However, when she meets the Duke for the first time and he kisses her, is it her identity that's compromised or her heart…   (Source: Tapas)

title: The Demon Queen Has a Death Wish
description: A listless Demon Queen falls in love with a human. After breaking a treaty and waging war against the demons, humanity suffered a crushing defeat. Civilization has been destroyed, and demons are now the ruling species. At the very top, above all others, is the Demon Queen. But the Demon Queen is tired. In fact, she only has one wish: to die!     (Source: Manta)

title: Myeonggeom
description: This is an era that belongs to the warriors. They are the law. Powerful and honorable, they decide life and death. Blood drawn by the swords are the melody of this era. In the midst of all this a lone boy, after the death of his grandfather, sets on journey to find his father who fights in the battlefield.

title: Placebo
description: "Let’s play…"    All Seo Woo-yeon wants is a simple university experience away from his intensely annoying step-brother, Woo-jin. So imagine his frustration when Woo-jin not only gets into the same university as Woo-yeon, but also follows him to the same major and even the same classes! Woo-yeon’s determined to make the world see how awful his brother truly is, but...well, his memory has been really spotty these days and, to top things off, Woo-jin seems to be acting even more smug than usual. Just what is going on in the times Woo-yeon can’t remember, and what does Woo-jin have to do with it?    "Playtime’s over."    (Source: Lezhin US)   Note: Includes ten extra chapters.

title: Lily of the Valley
description: Lily’s family chose to sacrifice her freedom, but the infamous Duke Blake has set a trap to ensnare her heart instead. Lily is sent to the duke’s estate like an innocent lamb for slaughter...although Lily’s love already belongs to a handmaid named Anna. At the estate, an uneasiness gnaws at her mind...is there anyone in the world who truly loves her back?  (Source: Tapas)   Note: Chapter count includes a prologue.

title: Health Dungeon
description: Humanity's greatest gym rat Hansol, lost consciousness during a deadlift. When he opened his eyes, he arrived at a different world. Monsters appeared in front of him, and all that he could see was protein...? "I'll flip this world by working out!"  (Source: Naver, translated)

title: 45 Cho
description: Siyeon, who returns home after studying abroad for college, finds out about the 'Understanding Wine' course that her younger sister has picked for her.  It's very popular because it's about tasting wine, but Siyeon is a lightweight that can't drink alcohol!  When she decides to correct the course and attended it, she is reunited with her high school friend Eunha... !?    (Source: Bomtoon, translated)

title: Akdang Daegongnimui Gwihadigwihan Yeodongsaeng
description: I became the sister of the villain, who shed no blood or tears in a war-ridden novel! I thought I was born again as the youngest daughter of a noble family, but I'm the little sister of a villain who's only being used!    A baby's body too fragile to survive in the Lagrange household, a brutal family that makes children fight for successors... I've decided to stick to the villain in order to live!    I need you to be my guardian until I run away from here. Raise me, villain!

title: The 10-Star Player's Lucky Draw
description: Casual gamers and skill gamers just aren’t meant to get along. But what if the extremes of both are forced to team up? When Junghoon dives into the world’s most mysterious new VR game, his craving for pure fun leads to a strange stroke of luck when his permanent patron spirit turns out to be Kang Jinho — a real-life hardcore gamer who’s stuck serving as an NPC! Are they doomed to annoy the hell out of each other? Or is there more to this game than either one could have ever found on their own?   (Source: Tapas)

title: The Crown's Shadow
description: After waking up to find himself in another world, he comes face to face with the prince of the kingdom, Daniel, who looks exactly like him. In return for saving his life, the prince asks him to play his stand-in, basically to become his 'shadow.' He accepts and with a new name and identity, Rael serves the prince by taking on any given tasks. But what will he do when he's asked to spend a night with the emperor of the realm...?  (Source: Tappytoon)

title: The Villainous Violet
description: Dahye always felt sorry for the villainess character Violet from the novel "For Shannon," who tragically pursues a one-sided love for Earhart, the hero. After waking up in Violet's body, Dahye sees her chance to ditch the story's love triangle and declares her feelings for Earhart are no more. Her next mission is to save Violet's childhood friend Haron from similar heartbreak by making sure he doesn't fall for the heroine, Princess Shannon. But now Earhart has suddenly confessed a renewed love for Violet, and the normally kind Shannon has become vindictive towards her. Can "Violet" and Haron find their own happily ever after, amidst all the unexpected drama and confusion? Based on the hit novel.    (Source: Tappytoon)

title: Love is an Illusion! - Superstar
description:
Byul, a popular alpha and a first-year high school student, once trained to be an idol but has since left that path to attend school like a regular kid. His world takes an unexpected turn with the sudden birth of a younger sibling, introducing new challenges to his daily routine. Byul's childhood friend, Siwoo, has secretly harbored feelings for him for years. However, both being alphas, Siwoo has kept his emotions hidden.

As the two navigate their growing closeness after a period of time apart, Byul faces adolescence head-on, grappling with friendships, family relationships, and his sense of identity. Along the way, he rediscovers his passion for music and begins to mature through these transformative experiences.

(Source: Lezhin)

title: Potion Witch
description: Vanna is an ordinary pharmacist who runs a small herb shop in Blalock City. Yet, when night falls, the mysterious “Witch Raven” emerges in this seemingly serene city, casting curses upon her targets before vanishing into the shroud of darkness. Consequently, Vanna often receives requests to make potions to lift the witch’s curse. However, her days are disrupted when a policeman approaches her, and the two ultimately form a partnership in the hopes of unveiling the truth behind “Triplet Academy.” Will the unlikely duo succeed in uncovering the mysteries of the Academy?    (Source: WEBTOON)    Note: Includes four extra chapters.

title: More Than Friends
description: A trio of friends had a special agreement. They'd all have fun together but just stay friends. After a hiatus, they meet up again to find that those feelings aren't just simply bottled up...   (Source: TOPTOON+)

title: Dog on Patrol
description: Follow Mr. H, a new security guard, in a luxury house as all of his sexual dreams come true  (Source: Toomics)

title: Neoui Aiga Aniya
description: Kalia is a war hero and commander that put an end to the past war. But one day, she finds out that she's... pregnant?! Of all people, the father of the baby is Simon Terroan, her best friend and archmage, whom she spent a single passionate night with.    Believing that Simon doesn't want the baby, Kalia hides the truth of her pregnancy, then retires from her job and disappears while Simon is away in order to have her baby. But the truth is that Simon has loved Kalia, more than anyone else. And so, the frantic search for her begins.    Note: This is a promotional one-shot for the web novel of the same name.

title: Fools Remaster
description: Eun-Gi has been in college without being engaged with others. One day by encounter, he finds the secret of underclassman Jeong-Woo. Why are you so nervous to forget? A love story that’s both easy and difficult.

title: The Duke's Teddy Bear
description: What if your soul could leave your body and possess people -- or even animals? Thanks to an incident in the past, that’s what happens to Marshall Lidiance every time she passes out or falls asleep. No one knows her little secret, but things become problematic for Marshall when she gets absorbed into a teddy bear owned by the icy-cold Duke Ludvillian! Will Marshall be able to figure out what caused the soul absorption while still keeping it a secret from everyone?    (Source: WEBTOONS)

title: In Between
description: Eun-Seo Lee and Si-Hwa Kang have been friends all their lives. One day, Eun-Seo shatters their comfortable relationship by asking Si-Hwa out, and Si-Hwa moves away soon afterward. Eun-Seo tries her best to forget him until they meet in a college class six years later. He seems to know about her unrequited love for him, and to make matters worse, he moves in with her family after running away from his hostile home environment. Can Eun-Seo cope with his sudden reappearance in her life? And is it possible that Si-Hwa loves her back?    (Source: WEBTOON, edited)

title: Stepping into Trouble
description: Eunsu is not happy that his mother’s new boyfriend has sons—a pair of twins at that. What was his mother thinking leaving out that important bit of information?! And when his mother tells him she might just marry the man, Eunsu is dead against it. But Eunsu’s trouble ensues when the twins are more than determined to win their new ‘hyung’ over and lend him a helping hand to change his mind. Will Eunsu give in and be bound to them in more-than-familial ties, or will he stay steadfast in his decision?    (Source: Lezhin US)    Note: Includes two side stories.

title: Rain Again
description: Recent grad Wujin has no job, no purpose, no one in his life…till he meets Jin. Suave and sulking, Jin has a tough past but a soft exterior. Now, as next-door neighbors, Wujin can’t hide his feelings but…is Jin just toying with him? In that hot, wet, summer, will love reign?    (Source: Tapas)

title: More Than You Think
description: What would you do if you caught your friend stealing your underwear...? Is that weird or is it just me? Somebody, please explain!  (Source: Toomics)

title: Between the Stars
description: Yun Byeol’s world is turned upside down when his brother, Hye-Seong, gets into an accident. But when Byeol visits him in the hospital, he’s surprised to find him in an expensive private room and learns that Hye-Seong received compensation for the incident. When he goes to confront Seong Un, the person who pushed his brother down the stairs, Byeol is met with another surprise: Un knows about a dark side of Hye-Seong that is hard to believe. What is their relationship, and why would Un push him?    (Source: Tapas)

title: It’s Just Business
description: “A love life? Give me a break.” A complete non-believer when it comes to romance, Eun-Ho is focused on climbing the ladder at work. Smart with excellent social skills to boot, both her bosses and clients love her. But when a new hire suddenly appears in front of her and an old first love start to shake things up again, she can’t help but waver.    (Source: WEBTOON, edited)

title: Hair-Raising Desires
description: Hong Dan-U, a man in his 20s with wild hair, has been avoiding hair salons for years due to a private secret – having his head touched tends to raise his "other head." However, when his boss asks him to tidy up his appearance, Dan-U can no longer avoid the salons. When he reluctantly steps into one, he encounters the strikingly attractive stylist, Tae-Han. As the man trims his unruly mop, Dan-U quickly gets turned on. And with his huge secret out, Dan-U finds both his hair and body tangled in quite a mess!    (Source: Tappytoon, edited)

title: Milking Girls in a Fantasy World
description: Seong-U quits his cafe job of five years to prepare for his public service exams but one day, he wakes up to an unfamiliar room. He soon finds out that he is in a world where drinking breast milk is ordinary. Then he stumbles across the chance to become the owner of a breast milk cafe!  (Source: DAYcomics)

title: Pureun Bulkkot
description: Mun Ga-Ya who suffered from childhood trauma. At the newly transferred school, he meets Cha Ae-Ri, the perfect model student and the beloved queen. Ga-Ya gradually falls in love with this dangerous and beautiful woman, and something inside that has been suppressed begins to awaken.     ‘Can we be free in this hell?’    (Source: Naver, translated)    Note: The chapter count includes an epilogue.

title: Marie Alex
description: "The negligence is not the fault of the master but of the servant".   Marie, who will be punished in place of the Lady Alex who has no head for studying! As the hem of her long skirt is lifted, her beautiful and porcelain legs are revealed, the whip slashing through the air leaves painfully red marks on Marie's thin legs.   Don't hit poor Marie. I should be the one to stop it. Huh? What? Something's strange? Why is my heart pounding?     (Source: Bomtoon, translated)

title: The Crown Prince's Fiancée
description: Palace maid Viola Vilvaura was in the wrong place at the wrong time when she overheard Crown Prince Adrian Aphensen's secret. It turns out his fiancée was really his bodyguard in disguise! Not only that, but the bodyguard has disappeared, leaving the prince with no one to marry! Now that she's learned this secret, the only way for Viola to save her neck is to take on the role of Etienne, the crown prince's fiancée, and become the new princess. But how long will they be able to keep up the act?  (Source: Tapas)

title: The Handmade Tales of the Handmaid
description: An 89-year-old grandma passes away and wakes up in a totally different world as Grana, a teenage maid at Viscount Winston’s estate. Grana’s kind soul and her natural talents for needlework and other crafts quickly win the hearts of the Winstons and the other maids. But in this world, her skills seem somehow related to magic! As Grana makes fast friends with the young heir to the viscountcy and explores her unexpected abilities, what could possibly await her?  (Source: Tapas)

title: Exit's That Way
description: Cha Hong just got her dream job, assistant director on the set of a real TV series! This show stars the nation’s top actress, Noh Seung-ah, so cool! But when the director’s relationship with Seung-ah reaches a boiling point, he recruits Hong to keep watch over her 24/7 so she doesn’t ruin his precious show! But this young diva is not interested in being told what to do. Plus, keeping an eye on her actually means…they have to live together?! Is trying to tame this wildcard going to drive her insane and make her run for the exits or will the experienced Hong have some of her own tricks up her sleeve...?    (Source: Lezhin US)

title: Tofu Shop Beauties
description: After being kicked out of his house, Ju-Yung finds a job by the beach making tofu. But the problem is… That the owner and her two daughters are just too hot! “Why am I getting hard making tofu?!”  (Source: TOPTOON+)

title: Manager, Please Be Punished
description: Tired of harassment from his female superior, JUN-HYUN decides to punish her by asking her out. The relationship started off as a prank, but things start to change as he realizes his hidden desires...  (Source: TOPTOON+)

title: Ganzi Monster
description: Eun-Ho Cha is, without a doubt, the biggest outcast at school. He spends his days avoiding bullies and daydreaming about his crush. He’d give anything to be popular, so when he discovers a face editing app called Icing, he spies an opportunity. With Icing’s help, Eun-Ho now looks like a superstar… or at least Ganzi Monster (GM), his online alter ego, does. But just when GM and his dance videos are starting to get popular, someone discovers his secret, and Eun-Ho’s days of being invisible are about to come to an end…    (Source: Tapas, edited)

title: Forbidden Fruit
description: Devout and gentle-hearted, Agatho firmly believes in the power of piety. When he met Noah six years ago, he instantly felt that leading the quiet boy towards religion would do him the world of good. His instincts were right—now, Noah has become an invaluable member of the church. While Agatho is proud of how Noah has changed, sometimes he does feel uncomfortable with the amount of trust the boy showers upon him. After all, the line between blind trust and dogged obsession is very, very thin...   (Source: Lezhin US)  Note: Includes three extra chapters.

title: Evangeline's Sword
description: How far are you willing to go for love?    Not a day goes by that Eve doesn't wish to reunite with her childhood friend, Mikha. But three years later, when she learns that Mikha has become a cursed sorcerer who leaves only death in his wake, Eve must embark on a journey to save not only the man she loves but also the world as she knows it.    (Source: Manta)

title: Return of the Genius Player
description: The Hunters League is a sport where only those with supernatural powers may compete, promising fame, glory, and incredible prizes. Changhyeon Lee had it all, but faces an abrupt downfall during his slump. Cast aside by even his own team, his world crumbles… but fate deals him an unexpected hand when a fatal encounter with a 10-ton truck ends his life, only to send him back in time to the day he discovered his powers. Armed with a second chance, Changhyeon is determined to reclaim and transcend his former glory in the Hunters League.   (Source: WEBTOONS)

title: The Painless Player
description:
Lee Lina, resident of the dystopian world Tolka, plays the VR dating sim Raison D’Etre with the pain setting at zero. After her 99th playthrough, she is gifted a new patch for completing all the endings. However, as she begins her 100th game, and her favorite characters start acting oddly affectionate to her in an unfamiliar storyline, Lina wonders if the reward is more of a glitch. Will Lina be able to unlock a new ending before shocking news back in Tolka makes it impossible to ignore reality?

(Source: Tapas)

title: Boss! I'm Taking Your Girl!
description: Junsoo's boss has entrusted him with his two daughters. But right now... I'm not sure if it was right to trust him with such things.  (Source: Toomics)

title: The Duchess Who Sees Ghosts
description: Blessed with the ability to see and communicate with ghosts, Lady Julia Robinharts is always trying to make a quick buck off of her talents. For this self-employed entrepreneur, there is always money to be made in the industry of the supernatural. When Julia sells one of her talismans to a stranger who seemed to be weighed down by an apparition, she learns that kindness isn’t always repaid in coins, as the mysterious man asks to marry her in return. This man is actually Duke Leo Sirius Epesia, one of the most influential noblemen in the Floren Kingdom, and he seems to recognize her from 10 years ago. In the end, Julia is swayed into working as the duke’s personal ghostbuster, in exchange for a handsome reward. After all, what good is a loveless marriage compared to cold, hard cash?  (Source: TappyToon)

title: From Today On, I'm a Boy
description: "If nobody notices that you are a girl until we graduate, I will give you a billion won."   "I'm in."    The bet was on. Will Shiru be able to hide her identity until she graduates?!    (Source: Webnovel)

title: She's the one
description: He met a beauty on the beach and had a passionate night with her. But it turns out that she was actually his friend's mom! A tale of deception, mystery, and shocking truth. What is really going on? Is anyone who they actually claim to be?  (Source: DAYcomics)

title: In the Doghouse
description: The Devon family sits on a mountain of debt and they are on the brink of bankruptcy. This is no fault of hers of course, but Courtney Devon has always been the one painted as the villain in her family. However, the family is in dire straits and they have to do something, anything, to raise some money and get out of this situation. But then one day, news arrives from the Imperial Palace that His Royal Highness the crown prince has decided to make Courtney the crown princess. Seemingly a typical prince on the outside, His Royal Highness is actually quite a troublemaker with a dark side. Will this arrangement end up solving Courtney Devon’s problems or just complicating things further? Will a love against all odds bloom or will someone end up in the doghouse...?  (Source: Lezhin US)

title: The Emperor's Mask
description: Is blacking out always this scary? Imagine blacking out and waking up in a different world! A teacher finds herself in the body of lady Lucia, a woman who committed suicide. While trying to understand what happened, she realizes Lucia was actually murdered. Why does the emperor hide behind a mask? And what really happened to Lucia...?  </br> (Source: Copin Comics)

title: Feeding the Lives of Failing Idols
description: Im Hyeon-Seong was a famous chef and restaurateur until he met his untimely death at the hands of his family. In his final moments, he is given the chance to get revenge, but only if he completes a special quest: save the failing idol group Climax as its leader, Cheon I-Se! Equipped with Hyeon-Seong’s entrepreneurial and cooking skills, will I-Se pull the group together and help Climax rise to the top for a successful comeback? Or will the group–and his new life–be on the chopping block?    (Source: Tapas, edited)

title: A Marriage Alliance for Revenge
description: Empress Olivia knows happiness is the last thing she deserves, but when she finally becomes pregnant with the emperor’s child, she thinks things might finally be taking a turn for the better. Alas, Olivia realizes how naive she was when her husband poisons her tea, killing both her and their unborn child. When Olivia opens her eyes again in the body of an unknown woman in the slums, she vows to take vengeance against the emperor. To do so, she forms a marriage alliance with her former fiancé, Duke Lucas Viterpan, the true heir to the empire who was deposed in a coup. Will this man and woman who had everything taken from them succeed in getting revenge?    (Source: Tappytoon)

title: Peak
description: 21-year-old Ryu Yeon-seong is about to start his mandatory military service in the ROK Army. But unlike most other conscripts, he and four others are assigned to the mountain police rescue unit stationed at Mt. Bukhan, a small mountain on the outskirts of Seoul. Not knowing much about it, they think it'll be a walk in the park, and count themselves lucky to have landed such a cushy assignment. But when they arrive at the mountain, the group soon learn that they're in for more than they bargained for

title: Arcana Fantasy
description: A new mobile game called Arcana Fantasy is all the rage across the globe. But here’s the game’s big secret: once a player decides to join the game, they’re unwittingly transported into a virtual world and trapped there until somebody beats the boss to clear the game. Yoon started the game to find his missing father, but now he’s in much more trouble than he bargained for. Will Yoon and his companions be able to find his father and escape from the blurred reality of this virtual imprisonment?   (Source: Lezhin X)   Note: Winner of the Excellence Award in Lezhin's 4th World Comic Competition.

title: Island
description: “I’ll offer you 50 million won for every demon you hunt down.”     Jeju Island is swarming with demons out for human blood. When Won Mi-Ho, heiress of Daehan Group, finds herself at the mercy of one of these evil demons, she strikes a deal with serial killer, Van, to ensure her survival.    (Source: WEBTOON, edited)    Note: Won the Grand Prize of Exported Korean Comics Awards in 1999.    Island was originally serialized in Daewon C.I.'s Young Champ magazine from 1997-2001 and released in 7 volumes. In 2016, the series was re-released on Naver Webtoon.

title: Reborn as the Protagonists' Daughter
description: Emeliette is determined to have a loving family in her second life, but that's much easier said than done when her mother has passed away and her father, Duke Cardin vel Vardion, is cold and absent. So when the duke finally comes back into her lonely life, Emeliette gives her all to win his heart with her cuteness. As she grows closer to her father, she begins to realize her parents' legacy is greater than she ever imagined and that she herself may be a girl worthy of her own story.   (Source: Tapas)

title: On the Emperor's Lap
description: A heartbreaking, fantasy romance of the two wounded souls finding their way back to each other again. "He abandoned me as a child, and I lost my voice. When I was reunited with him I was already broken."     Little Bella, a war orphan who once trusted for survival; grows up carrying an abandonment wound. It’s a life without purpose, she’s the unseen, unheard, and a war slave. Kiris embraces Bella, a girl he once abandoned, now has been forgotten. Maybe it is too late when he’d found...  (Source: Netcomics)

title: Psychopath in Murim
description: [Welcome to Murim Online, the world where the strongest reside.]   [Your device has malfunctioned, and logging out failed.]   [Would you like to attempt to disconnect once more?]   [Yes or No]   When he tried returning to virtual reality, the place he logged into was instead the “real Murim.” A once-in-an-era psychopath fell into the Murim due to the Grim Reaper’s mistake. Dong Bongsu's merciless fangs cast a shadow over Murim, which is rife with schemes and malice.  (Source: Naver, translated)

title: A Simple Guide To Surviving as a Stepmom
description: When a girl abused by her father wakes up in a novel as Luella Masimelle, the cruel stepmother of the protagonist Hirah, she is determined to make things different. To do this, she proposes a contractual marriage to Duke Huppert to make him Hirah's guardian, but the duke surprisingly seems genuinely interested in her. And with the once timid Hirah also starting to open up and show affection to her, Luella begins to wonder if she'll finally have a happy family... Or is it all too good to be true?    (Source: Tapas)

title: The Admiral's Monstrous Wife
description: They call her a monster… but to this admiral, she’s a sacred descendant of the sea! Rudia Flang has been mistreated her whole life, so when the emperor arranges her marriage to Alexander Cilia, war hero and the youngest admiral in history, she cowers in fear at the thought of marrying a violent seaman. As this ocean voyage treks on, she’s met with benevolence from the Sercilian Island people who, unbeknownst to her, find the scales glistening on her body far from the marking of a monster...    (Source: Tapas)

title: The Fistfighting Genius Mage
description: Zed, a former MMA champion, wakes up in the body of a scrawny prisoner in a fantasy world. Reborn as a member of the once-feared Arahan family, he’s trapped inside a brutal magical internment camp. With no spells at his disposal, Zed trains his body to become a living weapon. He escapes the prison with his only ally Riu, a sharp-witted inmate. Now hunted by both a ruthless warden and a noble house, Zed must fight his way to freedom only with his fists. Can a man with no magic change the rules of a world built on it?  (Source: WEBTOON)

title: Hidden Teukseong 13-gae Deulgo Sijakanda
description: In a world where the line between a game and reality has blurred, a man starts off with thirteen hidden traits.  (Source: Naver, translated)

title: Let Me Die in Peace!
description: By the time Princess Ophelia Lidania's fourth death rolls around, she's gotten pretty sick of dying painfully. However, she seems unable to avoid her fate of being killed by her half-brother Ewout Lidania. She's tried being nice to him, locking him up, and having him killed, but it always ends the same way. So, her goal for her fifth life is to just die painlessly. To this end, she hires the elite assassin Nau to stay by her side. But will this be enough to overturn her fate and bring her peace?    (Source: Tapas)    Note: Includes four extra chapters.

title: Summertime
description: Yeo Eunho and Cha Dohyeon have been friends all their lives. After 19 years, Eunho seems to have a good grasp on Dohyeon, even knowing that his “perfect” image at school is a façade. But what Eunho is absolutely oblivious to is the fact that Dohyeon has had an obsessive crush on him for years. Though Dohyeon has been able to keep it a secret in order to slowly ease his way into Eunho’s heart, the sudden arrival of a new student named Kwon Yihyeon throws a wrench into his plans. What will Dohyeon do to keep Eunho by his side? And will Eunho ever realize his best friend’s feelings for him?    (Source: Tappytoon)

title: Sweet Dream
description: Jae-Hee has a terrible history with dating in the office, so she intentionally remains single to focus on her work. But things get complicated when she starts having risqué dreams about her boss, Mr. Seo, and nothing she does can quell the intoxicating fantasies.     While trying to balance work and these impure thoughts, Jae-Hee happens upon a mysterious old woman that swears a cheap-looking bracelet will protect her from the incubus haunting her dreams. But if what she says is true, then is Mr. Seo really a lustful incubus? It would explain why Jae-Hee can’t control her physical urges around him. Are these symptoms a reflection of her inner desires or is she simply under her boss’s spell?     (Source: Tappytoon)     Note: Chapter count includes a prologue.

title: My Girlfriend is My Stepmother
description: When your dad brings home a significantly younger woman to introduce her as your new stepmother, it’s pretty normal to disapprove of the whole deal. And it’s pretty standard to hate this new woman invading your household. That’s exactly what Sung-Hoon plans to do when he meets Yeoni, his dad’s girlfriend, but…he really wasn’t counting on how hot she is, or how determined she is to befriend him. What do you do when your relationship with your sexy stepmom-to-be gets increasingly steamier? Time to come…and find out!    (Source: Lezhin X, edited)

title: Alpha Trauma
description: Woo-Yeon never liked Alphas, not before, and definitely not after he manifested as an Omega. The only person who ever made him feel seen was his tutor, Do-Hyun. Years later, Woo-Yeon follows him to university, hoping for a fresh start. But when they meet again, Do-Hyun doesn't recognize him. Woo-Yeon, however, never forgot—not his voice, his kindness, or the way Do-Hyun still makes his heart flutter. Then he learns the truth. Do-Hyun is an Alpha...  (Source: Tapas)

title: The Heroine Is a Man!
description: After what seemed like ages of waiting for the story to begin, Ainéis finally meets Tego Literuon, the main character of the fantasy novel she woke up in eight years ago. The only issue? Due to the novel's description, she thinks that Tego is secretly a woman in disguise! Things get even more complicated as Ainéis' efforts to help move the plot along end up making Tego fall for her. But can Ainéis' feelings about him change after assuming he was a woman all this time?    (Source:Tapas)

title: Taming the Corrupted
description: Arlenne Serkia is granted the chance to go back in time and devises a plan to ruin the man who stabbed her heart. The key to her scheme is the slave Kasadin, renowned for his unmatched swordsmanship and stunning beauty, whom she adopts as her "younger brother" to use as both her sword and shield. But Kasadin has a past much deeper and more dangerous than she realizes... and this drives his own motives for staying close to her, both personal and political. If Arlenne isn't careful, the user might end up being used!    (Source: Tappytoon)

title: Save the Dae
description: Won Dae has been teased for his name ever since childhood, so he has learned not to expect niceties from those around him. The bullying got so bad, Dae had to drop out of school to recover. So when he’s due to return, his best (and only) friend Choi Yeonhoo would do anything to help him actually enjoy it. But when Won Dae meets Goo Yoonwon, things are about to go from bad, to worse, to…surprisingly good, then worse again. Who will be there at the end of the day to save our Dae?!    (Source: Lezhin US)

title: The Rogue Prince Is Secretly an Omega
description: Prince Etienne de Frederick was born a dominant omega, but in a world where omegas can’t become the emperor, he must pretend to be a beta due to the empress’s greed. When his childhood friend, Grand Duke Rishar von Eckhart, returns after three years as a war hero, there’s no time to share a happy reunion as Rishar is a dominant alpha and his rival in the fight for the throne. The two continue to maintain a precarious relationship until, one day, Etienne has a sudden heat cycle, and Rishar finds out the truth. “Etienne de Frederick. You were... an omega?”    (Source: Tappytoon)    Note: Season 1 is R15 while Season 2 is R19.

title: Dating After Work
description: Adam's fake relationship with his boss was supposed to be mutually beneficial, so why is he so stressed out?  (Source: Toomics)

title: Bane of My Existence
description: Rabby Johnson’s sure got it all. (At least, he thinks he does.) He’s the best bounty hunter in all of the universe, he has great friends, he’s got it going on. Just one thing: he’s been saving up his ass for the perfect gentleman of his dreams. But it’s a disaster in hell when he drunkenly loses his virginity to this mysterious hunk… who turns out to be a real pain in the ass. Rabby was waiting for the one, but he sure wasn’t ready for this jerk who turns his life inside out…    (Source: Lezhin US)

title: The Insatiable Man
description: After food critic Jiho’s first meeting with novelist Inwoo ends in disappointment, he vows never to work with him. That is until Inwoo offers to buy him dinner. It’s then that he learns that Inwoo is unable to experience one of life’s basic joys – taste – and needs someone to describe flavors to him for his next novel. The more they meet, the more Jiho finds himself being drawn to Inwoo... but why? Is it because he too harbors a secret of his own?    (Source: Tapas)    Note: Chapter count includes 10 side story chapters.

title: Momentum
description: "Momentum" is a series of beautifully drawn vignettes that glimpse into the life-altering moments of several couples as they fall in and out of love. This BL features a series of characters learning how to love, understand, and forgive one another – and in some cases, the world – at different moments in their lives.    (Source: Lezhin)

title: The Hand That Once Fed
description: The widowed Evelyn Winter is the master of her home until Colonel Gilath Black, her scorned ex-lover and former servant, darkens her doorstep with accusations of treason. As Evelyn fights to maintain her rightful place as the duchess, Gilath, her once faithful and timid dog, lurks at every corner like a bloodthirsty wolf ready to pounce. But are Gilath’s actions driven by revenge or lust? Does the colonel seek to rekindle their old love or to ensure Evelyn’s life goes up in flames?    (Source: Tapas)

title: My Aunt in Puberty
description: While enjoying a very private moment with porn starring an actress that looks like his stepmom, he ends up cumming on his aunt's face. Living with two beautiful girls isn't all good!   "I'm going to lose control at this rate!"  (Source: TOPTOON+)

title: Crush of the Decade
description: Yuna has kept a secret for ten whole years: she has a crush on her best friend, Da-hye. It’s a secret she intends to keep for the rest of her life, but the new year brings a lot of surprises: including a strange new woman named Zoey, who just might change everything. Caught between two women, Yuna’s one-sided crush just might die down…or turn into something else entirely. After a whole decade of pining, is it time for Yuna to finally find her happy ending? And if so, who will be the one to ultimately grant it to her?  (Source: Lezhin US)   Note: Includes one extra chapter.

title: Neoege Hago Sipeun Mal
description: After losing everything in an instant, a glint of hope amidst the deep despair presents her with a new life.

title: Terror dae Buhwal
description: The terror man and the revival man finally meet. "Destruction is the beginning of resurrection". The whole world is in danger with the birth of a new evil. Min Jeong-U has the ability to see misfortune and Seok-Hwan has the ability to come back to life. The two heroes made different choices... Who will be the final winner?      Han Dong-U's and Ko Jin-Ho's first crossover work!     (Source: Naver, translated)    Note: The chapter count includes a prologue and epilogue.

title: Perfect Mine
description: A twisted school romance of someone who can "truly be mine" and love me to death.   (Source: Daum Webtoon, translated)

title: Miwoon Nosae Iyagi
description: "This is her daughter?"    Tara, the illegitimate daughter of the noble Queen Adelaide, was thrown away as a baby and raised by poor relatives. They sent her to a notorious mage in the west named Judas, whom she had never met before.    While she is overwhelmed by her so-called guardian's impossible beauty, he and the others in the castle treat her warily, hateful of the queen. However, the girl's lovable innocence and pitiful nature begin to melt the immortal magician's frozen heart...    “Stop acting cute. You’re like a vixen.”   “Why do you keep calling me a vixen?”   "I don't care if that child is broken. To me, life and destruction are one and the same."    A healing romance blooms between an obsessive and frigid 'guardian' that only shows kindness to one girl, and a little 'miss' scarred by her past.

title: Resume
description: An ability to make a debt of "1 million" overnight brings new meaning to his boring life.   "Please... Let me pay the debt with my body..."   (Source: TOPTOON+)

title: Only With Consent
description: A newlywed couple goes on a honeymoon and runs into another couple. Things take a strange turn as they play a drinking game...  (Source: TOPTOON+)

title: Ghost Dating Simulation
description: Struggling streamer Do-Yeon Choi downloads a mysterious dating sim game, Heart-Racing Ghost Dating Sim, only to find himself trapped in a deadly loop-- where the love interests are real-life ghosts with unresolved deaths. From haunted highways to murder cases, Do-Yeon must navigate a world where romance, horror, and mystery collide. Every wrong move could cost him his life...again.  (Source: WEBTOON)

title: Sistervention
description: Her favorite character's fate is in her hands.    A woman's dream comes true when she transmigrates into the body of Rachel Agnes, sister of Liz Agnes — her favorite story villain. Her mission? Ensure that Liz goes down a better path. Yet, things become more complicated than expected, especially when a notorious archduke is thrown into the mix...    (Source: Manta)

title: Catching Up to Luke Vischel
description: With wealth, status, and incredibly good looks, the only thing Bastian Effenberg is missing is a decent personality. But who needs one of those when the queen is your cousin and the whole world bows at your feet? Of course, even a noble pain in everyone's side needs to be disciplined once in a while. And that's what Bastian's parents thought they were doing when they threatened to marry him off to Luke Vischel, the ferocious knight of everyone's nightmares. Luke may have been the only person Bastian ever feared, but that is precisely how she captured his heart. Now, Bastian is determined to conquer the woman who once sent chills up his spine, but is he any match for her? This pompous heir is certainly a force to be reckoned with, but if anyone can tame him, it's her.    (Source: Tappytoon)

title: Kinks in Development
description: Jae-Won is reunited with his old classmate during a taekwondo lesson. But Jeong-Uk is no longer the timid dork from school. Instead, he’s a fully-grown hunk who’s huge in more ways than one!     It’s clear to Jae-Won that there’s animosity between them, but why? And how come he can't recall if they were friends or enemies? It’s all so hazy!     After class, a fall in the shower causes Jae-Won’s lost memories to begin trickling back to him. And the question, “Did I do something wrong?” sets the two old classmates off on a steamy journey to recover Jae-Won's forgotten past…    (Source: Lezhin US, edited)

title: Her Nickname is…
description: Ever wonder what having sex with a werewolf would be like? How about a vampire? Well, Hyunee and Mina are two normal girls, but when things get hot and heavy they’re not afraid to let their animalistic sides come out! Driving their boyfriends crazy, there’s always another sex romp around the corner. Come along for the ride, where in each episode, you can see a different “monstrous” side of these hot girls and really see what “Her Nickname is…”!    (Source: Lezhin X)

title: The Genius Wants an Ordinary Life
genres: Adventure, Drama, Fantasy, Slice of Life
description: A man who has everything and yet nothing. The only thing successful corporate executive Jin-Hyeok Son ever really wanted was an ordinary life with a beloved family, a desire arising from the tragic death of his parents when he was a child. This all changes after he finds himself back in his nine-year-old body after an accident -- to a time when his parents are still alive, to the very life he had longed to return to! Can Jin-Hyeok change the past and finally fulfill his dream of an ordinary life?  (Source: WEBTOONS)

title: Please Stop the Pope
description: While livestreaming about his struggles, Si-Woo receives a donation with a strange request. He agrees, only to discover it came from Limen, the goddess of Eden, who has suddenly tasked him with defending her world from seven demon rulers. Ten years later, Si-Woo returns to Earth as the pope of Eden, only to find it overrun by monsters. The demon rulers show signs of reappearing, and to maintain his divine power, he must spread Limen’s faith across Earth. Can Pope Si-Woo complete his holy mission?  (Source: Tapas)

title: The Annoying Older Girl Next Door
genres: Comedy, Drama, Hentai, Romance, Slice of Life
description: Back when I was sick and my friends didn't want to play with me, Eun-Seol was the kind older girl who always took care of me and kept me company. The problem is, even now that I'm an adult, she still clings to me and treats me like a little kid. Because of her, even in college, I ended up with the nickname "Baby" and became a complete loner. Now, I have to make her see me as a man if I ever want to stop being treated like a child.  (Source: DAYcomics)   Note: Chapter count includes an epilogue.

title: The Double Agent
description: As a child, Sasha Laurent lost her parents overnight when the Dochen Republic invaded and burned her hometown, Neroi. Fleeing across the border, she lived off the streets until rescued by General Gerard of the Allied Forces. A decade later, when he asks her to infiltrate Dochen as a secret agent, she has no choice but to comply, but soon finds herself a prisoner at the mercy of Major General Johann von Willendorf. Sasha’s unhealthy obsession with Johann veers dangerously close to love, but will her feelings change when he makes her a double agent?   (Source: WEBTOONS)   Note: Chapter count includes 3 side stories.

title: Kindergarten Driver's Dirty Secrets
description: U-Jin is the only man working in the kindergarten. While working as a driver, he learns about the special power of the mysterious app.    "I can control both teachers and parents with this? Things are going to get fun around here."    (Source: DAYcomics, edited)

title: Lustful Games
description: A university student, a model, a hacker, an auto repair apprentice…the list goes on, and these seemingly unrelated people have one thing in common. They are all from the same graduating class. One day, these 32 former classmates receive a suspicious text message from an anonymous sender. They’re promised $10,000 if they attend a class reunion held on an abandoned island. No one knows who sent the message or why, but they all participate. Some for fun, some for money, and some for the mystery. What will be awaiting them on the island?  (Source: Lezhin X)

title: Ileum-eul Allyeojuseyo
description: A stern student volunteer responsible for attendance and adherence to school rules is kissed on the forehead by a mysterious delinquent! Despite repeat violations, he has yet to learn the delinquent's name.

title: So You're Raising a Warrior
description: All Ell wants is for a warrior to come along and kill him so he can finally achieve a comfortable life after death. Just when it looks like he might get his wish, he accidentally kills the warrior who came to end his life. But Ell soon comes up with a different plan: if there are no warriors to kill him, he can raise one himself! So Ell the dragon, Lafi the magician, and Dino the baby warrior become an unconventional family. However, Ell soon discovers it’s harder than he thought to teach a baby combat moves!    (Source: WEBTOONS)

title: Midnight Men
description: Jeong-Hae has always wanted to live an ordinary life. But it’s hard to pay the bills when you’re deep in debt and barely scraping by working an honest, average job. One day, Jeong-Hae discovers that his brother is bringing in big bucks and suspects something dirty is going on, so he tails his brother…to a strip club full of male strippers?! When Jeong-Hae storms in to drag his brother out of the changing room, he has no idea that he’s about to get a hell of a new job that’s far from ordinary…and that the club’s charismatic number one stripper, Yu-Gon, is going to change his life.  (Source: Lezhin US)

title: Wonjogyoje Anindeyo?
description: Jungwoo gets misunderstood because he looks older than his age despite being 20 years old while Youngmin looks like a highschooler despite being a university student.

title: My Dear Aster
description: Lehanne Copland led an ordinary life as a wife and a mother before a carriage accident cut her life short. In the next moment, she finds herself in the extraordinary situation of being 19 once more! Ecstatic at this second chance but reluctant to let go of her old life, Lehanne decides to do just one thing differently: confess to Schudermel Laft, her first love. But when she succeeds in asking him to be her partner for a party, Lehanne discovers he is not quite like what she had imagined...    (Source: Tapas)

title: Profundis
description: 13 years ago, Baek Yugeon and his brother were the sole survivors of a mysterious anomaly attack, leaving them “awakened.” While his brother obtained supernatural powers, Yugeon became a “guide,” a being who is able to keep such powers under control through physical touch. When the same anomaly appears again, Yugeon’s brother is left in critical condition with the only one who can save him being Woo Shinje, an S-class awakened and the commander of the hunting order, Erewhon. In exchange, Yugeon must serve as the guide to Shinje’s team, which consists of the withdrawn Joo Taein, the beastly Yoon Chan, and the sadistic Kwon Heesu. Though Shinje seems like the nicest on the team, he might prove to be the most dangerous when he states another condition: Yugeon must follow him into the pit where the very anomaly responsible for all his tragedies awaits…    This comic contains graphic depictions of violence and suggestions of self-harm. Reader discretion is advised.    (Source: Tappytoon)

title: Fiery Enemies
description: On her deathbed, a beloved grandma leaves behind a terrifying last wish: for her granddaughter to reunite with the horrible, no-good ex-husband that didn’t last even one year! Garyung instead vows to live alone forever, even if that means giving up her entire inheritance. But when a disastrous fire threatens to rob Garyung of her hard-earned fashion empire, she is forced to come to terms with the money, and the man, at stake. Where there is hate, is there also... love?    (Source: Tappytoon)

title: Half of Me
description: A car accident leaves both Taekin, a high school outcast, and Heechan, a business owner, in the hospital. But Heechan has no time to sit around and enjoy his hospital bed. If he doesn’t get up and make sure his clients get their products, his business will be in jeopardy! There’s just one problem. After the accident, he now inhabits the body of this high school kid every day from 7 a.m. to 7 p.m. Talk about an out of body experience! Heechan decides that the way to fix things is to go to Taekin’s high school in the boy’s body and sort things out himself! While looking for the source of their transformation, Heechan sees a familiar face from his own past. But who is going to believe this ridiculous scenario and help him out? Just how is Heechan going to get his body back?!    (Source: Lezhin US)

title: Howling Under the Moonlight
description: Yoon works at an animal hospital. Eun-Woo comes every so often to the vet to get treated which gets on Yoon's nerves. In order to treat Eun-Woo's wounds, Yoon takes off his mask and is absolutely captivated by his good looks.  (Source: Lezhin US)

title: Eat Before You Go
description: After 30 years in the other world and defeating the demon lord, Cheolho Kang finally returns to Earth-- only to find it overrun with monsters and hunters. Tired of endless battles, he opens a small restaurant and wishes to live in peace. With dishes to make and a baby dragon to raise, a heartwarming tale where every visitor brings a story is set to begin.  (Source: WEBTOON)

title: A Handsome Swordsman
description: Moosung is an inn server with a huge crush on Soyeon, a beautiful woman from an influential family. Unfortunately, she’s only willing to marry… a very handsome swordsman. Now Moosung’s life mission is to become the best (and most handsome) martial artist in the world and win over Soyeon’s heart. So he starts training hard, but it’s not until he reads a book of secret martial arts skills that his true potential is magically unlocked. Can Moosung become a great martial artist, or will someone else swoop in and steal the love of his life?    (Source: Tapas)

title: Nice to Meet You
description: Same place, different time — A time slip romance!   “What does it matter if we have a 70-year age difference?” Jinha, an office worker who is traumatized from the bullying in her past, receives a mysterious message from the future... A time slip story of fantasy and romance transcending time and space.  (Source: Manta)

title: Trust Me, Little Duke!
description: After a tragic life spent in the shadow of her superior Duke Senoc Blacknight, the powerful Dame Aspyn Soir is sent back in time and given a lucky second chance at life. She's thrilled, at least until she runs into the very same Senoc! However, this frightened boy is very different from the cool, composed sword master Aspyn knew. Even though Senoc nearly killed her, she can't help taking pity on his younger self. If nobody stops her, Aspyn just might end up helping out her greatest enemy.    (Source: Tapas)

title: The Meaning of You
description: Da-Yeon is… tired. She’s so tired that she’s been transported to a new world and she’s still too tired to do anything. But most of all, she’s tired of Emperor Mikhail’s near-constant attention! He’s just so perfect… always concerned about her well-being and shielding her from the church’s attempts to label her some kind of saint. And he keeps finding reasons to brush her hair behind her ear or stare dreamily into her eyes. How’s a girl supposed to sleep through all this endearingly loving attention?!     (Source: Tapas)

title: Lick Me, Like Me
description: Jooin is a young vet that charms pets and owners alike at his animal clinic. When a puppy and kitten are dumped at his door, he decides to raise them as his own. With love and care the furballs quickly become full-grown ‒perhaps a bit too much as they’re now two… hunky humans?! When your pets are this eager, it takes being a ‘pet lover’ to a whole new level!     (Source: TappyToon)

title: Kiss Wood
description: After losing his job as a city gardener, the main character only seems to  care about one thing, his home garden full of rare plants.  But when a mysterious man burns down his garden and home, the protagonist barely manages to escape alive.  When he wakes up in the hospital, he learns he has lost his eyesight.  With nothing left, the man just lies in the hospital bed with seemingly no hope left, until the sudden regaining of his eyesight causes him to realise he has been transported to a strange new world covered in a mystical forest.

title: Before Death Do Us Part
description: The Yang and Kim families were once rival gangs with construction company fronts that spilled blood over a smidgen of gold. But a new company has entered the picture, and now both their stakes are at risk. Reluctantly, they form an alliance… sealed with an arranged marriage between their children, Hyejin and Moogahng! However, Hyejin’s past traumas keep her heart guarded, and Moogahng shrouds himself in mystery. It doesn’t seem like any amount of blood, tears, or gold will make their marriage better. But can love make this troubled pair work?     (Source: Tapas)

title: I Raided the Demon God's Treasure Trove
description: The peace of the world collapses after a war between the gods and demons, leading to the downfall of humanity—except for one person. Sewoon, the sole survivor, is determined to rewrite the ending of this tragic tale. While searching for Kronos' hourglass to reverse time, he discovers the treasure trove of the Demon of Greed, filled with items that can aid him in achieving his goal. With these demonic treasures at his disposal, can Sewoon stop the war and secure lasting peace in the world?  (Source: Tapas)

title: Cupid in the Rainbow Trap
description: In the office, Taejoon reigns supreme as the "Cupid of Sales," renowned for successfully pairing colleagues thanks to his ability to see the color of people's auras. Unfortunately, he himself has been single his entire life. But everything changes when he drunkenly kisses the new recruit, Hongyeon, which leads to a sizzling night at a motel. And then Taejoon discovers something fascinating—Hongyeon's aura is a mesmerizing rainbow! As Hongyeon boldly pursues him, Taejoon's shyness clashes with their steamy connection. Now they must navigate a somewhat clumsy and spicy office romance, where colors will fly in more ways than one!    (Source: Tappytoon)  Note: Includes 2 side stories and 2 special chapters.

title: Trigger
description: Nam Ji-il, an ordinary student who entered Daemyung High School, famous for being bad. From the first day of admission, he became the target of ILJIN and became a bread shuttle known to all students.    A weak body with chronic heart disease, assaulted and bullied by ILJIN, and the painful days are repeated.

title: Moon You
description: After an asteroid destroys Earth, Moon You unintentionally becomes the last person in existence, or so he thinks. Stuck on a research facility on the moon, he struggles with being the last person alive. Little does he know that humankind is watching his every move from Earth.   (Source: WEBTOONS)

title: The Legendary Fossil
description: This story begins like any other, with a tragic death and reawakening in a new world. Kang Yerin, after being hit by a truck, wakes up as Ashley Lute, the 2nd daughter of a noble household. Without the burden of being the firstborn or the need to earn a living, “Ashley” expected to live worry-free. But, what should’ve been a cushy life in high society, soon turns into one life-threatening hassle after another. Pulled in every direction, she is forced to go on a quest to defeat the Demon King, forced to keep her heroic quest a secret, and forced to re-enroll at the academy she left behind years ago, making her a downright “fossil” compared to her peers. Trapped under her murderous older sister’s thumb and stuck between a sibling rivalry over the crown, Ashley can never seem to catch a break. In a twisted irony, how hard will Ashley Lute have to work to be able to live the easy life she’s always wanted?  (Source: WEBTOONS, edited)

title: Bom's Espresso
description: Coffee-loving Yoon Bom-Sol has been struggling ever since her beloved business, Cafe Bom, went under. When she lands a job as assistant to Jake K., an arrogant but sought-after barista, she has no idea that he is really Kim Jae-Hee, a customer of hers who proposed to her almost a decade ago. Reunited once again in the world of coffee, will Bom-Sol see Jaehee for the man he’s trying to be? Or will this second encounter be a “latte” to handle?    (Source: Tapas, edited)

title: Garden of Silence
description: From losing her family to being mistreated by her in-laws and executed for crimes they forced her to commit, life was cruel to Guinevere Le Pur… Pitied by fate, Guinevere is given the chance to go back in time and learns that she was cheated out of her husband’s bequeathed wealth. Now, she’s determined to take back her stolen fortune and make sure her tormentors get absolutely nothing. But will Guinevere get her revenge, or will she walk down the fiery path of misery once again?   (Source: Tapas)

title: Pervert Club
description: A thrilling yet flirtatious relationship between the perverted girl Lee-ni, who gets excited from the wicked stares of men, and Du-jun, who is insensitive to sexual stimulus due to his father, who is an AV director, has begun! While showing off her cleavage and exposing her underwear, Lee-ni’s pride is hurt when Du-jun isn’t aroused even after seeing her bare form. The end result becomes an approach through all sorts of perverted acts in an effort to encapsulate him… What will the seduction of a pervert end up tasting like?    Note: The series has been cancelled due to the manhwaga's sexual harassment towards a female colleague.

title: Ragnarök
description: The winds of fate are blowing through the realm of Midgard. Ragnarok, the prophesized fall of the gods, is at hand, and the age of Man is set to begin. But the ancient gods are not about to resign themselves to fate. They have sent their elite warriors, the Valkyries, to scour the land for those destined to bring about Ragnarok. If the event can be prevented, the reign of the gods will continue for another 1000 years.   Fenris Fenrir knows Ragnarok must happen. She is on a desperate search to find the reincarnation of Balder, the fallen god, with whose help she can change the world. But if the Valkyries find him first, Fenris's quest may be over before it even begins.    (Source: Tokyopop)

title: How to Satisfy the Devil
description: Did our runt Vanessa Blake encounter another god because yours abandoned you? May we, the lord of evil Belzebuth, tell you something interesting? Most humans seek your god when they end up meeting us. They seem to think their lord will save them and seeing their desperation never fails to make us laugh. That is because their god is just our other half. You may see your many reincarnations as a sign of your god’s disdain, but we feel you are beloved. Thus, we shall give you whatever you desire.  (Source: Tapas)

title: No Office Romance!
description: Are first loves overrated, or can a reunion as adults bring back emotions of the past? Yun-Ji and Sae-Bom share a first love story left unfinished, abruptly interrupted by ten years of being apart. Now, as adults, both seem to have moved on from that unfinished chapter of their lives and agree to remain friends and coworkers. However, the surface is not everything there is to be seen, as an unspoken tension lingers between them. Will they merely stay friends, or does destiny have other plans for them?    (Source: WEBTOON, edited)

title: My Universe
description: As a socially awkward college student, Hayeon lives a pretty boring life -- except she can communicate with outer space. One day, she meets Ujun, an alien who is curious about human nature. When she rejects his request to “borrow” her body, he takes over the body of her crush! As Hayeon helps Ujun adjust to human life, their friendship blossoms into something more. However, their love story faces many obstacles, including an alien plotting to invade Earth. What will be the fate of these star-crossed lovers?    (Source: WEBTOON)

title: Sweet X Trouble
description: I couldn't kill my target because he's too cute, so I became his girlfriend instead.

title: Phantom Whispers
description: Noa has struggled with hearing unsettling voices since she was a child. But when a mysterious murder takes place, the voice in Noa’s head urges her to uncover the killer. With the police skeptical and her sanity on the line, Noa must navigate a web of fear and suspicion, guided by a ghost, to catch a ruthless killer before she herself becomes the serial killer. Will Noa uncover the murderer, or will her own mind betray her?    (Source: WEBTOON)

title: Love Plan
description: “Why am I naked in bed with another man…?”   Jae-Woo reluctantly attends his high school reunion and he can’t wait to leave. But after seeing someone he thought he’d never meet again, he ends up drinking himself into a stupor. The next day, Jae-Woo wakes up next to Si-Yeon, the boy that was pining after him throughout high school. This is Si-Yeon’s chance to pounce! He offers Jae-Woo a deal, one month of dating, after which things can end amicably, no questions asked. But as rumors start spreading about the circumstances surrounding the reunion, Jae-Woo starts becoming suspicious of Si-Yeon’s true intentions…    (Source: Lezhin US)

title: High Society
description: Sell me! I'll be the most expensive lady to obtain.  While scheming to get out of an arranged marriage, Cesare runs into Adele, a shoeshine girl from the slums. The two make a 3-month deal to help Cesare elude marriage. However, Adele is so different from the women he's met before that he can't help but be drawn to her.    (Source: Manta)

title: The Dragon's Proposal
description: As the White Dragon succumbs to the warrior’s blade, it makes a final wish: to exact its revenge on the warrior, whom it had begun to consider its only friend. When the White Dragon next opens its eyes, it’s to find out that it’s been reborn...as a child. Not any child, but the warrior’s only daughter! The White Dragon, now known as Mir, has to adjust to being doted on daily until a certain incident breaks her newfound peace. Whisked away from her family, Mir is ordered to become the wife of a tyrant, but she won’t follow orders without a fight. After all, Mir may have the body of a weak and feeble human, but she’s still the strongest of all dragons at heart.The world's strongest white dragon... becomes the tyrant's wife?    (Source: Lezhin)

title: Zippy Ziggy
description: Reputation is everything in a world of icons and popularity contests. So why not score some points here and there by being the nice guy? This is the way Shinghi Ghang legitimizes the fake personality he has everyone believing. Armed with his above average looks and a (completely false) angel-like personality, he has every girl in school head over heals, and all the guys looking to him for guidance. With the exception of having a screwed up cross-dressing devil for a dad, Shinghi’s life is absolute perfection (*cough* of lies) until one day, Sung-Hae transfers to his school.   While being a complete martial artist freak, she also likes to fib just a little in front of those who know her… you know, like acting like she’s just a scared little girl who’d play with kittens rather than break brick walls with her head~! After all, how can anything go wrong when you’re as cute as Sung-Hae?   Fate has brought these two masters of lies together and the two must battle it out to see who will be crowned the undefeated heavy-weight champion of fakeness!    (Source: Infinity Studios)

title: Babysitting the Male Lead
description: Rosetta Kazel is enjoying her life as the villainess of a novel, until she's given a silver wolf to be her new pet. Rosetta knows this is none other than the cursed male lead of the novel, Prince Sihael von Idris, who's become stuck in his wolf form! To follow the novel, all Rosetta has to do is look after the wolf prince until the female lead can show up. But what if events have changed so much from the novel that she never turns up? How long will Rosetta be stuck caring for this unruly pup?    (Source: Tapas)    Note: Includes one extra chapter.

title: Streamer Aunt
description: The next-door student makes noise everyday, but one day, he asks a favor, "Ma'am, can you go out with me for a day?" I didn't know that one day would lead to this... And what is with this broadcast?!  (Source: TOPTOON+)

title: Muhyeopji Aneuro Deureowabeoryeotda.
genres: Action, Adventure, Drama, Fantasy, Hentai, Romance
description: Did you not wish to see me, My Lord…? I’ve taken over a man’s body in the world of murim, and to make things even more complicated, it’s the body of an extra in a world where everything is determined by strength and skills. There’s only one way to survive and make it out of this place. Women? Power? I will take everything away from the original protagonist and rewrite the novel!  (Source: TOPTOON, translated)

title: Threads of Love
description: Sa-Rang Park has only one mission in life: to save her cousin, Pyeong-Gang, from a life-threatening illness. The only way to do so is to find Pyeong-Gang’s “Ondal” -- the person Pyeong-Gang has been fated to be with since her previous life. But on her journey to connect her cousin with her other half, Sa-Rang just might get tangled up in a romance of her own.    (Source: WEBTOONS, edited)

title: Cheonsassiwa Agmanim
description: The story of angels who don't behave like angels and devils who are kinder than them. A new romance begins!

title: Preventing the Making of a Tyrant
description: In contrast to her past life in Korea, the storybook world Rayne Haatz inhabits is full of wonders—think dreamy powers, nobles inspired by card suits, and anthromorphs. There’s just one issue… her destiny in this world is to die! Luckily, it seems that someone wants her alive. In her fourth life, Rayne vows to stop her scheming family from giving Emperor Jaynen the dark nightmares that drive him mad and lead to her death. But after three deaths, has Rayne learned enough to change her fate? Or will her feelings for Jaynen complicate her plans?    (Source: Tapas)

title: Cry for Me, Crown Prince
description: The last thing Lady Rivera wants to do is marry the crown prince of the Lacrima Empire, Ranke Sol Reggenatore. The problem is that his nasty temper and frigid manners have already chased off every other young lady eligible for the title of crown princess! The only way she'll get out of this marriage is by making the icy prince cry and collecting his magical "tears of blessing." And to make matters worse, a tragic event in Ranke's past forced him to lock his emotions away deep within his heart, leaving Rivera with a seemingly impossible mission on her hands. Now, as she spends more time with him, she's realizing that there's more to him than meets the eye... Can Rivera break down this perpetually dry-eyed prince without getting her own feelings involved?    (Source: Tappytoon)

title: The Girl Hiding in the Wall
description: Na Bomi is your typical office worker…with a secret. A chronic exhibitionist, she yearns to roam around naked, showing everyone what she has to offer. When a particularly risky escapade leads to an unfortunate accident, she undergoes an out-of-body experience. As a bodyless soul, she can parade around butt naked with no fear of getting caught! Is this her chance? Will she be able to indulge in her repressed desires?    (Source: Lezhin)

title: Chiller
genres: Drama, Horror, Mystery, Psychological, Supernatural, Thriller
description: Stories that crawl up and down your spine. (Source: WEBTOONS) 1) Life and Death (DEY) 2) Delivery Service (Jin-Guk Im) 3) SOS (Seong-Dae Oh) 4) Possession (Yong-Seok Jo) 5) The Other Side of Cleanliness (COSMOS/VANJ) 6) Tasteful Body (Cheongbori) 7) Neighborhood Noise (Woojun Kim) 8) Neighbor (Sang-min Kim) 9) Group Chat (Seunghun Nah) 10) Hand Grinder (Hyeseok Yang/Chae-Eun Lee) 11) Peek (Sini/POGO) 12) Blackout (Minkyung Park) 13) Footstep (Soohun) 14) Dinner (PhatCat) 15) Qwee-Ho-Gah-In (Yongjin Kim) 16) Delivery Guy (Tow/EunGook) 17) Uninvited Guess (Danwoo) 18) Home Alone (Giryang) 19) Apartment (Joana) 20) Film (Su-Bong Park) 21) Knock Knock (Horang) 22) Bongcheon-Dong Ghost (Horang) 23) Sie (Yong-Un Cha) 24) Beneath the Surface (Rangddo) 25) Call a Cab (Taeheon Kim/Gyeongun Kim) 26) The Voice of the House (Currygom) 27) Peephole (Honey B) 28) The Guest (209) 29) Do Not Scream (Yeowon) 30) Hair (Yoon Jin Choi) 31) Baby Journal (Jinsoo Bae) 32) Scream (Yoon-su Shim) 33) Entangled (Song) 34) DIE-T (Chan-ho Park) 35) Make Up (Durak Son) 36) # (Kim8) 37) My Name is Hyunjeong Kim (Jin-Yang Hye)

title: Dark Air
description: Before…magic used to fill up the world but all of a sudden it just disappeared. Magician can’t perform magic anymore and they are now being looked down by warriors. Only two individuals in the world are able to perform magic after its disappearance, a mighty wizard and a little boy… Follow Melrose and his companions in their adventures as they are trying to solve this mystery!

title: Unknown Caller
genres: Drama, Horror, Mystery, Psychological, Supernatural, Thriller
description: Unknown Caller is a horror anthology with stories from renowned Korean creators who have been scaring audiences for years. These stories use augmented reality to unveil the creatures that haunt your home.   (Source: WEBTOONS)    Note: It began publishing exclusively through LINE Webtoon's app on October 24, 2016.

title: Romance Not Romantic
description: Jin-Ha, an overworked developer, gets the worst news of his life—he’s a recessive Omega! He’s now extra sensitive to alphas, and the only thing that calms him is his boss Hyun-Joon’s pheromones. This is a nightmare, especially since Jin-Ha’s been stashing money in a “murder for hire” account to cope with how annoying Hyun-Joon is. As if that’s not enough, a creepy stalker starts showering him with pheromones. Now, Jin-Ha’s stuck under the protection of his infuriatingly handsome boss!  (Source: Tapas)   Note: Includes 12 extra chapters.

title: Living With My Ex-Wife
description: Getting divorced is hard. But continuing to live with your ex-wife for her sick father is even harder. Still, it's a bit easier when you get to have her, and keep seeing the other beautiful women in your life.  (Source: TOPTOON+)

title: Secret Crush
description: What's the probability of someone you have a crush on having a crush on you? What'll happen to these two secret lovers? Will they ever find out that they are, in fact, in love with each other?    (Source: Lezhin)    Note: 92 Chapters + Epilogue + 22 Extras

title: The Spooky Love Tale of Gongchan Seol
description: This is a mysterious romance between horror novelist Seol Gong-Chan and his downstairs' neighbor.    Ghosts aren't real... right? Gong-Chan has a wild imagination as a horror-novel author with a knack for turning his mundane life into a harrowing ghost story. These spooks live only in his head... that is until he meets Young-Min, a man haunted by the supernatural specters in Gong-Chan’s novel! With everything around him suddenly turning into an eerie mess, is Gong-Chan's growing love for Young-Min the reason why his heart is racing? Or is it the bloody ghost behind him?    (Source: Tapas)    Note: Includes nine extra chapters.

title: Dear Zero
description: After humanity triumphs over the dangerous gates, a fragile peace is restored, yet the immense powers of espers become a dangerous double-edged sword. At the heart of this turmoil is Esper Zero, Michael, teetering on the edge of destruction. Enter Adam, a retired soldier haunted by the fractured bonds between espers and their guides. In a bold act of redemption, Adam offers Michael a second chance and a new identity: "Eve," symbolizing a fresh start and a spark of hope. But is peace truly possible for a person created for war…?    (Source: Lezhin US)

title: Sensual Lessons
description: On the day of my father's funeral... I saw that bastard having sex with my mother. Years passed since then, and I found him with two beautiful women by his side...   "I'm glad that you have so much for me to take!"  (Source: DAYcomics)

title: I Possessed a Villainess, but I Wanna Raise Cats!
description: Seo Eunsu was only looking for her lost cat when she was hit by a truck. The next thing she knows, she's in the body of Lewayne Rarsel, a villainess from a novel! She's the cruel paramour of the emperor and has nothing but contempt for therianthropes, people with animal forms. Now, the only way to avoid her fate of becoming the emperor's consort is to marry Duke Dimitri de Blua, a feline therian. But can the duke forget her notorious reputation and realize that Lewayne just wants to raise cats?      (Source: Tapas)

title: Jack Frost
description: It’s Noh-A’s first day at Amityville High School, and her reception is chilly to say the least. Brutal might be a better description! Decapitated but not dead (or is she??), Noh-A quickly realizes that nothing is as it appears at Amityville High where paranormal creatures battle for supremacy. Caught in the crossfire, Noh-A may have to rely on the unlikely (and possibly unreliable) aid of the most sinister student at Amityville… the deadly Jack Frost!   (Source: Yen Press)

title: Ilhwakcheongeum Geunyeo
description: Myung-Woon, a waiter at a host bar suffering from the hardships of life due to his extravagant nature, lands a job as a private driver for a rich family.  (Source: TOPTOON, translated)

title: ANZ
description: As the world searches for the next great Witch of Wind, one mysterious student wishes to be left alone at the Winfred Academy of magic.  (Source: Toomics)   Note: Includes two extra chapters.

title: Knife in Her Heart
description: Sarang was never supposed to survive her incurable disease. In the callous and sadistic world that loves to take pity, she is adored and yet despised by everyone. She is tired of all the attention and wants nothing to do with anyone -- at least not until she meets Eunjo. Could the two girls who seem so different become friends? Can they right the wrong committed by their parents and finally find peace?   (Source: WEBTOON)   Note: Includes three extra chapters.

title: Magyeong Muinhagwon
description: Zen is a type of inner power energy that is essential in Martial Art World. The amount of Zen everyone has is different. Mingyum is a person without Zen who wishes to become East Asia's Strongest Martial Artist. Due to an argument with his sister on what Major she wants him to take at school and what he wants, he leaves, wandering around only to end up in a bad neighborhood. He ends up saving a girl, but gets himself beat up in the process because he has no Zen. Then he gets saved by a foreign girl who suddenly appears and announces that she is his fiancée. What will happen next?

title: The Genius Blacksmith's Game
description: Hyeonsu's life took a turn for the worse when a fire left him covered in burns, his father in the hospital, and their family smithy in a blaze. But just as he was losing hope, his friend had an idea: If he can't be a blacksmith in real life, why not try it in Ares, the AI-powered virtual reality game? With a bit of luck, he might make enough money there to pay for his father's hospital bills. With so many irons in the fire, can Hyeonsu rekindle the flame of his passion and rise from the ashes?  (Source: Tapas)

title: Her Rejuvenation
description: Harry has fallen hard for his boss, Susan. He knows they can't be together, but their body's think otherwise.  (Source: Toomics)

title: Nae Donggiui Seongjeok & Chwihyang
description: Jun, who lives a perfect life. He was full of confidence that he would take first place this semester as well, but it got taken over by the over motivated Cha Si Won. Even on the day of the farewell party, Jun gets drunk and kisses Si Won. To cover the dark story, he takes a leave of absence and goes to the army. But after 2 years, Jun and Si Won have returned to school together. They seem to have a lot in common, they have the same classes, they continue to meet each other and they also have the same phone model. Jun shudders at the constant feeling of being associated with Si Won. He tries to relax his stress with the Phone Sex, but due to the accidental change of cell phones, Si Won discovers Jun's sexual preference (SM) ...  (Source: Peanutoon, translated)  Note: Includes ten extra chapters.

title: Trump
description: On February 29th, children under the age of 14 are said to have their wishes granted on a day known as Melly Day. In a world where humans are said to be blessed by the gods, Hiasen has been granted the ability to manipulate mana in his dreams... but all he really wants is to see his mother again. When his wish is granted on Melly Day, the world as he knows it changes forever.  (Source: WEBTOONS)

title: Ability
description: A world of supernatural where strong preys on weak. An Earth just not for humans.....and a strange ability!

title: Sorry, I'd Like to Save the World, But I Have a Deadline to Meet
description: Lee-Hyun, the “Lightning Lord,” is one of the Twelve Apostles, the strongest Hunters in human history. He’s got fame, power, and glory… and he’s given it all up to become a web novelist. But a view from the top is pretty skewed, and Lee-Hyun can’t seem to escape criticism of his writing being “unrealistic.” Luckily, Lee-Hyun's got the perfect solution: he’ll just hide his power, join a low-ranked guild, and farm his team for inspiration! Easy-peasy, right?  (Source: Tapas)

title: Kill Me if You Can
description: In a world where doppelgängers exist and are tasked with killing their human counterparts, a devil named Joon falls prey to distraction and accidentally creates Doh Seong-ah. He’s supposed to be taking the place of Lee Woo-yeol, but instead comes out looking like the male version of Joon’s favorite idol! Undeterred, Seong-ah enters the human realm to start his mission, but Woo-yeol proves to be far more formidable and terrifying than Seong-ah anticipated… Can he succeed in eliminating Woo-yeol? Or will the world be big enough for the two of them after all…?    (Source: Lezhin US)   Note: Includes one extra chapter.

title: Missing Love: The Marrying Man
description: Thrown into the ruthless world of gangsters as a prostitute, Geom has seen all the ugliest sides of humanity. After a brutal eight years of being off the grid, he reunites with Wooyeon, the man he once loved, to congratulate him on his upcoming marriage. Recognizing Wooyeon as a light within a very deep, dark abyss, Geom finds himself being drawn to him all over again. But with each of his ankles shackled by the twisted Rieder and the obsessive Prosecutor Lee, is there truly any hope of salvation?    (Source: TappyToon)

title: Simyakjaui Churibeul Geumhamnida
description: Joo Sungwan is working as a fake ghost in order to pay back for a broken laptop, but instead of scaring customers, Sungwan is the one being scared! Even worse, there’s an actual ghost living in the haunted house?!
