With his job on the line, Sungwan ends up in a dating contract with the ghost — in exchange for the ghost scaring visitors, Sungwan must give him three wishes and be his boyfriend.

title: Phone Addict
description: Do you ever find yourself glued to your phone screen all day? Such is the case for Damu Ju, a girl in her third year of high school who has a particular attachment to her relatively ancient smartphone of ten years. All she wants is to graduate quietly with no trouble, but her high school life becomes anything but ordinary when one day, her smartphone transforms into a cute human boy – who still functions as a phone!    (Source: WEBTOONS)

title: His Majesty is Mine
description: Ga-Yeon knows what men want. She knows what it takes to fulfill their fantasies, and loves the power that comes with the conquest of even the most arrogant of men. Nothing can strip her of that confidence. Not even a sudden warp to a foreign land, and not even the fact that she has to become a random emperor’s concubine. Why would that faze her? The emperor Zeros is good looking, has a hot bod, and acts aloof. He’s just the kind of man that she’s used to dealing with. It won’t take too long for her to make him hers…or will it?  (Source: Lezhin)   Note: Includes ten extra chapters.

title: Charlotte's Letter
description: Charlotte, a bookworm who dreams of becoming a writer, starts her new job as a maid for Lord Matthew and his sister Lady Anna, the last remaining members of the Parvens family. Her ability to write catches the attention of them both. Now, for Matthew, she is tasked to write letters pretending to be him, while for Anna, she must secretly report on Matthew's day-to-day affairs. Putting pen to paper has never been so difficult! What will become of Charlotte when the Parvens family's twisted deceptions come to light?   (Source: Tappytoon)

title: Naughty Little Sister
description: For years, Seo-Hee has had a crush on Ji-Ho, a childhood friend who is more like an older brother. One day, she tries to make Ji-Ho fall for her through a hypnotic spell, and he goes along with it to keep her from leaving. But how long will he be able to keep up the act?  (Source: DAYcomics)

title: Heartbeat Conquest
description: When Da-Eun wakes up, she finds herself in a dating simulation game as Diana, a pretty schoolgirl surrounded by beautiful people with floating hearts above their heads. To her surprise, there seem to be no rules beyond the ability to conquer anyone, regardless of their gender, age, or even species -- yes, even dogs have heart-o-meters! Dating is fun, sure, but Diana has something else in mind… the ultimate goal of the dating sim genre -- to form a harem. She starts to strategize, but will things pan out as she plans?    (Source: WEBTOONS, edited)

title: Athena Complex
description: Suffering from heartbreak after being rejected by Poseidon, goddess of wisdom Athena becomes human to seek revenge... but as a high schoolboy. There she plots to befriend Poseidon’s reincarnation, Adrian, who doesn’t have the slightest clue about the world of gods. But will her sweet vengeance be thwarted by other opposing forces, or will her own one-sided love hinder her plans?   (Source: WEBTOONS)

title: The Tale of the Skeleton Messenger
description: 120 years have passed since the First Emperor’s death. Venlyra, a powerful rogue and trusted herald of the Emperor, awakens from a long slumber to a crumbling empire that has strayed from the light. Once more, the Skeleton Messenger makes the rounds, bound for a decaying throne, and for the embers of a self long thought extinguished within. Hear ye, hear ye! Hark, and heed the Emperor’s words! The hour of reckoning is upon you!  (Source: WEBTOON)

title: For the Third Time
description: Do-Hui is too busy girl-bossing her way up the corporate ladder to care about love. Her ability to randomly time loop makes her professionally successful but also renders all relationships meaningless. What's the point when she'll have to restart everything at some point? That all changes when Jun-Won, her annoying new boss, reveals that he can time loop too. Though she cringes at the mere sight of him, he's also the only person who understands her. Will they learn how to find solace in each other, or will their professional friction mess up their one chance at love?    (Source: Tappytoon, edited)

title: Winter Wolf
description: Lysithea Hilenaire Del Arman is a woman on the run. After a dangerous revolt claimed the lives of her family, Lysithea employs the broker, Taron Cardis, to help her escape the kingdom before she meets the same deadly fate. But Taron isn’t exactly the easiest man to work with, and the two spend most of their transactional relationship with plenty of bickering and arguing. That is, until an unexpected snowstorm leaves them stranded in an eerie, abandoned mansion. Now, Lysithea and Taron must put their differences aside to survive the cold and continue their escape.    (Source: Seven Seas Entertainment)

title: Please Sponsor My Revenge
description: After losing it all, Robelia Efferentia wants to give up on life until she learns the true cause of her misery: her uncle, Marlon. Filled with rage, she meets Jade Ferrado, a powerful duke who can help her enact revenge. Robelia asks him to become her sponsor, but he’ll only do so if she agrees to marry him. She signs the papers, and with the duke’s resources now at her disposal, Robelia is ready to wreak vengeance! However, she soon discovers that her uncle isn’t the only one behind her woes...    (Source: Tapas)

title: Sasangchoegang
description: The "Ten Masters" had kept each other in check and maintained the balance of power and order of the world beyond human limits, until Baek Do-Hyeon showed up with the strongest power ever!    (Source: Naver, translated)

title: We Hate the Male Lead
description: Luna wakes up one day to realize that she has been reborn into a novel as the childhood friend of the male lead, Fersen. To make matters worse, the guy is a clueless idiot! Luna wants to end their friendship to escape being bullied by the other ladies, but Fersen won't leave her alone no matter what she does. Things only get more complicated when she becomes entangled with the novel's villain, who hates Fersen even more than she does. Will Luna manage to get away from this dumb male lead?     (Source: Tapas)

title: The Villainess's Bestie
description: 5-year-old palace maid Charlie knows that in this world, she will be murdered out of jealousy by the villainous empress at a young age. Her only sources of hope are her plan to escape the palace as soon as possible, and her best friend Rose, a fellow maid who's like a big sister to her. However, when Charlie discovers that the kind-hearted Rose is actually the empress in disguise, her plans come crashing down around her. Can Charlie stay close enough to the empress to make it out alive?    (Source: Tapas)

title: Horangi Deureowayo
description: A pleasant and mysterious daily life created by a young couple in the forest and an unidentified child who one day came to them.   (Source: Naver, translated)    Note: Includes eight extra chapters.

title: Hyeollaui Iljok
description: Surh Jung-woo developed Gynophobia because of his trauma when he was younger. Even as a college student he is still afraid of woman, but Yoon hae-soo is a angel like existence for Jung-woo because of his fear. He starts dating after thinking he could trust Hae-soo, but while putting everything he has on line for her he falls into debt and gets cornered. After he gets betrayed by Hae-soo the person to save him is the most beautiful girl of this college, and the famous professor Pi Eun-na. What is this beautiful teacher after, and why did she help jung-woo?

title: Studying Sex Culture, For Science!
description: In the not-so-distant future, humanity faces extinction, not from war or disease, but from a total lack of action between the sheets. With AI doing everything (including flirting), people have stopped dating, marrying, or even having sex. Enter the Onnuri Sex Culture Laboratory, humanity's last, horny hope. Their solution? A time machine. Their mission? Study the golden ages of getting it on. Meet Garam, an awkward grad student turned chronosexual researcher, who's now zipping through history under the wing of the mysterious and seductive Professor Eun Ahyeon. From ancient orgies to disco-era hookups, Garam must document sex culture and harvest the elusive energy source known as... Orgasium. History class has never been this NSFW.  (Source: Lezhin US)

title: Non-refundable Alpha
description: Choi Jae-Won was living a carefree life abroad, surrounded by playful alphas and chasing nothing but pleasure. But when his father lures him back to Korea, he’s blindsided by a wedding—his own. The groom turns out to be Yang Joon-Hee, a childhood friend who’s grown into everything Jae-Won’s ever wanted. And before he can make sense of it, the vows are already said. Joon-Hee insists they once made a promise. Jae-Won doesn’t remember it... but something in him starts to respond anyway.  (Source: Lezhin US)

title: Stuck With the Protagonist
description:
What's so great about being the daughter of a duke anyway? As the youngest child of a crazy duke with no empathy for his kids, Elena wants to live quietly and avoid her family’s bullying. But when she ends up being followed by Sirius Hyperion, the illegitimate child of the emperor and the person foretold to bring down her family, Elena decides to sit back and watch their demise. But will sticking with Sirius allow Elena to break free from her family, or will she become one of his many victims?

(Source: Tapas)

title: Shaman
description: A world where "magic" exists. This is a story about a young shaman and his companions saving the world from "curses."  (Source: Kakao, translated)

title: Destined Killer
description: Number is not your average serial killer. Equipped with the ability to identify future murderers, Number takes the law into his own hands. He believes in ridding the world of destined killers. Simple, right? One day, he runs into Ji-Hyeon, whose number changes constantly as she develops a special power of her own. Will the two work together to eliminate would-be murderers? Or will Ji-Hyeon's very existence threaten Number's moral compass?    (Source: WEBTOON)

title: The Barbarian of Seoul Station
description: Cheoldu, a barbarian raised on Earth, lives a mundane life with his best friend Jintae. But when he sees an alien creature from his planet on the news, everything changes. Thrown into an apocalyptic challenge, Cheoldu and Jintae must adjust their lives in Nova, a savage world filled with goblins and ogres. Will the two conquer Nova’s perils and uncover the secrets that could change Earth’s fate? An epic tale of friendship, survival, and untamed adventure awaits.  (Source: WEBTOON)

title: The Sacred Serpent's Seduction
description: How far would you be willing to go to save the ones you love? With his grandfather bordering life and death, Taesun takes on multiple jobs in order to pay a seemingly endless stack of hospital bills. On one of his odd jobs, he ascends the great mountain Geumryang, unknowingly the home of an eponymous serpentine spirit. When Taesun encounters the divine being, he too is on the brink of death, desperate for water in his slithering form. Taesun offers him a sip of water, and saves the sacred snake from certain death. Later that night, a cold-blooded body embraces Taesun and offers him an exchange: bear the ancient being’s seed, and his grandfather will live. But is all really as it seems? After all, can one ever truly trust the forked tongue of a serpent…?   (Source: Lezhin US)

title: Heart Stealer
description: Jihoon’s always working. He needs to--there’s rent to pay, tuition to take care of, and hospital bills that need to be sorted out. His money problems don’t end when he gets into university, but he soon finds a way to pull himself up by his bootstraps. His part-time job at the girl’s dorm introduces him to a bunch of rich, spoiled, and sexy girls…all of whom want to have their way with him. Why would he say no? It’s his chance to climb up the social ladder, as well as sleeping with the most alluring girls in the school!  (Source: Lezhin X)

title: No Kidding
genres: Drama, Psychological, Romance, Slice of Life
description: The new school year brings with it a myriad of new encounters. Han-Seok’s first meeting with Ki-Un involves snow, an obese calico cat, and a lingering sweet scent. As it turns out, the two are now classmates, and Han-Seok finds himself slowly drawn to Ki-Un. Han-Seok wants to grow closer to Ki-Un, but he proves to be a tough nut to crack. He's amiable enough, but Ki-Un soon senses an invisible wall between him and his target. Will Han-Seok manage to charm his way through to Ki-Un's heart?    (Source: Lezhin)    Note: Chapter count includes 15 side stories.

title: Maison de Maid
description: The lively yet clumsy new maid June does nothing right except cause trouble and yet, instead of berating June, the young and gracious madam forgives her and shows favoritism among the maids. Both have admiration and affection for one another, but will it turn into something more?  (Source: Lezhin)

title: Dead Or Alive
description: Calahan, a famous hunter who has captured 999 wanted criminals, chooses Johnny the Grifter as the final target of his career for a reward of 10 million pais. But Johnny, a con man who preys on the pockets of the elderly, insists he's innocent... "If I prove my innocence, you give me a million pais.” Calahan and Johnny embark on a wild ride with a million pais on the line, and a mysterious group of men in hot pursuit. There's only ten days until they reach their destination, and both will do whatever it takes to win the bet - dead or alive.   (Source: Lezhin US)   Note: Chapter count includes a prologue and an epilogue.

title: Work Love Balance
description: Ahn Yiyoung has won big in both his career and love. Not only is the start-up company he started with his college friends thriving, but he’s also dating SJ Group’s talented director, Kang Daehyung. Well, “former” director, that is. After resigning from his position, Daehyung has been doing everything to be Yiyoung’s perfect trophy boyfriend at home. But it won’t be long until Daehyung is back to wearing his professional suits, now as the investor and director of Yiyoung’s company! How will these two keep things balanced between work life and love life?    (Source: Tappytoon)

title: Second Try Idol
description: Seo Hyeon-U is a member of an idol group that's about to debut. On the day of their profile photoshoot, an accident left a hideous scar on one side of his face, causing his dream of debuting to collapse. Fortunately, he became an idol trainer with the recommendation of his manager, but he still spent his shabby days in sorrow. One day, he got on a plane with the idol group in charge of going abroad, but an unexpected incident caused his plane to crash!!   When he woke up, realized that he has been transported to back when he was 19 years old; when he was preparing to join the debut team.     Seo Hyeon-U, an idol in the body of a 19-year old boy but who has been strengthened by his experience as a trainer. This is the story of his growth to become an idol once again!  (Source: Kakao, translated)

title: 100% Perfect Girl
description: Jay Jin is the headstrong teenage rebel, determined to prove she's serious about making art. J. Max is the tall debonair foreigner, in Korea on business, with more--much more--to his background than he lets on. On the surface, it would seem as though Jay and J. have nothing in common...until a chance encounter in a hotel lobby sparks a mysterious attraction. Will true love prove strong enough to overcome the language barrier, not to mention the thousands of miles separating two attractive people? Then there are the interventions of friends and family who think they know best... as well as a disastrous encounter with spicy chicken kebab! A giddy romantic fable for our ever-shrinking world, 100% Perfect Girl demonstrates the power of chemistry to conquer all.    (Source: Netcomics)     Notes:  - The chapter count includes a prologue.  - This manga was adapted into a colored webcomic (165 chapters) which we include under this entry.   - The chapter count reflects the one from tankoubons.

title: Behind His Kind Mask
description: As the #1 stalker of Pope Ulysses, the kind male lead, Yoidel was to be executed for her crimes. Just minutes before her end, Yoidel escapes her cell to ask Ulysses for help, only to come across a bloody madman... who turns out to be the male lead himself! In a desperate attempt to survive, Yoidel binds herself to him in a magical contract, dooming the two to share their lives and deaths. Now stuck with a two-faced psycho, will Yoidel find a way to break their bond before it breaks her?    (Source: Tapas)

title: Let's Get Divorced!
description: After her "storm kick" video goes viral on the Internet, Baek-hui is too humiliated and ashamed to live in Korea and wants to relocate to a different country. To do so, she agrees to marry Han-Gyeol, who holds a permanent resident status in Australia, and plans to divorce him as soon as she gets her visa. However, to receive their marriage certificate, they must prove that their love is "legit." How are they going to do that when their marriage is a fraud?    (Source: WEBTOONS, edited)    Note: Chapter count includes an extra.

title: Psychic Studies
description: "You are getting very sleepy..." Chan-Gyu Kim learns hypnosis from watching YouTube videos so that he would become popular amongst the girls at his school. However, things don’t go according to plan as he finds himself encountering repeated failures. He later meets mind reader Ui-Ju Yeo, who has extraordinary abilities just like he does. Their interesting but unfortunate story kicks off from there... (Source: WEBTOON)

title: Kneel Before Me
description: In the storm sleeps a giant...  When the unfaithful crown prince calls off their marriage, Lady Kyrie is exiled to a remote cottage. On the way, she discovers a hidden village while avoiding a snowstorm. It's there "the end" is awakened... and it's starting to become obsessed with her.    (Source: Manta)

title: The Beast Must Die
description: After finding out his sister has been gang-raped by a secret fraternity before she commited suicide, Lee Kirin decides to catch the rapists and take revenge on them. He approaches one of the known members of the group, Kang Moo, and asks him for his cooperation. However, in order to join the fraternity and find out who led his sister to her death, he is asked to have sex with everyone in the fraternity. As time goes by, this isn't the only challenge he has to face in order to come closer to the truth.    (Source: Lezhin US)  Note: Includes 39 extra chapters.

title: Long Live the Drama King
description: After his first drama flopped, Lee Hyunseok gave up on being a PD. But when he finds himself being granted one last wish in his dying moments, he wants only one thing: to produce the ultimate makjang drama. Now, he’s been given a second shot at life (and the assistance of a ghostly PD), but he’s on a time crunch to achieve ratings and recognition. With no budget, rookie actors, and an amateur writer, Hyunseok’s got his work cut out for him. But what’s a good drama without a few twists and turns?    (Source: Tapas)

title: Barami Meomuneun Nan
description: One day, a young glider technician crashes into a strange tree that turns out to be the nest of the last dragon on Earth. The technician accidentally bonds with the dragon's powers after she and the dragon fend off a weapon used by knights hunting the "Dragon Pearl," an item that holds the life and powers of a dragon. The technician finds out the Dragon Pearl has temporarily fused with her body and the dragon will die if they separate. So begins the story of how the dragon and the technician survive the onslaught of knights and villains while dealing with the strange events and moral differences that come from inter-species friendship... Or is it something else?

title: Diaries of Depravity
description: Outdoors, with the neighbor’s wife, in the kitchen, on the floor…just about anything you can imagine! Let these tantalizing tales help you break from the monotony of everyday life, and explore your deepest desires!  (Source: Lezhin US)

title: The Stairway of Time
description: To escape her exhausting daily life and definitively bury her past, she chose to marry the first comer. But, one night, as she takes a mysterious staircase in her old high school, she is propelled 14 years back, into her high school body. Is this a dream or reality? If she's really come back to the past, then she knows what to do: never meet her childhood sweetheart! Because this guy is the one who broke his life...

title: Tie Me Up
description: The two main characters of our story may not know each other, but their lives take remarkably similar trajectories. Both work in the adult industry, yet both suffer performance issues. Namgeun works at an adult toy company, and his less than stellar performance in the bed leads his girlfriend to dump him. Meanwhile, Yeorang’s made a career as a sex columnist, but a leaked video reveals her inability to orgasm. Separately, they visit the local hardware store for rope to take their lives. But not only do they not die...it seems the rope has magically cured their sex issues. Now it’s time for Namgeum and Yeorang to discover the extent of the rope’s power.   (Source: Lezhin US)

title: Damned Demonic Swords
description: One fateful day, Signatur Zegar's worst nightmare comes true when he unwittingly forges a pact with Minerva and Sui, two eccentric demonic swords donning a teenage girl guise. Setting forth on a quest to break the binding contract, Sig, along with his newfound companions, navigates through a web of conspiracies and unexpected challenges. As the journey unfolds, the pressing question remains: Can Sig break free from their bond, or is he destined to be forever entangled with these demonic blades?    (Source: Tapas)

title: Materialistic Lady
description: Despite being a beauty from a famous family, Roselia Kaneph is quite literally the poorest noble in the empire. Sick of munching on carrots during teatime and not being able to add salt to her meals, Roselia comes up with a plan to go from rags to riches: marry the emotionless Crown Prince Anoch! But before she can even go through with this, she stumbles upon Anoch, who mistakes her for a thief and an assassin. Will Roselia be able to convince him otherwise and persuade him to marry her?    (Source: Tapas)

title: Goddess Conquest
description: A college student, Wu-Suk decides to work out at a gym after getting dumped by a girl. One day, a hot girl with amazing body approaches him and tries to seduce him! "Hey, wanna grab a drink after workout?"  (Source: TOPTOON+)

title: Our Future
description: The futures Evan sees with his ability were never wrong. Will that be the case this time, too?     (Source: Toomics)

title: Ssasang Choegangui Manager
description: “What kind of hunter works without management these days?"     20 years after the first appearance of monsters, hunters need managers these days.

title: Divorcing the Emperor
description: As a self-proclaimed expert on archdukes of the north, Krisha has one goal in life. To marry one. However, all her plans are immediately overturned when she finds out she's already married to the emperor. To make matters worse, he wants a divorce! If that happens, not only will she become a divorcee at age 21, but she'll be banished from the mainland for the next 10 years. Though she sets out to give the emperor a piece of her mind, little does she know he's not the only obstacle to her dream...    (Source: Tapas)

title: Corpse Knight Gunther
description: Just as expected, the war between humans and vampires has ended with the victory of the vampires. In an effort to strike back, human refugees in the Holy Land “Bahal” successfully create an undying Corpse Knight, attached to a power source that can sustain him. Gunther, former gladiator and now corpse knight, is humanity’s last hope.    (Source: WEBTOONS)

title: SAMADHI
description: I-Bak Kim has only ever dreamed of living an average, peaceful life -- nothing more, nothing less. But when he finds himself with supernatural powers, I-Bak must now learn how to hone his new abilities and get used to the fact that, from now on, his life will be anything but normal...    (Source: WEBTOONS, edited)

title: How To Refuse the Route
description: In the ultimate dating game mayhem, Jerry Route's virtual love life takes center stage! Battling fainting spells due to his feeble stats, Jerry's three brothers crank up the competition for his affection. Enter the swoon-worthy crown prince Karyan and the fourth prince Ilya, who both vie for Jerry's attention. It's a hilarious, heart-fluttering quest as Jerry dodges the overprotective antics of friends and family, navigating the game while encountering an amusing array of characters. Will Jerry find true love amidst the chaos, or will his frailty throw a comical wrench into his romantic escapades?     (Source: Tappytoon)

title: Cheeky Habits of My Rabbits
description: My bride, Neungso, has so many wonderful qualities! He’s as pretty as freshly fallen snow, as big and strong as a mountain, and has a hu... HUGE summer squash between his legs! I thought having a bride meant having someone to take care of and make happy, but it turns out he knows just how to make me feel good. I wish I could make him happy too, but I’m not the special moon rabbit he’s looking for, so I know he’ll leave me one day. Maybe it would’ve been better if Habibi never brought my bride home. Maybe then, I wouldn’t have to feel this pain…    (Source: Tapas)

title: Yeonhaui Mat
description: Gong In-Ju was dumped by her boyfriend, Ahn Geu-Rim, for no reason. In-Ju, who has been living while depending on Ahn Geu-Rim all this time, feels the emptiness of losing Geu-Rim and plans to get him back. The first thing in the plan is to arouse Geu-Rim's jealousy! To do this, she tries to seduce Seo-Yun, a handsome junior she met during a volunteer work, but Seo-Yun had a crush on someone else... What will the end be for the two people who form an alliance to win over love...?

title: Merry Go Round
description: We couldn't do anything, but we believed we could.      We met as high school seniors. I was full of angst, while you guys were so carefree and lovable. I was miserable and powerless, but you made me believe anything was possible — the time of our merry-go-round.    (Source: Manta)

title: Escape From the Daytime Drama
description: An unknown actress's life is ruined when she wakes up as Cha Yeryeon, the villainess of a daytime drama. Determined to avoid an antagonist's fate, Yeryeon works to nudge the story toward a different ending. But as her actions threaten to upend the lives of other characters, Yeryeon has to figure out how to get her satisfying story while also protecting the people she cares for. Will Yeryeon flip the script and change the drama for the better? Or will she be stuck playing the bad guy forever?  (Source: Tapas)

title: Scent and Sensibility
description: “Become his therapist, and you’ll earn 500,000 a year!"     When Moon Dobin, a dominant omega, goes for a job interview, he’s baffled by the CEO's proposal: have sex with her son as a form of therapy. His client? Seo Tae-oh, a dominant alpha who can't sense pheromones. Dobin has worked hard to protect his virginity, but for that salary… anything goes! So, Dobin leads a secret double life as Tae-oh’s secretary by day and his therapist by night. As the two spend more time together, something is in the air - and not just pheromones!    (Source: Lezhin US)

title: Another Face of Roommate
genres: Comedy, Drama, Ecchi, Psychological, Romance, Slice of Life
description: Hara meets a beautiful girl at a club one night, and goes home with her. After a sweet rendezvous, Go-Eun wakes the next morning to find Hara in her bed. Shocked, she kicks Hara out, because she has no recollection of sleeping with her. So who was Hara sleeping with? A story about Hara, Go-Eun and another ‘Go-Eun’!    (Source: Lezhin, translated)

title: S.I.D
description: As a little boy, Si Mun, the grandson of a famous shaman, had the ability to see - and communicate with - ghosts. His grandmother gave him a talisman which temporarily rid him of this ability and erased his memories of any supernatural phenomena he had witnessed.   Years later, Si Mun is working a hectic, yet ordinary, job as a homicide detective in the Korean police force. His grandmother has since passed on - and the powers she sealed away appear to be reawakening...

title: June Peach
description: After two rebirths and two miserable, failed marriages, Leah Riveron vowed to never wed again. Despite this, she can’t get one man, the handsome duke Julian Raenal, off her mind. Though he ignored her in the past, this time, Leah throws caution to the wind and tells him every detail of her past lives. He won’t be interested anyway, right? But rather than repelling him, her refreshing honesty ends up charming him! Now, with Julian hooked, will Leah’s plan of a marriage-free life go as planned?    (Source: Tapas)

title: Office Affairs
description: Jin-U works at his uncle's shoe services, collecting and servicing shoes. What he didn't know, was that the offices nearby were filled with beautiful women.  (Source: TOPTOON+, edited)

title: Jeongnyeongwang Elkwineseu
description: Kang Ji-hoon, an ordinary high school student who died in a painful accident, finds out in the underworld that he is actually a Water Spirit King mistakenly born as a human.  “Making water spirits? How do you do that?”  The adventures of Elqueeness, the Water Spirit King who was mistakenly born as a human!

title: Youngest Sister-in-Law in a Tragic Reverse Harem
description: One feverish night, 6-year-old Liliana Bercchio suddenly recalls the plot of a tragic reverse harem novel. Unsure if she's been reincarnated or has time traveled, her young mind struggles to make sense of it all. Her family is doomed to get caught up in the protagonists' mess—but there's still time… or so she thought. When she witnesses the female lead's death and the deranged male leads appear before her sisters, the story takes a turn. They seem different now, but is her family truly safe?  (Source: Tapas)

title: Infidelity 101
description: Si-Hu’s life is a pretty good one. He’s starting a new job at a pretty decent company, he’s been happily married to a gorgeous wife for six years, and he’s pretty good-looking himself. But one day, everything starts cracking at the edges when he starts to suspect that his beautiful wife Si-A is having an affair. He can’t stop obsessing and worrying over it, but his pretty coworker Min-A might have the perfect solution: a steamy affair of his own. Si-Hu isn’t sure this is the right thing to do, but it’s hard to say no when his wife is more suspicious than ever and there so many gorgeous women at his office. So maybe a little infidelity can’t hurt…right?    (Source: Lezhin X)

title: Vitamin C Vitamin D
description: A strange current between the mysterious transfer student 'Do Won-kyung' and the girl 'Choi Kang' who is mistaken for a man?   (Source: Toomics)

title: The Pharmacy Where the Wolf Howls
description: As a teen, Sooji was heartbroken when her favorite idol group LUPUS disbanded, thanks to the traitorous member Jackie quitting. Ten years later, Sooji has become a workaholic pharmacist who just wants a stable, predictable life. But she's thrown for a loop when she suddenly runs into Jackie--at an animal shelter, of all places! After learning that he plans to return to showbiz, Sooji is enraged and picks a fight with him... starting a deep dive into the untold ups and downs of LUPUS and it members. What really happened behind the scenes to Jackie all those years ago, and can Sooji, now along for the ride, survive his path back to stardom?   (Source: TappyToon)

title: Changing the Genre From Angst to Heartwarming
description: I've been reincarnated. Into a novel I used to enjoy in my past life, no less! My name is Renatis, and I'll be playing the part of little sister to the female lead in this dark, tragic whirlwind of a story where a beastly bad boy shatters my sister's hopes, dreams, and her life. My sister is too good and too beautiful, and I'm not about to let that happen to my perfect sister. So, I'm taking charge. I shall turn this dark, tragic story into a heartwarming tale of healing. I will save my sister.  (Source: WEBTOONS)

title: The Rabbit Hole
description: Whatever her employer asks, Hee-Yeon, the maid, does it perfectly without any mistake. A beautiful yet twisted maid enters a complicated household. How far down the rabbit hole will Hee-Yeon go?    (Source: Lezhin)

title: I Became a Sitter for the Obsessive Villains
description: When Meia realizes she’s woken up in the story “The Flower of Shakir,” she immediately busts out of the temple and runs for her life. After all, she has no intention of becoming the side character who is sacrificed just for the sake of the male protagonist! But during her grand escape, Meia runs into Duke Rakha Aintia, the story’s villain, and his two younger siblings. In an unexpected turn of events, Meia is hired as the twins’ sitter, but she also happens to attract the duke’s attention due to something magical in her touch...    (Source: Tappytoon)

title: The Producer's Second Life
description: If you had the chance to start your career over again, what would you do differently? Junsu faces this question when he suddenly goes back in time to his first day at work as a rookie producer. After ten years of getting his ideas stolen by a scummy senior producer, Junsu gets a chance to change his professional fate. And better yet, he has all the skills and memories of the Junsu of ten years later. Will he be able to avoid his previous mishaps and make his dreams come true?    (Source: WEBTOONS)

title: Obsessed With Shuelina
description: Shuelina has only ever wanted to be loved as she grew up in an orphanage. But after her birth father rejected her in a previous life, she tries to find a family who will accept her in this one. Luckily, Archduke Bylot and his sons fall for her indomitable spirit, and they shower her with the love she has longed for. But once they find out she's the long-lost imperial princess, can she be a part of their family? Or will she have to go back to the people who sent her away in the first place?    (Source: Tapas)

title: Love Choice
description: Tae-Jun finds it difficult to talk to girls because he has only ever been at an all-boys school. He tried playing dating sims, but it didn't help much. One day, he starts seeing dating sim choices in real life...    [Ding! Heroine's friendship level has increased! You can now have sex with her!]  (Source: DAYcomics)

title: Outsider : Ravaged by an Invisible Man
description: Jeong-U Han got a job through special employment and is a complete "outsider" in the office. His coworkers treated him as though they couldn't see him, but no one thought that it would actually happen.   "You are now invisible."   It is finally his time to have his revenge on all those ho looked down on him.  (Source: DAYcomics, edited)

title: Magic-Girl Service
description: One day, Kim Namjoo is forcibly transformed into a mascot by ‘Seobi,’ a being who came from Fairyland. He now has the duty to gather sorcerer girls who possess the power of love to defeat the demons, creatures born from sexual desire, that are invading Earth…! But to truly purify the demons, he needs to fulfill the desires of both the sorcerer girls and the monsters to cleanse them…?! Can Kim Namjoo purify the demons that are trying to conquer Earth and restore peace to the world?  (Source: Lezhin, translated)

title: Dungeon Talchuri Neomu Himdeulda
description: Go Insung did not pass onto hell or heaven after suddenly dying, but instead onto a dungeon. A place in between the afterlife world and the living world. It’s a dungeon with a broadcasting system. While being watched by the numerous dead of the afterlife, Go Insung has to clear the dungeon with the other challengers in order to escape.    (Source: Naver, translated)   Note: Includes one extra chapter.

title: Zombie Girlfriend!
description: A couple decides to move in together. That much sounds simple enough - except that it isn't when the whole apartment complex is crawling with zombies, werewolves, and succubi. He's a half-skeleton with a functioning lower body, while she's a full-on zombie, with mostly intact body parts. Still, you gotta watch out for the occasional nip- no, liver slip!  (Source: Lezhin US)

title: Red Fox
genres: Drama, Fantasy, Horror, Mystery, Romance, Supernatural
description: Welcome to Ibana, a beautiful country also known as the red country. Here, lives the red fox, a wily beast who takes on the form of a human and feasts on the livers of humans. For hundreds of years, the fox kills without hesitation until, thanks to one human woman, it comes to know what that human emotion called “love”, truly is. Out of the land of fire, erupts the cruel yet tragic love story of one evil spirit who yearns to possess the heart of one human woman.   (Source: Netcomics)

title: Sinui Geimui Sin
description: Myeong-In, a student at a third-rate university, doesn't get much support or respect at home. But his true identity is a professional online gamer who is famous and rich, a star gamer nicknamed "God of Game".    Suddenly, three beauties intrude into his double-identity life. And Myeong-In learns a shocking truth from them: the elites of society play something called "Game of Gods". If you win, you receive superhuman abilities and powers, and you can basically rule the real world!

title: 5500 Shades of the Demon King
description: A writer wrote steamy adult stories starring a Demon King. Now he wants justice!   In order to avoid execution, the writer must make half the contents of her novel, a collection of lust and desire, come true! But wait, she is supposed to re-enact all the scenes, as the female lead, while the Demon King acts out the male lead???? Living in a world of demons, caught by its monarch and engaged in steamy role play! Let the games begin!  (Source: POCKET COMICS)

title: Resigning as the Villainess
description: Waking up as the villainess destined for a gruesome death, Olivia de Versace only has two goals in mind: 1. Avoid the Imperial Palace at all costs, and 2. Marry her childhood crush and live her life in peace. With a newfound passion for both swordsmanship and commerce and romance in the air, Olivia is building her reputation as the new local girlboss. But… does all of this attention come at a price? Why are all of these men she’s trying to stay far away from flocking to her side?!    (Source: Tapas)

title: The Mother, Not the Daughter
description: After discovering that his wife was cheating on him, Seong-Tae finds himself sent back to the time before their marriage. Determined to get revenge, he decides to use the secret of his mother-in-law, who once cherished him like her own son, to make his unfaithful wife pay.   "Seong-Tae, you can't do this..."  (Source: DAYcomics, edited)

title: Take Me Back Home
description: Just when her crush was about to express his feelings for her, our FL is warped away into the world of an unknown webnovel. Stuck as a noble lady with a suspicious suitor who wants her life, and a mystery savior who looks a little too familiar... Death-threats, protective MLs, and a dark secret that surrounds the FL's new life! I don't care anymore! Take me back home!    (Source: POCKET COMICS)

title: Need a Girl!
description: Three boys are desperately struggling to "make" a girlfriend in their sad, adolescent lives. They then realize that their classmate, Ghang Han-Gyul—the manly, serious, quiet person of their class—has been secretly going out with a beauty for 100 days*. This triggers the friendship between the manly, serious Han-Gyul and the three dateless losers.   *A 100 day celebration of a relationship is seen as very significant.

title: The Secret Life of the Demon King
description: After a debilitating war against the human kingdom, Hell has lost its power and glory, and even running out of the money to pay its Demon soldiers and servants. Even the Demon King, Hel, relies on two of his most loyal servants for livelihood. To bring Hell back to its golden days, Hel decides to become independent and earn enough money on his own to save his kingdom from financial destruction. He decides to start his first job ever at a Knight's Private Club in the human world. Now, he has to work and survive in an unfamiliar place against its customers, many of whom used to be his enemy.    (Source: Lezhin US)    Note: Chapter count includes 5 extras.

title: Choinui Game Bangsong
description: After being transferred into the dimension of [Reverse Planet], the world’s most popular online VR game, the ordinary college student Baek Woohyun returns. It was the homecoming he had dreamed of… except the damn game is still running as if nothing ever happened, and the vengeful shades of comrades who died over there hound him day and night, urging him to take revenge. Determined to uncover the connection between the game and the world he escaped from, Woohyun logs back into [Reverse Planet]. For better or for worse, he doesn’t cross over again, but he does appear on a streamer’s broadcast during a chance encounter… Then an anonymous watcher named "Viewer 62" sends him a message.   "How does it feel to be back in reality?"  (Source: Naver, translated)

title: 100-man Undong YouTuber-in Naega I Webtoon-eseoneun Choneungnyeokdo Eomneun Jjeori? -Buje: Wollae Geuraesseum-
description: Take a look at this—!!   [Saving the World at the Gym!]   The year is 20XX. With the invasion of monsters straight out of a B-movie, humanity opens its eyes to a new power! Among the heroes who ooze strength and power without having to work out is a "tiger" who guards the Stronger Gym... No, it’s not a tiger, it’s a man wearing a tiger-patterned t-shirt and pants! Today, he greets his gym babies with joy like any other day.   "What? A gym baby?! Don't be scared. Come on in!"   Come watch the main character and his Stronger Gym friends cultivate a healthy mind and a healthy body!  (Source: KakaoPage, translated)

title: The Villain’s Daughter Plans to Run Away
description: I'll make my evil dad good and survive this time!    I was killed for being the villain's daughter, but when I opened my eyes, I was 14 years back in time. Too young and penniless, I decided to wait to escape... But why should I have to run away?! What if I train my dad to be good instead?    (Source: Manta)

title: Dongteuneun Romance
description: Blacked out from drinking, just what happened with his crush during that time...?!    Dong Saebyeok, a scary-looking but softhearted guy who falls for his cool-headed junior, Seo Gwangchae. Watch their cute campus romance unfold because no matter how bad the day is, the sun always rises!

title: Stranger
description: "A stranger changed my life."    While struggling to survive his troubled life with no one to rely on, Ji-Ho Kim stumbles into Woojung Yeon and follows him. "Favors are not free." Ji-Ho's way of seeing the world paints Woojung as an untrustworthy character, but Woo-Jung's continuous kindness finally begins to open Ji-Ho's heart.  (Source: Manta, edited)   Note: Includes 20 extra chapters.

title: The Pest on My Shoulder
description: Nam Gun-min has been having vivid, X-rated dreams almost every night for the past week. These aren’t your run of the mill, typical sexy dreams filled with hot women. No, these dreams keep featuring Jeong Hu, a close sunbae who Gun-min previously had zero sexual attraction to. Gun-min manages to wake up in the middle of one of these torturous dreams only to find real man at the end of his bed. To make matters worse, that man isn’t even Jeong Hu, but the strange underclassman he had just met earlier that night, only now he's dressed like a devil. Why does he look so....good?    (Source: Lezhin US)    Note: Includes two extra chapters.<i/>

title: No Moral
description: I'll see you in court... I hope!    Yun-Shin Do is a young and compassionate lawyer who gets recruited by a corporate law firm. His boss, Se-Heon Kang, is a domineering partner who prioritizes paychecks and only looks out for himself. Will Yun-Shin be able to prove his worth in court and find a way to melt his boss's ice-cold heart?    (Source: Manta)

title: Toy Complex
description: All her friends do is talk about sex! But Yuna the virgin’s very single, and she has a plan to score some action. When she meets a cuddly teddy bear mascot (real name: Minseok), she does what any sane(?) girl would do: stalk him at the bar where he works and proposition him for a one-night stand. It was very enjoyable~ but he’s not sticking around. It's too bad though since they’re actually in the same major at school. Will this be an awkward city or are they destined for some more serious playtime?    (Source: Tapas)    Note: Includes the prologue.

title: 11-si 59-bunui Dangsinege
description: The weather forecast didn't say it was going to rain but Lee Mokhwa knew it would, that's only one of the things he knew was going to happen. No, he can't see the future, he's actually stuck in a time loop, reliving December 24th endlessly. The only person besides himself who seems to be aware of the repeated time is Choi Gyun, the childhood friend he drifted apart from, but he's avoiding the topic. Gyun must know something he doesn't, he could even be the cause of the time loop, Mokhwa is determined to make him break the chain.  (Source: Bomtoon, translated)

title: Story of Our Lives
description: Hyunwoo goes into deep shock and depression after his girlfriend of 10 years, Jihye, dies from a car crash. As if the grief wasn’t enough, his guilt-stricken conscience becomes embodied in an apparition of Jihye, whose constant presence reminds him of the horrors of that night. Desperate to put the past behind him, Hyunwoo takes his mother's advice and agrees to go on a blind date. Maybe a new girl is what he needs to get a fresh start. Someone he can make new memories with. But when he meets his date, all he can think about is Jihye. Because she looks exactly like his dead ex-girlfriend.    (Source: Lezhin)

title: The Black Leopard Family's Snow Leopard Baby
description: The child of a black leopard and a snow leopard shapeshifter, 7-year-old Tiel escapes her abusive family to seek refuge with the father she never knew. All she wants is safety, but her father, the feared Duke Asterian, has other plans... to give his long-lost daughter a loving family and a wonderful home! Now, Tiel is set on protecting her family from the evil forces who want to take her away. Can she fight these foes to save her new home? Or will Tiel lose her loved ones once and for all?  (Source: Tapas)

title: Lucky in Love
description: Stepping in a puddle, slipping and falling, getting pooped on by a bird—Hwi-Bum seems to attract misfortune like a magnet. Universally acknowledged as the unluckiest guy on Earth, he finds himself partnered with Yeon-Woo, a student with the gloomiest aura he's ever seen, for a group project. Initially attributing it to his typical luck, Hwi-Bum is surprised when Yeon-Woo not only takes on the project single-handedly but also brings an unexpected twist to Hwi-Bum's fortune. As Hwi-Bum starts to revel in his newfound luck, he dismisses the subtle signs of Yeon-Woo's seemingly growing obsession. Is Hwi-Bum truly starting to turn his luck around with this relationship, or is there more to Yeon-Woo's fixation than meets the eye?    (Source: Lezhin US)   Note: Includes 14 extra chapters.

title: Coffin Jackson
description: Ever wondered where dead bodies go in the criminal underworld? That’s where Roman Piotroski comes in. A funeral director by day and cadaver disposal specialist by night, Roman makes a living processing and selling dead bodies for Fisher, a ruthless New Jersey gangster. After a falling out with Fisher, Roman finds himself recruited by a trio of misfit criminals in a hair-brained scheme to rob his old boss. Enter an extremely valuable corpse everyone’s dying to get their hands on, and it’s anyone’s game, with life and death at stake!    (Source: WEBTOONS)

title: I Became the Young Villain's Sister-in-Law
description: Reborn as an amnesiac extra, Elia craves a simple life in the forest. But fate intervenes when she rescues a child who uncannily resembles her lost brother... and is the story’s villain. Suddenly thrust into the main plot, she fights to lift a fairy curse off the villain’s brother and even enters a contract marriage. Elia is beginning to wonder… is she the cause of all this trouble?    (Source: Tapas)

title: Choemyeoneuro Geunyeodeureul Hamraksikineun Beop
description: After obtaining a candle with the power of hypnosis, Seon-U hypnotizes Su-A, who raised him and is like his mother. Seon-U, who had a crush on Su-A, inches his hands towards her privates…  (Source: TOPTOON, translated)

title: Praesepe Outside the Cage
description: Trapped inside the world of "Praesepe in a Cage", Ju-Yeon Yun becomes the game’s female protagonist, Praesepe, and must navigate a tangled web of romance and danger to escape. After completing all five male protagonists' storylines, she’s thrust into "secret mode," where everything changes. The characters she thought she knew are acting strangely, and Praesepe begins uncovering secrets—memories, death, and a mysterious new ally named Grand Duke Fenrick. As she gets closer to finding the "real" male protagonist, Praesepe must decide who to trust, and whether escaping the game is truly the freedom she desires.   (Source: WEBTOON)

title: Ireumeul Matchumyeo
description: Jin and Junghyeok are childhood friends, but they have been in a cold war for years! What happens when their souls swap? One day, both of them found their old name tags from middle school and went to bed with old memories in mind... to wake up in the body of the one that they hate the most! How will they deal with day to day life? Is there a way back?

title: Igye Museun Hwangbi
description: A customer service worker Jin Ye-Rom has encountered a very troublesome customer, causing her number one employee status to disappear. Wanting her status back, she decides to find that customer and personally apologize to him, but, suddenly, she finds herself in a strange place. The next thing she knows, she's become the Empress, and that troublesome customer turns out to be none other than the Emperor himself!

title: Love on My Terms
description: Cha-Min is an A-list actor with a talent for reading lines — AND people’s thoughts. Mo-Gyum is an actor getting his career back on track after a mysterious accident left him scarred as a kid. The relentless Cha-Min can’t read scene-partner Mo-Gyum's thoughts at all, making him all the more intriguing... He can't get in his head, but that doesn’t stop him from trying to get inside his body. After all, they're just rehearsing the drama... The scenes heat up as the clothes come off between these two!    (Source: Lezhin US)

title: Hellper 2: Killberos
description: Jang Dae-Ho, the infamous vice president of the Nine Snake Family gang overthrown after 'the purge', was disposing of dead assassins bodies in the ruins of the grand earthquake that struck the forsaken city of Kana when he found a starved and nameless orphan. Taking him under his wing and giving him the name "Gwangnam" would be the catalyst for a long and bloody revenge journey under which the name "Killberos" began. Thus, this is the dark story of Gwangnam's crime infested upbringing, riddled with the many street rivalries and gangs' power struggles that preceded the formation of the fence project and "Killberos", the guard tribe, as we know it before his passing.

title: On Your Knees, Your Highness!
description: Everyone dreams of knocking out their insufferable boss, but what if that boss is a war hero, a duke, and constantly breathing down your neck? For Chloe, enduring Curtis's relentless inspections was a daily struggle... Until a royal marriage decree offers her an unexpected way out.    (Source: WEBTOON)

title: Hard For My Boss
description: After going through all the trouble to land himself a job at the big company, he's faced with a team leader that calls him by his first name...   "Hey... I really missed you..."    "Ma'am... Why are you doing this to me?"  (Source: TOPTOON+)

title: Faking It In Style
description: Suah is a petite, red-haired designer who leads a drama-free life… until one morning, she wakes up tied to a chair. The man scowling down at her is none other than her roommate’s scary older brother, Seung-hyun, the owner of the apartment she’s been living in rent-free for the past eight years. He gives her one week to pack her bags and move out. Panicked Suah tries to plead and beg, but the coldhearted Seung-hyun’s got the upper hand. That is, until he runs into Suah at work. Turns out she’s not only an essential member of the new team he put together, but also one of the best employees he’s ever worked with. Like it or not, the two are stuck with each other for the foreseeable future… Can Suah convince Seung-hyun to let her stay? And how will Seung-hyun keep things professional with the woman he wants to kick out of his house?    (Source: Tappytoon)

title: Threads of Time
description: High school student Moon Bin Lee has difficulty sleeping due to a recurring nightmare: he's stranded over a thousand years in the past chasing a dark-haired girl into a deep abyss.   Before long, the nightmare overwhelms him, and he is unable to tell whether he is Moon Bin, a Seoul teenager at the end of the second Millennium, or Sa Kyoung Kim, the son of a prominent warrior family in the middle of the first Millennium. People in his present-day life assume roles in his historical life as he struggles to learn exactly who he is and what he's expected to do, straddling a transmigratory portal through time and space.  In the present, his school's kendo club battles to stay in the championships...but in the past, Moon Bin finds himself at the threshold of a territorial dispute on the plains of Mongolia ...   (Source: Tokyopop)

title: The Tremors
description: "I thought of my tremors as an ability, not an illness!"   Eugene begins using his vibrating body to pleasure various women he encounters throughout his life.  (Source: DAYcomics)

title: Subscribers Only
description: Doyoon Cha is just another office drone working for the Lamis company. But after work, Doyoon secretly becomes the sexy Mil_Tea! As Mil_Tea, Doyoon live streams all kinds of naked, erotic acts for his online fans who are always thirsty for more! Doyoon soon catches the eye of his handsome co-worker Hanseok Choi, who definitely wants what Mil_Tea is offering. Can these two keep things professional at work or get caught bringing the hot, sweaty action from the digital world to the real world?    (Source: Tapas)    Note: Includes one side story.

title: UnderPrin
description: Jin is a famous singer whose true identity is the legendary devil “Lord Perdien”. Even his son Miryu does not know that his father is the legendary devil. To protect his son, Jin fights.   (Source: WEBTOONS)

title: Cradle of Imae
description: In the demon-plagued kingdom of Jinyeok, a child named Ryujin is born. Upon seeing him, a passing exorcist utters a warning: “Beware of fire.” Yet by the time Ryujin is grown, the evil spirts have robbed him of all he holds dear. As his home stands engulfed in flames, the exorcist reappears, telling Ryujin to head for the Exorcism Academy. Here he will learn how to combat the demons that torment him. But on the way, he runs into the mysterious Imae. Henceforth, their bodies and souls become entwined… For Imae is his intense and unrelenting fate.    (Source: Lezhin US)    Note: The chapter count includes 2 extra stories.

title: A Cadet Becomes a Prophet?!
description: Fernan Fallenberg, heir to the Empire’s most prestigious household and a prodigy of the Imperial Academy, was infamous for valuing everything by money and keeping others at a distance. One day, he is struck by lightning, and a foreign presence tries to invade his mind. Resisting with force, he instead witnesses the Book of Prophecies reveal itself—foretelling the world’s end.  (Source: WEBTOON)

title: Four's a Crowd
description: Living alone is tough, as it is... Living with a roommate could bring occasional problems... What if you bring three, four into the mix...?  (Source: Toomics)

title: War of Corpses
description: Uce, a down-on-his-luck young man, dreams of becoming the champion in the brutal and legendary War of Corpses—a sport where necromancers and their knights battle for supremacy. In a desperate bid, he revives Eleonora, an abandoned corpse who claims to have been the deadliest mercenary alive. There are two big problems, though. One, Eleonora is alive — a fact that cannot be revealed at any cost. Two, she and Uce can’t seem to coordinate their movements. Can this unlikely duo overcome all obstacles, win the War of Corpses, and prove everyone wrong?  (Source: WEBTOON)

title: The Skill of Being Unseen
description: The extremely hideous Joonyoung finds himself duped into an unfair contract with a mischievous succubus. To survive, he must seduce women, a daunting task for someone like him. However, he’s granted a unique superpower to aid in his mission: the ability to become invisible! With this newfound skill, Joonyoung navigates a world of unseen opportunities and challenges, all while trying to outsmart the supernatural forces at play. Can he master the art of invisibility and turn the odds in his favor, or will the succubus's game prove too dangerous?  (Source: Lezhin US)

title: Honey Sweet Part-Time Job
description: It seems like Seo's new part-time job is going to be great... first off, it pays well. Second off... he's surrounded by absolute hotties!  (Source: Toomics)

title: The Grand Duke's Fox Princess
description: Help, I'm stuck as a fox and can’t turn back into a human! I, Princess Eristella Leonalph, am the greatest magician in the empire, but I've been cursed to be hated by everyone. I was chasing after dark magicians when I became stuck like this! How am I supposed to break the curse? Maybe my fiancé, Grand Duke Heinlesione, can help, but our relationship is rocky… Well, even if I become a palace pet, I can’t give up! After all, some things are easier when you’re an adorable little fox.    (Source: Tapas)

title: How to Train Your Healer
description: Asta Chronicles, the cornerstone of MMORPGs, has surged into the stagnant gaming market like a blazing comet. On the day of the highly anticipated 'Mythic' difficulty raid update, the largest in recent memory, JJA (Sung Chahyun), the leader of the renowned guild 'Haste'—ranked first across all servers and boasting the most first clears—is thrilled. However, his excitement is dashed when he logs in to find that his partner healer is enlisting in the military that very day! Unable to tackle the new raid without his crucial partner, JJA posts a recruitment notice for new team members. Yet, is able to pass the most difficult requirement of them all: a one-on-one interview. After a day of meticulously managing his block list and flooding the chat with ♡♡s, a surprising newcomer appears—a perfect partner seemingly sent from the devs themselves! Can JJA nurture this adorable newbie, HealTeaser, into a raid-ready healer?    (Source: Lezhin US)

title: Boutique at 97 Sheldon Street
description: Feeling burned out from work, Yoo Eun decides to relieve stress through her one and only hobby: gaming. When the system update window appears floating in thin air in front of her, she suddenly finds herself being transported inside the game! With no means of escaping and desperate to survive in this strange new world, she manages to secure a job as a tailor at the boutique at 97 Sheldon Street, where she catches the attention of the mysterious noble Ashton Richmond. He says he will help her, but it’s almost as if he’s been waiting for her to show up the whole time…    (Source: Lezhin US, edited)

title: The Drunken Boss
description: Cha Yiseul is rich, reckless, and completely unapologetic about it. With her looks, money, and an endless roster of casual flings, life is one big party—until her mother cuts her off and kicks her out. Just as she hits rock bottom, a mysterious woman named Kang Sori appears, offering her a lifeline…and stirring up blurry memories of a drunken night they may—or may not—have shared. Who exactly is Sori, and why does Yiseul keep thinking about her?  (Source: Lezhin US)

title: Her Bucket List
description: Ra-Ri’s entire world falls apart when her boyfriend dies. Overwhelmed with the pain of losing the love of her life, she decides to go through the bucket list they made together before joining him in death. Things take an unexpected turn when fate links her to Han-Sol, her neighbor who has a painful story of his own. The two embark on a journey to heal their wounds and learn there is more to life than trauma and heartbreak.    (Source: WEBTOONS, edited)

title: The Gangster Daughter of the Henchman Duke's Family
description:
I’ve been reborn as Leonora, the illegitimate child of the dukedom of Hachaina. Though death will soon befall our ill-fated house, this storybook life is better than the betrayal I suffered in my past life. But what if I could change destiny? I’ll tame wild beasts, harness the power of auror, and do whatever it takes to save my family. Also, I’m not alone. Someone has reincarnated into this story to sabotage me. Will I have enough time to change my fate? Or will the House of Hachania fall again?

(Source: Tapas)

title: Guardian Angel for Cursed Duke
description: Astria leads a peaceful life as the keeper of the eternal haven.   Until one day, a man on the brink of death shows up. The man turns out to be Duke Earhart, the most handsome and youngest swordmaster in the empire. Astria manages to save the dying Duke with her magic, But the healing magic is only maintained in close proximity…     After listening to Earhart’s pleas, she decides to follow him into the human world.   With her accidental introduction as a Duchess, Astria slowly adjusts to her new life.   Will Astria be able to find true love and break the curse?!    (Source: Pocket Comics)

title: My Noisy Neighbor
description: A new couple moved in upstairs and the noise they make is unbearable! Time to get revenge on them. But wait, are these guys really a couple? And how can such a cute girl exist? A funny, cute story for the ages!  (Source: DAYcomics)

title: The Greatest Wolf of My Life
description: Eunbyul’s life isn’t perfect—she’s working a dead-end job at the local convenience store and has zero romantic prospects—but at least she has her own cozy space. But her peace is instantly ruined when a pair of boxers float over to her roof. As if a landmine has been set off, Eunbyul’s thrown into a number of crazy scenarios: an unfortunate misunderstanding with her new next-door neighbor, who also happens to be a pop idol in hiding, a surprise reunion with an old crush, and a literal run-in with an old family friend! With so much going on, Eunbyul’s life is far from comfortable and full of the unimaginable. Will she be labeled a perverted stalker forever, or will all these bad situations lead to some good fortune?  (Source: Seven Seas Entertainment)

title: Hole Journal: Unlocked
description: Women are just as driven by desire as men, but they suppress their instincts for different reasons. I specialize in breaking through such stubborn blockages.   “If you leave this hole as it is, you’ll be in big trouble.”  (Source: DAYcomics)

title: 3 Level Combination
description: In a dystopian future in which robots are becoming increasingly commonplace, a young boy named Hogu lives in near poverty with his grandmother and sister. Though he innately possesses a kind soul, he is ostracized by his classmates and frequently bullied. At the beginning of the story, we find Hogu, friendless and alone - until he meets a robot girl...and our story begins.

title: Redemption Camp
description: Da-ae’s past and present is filled with dirty little secrets. It was about time someone noticed. The only problem is Gitae, the minister’s son, is not your ordinary someone. He gathers all the people that suffered from Da-ae’s dirty acts and starts the road to her redemption.   (Source: Lezhin US)    Note: Chapter count includes a prologue, 15 side stories and an epilogue.

title: Body Restraint
description: “You treated me like some loser! Do you know how that feels?”   He's been abused and exploited by women all his life, but one day, he is given the powers of 'body restraint' by a mysterious being...   "Please, help me!! I can't move my body at all!!"  (Source: DAYcomics)

title: Love of Cloud and Rain
description: On the opening day of veterinarian Choi Jung’s new animal hospital, everything goes wrong when he discovers a pesky little lizard out front. But this creature insists he is the son of the Dragon King of the East Sea. This being is not only a dragon, but in his human form, insists on sharing, ahem, “life essence” with the human. And in his pursuit of becoming a proper adult dragon, will Woonwoo the dragon prince succeed in finding the inverted scales he so desperately seeks?    (Source: Lezhin US)    Note: Chapter count includes 9 side story chapters and one April Fools Day special.

title: Broken Melody
description: Minhee used to be a world-famous piano prodigy until one mistake sent her life spiraling. Her confidence shaken, her family broken and her life in ruins, all she can do is hope for a chance to make things better. That's when she meets Eun Hyun, the neighborhood piano teacher whose life has been filled with tragedies of his own.  (Source: Lezhin)

title: Lv. 99 Princess of Black Flame
description: When portals called “gates” opened in 1997, humanity was thrown into chaos as monsters ravaged the planet. Countless lives were lost, including Eunha Cha’s mother. Left to fend for herself, Eunha one day mysteriously awakens a new power. Drafted into the military to fight alongside other Hunters, she sets out on what was supposed to be a routine mission inside a C-rank gate. But when she becomes trapped inside, she’s forced to fight relentlessly against waves of monsters as the gate resets endlessly... until a voice calls out to her.  (Source: WEBTOON)

title: Between Fate and Fortune
description: How many coincidences does it take for something to become fate? For Chae Dojun the only thing fate has ever brought him is bad luck and misfortune. As a result, he refuses to believe in such romantic notions, and instead has his mind set on a simpler goal: live happily. But with an ailing parental figure, a “brother” who keeps getting into trouble, and an ever-growing series of debts, even such a simple goal is beginning to feel unachievable. But maybe, for once, fate has something different in mind. Because, whilst the first few times Dojun meets Heo Tae-seok are nothing short of disastrous, they just can’t stop bumping into one another. Could these coincidences be fate after all? And maybe — just maybe — this fate might finally bring fortune.    (Source: Lezhin US)

title: I Met the Male Lead in Prison
description: As if waking up in an R-rated dark romance wasn't surprising enough, it turns out that Ianna is in the prison where the cursed male lead, Rikedoran, is also being held! Despite having no memories of her own, Ianna thankfully has full knowledge of the story, which leads her to visit Rikedoran out of curiosity. In his cell, she discovers rather shocking truths about the reality of his curse and his past. It doesn't take long for her to wonder whether she'll be able to leave him and the plot be...    (Source: Tapas)

title: The Dirtiest High
description: A one-night stand turns into a messy love story.  Josh, a brilliant lawyer and obsessive neat freak, is coping with a broken engagement. The only upside? His firm changed cleaning services. But when the new cleaner is Angel—his one-night stand from last night—chaos ensues. Is this love or just a messy disaster waiting to unfold?    (Source: Manta)    Note: Includes six side story chapters.

title: Yeoreum Monyeo
description: Kim Se Myung, a medical student from a humble background, ends up tutoring in a rural area during the summer vacation through the introduction of his girlfriend. There, he encounters a beautiful mother, a housemaid, and even a doll-like girl… Overwhelmed by their beauty, he is approached by an enchanting girl who says,   “Teacher, do you want to have sex with our mom?”  (Source: TOPTOON, translated)

title: 2019 Rookie Danpyeonseon: Jiok Camp
description: The anthology includes: 1. Momo Cinnamon (모모 시나몬) by Yun-Su Lee 2. Wangbi (왕비; Queen) by Yeong-Chae Hae 3. Nancy wa Lara (낸시와 라라; Nancy and Lara) by Ri-Geon Lee 4. Yeouhaegol (여우해골) by Su-Seong Yu 5. Be my baby by Gon-Ji 6. Eomma (엄마; Mom) by Samgueok 7. Oraeorae Haengbokage Saratseumnida?! (오래오래 행복하게 살았습니다?!; Will We Live Happily Ever After?!) by Jep Park 8. Najungmalgo Jigeum! (나중말고 지금!; Not Later, Now!) by SONNA 9. Bimildongmaeng (비밀동맹; A Secret Alliance) by Du-O 10. Immatchumeul Heoyonghagesseoyo (입맞춤을 허용하겠어요; I’ll Let You Kiss Me) by Seo-Yeon 11. Ttangeseo Umteun Nalgae (땅에서 움튼 날개; Wings From the Ground) by Hyeon-Jeong Kim 12. Eung, Ni Eolgul (응, 니 얼굴; Yeah, Your Face) by Nongyung10 13. Boineungeot (보이는것; What You See) by Ga-Yeon Kim 14. Eo Dark Sini-ui Sowon (어둑시니의 소원; The Dark Sini’s Wish) by ZQ 15. Noineul Wihan Naraneun Eopda (노인을 위한 나라는 없다; There Is No Country for the Elderly) by ALTZ 16. Going Home by Sin-Jin 17. Goyangipyeonuijeom (고양이편의점; Cat Convenience Store) by So-Yeon Cha 18. Gureume Garin Dal (구름에 가린 달; The Moon Hidden by Clouds) by Nagyeopbeoseot 19. Myeolmanggwa Silheomui Huisaengyang (멸망과 실험의 희생양; The Scapegoat for Destruction and Experimentation) by Meotjinsegye 20. Jjaksarang Jeonmunga K Yang (짝사랑 전문가 K 양; K, the One-Sided Love Expert) by Gonggonggugong 21. Yuriro Mandeun Jip (유리로 만든 집; A Glass House) by Jin-Yu 22. Taeyangi Nal Wihae Naerijjoeji Aneuna (태양이 날 위해 내리쬐지 않으나; The Sun Shines for Me) by Nallo 23. Gyeolhonjeonya (결혼전야; The Day Before the Wedding) by Min-Gyeong Kim 24. Chadichanmaeum (차디찬마음; A Cold Heart) by Soyom

title: Fallen to Paradise
description: Ange, the daughter of Duke Glaster, believes her life is all planned out as she is set to marry Philip Cardiner, the rightful heir to the throne. However, her plans are disrupted when Philip's brother, William Cardiner, schemes against him and removes him from the line of succession. In order to secure his power, William forces Ange to marry Aiden Fitzroy, an illegitimate child born between the emperor and a commoner. Will Ange learn to love the humble stranger she was forced to marry?    (Source: WEBTOONS)

title: My Egocentric Boss is Obsessed With Me
description: For the chronically single and overworked Soohan, thirsting over his boss's firm booty is his greatest guilty pleasure. It's sad and pathetic, but after a long string of lousy exes and an even longer dry spell, the handsome and talented Mr. Woo seems just that much hotter. Sure, he comes with blazing red flags like his egocentric personality, his bizarre preferences, and his sadistic tendency to overwork his employees. But as off-putting as these qualities are, they aren't enough to deter Soohan's massive crush - especially when the man keeps calling him "babe" and giving him special attention outside the office. Why on earth is his demonic yet charming boss asking him to pick out his bedroom sheets and cooking him his favorite dinner when they aren't even dating? Though he doesn't want to get his hopes up, Soohan can't help but wonder whether his self-centered boss is actually obsessed with him...!    (Source: Tappytoon)    Note: includes six side story chapters.

title: The Girl That Wet the Wall
description: Life is good (if not a bit boring) for Jun-Gyu, who works as a part-time receptionist at a local youth center. One day, a young personal trainer joins the gym... only she’s the girl who took his virginity 6 years ago!    (Source: Lezhin US, edited)

title: Moonrise by the Cliff
description: I dared to fall in love with him.  A lone house perched on the cliff of a miserable little island, and the man who was dethroned and exiled there. I watched him on behalf of my sickly father... and I dared to fall in love with him. Without even knowing what my fate entailed.  (Source: Manta)   Note: The Revised Version is completed with 74 chapters while the Mature Version is completed with 77 chapters. Chapter count includes 18 side story chapters.

title: The S-Class Guide as Sweet as Honey
description: Jin Hyoseop is an S-class guide whose powers leave him aroused and smelling as sweet as honey. In order to hide his embarrassing secret, he joins a C-class guild on the condition that he only does the minimum guiding required to heal his esper guildmates. It shouldn’t be an issue since the guild’s kind and understanding commander Andante assures him that they don’t handle any dangerous jobs. But then, why does everyone keep coming back injured and in desperate need of guiding? Little does Hyoseop know that he has just stepped into a lair of criminal S-class espers!  (Source: Tappytoon)

title: Kill the Lights
description: During his youth, child star Haley Rusk once captivated the people of America with his charming face and acting. But now, as a narcissistic adult, he is notorious for something completely different. From scandalous sex to drugs, he’s done it all-- Haley Rusk is a bonafide Hollywood Bad Boy, in the worst way possible. After a very public and drunken confession to America’s Sweetheart, Noah Raycarlton, his reputation finally hits rock bottom. Haley turns to some supernatural blood magic as a last-ditch attempt to repair his life, which ends in his body being possessed by the soul of a mercenary named Mason Taylor. Mason, while not confident in acting, seems to have a deep-rooted history with Noah. What kind of traumatic past do the two of them share? And, what really happened to Haley Rusk?   (Source: TappyToon)

title: I'm Not the Final Boss' Lover!
description: When protagonist Jun Karentia enters a game as a support mage, she's all set to guide hero Fabian to success. But, oops! The game throws her a curveball when Fabian ditches her in round two, and Mayer Knox, Fabian's rival and secret final boss, recruits her as vice-captain for his corps. The problem? He's the final boss and now everyone thinks they're dating! Now, Jun's mission is to outwit Fabian, transform the final boss into the game's new hero, and put an end to those pesky romance rumors.    (Source: Tapas)

title: I Have A Boyfriend
description: "A romantic campus love story about a gay soccer star and his regained first love!"    The campus soccer star Hyunho runs into his first love Gyul at the university. Back then in middle school, Gyul saw Hyunho as a friend and never learned about his feelings. Hyunho, still in love with the withdrawn Gyul, lends him a helping hand. Because Gyul's aunt is taking advantage of him, Gyul has to support his younger brother. To thank Hyunho, Gyul helps him navigate university assignments. What starts out as a caring friendship, soon flourishes into a romantic relationship. But then, Hyunho receives an offer to play abroad in the major league. Will Hyunho and Gyul be able to overcome this hardship, too?   (Source: Netcomics)

title: I’m Not a Soccer Genius!
description: Suit up! Jian is an Italian soccer league benchwarmer who needs to convince his childhood friend that he's a star player. A lucky goal or two might do the trick, but how long can he keep up the ruse? Unless, unbeknownst to him, Jian really is a genius...  (Source: WEBTOONS)

title: Like it Ruff
description: There is no one in the world Choi Euncheol loves more than his dog Jong-gu. Having been there for him through heartbreak and happiness alike, the pup is as loyal as can be. The two are best friends, and more alike than they look…because Euncheol loves a little bark and bite in the bedroom. But when Jong-gu mistakes a little nighttime pet play for an attack on his masochistic master, he valiantly rushes to his defense and bites the "assailant" square on the buttocks! Euncheol decides to end things with his lover, and is now left with no one but his precious pet to help him grieve his relationship. When he awakes the next morning, however, Jong-gu has gone missing! In his place is a cute guy who seems strangely familiar, but Euncheol can’t quite put his paw -er, finger- on why…    (Source: Lezhin US)

title: You Think It's Easy Rewriting a Story?
description: Reincarnation stories are all the rage these days, but I never thought I’d be the one getting reborn! But still, life as a rich man’s beautiful daughter is pretty sweet... except for one thing. No matter what I do, where I run, or who I romance, this novel is dead-set on getting me hitched to the handsome duke destined to kill me! There must be some way to change my fate, right? I won't go out like this!    (Source: Tapas)

title: Contractual Marriage to a Surly Duke
description: Tragedy strikes when Selene’s parents pass away, and her family loses everything. With no other option at her disposal, she works multiple jobs to provide for her siblings. Luckily an opportunity for financial security arises; all she must do is marry the duchess’s son, Armand, and produce an heir. But the home situation Selene enters is complex, and Armand, once a great commander, is housebound with a mysterious condition. She’s determined to find the root of his illness, but she might drudge up some skeletons in the closet instead...  (Source: Tapas)

title: Mom Swap Pact
description: Eun-Nam's got it bad for his best friend Ji-Dong's mom. So he throws out a filthy deal. He offers up his own stepmom. That's how their dirty pact begins. Two shameless punks, both plotting to get into each other's mom's pants.   "It's only fair. We swap moms."  (Source: DAYcomics)

title: Amentia
genres: Comedy, Ecchi, Romance, Slice of Life, Supernatural
description: Lee Wee-jin normally endures each of his his high school days as a servant his perfect sister Lee Wi-na. However, he has a secret he can't share with anyone—that he can materialize his delusions as he pleases. When he needs to relieve stress caused by his sister, he materializes a version of his own sister in order to punish her.  But one day a black-haired transfer student says the following to Wee-jin while wielding a knife against him: "You damn delusioner that materializes delusions, we wakers will get rid of all of you!"    (Source: Game of Kekeke)

title: Hiding My True Self
description: Mary Siringa has finally realized the error of her ways as a spoiled burden to her family. In her search for a job, she runs into Prince Grandiel, disguised as his alter ego, Nepenthes. Intrigued by Mary, Grandiel draws up a magical contract for her to be a maid in the imperial palace and work as his spy.
