Find out how Beopgyu survives as Han in the game he created--not as the main character but as the master of villains!   (Source: WEBTOONS)

title: Welcome to the Dungeon Hotel
description: Lee Jeonghyo, daughter of a legendary S-rank hunter, despises dungeons. After quitting her job, she plans to open a cafe in a beach town to honor her late father. But stepping into the old motel she bought, she unexpectedly awakens as a hotelier-class hunter! Now, she’s juggling hotel management with aiding stranded hunters in her dungeon hotel. Things get even trickier when her old classmate and S-rank hunter, Han Wuhyeon, checks in. Can she handle the chaos while reconnecting with her past?    (Source: Tapas)

title: Pogguneur Girdeurigo Domachyeobeoryeossda
description: God gave me a chance to relive my life. Before the rebirth, I had been used for the past 400 years as the empire's sword. And so, I swore to destroy the empire. I found the young prince of the country and became his teacher. I taught him how to become a tyrant and asked for the country.     "I will do the lady's will."    He conquered the whole empire for me, and I ran away.    "I came to take you, Charlize Ronan." Dylan became a perfect tyrant and searched the entire empire for me.    "You tamed me, so why did you run away?"

title: Breastfeeding
description: A single father raising twins wants nothing but the best for them, but he didn't expect that he'd need breast milk! A beautiful married woman offers to sell them, and things start to get real steamy...    (Source: TOPTOON+, edited)

title: Yeojuege Beoryeojin Akdangeul Guhaneun Bangbeop
description: I tried to save the sub male lead, who was poisoned by the female lead, but an accident happened! He said he would repay the favor, but he randomly sent me to the most notorious villain, the Family of Assassins?!    The family that consists of the oldest brother, a knight in the Imperial Army preparing for a revolt, the second brother, a reverend with a large bounty on his head, and a father who is the greatest villain of all time...    Will I be safe in this villainous family throughout my three-year contract?    Note: Promotional prologue for the homonym web novel.

title: Hooked and Cooked
description: The restaurant owner fell in love at first sight with... A mermaid!    Hae-Beom is often mistaken for a gangster due to his stern appearance. Sang-A, a customer who helped Hae-Beom, is a mermaid. Sang-A needs human saliva in order to get legs, so Hae-Beom selflessly offers a kiss... Once a day, every day.    Sang-A just needs legs... But will he like me someday?    (Source: Lezhin, translated)    Note: Includes five extra chapters.

title: Hide & Seek
description: The neglected grandson of a wealthy CEO, Sooha has a dark past that has resulted in a split personality. Sooha as himself can be cranky and distrustful, but his alter ego, Ray, is quite violent. This isn’t without good reason: the CEO has been orchestrating attacks on Sooha/Ray in order to find an invaluable jewel Ray has hidden. As part of his plan to find the gem, the CEO hires Soohyun to pretend to be Sooha’s bodyguard. Yet the more Sooha and Soohyun spend time with each other, the more both let down their guard…    (Source: Lezhin)

title: Shall We Ride?
description: "Girls who exercise... really are different." Shortly after reuniting with his first love, he is invited to join a cycling club. However, what he didn't know is that the club only consists of the hottest girls!  (Source: TOPTOON+)

title: Cram School Scandal
description: Looks like Dae-Man’s made it. He’s secured a job at the most prestigious cram school in Gangnam: an academy full of the rich, the studious, and the incredibly sexy. With hot girls seducing him from all directions, he’s all set to enjoy himself, but… What should he do if their advances put his cushy job at risk?!    (Source: Lezhin US)

title: The Rules of Rose Ivy Manor
description: Rosé Ovair thinks she woke up in a romantic love story where she's the rich heroine with a handsome fiancé, but her new home... isn't quite right. Her family seems to be keeping the cause of her father's death from her, and the servants all have fake names. Unfortunately, she is so enamored by the idea of marrying a good-looking man that she fails to notice much else! Will Rosé realize that breaking the rules of Rose Ivy Manor leads to deadly consequences before it's too late?    (Source: Tapas)

title: The Sea Captain's Bride
description: Arsel de Leahr knew her fate as soon as she realized she was inside the world of a novel. To prevent her eventual tragic death, she turns to the secret pirate of the empire, Duke Gael von Zenat. Arsel proposes marriage to him in exchange for access to her family's valuable sea territories, and he gladly agrees. But even though Arsel thinks their union is a mere formality, Duke Zenat falls deeper in love with her. Can their marriage stay afloat? Or is it doomed to sink to the bottom of the ocean?    (Source: Tapas)

title: Circle Zero: Otherworldly Hero Business
description: Young, successful, ambitious. The young CEO was born to conquer. After his untimely death, he wakes up in an alternate world as the eldest daughter of Count Hall McGrewd. "I may be in a damsel's body, but you won't find me in any distress!" Follow the newly reborn Farrell Hall McGrewd as she begins to take over in the other world of nobles and magic.  (Source: Pocket Comics)

title: Rix Vanus
description: The handsome and strapping Prince Rix Vanus has returned to his homeland after winning a brutal war against demons! And yet... Cursed by a vicious demon, the warrior prince is tormented nightly with shameful, lust-filled hallucinations as the demon takes the lascivious form of all his associates.     Escaping to the wild, miraculously, a benevolent divine spirit named Nuah joins the prince, seeking to break the curse and ease his suffering. And now, his nights —and more— are filled with Nuah.     (Source: Tapas)

title: Office Affairs
description: After three years of struggling to find a job, Kim Donghyuk manages to get hired at the esteemed company, DN group. Not only is it one of the most highly respected corporations in Korea, but it’s famous for having a plethora of sexy woman in its workforce. This is everything Donghyuk has ever dreamed of… except for just one thing. His boss, aka “the ruffian”, whose nickname stems from the brutal way she treats her subordinates, turns out to be his ruthless high school bully. Will Donghyuk be able to navigate the murky waters of his new office environment?  (Source: Lezhin X)

title: Mr. Kang's Son-in-law
description: Han Yisu’s proud of himself for winning over Kang Jihyung, the perfect partner. Not only is Jihyung incredibly rich and handsome, he’s also turned gay just for Yisu and Yisu alone. For Jihyung, Yisu’s willing to move in with Kang Jungman, Jihyung’s father and president of Cheonbong Corporations, and be the daughter-in-law that Jungman so seems to want. So just imagine his surprise when Jihyung suddenly brings home a woman and declares her his fiancee. And not just any woman, but Jungman’s mistress from his favorite bar. Enraged, Jungman chases his own son out of his home and vows to cut him off. Meanwhile Yisu, heartbroken and confused, wants to move out, but Jungman insists that Yisu needs to “take my son’s place.” Yisu’s always considered himself tough, but all this family drama is too much even for him… Just what is he to the house of Kang? Son-in-law, daughter-in-law, stepson, or maybe…all of the above?    (Source: Lezhin US)

title: The Duke's Family Is Not My Problem
description: After being cast out as a child over suspicions of illegitimacy, Perrianne was adopted by the queen of the neighboring kingdom and has been her loyal spy ever since. She's very happy with her new life when she suddenly hears perplexing news: Duke Exer's long-lost daughter has finally returned... except that's supposed to be her! Tasked with unmasking the imposter posing as herself, she's determined to just get the job done and get out of there. But will her family let her go so easily this time?    (Source: Tapas)

title: Yogurt Lady
description: A rumor is going around in a college town that a yogurt lady is going around drinking the yogurt of the male college students. Jun-U, curious to get to the bottom of the rumor, asks his yogurt lady about the rumor.   "I want to eat your yogurt, Jun-U."  (Source: DAYcomics, edited)

title: Kim O-Jin-gwa Isanghan Dongmuldeul
description: Veterinarian Kim Ohjin was unexpectedly summoned by a dragon. After successfully treating the dragon's pet, he returns home... only to find himself in another world. "Animals in another world are still animals, right?" I was a vet barely scraping by in the real world, but now, in this strange new world, I'm a renowned doctor? With my old clinic on the verge of closing, I'm setting my sights on a new opportunity—my second clinic, and, hopefully, a big success!  (Source: Naver, translated)

title: Gwanjon Lee Gang-Jin
description: Is he crazy? Or just the typical attention seeker?     Lee Gang-Jin, who doesn't understand the differences between people, and his Master Kwak-No who's the one helping him to understand the differences between people.     A warm human story of a student and his Master.    (Source: KakaoPage, translated)

title: You Mustn’t, Your Majesty!
description:
There's nobody more loyal to Crown Prince Armund than Rosetta, his personal knight. But somehow, he keeps dying, no matter how many times she goes back in time to protect him. By the fifth loop, Rosetta switches tactics and becomes his personal maid in hopes of sticking by his side... Yet earning his trust as a maid proves to be her most difficult mission to date. The deathly paranoid Armund just won't let Rosetta get close to him! If this continues, Armund will face yet another grisly death. But the fifth time's a charm, right? Right...?

(Source: Tappytoon)

title: In the Private Room
description: Yeo-ho is a k-pop idol who’s struggling to financially support his younger siblings and keep his comatose mother alive. Desperate to make it big, he tries to make connections with the right people—but it all goes wrong when he finds himself on the brink of getting dragged into a drug scandal. The only person who can save him is the powerful representative of a conglomerate, Hyung-joo. To save his career, Yeo-ho must make Hyung-joo an offer that’ll change both of their lives…    (Source: Lezhin)

title: Undercover Princess
description: A prosecutor-turned-royal must race against the clock to solve a string of serial murders… before she becomes the next victim! When an overworked criminal justice employee is suddenly reborn into a novel as the rebellious Princess Charlotte, she also finds herself engaged to the handsome Duke Adler. However, there’s one big problem: according to the novel’s synopsis, Charlotte is doomed to be killed on her wedding night, and the duke is the prime suspect. Now this princess must go undercover to capture the culprit behind the series of sinister crimes… and maybe capture some hearts along the way!    (Source: Tappytoon)   Note: Includes five extra chapters.

title: Alice in Adultland
description: Gun-woo, who has never been involved with romance before in his life, falls down a rabbit-hole after losing a bet. "Wait, nobody told me that the owner of this shop was this handsome?!"   (Source: WebNovel)

title: One Coin Clear
description: “Die in the game, and die in real life.”    Tae-Yang must use his godlike gaming abilities to traverse the stages of rogue like virtual reality game “Dantalian” to find his trapped sister. The only catch is, in Dantalian, your life is synced to your character. If you die in the game, you die in real life.    (Source: WEBTOON, edited)   Note: Includes one extra chapter.

title: The Monster Princess
description: Princess Arbella Camulita believed she was destined for greatness since she was the empire's most powerful magician. But her hopes are destroyed after a dream reveals that she will become a monster and die due to being jealous of her half-sister, Judith, who will become the heroine and have a happy ending. Determined to prevent this awful end, Arbella decides to get close to Judith instead. Can this princess beat fate and prove that she's not the monster the future says she'll be?    (Source: Tapas)

title: Sura's Beloved
description: In the deepest depths of the mountains, there lies a small village where budding physicians learn how to help those in need. It is a place Cho-ah calls home, and he expects to spend the rest of his days there. However, everything changes when a mysterious, heavily wounded man appears out of nowhere. Cho-ah does his best to nurse the stranger back to health, despite the misgivings that his fellow students have about him. The man’s name is Mujin, and it soon becomes clear that the only person he trusts is Cho-ah. How will this handsome stranger change Cho-ah’s life?    (Source: Lezhin US)    Note: Includes four extra chapters.

title: Doraon Gyejeol
description: For some reason a collegian Maru needs a new place to stay and ends living with his friend’s bro, a novelist Yohan who complains about his late​ insomnia and asks Maru to help him fall asleep. Guess what happens next?

title: Gongjakgaeneun Michingaega Sanda
description: I lived my whole life as a slave, bound by a leash. But there was one thing that I was able to choose for myself: the place where I would die.   “…Any last words?”   My only friend asked me in a calm voice, and I quietly replied as I closed my eyes.   “Waaaah!”   …Waaaah? To cut to the chase, I was reincarnated. And not just as anyone, but as my friend’s youngest grandson. So, what am I going to do now? Well, what else can I do?   “I’m going to cause chaos.”  (Source: KakaoPage, translated)

title: This Wasn’t in My Adoption Plan!
description: I spent a decade cleaning up after Duke Havenik Brauno’s mess only to be murdered by him? Reincarnated as Aerin Brauno, an illegitimate child of the Brauno family, she’s horrified to find her adoptive father is none other than the man who killed her. This time, Aerin refuses to let him control her fate. Armed with the knowledge from her past life, she’s determined to escape his grasp and find a new path. Can she rewrite her destiny, outsmart the deadly Duke, and maybe even save the Brauno family?  (Source: WEBTOON)

title: The Promise Isn't Mine
description:
"Kill me, as you promised."

When her twin sister Leyla, the Holy Maiden, suddenly disappears one day, the ordinary Elena finds herself having to marry Crown Prince Kyle, a man infamous for his ruthlessness, in her stead. After a dreadful marriage ceremony, Kyle demands that a certain promise be fulfilled, to Elena’s confusion.

(Source: Manta)

title: Miss You, Lucifer
description: An A-list star has a crush on a rookie idol.    Jung-Woo 'Lucifer' Lee, a member of the obscure idol group Sweet Devils, dreams of making it big. His one claim to fame — an accidental pants-ripping on air — leads to a chance encounter with A-list star Kwon-Jun Kang. Turns out, Kwon-Jun has been harboring an intense crush on Lucifer. What will happen when an unexpected one-night stand leads to an ambiguous romance? How will this A-list star and D-list idol navigate their relationship?     (Source: Manta)

title: Marry Me, Alpha
description: Due to a huge debt, SeoWon (a Recessive Alpha) is a scholarship student in college by day, and serves guests as a barman by night. When he sees HeeYeon - a college student from his year (and a Dominant Alpha) - at the bar, SeoWon freaks out. And to top it all off, SeoWon is even more freaked out when HeeYeon says he’ll give him a large sum of money if he sleeps with him?!

title: The Baby Saint Wants To Destroy The World!
description: In her 99th life, Archwitch Lucifella was known as the scourge of the continent, wreaking chaos and havoc over the land. Looking to end her continuous rebirth cycle, she attempted to destroy the world and failed upon being defeated by the pope. But for her 100th life, she was reborn as the opposite of what she stood for—the baby saint prophesied to bring peace! Under such circumstances, can Lucifella bring ruin to this world instead of blessings and break her endless cycle?    (Source: Tapas)

title: Jeuksek Bokgwon
description: “I’m going to cash in the lottery ticket! Take off your clothes and have sex with me!”   Him-Chan, an ordinary office worker, receives a mysterious lottery ticket. He scratches the lottery ticket with doubt… Only to find it’s a sex coupon? Yet, as he hands over the mysterious ticket, the woman begins to undress on her own… Is this the beginning of a new chapter in his sex life?!  (Source: TOPTOON, translated)

title: Hilde Takes House Arpeggio
description: When Hilde Ruth is put on trial for defending herself from a lecherous customer, she meets Viscount Logen Strauss, who reveals that she's actually the granddaughter of the powerful Duke Arpeggio! Eager to become a noble, Hilde happily accompanies Logen to her ancestral home. But instead of a tearful family reunion, she's coldly ordered to pass a test to prove herself worthy of the Arpeggio name. Under such circumstances, will Hilde successfully claim her spot in House Arpeggio?    (Source: Tapas)

title: Following Namsoo to the Bathhouse
description: After bumping into a guy with a strong smell of soap on the bus, all Minjae could think about was that 'soap guy'. So when they meet again, Minjae, without any detailed plans, blindly follows him into a place called Namsoo's bathhouse and finds out...    (Source: Lezhin US)

title: Are you into that kind of thing?
description: A nerd Jin-U and a school star Chae-Yeong found out about each other's sex fantasy that could end their college life. Here's their fresh but unpredictable love story.  (Source: DAYcomics, edited)

title: No Outtakes
description: Jae-Rin seems like a hip college girl, but she spends her days as a shut-in geeking over Hwi, the male lead of her favorite period drama “Hwaya.”   As part of a family intervention, her sister talks her into accepting a job as a TV extra. Upon arrival, Jae-Rin discovers that the set is for “Hwaya” but ruins the takes with her awkward movement. Worse comes to worst when she wanders off set and runs into Ahn, the actor playing Hwi. While Jae-Rin loves Hwi to death, she couldn’t care less about the egomaniacal star bringing him to life. Yet lo and behold, a near-fatal accident transports them into the drama! The once fictional world is now their reality. Jae-Rin must act out the role of Hwaya, the dragon maiden who saves her country from peril, without butchering her lines.  Can she put up with Ahn and pull off her role as the heroine in a world without outtakes?  (Source: Tappytoon)

title: Sinma Hwansaeng
description: A legendary being who wished to sweep the Jianghu in a storm of blood, the Divine Demon, Jeong Cheon.At the mere mention of his name, murim trembled in fear, and his sword split the very heavens.Even the elite warriors of the Nine Great Sects, none could stand as his equal.His martial prowess that shook the world was passed down as a myth, yet in the end, defying all expectations, he met death. For a brief moment, peace returned to the jianghu, and the tale of the Divine Demon seemed buried within legend.“But fate did not let him go.”Jeong Cheon, the Divine Demon, returned to life, However, this time, not as the great warrior as he was in his past life, but in the frail body of a fallen noble's heir, a weak young master plagued by madness.The soul that once commanded all under heaven is now trapped within a feeble body and endless torment.The downfall of his clan, the contempt of those around him, and the creeping shadow of insanity devouring his mind, all of it weighs upon his new life.  (Source: Naver, translated)

title: Garden Club Detective Squad
description: Gardening and solving crime aren’t what straight-A student Ye-On Han thought she would be focusing on at her new school. But when she discovers a notebook that contains clues to a 15-year-old murder mystery, she and the other members of her new gardening club realize the murderer not only has access to the school -- they probably work for the school. Can the gardening club squad figure out who committed the murder even though the principal and their teachers seem desperate to cover it up?    (Source: WEBTOONS)    Note: Chapter count includes the prologue

title: Trapped With the Male Lead in a Horror Game
description: As an NPC stuck in the horror game, Charlotte sees a chance for freedom with the arrival of the handsome male lead, Dietrich. Desperate to escape, Charlotte aims to help Dietrich beat every level and unlock the final room. However, she is also forced by the game system to hinder him by obeying its mysterious and cruel demands. Can Charlotte's growing feelings for Dietrich break her free from her passive NPC role and escape the deadly game, or will her story lead to a chilling Game Over?     (Source: Tapas)

title: Price of Violence
description: For most, kumdo is just a hobby. Practitioners are there to entertain and Si-ho Ye is the best entertainer of them all. Quicker, more agile, and more experienced than most, he was a force to be reckoned with in the kumdo world. Si-ho was content living his life as the best at something that barely mattered until the day his sister died. Convinced she was murdered and determined to take revenge, Si-ho sets out to show the dark underbelly of Korea why swordsmen were once revered…and feared.  (Source: Tapas)

title: Silly Dog and The Lady
description: “I'm going to do it, since you said you liked me.”    Dee-Ha is the assistant librarian of the city's female-only library. And Lougene is a half-blooded wolf spirit and a childhood friend of Dee-Ha. On the night of the winter festival, the two cross the line of friendship and have a secret affair.   (Source: Copin Comics)   Note: Includes five extra chapters.

title: My Comeback as the Youngest Member
description: After being disqualified from the famous boy group survival reality show Stardust Project, Seo-Han finds himself stuck in a mundane life of part-time work, unable to achieve his dreams of debuting. But then, an unexpected twist of fate catapults him eight years back in time, just before the inception of the show. Now equipped with years of experience, Seo-Han is determined to rewrite his story and fulfill his dreams with this second chance. With the many challenges and dark sides of the music industry, will he finally succeed in debuting as a member of a boy band this time?  (Source: WEBTOON, edited)

title: Naengjeong-gwa Yeoljeong Sai
description: It was a summer when even breathing was hard due to the heat. The air conditioner in An Kyungsoo’s room was long broken. As a replacement, his landlord sent him a humanoid air conditioner that is all the rage overseas, taking form in a handsome male model. As soon as it is turned on, it became so cool that he cuddled it, but he can’t help feeling a bit weird. As he was cuddling this temporary replacement of his AC, he pressed a button located “somewhere” and it opened it’s eyes. Turns out that not only did his humanoid have a handsome face, he also has a kind personality and a gentle voice… This totally perfect AC’s over friendliness gradually included skinship, as well as relieving his sex drive that has been long stifled by the heat…     (Source: Bomtoon, translated)    Note: Part of Kidari Entertainment's "Yeoreumdanpyeonseon: Some in Summer (~키다리이엔티 여름단편선~ 썸인썸머, Kidari Entertainment Summer Short Story Collection: Some in Summer)"

title: Maid To Love or Die
description:
After Irenea woke up as the chambermaid in a reverse harem game called "Love or Die," she thought she could get back home by seeing every good and bad game ending there could be. But she's still here! So this time, she wants to try leaving the Lavrenti family and the three young masters she serves, but they've all inexplicably fallen in love with her, even though she's just the game's "Save Point." So is the game now making Irenea the main character who has to choose who she loves and who dies?

(Source: Tapas)

title: Ciel
description: With the author's characteristic humour and creativity, the work describes one girl’s fantasy adventure. Yvienne Magnolia's beauty widens the small villagers' eyes she is living but she never knew what her future would be, since it is destined too high to imagine for her at that time...    As the lord of the manor tries to kidnap her, Yvienne flees to Lowood Institution for wizardry and witchcraft she never thought to go leaving behind her family.    In the school, she meets interesting people, like, January Lightsphere who shines purple aura compared to his noble but peculiar family, and Lariatte, an orthodox fighter family's heir, who will be her closest mate.

title: My Special Squishy Someone
description: After losing all hope of finding love, Ha-eun doesn't see the point of carrying on...until one day, a mysterious being saves her life and promises to make her irresistible to any man. Its method is unorthodox to say the least, but it sure makes her feel good. 2nd Lezhin Comics Big Comic Contest Prize Winner.  (Source: Lezhin US)

title: Special Delivery
description: Having recently moved to Seoul, innocent young man Sang-Ho Kim gets a job at a Chinese restaurant. His day begins with a whirlwind of deliveries and ends with passionate sex. Which woman will Sang-Ho pick?  (Source: TOPTOON+, edited)

title: Romance Camping
description: After military discharge, Chan-Yeong is asked by his former superior to work on a camping site. However, it was a place where young men and women gather to enjoy themselves.  (Source: TOPTOON+, edited)

title: My Mad Fake Marriage to Maddie
description: As the legitimate heir to the imperial throne, Yullikian kuhn Rondenez is desperate to find a way to keep his usurping uncle from killing him next. Frequenting the slums to make it seem like he's become a gambler, he crosses paths with Maddie, a notorious pickpocket who is willing to do anything for the right price, even kill. That's when he comes up with a crazy plan. Yullikian proposes to Maddie to get his uncle off his back, but will this fake marriage lead to mad love or just madness?  (Source: Tapas)

title: ZOMBIE PAPA
description: Minseok loses his daughter again and again in a world overrun by zombies. He’s been mysteriously given 100 lives to save her and has watched her die in 99 of them. On his final one, he dies before they even make it out the front door–except this time, he wakes as a zombie. But a zombie papa still has a father’s heart. Now stronger than ever, he’s ready to take on the world to protect his baby girl.  (Source: WEBTOON)

title: Silver Devil King
description: Yoo-An Ha, a high school senior, messed up his SATs because he mismarked his papers. He is approached by a foreigner- no, a demon who proposes to turn back time. In exchange, Yoo-An must stand in as the demon king's replacement... Will Yoo-An, living the demon king's life, be able to safely return to his own life? “Should I live however I want? I'm the real king until the real one returns!”    (Source: Copin Comics)

title: Instant Family
description: Can you form a life-changing bond with somebody overnight? It’s a question Sejoon has never imagined he’d have to ask himself, but here he is. He’s spent his entire life as an omega with an innate disgust for alphas, which has only grown since he was forced into prostitution by his own cousin. Yet when he accidentally spends a passionate night with Taeheon, a gruff but thoughtful alpha, they immediately form a bond that’s deeper than anything either of them have experienced before. But is this connection meant to last for only an instant? Or will it last for a lifetime?    (Source: Lezhin US)

title: Dongsaengui Uimu
description: Dong-U, who happened to find the secret of his squad leader is spending a hellish day because of it. Jeong-Yeon, the younger sister learns of her brother’s suffering through his diary. To protect her brother whom she loves more than anyone else, Jeong-Yeon visits Jin-Ho, the squad leader…   “Oppa… I’ll protect you this time.”  (Source: TOPTOON, translated)

title: I Spy a Married Life
description: What would you do if you were ordered to enter a fake marriage… with your crush? That's exactly what happened to Do-Dam, an agent working for the NSO, the most secretive government organization. Do-Dam's mission? To expose an industrial spy. But here's the twist: she has to go undercover as a newlywed with her boss and crush, Ju-Won Gi. Do-Dam is determined to accomplish her mission and win Ju-Won's favor along the way. Can she safely complete her mission? Or will her feelings jeopardize everything?     (Source: WEBTOONS, edited)

title: How To Reject My Obsessive Ex-Husband
description: When Yu Seohyeon sacrificed her life to save her first love, Ciel de Leopart, she never expected to wake up as Irene de Closhe in a world straight out of a book. Amidst this bizarre twist, she reunites with Ciel, who has now become a supporting male lead destined to betray the crown prince. As her unique guide abilities resurface, Seohyeon is haunted by Ciel's intense, madness-filled gaze, a stark contrast to the man she once knew. Tangled in a web of past love and new identities, Seohyeon must navigate a treacherous path where past and present collide.   (Source: Tappytoon)

title: Yeosin Sanyang
description: John made a bet with the Jade Emperor to become the god of sex. The condition is to have sex with all 12 fairies. Will he be able to conquer all the goddesses safely?  (Source: TOPTOON, translated)

title: Sugar Trap
description: If there was a closet inside a closet, Joohwan would hide there. He's that desperate to hide that he's gay. Still, he's doing a pretty good job at hiding his sexual orientation, on his way to a promotion at his job, and has everything going great...right until he crosses paths with Sihyun during a major presentation for work. Unfortunately, Sihyun is devastatingly attractive. Perhaps attractive enough to drag Joohwan out of the closet...    (Source: Lezhin)

title: Jinx-ui Yeonin
genres: Drama, Romance, Slice of Life, Supernatural
description:
The beautiful goddess of fortune hidden by a rich man came into the life of the poor and unlucky me.

Note: Includes prologue and 10 epilogue chapters.

title: My Beautiful World
description: Every person in this world changes, it could be anything like their desires or personalities. What if behind a person smiles hides a dark malice or depression? How will someone react to it if that person had the ability to see their hidden façade? This is the story of a girl who can see the ever changing form of humanity as she dives into the mysterious realms of the unknown and real life.

title: My Beloved Baby Sister
description: When Princess Fleta, who has been mistreated her entire life due to being born with a curse, summons the basilisk and destroys the palace, Princess Cezanne regrets that things could have turned out differently if someone had been by Fleta's side. So when she miraculously finds herself six years back in time, she is determined to take Fleta under her wing and fill her baby sister's life with nothing but joyful light. Will Cezanne be able to dispel the darkness inside Fleta and rewrite the ending?   (Source: Tapas)

title: Insatiable Massage Club
description: Seo Minjae, who recently treated his hyperhidrosis at a mysterious clinic, now possesses a strange power no one can quite explain. To manage its lingering symptoms, he turns to the campus rehabilitation club, Care, for an affordable solution. To join, he must pass an initiation test: a one-on-one massage session in front of the club president. The catch? His massage partner is none other than Yoo Ara, a judo major who once slammed him into the ground after mistaking him for the campus pervert. Now, Minjae must use his mysterious power to pull off the ultimate act of persuasion.  (Source: Lezhin US)

title: A Wicked Husband
description: When Archduke Cesare returns from war, Eileen barely recognizes the man she once knew—he's cold, commanding, and burning with unspoken desire. But nothing shakes her more than his sudden proposal. As old feelings stir, Eileen must choose: take his hand, or flee before his fire consumes her.  (Source: Manta)

title: Shadow Bride
description: Yunjo is a young prince who has always served his kingdom from behind the scenes. He’s spent his whole life in the shadow of his brother, the crown prince Yigang, fighting enemies and winning wars in his name. All that changes when one day, he meets Seolyun, a mysterious and charming woman who captivates him instantly. What happens when a man emerges from the shadows to follow his heart? Can he overcome all of the obstacles in his way to step into the light and be with the one he loves?    (Source: WEBTOONS)   Note: Chapter count includes a prologue.

title: Jeonjeonbancheuk
description: Gyojin mistrusts all alphas and he despises the society that makes life difficult for Omegas. He manages to find a job, but his superior is none other than Hyeono, his former classmate from middle school who was bullied because of a misunderstanding that involved him. They settled the misunderstandings, but Gyojin is now bothered because Hyeono started courting him. While trying his best to reject Hyeono, Gyojin’s senior from college, the source of his trauma of Alphas, re-appeared in his life. And this sunbae also turned out to be one of his superiors…

title: The Academy is Doomed
description: The academy where Amon was assigned as a new teacher has gone bankrupt! The principal is addicted to gambling, the teachers are no-goods, and the students are lethargic! How will Amon tread forth as he stands at the crossroads of escape and success? A comedic fantasy series that will make your sides hurt from laughing!  (Source: WEBTOON)

title: Dareun Segyeeseo Juwowatseumnida
description: In the midst of the devastation, only the soldiers’ bones remained. It’s only a matter of time before the entire world is annihilated. To avoid this, Kyung-Hoon began searching for clues in another universe with the help of a ten-year-old phone he discovered in an abandoned building.

title: While I'm Back in Time, I'll Get My Revenge
description: Most people would consider getting a second chance at life a blessing, but Arnell Radfell is furious when she wakes up to find herself back in the past.    Terrified of having to suffer through the horrors of her past life twice, she attempts to end her life again but is rescued by Sir Herbert Schladin, the very man who gave her the courage to end her life the first time.    However, when Arnell finds out that she can use the power of mana, she has a change of heart.    They say revenge is sweet, and now, Arnell is determined to make everyone who made her suffer in her past life pay.    (Source: Tappytoon)

title: Madochonggyeok: Gangcheorui Sniper
description: Republic of Korea Special Forces, Kang Yi-Chan. During the mission, he faced enemies to save his comrades and was isolated alone in the operational area of the mission. It had been several days since he had faced the enemy without being able to sleep and waiting for rescue to come for him… but in the end, he saw the bazooka flying over the hill, he realized that it was the end of his life and then fainted… When he regained consciousness and opened his eyes, he found himself in a trance, alone in a strange world.  (Source: KakaoPage, translated)

title: Between Summer and Fall
description: A teen who is worried about growth, love, and of friendship.

title: The Secret of House Francesca
description: House Francesca holds a secret. There's an imposter within the house who seeks revenge. But who could it be? Is it the late duke's greedy sister who loathed sharing the riches of the duchy but loved spending them on herself? One of the duke's brothers, both of whom were hungry for the power that the duke held? Or could it be his daughter, who was under a spell to kill those who got in her way? Whoever it may be, can they keep their identity concealed, or will their dastardly deeds be revealed?    (Source: Tapas)

title: Hwangjeui Yaghonnyeolo Sandaneun Geoseun
description: Adel, who entered the emperor's office using the power of the Imperial Palace's magical door, accidentally hears the secret plans of the emperor.   'Emperor' 'fiance' 'fake' 'killing'   When Adele came back to the academy, the interior minister and the emperor appeared and took her breath away.   "I'll give you a chance to choose."  "...Chance?"  "Go to  prison or be my fiancée!"   Thus, the beginning of the fateful love between the orphaned girl Adel and the emperor of Krishi.

title: The Man's Game
description:
Getting dumped is harder than it looks! I-Na has the world's grumpiest neighbor, Geon-Ho. The love letter meant for his brother Ju-Hyeong somehow finds its way to Geon-Ho instead! Before she can fix her mistake, he accepts her confession! I-Na tries everything possible to get dumped by Geon-Ho, but it seems he has a different game plan altogether!

(Source: Manta, edited)

title: No Marriage is Perfect
description: An argument, a fall, and a lie. Determined to save her loveless marriage, Yeonhwa impulsively fakes memory loss to buy herself some time. After all, who would insist on divorcing someone with a brain injury? But now, not only is her ice-cold husband suddenly warm and caring, he’s telling her that they’ve always shared a bed -- even though she knows they’ve never even kissed! How long can she hold him at bay? Does she even want to? And maybe more to the point, who’s playing who, here?    (Source: WEBTOON)

title: Swapping
description: It began with la mort d'amour.  When a rich old man croaks during a passionate round of bedroom escapades, So-Heon is accused of being his partner. Not long after, Seo-Ho, the CEO of the company So-Heon works for, presents him with a video of the incident... and makes him an offer just can't refuse.    (Source: Manta, edited)

title: Go, Hosik, Go!
description: The most popular person on campus, a pretty face with smiling eyes, a friendly-yet-awkward classmate…that’s all Sung-yeon ever was to Hosik. But after a wild night out, Hosik awakes with zero memories of their time together - and one naked Sung-yeon in bed next to him! Hosik would have been fine with leaving their relationship as a drunken mistake on a night of many; but when he started feeling funny in the following days, a trip to the doctor’s office would change everything: “Mr. Kim Hosik, you’re pregnant!”    (Source: Lezhin US)    Note: Chapter count includes a prologue, 27 Side Story chapters and 9 Special Episodes.

title: Hero Waltz
description: Go Sung-tae is the target of the bullies in his school... voluntarily. He is a part of a secret experiment by the government that aims to produce "Heroes" in hope of rivalling the other countries. Not wanting to get involved, he steers away from the prying eyes of the government by keeping a low-profile, being the "timid" kid.    The most popular girl in his school, with a strong sense of justice decides to follow him with the intention of helping him, only to discover that he was faking his personality. (On top of that, his secret got revealed.)     What will happen to Sung-tae now?

title: Eolgul Cheonjae
description:
One day, I suddenly had the ability to transform into a video game character!
The skills and appearance are all mine.
I am now always a "face genius"!

(Source: Naver, translated)

title: My Second Life as an Idol
description: From failed idol to hailed idol!   Flop idol Yong-Min dies an unfortunate death but is given a second chance at life in the body of Ian, a super hot rich kid with a voice to match. At his side, he finds Jin, a mysterious soul tasked with guiding Ian to becoming a certified star. But is it really all smooth sailing from here?    (Source: Manta)

title: Nunbom
description: Gong Shiwoo has been secretly living on the school’s rooftop when an encounter with student Cha Hajin and his subsequent daily visits put an end to the teenager’s privacy. It doesn’t take long for him to stop minding Hajin’s presence though, and soon a special bond begins to form between the two teenagers.

title: The Possessive Tyrant and His Sleepy Cat
description: I've found myself trapped in a mature-rated novel as a cursed cat, whose mere existence is believed to be harmful to the empire. This place has killed every cat in every alley all because of one prophecy... The moment anyone finds me will be my last moment in this life.    <I>"What's this?"    Before I could even think of escaping, the male lead, who's fated to become a mad tyrant, effortlessly snatches me up.    (Source: POCKET COMICS)

title: Downpour
description: Having been outed at work, shoe designer Park Seok-Yeon is forced to start all over. He gets a new job at “Youm,” an up-and-coming brand with an accepting work environment and generous perks. It seems like the perfect company until Seok-Yeon finds out that the CEO is none other than his former crush, Jin Yeowon, the cold-hearted jerk who nearly drove him to end his own life. Now, they must work together, but will old feelings well up? Like a sudden downpour, love appears when you least expect it.    (Source: Tapas, edited)

title: Miracle! Yongsa-nim
description: Story about a "Holy Warrior" who seals the demon lord with his holy powers and holy sword. However, the protagonist is some lame guy who happens to run out of luck very often. Along with his 2 other friends/followers, he travels around.

title: Never-Ending Darling
description: Ha-Im Yun lives in a world where people register their DNA into cloning databases, a world where human suffering has basically been eradicated. The brilliant mind behind this cloning technology is none other than Ha-Im’s boyfriend of five years, Geun-Hu Ji. Their relationship isn’t perfect, but they make it work -- or so Ha-Im thinks, until she finds a dead body at her boyfriend’s house… and the dead body is hers. The next day, she wakes up with no recollection of the previous day until she finds a note from herself in her room…   “Ha-Im, if you’re reading this, you’re a clone.”   (Source: WEBTOON)

title: Twin Recipe
description: When Kyung-chan goes back to his hometown, he immediately gets tossed into living with Jinmi and Yoomi - the hot twins who need help running their restaurant. But things don’t look too bright for Kyung-chan, what with the restaurant in shambles and Jinmi constantly harassing him and teasing him for being a crook! Will Kyung-chan manage to make the twins warm up to him and save their failing restaurant?  (Source: Lezhin X)

title: Geunomege Bachineun Jangmi
genres: Comedy, Drama, Romance, Slice of Life
description: "If you were a girl, we would never have met"  "Well- to...to be honest with you- I AM a girl-"   Plain when she's a girl, but disguised as a guy, she's got a good body, is awesome at fighting and has a handsome face.  Despite thinking that Ida is a guy, Kang Naru falls in love with her.  Now everyone thinks that Naru is gay, Ida wants to tell him the truth.   "What should I do? If they know I'm a girl - "   - But at what cost...?

title: Nevermore
description: James Jung is the top student at Ozoh Academy, home of the gifted and mega rich. He is also an undercover agent protecting the principal from a dangerous assassin. His name? Samuel Gyo, codename black mamba and now James’ homeroom teacher. In order to fight, they must abide by three rules. First, they cannot have their identities exposed to the other students. Second, they cannot harm the students. Third and most importantly, no explosives or firearms. Poison and tranquilizers are fine. Fighting to the death, no one ever briefed them for the fourth and final rule: you must not fall in love. Will they break it?

title: Graceful Sister-in-law
genres: Drama, Hentai, Romance, Slice of Life
description: "But we're a family..."   Su-Jeong has the attractive sexy look that every guy desires. And Chang-Hyeon can't keep his eyes off her. The insatiable desire burns through him and he can't keep it down any longer...    (Source: TOPTOON+, edited)

title: Mabeopsonyeo Ajeossi
description: 202X. In the back alleys of Seoul, South Korea… He looked down at the heroes under his feet—the heroes who adorned themselves in a variety of colorful clothes, as if they were K-pop idols on TV. Those heroes? They were crawling beneath him, their gaudy outfits smeared with dirt. That was the true nature of being a hero. He hoped the individuals before him learned that lesson well. It was time to ensure they never forgot it. As a magical girl, he swung his hammer down. This is a bright story. The story of a man reclaiming his light.  (Source: KakaoPage, translated)

title: Sensual Smartwatch
description: [Begin intimacy - Analyzing sexual orientation...]   "Smartwatch" that can satisfy any woman in no time. This watch from a stranger flips Seung- gwan's life upside-down...!  (Source: DAYcomics, edited)

title: One-Room Hero
description: After spending his entire life in all-male schools till high school, Mingu finally enters college. Making things more exciting is the fact that he's in the Food and Nutrition Department with a male to female ratio of 1 to 9! A virgin and single since birth, this is his opportunity to date girls and enjoy a romantic campus life. But one wrong lie during a drinking party turns his life upside down and now he's been branded as a sex beast all over the school!  (Source: Lezhin)

title: Wedding Impossible
description: What would you do for $500k? As a struggling actress, I agreed to play the part of Doting Fiancée to Jeekyung Lee, a charming, handsome heir to a Korean conglomerate—the perfect husband! Except, he’s gay. Eh, it’s fine! The only problem is... (cue ominous music) Jeehan, Jeekyung’s younger brother. That jerk may have the looks of a leading man, but he’s determined to show I’m the wrong girl for Jeekyung! It’s gonna take the performance of my life to win him over. Hah! I’m ready for my Oscar!    (Source: Tapas)

title: My Teacher, Milady
description: Junghoon was living like a total loser, when he receives a job offer from a very rich household.And the lady of the house... is his high school teacher.  (Source: Toomics)

title: The Edge of Ambiguity
description: For Shin Soo-young, school is nothing more than a place to study. He’s there to get good grades, get into a good university, and get himself a good enough job so that he can help his family. He’s certainly not looking to make friends. You see, for Soo-young, human relationships are...uncertain. And because they’re uncertain, they’re unsafe. Tae Jihwan, on the other hand, swans through life without a care in the world. He’s got it all: money, good grades, and more friends than any one person could truly need. And yet, he seems to have his eye on becoming friends with Soo-young as well. No matter how hard he tries, Soo-young can’t figure out what Jihwan wants from him, but the other boy is nothing if not persistent. Slowly but surely, Soo-young starts to let his walls come down, but just how long can he keep his balance on the edge of all this ambiguity...?   (Source: Lezhin US)

title: Locker & Opener
description: There’s no lock Detective Do-Bin Kim can’t open. With his unique ‘opening’ ability, he can unlock anything -- even people -- to get the information he needs to hunt down criminals and solve crimes. Enter Locker -- his polar opposite and his enemy. When Locker uses her ability to ‘lock’ a witness and prevents Kim from accessing key information in a crucial case, they plunge into a cat-and-mouse game with justice itself at stake. When two equal forces collide, who will emerge the victor?     (Source: WEBTOONS)

title: My Far Too Tumultuous Marriage
description: Finding love is the last thing on So-Ran’s mind. She’s busy trying to juggle a legal career and figuring out a way to pay off the debt she owes her stalker ex-boyfriend. All she wants is to move on and find peace, so when an unexpected opportunity presents itself, she seizes it. A fake marriage to Kang-Ho Baek, a mysterious but successful businessman, sounds like the perfect solution to her problems. But what she doesn’t anticipate is falling in love with him. What happens when a marriage of convenience turns into something more?  (Source: WEBTOONS, edited)

title: Seventh Time's the Charm!
description: How would you win over an enemy who just won't stop killing you? Laila thought she had escaped death by figuring out how to turn back time, but her assassin finds her again... and again... and again! All because her sadistic villain of a father had to murder his entire family... When all her evasion plans fail, there's only one option left: coddle her enemy through his childhood and hope he'll spare her when he comes back to exact his revenge. But why is this wacko so pigheaded?!    (Source: Tapas)

title: Born with a Surprise
description: Jungwoo's perfect life ended when his wife's needs killed him. Reborn as Dohoon, a hot guy in his 20s, he can now choose to have what he didn't have in his old life, so, the things that made her lose interest in him. What will Jungwoo do as Dohoon, chasing women and fulfilling missions?  (Source: Toomics)

title: Boo-tiful Nightmare
description: Kim Gitae looks like your typical college student—aside from his killer looks and strangely eerie vibe. But there's one thing that sets him apart: he can see ghosts. Spirits swarm him day and night, desperate to possess his body, and the only way he can fend them off... is by jerking off every night. Yeah, it’s as exhausting as it sounds. All Gitae wants is a normal life—but things take a wild turn when a naked ghost named Lee Serin suddenly appears with an offer he can’t ignore. If he agrees to sleep with her, she’ll use her powers to protect him from other spirits. A ghostly hookup for a shot at peace—what could possibly go wrong? Gitae’s not-so-average college life just got a whole lot weirder.  (Source: Lezhin US)

title: The Male Lead is Mine!
description: Stuck in the body of a rich and spoiled side character in a romance novel, Aris Horrison is determined not to experience the destitute fortune of her namesake. After deciding to take the plot—and the plotting—into her own hands, Aris starts to romantically pursue the novel’s hero. However, her preemptive strike only pushes the other characters to deviate from the original plot, ultimately sending her little rewrite spinning rapidly out of control. Aris soon begins to wonder if having spoilers about her life is really all it’s cracked up to be…    (Source: Tapas)

title: Jisang Choeagui Sonyeon
description: A contest to determine the most unfortunate person on Earth is underway?! A hybrid school fantasy action thriller from Jung Pil-won, the author of "Family Man"!  (Source: Naver, translated)

title: Woof Wolf
description: Min-woo and Jae-min have been eyeing one another across the classroom for ages, but so far they’ve only gotten hot and steamy together in their imaginations. Just as the sexual tension reaches a boiling point, Jae-min makes a shocking discovery: Min-woo is a werewolf! And this only excites him more! Will Min-woo be a good pup and make Jae-min howl in bed? The fangs and claws will surely come out this semester!   (Source: Lezhin US)    Note: includes six extras.

title: Pick Me, My Queen
description: Aurora Fenryr Astrophotas, the Goddess of War, returns from the seven-year war to face the aftermath of her father’s mysterious illness and subsequent death as well as the four men vying for her hand in marriage. Her best friend’s lover, her loyal fan’s fiancé, a professor with a secret, and her ex-fiancé come before her, but will she find a husband in time? She yearns to return to the battlefield, but instead, she must evade bedchamber intruders, power-hungry nobles, the haunting illness, and most importantly… her own heart.    (Source: Tapas)    Note: Chapter count includes the prologue.

title: Hit Me!
description: For as long as I can remember, I've been fascinated by violence. But the fixation turned out to be a disguised longing for pain, and in turn, my deepest, darkest secret. I can't let anyone find out, but I also can't help but wonder - will I ever find someone to quench my desires? Or will my fantasy remain unfulfilled... forever? What lies in the end of a pain-fueled revenge?!    Editor's Comment: This comic contains graphic depictions of rape and violence. Reader discretion is advised.    (Source: Lezhin US)

title: Black Chains
description: Despite standing by Black Dragon Akelans’ side for 14 years as his loyal vassal, Hasolan was never accepted as his mate, her love left unrequited until the day she took her own life. But upon opening her eyes, Hasolan finds herself back in the past on the day she first awakened Akelans. Though she tries to change her fate in this life, she ends up in the merciless dragon’s clutches once more. Except this time, there’s something different about him. To Hasolan’s shock, Akelans acknowledges her as his mate right away. But at this point, it may be too late...     (Source: Tappytoon)

title: Don't Tell Anyone at School!
description: Daniel and Sarah are complete opposites: one is an outcast, and the other is the school’s queen bee. However, they have one thing in common… they’re both virgins.  (Source: Toomics)

title: Mireuui Jeonseol: Geumgapdoryong
description: "Where am I? What... am I?"    The Gold Armored Sword Dragon (or Geumgap Doryong), the boss monster of Demon Palace's 7th floor and the Guardian of the Abyss, becomes self-aware and awakens in a game world! He is a giant dragon covered in golden scales, but he takes on a human form once he withstands a set number of attacks. He's a rare character in the game, "New Legend of Mir", a supposedly authentic martial arts game.    And then there is Dorothy, a girl who calls him "Geum Ryong" (Gold Dragon), and Jeok Chan-Woon, the attack force's leader and commander of the Red Blood Group, and Gepetto, who goes by the nickname, "Dumplinghead Girl"... Their story takes place inside the world of Murim within the virtual-reality martial arts game, "New Legend of Mir"!     (Source: Kakao, translated)     Note: Chapter count includes a prologue.

title: Geu Hae Yeoleum
genres: Drama, Psychological, Romance, Slice of Life
description: Kim Jumi's life is like that of any other teenager preparing for her CSAT's: all work and no play. But one summer day, she witnesses something on the rooftop of her school... From then on, she finds herself getting tangled up with two boys who are in a complicated relationship.

title: Pro Wrestling-ui Sin
description: Jun-Ho Kim loved pro-wrestling more than anyone but he couldn’t escape the racial standards. After his meaningless retirement, while working as a construction worker, he got caught up in an unexpected accident… and when he opened his eyes, he returned to the day before his WWF entrance exam!    “This time, I won’t end as the villain ‘king-fury’ with a 0.7% success rate!”    He returned to his 20s body with all the knowledge he’s worked so hard for and information about the future. He will not repeat his history of being ‘jobber’, the expert at losing. He will rewrite the history of pro wrestling together with the wrestler that will take over the future, to ultimately become the god of pro wrestling, an ‘icon’ of the era!

title: Seoneul Neomeun Yeonae
description: Ara and Graham are childhood friends who used to have a sibling-like relationship. When they are finally placed in the same class (since the age of 8) as they enter their 2nd year of high school, their situation begins to change towards an unexpected direction. Will they be able to cross the line of dating, or not?

title: Need A Service?
description: When Jae-Min couldn't find work, his friend persuaded him to work as a phone dealer. The cold calling got him to hang out with a bunch of women.   "Let's take our time and enjoy ourselves. Like adults."  (Source: DAYcomics)

title: Black Dragon Romance
description: The wealthy Black Dragon clan rules Shanghai, and their power knows no bounds. But for three ordinary young Koreans, life in the city is very different. Pyung-an, an art enthusiast, is working her dream job in a prestigious gallery. Yeo-rae, a talented cellist at the Music Institute, is grafting hard to make ends meet. And Jin-hwan is looking for inspiration after his dream of being a taekwondo star foundered. For these three, the vast metropolis teems with potential romance, excitement...and danger. As they become mixed up with the formidable Black Dragon family, their lives are turned upside down.    (Source: Lezhin)

title: Welcome to the Café of Love
description: In a hidden corner of a quiet street, there sits a strange café. The owner is Ingyu, a horny little incubus with a penchant for human genitals. How does he ensnare his prey and absorb their - ahem - “vitality?” A simple charm usually does the trick! When a particularly ravishing human named Kangin walks in, Ingyu’s all set to have his wicked way with him. But this time, things don’t quite go to plan… Come in, sit down and enjoy the Café of Love!    (Source: Lezhin)    Note: Includes 7 extra chapters.

title: Let's Get Married First
description:
With her family deep in debt, Hedel Argetnta was looking for any way out of her disastrous situation. Her only option? Marrying the wealthy but monstrous duke of the east, Cassian Ekarde, a total stranger. Upon her arrival in the East, she learns it is a cursed land infested with criminals, and that her new home is full of dangerous servants. Determined to turn things around, Hedel starts to make changes but finds out that the cause of all this mess might be none other than the man she married.

(Source: Tapas)

title: How a Mage Welcomes Death
description: For the past 300 years, Ente has fought against the dragon, Caliesto, as the reigning Magnus. When she finally slays her nemesis, she welcomes death with open arms, hoping to meet her beloved teacher in the afterlife. But instead of finally gaining the eternal rest she has long yearned for, she opens her eyes in the body of Melissa Tiony, the richest bachelorette in the empire. Ente realizes that her lifelong mission has yet to be fulfilled, as it is impossible for her to die so long as Caliesto still breathes. She must find a way to regain her magic and finish him once and for all, and the first step to doing so is attending the Academy of Magic in the city of Kastium. Ente sets out on another journey, hoping that this one will be her last.    (Source: Tappytoon)

title: I Became the Villain's Trainer
description: When veterinarian Yoohee Han dies early, a grim reaper sends her into the world of a novel she once read to live out the rest of her time as the side character Alexa. She uses her knowledge of the novel (and of animals) to take on a more prominent role as the trainer of Isildus, heir of Terrecion, a wolf shifter who will remain in animal form until his 16th birthday. She becomes a beloved advisor in Terrecion castle, and her actions change the fates of other characters. How will little Issy feel about her when he becomes human?    (Source: Tapas)

title: Shining Summer
description: After parting ways nine years ago, Youngmin and his first love, Jihoon, have been reunited in the same homeroom class. There’s just one problem… that’s not really Jihoon. When the boys were young, a traumatic car accident landed Jihoon with an entirely new soul! To avoid suspicion, the fake Jihoon enlists his old friend’s help in fooling the rest of the world about his identity. This arrogant new guy is nothing like the old sweet, polite Jihoon… so why is Youngmin still getting butterflies?   (Source: Tapas)   Note: Season 2 is rated R19.

title: Geom Meongneun Swordmaster
description: Arhan lost everything he had to a swordmaster without even knowing why. Amidst the death-like despair, his ancestor Liam Caravan appears before him. Liam offered Arhan only one way to seek revenge:   "Eat the sword and make its power your own."   From that moment, the young Arhan's quest for revenge began, and the forgotten name of the Caravan clan also began to resurface.  (Source: Naver, translated)

title: I Found Somebody to Love
description: As a professor of English Literature, strict but capable I-Hyeon is both admired and feared by his students. He's surprised to discover his love for poetry is shared by one of them, the quiet yet arresting Nam-U. Drawn to her despite a painful past, can their love remain strong when faced with the new challenges that lie ahead...?     (Source: Tappytoon, edited)

title: Iljini Sanawo
description: What happens when the scariest kid in school asks you out on a date? Yoojung struggles to survive what may just be the worst day of her life.    (Source: YLAB)    Note: Belongs to Blue String universe.

title: Sangsa Dwijibgi
description: Jin-Ho Kim is an intern who is filled with dreams of becoming a full-time employee after finding a job at a large company. However, what he got was a special "education" for new recruits from his beautiful boss.  (Source: TOPTOON, translated)

title: Noesinjeonsaeng
description: He was the hero who brought down the Heretic Cult that drove the Murim world to ruin. The protagonist was killed due to the betrayal of the seven emperors because he was too strong and they didn't want him to be a hero. He was reborn as Baek Gong, a crippled person who was in despair.   It's only been 30 years since my last life.   "So my enemies are still alive?"   This is his Revenge and his final journey!  (Source: KakaoPage, translated)

title: I Tamed the Male Lead Who Tried to Kill Me
description:
Latia's family took in Karshian when his father went on a maritime expedition, but after rumors go around that he's dead, they treat him like a parasite. Egged on by her sadistic parents and desperate for their approval, Latia bullies Karshian relentlessly. However, when Karshian's father returns as a national hero and powerful duke, Karshian gets his revenge by executing Latia's entire family! As she recalls her last moments, she realizes that her family had been lying to her all along. So when she's thrown back into the past, she's determined to prevent her death and treat Karshian right this time. But this won't be easy when Karshian distrusts Latia's every move. Will Latia be able to win over Karshian and turn the tables on her family this time around, or is she doomed to die once more? (Source: Tappytoon)
Note: Chapter count includes prologue.

title: Hogutalchul
description: “Gu-Ho, can you help take a look at mine?”   Gu-Ho and Yun-Ji were reunited as new employees at BS Electronics. Yun-Ji, who is famous for her beauty, approached him affectionately, and Gu-Ho, with his open-mindedness, devotes himself to her. But Yun-Ji’s intentions for Gu-Ho weren’t as affectionate as it seems, as she approached him from the start to make use of Gu-ho...  (Source: TOPTOON, translated)

title: The Villainous Tyrant has Returned
description: Was there ever a greater tragedy than love turned to hate? Such is the tragic downfall of Emperor Ludwig of Berzantium, as he is betrayed and murdered in a fiery blaze by his empress. Olive Charleterre was once a bright young debutante, until her spirit was broken by the emperor’s cruelty. Yet when Ludwig opens his eyes, he finds he has been sent back in time to his childhood. Whether he uses this boon to reclaim his lost love and forge a new path away from his villainous future -- only time will tell.     (Source: WEBTOONS)

title: Devilish Son-In-Law
description: Jaerim, a.k.a. the “Executioner”, the most fearsome villain of all, is about to marry his civilian girlfriend! But before they can say “I do”, he has to survive life with her family, who just so happen to be the most powerful superhero clan. Can he keep his identity a secret and convince them that he’s the perfect son-in-law?  (Source: WEBTOONS)

title: Cherry Blossoms
description: The girl that you keep thinking of when it blossoms. Regretting not having been able to express your true feelings to her a year ago. Should have had the courage to hold her hands.  (Source: WEBTOONS)

title: Byeolsatang Yojeongui Chum
description: "This isn't the life that I wanted."    On the day of her wedding, Eunha, who has hidden the fact that she's a lesbian her entire life, decides to jump off a building and end her life, not wanting to devote her life to a person she can't love. Just as she leaps, she closes her eyes and wistfully reminiscences her first love whom she never told her feelings for... only to find herself 10 years back in high school when she opens her eyes. As she is reunited with her first love, will Eunha be able to turn back her ill-fated life?

title: Pheromone
genres: Drama, Hentai, Romance, Slice of Life
description: Tae-Gon, a chemistry graduate student, is surrounded by toxic professors and colleagues. But… it turns out that the perfume he made can make any women fall for him... How will Tae-Gon use this to get back at them?!  (Source: DAYcomics)

title: Eoseooseyo. 305-hoe!
description: Regular college freshman Kim Jeong-Hyeon and his roommate Kim Ho-Mo are polar opposites and friends. This is a story that deals with many sensitive topics with a dash of humor.    (Source: Naver, translated)

title: Zero Day Attack
description: A skilled hacker, Jin Kang, falls into a broker's trap and fails his mission. Barely escaping with his life, he can't bring himself to face VX, a genius hacker and team member he greatly respects. Instead, Jin Kang chooses to go into hiding. By day, he works at a café, while at night, he quietly plots his revenge. However, his routine takes an unexpected twist when a mysterious and striking customer, Seo Yi-Yeon, enters the café and makes bold advances toward him. Baffled by Yi-Yeon's unexpected attention, Jin Kang now finds his plans for starting to go awry...    (Source: Tappytoon)   Note:   - Series is rated mature after season 1.  - Includes 10 extra chapters.

title: You Can't Change a Person!
description: As the very first human to step foot in this world, Darjeeling is showered with love and admiration. But instead of spreading the love she receives, she keeps it all for herself inside a treasure chest. Then one day, God descends from the skies and takes her treasure chest away. Until she can find the answer to his riddle, Darjeeling must wander the earth forever, drifting from one soul to the next. This time, she finds herself trapped inside a body of a young princess, which means she must first learn how to walk and talk before she can even go hunting for clues. Then there are her new "friends"... a group of children whose idea of fun is running around and screaming at the top of their lungs. Is her new life doomed from the start? Or will she discover a way to finally break her curse?  (Source: Tappytoon)

title: Evangeline After the Ending
description: After the last episode "Servant Yesterday, Crown Princess Today," the author thought she was done with the story. But when she awakens as the villainess, Evangeline, she realizes the ending was just the beginning! To avoid the gruesome end she originally wrote for Evangeline, she resolves to win the male lead's favor and be accepted into his household. But as the plot begins to take strange turns that make Evangeline the new heroine, it becomes clear this story was written by someone else...    (Source: Tapas)

title: Salieri and Mozart
description: ... There is a girl, whose dream was to swim, but couldn't win with just her talent alone even if her life was on the line. There is another girl, who started swimming because her life wasn't fun, but then ended up showing genuine promise, even though swimming was just a joke to her. Like this, the two of them met each other, forming the worst relationship, akin to water and oil, the modern version of Mozart and Salieri, leading to the romance of dreams and youth.    (Source: Bomtoon, translated).

title: Loser Coin
description: He’s broke, lonely, and he’s a loser. With the betrayal by the only friend that he once thought he had, Ui-Jin’s casual investment in cryptocurrency miraculously bears fruit, turning him into a millionaire in an instant. Thanks to the unexpected fortune, Ui-Jin’s life somehow drastically changes for the better… or does it?   (Source: WEBTOON, edited)

title: Uridongne Yeosabeom
description: Jun-Ho, an ordinary office worker, decides to learn Jiu-Jitsu from A-Rum, his neighbor.  (Source: TOPTOON, translated)

title: I Grabbed the Leash of the Blind Beast
description: When an average twenty-something wakes up in the battered body of a nameless extra from a romance novel, all she wants is to go home. But first, she’ll have to see the story through as Rona, the maid of Grand Duke Ileon, the novel’s hero who was blinded by poison. She just has to make sure the heroine restores his sight with a special flower so they can have their happy ending -- easy enough, right? With a plot gone awry, Rona’s dangerous past, and the grand duke’s affections, can Rona stick to the story?  (Source: WEBTOONS)

title: Newbie Management
description: "Only the true hero can take down the Demon Lord." Well, Presidio Cage has already accomplished that... numerous times. He can catch the Demon Lord with his bare hands, but every time he does, he's sent to the beginning of the game again. Although he knows all the tips and tricks, he doesn't know how to escape this endless loop. In order to switch things up, Cage summons a "new" hero to defeat the enemy in his stead. Now, he's ready to create the ultimate newbie and finally get back home!    (Source: Tapas)

title: High School Boy
description: Once a middle school bully who would harass those he saw below him, Hong Il-tak found himself among the lowest of the low after puberty struck for everyone but him. His body remains as small and soft as it’s always been, even into his late teens, making him a prime target for constant sexual harassment at the hands of the other school delinquents. Lee Hyun-woo is his complete opposite. Tall, stoic, and intimidating—Il-tak sees befriending him as a surefire way to climb the school’s social hierarchy once more and escape his daily harassment. Even as Hyun-woo tries to keep Il-tak away, wanting to keep his own burgeoning feelings at bay, circumstance always seems to bring the two together.

title: Plum Candy Love
description: Yeong-Hyeon is a quiet and nice boy who is leaving school early when he runs into Dae-Han, an intimidating classmate rumored to have ties to a gang. Although Yeong-Hyeon tries to sneak past him, Dae-Han drags him to a cafe and asks him to be his boyfriend when they're both guys and have never even spoken before! Undeterred by Yeong-Hyeon's immediate refusal, Dae-Han walks him to school, buys him snacks, and changes seats to sit beside him. Eventually, his constant attention begins to grow on Yeong-Hyeon...   They say opposites attract, but can these two very different boys find love together?    (Source: Tappytoon)

title: In At the Deep End
description: After years of slacking off, Sun-ki decides to get his act together and find a job. Strong, virile and good with his hands, he finds a position that’s perfect for him: swimming pool maintenance guy at the local women’s university! But when the girls on the college swim team are this hot and horny, perhaps the pool won’t be all he ends up servicing… Join Sun-ki as he gets wet ’n’ wild with these busty beauties!    (Source: Lezhin US)

title: Uglyhood
description: The world is being assimilated by a crazy religion, and to stop it I have become their satan. The religion is controlled by aliens, and people don’t have a clue. The world says that aliens don’t exist, but they are everywhere. How am so I certain? Because I am also an alien.

title: Pireul Bachigetseumnida.
description: Ozae is a blood-drinking monster known as a Bat. Knowing his secret, Seoho offers him a deal. Initially wanting nothing but his blood, at some point the beautiful Ozae finds himself wanting all of Seoho. While Seoho also soon falls for the beautiful man. How will their dangerous and dizzying dance end?

title: Hell & High Water
description:
When homicide detective Dexter J. Daley’s testimony helps send his partner away for murder, the consequences—and the media frenzy—aren’t far behind. He soon finds himself sans boyfriend, sans friends, and, after an unpleasant encounter in a parking garage after the trial, he’s lucky he doesn’t find himself sans teeth. Dex fears he’ll get transferred from the Human Police Force’s Sixth Precinct, or worse, get dismissed. Instead, his adoptive father—a sergeant at the Therian-Human Intelligence Recon Defense Squadron, otherwise known as the THIRDS—pulls a few strings, and Dex gets recruited as a Defense Agent.
Dex is determined to get his life back on track and eager to get started in his new job. But his first meeting with Team Leader Sloane Brodie, who also happens to be his new jaguar Therian partner, turns disastrous. When the team is called to investigate the murders of three Humanitherian activists, it soon becomes clear to Dex that getting his partner and the rest of the tightknit team to accept him will be a lot harder than catching the killer—and every bit as dangerous.
(Source: Dreamspinner Press)

title: Jungcheonsuwollyeong
description: Ban Su-Ho, a guard who died after failing to protect the Princess from the assassins! Back in time two years through an unknown force! “This time, I must…” Determined to protect the Princess he sets out in search of the sealed power to become stronger. Will he be able to protect the Princess?  (Source: Kakao, translated)

title: The Golden Light of Dawn
description: You're still precious to me.    After losing her family in a demon attack, Rosha is reborn as the 777th most powerful magic knight in the Golden Dawn Society. To avenge her family, she trains hard and rises through the ranks against the odds. Then, she is tasked with protecting little Joshua, who is said to be the Child of God...    (Source: Manta)

title: My Kitty and Old Dog
description: Nang-Nak, an old poodle, and Sundae, an adorable kitten with blurred eyesight, love their owners whom they are loyal to. Here are the episodes of the mature dog and the energetic young kitten that always wait for their owners to give them love and affection.

title: Cleaning Service
description: Jun-Ho finds a job in a company run by his first love and her daughter. He can't keep his hands to himself when his crush lets her guard down...   "I ended up doing it... With a boy who is as young as my daughter..."  (Source: DAYcomics)

title: Vampire Library
description: Yu Mano wanted a job where he wouldn't have to deal with lots of people looking at him, and maybe where he could get some of his college homework done during breaks. Being an albino in South Korea, he always stands out. There's this creepy yet eye-catching mansion in his neighborhood that somehow is a library, so he decides to work there part-time for a while.    But his annoyance level soon shoots through the roof because every single one of the (admittedly gorgeous) librarians there are vampire otakus! They even dress and talk as if they are vampires—and as if they're certain he is one, too!    After an awkward first encounter with the head librarian (including being dragged into his elegant coffin), he is determined to never go back but...   Note: The chapter count includes a prologue

title: The Masters Have Subscribed
description: "Cheong-Un, parry the attack! Move faster or the obstacle course will kill you!”    The progenitors of the great Wudang sect and the mighty Shaolin encounter post-ascension issues when they find themselves reduced to servants in the godly realm. Their only hope and escape from their divine chores lie in the hands of less-than-average Cheong-Un, who can hardly beat his peers in the sect. Can the masters raise an average boy into a master of martial arts and finally relieve themselves of their menial chores?  (Source: WEBTOON)

title: Aideur-Ui Kwon Seonsaengnim
description: The story follows Mr. Kwon, a man that relocates to the countryside to be a teacher just for the sake of it. This being the countryside, the classroom he's assigned to is really small, compromising of only five unique children, all with their unique personalities and struggles.    Even though he's nothing more than a gangster, Kwon does his best to get through to the children, and ends up doing all he can to help them and lead them to a better life, in their families, education and social lives.    (Source: MangaRock)

title: God of Cooking
genres: Comedy, Drama, Fantasy, Romance, Slice of Life
description: Window of food 's level starting to pop up in Minjoon's sight! Minjoon's journey to becoming the best chef!  (Source: Lalatoon)

title: Two Steps Away
description: Hosu is an average, carefree high school student who isn’t particularly special in any kind of way. Danwoo is the attractive, untouchable top student of the class. There shouldn’t really be any reason for them to interact at all. But one day, Danwoo announces that he wants Hosu to sit next to him in class. In fact, he wants to be within her presence as much as possible, and he’s willing to do whatever it takes to stay by her side. Not too close, but not too far. Just two steps away is enough. However, will they be able to maintain that distance? Come take a closer look, from just a couple steps away…   (Source: Lezhin US)

title: Projection
description: Se-Ju lives every day weary as a member of a crime ring that he joined to avenge his younger sister’s death. However, one day, he encounters a boy, Se-Jin, and reminded of his dead sister, takes him in. From there, what was supposed to be a temporary arrangement grows into something far more.  (Source: Manta)

title: Beast Burn
description: Cha Hyeon-seong, a boy who lived a painful life, is killed by unknown beasts one day. However, what he saw before his eyes was himself, who had been resurrected and awakened from his death, and Son Ga-yeong, a girl who hunts beasts. In the battle between beasts and humans, Hyeonseong starts a desperate struggle for survival.    (Source: Naver, translated)

title: Wild City
genres: Comedy, Fantasy, Psychological, Romance, Slice of Life
description: A story of a lonely werewolf seeking love in a world full of lies.    (Source: Toomics)

title: The Mistress Runs Away
description: Ever since that fateful rainy day when she was rescued by the handsome Duke Killian Devonshire, Rowena has lived as his mistress. Though she believes that Killian has grown to love her over the past three years, she wants to repay her debt to him and become his equal so that she can stand proudly by his side. But when Killian begins to behave strangely, her trust in him wavers, only for it to be fully broken the day he introduces another woman to be his future wife. Thus, Rowena decides to make some drastic changes to their relationship. But will it be for better or for worse?  (Source: Tappytoon)

title: Break A Leg
description: Ordinary high schooler Kim Hangyeol Kim can’t shake the feeling that his bad days are always linked to his encounters with Seo Jooyeon, a quiet classmate who hides behind his messy bangs and a trail of eerie rumors.
