The more their paths cross, the worse Hangyeol’s luck seems to get—almost like a jinx. But after glimpsing a hidden side of Jooyeon, Hangyeol finds himself unexpectedly intrigued. Now, every glance they share sends his heart racing, and he starts to wonder if this so-called jinx might actually be something more.    (Source: Lezhin US)    Note: Includes four side story chapters.

title: 340 Days
description: Lin is a Shut, destined to a life of undying love towards one person. Do-Sung is a Destroy, always on edge to hide the violent outbursts they're known for. In this world, it's not just the genetic, but also the psychological traits that distinguish them. Just as Lin is coldly rejected by Do-Sung, a string of horrific murders threatens their lives and the investigation creeps ever closer. Everyone has a secret in this society of differences, but can Lin turn Do-Sung around? The countdown begins in this gripping romance thriller.  (Source: Tappytoon)   Note: Includes a prologue, epilogue, and 21 side story chapters.

title: Private Visitation
description: A fresh-faced new recruit finds out that his girlfriend is cheating on him, and the devastating news plunges the poor soldier into a sleepless craze. His constant jerking off to his ex-girlfriend alarms the other soldiers, and soon the entire unit is made aware of the situation. Then one day, an unexpected visitor shows up...!  (Source: Lezhin X)

title: The Runaway Lead Lives Next Door
description: Seina Rohill is a D-class hunter making a living off of killing monstrous fiends—or so she thought. In actuality, she's become an insignificant character in the novel, A Secret in the Flower Shop. What's more, she happens to be neighbors with the female lead, Ellen Euclis! The story revolves around Ellen receiving daily love confessions until she meets the male lead. But when Seina encounters a side character named Dion Fravel, who seemingly has a deep connection to Ellen, she's determined to make him Ellen's endgame. Unfortunately, Seina also has to deal with Duke Rashad Carlman, who appears to be the strongest candidate as the original male lead. As these four characters' paths cross, who truly will be the protagonists of this tale? And what could the "secret" mentioned in the novel's title be?  (Source: Tappytoon)

title: Malgwallyang-i Gildeul-igi
description: A playboy named Petruchio accepts a request to seduce the unfriendly Katherina...?    This webtoon is based on Shakespeare's comedy play, "The Taming of the Shrew".

title: Celestial Bride
description: For thousands of years, humans have worshiped the gods of the heavenly world, but faith has been on the decline since a celestial last graced the earth. That is, until a scorned princess with a target on her back is miraculously rescued by one. Hunted down by soldiers from her own nation, Princess Chaeyeon is in a desperate battle for her life. As if to answer her prayers, a mysterious man with wings swoops down from the sky, whisking Chaeyeon away to the land of Mount Kunlun, home of the Great Celestial Phoenix who will soon become her husband. Blessed with this unprecedented opportunity, Chaeyeon is determined to become the Celestial Bride and right the wrongs of her past. In doing so, she may just change the course of her fate, both on Earth and in Heaven.    (Source: Tappytoon)

title: Monster Princess of the Snowy Mountain
description: Valerie Beloff, a princess in exile, decides to take her own life on her 19th birthday. Abused by her own mother and exiled for her mother’s crimes, she had to live in the freezing Makleroad palace by herself, and she somehow acquired the powers of an ancient monster - the power to freeze things. Hopeless, she seeks an escape in death… only to find herself before her cruel mother, yelling at her once again. Is she dead? Is she reliving a memory? When her mother strikes her, the throbbing pain lets her know that this is neither a dream nor a memory! This series contains themes regarding child abuse that may not be suitable for all readers.  (Source: WEBTOON)

title: Naui Akdangdeul
description: “Dark World,” the game I, a thirty-year-old salaryman, had devoted my entire youth to.      “What the fuck is this…”     When I opened my eyes, Dark World had become my reality. The pouring rain, dripping hot blood, and a cold blade. At the moment of my impending death, I came into this familiar world.    (Source: Kakaopage, translated)

title: Gunggwigeomsin 2-bu: Gunggwiui Huye
description: Eulji So Moon has aged well and is now a grandfather. He orders his mischievous grandson to go on a joyful trip to Zhongyuan! To save the fallen Namgung family clan and help them spread their wings once more, Eulji Ho’s journey starts now!!  (Source: KakaoPage, translated)

title: Gunggwigeomsin 2-bu: Gunggwiui Huye
description: Eulji So Moon has aged well and is now a grandfather. He orders his mischievous grandson to go on a joyful trip to Zhongyuan! To save the fallen Namgung family clan and help them spread their wings once more, Eulji Ho’s journey starts now!!  (Source: KakaoPage, translated)

title: Cheonhajeirin
description: There is no need to state the simple truth in large sentences. I am the greatest in the world.    Note: Includes one extra chapter.

title: Even When I'm Dead
description: On the day of my wedding, I found out that my lover was cheating on me with my best friend. I died because of their betrayal, and when I opened my eyes again, I returned to the past. I thought this was a blessing from God, a chance to take revenge. But this return was neverending as I kept dying either from their betrayal or in an accident. After my repeated death, I realized that accidents did not cause all of my deaths but that I was being murdered. So this time, I faked my death and left everything behind to catch the murderer, who was killing me repeatedly and to take my revenge finally.    (Source: WEBTOON)

title: Zero
description: Having been born in a secret government laboratory that cultivated esper (telepathic) powers within humans, Shuuichi and two sisters, Sumire and Katsumi, are forced to endure a difficult life as test subjects until their escape. Years later, these siblings are still being sought after by unknown organizations that are after Shuuichi powers as he is what they refer to as the “zero-sample” with the ability to cause “zero-shock.”    (Source: Infinity Studios)

title: Gimme Some Love!
description: The new semester is buzzing with students eager to make friends. Nam Soo-Min, however, has only one goal: survive the year without getting dragged into anyone’s business. Enter Lee Jae-Ha, the ultimate social butterfly and Soo-Min’s brand-new classmate and roommate. For someone like Jae-Ha, being ignored is unthinkable. And Soo-Min? He just made the mistake of catching his eye. Try as he might to escape, Soo-Min finds himself tangled up in Jae-Ha’s wild orbit.    “How much longer are you gonna ignore me? Give me some attention!”   It’s the unstoppable force of popularity versus the immovable wall of indifference... and the semester has only just begun!  (Source: Lezhin US)

title: Slammer Dogs
description: "Watch out for the guy with the ponytail,” a warning Lee Myung-il heard on his first day in prison. But when he unintentionally rescues the central figure of the rumors, Choi Jingi, it takes an unexpected turn. And with Jingi’s younger brother, Heonjae, involved, things get even messier...    (Source: Lezhin US)

title: What's Our Hero Doing?
description: Hans wakes up as a minor character in Vantablack Ring, a game he's cleared countless times. To survive the monster attack, he decides to stick close to the hero, Kadith, only to see him immediately killed in battle. Shocked, Hans sets out to find the other heroes... but soon learns that the same fate awaits every one of them and that he seems to be absorbing their abilities. With his plans to lay low gone awry, will Hans have to become the hero and save this world himself?  (Source: Tapas)   Note: Includes one extra chapter.

title: Surviving in the Emperor's Bed
description: When Robelia Naegrad married Emperor Carmond DeHardt, it was expected that she would produce an heir to the imperial bloodline of the Golden Dragon, one who would inherit the family's mind-control abilities. However, with her own deadly powers being manipulated for her devious mother's mysterious scheme, Robelia must do all she can to avoid sharing a bed with her husband. Caught in between the two, will she be able to resist Carmond's continued seduction and avoid becoming her mother's pawn?    (Source: Tapas)

title: The Tiger That Swallowed the Moon
description: Taebom Gwak, an Olympic gold medalist of the national shooting team, suffers a dangerous hit-and-run accident. The person who he used to call "Daddy-Long-Legs" suddenly appears in this life-or-death situation, ten years after he's disappeared from Taebom's childhood. But he is actually… a vampire?!    (Source: Manta)

title: Banya: The Explosive Delivery Man
description: With a worldwide war raging between humans and monsters, the young delivery men of the Gaya Desert Post Office do not pledge allegiance to any country or king. They are banded together by a pledge to deliver. Fast. Precise. Secure. Banya, the craziest and craftiest of the bunch, will stop at nothing to get a job done. Known as the Explosive Delivery Man for his risk taking, bold resolve, and impeccable record, Banya agrees to complete a wounded soldier's mission to transport a parcel of great importance--not knowing what dangers lie in store for him and his friends! As their arduous journey begins, Banya promises, "There isn't a delivery I can't make. I always deliver." (Source: Dark Horse)

title: Ballboy Tactics
description: After retiring from gymnastics, Han Ji-Won thought his biggest challenges were behind him. Turns out, winning Olympic medals was easy compared to surviving university as a painfully shy ex-superstar. Enter Kwon Jung-Woo—campus heartthrob, basketball star, and a whole new world of trouble wrapped up in a perfect smile. But just when Ji-Won thinks he has Jung-Woo figured out, he discovers a surprisingly sweet side beneath that cold exterior. Can this unlikely duo overcome their differences and stick the landing on their budding romance?    (Source: Lezhin US)   Note: Includes nine extra chapters.

title: Self-Made Lady
description: Stuck in a loveless engagement with the crown prince and tired of living in the violent capital city, Violet Hale wanted a way out of her miserable life. Enter the enigmatic archduke Cedric Etchell, who breaks off her engagement and agrees to a contractual marriage with her as thanks for saving his estate. Determined to make it on her own once the contract ends, Violet starts her own business. Love isn't in the plan, but could the archduke make this self-made lady have a change of heart?    (Source: Tapas)   Note: Includes two extra chapters.

title: Burnout Shock
description: When an unknown substance called “Burnout Shock” blankets Earth, all fire and energy are disabled, upending modern civilization. Amidst the chaos, Ra Yi loses his mother to the mafia leader Sakan. To survive alone, he takes an experimental pill and becomes a powerful mutant known as a subject. But the side effects are slowly killing him. Now, he must find the Lady of Fire, whose unique ability can heal his condition, and journey to the fearsome Top Zone, where his road to revenge begins!    (Source: Tapas)

title: Interview with a Murderer
description: As a reporter, Clark has interviewed many criminals but never a murderer. Enter Alex, the Triage Killer. A serial killer who kills in three, he agrees to an interview so long as Clark offers one thing in return: himself. Murder after murder, question after question, Clark will learn why Alex kills. And Alex… he will learn Clark isn’t as innocent as he seems.    (Source: Tapas)

title: Get Back
description: The accident that occurred seven years ago at the orphanage changed the lives of these two girls forever. In a world where talent and ability are everything, what will be their destiny now?  Note: Includes 3 extra chapters.

title: Osaka
description: T-shirts, keychains, snacks… when you hear souvenirs, you don't usually think of people. But for Park Sejin, it’s another story entirely. Having just ended things with his high school sweetheart, Sejin goes on what was supposed to be a couple’s trip to Osaka alone. Heartbroken and bored out of his mind, the college virgin wanders the neon streets of Japan in an attempt to find some sort of meaning in his life. That’s when he runs into the buxom-yet-innocent Nakashima Haru: a lonesome Japanese girl in the same boat. One thing leads to another, and the two share a steamy night of passion and pleasure; but when Sejin wakes, Haru is nowhere to be seen. And that’s the end of it…or so he thinks, until she shows up as an exchange student at his college! With the two reunited, will they be able to spark the flames that burned so brightly that fateful night? Or are things doomed to fizzle out in disappointment?  (Source: Lezhin US)

title: Someone Like You
description: When tragedy strikes and tears young Shinwoo's family apart, the charming Han swoops in like a prince and saves the timid boy with his kindness. So it comes as a huge shock to Shinwoo when his new friend and crush suddenly ghosts him after graduation. Initially, Shinwoo just thinks that Han got tired of him due to his fickle ways. But when the two reunite as adults, it turns out that Han has strangely little memory of their time together. As he slowly recalls their past, however, Han realizes that the quiet boy left a surprisingly deep impact on him in all sorts of unexpected ways. And because Shinwoo is very much his type, he's determined to do whatever it takes to win him over. There's just one unanswered mystery lingering in the air between them: why exactly did Han forget about Shinwoo in the first place?    (Source: Tappytoon)

title: Jipchang Seobeu Namjuga Michyeo Nalttwinda
description: I remember the story of a novel I had read in my previous life just before my marriage. If you don’t mess up the wedding, you’ll be poisoned by your husband! So I just kissed the pastor who was in charge of the ceremony.    "Commander, are you alright?"    One of the holy knights shouted as he approached the pastor who was kissed.    "Huh, what?"  "Wait... are you the commander of the Holy Knights?"    ****    Rurutia, who was about to die, wanted to spend her last moment in a temple where she felt at ease the most. She started a business with her friends for the temple, and it was a big hit.    "Miss, you have the world in the palm of your hands!"  "Are you a God who descended to earth?"    In the midst of being embarrassed by the large crown, the commander of the holy knights himself was also acting strange.    “All I wish for is to be your husband.”, he said that with eyes shining with obsession.  "Take responsibility for stealing my first kiss."    This is all so wrong. It seems that I changed my future.

title: Huhoe Gwanggongui Yeodongsaengi Doeeotda
description: I’ve transmigrated into the world of the BL webtoon "In The House of Dolls, There’s Another Doll Living There" where I left my one and only spiteful comment. On top of that, I become the adopted younger sister of my favorite character: the obsessive male lead who is later regretful for his actions but still dies along with the duke in the end. So, I was determined. Since I have transmigrated into this world, I can’t stand by and watch my favorite character die. Additionally, I also don’t want to die. That’s why, author, I'll need to change the tags and the ending of this webtoon slightly! From "Obsessive Male lead" to "Considerate Male Lead". From "Sad Ending" to "Happy Ending". (Source: Kakao, translated) Note: This is a promotional manhwa for the web novel of the same name.

title: Bloody Romance
description: We’ve all heard that people would do anything for their 15 minutes of fame, and up-and-coming Mukbang star, Bang Ha-Ri is no different. She was dead set on eating her way to the top until she got slammed with a doctor’s order to lose 20 kg or run the risk of contracting diabetes, coronary heart disease, high blood pressure, and so on. Determined to get back to making mukbang videos, Ha-Ri starts exercising every day after school.     Meanwhile, her classmate, On Do-Yun, has his own problems. Busy fighting his inner demons and trying to keep his urges to suck blood at bay, this half-vampire is in for a shock when the scent of Ha-Ri's blood proves impossible to resist. What makes things even harder is that Ha-Ri won’t stop offering to let him drink her blood. This unlikely pair strikes up a deal to have weekly blood-sucking sessions. But, Do-Yun can’t seem to figure out what makes her sweet-smelling blood so delicious and why she’d go to such trouble just for her career as a mukbang vlogger. As he finds the answers, he soon learns that he’s not the only vampire in town after Ha-Ri's blood… or her heart.     (Source: Tappytoon, edited)

title: The Fateful Invitation
description: After Hillaria sees a future where her beloved nation is burned down to ashes just because she refused the emperor’s proposal, she accepts an invitation to the imperial palace with a mission to change this grim future and prevent the fall of her home country. How will the story unfold for Hillaria and her unique powers?   (Source: WEBTOON)   Note: includes three extra chapters.

title: Golden Print
description: I wanted to design!    A dream I have had since I was 12 years old and have nurtured since then. For thirty years I worked hard, not missing a single day, but the reality is that I'm a construction site manager constructing buildings for other people. If I hadn't made that choice back then... Would I have become an architectural designer? Thirty years after all that, a miracle happened to me.    I went back to my university school days 20 years ago, in 2010. I'm 22 years old, but with 20 years of field experience, I'm going to fulfill my dream of being an architectural designer and make world famous designs of my own!

title: The Little Lady Tames the Leads
description: I was reincarnated as the young lady of a Marquis. Emir Sharon, who has no significance in the novel and her goal is to live a peaceful life! I met the main characters of the original novel as kids in the imperial kindergarten, which I'm currently attending too. I can't believe that I'm meeting all the main characters! I was happy for a while but somehow, everyone doesn't seem to be so happy with me. But I can't miss the opportunity to build a strong connection with the future protagonists. Emir Sharon is on her quest to getting close to the main characters finally begins. And when I finally come to my senses, I'm in a situation where everyone is keeping each other on check just to take the seat right next to me.    What am I going to do with these kids who already glued themselves to me?  (Source: KakaoPage, translated)    Notes: The chapter count includes a special episode.

title: Hiding the Archduke's Humiliating History
description:
After being neglected in her past life, Izelle is ecstatic to be reborn as a rich character until her family suddenly goes bankrupt! While thinking about what to do, she's given the perfect chance to solve her financial crisis when she saves young Archduke Karl Byron from being bullied. Unfortunately, Karl doesn't remember her at all when they reunite as adults, and she has no choice but to coerce him into helping her. Can Izelle get what she wants, or will Karl be more trouble than he's worth?

(Source: Tapas)

title: Special Martial Arts Extreme Hell Private High School
description: A teenager decides to enroll in a Martial Arts High school so he can learn how to defend himself and not get bullied anymore. But the school he has chosen to enroll in is not like all other typical martial arts schools and he will soon be caught up by a surprise…!

title: Miss Guillotine
genres: Action, Drama, Mahou Shoujo, Mystery, Psychological, Supernatural, Thriller
description: The era of the anonymous hero has ended, and the world's protectors - the Magical Girls - now live their lives in near celebrity status. But it turns out these protectors are really school bullies in their everyday lives. One day, a new, never-before-seen Magical Girl appears with a proclamation of war against the original Magical Girls! With imagery reminiscent to your favorite planetary protectors, Miss Guillotine promises nostalgic visuals with a dark premise.   (Source: Lezhin US)    Note: Chapter count includes a prologue, epilogue, 22 side stories, and a side story prologue.

title: Shame Room
description: Wooyeon and his ex-stepsister Se-myung have been kidnapped. They awake in Shame Room, where they must complete a series of embarrassing missions in order to escape. As the pair lick, tug, suck and thrust their way through ever stranger and more perverted missions, how close will they become? Will their desires get the better of them? And will they ever get out?  (Source: Lezhin US)

title: Foul's Start
description: When Hae-Il drowns saving a boy at sea, his final thought is of Pa-Do, the childhood crush he could never forget. Instead of sinking into darkness, however, Hae-Il wakes up with an impossible second chance. But this new life is far from perfect—Pa-Do is cold and distant, and Hae-Il's body dissolves into seafoam with every sting of rejection.  (Source: Manta, edited)

title: I've Become the Devil's Master
description: After countless reincarnations as doomed villainesses, Ms. Transmigrator gets her final chance to rewrite fate–as Ciani Felicité, the woman who drove the male lead to madness! Instead, she plans to rescue Redian, the male lead trapped in her family’s Subterranean Castle, nurture him, and then escape. But why is his intense gaze fixed on her? With so much attention, can she really navigate this reincarnation to a happy ending?    (Source: Tapas)

title: Surviving a Fantasy Adventure Comic
description: When the author of Hero Lee’s favorite comic, Adventure King, starts killing off major characters and wraps it up with a huge letdown of an ending, he sells every book in disappointment. Right then, Hero receives a strange text from the author himself that all characters must endeavor to survive, and those who don't do not deserve a place in the story. After being asked if he would like to try it for himself, Hero wakes up inside the comic as Background Villain #3. Will he be able to survive the story and see it to the end?   (Source: WEBTOON)

title: Agnyeo Maker
description: Promotional prologue for the homonym web novel.

title: I See Your Desire
description: Tae-Jin suddenly gains the ability to perceive others’ hidden desires. Overwhelmed, he’s first faced with the desire of his aunt, who raised him as if he were her own…   “I wish Tae-Jin would look at me as a woman…"  (Source: DAYcomics)

title: Seven Days of Lust - Omegaverse Anthology
description: A collection of seven omegaverse short stories. What if your childhood friend who's living in the apartment next to yours is an omega? Love triangle, unrequited love, romantic comedy, battle, seduction. We're not sure about what you want, so we prepared a variety of hardcore BL titles for you! The collection consists of: 1. Beta Test - Lee Aru 2. Love is Love - Hato 3. Melting Point - MEL 4. You Don’t Have to Talk - Ddomi 5. Restless - Ho Ben 6. Cat-and-Dog - Pyo Ryu 7. Heart Pounding Clinical Trial - Fujo King

title: Escape the Original Male Lead!
description: Wait, why are you in love with me?!    An office worker is reincarnated as Elena, the villainess of a romantasy novel. Aware of what fate awaits her, she rejects the male lead's offer to become his lover and thinks herself safe from trouble. That is, until she discovers that she has unwittingly charmed the male lead's younger brother!    (Source: Manta)

title: Chicken Club
description: After getting scammed with his apartment, Hyeon-U needed quick cash. After getting an offer from his close friend, he starts working as a delivery man of <Chicken Club>. He thought it was going to be a regular delivery service, but his first customer grabs "His part".   "Did it get big because of me?"  (Source: DAYcomics, edited)

title: Blossoms of the White Night
description: To secure an alliance between the northern kingdom of Leracal and the southern realm of Arnata, the countries’ royal families agree to a political marriage. Tei, known across the frozen battlefields as the most fearsome warrior and monster hunter, volunteers himself as the kingdom’s hostage, trading his life as a warrior for that of a bride. In Arnata, Tei finds not the hostility he anticipated but the calm, steady gaze of Shuraka, the young crown prince destined to become both his spouse and future Padisha of the empire. For Shuraka to claim the throne, however, he must survive an uprising that threatens the kingdom - once that forces him to draw the blood of his own brothers. Moved by the courage and gentle integrity of his betrothed, Tei pledges to protect him at any cost…and in the quiet hours of a white night, two hearts caught between loyalty and longing begin to bloom.  (Source: Lezhin US)

title: Hacking to get closer to streamers!
description: One day, a hacking app gets installed in Seon-U's phone by chance. With the app, he finds out about the secrets of female streamers, and starts using the secrets to approach them.  (Source: DAYcomics, edited)   Note: Includes one extra chapter.

title: I Thought My Husband Was Supposed to Die?
description:
Alice was a chef living in Korea when an explosion transported her into a novel. Having worked so hard in her previous life only to die young, Alice wants to live this new life in peace. There’s only one problem: her mother-in-law is trying to frame her for the murder of her husband. Using her knowledge of the novel, can Alice subvert the original plot into something that might allow her to live in peace, or is she doomed to live as the caretaker of a comatose husband until her death?

(Source: Tapas)

title: Castle 2: Maninjisang
description: Shin Kim is a special killer who gathered men from all over the country and made the organization "Baek-Yi" to destroy the absolute power "'Castle" of the underworld. Through a negotiation, he got inside Castle and started working with the enemy... Will Shin be able to take down Castle and complete his revenge as he hoped?    (Source: Naver, translated)

title: Dazzled By You
description: For Yeonsu, writing is all there is to life. Her workaholic tendencies prevent her from properly eating, sleeping, exercising…until one day, she wakes up and finds herself in a hospital room. A clear warning from the doctor about her physical health and a desperation to come up with the plot of her next story forces Yeonsu to seek the help of Gyeol, a fellow patient. Falling in love with an athletic stranger may seem like the stuff of romance novels, but reality can often be crazier than fiction…    (Source: Lezhin US)

title: Hawar in the Winter Garden
description: Princess Canola arrives in wintery Tripol expecting a warm welcome from her future husband, Edel, and his kingdom. It's love at first sight the moment she lays eyes on him. But her picture-perfect fantasy comes crashing down when the people of Tripol reject an outlander for their prince. Now, Canola has to jump through hoops just to remain in Edel's orbit. Most would crumble under the pressure, but Canola isn't about to miss her chance to land herself a dreamy husband. She just has to find a way to melt prince charming's heart, and all the icy hearts in Tripol.    (Source: Tappytoon)

title: Puppy Ever After
description: Gyu-Jin is special. He’s the only son of the legendary blue-eyed German shepherd family…and he’s a 26-year-old virgin. To carry on the family lineage, his parents organize an arranged marriage. However, Gyu-Jin cannot think of getting married to a stranger, let alone a female shepherd. He impulsively decides to ruin his parents’ scheming by preemptively announcing that he prefers smaller dogs. In order to cover up his lie, Gyu-Jin asks his childhood friend Young-Woon, a small breed, to act as his boyfriend in front of his parents. Young-Woon agrees under one condition: Gyu-Jin must act like he really has feelings for him! With such a strange demand, could Gyu-Jin be barking up the wrong tree?  (Source: Lezhin US)  Note: Includes 15 extra chapters

title: Just Kidding
description: This is the story of two people living out their campus romance, the returning transfer student Min who has a though time with love and the department legend Joon who's scared of romance.

title: My Cocky Neighbor
description: Ji Soon-yi’s always been the type to keep to herself. All her hobbies are things she can enjoy alone, and she’s the happiest when she’s at home by herself. Except…her neighbor certainly isn’t the same. Nam Changlim may be a stud, but he has a different girl over every night and each time, Soon-yi can hear everything that’s going on between him and his female companion. Annoyed, she curses Changlim and wishes that he be turned into a cock if that’s all he can think about. Alas, she’d forgotten that she’d purchased a magic candle holder earlier on that day… And the very next morning, she wakes up to find a very disgruntled, very animate dildo at her door. Uh-oh. Soon-yi did think her neighbor was too cocky, but she didn’t mean for the curse to be so literal…   (Source: Lezhin US)

title: What the Evil Dragon Lives For
description: Unwanted from birth, illegitimate child Elaine Newt knows better than anyone that life’s not fair—especially when she's chosen as a human sacrifice to appease the wrath of evil dragon Rabeth, who’s sworn vengeance on the empire for sealing him away for 500 years. But to her surprise, Rabeth grants her three wishes for waking him up from his slumber. When Elaine uses her first wish to stop Rabeth from destroying the empire, she finds herself transported back to the past with a chance to live her life all over again… but this time, with a dragon by her side!  (Source: WEBTOON)

title: Time Roulette
description: Poor law school student, Jeong-Hun Han, experiences a time slip via the time roulette machine he accidentally finds at his father's place. When he comes to his senses, he finds himself in the middle of a battlefield during the Joseon dynasty! But before Jeong-Hun can even process what’s happened, he’s approached by a messenger named Jun, who informs him that the only way he can go back to his time period is by completing the time roulette’s mission. Will Jeong-Hun be able to complete his mission and return to his time?    (Source: WEBTOONS, edited)    Note: chapter count includes 2 side stories

title: Don't Build My Hopes Up
description: Rule one of harboring a secret crush: never get your hopes up. Especially if your crush is the nicest person you’ve ever seen. Yeon-U’s kind, thoughtful, and gentle—everything that Gyu-Yeong wants his significant other to be. The problem is that Yeon-U’s nice to everyone, not just Gyu-Yeong. Gyu-Yeong knows that he’s not special to Yeon-U, but sometimes he wants to give in to the little voice in his heart. Maybe all of this does mean something, maybe Yeon-U thinks that he’s special, maybe Gyu-Yeong will be allowed to build his hopes up, just this once.  (Source: Lezhin US)    Note: Season 2 is rated R19.

title: Tied to You
description: It’s only sleeping together while holding hands, nothing else. That’s what Shin Wooseo tells himself when a red ring that ties a person to their soulmate appears on his finger one day. Once two people get tied by the ring, they cannot fall asleep unless they’re physically together. However, his destined partner isn’t his long-term friend and secret crush, Kang Jiseok, but rather his older brother, Kang Jigeon! And so starts the tragedy of loving one brother but having to share beds with the other. Although, it might not entirely be a tragedy, as Kang Jigeon doesn’t seem so disappointed about being tied to his younger brother’s best friend…   (Source: Tappytoon)

title: Unhinged
description: A story of murder and violence, "Unhinged" follows Erika as she walks a path of vengeance. Seven years ago, Erika came home to find her husband murdered. Unable to find any other suspects, Erika was found guilty and spends most of a decade plotting her revenge from the inside of a cell. Once freed, she finds herself moving past the boundaries of "respectable" society and beyond the shackles of morality. Laws will be broken, lives will be lost, and, yes, there will be blood.    (Source: Lezhin US)    Note: Chapter count includes a prologue and a 6-chapter side story

title: A Game With My Boss
description: My boss, the robot... No emotions, no facial expression... nothing... Well, that was until...  (Source: Toomics)

title: Haengbogeun Bitjarureul Tago
description: Dan-Jo is a freshman in a university and lives a monotonous life. On orientation day she goes to the warehouse on an errand for her senior and witnesses a broom that transforms into a human. From that day on, the Broom Ghost persistently asks for help from Dan-Jo, who she has never met, saying she has nowhere to go. In the end, Dan-Jo accidentally gives the Broom Ghost, the name 'Eundohae', and they live together in a small gosiwon. In return the Broom Ghost promises to make Danjo happy.  (Source: BOMTOON, translated)

title: Aewan
description: "If you're coming, then just come. You missed me didn't you."  "Understood, 'Master'."    A florist and his regular customer...  On the surface, they seem normal but they have a very special relationship...Restraints, handcuffs, toys, SM... The florist is a master and the other is a dog who listens obediently...However, things take an interesting turn when their already unusual relationship grows into something more.  (Source: Ridibooks, translated)

title: The Ugly Duckling's Secret Pouch
description: When Yunseol wakes up as Laila el Este in the novel, “Bird Cage,” she is horrified. Though Laila may be beautiful, her beauty is the reason the three male leads obsess over her and make her life a living hell. As such, Laila decides to use her professional makeup skills to become high society’s infamous ugly duckling. But out of nowhere, she receives a marriage proposal from Duke Montefeltra, a fellow outcast who is ostracized for his unattractive looks. Will this turn of events help Laila escape the novel’s bad ending once and for all?    (Source: Tappytoon)

title: Je Aiimnidaman!
description: 'I had a one night stand with the first person I met, but I got pregnant.'    Everytime this omega had a boyfriend, the relationship always ended up with him being cheated on and in the end, he even got crushed by hearing the words, “You are an omega, but I’m not attracted to you". Hae-Su, who was chugging alcohol while raging to his friend who comforted him, got wasted on a drug, and to make matters worse, his heat cycle started. Alpha Do-Geon, who was in the same pub, notices Hae-Su's condition and tries to help Haesoo and get him away from the place but he is seduced by Hae-Su's pheromones and they end up spending the night together.    In the morning, as soon as he wakes up, Hae-Su hastily ran away and finds out that he is pregnant 4 weeks later. Hae-Su decides to raise and make the child happy by himself. After 4 years, Hae-Su and Do-Geon are reunited...    Note: Chapter count includes 3 extras.    (Source: Lezhin, translated)

title: A Cat, Adopted by a Wolf Family?
description: Kittia is a young but brave kitty who wants to avenge her mom’s wrongful death. But with no one left to rely on, she seeks help from the powerful Gritwolfs by pretending to be an orphaned wolf pup. To her relief, they completely fall for her act... Well, they fall for her cuteness anyway. Despite realizing Kittia is a cat at first sniff, the Gritwolfs decide to take her in as the family’s youngest daughter. Totally oblivious to the fact that she has already been found out, Kittia will try her best to be the most convincing wolf ever...!    (Source: Tappytoon)

title: Dasi Mannan Neo
description: Kyung-Soo, a high school teacher has his eye on Yura, a girl student who resembles his first love. Even if I draw the line by saying “I am a teacher and she is a student”, Yura tempts me even more   “Sir… I am an adult now so don’t hold back.”  (Source: TOPTOON, translated)

title: The Archvillain's Young Patron
description: Princess Daphne helped her brother, the male lead, become the crown prince to ensure her own happy ending. However, her dream is shattered when she is killed by that very brother! In the next moment, Daphne somehow wakes up as her 13-year-old self again. Vowing to destroy the one who wronged her, she decides to become a patron for Archduke Bertrund, the story's archvillain, and have him carry out her revenge. But will Daphne be able to get the ending she wants with a villain's assistance?    (Source: Tapas)

title: Please Draw me, Love!
description: Aiden ends up working with his favorite novelist, but when he meets him, things start to take a different turn...    (Source: Toomics)

title: Marriage of Convenience 2: The Unforgettable Song
description: Cyril Ireon de Sevran, a young and powerless king, was betrayed and murdered after his only supporter, Alexandra de Arno, died in war. But when he opens his eyes again, he is shocked to see her younger self who doesn't recognize him. Cyril vows to protect Alexandra and her dream of becoming a knight this time. Still, threats lurk at every turn, including the very person who killed them both. Will Cyril save the one dear to him and change the future? Or will fate just repeat itself?  (Source: Tapas)

title: Oppasekki
description: The school's three most popular guys are actually someone's exasperating brothers—and someone who loathes attention at that! Haejoo craves a life of mundanity and obscurity, but she's plagued by her three jaw-droppingly handsome brothers who stand out even when they're doing nothing more exciting than breathing. At school, she goes to great lengths to hide the fact that they're related, but what happens when she finally gets busted? Will Haejoo be able to achieve the quiet life she seeks despite being stuck in a school with her three older brothers?  (Source: Naver, translated)

title: Perfectly Broken Love
description: Business student Ma Dongjae is cursed with only ever falling for ultra-straight dudes, so you can just imagine the luck he’s had with love. All he really wants is a relationship of his own, but his own poor taste keeps getting in the way! Finally, Dongjae is propositioned, but…it’s by a weirdo in the campus changing rooms. It doesn’t matter how sexy he is, Dongjae has to turn him down, obviously! That should be the end of it, but fate just loves messing with Dongjae, and so they end up not only sharing a class but also being assigned to work on the same project! The thing is, the cool and aloof man who introduces himself is nothing like the creep Dongjae met before. One minute he’s hot, the next minute he’s cold, and half the time he seems to forget they’ve ever even spoken. It’s almost like he’s two different people…    (Source: Lezhin)

title: Love in Kitsch
description: The Mandarin House, a kitschy B&B on Jeju island. Lured in by an ad featuring a hot guy, first-timer Yeon-U is a bright-eyed and bushy-tailed 23 year old that has come to work here, looking for a little fun and excitement over the summer.    The hot guy in the photo? Tae-Hun, your classic tsundere. Hard(body) on the outside, but you know he’s got that soft, gooey interior that just needs to be coaxed out. But things aren’t all soju and sun in paradise. Insatiable front desk manager, Hyeon-Su, wants to get to know the newbie too. Soon, Yeon-U is smack dab in the middle of a love triangle he had never anticipated. This is no reality show! Who will find love, who will get over the past and who will just get their rocks off this summer in "Love in Kitsch"?    (Source: Lezhin US)    Note: Includes 2 extra chapters.

title: Hanbeon Deo Haeyo
description: A dissatisfied married couple is given a second chance at love and are transported back in time to the day they met. Will they get back together or find new loves?  (Source: Naver, translated)

title: Jjajang Han Geureuse Jegalsega Derilsawi
description: Do you think you can conquer the entire martial arts world with just one bowl of Jajangmyeon? The protagonist dreamed of becoming the best Chinese chef, but was sent to the Song Dynasty in China! However, when he woke up, there was no martial arts at all, and all that was left was the cooking skills he had learned in his previous life. But these dishes... the response is very good! In this life , will he be able to captivate Jungwon with Jjajangmyeon and live a successful second life?    (Source: Naver, translated)

title: She's Got It Going On
description: A young man finds himself consumed by an irresistible attraction—to his best friend's mother. With a face that defies age, a body sculpted to perfection, and a dangerously seductive aura, she stirs desires he can no longer ignore. From glimpses of lace peeking through to the teasing sway of her hips, every encounter fuels his fantasies. But when he asks her for private yoga lessons, will he be able to keep his composure… or will temptation push them both past the point of no return?  (Source: Lezhin US)

title: Abella's Dessert Cafe
description: Seo Hyunji was just an ordinary office worker when she died and was reborn as Lady Abella Travis, the daughter of a wealthy noble family. Sadly, in this life, she has horrid in-laws, a playboy husband, and ultimately ends up dying tragically with no way of getting revenge. Reborn as Abella again, she vows that this time, things will be different. She calls off her wedding and decides to fulfill her fantasy of opening a dessert cafe. Will she finally have the sweet life she always dreamed of?    (Source: Tapas)

title: The Predator
description: Sangjin seems like your typical average joe working part-time at a convenience store. That is until you find out he lives with a human-eating monster. To keep the monster's appetite satisfied, he feeds the monster humans whom he deems to be trash of the world. One day, a girl named Jiwon, who believes the monster to be a god, decides to move in with the two. With the police closing in on Sangjin as the main suspect in the recent disappearances, how long will he be able to get away with this?    (Source: WEBTOONS)

title: Supsogeseo Gongjagi Juungeoseun
description: “I’m going to do this for the last time, so let me go back with my memories.”    Those who died for me 29 times.... I wanted to protect you with my own hands at least once. I want to protect those poor and pitiful 'my people'.    Thus, Elysia's 30th and last regression began. Everything began to change as if fate had been twisted into place. A child who was born without a ‘sign’ in a family that received God’s protection and lived a harsh life. I gradually realize that the beginning of the curse disguised as God's blessing all started with one person...    (Source: Naver, translated)

title: The Chain of Youth
description: Jia is an average girl who, along with the majority of her classmates, has fallen head over heels for Yoona, a girl so pretty she's practically the school's idol. They're on two totally different levels, but Jia can ignore her feelings no longer! But who is Yoona, really? Stay tuned to see what romance unfolds between these two!    (Source: Lezhin)

title: Corruption: Dirty Confessions
description: The filthy gaze of my perverted boss crawls over me like he's defiling my whole body. My pent-up lust was overflowing enough to soak through from just a stare like that.  This reckless escape to quench my thirst... Slowly, deeply, it dragged me into depravity.  (Source: DAYcomics)

title: Hello Again!
description: Ever since he was young, Hee-Min has always liked his neighbour, Seon-Woo-hyung. Hee-Min had given up on Seon-Woo after he had moved away. However, coincidentally, while Seon-Woo is searching for a roommate, Hee-Min is able to meet him once again. But, the love rival that has appeared in front of Hee-Min now is none other than his older brother, Yoo-Min!   (Source: Bomtoon, translated)

Long straight hair, a white dress, his first love—these three words linger faintly in Baek-gu's mind as he promptly passes out. When a mysterious woman appears at his doorstep amidst a pouring rainstorm, Baek-gu is shocked to his core. Not because she faintly reminds him of someone he knew long, long ago, but because he mistakes her for a ghost. With their relationship already starting off on an awkward foot, the question looms: what will become of the story between these two?  (Source: Lezhin US)

title: Isanghan Ahopsu
description: Soo-Hee grew up trapped in a household preaching about an old-policy that women must be submissive and modest. And at the age of 29, she left. Using an app on her phone for the first time in her life, she got connected with a man, whose personality and voice were her type. And during their first phone call... "Your voice makes me so horny. The moment I heard your voice, I just wanted to do things like this." She moaned silently as an attempt to suppress her moaning, she buried her head in her blanket. The man patiently waited for Soo-Hee's response, and as soon as she got quiet, he finally spoke. "Now put your hand down there."

title: Isegye Yongsa Hamnak
description: “Fuck the hero.”    “Of course… Wait, what?"    A normal (?) office worker who’s fine after jacking off fifteen times in a row was summoned to another world. Who he met up with was not a goddess, but a demon lord? Plus, if he wants to return to his original world, he has to make the hero fall, something even the demon lord couldn’t do?!  (Source: Lezhin, translated)

title: Taming a Female Delinquent
description: "Shove it inside your hole while I watch. It's an order."   The ruthless revenge of a man who was bullied in high school began with the kidnapping of the delinquent girl who drove him to near death.  (Source: DAYcomics)

title: Arelyn Is Sick and Tired
description: The Caretakers' Council is a group of dedicated servants with only one goal: to nurse terminally ill Arelyn Halbern back to health. But Arelyn is already resigned to her fate, knowing she's simply an extra in a novel meant to die young. That is, until Crown Prince Pession Allermand takes an interest in her. Now, Pession visits Arelyn daily, nagging her to eat better, play, and be more active. With the novel's male lead lending his strength, can Arelyn finally find the will to fight her illness?  (Source: Tapas)

title: SO-EUN for All
description: “Would you really let them have their way with you?”   The sweet scent and gentle touch of my first love, the one who once comforted me… And now, that very person is standing here, wearing nothing underneath her shirt?  (Source: DAYcomics)

title: Love Gacha!
description: Yang-U Jo, a typical salaryman finds joy only when he plays gacha games. Unexpectedly, he downloads an app called Love Gotcha! as if he was tempted by “free rerolls”, he obtained his workplace junior Yun-Ha…?! He comes across the opportunity to scold her troublesome junior when…   “You have encountered your partner! Would you like to train her?”  (Source: TOPTOON, translated)

title: Blue Glass
description: Every princess in Nak-Rang Kingdom is fated to be married off as a political tool the moment she comes of age, and Princess Sol is no exception. Seeing her older sister die after being used the same way leaves her feeling alone and helpless. That is when a mysterious medium tells her that what she desires most awaits her outside the palace. As fate would have it, Sol finds a frail boy named Mi-Ru at the slave market and feels compelled to save him. Though Mi-Ru quickly becomes Sol's only refuge, it won't be easy to protect him from her evil brother's clutches...    (Source: Tappytoon, edited)    Note: As of July 19th, 2023, this work has been re-serialized in full color.

title: Hujakgaui Mabeop Cheonjae
description: "To stay alive… I have no choice but to become a genius. I’ll do my best starting today, so please support me."    Lee Hyun-Woo finds himself possessing Kyle Seltarion, an extra character from a game where he used to reign as the world’s number-one player. Considering the game’s storyline, he soon faces the imminent death of Kyle, who, on top of being on death's door, can't use magic or aura and has a terrible reputation. How did he end up in the body of such a character?    However, after discovering a new talent, he learns to harness mana and begins to shift his attributes and reputation with knowledge of hidden routes gained through grinding in the game. His immediate goal is to save his own life, but that goal is closely linked to the impending global catastrophe... To overcome this situation, he needs to gather allies and boost his reputation!     It's time to turn his past, which was a reckless mess, around and move into a new phase!    (Source: KakaoPage, translated)

title: Teen Spirit
description: Hwee Kang is in a band with all his friends and is recruited by a well known company called JBL because they all have the looks of stars. However, there are high expectations. During the audition, what surprise will they give everyone, and what will Hwee Kang do?

title: Mango's Bone
genres: Comedy, Drama, Romance, Slice of Life
description: Baek Jooin is a smart, diligent student and has a crush on Ham Sobok, another elite student. However, things start to go downhill when Jooin's twin brother, Jooyul, turns up to meet Sobok while pretending to be Jooin. What's worse, Sobok's best friend, Lisa, doesn't seem to like Jooin one bit. How will it all play out?    (Source: Lezhin)

title: Imitation
description: As a member of the obscure idol group Tea Party, Maha Lee dreams of becoming a superstar one day. But she had no idea she’d get her big break so soon…by embarrassing herself on a popular talk show! Even worse, the debacle lands her on the bad side of Ryoc Kwon, a member of the top male idol group SHAX. He now has her pegged as a talentless fake who imitates successful artists for attention…Does Maha have what it takes to convince him and the world that she’s the real deal?  (Source: Yen Press)    Note: Chapter count includes 59 side stories and 5 specials.

title: Welcome to Erotic Land
description: U-Geon has always been fascinated with amusement parks, but his work is miserable, getting looked down on by his childhood friend, Cho-I, every day. However, his life changes when he gets his hands on a magical tarot card that gives him the power to control any girl he wants.  (Source: DAYcomics, edited)

title: Maid in Heaven
description: An orphan, Sherl Watson, leaves her job in London to work at the Taylor Mansion.  Rumors and a cloud of mystery surround the mansion as strange occurrences keep popping up.  Will Sherl and the other maids be able to get out alive or were they all doomed, to begin with?    (Source: Pocket Comics)

title: Time to Call Off This Engagement
description: Soojin is suddenly transported into the 18-year-old body of Leah, the second female lead in her favorite web novel. As a villainess reincarnate, her mission is to avoid a terrible ending. Soojin's only option is to break off the engagement... However, Devan, her egotistical fiancee is not making this easy, not one bit.   (Source: POCKET COMICS)

title: THE STAR SEEKERS
description: It’s the age of magic; a world where magic idols prevail. In these extraordinary times, an ordinary idol group called Star One is suddenly gifted with magical powers. And with these magical powers, a mysterious enemy appears. The once unpopular idol group finds themselves tasked with saving the world. Will they be able to take on this enormous responsibility to restore peace?    (Source: WEBTOON)

title: Alt Account Trap!
description: Everyone knows Kang Su-hyun. The Class president, social butterfly, the kind of guy who shines in every corner of campus life. But even the brightest star has shadows.His secret? He runs a private “alt account,” an anonymous SNS page where he draws and posts scandalous 19+ art. It’s his hidden world, one that absolutely no one can ever discover.At least, that was the plan.One day, his double life is accidentally exposed to the very last person he’d want: Lim Ji-ah, the school outcast who barely talks to anyone.“Wait… sunbae, you’re that famous lewd artist? Hehe… guess I’ve got some leverage now, huh?”From that moment on, Su-hyun’s carefully maintained image as Mr. Perfect begins to crumble.Stuck between bribes, blackmail, and the most awkward partnership imaginable, can a campus golden boy survive having his NSFW alter ego in the hands of an unlikely accomplice?  (Source: Lezhin US)

title: Unfather
description: Kyunghee's strapped for cash and with classes about to start soon, he's running out of options. He was fine last year, Sihyun paid him well for his "company." But that ended not long after it started. The old man was clingy and the last thing Kyunghee wanted was a relationship. Things make a turn for the worse when Kyunghee meets his mother's new boyfriend, a vindictive Sihyun.    (Source: Lezhin US)

title: A Friend's Girlfriend
description: There's lots of ways to get a girl. Gyeong-Su has never had a girlfriend, and his friends are out to help him find one... The lesson begins now!  (Source: DAYcomics, edited)

title: The Cliff
description: Two men accidentally fall during a hiking trip and wait for someone to save their lives. The cliff becomes a stage for conflict, violence, madness, and frustration.   (Source: WEBTOONS)

title: Kkorireul Heundeulda
description: Korean Wolf Kang Doha is quite the popular guy in school. One day, he bumps into the fox, Yeojoon, who is known as a loner. Doha finds him irritating, but he couldn’t stop seeking him out. Is this… perhaps… love?

title: His Addictive Touch
description: A crowded subway full of people, and a hand that enters from beneath the skirt. The fear of being seen by others, and the pleasure from his touch, gets the girls addicted.   "I can't believe I came, what's happening to me?"  (Source: DAYcomics)

title: Dominating My Mother-In-Law
description: Tae-Seok is about to meet his soon-to-be wife's mother, and is shocked after finally getting to see her. She is the woman who used to be his sex slave.  Tae-Seok decides to take advantage of this chance and his mother-in-law. Now... His goal is to turn his mother-in-law into his bitch!.  (Source: DAYcomics, edited)

title: The Messiah and His Followers
description: After spending the night with Zion, a girl from a cult, Hageon finds himself worshiped as the cult’s Messiah—and he fully embraces it.  (Source: Toomics)

title: Man of The House
description: One stupid decision cost me my dream, but it also led me to this four-story heaven... Maybe living with my wife's family isn't so bad after all! Because no matter what people say... I'm the man of the house.  (Source: Toomics)

title: Ibeon Saengdo Hanpanhallae?
description: We have developed love since our school days. As college students, we finally had the first experience we had been enduring, and our future as a couple seemed to be filled with only happiness. “We were definitely lovers in our past life… !” The moment I ejaculated for the first time, memories from my past life rush into my head, and I learn the shocking truth about my lover in the past! What will happen to our future now?!  (Source: Lezhin, translated)

title: Nampyeoneun Dwaetgo, Donina Beollyeomnida
description: I became the wife of a man who already had a lover.  So, I should do my best to help him remain faithful to her, right?    But how did I end up destroying the bed with him on our first night together...?    ***    Aristine is a royal princess who's been confined all her life, as she is highly disfavored by the emperor.  But the truth is, as the possessor of the [Royal Sight], she can see the past, present, and future.    The emperor sends her off to die in a political marriage arranged with the prince of their enemy country, rumored to be a bloodthirsty savage, but...  Her soon-to-be husband, the so-called "savage," is far more normal than the rumors suggest.    "Still, he's taken, so he's off-limits for me. I'll just focus on making lots of money from now on!"    Will Aristine be able to fulfill her dream of living a luxurious, wealthy life?  Or will she be able to kill two birds with one stone and win over her husband as well?    (Source: Korean publisher, translated)

title: A Life-Changing Turn
description: My name is Sua Jo, and my life couldn't get any better - my loving dad is a Mayor, my handsome boyfriend is the top dog in school, my fun-to-be-with friends love me, and my background is top-notch. My life is perfect. But wait, did I just hit someone?! No, no I didn't... No one saw me, so nothing happened. My life is still perfect, or so I thought... until "M" appeared claiming to be a witness. You think I'll let you ruin my perfect life?! Just wait until I find you!     (Source: WEBTOON)   Note: Includes one extra chapter.

title: The Love Meowtchmaker
description: Orange cats have a reputation for chaos, but not Big Cheese! This clever feline has a mission: play matchmaker and help two clueless souls find love.  (Source: Toomics)

title: Miyeon
description: Picture this: It’s your final year of high school, and you can’t wait to get out there and live your best life. You blush at the popular kid, and eye the new transfer student with bruises on his face. You’re looking forward to the future… Until you wake up in the future, with no memory of the last six years. Suddenly finding herself as a 25-year-old aspiring actress, Miyeon Seo begins to unravel the painful threads of her forgotten past.  (Source: WEBTOON)

title: Nae Yeonaeui Munjejeom
description: Always doing her best to avoid any connection to internal powers in the company until she retires, Mo Taehee.  Cha Soohyeok, the general manager who has overcome all kinds of obstacles, finally finds his way to be the CEO.  The love and shameful(?) story of a young man and woman, who spent one night in a secluded cottage with their own secrets, unfolds!

title: Demon Diary
description: Gods and demons wage a neverending battle with the mortal realm as their battlefield. As with most longstanding feuds, the reasons are no longer important--hatred is a way of life. But it is foretold that one would arise who could restore harmony between gods and demons. Enter Raenef...heir to a set of demon royalty, he is hardly courtly material. The demon king assigns Eclipse to be his tutor, to mold Raenef into proper demonic shape. The two begin a journey of discovery and are soon joined by a human knight and a god-blessed priest. (Source: Tokyopop) Included one-shots: Volume 1: Crystal Heart and Tera

title: Hanamjaui Tap Gongnyakbeop
description: One day, mysterious black towers suddenly rose all over the world, and a chosen few began to awaken. But for Bong Joohyuk—a wimpy, down-on-his-luck nobody—it was something that should have had nothing to do with him. After another exhausting day at his part-time job, he was just about to take a bite of ramen when—   [Bong Joohyuk, you have awakened.]   “…Eh, fuck, what the hell?!"   Is this finally his chance to turn his life around?  (Source: Naver, translated)

title: Sunyu of the Shadowless
description: When failed martial artist Kwak Noh is tasked with protecting a group of young orphans, he plans to send them off to good homes. However, after growing attached to the children, he decides to raise them all as disciples of the Shadowless Clan. But as times get tough, Kwak Noh is forced to journey far from home to make money, leaving Sunyu, first brother of the clan, to provide for his siblings. If Sunyu wants to step up for his clan, though, he'll need to step up his skills! Training begins now!   (Source: Tapas)

title: Jusul, Yogoe Harem
description: "Don’t ever take that necklace off."   That was the promise I made to my grandmother as a child. However, during the turning point of my life, the necklace was removed from me… and the most beautiful woman I had ever seen… No… a three tailed fox was on top of me.  (Source: TOPTOON, translated)

title: Sonyeojaepan
description: The unpredictable trial of a girl who was nothing at school begins!   Ordinary Park Ga-Eul witnesses the secret affair of Han Yu-Hyeon, who belongs to the so-called 'popular group', and uses this to blackmail Han Yu-Hyeon to join the group she admired...  (Source: Naver, translated)   Note: Chapter count includes 10 side story chapters

title: Ping
description: In the modern age, there still exists some martial art clans from long ago, vying for power. Amidst a fight, the son of a security man meets a mysterious girl who kisses him out of the blue...

title: Budaee Namguni Na Honja
description: “I’m considering sending you to join the female soldiers.”   Jae-Jun is a participant in the -Mixed Gender Operation Pilot Program-. He ends up transferring to a military base comprised entirely of female soldiers with himself as the sole male… Will he be able to complete his military service in a base where temptation lurks around every corner?!  (Source: TOPTOON, translated)

title: Dark Mermaid
description: She just wants to start fresh so she can graduate in peace. She just wants to leave behind all the bad memories — her sleepwalking, the trauma from being bullied at school — all of it. She did everything she could to keep to herself, but the class president, Hae-On, just won't leave her alone. One day, when Seul-Bi visits the local lake Hae-On recommended, she comes across something she never imagined seeing in her wildest dreams: a wild, dark mermaid.    (Source: WEBTOON, edited)   Note: Includes one extra.

title: The Red Shirt
description: It all started with a retirement. A legend in the underworld of killers and assassins, Sihyeok Cha, otherwise known as “The Red Shirt,” leaves a life of violence behind for his loving wife Miju and their unborn child. Little did he expect, however, that bonds made in blood cannot be so easily erased. When tragedy strikes, Sihyeok is dragged back into the deadly struggle between mob factions… and the fight is far from over.  (Source: WEBTOON)

title: Curious Recipe
description: As a young boy, Junghyuk felt drawn to the tough Taesu who often swooped in to save him from bullies. Now after years have passed, it’s his turn to make Taesu fall head over heels. Will plates of sweets be enough to win over his heart?  (Source: TappyToon)    <I>Note: Includes three side stories.

title: The Blooming Baby Boss Lady
description: Gloriosa Elvador can bloom flowers that produce harmless flames, but her evil brother, Magnus, deems her power worthless and feeds her to the sacred tree. Although she's resigned to die, she reawakens in the past as her 13-year-old self with a second chance at life. Now, she must find her cursed betrothed, Arvid Yultecia. Only he can save her from dying again, and only she can lift his curse. Will their blooming love be enough to save them both, or will Magnus trample their budding romance?    (Source: Tapas)

title: Hyung, You're My Idol
description: As the youngest member of hit idol group LoverU, Ryeojoon never suspected that a book gifted by a fan would be... riveting fan fiction starring himself and the other LoverU members! Drawn deeper into the mysterious world of fanfics, he just can't stop himself anymore... How long can this bookworm keep his not-so-innocent hobby a secret? Superstar turns superfan as Ryeojoon walks a dangerous line between idol and fanboy!    (Source: Tappytoon)    Note: Includes a prologue.

title: The Path to Vengeance
description: Cha Chan-ok is a man in his forties that grew up believing that happiness shared is doubled and and sadness shared is halved. He is a good man that helps whenever and whoever. But that has come to bite him in the ass. After his father’s death, he has everything taken away from him - wealth, power, status, friends and even his family. However, his good disposition didn’t bring only misfortune. In the past, he ended up saving a young girl called Jae-hee. And after a traumatic event lands Chan-ok in the hospital, she’s the only one willing to help him turn things around. But his path to vengeance might not be as smooth as he’d like. Love, sex, betrayal and blackmail will all be part of the game.    (Source: Lezhin X)

title: Rust
description: Hamaru works as a detective at a livestock company. One day, he goes on a business trip to Japan at the recommendation of his boss, but the place is a Yakuza crime syndicate. While struggling to survive there, he gradually realizes his talent for using a sword. A detective who has stepped into the shadows challenges the top of the underworld in order to survive.  (Source: Naver, translated)

title: When the Black Moon Rises
description: Ju Sehwa lived a blessed life as a daughter of the mystic realm's most powerful clan, until she was framed for treason and executed by those she trusted most. But when the power of a divine wish grants her a second chance, she knows that she must use it to save her family and take down the corrupt clan leaders. With the handsome head of the rival Baek clan as her unlikely ally, Sehwa is set on revenge, but with those closest to her still plotting against her, is history doomed to repeat itself?    (Source: Tapas)

title: The World of Dating
description: The day Se-Ul declares that she will stay single, three attractive men suddenly decide to pop into her life all at once. A man who matches her ideal type, a childhood friend she’s known for twenty years, and a man who checks off all the right boxes. Will Se-Ul be able to hold firm to her declaration of staying single?    (Source: WEBTOONS, edited)

title: Chaengman Bogo Tapbaeu!
description: Due to his lack of talent, Seonghyeon gave up acting and became a writer. Seonghyeon is a genius author with a natural talent for screenplays, but he still misses acting. Then one day, he got into a truck accident on set.    “If I’m born again, I have to act”, he promised and closed his eyes.    Seonghyeon returns 13 years back into the past to when he was 24 years old. And the method acting ability that goes into his scripts became the character itself! Okay, this life is about being reborn as a genius actor!

title: Kindergarten for Divine Beasts
description: Min-U Seo, a struggling nobody, never thought he'd inherit anything, especially not from the mother who abandoned him. However, what he received was beyond anything he could have imagined... A kindergarten for divine beasts! Will Min-U be able to look after these magical children as their new teacher?  (Source: WEBTOON)

title: I’m a Mom
description: A world full of zombies, where my daughter lives...   "Don't worry, dear... Mommy will protect you, even if I become a monster...!"  (Source: TOPTOON+)

title: May Belongs to Me
description: Without a stable job or home, Joo May lives recklessly, drifting from one lover's house to another. One day, May passes out, almost beaten to death by an ex-boyfriend he bumped into. When he wakes, he finds himself chained up in the house of Shin Jooin, the clean-cut man who apparently rescued him. But there's something off about Jooin, who treats May almost like a pet* Who is Jooin really, and what is he hiding?  (Source: TappyToon)

Armed only with a gun and a frying pan, Ho-Yeong Cheon must survive Battlegrounds: a battle-royale style game with 100 participants, where there’s only one way to win: kill the 99 other players, all of them death-row convicts. Ho-Yeong has another objective besides survival, though -- he must find an assemblyman who was captured while investigating the game, and is now an unwilling participant. Can Ho-Yeong complete his mission on an island with 99 people willing to kill to survive, and emerge the last one standing?    (Source: WEBTOON, edited)

title: Meow Man
description:
What if your dream date turns out to be a…cat? Such is the dilemma for Bonnie, a young woman who wanted love and ended up with Claude, a highly needy half-man-half-cat instead. Will they be able to make it work? Is sharing the litterbox going to be a huge problem? And what ARE her friends going to think? Read Meow Man to see how this big ball of yarn unfurls.
(Source: WEBTOONS)

title: Into the Depths
description: The true meaning of friendship is explored in this story about Shihyeon, who was born deaf, and Youngwoo, who acquires a disability later in life.    (Source: Pocket Comics)

title: Beyond the Memories
description: Jeong Sejin knows full well that his life doesn’t have anything good in store for him. As an adoptive son riddled with nightmares of a strange assault, Sejin sometimes finds himself wondering if there could ever be someone out there for a person as broken as him… With his family’s company teetering on the edge of financial ruin, Sejin knows a happy-ever-after is further away than ever. So when the second son of the thriving Seonho Group, a handsome alpha named Kwon Ido, requests his hand in marriage, Sejin goes into it with low expectations. Yet, something strange happens the moment their eyes meet. How could someone he had just met look at him with such pain and tenderness? And how does Ido know all of his preferences? Could there be something more to this seemingly arranged marriage…?    (Source: Lezhin US)

title: Disconnected from Reality
description: “Please help! I’ve been kidnapped by this man. Please call the police!” Just like any other night, Hye-Seong spends his time playing games with an online friend, Nana. But when Nana goes AFK and accidentally leaves his mic on, Hye-Seong hears the voice of a panicked girl crying for help, saying she’s been kidnapped. Once Nana gets back, he sounds suspicious of Hye-Seong, even asking questions that sound like he’s trying to gauge Hye-Seong's reaction. Despite Hye-Seong trying to act as natural as possible, Nana insists on meeting IRL…   (Source: WEBTOONS, edited)

title: Behind the Scenes
description: Korea’s hunkiest top model Woo Tae-Young has decided to try his hand at acting once more. No more of those teen heartthrob roles, Tae-Young has his eyes set on a much more…mature role. And when he finds out his idol, the dreamy Koo Min-Ki, is set to be one of the main actors of the film, he is even more determined to get the role as his co-star. The two seem to have a natural chemistry with each other… both on and off screen. Will this end up helping their performances? Or will it cause their worlds to come crashing down?   (Source: Lezhin)     Notes:   - The main story finished with chapter 84 which was published in March.  - Total chapter count includes 11 extras and 3 epilogues (one per season and one for the extras).

title: Sadistic Beauty: Epilogue
description: Byun Minho watched Duna from behind as she was congratulated by everyone for winning the competition's grand prize. Minho had always believed she was beneath him. Feeling a mix of jealousy and defeat, he went to the school rooftop to cry his heart out. That day, Cha Wookyung secretly followed Minho and watched him quietly. Ever since he saw Minho spill his raw emotions, Wookyung dreamed of claiming Minho as his. After 7 years of waiting, Wookyung's vanquish begins now.    (Source: Bomtoon, translated)

title: Greed Game
description: "You will win this round if the male contestant cums."   In-Ho gets invited to a dirty death game through a suspicious woman, Tae-Ri. Putting his life on the line as a wager, he enters the game with an enormous prize at stake. The do-or-die game begins!  (Source: DAYcomics, edited)   Note: Includes one extra chapter.

title: My Aunt
description: Sarah can't resist her nephew's huge features... and so their secretly promiscuous life begins!    (Source: Toomics)

title: Frequency
description: "I can dominate whoever I want?"   Ju-Won is a grad school student who everyone in the lab looks down on. But when he and Ye-Rim hear a certain sound wave that's been turned on without his knowing...   "I'm sorry... Please forgive me!"   After that day, Ju-Won starts taming arrogant bitches.  (Source: DAYcomics)

title: The Silent Warrior
description: "Face your destiny."   In the alternate realm of the Otherworld—filled with creatures and Earth's catastrophes—an ancient warrior, a human summoned long ago into the realm, is determined to bring it all to an end. Fueled by the resentment of an unknown past, this journey unravels hidden identities, embarks on undercover missions, faces death trials, navigates through betrayals, and wades through bloodbaths. What do the shadows conceal, and what destiny awaits in the heart of the unknown?  (Source: WEBTOON)

title: Eoseooseyo, Isegye Pyeonuijeome
description: Kim Dojin is the manager of a convenience store in the other world he was suddenly pulled into. He was spending his days in a body that didn’t get aroused when… a virgin girl who came to his store revived his senses?!   “The taste of a clumsy virgin girl is the best!”  (Source: TOPTOON, translated)

title: Wife Exchange
description: If a stranger invits you to witness his sex experiment, what would you do? What if you were someone who was having sex problems after 10 years of marriage? Will your brain win out, or your dick?  (Source: DAYcomics)

title: The Pain in My Neck
description: Recently something's really been doing a number on Su-Min. No medical test can seem to tell what it is, though. After several unsuccessful checkups, Su-Min walks home to find…his next-door neighbor drinking the blood of a random stranger! Su-Min’s thoroughly creeped out, but he soon becomes interested when the vampire claims that he can suck all of Su-Min’s pain away. What could possibly go wrong? It’ll be worth it if a small pain in his neck will rid him of this mysterious ailment, right? Right?    (Source: Lezhin US, edited)    Note: The chapter count includes a prologue

title: Gorgon
description: This is the story of Im Soo-Hyun, an orphan who is cursed with the ability to kill people by looking them in the eye.    (Source: Toomics)     Note: Includes one extra chapter.

title: SURVIVAL 101
description: Despite living in a dystopian world ruled by an insane dictator and reinforced by his discriminatory values, Victor managed to lead a happy life thanks to his wife, Julia. Unfortunately, that life is torn to pieces after she is cruelly murdered by the dictator's Special Security Unit. Grief-stricken and enraged, Victor swears to avenge Julia by entering a survival game that might give him a chance to meet his targets. But can Victor win this battle royale, where only the strongest survive?  (Source: Tapas)   Note: Includes one extra chapter.

title: Lulutier's Fiery Final Days
description: To resurrect her dead mother, Lulutier is abused in a magic experiment by her father, which shortens her lifespan significantly. Now deemed useless, she's forced to marry an old count. Refusing to accept her fate, Lulutier kisses the priest officiating the wedding to call the marriage off. Much to her surprise, said priest turns out to be Captain Caintzel of the Holy Order, who offers to become her husband instead! But can this holy knight offer Lulutier the sanctuary she truly needs?    (Source: Tapas)

title: Yangtal
description: A fat body type leads to a hellish military life due to sexual harassment from Yu-Hyeok, a senior military officer. Even after discharge, the memories of military service are so traumatising that living a normal life is impossible.     A familiar face appears on a recruitment poster. After seeing Yu-Heok, who ruined his life, living happily ever after, he decides to take revenge. That day, a plot to kidnap him and take revenge begins to unfold...    (Source: BOMTOON, translated and edited)    Note:  - This series is tagged with #L_이없는BL, which means BL without L(ove)  - Reader discression is advised: this work contains disturbing themes, including kidnapping, rape, imprisonment, and murder  - Chapter count includes an epilogue

title: Her Ladyship Objects to this Marriage!
description: Lady Kyriel, the strong-willed commandant of the Alteion Empire, does not want to get married. However, when she finds herself in an arranged union, she is surprised to find that it is with a cordial but mysterious sorcerer named Idwin. He somehow checks all her boxes—the boxes she made sure were impossible to check. Kyriel’s unbreakable vow and Idwin’s inescapable fate take them on a journey to their higher purpose—one that involves the past and future of empires and churches..    (Source: Tapas)

title: The New Hire is the Demon Lord
description: Dullahan, the demon lord who once terrorized the world, finally revives in modern-day Korea, eager to take revenge against the hero who defeated her centuries ago. But all she can find is his descendant, Yong-Rae Kim: a hapless, incompetent office worker with no prospects and no joy in life. Ending his life now would only be doing him a favor, so Dullahan decides to improve his life first… but Yong-Rae's two-timing girlfriend and his many strict superiors at work stand in the way. Can Dullahan crush the office hierarchy and awaken Yong-Rae's dormant hero abilities to make her revenge more satisfying?    (Source: WEBTOON, edited)

title: Cheonui Eolgul
description: “What will people call him?”   Someone asked. But no one could answer. A transcendent being appeared in the world. Creating a new history in the film industry.  (Source: KakaoPage, translated)

title: Overnight Success
description: After suffering both scam and divorce, Chu Minsik teeters on the edge of financial ruin. Still, he doesn't let it completely ruin his humanity - a fact soon rewarded when the old man he helps out turns out to be more than meets the eye. Minsik is rewarded for his help, being told that the key to his future lies within his dreams... Specifically, dreams where he dates oh-so-sexy women! Each dream is guaranteed to tell him which crypto he should invest in the next day, turning him into somewhat of an overnight success! Money, fame, and women - what more could a guy want!  (Source: Lezhin US)

Forced to live as a high school student due to his stepfather’s gambling debt, Jeong Hui-jae flees to a remote island to live with his grandmother so he can escape the pursuit of loan sharks. But just when he thinks he’s safe, Hui-Jae runs into trouble in the form of the local gangster squad: Bowlcut, Hatchet, and Cha Beomjoon. But when Hui-jae becomes Beomjoon’s errand boy, the two find themselves stuck not only on the island, but in a complicated love affair that leaves them both stranded in love…    (Source: Lezhin US)

title: Gwi
description: Mu-Sang has a quest... He must find and kill every "Gwi" that has ever existed. He is determined, and won't let anything get in his way, not even the imperial army!   While traveling and searching for the remnants of Gwi, he meets a girl who also bears the same mark crossed out than he has. A fateful encounter? Were those two fated to meet? And why does he hold such a grudge against the "Gwi"...? All are questions left to be answered!

title: Matched with My Bully on Random Chat
