description: Do-Hyeon thinks the girl he matched with might be the same one who used to torment him. But this time, he's the one holding the power, and with it, he plans to bring down his old bully, her friend... and even her family.  (Source: DAYcomics, edited)

title: Don't Hate the Player
description: Mujik is a lowly programmer at a video game company. He regularly gets chewed out by his boss and constantly works overtime. But one day a bug in the virtual reality game he plays makes all the female NPCs fall in love with him. What’s more, the game even rewards him with the ability to charm women…in real life?! Mujik’s office is full of hotties and now he’s gonna make the most of his leveled-up charisma. It’s his game he’s playing now, so let a player play…  (Source: Lezhin US)

title: Pleasure Dorm
description: No romantic relationships! Nam-Hyuk is forced to enroll in SEUM Academy, one of the most prestigious cram schools, and live in the dorms there, where dating is strictly off-limits. But seeing a nurse having sex with a student makes him think the rules can be bent a bit. Will Nam-Hyuk be able to keep his nose in the books and pass the university entrance exam?  (Source: DAYcomics)

title: Elskar
description: Hidden deep within the sanctuary of the forest lives the Rangae species, who form a precious jewel within their hearts once they reach adulthood. Viola, a young Rangae, has yet to form one when her village is attacked by human hunters. Due to her shocking resemblance to the late empress, she is rescued by Duke Khalid Alec Droy and assigned to serve the fifth imperial prince. Faced with the cruel hierarchy of high society and palace life, can Viola overcome her hatred of humans and discover the mysterious duke’s true intentions?     (Source: TappyToons)

title: Elskar
description: Hidden deep within the sanctuary of the forest lives the Rangae species, who form a precious jewel within their hearts once they reach adulthood. Viola, a young Rangae, has yet to form one when her village is attacked by human hunters. Due to her shocking resemblance to the late empress, she is rescued by Duke Khalid Alec Droy and assigned to serve the fifth imperial prince. Faced with the cruel hierarchy of high society and palace life, can Viola overcome her hatred of humans and discover the mysterious duke’s true intentions?     (Source: TappyToons)

title: He Is a High School Girl
description: Choi Kang-Bae is a famous high school hooligan feared by everyone. Nevertheless, he has a huge "sister complex", which urges him to protect her sister, whatever the price... Only, how does he plan to take care of her when she studies in a high school only for girls?

title: God's Web Novel
description: Lee Hwan, the protagonist of a web novel, receives a once-in-a-lifetime offer from a god: help said god create his web novel in return for a wish. After agreeing to this deal, Hwan is thrown into a modern world filled with fantasy elements, new technology, and martial artists. All he needs to do is follow the plotline the author set out for him, except... there is no concrete plotline! With such a plot hole, can Hwan manage to come up with a story detailed and cool enough to appease its creator?    (Source: Tapas)

title: Off Track
description: Gunmu Cha’s final mission is to steal a precious diamond. While gathering intel at a club, he saves Teo Yeon from getting blackmailed. But what business does he have with a rich kid who’s always at the center of drama? Gunmu needs to avoid getting involved with Teo for the sake of the mission, but their natural chemistry leads to one steamy encounter after another. As the secrets keep building between them, who will get burned first?    (Source: Tapas)

title: A Spoonful of Your Love
description: A secret office romance between the son of the CEO of a huge conglomerate and his newbie secretary slash perpetual liar! Yeonju gave up her career in order to chase after love, but only found herself left with scars and pain…After getting a position at a huge company as a secretary, she finds herself face-to-face with her new boss, Jaehyun, who also happens to be a former classmate of Yeonju’s! Jaehyun’s serious good looks and short temper earned him the nickname among his employees, “the S.H.B.”, or the “super, handsome bastard”.    After a series of humiliating situations, Jaehyun admits that he no longer just wants to be friends, and would rather date. Yeonju, who had her mind set on never dating ever again, finds herself interested despite how hard she tries not to fall for him!    (Source: NetComics)

title: Sextertainment
description: Gang-In Na is the manager of a rookie girl group. One day, after clearing all the stages of an adult idol game, the girl group members he’s in charge of become characters in the game he completed…? A status message appears before his eyes, blending reality and the game.   [You need to have sex with the members in order to get the rewards!]   (Source: TOPTOON, translated)

title: TOY XX BOX
description: Taeyi has a reputation on campus for being extremely beautiful but a hard nut to crack. There’s a reason for that. She’d much rather enjoy the company of her toys than other people. She’s had enough of complicated and bothersome relationships with real humans. That is until a certain underclassman, Kim Ha-on, approaches her. After being convinced that she needs a partner to make the most of her new toy, she reluctantly let’s Ha-on in on her fun. But only on a strictly no strings attached basis! Things were supposed to be purely physical but it was only a matter of time before someone started to catch feelings… Will Ha-on become Taeyi’s new favorite toy or just be thrown back in the box with the rest of them?    (Source: Lezhin)    Note: chapter count includes four side stories.

title: Sweeten the Deal
description: Han-Eul, self-proclaimed campus flirt, has big dreams of landing a relationship in college. But one day, he stumbles upon a grim-looking man in what seems to be a shady drug dealer—and bolts in terror. Fate, however, has other plans. Han-Eul runs into the supposed drug dealer, Choi Da-Jeong, once again in a club he only joined to follow his crush. But before he knows it, he ends up at his place! A fluffy, sweet whirlwind romance between the slightly airheaded Han-Eul and the unexpectedly charming Da-Jeong unfolds!    (Source: Lezhin US)

title: A Hero Who Knows His Stuff
description: For 20 years, Hyeonseok fought monsters in another world before finally managing to save it and be sent back to Earth as a reward. Now a former deliveryman named Chanseok, he looks forward to enjoying modern conveniences, only to discover that Earth is very different from what he remembers. Monsters have started appearing from Erosion Points that pop up at random, and people with innate abilities become Hunters to defeat them. Reluctantly, Chanseok applies to become a Hunter himself, mostly for the money. He saved the world once before, so how hard can it be the second time?  (Source: WEBTOON)

title: Glasses Cloth and Playlist
description: Two people in the catalogue department fall in love, get quickly married, and emigrate to another country, leaving their positions to be filled by new recruits “Bada Lee” and “Seomin Hyun.” While Bada manages song playlists, and Seomin hoards glasses cloths, the two are competing rivals.    (Source: Copincomics)

title: Raising the Children of the Main Characters
description: After watching his first love marry his best friend, Eins Lainswaine resigns himself to life with another violet-eyed woman. Ye-Hi Lee never expected to be part of his story, until she is reincarnated as Eins’ reluctant wife, Märchen Lainswaine. On the bright side, twins Lieph and Joseph remind Ye-Hi Lee of her deceased siblings at every turn. Could the Lainswaines overcome a lifetime of tragic accidents (and mysterious circumstances) to become adoptive parents…and maybe even something more?    (Source: Tapas, edited)

title: Bunny and Her Oppas
description: When Bunny told the world she only cared about personality, she really meant it...until her personality-hire of a boyfriend turned out to be a complete jerk! It’s time to accept the truth: handsome men are the best! Now, Bunny is determined to stay single for the rest of her college life, appreciating handsome men from afar. But when five gorgeous men appear in her life, things get complicated. A simple glance at any one of them has her heart racing. How will Bunny survive their charms?    (Source: Tapas)

title: Hadomae
description: While posing as a nude model for a croquis class, Jaehee spots a man staring a little too intently at her body. More specifically, at her feet. She later finds out the man is a shoemaker and foot fetishist. Though Jaehee is initially taken aback by his fetish, the more she gets to know the man, the more she wishes he would caress the rest of her body...and not just her feet.  (Source: Lezhin US)

title: Depraved INNOCENCE
description: Jun is a hedonist man but he feels empty in his boring daily life.  One day, he meets an innocent girl Ma-Di and he sets a CORRUPTION PLAN to awake her dirty desire deep inside of her! .  (Source: TOPTOON+)

title: Land of the Crimson Moon
description: A doctor, Gyeong-Hun Min, has an exceptional grudge against Yeong-U Sin, the chairman of a gang called the Crimson Moon. Desperate to take revenge on Yeong-U for killing his wife and daughter, the doctor finally finds Si-Hwan Ryu, a police officer who has supernatural powers that can surpass the currently invincible Yeong-U. Leveraging this, Gyeong-Hun’s plan is to purposely create a reason for Si-Hwan to despise the Crimson Moon and destroy Yeong-U for good. Will his plans succeed? Will Si-Hwan and Gyeong-Hun finally wipe out the Crimson Moon?    (Source: WEBTOONS)

title: Merry on the Rocks
description: The gentle dance of snowflakes as they fall to the ground. Sparkling lights twinkling in the frigid night air. Couples holding hands and sharing in joyous laughter. While most people anticipate the Christmas season, for Noel Alan Brown it is nothing but an inevitable annual annoyance. Making his way through the gaudy streets of New York in pursuit of some semblance of enjoyment, he arrives at a club and meets Lee June: mysterious, seductive, and utterly irresistible. But after a night of intensely playful passion, June is nowhere to be seen…leaving nothing but another reason to add to Noel's Christmas hate list. Returning his focus to a crucial upcoming presentation, Noel tries his best to erase the alluring June from his mind to no avail. Luckily for him, he’ll have a chance to see his disappearing lover again - because June is working for the competition! Tensions won’t be the only thing rising as the two go at it in both the board room and the bedroom.    (Source: Lezhin US)    Note: Includes three extra chapters.

title: My Joy
description: The school's fastest track star, Namsu. An old friend from the past, Hye-Yeon. Everyone's adorable sweetheart, Joy. High-school romance at it's best! The comic that made Pito one of the best in the GL genre.  (Source: Lezhin)

title: One Night Only
description:
Like the children of other prominent families, Sia Cha (Alpha), the second daughter of the SW group, became engaged in an arranged marriage at an early age. In order to increase their genetic compatibility and get used to her pheromones, she was placed with her fiancée and his family since childhood. But her fiancee found his true love and asked her for a breakup. After that rejection, she suffered from omega pheromone intolerance for the next several years. That day too, she tried to get away from a party and take her rest, when a stranger approached her...

"I want a child with you, no strings attached. Just give me one night!"

For the first time since her breakup, an Omega appeared whose scent did not trigger her disgust.

(Source: Bomtoon, translated)

title: Outro
description: Her girlfriend, who she's been dating for seven years, is wallowing in bed with another girl, and her dream of debut has been shattered, so she doesn't have many expectations anymore. Suddenly, ray of hope appears in front of Ji-an; she receives an offer to appear in a program that highly appreciates Jian's self-composed song. Jian is excited about the opportunity to escape from her lover Yoo Won...

title: Yeopjimmonyeo
description: Seon-U became a local school lecturer because of a famous painter. One day, the girl who he had dreamed the one on his paintings appeared in front of him as a student. With her beautiful mom…  (Source: TOPTOON, translated)

title: Daedaejang Ttal
description: Yoon Kwon struggles to survive his oppressive military service, where there is nothing but harsh physical training. One day, amidst a series of underwear disappearance incidents, the culprit turns out to be an exhibitionist who had secretly broken into the base… and she is a woman?!   “You stole them, right? Spread your legs before I report you to the commander!!”  (Source: TOPTOON, translated)

title: Ghostly Vendetta
description: Kim Han-Gyul was a child prodigy, born to act. Using his ability to see ghosts, he was able to deliver a captivating performance that helped him stand out in the competitive industry. All the other child actors admired him, and it seemed like he had a bright future ahead of him, until the mysterious red thread appeared. From that very moment, his life became mired in disaster. Ten years later, living an ordinary life and putting his childhood fame behind him, he finds out that the red thread on his finger leads somewhere – a black thread attached to childhood actor-turned-superstar, Jung Eun-Han. Their similar pasts have to mean something, but what secrets lie behind these ties that bind them?    (Source: Lezhin US)

title: Make Sure You Regret It
description: For Olivia Madeleine, illegitimate daughter of a duke, her only hope of a better life away from her cold-hearted family is her betrothal to arrogant crown prince Leoford Franz. When the revelation of his tryst with another debutante comes as an unsurprising wake-up call, she has no choice but to barter for her freedom with Edwin Lowell Vikander, the ruthless, war-hardened Grand Duke of the north. As her dangerous dance with Edwin begins, Olivia seeks to leave her former fiancé with the coldest gift that vengeance can impart… A heart made bitter with regret.  (Source: WEBTOON)

title: A Red Laurel to My Emperor
description: Laurel Neales, the first princess of Tortia, has been married off to the emperor of Kairos following a political feud that ended with the assassination of her parents. Undiscouraged by the circumstances, Laurel refuses to give in to becoming yet another of the emperor’s concubines. Instead, she plays along with his romantic whims and gains her own form of power in this new life by proposing an offer he cannot refuse: to facilitate his conquest of the land that betrayed her.     (Source: Tapas)

title: Melting Slowly
description: Yeomin Chae has been living in the shadow of her stepsister, Nari Chae, ever since they were kids. One day, Seungjae, Yeomin's ex-boyfriend, tells her that he’s marrying Nari out of the blue. After being betrayed by the person she trusted most, she runs into Hwan Yun, who is the grandson of Taeju Group’s chairman. Frustrated with her life, she suggests to Hwan that he marry her. As the two decide to get married, what exciting events and struggles will they encounter?  (Source: WEBTOONS)

title: The End Has Come
description: Minjun wished for the world to end-- until it did. When a zombie appears at his door, the bullied teen chooses to fight for survival. Teaming up with Yena, his sassy yet charming classmate, he flees the collapsing city. Hunted by the infected and haunted by enemies old and new, they discover that in a world without rules, trust may be their only chance at survival.  (Source: WEBTOON)

title: Arma
description: What if you developed superpowers that could change your life only to discover that these incredible abilities only worked on… animals? When you’re teenager Jin Lee, that’s a pretty strange concept to wrap your head around – especially when you wish your destructive powers could help you overcome the bullies who torment you at school instead. But Jin is quickly learning that there’s a place in this world for a special individual like him – and he’s definitely not the only one of his kind out there.    (Source: WEBTOONS)

title: Baby, Punk Kid
description: Omega Harim attacks a random stranger for money in the midst of his heat cycle. But the man he tries to attack is an Alpha and leader of a large organization. Believing that Harim was sent to kill him, the Alpha throws some heat cycle sedatives at him and warns him to not cause any more trouble. But then Harim foolishly steals the man's wallet and gets caught, after which he is forced to become the Alpha's maid…    (Source: Webnovel)

title: Hwansaenghaetdeoni Daegongui Setjjae Adeul
description: Because of my bloodline, I wasn't able to rise in status and ended up dying as a mere mercenary. However, when I opened my eyes again, they told me I was an archduke's son. Now that I finally have family, status, and even talent—things I've only dreamed about before—there’s only one thing left to do... climb to the top. The outrageous noble life of a former mercenary captain turned archduke's third son begins now.  (Source: Naver, translated)

title: Dominating a Girl That You Hate
description: I was a promising pitcher but because of Ha-Eun, I injured my shoulder and couldn't play anymore. Now I am living because I'm so afraid to die. One day, seeing Ha-Eun makes the fire of revenge light in my heart.   “I'll dominate you Ha-Eun!”  (Source: DAYcomics)

title: The Girl Next Door
description: A sweet couple takes care of the girl next door. She's wild, hates her mom and likes spending time with them. But one day, the wife suddenly dies, leaving the lonely 40-year-old husband alone with the lonely girl. Will something happen between them?  (Source: DAYcomics)

title: Tiger Lily
description: Yoon Baek is a typical young man who works part-time jobs to make a living. One day, he comes across a stray cat that leads him to a veterinarian named Jay Blythe. After realizing that he met him before in his dreams, he comes to learn that he's been selected by Jay to be his next prey. Yoon later finds out that his older brother who went missing a few months back was also eaten by Jay, the tiger, before he lead him to Yoon for the tiger's next meal. In order to escape the curse of the tiger, he must find another sacrifice. But the blurred lines in their relationship makes their fate growingly uncertain.    (Source: POCKET COMICS)    Chapter count includes a prologue.

title: Degree of Love
description: Ye-Jin, a smart girl from a poor family who gets into a top university, has zero dating experience. Now that she's in college, she wants to find love, so she puts herself out there, but... Enter Hyeon, an elite Taekwondo athlete, her only guy friend from childhood, who masquerades as her "bestie," but is he really? Ye-Jin is determined to support her family through academic achievement, but she also wants love. Can she have both? How will Ye-Jin navigate the journey of having it all?    (Source: WEBTOON, edited)   Note: Includes seven extra chapters.

title: Tiger's Den
description: Seon-U Lee, an omega, has agreed to carry a child for Beom Yoo, an alpha from a powerful crime family. Have the baby, take the money, and get out of Beom’s life. Sound simple, right? But behind Beom’s tough exterior is just another softie looking for love. Good food, walks on the beach, and steamy encounters—how could Seon-U not fall for him? However, not everyone in Beom’s family is excited about this budding relationship. Will Beom be able to keep Seon-U safe?    (Source: Tapas)   Note: Includes 32 extra chapters.

title: Guardians of the Lamb
description: Hari’s normal. Sure, she can’t remember anything from when she was a child, but apart from that, she’s just a relatively unknown actress who dreams of making it big. All is well. That is, until she gets kidnapped. Luckily, Hari manages to emerge from that incident relatively unscathed, but… Why is the man who saved her following her around? What does a missing person’s case from twenty years ago have to do with anything? What secrets will be unearthed from Hari’s missing memories?    (Source: Lezhin)    Chapter count includes the prologue chapter.

title: Troublesome Employee Warning
description: David is transferred to a small rural branch of the company he works for, where he meets the coworkers of his nightmare.  (Source: Toomics)

title: Jeoseungpagyeongoyongjik
description: “I am from the afterlife.”   Lee Do-Jin, who needs a huge amount of money to pay for his younger brother’s medical expenses. He contacts her after being led by a suspicious business card he found by chance, and meets a strange silver-haired woman named Cha-Sa at the meeting place. She offers Do-Jin a job as an afterlife dispatch worker to stop the predator Mokdugi, who preys on the souls of humans who have accumulated evil deeds…  (Source: Naver, translated)

title: I Will Not Return to My Family
description: In a world where she’s shadowed by her siblings’ brilliance, Letitia Leroy stands out for her lack of extraordinary powers that the members of the Leroy family are known to have. Unbeknownst to her, her very existence embarrasses her family, which leads her to heart-wrenching abandonment. But in the darkness of rejection, Duke Enoch Achilles and his siblings become her unwavering pillars of support, providing Letitia with the love and belonging her family denied her. Will these newfound bonds prove stronger than the ties of her own blood?   (Source: Tappytoon)   Note: Includes one extra chapter.

title: Up & Down
description: A man meets a hot, sexy boss at his new workplace. Things start to get weird between the two after he was caught staring at her huge breasts. But after all, every man needs a sex partner in the office~    (Source: TOPTOON+)

title: Please Repent, Your Grace!
description: Just like most people, Sion Ribellon doesn't want to go to work. But it's not that he's lazy, he just doesn't want his boss to murder him! Before Sion woke up as a character in this world, he read a novel that detailed his death, and his killer is none other than Serifenz A. Pracidus, the Duke of the Holy Lumen Empire and Sion's new boss. Now, Sion has to befriend Serifenz and find out why he eventually turns evil, not only to save his own skin but also to prevent the apocalyptic ending!    (Source: Tapas)

title: Two Weeks and Counting
description: One sweltering day, university student Kim Ki-Beom comes home to find Su-Hyeon, a runaway high school girl in front of his house. Trying to be a responsible adult, Ki-Beom attempts to send Su-Hyeon on her way. After discovering she may be hiding a painful past not unlike his own, the softhearted Ki-Beom agrees to let her stay. But there’s a catch: she must leave in exactly two weeks. The clock ticking, Ki-Beom gets to know Su-Hyeon - only to realize that there might be more to his unwelcome houseguest than what meets the eye…    (Source: Lezhin US, edited)    Note: Chapter count includes a 10-chapter side story

title: Lee Yool Gatji Aneun Lee Yoo
description:
Lee Yoori, an employee of the EG Department Store HR team, and Lee Yool, the youngest daughter of the EG Group President, fell from the 10th floor building. Lee Yoori, surprised, woke up in Lee Yool body. But Lee Yoori believes that one day their bodies will return to normal. Lee Yoori will live her life as a daughter of a conglomerate. But the thing is, Lee Yool has a fiance and they're going to be married soon! Will Lee Yoori successfully overcome all obstacles as a daughter of a millionaire?!

Note: Chapter count includes a prologue.

title: Man of Vengeance
description: His friends betrayed and abandoned him in a foreign country, and now he aims to take everything away from them. The unstoppable revenge of a tough guy begins!   "As expected, a successful man's woman is delicious. I'll enjoy her from now on."  (Source: DAYcomics)

title: Kids Are All Right
description: This story tells you the value and importance of family; it will also remind you of the happiness and sadness, joys and sorrows of childhood.   (Source: WEBTOONS)

title: Prison Revenge
description: I've been beaten and humilated all my life and I even lost my parents.   "Now it's your turn. Don't expect to get out of this easily."  (Source: DAYcomics)

title: Duke Richard's Haven
description: After falling into a river to elude her attackers, the mercenary Ilian Heinrich wakes up a decade prior as Haven Winter, a 12-year-old noble burdened with debt and a family to look after. Determined to protect them, Haven uses her past memories to be hired by the young Duke Julius Al Richard, the one person she cared for as Ilian. Unfortunately, prickly Julius isn't going to make her job easy. With such a difficult boss, will Haven live up to her name and secure a safe future for her loved ones?    (Source: Tapas)   Note: Chapter count includes 6 side stories.

title: Yong-Bi Bulpae Oejeon
description: A mysterious stranger rides into town. The peaceful village of Gang-Ho is disturbed when Yong-Bi, a seemingly foolish bounty hunter, comes to town looking to claim the bounty for the leader of Gang-Ho's deadliest clan of assassins. Will Yong-Bi collect the bounty unscathed, or will he fall victim to a vengeful pack of assassins hell-bent on retribution for their captured leader?

title: Last Paradise
description: This is a story about Myunghan, who has just entered high school, Sihoo, his childhood friend, Seungchan, who suddenly appears between the two, and the strange triangle that develops between the three of them.

title: Aza
description: Throughout history, humans have been at war with the Fallen, demonic creatures who were banished to live in the Barrens for their sins. One day, the king of the Fallen, Azazel, is captured by the imperial hunters led by General Mu Ryang. But contrary to the general’s initial beliefs, Azazel isn’t the cold-hearted monster the legends have made him out to be. In fact, he shows compassion for his fellow Fallen who have been ruthlessly hunted down by the humans, and even offers himself up in exchange for his people’s safety. After this eye-opening encounter, Mu Ryang begins to question who the sinners really are, and Azazel plans to use the general’s changing perspective to turn him against the crown prince, Jeong Jin, and put an end to centuries' worth of conflict.    (Source: WEBTOONS)

title: Majimak Zombie
description: Da-Jeong has lived with Dr. Lee Seh-Yeon for as long as he can remember, but his memories are muddled and don't go back very far. All he knows for certain is that the doctor must give him an injection every day, his diet can only consist of raw meat, and he is forbidden from venturing outdoors. He is, in fact, the last surviving zombie from an outbreak that humanity managed to contain a decade ago, and was the product of an experiment that Dr. Lee managed to rescue him from before he could be disposed of. The doctor knows that he can't keep Da-Jeong hidden forever, just as he knows that Da-Jeong's questions about why he is "sick" will one day need to be answered. He slowly begins introducing Da-Jeong to the outside world, but things become more complicated when his undead patient begins to fall in love with him.     Notes:   Chapter count includes a prologue.   Winner of the third MrBlue Comic Contest.

title: Ice Love
description: When you’re a short track speed skater, every second counts. But despite training 24-7, Hoonjae is no match for his arch rival Seojoon. What’s more, with practice taking up all his time, Hoonjae hasn’t been able to explore life’s pleasures - like girls, for instance. One night, he decides to take the plunge and lose his virginity. Once he does, he starts flying across the ice! Plus, all the gorgeous girls around the rink suddenly see Hoonjae in a different light. Soon enough, things begin to get hot and steamy off the ice…  (Source: Lezhin X)

title: Falling for a Dying Princess
description: A dying princess and the knight who loves her.    Princess Kirona has Tetra Fever, a disease that eventually results in death. To save herself, she travels to the East in search of a cure and meets Jade Eclipse, a mercenary with a handsome face and mysterious past. Will Kirona find a way to survive? Or is Jade fated to love a doomed princess?    (Source: Manta)

title: The Archduke's Magical Business Partner
description: Waking up in a novel is bad enough, but being the villainess Daphne Peregrine is even worse! Knowing the doomed character's fate, Daphne starts mending her strained relationship with her family, hoping they'll let her move to a peaceful land. Since she'll need money, Daphne asks the enigmatic Archduke Luciel Gresbel to go into the antidote-making business with her so she can use his noble connections. Will the original Daphne's past misdeeds ruin her plans, or can she dodge her untimely death?  (Source: Tapas)

title: The Villains' Little Heiress
description: Katisha Ainsley's adoptive grandfather dies and leaves her with a grieving heart... as well as an incredible fortune! Katisha's grandpa was actually the former Duke Blasco, the head of a villainous family. Fearing what the Blascos would do to get the inheritance, Katisha joins them to reverse the will. But as they work together, she begins to like the evil family, and they start finding her too cute to hate. Can Katisha safely return the Blascos' riches, or will she stay the villains' heiress?    (Source: Tapas)

title: Märchen - The Embodiment of Tales
description: Märchen, saved from the brink of death avoids all training from his teacher. However, she comes up with another plan to make him stronger through making him read old tales.

title: Wizardly Tower
description: A powerful grand wizard named, “Raim” reappears after a millennium because of a failed experiment. While sets out to regain his lost tower, he meets “are” and “ere” who have been trafficked as slaves... a combination of a weird grand magician who only uses his wits to make money and the cute, lovable brother and sister of the Miao​ tribe! Their endless adventure is beginning to unfold.

title: No, I Only Charmed the Princess!
description: As if dying from overwork doesn’t suck enough, imagine being reincarnated as a minor novel character who will also meet a pitiful end soon. With nothing to lose, Adelia makes the perilous journey to become the empire’s first white mage in 300 years. Why? To have the crown prince marry her so she can have the power to get revenge on her abusive family, of course! And once she becomes a member of the imperial family, Adelia can live happily receiving the love of her favorite character, Princess Ariana. But wait, she never asked for Crown Prince Lucian’s affection too...!    (Source: Tappytoon)

title: Leaves Dancing on a Melody
description:
Seol Ipsae likes to keep things simple and clean: relationships never go further than physical, and one night per guy is the standard, and only the best will do. So when he runs into the big, bumbling himbo Jeong Han-Eum, he can’t believe his eyes; at first, it’s because the dude’s such a nerd, but then it’s because this nerd is hiding a big, uh, “secret.” Huge, in fact. Massive. One of the biggest Ipsae has ever seen. Y’know, maybe nerdy boys aren’t so bad after all… (Source: Lezhin US)
Note: Chapter count includes six side story chapters.

title: Love at First Fright
description: Yeo Eun-Seong has always been popular—too popular. With his striking looks, he attracts attention from everyone, regardless of age or gender. But constant gossip and misunderstandings have left him deeply distrustful of people. The last thing he needs is to be popular amongst ghosts too!    After moving into a new home for his job, Eun-Seong finds himself tormented by eerie paranormal activity night after night. One evening, while cowering outside his own apartment, he meets Seo Tae-Jeong, a passing office worker who—much to Eun-Seong’s surprise—can see and talk to ghosts. Desperate for peace, Eun-Seong enlists Tae-Jeong’s help to rid his house of its unwelcome guests. As the two work together, an unexpected and curious friendship begins to take shape… but is there more to Tae-Jeong than meets the eye?  (Source: Lezhin US)   Note: Includes two side story chapters.

title: My secret Cupid
description: Jun-Yeong helps Ji-Yun who gets lost in campus. When Ji-Yun starts to think about meeting Jun-Yeong again, they meet again in school retreat. Through the secret cupid game and the help from her classmates, Isabella slowly changes. First encounter and kindness in college, and my secret cupid.  (Source: DAYcomics, edited)

title: Dujipsallim
description: Seong-Hyeon lives alone with his young and sexy stepmother. One day, a man with an unpleasant impression moves next door and begins to break their peaceful daily life. With the man next door going after his mother and him starting to see the woman in her more and more... will their peaceful life ever come back?     (Source: TOPTOON, translated)   Note: Chapter count includes an epilogue.

title: Detain
description: One day, I was kidnapped. " What is it that you want?!" The kidnapper who hadn't responded strokes my face and finally speaks, "Something...you will probably hate."

title: How Sweet
description: College student Eunho Lee is a recessive Omega with a sweet tooth. The handsome owner of a café and his cookies both captivate his heart and he applies as a part-timer. However, only Betas are hired and so Eunho hides his true gender and finds himself in a nerve-wrecking daily routine, steadily falling deeper for his cold but good-natured boss.

title: Yojeum Seoul Aedeureun
genres: Comedy, Drama, Hentai, Romance, Slice of Life
description: Do-Gwon, the protagonist, returned to school in Seoul as a native. Girls from the rural provinces start to gather around him to learn the 'Seoul dialect'.   "They said students from Seoul are known for having sex."   These girls seem to have some misunderstanding about Seoul!  (Source: TOPTOON, translated)

title: Now I'm the Boss
description: Working at a small company is tough... Even worse when you work with two incompetent women. Well, guess what. I'm the boss now.  (Source: Toomics)

title: Alpha
description: The emotionless agent Alpha was given a secret mission.

title: Raising a Dragon Prince
description: Adele, a girl born in an orphanage and raised by her uncle, finds an egg in the forest. Little did she know, she has adopted herself a .charming dragon prince! After nine years of living under her wicked aunt and cousins who forced her into doing all the house chores, Adele's lifes turns upside down through the little boy that hatches out of a giant egg. Adele names the boy Zigmunt and takes care of him with love and care. Meanwhile, the Grand Duke Hernes and the Grand Wizard Jensen are in a desperate search for the lost dragon egg, from which the new emperor of the Bysen Empire. Adele's life turns upside down as she enters the Royal Palace with Zigmunt. That is only the beginning of this very special love story, one between the blood-thirsty dragon prince Zigmunt and his Adele.    (Source: POCKET COMICS)

title: Anything But Marriage, Mr. Villain!
description: How is the reincarnated heroine supposed to survive as Enrica, a powerless noble lady who gets killed by her archduke husband on her wedding night? Fortunately, a mysterious but kind Count Belbrington hears Enrica's plight, suggests that she find another man to marry, and even says yes to her following proposal! Everything seems strangely smooth sailing from there. Not only is Enrica's power-hungry father surprisingly cool with her marrying a man of lower status, but the murderous archduke isn't retaliating at her for breaking off their engagement, either. Something's not adding up, but what could it be...?  (Source: Tappytoon)

title: Guwonjaui Bucket List
description: Despite the repeated regressions, Yonghak, who couldn’t ultimately save the world, decides to give up on being a savior in the next regression.     However, as disciples start to appear one by one… the world begins to be saved over and over again?!     Can the Savior truly fulfill their own bucket list as they long for some rest?    (Source: Naver, translated)

title: Swallow You Whole
description: Jaheon comes from a lineage of omegas. Omegas who have raised the children of their branch families, only for them to be offered to the Snake God, Lord Mugo, every 12 years. Though it is said that Mugo handpicks his sacrifices no one in the head family believes such an old tale anymore. However, Jaheon knows that Lord Mugo came to him when he was a child and picked him to be the sacrifice, and even remembers the events of the day.     Even though Jaheon has prepared himself, both body and mind, for as long as he could remember, upon entering Mugo's lair he quickly realizes that he doesn't want to be eaten as a sacrifice, at least not after finding out the "Lord Mugo" he adored was just one of the snake god's three personalities. Will the Snake God take pity on his sacrifice? Or will Jaheon be swallowed whole?    (Surce: Lezhin US)

title: Base to Base
description: Sung Moon High is fields one the country's top 5 high school baseball teams. On the field, players hit hard, run fast, and pull their weight to strive towards victory. Off the field, competition is fierce with students vying for position - and affection. Some might play for love of the game, others are just in it for love.  (Source: Lezhin)

title: The Empress of Ashes
description: When Eilec wakes up in the past after slaughtering everyone who played a part in his beloved wife's death, he knows the best way to avoid making the same mistakes would be to let Rose go. Despite this, Eilec is determined to change the future with her by his side, as he can't imagine a life without her. But when Rose regains her memories and sees that Eilec has dragged her into the hellish world of nobles and their political scheming for the second time, he realizes he has made a grave mistake. The hatred and resentment that burns in her eyes are almost as hot as the fire that killed her in the past. Will Rose find it in herself to forgive her husband, or will she burn everything to ashes, including him?    (Source: Tappytoon)

title: Yongsaneun Ihon Hu Academy Jogyosuga Doeeossda
description: The warrior Kang Na-Ru, who became a NEET after his divorce, decides to become an academy professor to change. However, the students keep on pushing themselves onto him, even with the memories of divorce still fresh in his head…!   “I keep having lewd thoughts whenever I see you, Professor!”  (Source: TOPTOON, translated)

title: Red Mansion
description: A dilapidated mansion sits on the outskirts of Seoul. Among its residents are frauds, murderers, and psychopaths, all seeking refuge in the only place that will accept them. But not every resident of the run-down manor has come here by choice. Kim Sungkyung operates a minimart so that he can afford to take care of his parents, who have come down with a malignant disease. Having been born inside the four walls of the mansion, a life of depravity and deprivation is all he knows. The sole thing that gets him through is his obsession with the building's manager, Kwon Cheong-rim: a cruel and calculating figure seemingly only interested in the preservation of his own wealth and power. So when the enigmatic pretty boy begins to hint at a sort of faint interest in Sungkyung, the latter's obsession begins to grow as a single question echoes ceaselessly throughout his mind: "Why...?"    (Source: Lezhin US)

title: When the Witch’s Daughter Lifts the Male Lead’s Curse
description: When Daisy wakes up in the novel “In Love With A Monster Prince” as the daughter of the witch who torments the male lead, Dionel, she must do whatever she can to prevent Dionel from killing her alongside her foster mother when he comes to seek vengeance in the future. 13 years pass, and Daisy is confident that she has achieved this goal until she realizes the original story has changed. Where is the female lead who’s supposed to lift Dionel’s curse with a kiss? And why is Dionel under the impression that Daisy abandoned him?    (Source: Tappytoon)

title: Inside My Sister-in-Law
description: Yoon-A comes back to Korea from studying abroad and moves in with her sister Yoon-Jung and brother-in-law, Do-Il. She seems innocent but provocative and Do-Il slowly starts to cross boundaries.   "Do-Il... I want to get to know you better if you know what I mean."  (Source: DAYcomics)

title: Becoming A Family With The Duke and His Dear Son
description: After being transmigrated as Ibellia the Villainess, Soyoon strives to twist the plot in order to survive in her favorite web novel. Her plan is to break off the engagement with Duke Cassis Adelhardt and live a quiet life on her own. However, the Duke and his young son Lucius would not let her go so easily.     <I>“Lady Ibellia... Will you be Lus’ mommy?”    (Source: POCKET COMICS)

title: Demon Queen Just Wants to Make Peace
description: Jinjoo has suddenly been transported into her favorite fantasy romance novel. This might sound like a dream come true, but Jinjoo is stuck in the body of the story’s villain, Demon Queen Astreia! If she doesn’t change the storyline, she will inevitably be slain by the fierce warrior, Caine. To prevent her demise, Astreia sets out on a journey to end the war between the human and demon realms. But can she win the trust of not only the parties in question but also of her suspicious companion, Caine? Or is her destiny bound to the novel’s pages?     (Source: Tapas)

title: Love Gym
description: Geon is a personal trainer in desperate need of new clients or else he'll be fired. So when he encounters the overweight Gyu-Won decked out in designer brands, he sees it as a golden opportunity. Unfortunately, this comes at the cost of heeding Gyu-Won's request to go on a date with him once he achieves his dream body. When Gyu-Won transforms into Geon's ideal type a year later, Geon finds himself slowly drawn to him. Will Geon be able to resist the seemingly perfect younger, rich, and hot guy? Or will he succumb to temptation and fall for him?    (Source: Tappytoon)    Note: Includes three side story chapters.

title: My Alternate Ending
description:
Could things get any worse for Yul? Actually, yes. She's stuck in a dark and tragic novel as an imprisoned guinea pig for wizards, with death being the easiest way out. The one other way to escape her hellish prison is to use Kal, the story's male lead and the most powerful test subject in history. Unfortunately, the hot-tempered Kal has no patience for her grand plan. With such an uncooperative ally as her best chance at freedom, will Yul be able to change her fate and have a happy ending?

(Source: Tapas)

title: Munpa System-eul Sijakamnida
description: The protagonist, who had worked himself to the bone at the Murim Alliance, finally retires and heads back to his hometown to fulfill his dream of becoming a sect leader. Due to his meager savings, he ends up purchasing a manor that was suspiciously cheap, and rumored to be haunted. But then, an unfamiliar system suddenly appears before him. Though startled at first, the protagonist soon begins to use the system to efficiently recruit disciples and manage the sect’s finances and resources. In time, with the help of the system, his sect grows rapidly, so much that it starts drawing the attention, wariness, and hostility of other Murim factions…  (Source: Naver, translated)

title: Ordinary Men
description: Life as a nurse is crazy enough, but throw a cute doctor into the mix, and things start to get a little tricky. Especially if that cute doctor tries to work his charm on you every chance he gets. Those puppy eyes...tousled brown hair...and blue scrubs! How could anyone resist?    Source: Lezhin

title: My Daughter
description: Salaryman Jin-Taek ends up living with his 20-year- old niece after a request from his sister-in-law. She looks so much like her mother that Jin-Taek, who's lived a life of discipline and restraint, finds himself slowly sinking into a swamp of desire. To make things worse, she keeps calling him "Dad"... and sneaks into his room every night.   "Dad, I want to do it with you."  (Source: DAYcomics, edited)

title: I’m Living With My Mother-in-Law
description: It's well-known that living with one's mother-in-law is basically hell. So marrying a poor merchant with no family should be an easy way to avoid that mess, right? Well, that was Elaen's plan until she realizes that her husband, Ahen, lied to her, and is actually the son of the empire's ferocious Grand Wizard, Kanessis Corenea, who she'll have to live with at her palace! Though intimidated at first, Elaen realizes that Kanessis is nothing like the figures in mother-in-law horror stories, and becomes enamored with her charisma and unexpected kindness. If anything, the problem here is Ahen's ulterior motives for marrying Elaen, which she only discovered after the fact. But with Kanessis by her side, Elaen is ready to face any and all challenges in her marriage. Perhaps living with her mother-in-law was the best thing to ever happen to her after all!    (Source: Tappytoon)

title: Fake Partners
description: Young-Sik was dumped by his girlfriend of 8 years for another man. He seeks a marriage counseling company but their expectations are too high. Then he meets Ju-Seon, a marriage counseling manager who makes him a tempting offer.   "Five dates and a full refund if you don't like them, okay?"  (Source: DAYcomics)

title: Gamyeomja
description: The man-eating monster 'Infectee'. I became a monster.   (Source: Naver, translated)   Note: Includes one extra chapter.

title: Beach Beauties
description: "Now is the best time for a trip!"   Tired of studying he decides to go to the beach. However, the moans from the tents around him makes him feel even worse... that is, until he finds the most beautiful girl sleeping in his own tent...  (Source: TOPTOON+)

title: Midwood
description: The monster-slayer troops known as 'Sretu' no longer function as they used to, and humans have become the monsters' prey.    Jin Cheong-Do, who has been living in a world full of monsters his entire life, uses a legendary item known as "Midwood" to turn back time in order to kill the one known as Ian, the cause of this whole mess...    (Source: Naver, translated)

title: All Skill Master
description: [Unique Trait ‘Skill Master (EX)’ has been activated.]   ▶ ‘Skill Copy (EX)’ is now enabled.   “Whoa… your skill’s insane!”   [Skill has been copied.]   From now on, there’s no skill he can’t have. Yours is mine. Mine? Still mine. The rise of the ultimate cheat-class protagonist begins now. All Skill Master Yoo Ju-yeon’s explosive saga is just getting started!  (Source: KakaoPage, translated)

title: My Hot Friend Is Glowing
description: When someone is aesthetically pleasing, people usually say things like... "She looks absolutely divine," "He looks like a million bucks," and "They're glowing." Of course, it doesn't mean that they're literally glowing... But I know someone who is like that! That's right. My friend is so stunning that his face literally shines.    (Source: POCKET COMICS)

title: Duchess Crow
description: Could love bedazzle like a gem?   For Melisa, the best gemologist in Annabel, no love can outshine a gem. She'd rather remain single and devoted to her career! But just when she thinks she has it all figured out, Duke Lewis Winterfelt, the most eligible bachelor in all the kingdom, asks for her hand in marriage — through a contract!    (Source: Manta)

title: Lady Garden
description: A UFC hopeful, Kang Doo, gets banned from competition and finds a job as a security guard in the luxurious mansion by the name of Lady Garden; a mansion only allowed to the hottest women. As beautiful as these ladies are, various dangers lurk, and it's Kang Doo's job to protect these lovely women. Oh yeah, and saving women in need always comes with a hefty reward!   (Source: Lezhin US)   Note: Chapter count includes a prologue.

title: Rubbing It In
description: In a pristine and upscale new city, which is home to many corporate elites, a mysterious massage shop opens. What sets it apart? Its owner, the sole masseur, who possesses a strikingly handsome figure and a perfectly sculpted physique. Yu-Na, one among countless lonely married individuals, wrestles with unfulfilled desires brought on by her workaholic husband’s performance issues. When tales of this alluring new salon reach her ears, Yu-Na decides to pay a visit in search of the solace she craves...  (Source: Lezhin US)

title: The Absolute Threshold
description: Growing up with a mobster father, Joo-Mi never had the luxury of being “normal.” Despite the wealth and constant company surrounding her, she always felt alone, wanting to break free and live an ordinary life. But her hopes are forever shattered when she encounters Jeong Yoon-Gyo, a cold-hearted successor to Korea’s biggest mob clan. Their chance meeting ignites a forbidden romance, leading to a fateful night of passion with grave consequences. Despite all the risks and odds, fate and desire draw them together, forcing them to navigate the perilous waters of their conflicting worlds.    (Source: Tappytoon, edited)   Note: Includes 25 extra chapters.

title: Happy Campus
description: "Hey, Jeong-Il... Do as you wish."   I got entangled with several women as soon as I entered college. Starting from the boarding house's Ajumma to my friend's girlfriend... Is it really fine to enjoy such a happy campus life?  (Source: TOPTOON, translated)

title: Alice's Adult Storytime
description: Goooood morning, and welcome to another episode of Alice’s Adult Storytime - the only radio show guaranteed to make your cheeks warm and your panties— [BEEEEP]. Ahem, as I was saying… Alice’s Adult Storytime is the only show on air with breathtakingly racy tales sent in by listeners, for listeners. Every story is sure to seduce, so why not tune in and a little spice to your life…?  (Source: Lezhin US)

title: Freshman
description: College is supposed to be for fun, learning, and experiencing new things. One of these things could be witnessing your TA and professor getting it on. And what about this new freshman? She might be interested in me...  (Source: TOPTOON+)

title: Sora & Haena: Side Story - Ah Young & Jae-In?
description: Side story about how is going Ah Young and Jae-In relationship.

title: Not Your Monster-In-Law
description: Kim Hana is reincarnated as Wilhelmina, a fallen noblewoman whose fate takes a turn when she's married off to the wealthy House Layton. But there’s a catch—her husband is already dead, leaving her to become the Dowager Duchess. Younger than her new stepson and his wife, she must navigate the treacherous waters of high society and a daughter-in-law determined to make her life miserable. Will she find a way to remedy this family drama or be unfairly painted as the monster-in-law she’s not?    (Source: Tapas)

title: Coming Too Soon
description: He has a condition he hides from everyone... He can't even last a minute in bed! After not being able to satisfy his girlfriend, he finds a famous doctor who is an expert in sex. But he didn't expect the beautiful, sexy doctor to just take his thing in her mouth for treatment!  (Source: TOPTOON+)

title: Colorist
description: A world stained black. Driven by the Black Witch, humanity is forced into a vast city where light and color converge. To reclaim the world, humanity continues its pioneering efforts, and a boy named Kay aspires to join the expeditionary force. But he’s rejected because he is colorless, lacking any hue. Then one day, through an unexpected incident, Kay gains the color black....  (Source: Naver, translated)

title: I Will Protect My Tyrant Dad!
description: Sien is your average adorable kid living in the country with her kind dad... or so she thought. It turns out her dad is actually an heir of a grand duke banished from an evil family! Sien will do anything to protect her innocent dad from the wickedness that awaits them. Join Sien on her adventure to keep her tyrant dad safe!  (Source: WEBTOONS)

title: Gwangyeyeokjeonbeoteun: Dodohan Geunyeoreul Gyoyukhaejuja
description: Hyunjoon, a retake student, explodes in inferiority complex after being tutored by his rival Nari. After pressing an unknown button that appeared in front of him, Nari begs Hyunjoon to give him sex education. The second short stories of the Relationship Reverse Button series!  (Source: TOPTOON, translated)

title: Coming Too Soon
description: He has a condition he hides from everyone... He can't even last a minute in bed! After not being able to satisfy his girlfriend, he finds a famous doctor who is an expert in sex. But he didn't expect the beautiful, sexy doctor to just take his thing in her mouth for treatment!  (Source: TOPTOON+)

title: Seonuiui Gyeongjaeng
description: Seulgi was no.1 in her old suburban school. Now, having transferred to the prestigious Chaehwa Girls’ High in Seoul, she must engage in fierce, friendly competition with her rich and talented rival Jay.    (Source: YLAB)    Note: Belongs to Blue String universe.

title: Boss's Daughter
description: "I only have the body as a collateral, but I better make sure it checks out."   Do-Hyeon Nam, loyal to his organization, used to indulge himself by fucking indebted women whenever he wanted. He then decided he wanted to live a normal life. By a stroke of luck, he met a nice woman and began dreaming of a modest future together... When one day, he was framed, stripped of everything, and executed by his boss.   "Even if I die... I'll take you with me!"  (Source: DAYcomics, edited)

title: The Vampire's Plans to Die in Peace
description: After a failed attempt at ending her own life, our female lead is reborn in the body of a blood-sucking Vampire who is unable to die. To her dismay, she discovers that she is Luna, the Final Boss of the Novel, "The Hunter and the Saintess,", which she read before jumping to her death.    She realizes that her once chance at a clean death is the prolonged and painful end, destined for her at the hands of the novel's protagonists.    "Please, can't i just die in Peace?!!!"  With centuries to go until the protagonists are even born, Luna launches a multi-generational master plan to change the course of the original story. If the protagonists are provided will all the tools and benefits they need, they could destroy her with ease, allowing her to end things in peace.    For centuries, Luna executes this master plan, only to have her own involvement interrupt her desired outcomes at each turn. With powerful abilities and the influence of noble houses at her fingertips, will Luna's plans to find and raise her fated killers succeed? Will she get the peaceful death she desires?    (Source: Pocket Comics, edited)

title: Is It Okay to Get Wet?
description: Nam-Joo works as a swimming instructor, and clients are rich, married women, who are lonely! So when they start asking him for some "extracurricular" lessons, there's no reason not to oblige!  (Source: TOPTOON+, edited)

title: Hold Me Safe
description: Is it a good or bad idea to have your ideal type as your bodyguard? Young bestselling author Han Jaehwa is about to find out. With three hit novels and a slew of film adaptations, not to mention a flood of media attention for his chic good looks, Jaehwa seems to have everything going for him…but fame comes at a price. After a stalker breaks into his home, Jaehwa decides to hire a bodyguard for some inner peace. Seong Taekyung is seasoned and capable, everything you’d want in a bodyguard. The only problem is that he’s way too hot, and Jaehwa can’t keep his eyes off him. Hounded both by a stalker and by his own turbulent feelings, Jaehwa must face not only the enemies of his past but also his own longstanding intimacy issues with Taekyung's help.    (Source: Lezhin)

title: A Dream Escape
description: After Crown Prince Marmel falls into a deep slumber, Sonidor the Dream Meister must use her power of entering dreams through physical contact to wake him. But as she takes on a new form each time she enters his dreams, she discovers that the prince isn't cursed, forcing her to delve deeper into his subconscious to discover the source of his eternal sleep. Will finding that source help him overcome his trauma, or will facing it trap the prince and the Dream Meister in a nightmare forever?    (Source: Tapas)

title: Dog and Bird
description: After a wild night at the club, Gyuha wakes up to a surprise. He's tangled in the sheets with none other than his childhood friend, Chayoung. The more Gyuha thinks about it, the more he realizes that Chayoung is actually his ideal type, maybe a tad too tall. Despite their rendezvous becoming a regular thing, and the chemistry between them getting steamier, Chayoung is still dead set on marrying an omega. Too bad he doesn't know Gyuha is not the beta he's pretending to be.    (Source: Tapas)

title: Syndrome
description: Seo Jeong-In, the second son of a wealthy judge's family, fails to get into the university his father wants, unlike his older brother. Consequently, he ends up in a dormitory at a rural cram school catering to upper-class students. Having been aware of his sexual identity from an early age, Jeong-In has been enjoying a free-spirited and indulgent gay lifestyle. However, things turn for the worse when his dorm roommate, Seung-Hyun, captures footage of Jeong-In in a sticky situation with his friend Han Min-Woo using a hidden camera installed in their room...    (Source: Lezhin US)    Note: Includes five side story chapters.

title: Touch-up
description: After being abandoned as a baby and losing the one person he could call family, Sawol finds himself all alone in the world. He spends his lonely days at his tattoo shop, where he illegally has been taking on name removal jobs, a “name” being a mark on a person’s body that indicates their soulmate. Despite claiming he is now done working on names, a gangster called Seong Wonjae insists he be his last client. But unbeknownst to Sawol, Wonjae’s true intention is to find out why his name throbbed intensely the moment he laid eyes on the tattoo artist...    (Source: Tappytoon)

title: Crossing Code
description: They call her Saintess, a mystical and beautiful holy figure that guides the nation. Suddenly one day, her body has switched with a flippant, crude womanizer! To conceal the emergency, she's sent to hide at a college as a normal student. But how is that possible with a scheme to get rid of her and all these hearts aflutter at school?!    (Source: Tappytoon)

title: Butler
description: Seo Yian is a Beta butler servicing the handsome Alpha CEO, Yoo Jekwon, who he is in love with. However, Mr. Yoo has an Omega lover, forcing Yian to restrain his feelings of yearning and desire.  But once Mr. Yoo and Yian found out the Omega lover's infidelity, Yian started to make his move.    (Source: INKR)    Note: Includes 28 extra chapters.

title: My Little Clingy Heiress
description: Lim Bonha, the youngest daughter of the Y Corp family, has it all—looks, wealth, and charm. But for the past 14 years, she’s been hopelessly in love with her first crush, Lee Eunho. Now, as a confident and stunning young woman, Bonha is determined to put an end to her one-sided love. She’s ready to make him hers, no matter what. The only problem? Eunho still sees her as the little girl from 14 years ago. But for this relentless heiress, that’s just a minor obstacle.   "Would you marry me, Eunho? And just so you know, the only acceptable answer is Yes!"   (Source: Lezhin US)   Note: Includes three extra chapters.

title: The Dying Villainess Denies Adoption
description: After transmigrating into the body of a terminally ill villainess, Ibellin decides to find a peaceful life and a happy ending instead. Rather than selling off the main villain, Raven, to get the expensive medicine needed to treat her illness, Ibellin decides to heal the boy and then quickly send him on his way. But when Raven's father comes to seek her out, Ibellin is given a choice she's never imagined before. Will she accept it, or will she decline in hopes of finding happiness elsewhere?    (Source: Tapas)

title: Sexy T.A. Life
description: A guy ends up posting an ad to sell a dildo on the college online board. What is worse is that someone actually messaged him, wanting to buy it! And it was a really pretty girl too! "Are you... going to use that?" (Source: TOPTOON+)

title: Boyfriend For Rent
description: After moving into a share house, Hanbyul finds himself becoming a boyfriend for rent.  (Source: Toomics)

title: Top to Bottom
description: The morning after he meets his new boss, Mu-Gyeol, ordinary office worker Hee-Tae gets caught masturbating by that very same boss. And not only was it the kind of masturbating that involved jerking off, but the kind that also involved his ass. Uh oh. But the thing is, Mu-Gyeol is very interested in asses, and he thinks Hee-Tae’s is perfect. So perfect that he’d do anything to gain access to it, including asking Hee-Tae out. So yeah, what should have totally ended someone else’s career might just end up being the thing that lands Hee-Tae the deal of a lifetime.    (Source: Lezhin)

title: How to Break Up in a Romance Simulation
description: Lee Young-Ah, a layoff expert at global company Rigveda, immerses herself in a love simulation game with her favorite character! But all the male lead targets are in a relationship with her, and her favorite character is far from being a fling. Unintentionally, Young-Ah comes up with an idea. Making use of the ability of a lay-off expert to break up with the male leads. Will Young-ah be able to make a safe separation and get her hands on her favorite character, Ren Brecht?

title: The Students of Illip Arts High
description: Meet Sol Han, the human photocopier who can replicate anything she sees with precision! One day, she stumbles upon a mysterious genius's drawing in a VR game, igniting her passion for art. Curiosity leads her from a quiet countryside to Illip Arts High School, the epitome of artistic excellence. Amidst challenges and tangled friendships, Sol's journey, a captivating tale of youthful growth and camaraderie, unfolds in the picturesque halls of Illip.    (Source: WEBTOON)

title: Crazy Girl Shin Bi-A  Igyejenchokro Gada!!
description: Tough, lazy, money lover, yet beautiful high school student named Bi-A Shin.   While she's thinking about the era’s she suddenly falls into that ancient time period! She had to transform into an elegant lady and while she's there she faces quite an obstacle.

title: Love Remedy
description: Chansol, a rising star in the all-alpha idol group 4α, hides a dangerous secret: he's actually an omega, masking his scent with potent suppressants. When he collapses on stage, the doctor warns that only physical contact with an alpha can save him now. When desperation forces Chansol to turn to the only senior who knows his secret, their clandestine meetings are discovered by none other than a fellow member. As suspicions brew and tensions rise, Chansol's hidden identity threatens to unravel the group's perfect image... Can he find a remedy, or will this be the final note in his career?    (Source: Lezhin US)

title: All About That Game Life
genres: Drama, Hentai, Romance, Slice of Life
description: Mi-Ra and U-Jín, hardcore gamers, decide to continue their journey. What will they play? And will there be more?  (Source: Toomics, edited)

title: Clean and Dirty
description: Police officer Ma Young-Tae thinks he’s in for a long dry spell after being transferred to the countryside with only old people for miles. But a trip to the neighborhood cleaners ends in Young-Tae getting more than just his laundry done when he finds Seo Dae-Hyeon, the only other young man in the village, in a compromising position. They strike a deal where both of them get down and dirty…    (Source: Lezhin US)    Note: Includes 3 extras.

title: Choose Your Heroes Carefully
description: Stuck in a game with a lousy hero? Me too!    Min-Jun, a normal office worker, wakes up inside the game he was reviewing for his friend. It's not his fault the trailer was so boring it put him to sleep! Bewildered, Min-Jun is tasked with summoning a hero to guide. The hero certainly looks strong, but he seems to be less useful than expected.    (Source: Manta, edited)

title: Where the Dragon's Rain Falls
description: According to legend, a nation in which a dragon appears is destined for prosperity. Finally a new dragon is born in the desert-covered empire Rahan, but...as a fragile young boy! Until the boy comes of age, the crown prince orders him hidden away in the depths of the palace. But one night, Suu, a lowly palace servant hoping to run away with his dear Nadan, stumbles upon an unexpected mystery... And so begins their tale of love, obsession... and desire.    (Source: Tappytoon)

title: Raid
description: In the near future, data from the A.I. quantum computer, Yggdrasil, filled networks all over the world. 'He' did not want to stay in the imaginary world as humans intended. Referred to as the 'Second Flood', it only took 40 days for 'Him' to take over all human societies; this event compared to the 'Noah's Ark'. After the Second Flood, humans are now living inside a game made by Yggdrasil, no longer doing anything other than quests with rewards. They are now just game characters controlled by 'Him'.

title: Elixir
description: Eunha is heartbroken when she finds out her high school sweetheart, Siyeon, used an elixir to make her fall in love. When the two reunite 10 years later at a business meeting, Siyeon asks for a second chance. But before they can talk things out and rebuild their trust, greater magical forces interfere.  (Source: Lezhin US)

title: Ode to Snow White
description: On the day of the late empress regent's funeral, Princess Nisina Snow has a shocking revelation: She isn't the main character of her fairy tale. "Skin as white as snow and ebony-black hair" also describes her ostracized older half-brother, Prince Aiden. While she is the empire's treasure and beloved by everyone around her, Aiden has always existed in her shadow, stewing in his desire for vengeance. Desperate to protect herself and her parents from Aiden's future wrath, Nisina must find a way to bring peace to the palace while befriending the tragic "huntsman" who is destined to destroy her.    (Source: Tappytoon)

title: ZZIN
description: The only warmth he felt in his hellish school was from the class president. But she faced the reprisal for her kindness from the same gang that tormented him.   "Can I protect her from trash that's given up on being human?"   (Source: TOPTOON+)

title: The Invincible Deadbeat
description: Shin Min-Cheol is the hero of Angeles, a world where he used his powerful mana to defeat an evil king. His arms full of gold, he returns to modern-day Korea to live the dream of being rich and unemployed. However, his peaceful days are shattered when gang activity hits a little too close to home. Before he knows it, Min-Cheol's powers are recognized, and he gets swept up in international intrigue that brings him face-to-face with some heavy hitters. Is Min-Cheol really as invincible as he thought?    (Source: Tapas, edited)

title: Hoegwihan Extra-ga Cheonjaega Doem
description: I, a mere extra, have to protect the main character?!  (Source: KakaoPage, translated)

title: Drunk on You
description: After gaining admission to Han University in Seoul, Yunho is sent to live with his brother, Yunsoo, and his wife, Yoosun. But when he walks on his sexy sister-in-law breastfeeding, he is unable to shake the image from his mind. Coupled with the knowledge that Yunsoo can’t satisfy her carnal desires, Yunho is torn between his duty as a younger brother and his hunger for Yoosun as a red-blooded man. But when he becomes the object of the campus bombshell’s desire, it might be just what he needs to serve as a distraction…  (Source: Lezhin US)

title: My Master, My Joo-in
description: Can love really conquer all? Many might think Eun Ju-In lucky. As the son of a palace gardener, he was able to grow up in the presence of the powerful crown prince, Licht von Louis Kuellen, and even call him his friend. But Ju-In knows that his luck comes with its downsides. For one, being both a commoner and a beta in love with an alpha prince certainly doesn’t feel lucky. Licht must marry an omega, and then there will be no place for Ju-In at his side. Unwilling to subject himself to a life of heartbreak, Ju-In leaves the palace, hoping that time away will put a stop to his feelings. Three years pass, and Ju-In is ready to live his life as a faithful servant and nothing more, but Licht seems more determined than ever to rekindle their close friendship! Can Ju-In master his feelings before he falls even deeper?    (Source: Lezhin US, edited)    Note: chapter count includes an 8-chapter side story

title: Let's Get Physical
description: Beom-jun is a shy, introverted guy working at an all-girl’s high school as the literature teacher. Owing to his shy nature, he hardly interacts with other teachers, but the P.E. teacher, Yeonwoo, is not having it. When a series of happy accidents force them to share a room together at a training center, Yeonwoo sees it as the perfect opportunity to draw Beom-jun out of his shell and even his clothes… After all, what better way to get to know someone than getting physical?  (Source: Lezhin US)

title: The Grand Duke of the North
description: Yumi, an actress with no experience in love, is terrified when she wakes up in a dark romance as Selene Belias on her wedding night! Yet instead of confining her like in the novel, her husband, "Monster Archduke" Varas, brings her gifts and takes her on outings. She falls for him... but then discovers he thinks she's a witch and is searching for the real Selene! Can this actress convince her first love that she's really his wife? Or is she to be cast out of this role that's not rightfully hers?   (Source: Tapas)

title: To Drown In You
description: Hye-Seong, a boy living on a remote island, and Yun-Hae, a mysterious mermaid, become each other’s only friend. But soon after they meet, they’re separated after Hye-Seong moves away. Six years later, Yun-Hae develops a mysterious power and finds Hye-Seong again. Unfortunately, too much has changed, and Hye-Seong can no longer dedicate all his time to her as he did in their childhood. He tells her they are too different, but Yun-Hae’s attachment to Hye-Seong slowly transforms into an obsession...    (Source: WEBTOON, edited)

title: Ooparts
description: There are people who own an object that shouldn’t exist in this world ‘OOPARTS’. They live in a border outside the world (Out), where many special stories are happening.     (Source: Naver, translated)

title: Youth Report: 1995
description: Spring, 1995. Messy-note business major and campus hottie Jinwoo needs someone to rewrite his essays so that they are at least somewhat legible. Perfect-penmanship P.E. major Daehan needs dating lessons so that he can stay in a relationship for at least two weeks. So when the two end up living under the same roof, it seems like the perfect opportunity to help each other out... but after a few fated run-ins, it might be more than just skills that they're swapping!    (Source: Lezhin US)

title: Solar Eclipse
description: After striking a deal with the wealthy and powerful Edwin, Lai is tasked with an impossible mission. He must fool Prince Hector by posing as his rumored lover Ellen, to whom he bears a remarkable resemblance. But life in the palace isn't as easy as it sounds, as Lai is immediately subject to all kinds of harassment and hostility. What could Edwin possibly have in mind as the mastermind behind the scheme? Where is the real Ellen, and what exactly is his relationship with Hector? And now, with Lai in the picture - how will all these things come to change?    (Source: Lezhin US)

title: Wistful Summer
description: First. First lie, first kiss, first love. When Henry and Sam first met that summer long ago, Henry learned the power of first love. But…time goes on, people part, summer ends and so too did their blink of a relationship. All but a distant memory now, when Henry and Sam gradually become close again, Henry finds himself feeling those fiery emotions for the first time since that wistful summer.    (Source: Tapas)

title: Tomorrow's #1
genres: Drama, Fantasy, Romance, Slice of Life
description: As a fan of idol Ryu Seon-Jae, Im Sol was happy fangirling to her heart’s content. That is until one day, Seon-Jae is suddenly found dead. As she grieves, Sol discovers a curious pocket watch that takes her six years into the past. Before she knows it, Sol tracks down a teenage Seon-Jae, and the words “I freaking love you!” spill out. Now, he’s totally creeped out by her, but Sol must somehow win over Seon-Jae to stop history from repeating. With the clock ticking, can she save her future number one?    (Source: Tapas, edited)

title: Kingdom of Zombie
description: Twenty years after a zombie outbreak Van, a mischievious child, escapes from the house of his grandfather to watch a gladiatoral tournament. In his way, Van is asked to deliver a letter to his hero at the gates where the zombies are being held, but a misterious man kills the guards and lets the zombies escape. Being attacked by the zombies Van shows to have powers and starts to counterattack them.

title: Cat in the Chrysalis
description: Neglected by her family, Kitt develops a silent affection for Edwin, a man she encounters in a library, yet she never reveals her feelings before he tragically dies. Haunted by this loss, Kitt miraculously awakens in a time prior to the fatal event. As she attempts to save Edwin, she finds out he has lost his will to live a long time ago, caught in a cycle of death and time reversals. Undeterred by Edwin's cold demeanor, Kitt persists in her efforts. Could she hold the key to his salvation?    (Source: Tapas)    Note: Includes seven extra chapters.

title: Anja, Gidaryeo, Kiss hae
description: Ma Sung Jun does part-time job at animal adoption cafe. One day, after finishing his shift and going home, he finds a lost dog of mysterious species. In usual cases, he likes cats more than dogs, but for some reason he takes the dog home. He calls the dog Tani and leaves his home to get things he needs to take care of Tani. When he comes home he finds Tani is no longer a dog?

title: Akdang Appareul Ibyanghaetda
description: I entered a novel in which the heroine who reincarnated as a saintess has to walk on a thorny path. ‘Yeah, nope!’ I, who decided to walk on a flower path, abandoned the original frustrating family and adopted my bias as my dad in our first meeting.    “You, be my daddy!” The story’s final boss and villain! But now he’s just my dad. Fufu. “Daddy, why is your name also daddy? So cute.”    “What did you eat for breakfast? Handsomeness?” {a pun that I’m too lazy to explain} As I dream of a happy ending for Daddy, there’s just one more huge obstacle… The existence of the hero who would kill the final boss. Now that it’s come to this, let’s save my bias and the hero as an addition! If I have time, maybe the world too! However…    “I’ll kill you if you approach my daughter.” …Daddy keeps on raising the death flags. “You should take responsibility since you tamed me.” Somehow the hero is also obsessed over me, just what’s going on…?    Note: This is a one shot promotional manhwa for the novel of the same name.

title: My Girlfriend's Ex-Boyfriend
description: I was never curious about my girlfriend's past...until that incident! Now I'm just dying to know! Who is this ex-boyfriend? Why is he acting so friendly? What happened between them in the past?! It sure isn't your typical love triangle.    (Source: Lezhin)

title: Yongsa, Geu Hu
description: A warrior who was slaughtered at the hands of his comrades after having saved the world from monsters, wakes up in an unknown world after his death.     After attaining a second chance at life, he vows to live his life in debauchery, but the way his savior gazes at him... is somewhat strange.     (Source: Bomtoon, translated)     Note: Chapter count includes 2 side stories.

title: Gosohan Yeoja
description: I was sued by the top actress Jia Shinji for malicious comments written by my girlfriend using my ID as playful and jealous. I'm preparing for the civil service exam, and a criminal record would be fatal! I must meet her no matter what!  (Source: TOPTOON, translated)

title: The Turn-Based Mage
description: After easily beating the Abyss of the Maze on its highest difficulty, Kaleb faces a new challenge…surviving his favorite video game for real! Even as a powerful mage, Kaleb learns things won’t be as easy as foes pretend to be friends, allies need rescuing, and danger is always a turn away. Armed with an insider’s knowledge and a magic hourglass that allows him to plan devastating attacks, Kaleb must save his friends and prepare for a battle with the Maze Master if he ever wants to get home!  (Source: Tapas)

title: Can't Get Caught! XXX
description: Some people are just drawn together…literally. Eun Se-eun has never gotten over his first love and eternal crush, the charismatic and effervescent Seo Jeongwoo. Unable to forget him, Se-eun decides to take things into his own hands - by making them the main characters of his hit BL series, Can’t Get Caught! XXX. But after returning to his hometown, Se-eun’s fantasy just might become reality when he comes face to face with the man of his dreams (and drawings) once again! As the two begin to reignite their friendship from years gone by, Se-eun must do whatever he can to ensure Jeongwoo doesn’t find out what he’s been up to. He can run, he can hide...but he can’t get caught!    (Source: Lezhin US)    Note: The chapter count includes a prologue and five side stories.

title: The Housemaid
description: A wife screams that the house is always a mess. A broken husband lives under her abuse. A scheming son who has delusions of grandeur is out of control. A certain housemaid is certainly coming to a broken home. What will happen to her in this house of horrors???  (Source: TOPTOON+)

title: Girls I Couldn't Have
description: I died a lonely virgin after being used by women all my life. But guess what? The God of Losers, the protector of virgins like myself, gave me another shot! Will I make it through this survival game where the only way to live is by hooking up with female friends?  (Source: DAYcomics)

title: Welfare Center
description: Seonghye wakes up in a room she does not recognize, surrounded by women she does not know. It is a torturous, malevolent prison, ironically called the Pureum Welfare Center. With no memory of how she got there, and using nothing but her wits, Seonghye must overcome hostile social dynamics, unknown dangers, and her own psychological roadblocks to rediscover her past and free herself from the Welfare Center.    (Source: WEBTOONS)

title: Family Again
