description: Josh visits the gym after his girlfriend calls him fat. There, he meets the woman who almost became his stepmom but became estranged from him after his father’s death.  (Source: Toomics)

title: You're Under My Skin!
description: Nuri hasn’t changed much since she was in elementary school. She still has a temper, she still lives in the same house, and she’s still tragically short. Her childhood friend Homil, however, has changed a lot. Several years after he moved away, Homil returns as Nuri’s neighbor and high school classmate. Now, he’s not quite the same boy Nuri used to know. Sure, he’s still an idiot and a good friend, but something feels different, and Nuri is all too aware of it in a more-than-friendly way. She might not be growing any taller, but maybe some weird feelings about Homil are growing inside of her…  (Source: Lezhin US)

title: Half-Ghost
description: Can she see them or not? Hayeon has always felt something creepy near her. She knows ghosts exist, but she can’t really see them. She suddenly meets a boy who not only sees them but fights with them? Hu-an Lee isn’t your average student. He’s a half-ghost. He knows there’s something different about Hayeon, but he can’t seem to figure out what. No one can. Human or ghosts!    (Source: WEBTOONS)

title: Take Me, I'm Yours
description: Have you ever had a ghost as a roommate? That’s the situation that confronts Chanyang Jeong when a haunting turns into a homestay. The “ghost” in question is actually Jian Nam, heir to the Baekgyeong Group, who’s currently in a coma after a suspicious accident. Jian needs to remain near Chanyang for three months to find out if he can wake up from the coma, so the two are forced to cohabitate. Can Chanyang uncover the truth behind Jian’s accident, and endure living with her unexpected guest for three months?    (Source: WEBTOONS)

title: Rooftop Sex King
description: Hyeong-Sik has one problem: The size of his dick. But he can't say no when he's offered a mysterious series of missions that promise to boost his size. With each challenge growing harder and hotter, will he be able to become a legend?!   "Take a peek at the landlord's wife's naked body."  (Source: DAYcomics, edited)

title: The Black Serpent
description: “I shall destroy the factions of justice and avenge the deaths of my comrades!” Jeonghwa, the captain of the Black Serpent Squad, loses everyone she grew up with when the lawful factions betray them after the battle against the chaotic factions. On the verge of death herself, she must now claw her way up to deliver true justice to the so-called justice factions.   (Source: WEBTOON)

title: Reluctant Encounters
description: After Tae-Yoon's ex-boyfriend sends a package to his old address, he quickly rushes to get it before anybody sees it. There, he unexpectedly runs into Jae-Min, a former high school classmate with whom he shares a tense and complicated past. Tae-Yoon flees quickly, hoping it will be their final encounter, but fate insists on intertwining their paths again. To confront his lingering guilt, he offers Jae-Min a sincere apology, only to be met with a shocking suggestion—that they meet five more times. What seems like a simple request leaves Tae-Yoon both confused and anxious, as he begins to wonder what Jae-Min’s true intentions might be.    (Source: Lezhin US)

title: A Friendship So Impure
description: Siyeong and Jihoo are "just friends." At least, that's what Siyeong tells herself before they share a steamy night that redefines their relationship forever. How was she supposed to know that the guy who invited her to work at his company, hasn't dated anyone in almost a decade, and has been pining for her since college might want more? Still, being upset with her lying boyfriend was no excuse for the drunken night she had with her pseudo-friendzoned boss. Now Siyeong is torn between the man she's loved for the past nine years and the one who was by her side through everything. Can she find the will to forgive the very person who sent her running into the arms of another man, or will she fall head over heels for her longtime friend and risk losing him forever?    (Source: Tappytoon)    Note: Includes ten side story chapters

title: Wild Eyes
description: Eun Woo’s never been one for attention. She’s kept her head low in the palace ever since she first arrived, and all she’s focused on is doing a good job. Her peaceful life is broken, however, when the prince calls her to his bedroom. Lee Hyun is known for never having the same maid in his chambers twice, but Eun Woo keeps lingering on his mind. A story about a lonely prince and a lovely maid—will love make the prince’s wild eyes lose their sharp edge?    (Source: Lezhin US)

title: To Take An Enemy's Heart
description: Kassan is believed to be the sole survivor of the Azkun clan, after Master Igen, a ruthless ruler, slaughters his family. Master Igen brings the young boy as a slave into his home, exploiting, beating and starving him. The only one who cares about him enough to risk the Master’s wrath is Lanour, a fellow slave. Oblivious to the fact that Master Igen is the one who had the members of his clan killed, Kassan starts falling in love with him.  (Source: Netcomics)

title: I Confessed to the Boss!
description: Everyone loves Mr. Perfect, team leader Ji Do-Hoon-- except for one person, that is. For the past two years, Da-Jung has only had eyes for her coworker, Hyun-Woo. On the night of the company dinner, Da-Jung runs after him as he leaves and asks him to be her boyfriend. However, once the tall figure she confesses to steps out of the shadows, Da-Jung realizes she was talking to none other than Mr. Perfect himself! But what’s more shocking is… he agrees to date her! What in the world is he thinking?!  (Source: Tapas)

title: The Duke's Obsession With His Wife
description: Anriette may look like an average noble, but she's actually a human who's been transported into the world of her favorite novel, cursed by its author for writing fanfics critical of the original ending. And as Anriette, her fate is to be slain by the very male lead she wrote her fanfics about! Can she use her inside knowledge to craft the ending she always dreamed of for her favorite lead?   (Source: Tapas)

title: Raffine’s Plan: Save My Favorite Character
description: I'll marry the male lead myself!    Raffine is in a predicament, and there are three reasons why. One, she's been reincarnated into a super angsty, highly depressing novel. Two, her older brother is destined for death in said novel. And three, the only way to save him is by marrying the male lead. What the hell is going on?!    (Source: Manta)

title: Must the Reincarnated Mother Always Die?
description: Lilliana is a neglected princess with a single mission: do not get pregnant. Ever since she woke up in a novel where she will die giving birth to the main character, Lilliana has known that her pregnancy will be her death sentence. However, her mission’s greatest obstacle is her new husband, Emperor Helio. Although they have married for political reasons, the ruthless emperor's fondness for Lilliana drives him to decide that his mission is to win her over. Thus begins the battle of wills between wife and husband. Will Lilliana be able to defy destiny and Helio’s affections?    (Source: Tappytoon)

title: Once was enough
description: "I'll become a perfect loser and punish you."   Eun-Hyeok returned to his high school days when he was a loser. He trembled with anxiety at first, but he started taming the bullies, armed with his past.  (Source: DAYcomics, edited)

title: Run Away
description: Naeyeon wanders in the forest with her memories lost and is approached by Dongcheol who tries to assault her. Naeyeon successfully escapes and is reunited with her husband  Kitae, but with her memories still a mess.

title: Show Me Your Color
description: After getting hit by lightning, he started seeing girls' erogenous zones! Now girls get wet the moment Ok-Hee touches them.   "I can't take it anymore!"   But all the lights represent something different? A normal life suddenly turns very sticky!  (Source: TOPTOON+)

title: Dokgo 2
description: The sequel to Dokgo. After avenging his older brother, a new story begins for Kang Hyuk.

title: Gateun Hakgyo Chingu
description: Gyeoul, a friend from the same class, always maintains proper posture. For some reason, Gyeoul keeps catching Yohan's attention. Suddenly, the two of them become deskmates. Just like the physical distance, their hearts get closer. This loud heartbeat. What should we call the rising blush of that face? A clueless boy and girl's first love story.  (Source: Naver, translated)

title: My Secret Roommate
description:
Hyemin's life as a neurosurgery resident is thrown off balance when her childhood nemesis and popular actor, Sooha, shows up at the hospital with narcolepsy. Because of the dirt he has on her, she has no choice but to comply with his demand and secretly treat his illness. On top of that, their relationship takes a complicated turn when their parents make them consider each other for marriage! And because Sooha puts the burden of rejecting the marriage on her, Hyemin vengefully does the opposite. But after the dust settles, the two realize what they have to gain from this unlikely union: for Sooha, it's a doctor who can treat his narcolepsy round the clock, while for Hyemin, it's a successful husband who won't interfere with her career. Maybe they can keep the truth a secret from their fans and loved ones... if they can stop fighting for two seconds, that is! (Source: Tappytoon)

Note: Chapter count includes 10-chapter epilogue story.

title: Melo Holic
genres: Comedy, Drama, Mystery, Psychological, Romance, Slice of Life
description: A cynical romance, 'Have you been addicted to love?'

title: I'm Nobody's Shadow
description: Behind every great man is a great woman, but that is only half true when it comes to Lancaster's famed painter, Count Ryan Bryerton. In fact, his wife, Ennis, is the talented one, but submits her paintings under his name to give him the honor and status he desires. However, Ennis makes the shocking discovery that Ryan's been cheating on her with her best friend, and is almost sent to a mental institution by the traitorous pair! Once an accident sends her back to the past, Ennis is determined to expose Ryan as the talentless sham he is...    (Source: Tappytoon)

title: Please, Candy!
description: Talented office worker Ha-Gong Park’s life takes an unexpected turn when Jin Woon, a former friend who confessed his feelings for him years ago, joins the company. As their mutual attraction rekindles, Ha-Gong begins to notice that Woon keeps avoiding any physical contact. Frustrated and confused, Ha-Gong decides to visit Woon’s home late at night—only to see a stranger leaving Woon’s place...  (Source: Lezhin US)   Note:   - Chapter count includes a prologue.  - Part of Lezhin's Gwanggong Collection (광공단편선). A gwanggong (광공, hanja: 狂攻) character is obsessed with the object of their desire, similar to the Japanese "yandere". Scanlations have erroneously translated this to "GwangGong Apartment/Industrial Complex", which may have caused confusion.

title: The Palace of Bardo
description: Even in death or rebirth… You won’t be able to get rid of me…    He ended his life because he was unable to accept the emperor, who had gone mad with obsession. But, after over a hundred years pass by… like fate or… fate playing some sick joke, he is born again, with his memories of his past fully intact. Even though he had made a vow to never see the emperor again, and had wished for nothing more than to have his memory wiped clean of him… Was he still unable to escape him even through death?! Despite his best efforts, he finds himself face-to-face with the reincarnation of the Emperor…    <I>Note: The chapter count includes 5 extras.     (Source: Lezhin US)

title: I'd Rather Take the Father
description: After a once-dormant contract requiring descendants of House Morgana and House Kalakis to wed resurfaces, Meivia Morgana receives a shoddy proposal from the ever-miserable eldest son, Gilbert Kalakis. Determined not to settle for less, Meivia decides to marry the single and mysteriously alluring family head, Grand Duke Edis Kalakis. Between a volatile son always knocking at her door and an enticingly enigmatic father who leaves her wanting more, will Meivia be able to sign her way to happiness?    (Source: Tapas)

title: You Are My World
description: Childhood friends Ju-Hyeok and Su-Ah once promised to stay together forever, but when their secondary genders manifest in reverse, their worlds drift apart. Years later, Ju-Hyeok’s dream of Olympic gold is on the line, and Su-Ah might be the only one who can help him reach it. What follows is a story of fate, pride, and a love that refuses to yield.  (Source: Lezhin US)

title: Obsessed With Hazel the Sweet Witch
description: Waking up in a fairy tale she illustrated, Hazel is rumored to be a wicked, man-eating witch. In truth, all she wants to do is bake sweets and share the kindness. So when the adorable Luna and Luca show up at the door of her gingerbread house, Hazel is determined to care for the siblings. However, things go awry when their guardian and brother, Grand Duke Elliot Blaine, show up, accusing her of kidnapping them. Now, with her charm and cooking skills, Hazel must prove she is indeed a sweet witch!    (Source: Tapas)

title: Sneak A Peek
description: A woman lives in a house with a disinterested husband and a perverted father-in-law. And to make things worse, she's also the target of a pervert that lives nearby. But maybe she was kinkier than she thought?   (Source: TOPTOON+)

title: Carefully Choosing a Husband
description: After her mother's death, Elrose Basellan was cast out by her father for 14 years. With news of his passing, Elrose rushes to claim her inheritance, but can't do so unless she's married! Desperate, she prays for a husband, and the mysterious Rakshan seems to fall from the sky! They agree to a temporary union that benefits them both, but unexpected issues keep delaying their plans for divorce. Will this fake marriage become something more? Or should Elrose have chosen her husband more carefully?    (Source: Tapas)   Note: Includes three extra chapters.

title: Toegeun, Hal Geoya?
description: Jin-Woo decides to take on a part-time job as an executive chauffer for hire to pay for his tuition. While working for a young female CEO, Jinwoo finds himself attracted to her and vows to become her personal driver. However, something seems odd about this CEO… Wait, is a CEO’s driver supposed to do this?!  (Source: Lezhin, translated)   Note: Includes one extra chapter.

title: No More Princes
description: This is the legendary tale of valiant princes, devoting their lives to rescue the princess from the evil drake that has been terrorizing the nation…   "Here I am, my damsel in distress, I will smite the dragon and return you back to the golden castle!"   when the brave prince roars his promise, our beautiful princess Mikaella asks the question to drake.   "Xeno, I don't want to be saved by him... Please take care of him."   The mighty "evil" dragon responds,  "Anything for my sweet Mikaella."    (Source: Pocket Comics)

title: My Girlfriend's Sister
description: "Let me help you masturbate."   Min-Hyuk falls for his girlfriend's sister, who is a mature, sexy girl. One day, he ends up seeing her touching herself. He should've just ignored it, but he just couldn't resist the temptation...  (Source: TOPTOON+, edited)

title: Friends or F-Buddies?
description: Hyunwoo, Yiseul, Nayeon, and Jimin – the four once-inseparable friends coincidentally run into each other in college. The surprise reunion is riddled with confusion, as some members of the group are less than thrilled about the meeting. Everything from their looks to their personalities has changed, and Hyunwoo is soon faced with the ultimate question: “Is it okay to sleep with your friends?!”  (Source: Lezhin US)

title: Running on Empty
description: Han Soo-bum has nothing to lose. Dying seems to be the solution to all his problems. How hard can it be to kill himself? Unless he gets abducted by a hot guy running from the law who has been falsely accused. Where will they run to, and what are these feelings blooming inside our fugitive’s heart?  (Source: Noir)

title: My Sadistic Master
description: Jin Yu-An is a shy, sweet-faced sub who’s never actually tried any real SM play. He’s never had a partner or a lover—mostly because he’s way too busy, kind of a scaredy-cat, and hasn’t found anyone who fits his taste. One day, while browsing a BDSM app, he stumbles upon a profile that makes his heart race… only to realize the guy hasn’t logged in for years. Still, hoping against hope, Yu-An starts sending him cheerful messages. And then—a reply.    [You got a death wish?]  [Can’t you see my age?]    Oops. He missed the guy’s age. And the terrifying attitude in the response? Yikes. But somehow, Yu-An gets stubborn and insists on meeting him. The guy is exactly his type—intense gaze, scary tattoos, and an aura that screams danger. BDSM? More like organ theft??    Still… should he give this scary-sexy dom a shot?"    (Source: Lezhin US)

title: Sweet As Hell
description: If anyone’s looking for proof that two people can have casual sex and stay friends, look no further than Choi Eui-hyun and Jung Min. First classmates, and now co-workers, the secret ingredient to this 9-year relationship may just be Min’s unique preferences in bed. As someone who has never needed a safe word for anything in his life, Eui-hyun often struggles with Min’s overwhelming demands. Min, on the other hand, sometimes feels frustrated by how much convincing Eui-hyun needs to get kinky with him. But they’ve already lasted nine years, so what’s nine more…right? Or will their differences ultimately drive them apart?    (Source: Lezhin)

title: Unfinished Business
description: Ji-Chan the alpha is a director at a conglomerate run by his gang but must fight to keep his rivals from stealing his position. Just when he's desperate to produce results, he's offered a promising business deal by Eugene, the director of a famous pharmaceutical company. However, Ji-Chan's hope turns to despair when Eugene kidnaps him and uses him as a test subject for a trait converter drug. Turned into an omega and confined against his will, Ji-Chan is forced to submit to Eugene, a merciless alpha. But why is Eugene being strangely vengeful when they barely know each other?    (Source: Tappytoon, edited)

title: Princess of the Animals
description: I'll be a voice for the animals!    Though Elise is forced to live in isolation, she doesn't feel alone thanks to her ability to communicate with animals. That is until she's sent off to marry the ruler of what's known as the Land of the Barbarians! What adventures, and dangers, await Elise in this strange, new world?    (Source: Manta)

title: Hotel Phryne
description: It’s Christmas Eve, and Doyoung’s made a reservation at a luxurious hotel in the hopes of spending a romantic day with his crush, Hyunjin. But nothing seems to be going according to plan. They lose cell service, miss their reservation, and drive through a terrible rainstorm only to arrive at a haunted-looking hotel. When Doyoung asks for a refund, the imposing concierge insists he must participate in a game—a game that quickly turns Christmas into a nightmare.  (Source: Lezhin)

title: Gyosuinhyeong
description: Five individuals, 24 years old. Their first memory starts in 1994, and it all revolves around a mysterious crime that occurred... Will they be able to escape the dangers?

title: Sword of the Falcon
description: Rescued from a band of human traffickers, Eremia, the continent's most renowned traveling musician, meets Rajid Shan, the ruler of Istania. Soon, fate brings Eremia into the palace and she's forced to serve as his royal musician. They bond over their shared love of Istania's lore, but the threat of a devastating war looms on the horizon. Will Eremia be forced to watch the nation burn, as history repeats itself? And will Rajid realize that even a caged songbird longs to be free?     (Source: Tappytoon)

title: The King of Home Cooking
description: Broke college student Ji-Ho is determined to win the grand cash prize on the TV show "The King of Home Cooking," where culinary mastery alone isn't enough to become popular with the audience voters. After a wild night of research, he concludes that faking a gay relationship with another contestant is the surest way to victory. The handsome and good-natured Woo-Hyuk could be the perfect partner -- but the instant he hears Ji-Ho's plan, Woo-Hyuk turns into a complete jerk! The two somehow agree to team up, but will their rocky "ship" be enough to beat the other attention-hungry contestants?     (Source: Tappytoon)    Note: Chapter count includes 8 extra chapters

title: Please Obsess Over Me
description: Just before Princess Arabella Strovna’s 24th birthday, she and the entire imperial family die at the hands of the rebel army. Thanks to a magical blessing, though, she wakes up and she’s… 20 again? Trapped in a loop of rebirth, Arabella continues to repeat the same four years, only to be killed every time. To break the cycle, she must befriend her own murderers, the three rebel leaders. But as she gains their trust, Arabella realizes that they may not be the true villains of this tale…    (Source: Tapas)

title: Valentine Kiss
description: Cursed by God to live out nine wretched lifetimes as a human on Earth, Valentine has finally reached the ninth and final chapter of this long punishment. Reborn as a penniless kid living on the streets, "Lucien" must find a way to survive... But it seems even with eight lives' worth of experience, there are still mistakes to be made! In a tumultuous twist of destiny, could this miserable life lead to... a forbidden romance?  (Source: Tappytoon)

title: You're Not That Special!
description: I didn't think much of the creepy girl in class, but who would have thought...  (Source: Toomics, edited)

title: Please Obsess Over Me
description: Just before Princess Arabella Strovna’s 24th birthday, she and the entire imperial family die at the hands of the rebel army. Thanks to a magical blessing, though, she wakes up and she’s… 20 again? Trapped in a loop of rebirth, Arabella continues to repeat the same four years, only to be killed every time. To break the cycle, she must befriend her own murderers, the three rebel leaders. But as she gains their trust, Arabella realizes that they may not be the true villains of this tale…    (Source: Tapas)

title: Metro Hunter
description: Unidentified monsters have taken over the metro lines of Seoul, bringing chaos to the city. In the 20 years since the monsters emerged, a system of hunters has been built in order to deal with the monster dungeons that have formed all over the city. One such hunter, Kang Cheol -- the Metro Hunter -- is on a journey to find and slay a monster he calls the “Master of Fire.”    (Source: WEBTOON)

title: King of Eden
description: Humanity is in danger of extinction…and it all started in a small Spanish village. In every corner of the world, the mystery behind the mass fatalities remains at the forefront of everyone’s mind. In the latest volume, a strange man claims to know the origin behind humanity’s demise. Who is this man, and how will he change the fate of the world?!    (Source: Yen Press)

title: Jugilnomui Jugeunnom
description: Shin Lee is the wealthy CEO of a company who should be able to get any woman he wants, but he has a problem: he can’t maintain an erection. Hyonggi is a charming deliveryman who will answer any call within a few minutes. The two cross paths when Hyonggi unexpectedly rescues Shin’s daughter from a dangerous situation, and Shin soon discovers that Hyonggi himself might just be the mystical solution to his penile dilemma!  (Source: Lezhin, translated)   Note: Chapter count includes a prologue.

title: Honjeon Yeon Ae
description: "Han sang-hyun" Is a boy that dreams to become a manhwaka, and one day he hears a story that falls like lightning from a clear sky. And that is that he had a fiance he never knew about. After not being able to win against his grandfather he goes to the meeting against his will. however the lady ehe meets there is a girl who feels to be a rich spoiled girl named "Yu Suh-eun". after having a fight with a girl that acts negatively to him, he comes back to his house just to find out that Yu Suh-eun is in house!? What? The new house that the'll be staying in is the "Marriage House"? Will han Sang-hyun and yu suh-eun break through their families plans to successfully get divorced!?

title: Sofa Wiui Sumbakkokjil
description: Are we playing hide and seek? Who's hiding this time? Am I the seeker? Follow this topsy-turvy journey, with mind-bending plot points, and places where you'll scream "Found you!"

title: The Last Straw
description: You can have everything else, but not him!    When Anita's long-lost older sister Arabella finally turns up after 19 years, their parents are overjoyed and begin to shower her with the love and attention Anita never received. But when they try to take away her best friend and fiancé, Axion, Anita finally puts her foot down. She's had enough.    (Source: Manta)

title: Villainess's Idol
description: A girl from the modern world aspiring to become a pop idol slips into the body of Ashley Verrence, the main villainess of the novel she was reading. In the original story, Ashley was a crown princess who lost favor with the prodigal crown prince and ended up being executed.    The new Ashley has one year to change her destiny and her first steps towards a new future start with preparing a play using her modern knowledge. Can she make amends and escape her death?    (Source: POCKET COMICS)

title: Life Howling
genres: Action, Adventure, Drama, Ecchi, Fantasy, Supernatural
description: Jung Yoon-hwan may be an orphan but he was a college student who was focusing hard on his studies, one day he is brought to a mysterious "White room" to fight even when he does not want to. Every time he defeats these monsters he gains psychic power, magic, and items beyond his imaginations....

title: Unbalance x Unbalance: After Story
description: Unbalance x2: After Story manga summary: Sequel to “Unbalance x2”. 25-year-old Nah Hae-Young is a high school teacher. She’s pretty popular and well-received by her students, but she has one huge secret… She’s actually in a relationship with one of her students, Myung Jin-Ho! This is her story of trying to navigate her life without allowing too many stirrups from her young lustful boyfriend!

title: Newlywed Special Admission
description: The first year of university is hard, but so is registering a fake marriage to a random alpha to score admission to a top university. It’s even harder keeping that marriage a secret from your classmates while doing just enough sexy stuff with your fake husband/roommate to prove your marriage is legit. But for Yidam, the hardest part of all is keeping his hands off the stranger he married.    (Source: Tapas)

title: Tong
description: Having lived as a fighting legend in Busan, he wanted to live peacefully in Seoul. However, we all know that wasn't how Lee Jung Woo lived. Showing off immense skills in the fight against the best fighters in the school, Lee Jung Woo takes over the area in no time at all. After that, the gangs nearby never leave the 'Tong' Lee Jung Woo alone. Although he is the 'Tong', since Lee Jung Woo did not wish to being harm to those not involved, he starts changing the way he lives. What exactly was Lee Jung Woo trying to protect through all that violence?

title: Maria: The Deposed Empress
description: Maria, Empress of Rastonia, is betrayed by her husband Emperor Henry after his mistress gives birth to a son. King Helland the Great, ruler of a neighboring kingdom, takes her as collateral so that Henry can have one more year to repay a considerable debt. King Helland is actually Gunther Preisley, a former slave for Maria’s family. He has loved her a decade and is determined to woo her. Meanwhile, back in Rastonia, two different women vie to replace her as Empress. Will Maria survive the year so that she can avenge herself, and will Gunther win her heart?  (Source: WEBTOON)

title: FAMILY MAN
genres: Comedy, Drama, Romance, Slice of Life
description: Gang-ho is a laborer at the local factory, sleeping just 3 hours a day and working like a horse. But when his face is burned in an accident at work, he's left unemployed. Scared of his daughter's reaction to his burns, Gang-ho decides to transform into the superhero, Gugu-Man!   (Source: WEBTOONS)

title: Nae Choeaeneun Agyeogyeongae: Another Revolution Story
Father-in-law fucks everyone
description: "Sir, please bless me with your superior baby seeds❤️"   He had clawed his way up from nothing, building a kingdom in his dusty hometown without any help from his parents. Having lived so fiercely, he left his company to his sons, in hopes to spend the rest of his life in peace. However, his naughty daughters-in-law were not going to leave him alone- not his dick at least.  (Source: DAYcomics)

title: Alley Story
description: 6 friends grew up together in a small alley. At night when everyone is asleep, YOON-HO makes a secret with a girl in the neighborhood.  (Source: TOPTOON+)

title: The Spot Master
description: I somehow learned of a special "spot" that could change my life and others...! But what will I do with this newfound power...?  (Source: Toomics)

title: Onward
description: Sometimes one splash is all it takes to make waves. Swimming prodigy Woo Seungwon, whose very being is vast and endless like the ocean, runs into former a-list singer Doh Si-on. Si-on, now a businessman trying to stay afloat, is doing his best to move forward with his life; but the weight of the world only drags him down, as if he is struggling to crawl through a swamp. Taking an interest in Seungwon, Si-on offers him the opportunity to make some extra money as his housekeeper…and perhaps do a little extra work on the side…   (Source: Lezhin US)

title: Seven Sundays
description: Tae-Yang thought he'd never see Ji-Wan again after their messy breakup, but fate and the media have other plans. Now a heroic firefighter with a documentary deal, Tae-Yang reunites with his producer ex at the broadcasting station... except Ji-Wan is doing everything he can to avoid him. But then, why does he have a seven-year-old kid with the same name as Tae-Yang? Once he secures seven dates with Ji-Wan as "payment" for using his name, it's up to Tae-Yang to do some detective work and win over his reluctant ex in seven Sundays.  (Source: Tappytoon)

title: Bittersweet
description: After he was laid off, Seho wasn't sure what his next move was going to be. He only took a job at a cafe so that he'd have something to do with his time. He never imagined that he'd catch the eye of the cafe owner, or that being with an older woman could be so electrifying. Then again, Mira assets are definitely one of kind. Things are looking up until Mira asks Seho to move in with her and her daughter. Nayoung may seem innocent, but things aren't always what they seem. And Seho's about learn just how complicated family relationships can be.  (Source: Lezhin US)

title: SSS Geup Wijangyowon
description: This exciting story involves the landing of a nuclear missile, code named “Nuclear Warhead,” in the North. Nuclear Warhead’s’ 69th mission is to subjugate a wealthy South Korean family’s daughter! However, due to an accident during his mission, he unexpectedly loses his memory.   “How do I use this enormous weapon to win over the hearts of South Korean women? What was it again?”   He finds himself wondering now. Will he be able to finish his mission successfully?  (Source: TOPTOON, translated)

title: Fray
description: In a world filled with demons, only knights blessed with miracles can fight against their tyranny. During a moment of desperation, Magpie was given a miracle, the one and only flame that can kill demons. But that very flame turns its owner into a demon that thirsts for ashes…     “Put in the firewood, if you don’t want to turn into a handful of ashes.”    (Source: WEBTOONS)    <I>Note: The chapter count includes a prologue.

title: On My Own
description: Genius chef and restaurant owner Heemin hates relying on others so much that he’s called “Mr. On My Own”. Being known as a no-fluff, values-over-looks guy is all good in the workplace, except it means he has to hide an integral part of who he is… The fact that he’s a diehard fan of the K-pop group, Emotion! To be specific, Heemin is obsessed with Jeong-woon, but at a meet-and-greet, one of the other members, Yiyeon, keeps chatting him up. There’s no room for another #1 in Heemin’s heart…or is there?    (Source: Lezhin US)

title: Second Life Millionaire
description: Do Shiyoon was the leader of a struggling K-pop boy band when he tragically died in a car accident... or so he thought! Miraculously, he wakes up in his 17-year-old body and realizes that he's gone back in time to before he debuted as an idol. Now, he is determined to make it big in K-pop. As he prepares for his re-debut, he has to avoid the pitfalls of his first life while gathering four like-minded and talented idol trainees to make a new boy band, the likes of which K-pop has never seen!    (Source: Tapas)

title: Unbreakable
description: The laws of the world have changed!     In an instant, the world turned into a hell for the strong because of the god Kashita. At the end of the slaughter test given by the gods, Yu Do-Hyeok became the “Great Emperor”, the strongest of mankind, and defeated God.    However, the pleasure of victory is short-lived, and everyone returns to the first day of the trial with their memories of what happened. With the exception of Yu Do-Hyeok.     Instead of helping each other, people rush to take the place of the strongest one by killing the Great Emperor. In a world crazier than his previous life, can Yu Do-Hyeok kill God and restore peace?     (Source: Kakao, translated)

title: From Acting Genius to Top Idol!
description: Baek Hyeon sacrificed everything to become the best actor in the industry. So when he's about to die in a plane crash, he makes a desperate wish for another chance to live. Hyeon's plea is granted, but who said anything in life was free? Reborn as his younger self, Hyeon must first become a successful K-pop idol if he wants to be an actor again. Can Hyeon make it in the cutthroat world of fierce competition, demanding schedules, and fake smiles? Or will he fail and lose his second shot at fame?    (Source: Tapas, edited)

title: Traded Lives
description: Shay, the S-Class Hunter everyone dreams of becoming. But Dennis, a man with the power to switch bodies, sets his sights on stealing everything from him... by taking his body.   "You want my body? You'd be better off chasing youth."  (Source: DAYcomics)

title: The Red Book
description: The more you think about it, the scarier it gets. This is about things that are everywhere and nowhere.  (Source: WEBTOON)

title: Gwangyeyeokjeonbeoteun: Naengjeonghan Geunyeoreul Bokjongsikija
description: Assistant Manager Kim Minwoo is struggling because of his female team leader, who is always harsh and cold towards him. One day, he unexpectedly presses an unknown button, and the team leader’s cold demeanor changes 180 degrees…  (Source: TOPTOON, translated)

title: Wild Ranker
description: A blinding flash of light, and his village was gone. Lowe vows to reach the floating Island of the Gods, but first, he must venture into a world ruled by a ranking system and claw his way to the top. Trained by the world’s strongest knight, he embarks on a quest to become the top ranker, battling fearsome beasts and ruthless rivals to uncover the truth and save his loved ones.  (Source: WEBTOON)

title: Boobie Trap
description: "I've always had feelings for you... Let's do it."   Growing up, Hyun-Woo has always been confident and popular. But his job has not been easy. One day, he gets accused of an office scandal. Now, he's ready to fight back and show them what he's made of.  (Source: DAYcomics)

title: The Hip Guy
description: 27-year-old Ga-eun Seong has everything that money can buy, but she can’t rest until her athleisure company is the best in the industry. That’s why she hires Chan Gwak to model her new leggings line for men. Chan has the perfect butt, but is it perfect enough to meet Ga-eun's high standards? After social media interactions have people thinking they’re dating, Ga-eun begins to question... even though Chan’s not her type, could she end up falling for him anyway?    (Source: WEBTOONS)   Note: Chapter count includes 2 side stories.

title: One-way Romance
description: Jae-Hwan is an ambitious reporter. Whilst struggling to find an exclusive story, he hears a rumor that the successful Taeryong Group was in fact secretly related to the notorious Hong Kong mafia. In order to do some digging and to find some evidence of their connection, Jae-Hwan goes to the Taeryong rooftop party and unintentionally becomes involved with Liu Yuan, the mafia boss. Will Jae-Hwan be able to get the scoop from this heartless mobster? What is the secret connection between these two Hong Kong giants?     (Source: Lezhin US)    Note: Includes eight side story chapters.

title: So I Married the Abandoned Prince
description: Although Rita Cardinale married Grand Duke Giuseppe Catane to help her lover George become emperor, she is stabbed in the back by the love of her life and loses her entire family. As Rita uses her alchemy to try and stop the emperor's army from taking her fallen husband's land, she is sent back in time to right before she's married. Full of vengeance, Rita wants to stop George from becoming emperor. For her plan to work, she marries Giuseppe again, but why is he acting so different from before?  (Source: Tapas)   Note: Chapter count includes 2 side stories.

title: Sahwa: Eunmilhan Uiloe
description: She is an assassin for hire because she needs the money. Like a chameleon, she is capable of transforming herself a numerous amount of times. To anyone that ends up meeting her, only death awaits them...  (Source: TOPTOON, translated)

title: The Fabled Warrior
description: Myeong-Ok is just your typical 49-year-old mother living her life with her family--at least, that’s what she’d want you to believe. When two people from another world suddenly show up and ask her to help save their world, she refuses. She has a family now and can’t risk putting her life on hold... but will she be able to say no if her daughter is involved? Will Myeong-Ok be able to find some way to save this other world and protect what’s dearest to her as well?    (Source: WEBTOONS)

title: Naneun Namjuui Jeon Yeochinieotda
description: I am the villainess in a harem novel. My role as "Erika" is to be an evil ex-girlfriend. I don't want to be a dumb villainess, so I broke up with the male-lead first... But after 3 years, Leo came back to me. "I can't live without you. I still like you..." I'm not the girl you should be obsessed with?! The second leads also came to me "I like it when you're next to me..." I'm just a supporting villainess, yet why are all these men confessing to me?! Who should I choose?    (Source: Kakao, translated)

title: The Flower That Swallowed the Beast
description: A bargain for her life, to escape a tragic future. When Iris Whittle is murdered by her sadistic husband, she is sent back in time to when she was 20 years old. As the unwanted daughter of a duke, Iris realizes she can leverage her status and foresight to secure a better life this time around. Thus, Iris makes a daring marriage proposal to the fearsome Count Keibrandt Green, the most eligible bachelor of Gavizar Empire, whose gruff and stern demeanor hides the fangs of a wolf.   (Source: WEBTOON)

title: Stupidemic
description: A rural factory faces a new outbreak of the 'Dumfluenza' virus, and for Daeho, this could be his chance to get back at his arrogant boss lady.  (Source: Toomics)

title: The Last Golden Child
description: How many kicks does it take to smash the heart of a giant? Though she’s not a pure Child of Golden Light, Loxy must learn to channel the sun’s warmth and topple the towering titans that stand in the way of saving her sister. With bloodthirsty giants in her path, and the ruthless God of the Gods, Odin, in hot pursuit, Loxy pushes her body to its very limits in the hopes that she can become half as strong as the sister that now desperately needs her help.  (Source: WEBTOONS)

title: Stigma
description: Yejun, who had always believed he was a beta, found himself unexpectedly in the throes of heat, resulting in the birth of his child during college five years ago—a consequence of his complicated relationship with Do-yoon, his unrequited first love and friends-with-benefits partner. Returning to Korea, Yejun decides to bear the sole responsibility of raising his son in secrecy, keeping the truth hidden from Do-yoon. However, five years later, Yejun crosses paths with the child's father at his workplace—a long-overdue meeting that he had hoped to delay for as long as possible.    (Source: Lezhin US)

title: A Physical Education
description: Cha Jae-Hyeon’s had it easy for the past few years. His job as a PE teacher is a no-brainer, plus, he’s enjoying the more illicit perks that come with the job. However, his comfy lifestyle is brought into peril with the appearance of the deceptively soft-spoken school inspector, Lee Sun-Jin. Sun-Jin catches onto Jaehyun’s secret and uses it to get what he wants, which is…to do whatever he desires to Jae-Hyeon's body. Initially, Jae-Hyeon only feels humiliation, but humiliation quickly turns into something different. It’s a physical education like no other, one where excrutiating pain turns into inexorable pleasure. A new series from the writer of “Dine With a Vampire!"    (Source: Lezhin US)

title: Akdangyeongae Gildeurigi
description: The real world’s Lee Sung-Eum gets transported into the body of ‘Taeo Gaspell’, servant of the 8th tyrant Aira Phone Tarenterra, in the novel “Villain Hunters”. According to how the original novel goes, his fate is to be executed with the other evil ladies. However, since he knows everything that will happen in the novel, he decides to change his fate. Will he be able to tame those evil ladies and live through it till the end?  (Source: TOPTOON, translated)

title: Sweetie, Sweetie, Sweetie
description: After being hit by the fateful truck of transmigration, Jeong Yujin wakes up in the world of a fantasy novel as Lord Eugene Linweisen. Eugene’s main role may be to marry the story’s antagonist, Grand Duke Ivilaron, but Yujin has an even bigger job to fulfill: saving the world! But how is he supposed to achieve this feat when the Gods won’t even give him a simple status screen to help on his quest? Plus, what’s only supposed to be a loveless contract marriage seems to be turning into something more the longer Yujin stays with the supposed villain...!    (Source: Tappytoon)

title: Diana's Dearest Is the Family's Favorite
description: After traveling back in time, Lia finds herself in the orphanage where she spent her childhood just before Diana, the lost daughter of Duke Ellad, arrives. Remembering with regret how she once ignored Diana's mistreatment in the orphanage, she vows to protect her until her family finds her. The two grow close, and she sees her life unfolding in an unexpected way as she is welcomed into House Ellad with Diana. Will Lia find happiness in her second life, surrounded by love she's never known?  (Source: Tapas)

title: 100 Nyeon Mugeun Top Chef
description: The world’s greatest chef. First, second, third… and sixth life. The combined time I’ve spent on cooking is over 100 years.    “I can’t do this anymore.”     There is only one way to stop this endless reincarnation and regression. This time, I will definitely succeed.

title: A Bookstore Romance
description: A job at a mysterious bookstore.    (Source: Manta)

title: The Cutest Little Villainess
description: Lysian de Neif thought her sad life couldn't get any worse until she discovered she was kidnapped by the woman she called mother and never returned because her real family refused to save her. After learning the secret behind her birth, Lysian dies yet again, only to wake up in the past as her younger self. This time, she decides to go on a journey to find the ones who abandoned her and get revenge. But little does Lysian know that there is more to the truth and her kin than meets the eye…    (Source: Tapas)

title: Yeolhyeoryeoa
description: What is a sweet, soft-spoken girl (Ha Li Kang) to do when her brothers, having just learned fencing and martial arts, decide to test some moves out on her in order to "tame her" and make her into their "little slave?" She runs to her knightly friend (Te Hu Kang, not related to Ha Li) for protection, of course. However, what happens when, instead of comforting her, he tells her that she is a coward for running away like a puppy who needs constant protection? No, she does not break down and cry like a weak girl. Instead, she resolves to grow stronger. With rigorous training everyday, Ha Li goes from being a scared girl who cries for help to becoming the Jjang (boss of a gang) of the Doberman gang. However, events lead to Ha Li getting in an accident with a truck. Afterwards, she is reborn into the body of a beautiful, but weak, rich girl Aram Han.

title: Max Mojave Case Files
description: After witnessing a murder and being spared by the murderer as a child, Chris has been obsessed with playing detective, and researching crimes whenever he can. When Chris goes to college, he is assigned to the same room as Max. Chris finds Max fascinating because he is a lot similar to him. In order to fit in, Max decides to not push Chris away. As time goes by, the two start to open up to each other. Little did they know that the two of them had met each other before...    (Source: Tappytoon)

title: Welcome to Sylvia's Garden
description: The last thing Ji-Hyun remembers is looking up and then... BAM! She was reborn into a magical fantasy world as Sylvia - the empire's most powerful gardener. Everything was fine and dandy in her bustling shop until one day, "Terran" appears. Now, her days have gotten all the more interesting.   (Source: POCKET COMICS, edited)

title: Over the Top
description: Legend says that a being stronger than any other, a being feared by both angels and demons, a being completely OVER THE TOP (aka OTT) will be awakened in the near future. But our average high school boy Jae-Ik doesn’t care much for this legend... until he turns 19 and members of Heaven and Hell desperately attempt to win him over. Will our soon-to-be fearsome (and uninterested) OTT be able to pick a side? Well, we'll see once the dust of the recruiting war settles.  (Source: WEBTOON)     Note: Includes one extra chapter.

title: Doctor, Joseon Gada
description: "Is this really Joseon?! Even so, we must save lives!"   Baek Gang-Hyeok, South Korea's greatest genius surgeon. After touching a mysterious painting, he falls into Joseon. And of all times... right before the outbreak of the Imjin War!   (Source: Naver, translated)   Note: Includes one extra chapter.

title: Let Me Kidnap the Male Lead!
description: Following a carriage crash, our heroine recalls being reincarnated as Vivian in a novel called "The Bloody Flower." Poor Vivian now knows she's a side villain who dies after kidnapping the male lead. But if she doesn't kidnap him and guide him to the female lead, the demon will destroy the world anyway! Unfortunately, the male lead was only described as "handsome," and this world is crawling with handsome men. Thirty kidnappings later, all Vivian has is a handful of good-looking fans who loved their luxury hostage experience. If only someone could point her to the man she's looking for...!    (Source: Tappytoon)

title: Teacher Training
genres: Drama, Hentai, Romance, Slice of Life
description: It's always awkward seeing your former students in public. It's even more awkward when they show up at a club where you and your boys are prowling for some puss. Don't worry man, they're legal now. Just don't remember those high school memories...?    (Source: TOPTOON+)

title: Crossing the Line
description: Clive's best friend is quite the catch. After a little incident, things seem to grow apart, but his friend has a secret crush on him!  (Source: Toomics)

title: The Prenup
description: What’s a girl to do when she has sworn off love completely? Get married, of course! When Seung-Hui Wu is scarred after the end of a relationship eight years ago, she refuses to even consider dating. But when her father comes to her with a old contract he made, promising her to another man’s son, there’s not much she can do. Despite her circumstances, Seung-Hui is determined to get married on her own terms, which are all conveniently laid out... in a prenup!    (Source: WEBTOONS, edited)

title: Life with Mia
description: The start of a dangerous new life with my ex-girlfriend's sister.  (Source: Toomics)

title: Surviving as a Player
description: Trapped in the gaming world of Elix, Sehyun’s once mode of solace is now his prison. Here, one must conquer empires or be conquered. What’s more, dying in-game means dying in real life. Stuck in a perilous reality, Sehyun must save his empire while facing the effects of his corrupt past. To do so, he must regain the trust of his Grand Duke, Ruhak. But since he has so much resentment toward Sehyun, the only way to appease Ruhak is to succumb to his needs, no matter how immoral or carnal they are.    (Source: Tapas)

title: No Reason
description: Do Jung-hoon is powerful, ruthless, and…fond of a lovely face. So, when pretty-boy Yoo Hyunjae joins the Sung Jin gang, Jung-hoon finds it hard to believe the rumors about this supposedly dangerous and unpredictable newbie. Getting Hyunjae into his bed is as easy as promising a way to the top, but one year later, Hyunjae mysteriously vanishes. The only message he leaves is a cryptic “I will miss you, hyung.” Jung-hoon barely has time to think about the anxious feeling growing in his stomach when his gang is viciously attacked by an unknown enemy. But then, a voice comes from the shadows…   “Long time no see, hyung.”    (Source: Lezhin US)    Editor's Comment: This comic contains scenes of violence, bodily harm, and criminal conduct throughout. Reader discretion is advised<i/>    <I>Note: The chapter count includes nine chapter side story and four special chapters.

title: The Password Is 002!
description: The night before Su-Jeong plans to confess her feelings for Do-Jin, she runs into him on the street and is devastated to find out that he doesn't even know her name. Too afraid to face him in class the next day, Su-Jeong hides in the storage locker, where she meets Do-Jin's younger brother Jae-Yun. With Jae-Yun's help, will she able to win Do-Jin's heart?    (Source: WEBTOON, edited)   Note: Includes four extra chapters.

title: The Dungeon's Dying S-Class Lady
description: Top S-class hunter Sin Yu-Ri helps protect Korea from the dungeons that have been wreaking havoc. And when all the hunters refuse to take on the "I've Possessed the Body of a Weak and Terminally Ill Noble Lady" dungeon, Yu-Ri and her team head inside to challenge it. But while her comrades become an emperor, a pope, and a master of the magicians' tower, she becomes a dying noble lady! They have one year to prevent the destruction of the continent, but can she help with this frail body of hers?!    (Source: Tapas, edited)   Note: Includes a prologue.

title: Countdown to Graduation
description: The end is in sight! With three months left till graduation, Muyoung is on the high-school home straight. And it’s gone pretty well! He’s student body president, gets good grades, and has never strayed from the straight and narrow. Then out of the blue, the mysterious transfer student, Chanhee, confesses his feelings to him! Muyoung is so taken aback that he barely manages to turn him down… But with 92 days left until graduation, there’s still plenty of time for love to blossom!    (Source: Lezhin)

title: Narakarana
description: The male with the devil's name, Amon. In order to protect himself and the people around him, to gain back his memories, and in order to escape from hell, he must fight. The enemies that will come after him after having woken up from the dead, and the encounters with women that will leave him breathless. And of course, "Good luck this time around oppa♡" But wait, The condition of hell is...?!  (Source: Lezhin, translated)   Note: Chapter count includes a prologue.

title: Vivarium
description:
Yoo Heesung is…not a nice person, to say the least. Arrogant, selfish, and criminally lacking in loyalty. So when he decides to steal from his childhood friend, their years of history don’t really weigh upon his mind. Until he wakes up, head pounding, tied to the bed of a dingy room?! Choi Jaeyeon knows just how awful Heesung can be, and is determined to teach him a lesson he will never forget. (Source: Lezhin US)

Note: Chapter count includes an epilogue, 6 side story chapters, and a Christmas extra.

title: Hero of All Trades
description: Gang-In Na wakes up in the year 2024 in the middle of South Korea with no memory of where or who he is. Upon hearing a voice that sounds strangely familiar, he comes face to face with a robot named ACE (Autonomous Combat Entity), who informs him that he was once part of the Earth Federation Forces in the year 2082 and possesses a wide array of skills. Gang-In decides to join forces with ACE to recover his lost memories and adapt to life on Earth, but the two look to be in for a bumpy ride.  (Source: WEBTOON)

title: Red And Mad
description:
Lee Yeju can escape death by walking through a "door" leading to the near future. But unfortunately, this time, the door she walks through drops her a thousand years later. To make matters worse, she runs into a magical madman who wants to destroy all humans. She gets away by going through the door again, but strangely, it keeps leading her right back to him. It seems like the only way for her to survive is to follow this man, but can Yeju prove to him that there's still hope for humanity?

(Source: Tapas)

title: Alien in My Wardrobe
description: "Hey you, Livestock, I need a subject for my alien probe" are not words Haesung expected to ever hear. He spends his days spacing out, hopelessly fantasizing about being tied up by his office crush, Shiwon. But his secret BDSM fantasies come to life as a brutally sexy alien crash-lands on Earth and ropes in Haesung as his research subject (and roommate). Things heat up when Haesung submits to the experiment—in exchange for sexual favors that are out of this world!    (Source: Tapas)

title: The Open Chat
description: Taeyang doesn’t believe in love—not after the wounds left by his past relationships. Ha Hyeon, a sultry and enigmatic adult webtoon artist, has spent her life dodging judgment and misconceptions about her work. When fate throws them together in an open chatroom meet-up, the chemistry is undeniable, and by the end of the night, they find themselves tangled in heated passion. But secrets don’t stay hidden for long. Ha Hyeon’s irresistible allure catches the attention of the entire chatroom, and soon, whispers spread. Not all curiosity is innocent—some have dangerous intentions. As intrigue and obsession begin to swirl, Taeyang realizes their encounter was anything but a one-time affair.  (Source: Lezhin US)

title: Dolsoe Jeon
description: ‘Dolsoe’, a trusted servant known for his unusual physique and loyal nature, witnesses a scene late at night that he absolutely shouldn’t have, involving him in a situation far beyond his control…!   “Ma’am, would it be okay if I acted boldly once more?”  (Source: TOPTOON, translated)

title: Into the Horizon
description:
Han-Joo Yeo, a reserved and introverted student, has been hopelessly in love with the most popular guy in college, Chan-Young Choi. Despite the unrequited love and constant feelings of regret and humiliation, Han-Joo finds himself unable to end the relationship. But when his father remarries and introduces a stepbrother, Ji-Hyun Yoo, into the mix, strange things start to happen. Nobody seems to notice the tall and handsome stepbrother, and soon, things begin to take an unexpected turn.

(Source: Tapas)

title: Electrifying Confession
description: Hari Jeon is a high school student with a heart condition. One day, she is struck by a curse that causes her to zap everything and everyone around her whenever her heart races for Jeong-won, her secret crush. Yura Baek, a brash and sharp-tongued classmate who mysteriously knows about her curse, offers her a deal—he’ll help her keep it under control if she lets him use it. Can Hari find the courage to confess her feelings to her crush? Or will she stay in the safe zone of friendship? Get ready for Hari’s electrifying first love story!     (Source: WEBTOON)

title: The Bad Son
description: Blood ties bind, but vengeance severs, and in the heart of a heartless man, a fire ignites. Pil-Du Kang, a prosecutor born into a legacy of corruption, uncovers his family's harrowing involvement in his mother’s murder. Now, a chilling vendetta awakens the monster within, drawing out the primordial urge he has long sought to contain. Will he rely on the law to be his ally on this treacherous path, or will he become the judge, jury, and executioner?  (Source: WEBTOON)

title: Yojeongeul Asimnikka
description: Eun-Oh is always alone because of his peculiar ability to see fairies. But one day, Jae-Hwi, a transfer student, comes up to Eun-Oh without hesitation! "When I'm with you, I feel good," he said, shaking Eun-Oh's heart.    (Source: Lezhin, translated)     Note: Chapter count includes three extra chapters.

title: Nice Day for Camping
description: Six months into their marriage, Yeong-Su can't get any sex as his wife is too busy with work. One day, they decide to go out camping to relieve some stress, and to maybe address their marital troubles. Yeong-Su gets more than he bargained for when another woman comes into the picture!  (Source: TOPTOON+)

title: Her Secret Account
description: Lois, an ordinary girl, has a secret. A secret she's not embarrassed about, but one she wants no one to find out about...  (Source: Toomics)

title: The 9th Class Swordmaster: Blade of Truth
description: Adopted by the powerful Macgovern family after the death of his entire tribe, Karyl becomes the empire's greatest swordmaster who leads his men to victory in the Oracle War. But on the final battlefield, Emperor Olivurn betrays him and dooms the nation. Determined to find the cause of this treachery, Karyl travels back in time and commits himself to learning skills he never had in order to uncover the truth. Will he succeed? Or will Olivurn's trickery outsmart him again?    (Source: Tapas)

title: Written in the Stars
description: Joo-Hyuk has spent a lifetime at the bottom of the societal food chain as a recessive alpha. That hasn’t stopped him from maintaining a peculiar relationship with the dominant omega at the top of the food chain, Yoo-Sung. For ten years, Joo-Hyuk finds himself longing for Yoo-Sung, who only comes to him when he needs to hide away from the world for a night. After spending ten years as Yoo-sung’s occasional sanctuary, Joo-Hyuk, sick of his one-sided pining, puts an end to their arrangement. But are they really destined to end there? Or is there something written in the stars for them?    (Source: Lezhin US)   Note: Includes ten extra chapters.

title: Will You Be My Male Lead?
description: Ah-Rah Shin was secretly in love with Seung-Woo Han, her childhood friend. Unable to express her feelings, she wrote a novel, molded the male lead after him, and confessed her love in the pages. He never read it, but everyone else did, and her first novel was a hit! Now a famous web novelist, Ah-Rah struggles to write her second book without a muse until she meets Joo-Won Cha. Joo-Won is the ideal male lead. He's handsome, professional, and very different from her first male lead! There's only one issue... he's the CEO of her publishing company!  (Source: Tapas)

title: My Exes Fell for Me
description:
How awkward would it be to reunite with not one but two of your ex-boyfriends, and at the workplace nonetheless? When Nabom Han comes face-to-face with her unforgettable first love, Chajun, and her ex-boyfriend she hoped she’d never see again, Tae-o, she must learn to navigate the relationships from her past while ensuring the success of her father’s struggling manufacturing business. They say you should never mix business with pleasure, but will Nabom be able to resist the temptation?

(Source: WEBTOON)

title: B-geup Guide
description: A dizzying office love affair between an S-class esper and a B-class guide! Lee Jaeha, a B-class guide, had an office relationship with an esper at the same center for 3 years, but was recently done wrong. Despite breaking up with his lover, he finds himself forced to still guide him, and he applies for a transfer to a high-risk area. Surrounded by all kinds of rumors and stares, all he wants is a quiet and peaceful work life in the new center! However, Jaeha takes on the task of guiding Do Jiyoon, an S-class esper, on the verge of a rampage, and Jaeha’s work life is getting farther away from peaceful…!    (Source: Ridibooks, translated)

title: The Fish I Loved
description: Yana Jeong, a typical girl, runs into a strange man who’s out of breath during one of her part-time jobs. Little did she know that this was Kai Shim, the son of the CEO of a large jewelry corporation called Inoroo, who also happens to be a merman. Yana coincidentally runs in Kai again when she ends up working as a waitress at his birthday party, where a series of accidents lead to the two of them meeting each other again. Will Yana be able to keep up with these unexpected events happening one after another?  (Source: WEBTOON)

title: Saegin Sarang
description: If you make tiny cuts on the skin and apply ink into that area... it becomes a tattoo - a lasting mark that won't disappear even after the wounds heal. Isn't love similar?     (Source: BOMTOON, translated)

title: 30 Minutes With You
description: Seong-Eun has always walked home alone from Galaxy Academy... that is until she met Gu-Bong! Now, the two of them spend 30 minutes walking home together once a week. This 30-minute walk home becomes an exciting time for both of them as their friendship grows... into a budding romance?    (Source: WEBTOONS, edited)

title: She's Driving Me Crazy
description: College student Juwon has a hot girlfriend and everything else a guy could ask for. But when his childhood best friend cum first love, Nahee, moves into his boarding house and joins his college after years of no contact, Juwon finds himself in a sticky situation. Especially when she brings up the promise he made to her as a teenager: to let her, an aspiring artist, draw his hard on. Of course, Juwon tries to refuse, but Nahee is not one to be swayed by reason, and a man can hardly go back on his word, right? But things soon start getting stickier before Juwon realizes what’s happening…  (Source: Lezhin X)

title: Sineul Jugineun Bangbeop
description: In an era where people no longer believe, this will be the gods' final legend.    (Source: Naver Series, translated)

title: Moojokja
description: Lim Hwa-Pyeong. Just like his name, he was a man who wanted to live a normal life. Everything he achieved was destroyed.    [ Your love has become hate for me.]    You shouldn’t have messed with me. You should have just let me live a quiet life.    ( Source: Kakaopage, translated )

title: Lady Long Legs
description: Ji Hyunwoo gets a chance to turn his life around after signing a contract with a rich and powerful woman! But why does it feel like everyone wants a piece of me...?!    (Source: Toomics)   (Note: Chapter count includes a prologue)

title: Viola Tames the Duke
description: I did wish upon a mysterious painting to live a new life, but I didn't think that'd mean becoming Viola, a villain bound to die for copying her friend Robina's art and stealing her lovers! Still, I've got one good chance at survival if I stay away from Robina's men and use a different art style... if not for the fact that Robina now wants me to seduce Duke Depheloa, the male lead who's destined to kill me! But can I still turn this story around and get the happy ending Viola never had?    (Source: Tapas)

title: With You Once Again
genres: Drama, Hentai, Romance, Slice of Life
description: “I missed you so much, and I want to feel every part of you"     I thought I would be together with my first love forever, but I was wrong... Now I'm with her again after so many years, and she hasn't changed at all!    "Stay with me! I can't lose you again!"    (Source: DAYcomics)

title: Wake Up Deadman
description: Saving the life of the girl he loves, Sahu incidentally turns into a zombie. And now he's trying to survive in a stone jungle, believing that one day he will sing for the world.

title: Well Done
description: Sangwoo Yoon was climbing up the corporate ladder until he got caught sleeping with his boss’s daughter. Two years later, he’s back at the bottom of another soulless gig when he stumbles upon the famous CEO Jaehyun Han in a…compromising position. Now, Jaehyun wants Sangwoo to work under him. Is this the career defining break he’s been looking for, or a trap?    (Source: Tapas)

title: Bugbu Gongjagnim-eul Yuhoghagessseubnida
description: Selena, the top star that had the entire world's attention, was suddenly warped to Northern Duke's land during an accident while filming.Kalcion, the Northern Duke that saved her from the infernal beasts, offers Selena a chance to go back home in return for collecting information in various social circles by pretending to be his lover. Selena quickly accepts Kalcion's offer, but... There was a critical problem. The Northern Duke's acting skills are horrible! And thus the contractual relationship between the two started. Will Kalcion's acting skill improve first, or will he start to have true feelings for Selena instead?

title: WEAKNESS
description: She has a good personality, is popular, and has a lot of money: Gu Do-Yeon, the daughter of the perfect G company president. However, Do-Yeon's step-sister Gu Yi-Seo is just unlucky and annoying. Who in the world is perfect? In the end, Yi-Seo secretly hides in an office to dig up Do-Yeon's weakness. There, she discovers a completely different side to the Do-Yeon she knew.    (Lezhin, translated)    Note:   - Chapter count includes a prologue.  - Part of Lezhin's Gwanggong Collection (광공단편선). A gwanggong (광공, hanja: 狂攻) character is obsessed with the object of their desire, similar to the Japanese "yandere". Scanlations have erroneously translated this to "GwangGong Apartment/Industrial Complex", which may have caused confusion.

title: The Archduchess's Loyal Shapeshifter
description: The empire's archduchess Rosalin has a mysterious new lover, Fenrir, a lowborn shape-shifting anthromorph. However, in a world that separates them by class, their love didn’t bloom easily. Turning a blind eye to the injustices of the empire, Rosalin showed no interest in anyone but herself, and having never known his parents or even his own name, Fenrir trusted no one. In a society full of prejudice and hate for their love, can this unlikely couple overcome the odds against them?     (Source: Tapas)

title: How to Raise a Nine-Tailed Fox
description: As captain of the holy knights, Celia excels at protecting the country from monsters. So, when a priestess tasks her with raising a baby nine-tailed fox, Celia is hesitant but does her best to help the creature. Despite the abuse he has endured from other humans, she manages to gain some of his trust and names him Rahn. They start getting along, but the crafty fox is always looking for a way to escape. Can Celia raise Rahn until he's an adult, or will this sly fox pull one over his holy knight?    (Source: Tapas)

title: The Events of Romeo's Household
description: O Romeo, Romeo! Where art thou, Romeo? Seriously, where the heck is he?! Secluded in his mansion, Romeo and his brilliant mind tug at the strings of power, unraveling the city’s plots and mysteries. His loyal servants have guarded his secrets closely, but when someone new enters the household, they begin to question this self-inflicted isolation. Meanwhile, a wicked web looms large, beckoning Romeo to it. Will these threats thrust him back onto the public stage and bring dark truths to light?    (Source: Tapas)

title: Chasing Lilies
description: Hwa-Won knows better than to pick things off the street, even if it is just an innocent-looking USB. In an effort to find the owner, Hwa-Won discovers that the USB belongs to her favorite GL writer, Kim Yuri, and has unreleased chapters of the latter’s new sequel! As a zealous fan, Hwa-won can hardly resist herself from devouring the chapters in one setting. However, she seems to have forgotten that curiosity is not just hazardous to cats! Because the USB doesn’t just contain the chapters to the sequel. It also contains things that leave Hwa-Won upset. Now Hwa-Won needs answers and Kim Yuri’s the only one who has them. But Kim Yuri is a staunch recluse who refuses to leave her house! How is Hwa-Won to meet her?! Soon, online meets offline, fiction meets reality and as the pages turn, it is no longer Hwa-Won doing the chasing!    (Source: Lezhin US, edited)

title: The Boss's Wife
description: My boss is thoughtful, and his wife is gentle and beautiful, but I'm committing embezzlement under their noses. While doing so, I ended up sleeping with my boss's wife against my will.   "D-Do you really think he'll like this?"  (Source: DAYcomics)

title: The Doomed House's Contract Daughter
description: After dying in an experiment, Anisha wakes up in the past at the orphanage where she was sold to a mad scientist. However, things take a different path when she is adopted by Duke Aubrey to replace his late daughter, Annette. Though having to live as someone else, she decides to enjoy her new freedom while plotting revenge on the scientist. But as she starts to recall facts unknown in her former life, Anisha wonders if it's a side effect of the experiments or if her past holds deeper secrets…    (Source: Tapas)

title: Beast's Flower
description: Beware the witch in the forest for she may curse you with her stench! So everyone says about Lyla, who was abandoned by her family and cast away to a cabin deep in the woods for being born with a putrid odor. Though she’s spent her entire life alone, everything changes the night Viorst comes knocking at her door. When asked why he isn’t disgusted by her, he claims it’s because he lacks the ability to smell. Little does Lyla know that her new visitor is actually a hungry beast that was lured in by her absolutely irresistible scent...    (Source: Tappytoon)

title: My Housemate
description: When it comes to employment, Jinwon’s suffered a string of bad luck. So at 29 years old, he’s unemployed and studying again. Lucky for him, his sister’s just married into an elite (read: super rich) family, and she’s offered him part-time work as a housekeeper for her husband’s son. The job pays well, and the hours give him time to study. But it isn’t long before Jinwon discovers that this arrangement with his nephew will involve more than just housekeeping...  (Source: Lezhin)

title: Ranju's Race to Romance
description: Ranju has had a massive crush on Jiha, the school’s most popular girl, with her angelic beauty and kind nature. But when Ranju hears the shocking news that Jiha is going on a group date, she’s thrown into a panic. Determined not to let her chance slip away, Ranju hatches a bold plan to win Jiha’s heart before anyone else can. Will Ranju’s daring moves lead to the romance of her dreams, or will she get stopped on her way to the finish line?  (Source: Lezhin US)

title: Let's Kill Your Husband
description: So should we kill your husband? Your shaky demeanor, the bruises on your face... It killed me to see how you'd changed after getting married. Maybe we should just kill your husband. But how? Will our lives ever be the same again? Fate must have been on our side, because everything went smoother than expected. (Source: Manta) Note: This series contains upsetting contents such as murder and domestic abuse. Viewer discretion is advised.

title: Sonagi
description: Little Geuroo was curious about him. That boy from next door who asked him a strange question. The boy, Lee Garam, who always avoided him even though all Geuroo wanted was to get close to him. But before Geuroo could even confess, Garam disappeared in thin air, leaving only clusters of blue light behind. And then, one summer, he appeared in front of Geuroo as if nothing happened...?    (Source: Bomtoon, translated)    Note: Part of Kidari Entertainment's "Yeoreumdanpyeonseon: Some in Summer (~키다리이엔티 여름단편선~ 썸인썸머, Kidari Entertainment Summer Short Story Collection: Some in Summer)"

title: Holding You Close
description: After three failed marriages, Archduke Theo de Phoenix has long accepted that love simply isn’t in the cards for him. After all, who could love a war-hardened monster like him? So when his fourth bride arrives, he greets her covered in blood, gives her a shabby attic for a room, and keeps his distance. Surely, this one will run too. But Yuelina is not like the others. To Theo’s disbelief, she welcomes his presence and fills his cold world with warmth and light. As the walls around his heart begin to thaw, will Theo finally allow himself to love?  (Source: WEBTOON)

title: Talent Agent and the Threads of Fate
description: Ever since former screenwriter, Injoon Kim, was nearly taken to the underworld by mistake, he has been able to see Threads of Fate—white where fortune awaits, and black where misfortune looms. This newfound ability quickly proves itself useful as Injoon becomes a manager in the entertainment industry and successfully saves the actress, Hye-ryung Yun, from a fatal accident. Will Injoon be able to use these Threads to his advantage and bring Hye-ryung to stardom?  (Source: Tapas)

title: Poolside Playtime
description: Teaching at a swimming pool frequented by ultra sexy women ought to be the ultimate dream job, but for glorified litter-picker Yoo Myungjin, it isn’t quite what he’d expected. Everything begins to change, however, when he gets his first taste of hands-on teaching with the oh-so-stunning Yura, and not long after that he’s approached with a deal that’s too tantalizing to refuse. Is this finally his chance to get a taste of real teaching, and all the perks that come with it? A game of love and lust is officially underway, but just what will go on beneath the waves?  (Source: Lezhin X)

title: Let's Go, ASMR!
description: Soohyun, who runs a popular ASMR channel, scouts some new recruits to help him film and produce videos. There’s Joonhyuk, an ASMR fan, Hyesoo, who has an amazing voice (but who only joins because he’s got a huge crush on Joonhyuk), and Chanyoung, who joins to protect (?) Joonhyuk from Hyesoo. From the creator of “Voice of Love” comes a new BL series full of budding romance and tingles!    (Source: Lezhin)

title: The Wanderer
description: The wandering soul tries to find himself in the battlefield with only one reason to live.     (Source: Toomics)

title: High School Queen
description: Cheongha Kim, a legendary swordswoman from the Joseon era, awakens centuries later in the body of Dajin Park, a quiet high school student. Armed with deadly combat skills, Cheongha must face school bullies, navigate the chaos of modern-day life, and find her place in a world far different from her own. The halls of Juwon High are about to meet a warrior unlike any they’ve seen before.    (Source: WEBTOON)

title: As If Love Doesn't Exist
description: Si-Yeon had the rug pulled out from under her when she realized that everything in her life was a lie-- her parents are not her real parents, her fiancé not really her fiancé, and her cousin Eun-Hye is actually the birth daughter of this household. Si-Yeon is resigned to her misfortunes until Eun-Hye reveals to Si-Yeon that all of this was planned and orchestrated. Swallowing her tears of anguish, Si-Yeon makes a fateful wish that brings her 10 years into the past where she may be able to change everything... or can she?    (Source: WEBTOONS, edited)

title: Akdangman Chwigeupamnida
description: Note: Promotional prologue for the homonym novel.

title: Majunge Maneun Saekmada
genres: Action, Adventure, Drama, Fantasy, Hentai, Romance
description: "Women should only cry in bed."   Be it the orthodox faction, the unorthodox faction, or a member of the imperial family, the lustful demon, Cheon Ji-Jong, fucked them all until he was killed during the Demonic Cult Extermination. However, 10 years after the incident, the lustful demon returns and vows to fuck every woman in the Murim!  (Source: TOPTOON, translated)

title: Pinocchio
description: Choi Ha-Ram, your typical high schooler, decides to buy a necklace on a whim, however, unknown to both her and the ghost of Yu Ga-On, whoever wears it is able to see Yu Ga-On, who seems to have no recollection of his past. What are the circumstances behind his death? What is his connection to the necklace? And just who is the mysterious yet familiar new neighbor of hers?

title: The Rogue Producer Survives as an Idol
description: Seo Hoyoon, the genius producer of a popular idol survival show, is infamous for his sharp tongue and coldheartedness. Cursed by a trainee for it, he wakes up as a member of a flop idol group called "The Dawn." To avoid being stuck in this parallel world forever, Hoyoon must make his group top-tier... but with the competitive industry and challenging tasks, it won't be easy. With his wits, know-how, and a little help from those around him, will this producer-turned-idol make it big?  (Source: Tapas)

title: Mistaken as the Monster Duke's Wife
description: When Lia Dellis comes across a dying man in need of help, she never could have imagined a curse would drive him to attack her. That's why she hits him over the head with a rock! Feeling guilty, Lia nurses him back to health only to realize that he's Dillian Synaize, the ruthless monster duke. To make matters worse, Dillian has lost all his memories and inexplicably thinks Lia is his wife. Can Lia escape the grasp of this so-called monster before he remembers that she was the one who hit him?    (Source: Tapas)

title: The Empress' Lipstick
description: Jae-In is a typical middle school girl obsessed with beauty and makeup and wishes to become a makeup artist. One day, she finds a mysterious lipstick by chance, which leads to the opening of a mysterious portal that warps her to a different dimension. When she wakes up the next moment, she realizes she has become a princess of a different world! Stuck in this mysterious world, will Jae-In be able to find a way out?
