Or better yet, will she be able to pursue her passion for beauty and live the life she could never live before?     (Source: WEBTOONS, edited)

title: You Are My First
description: He is living the happiest life on campus with his perfect girlfriend, Bom. But when his ex-girlfriend and childhood friend comes in, things start getting out of control!   "But I have a girlfriend!!"   Will be able to save his current relationship?  (Source: DAYcomics)   Note: Includes two extra chapters.

title: PHONE SEX
genres: Drama, Hentai, Romance, Slice of Life
description: "I definitely heard her voice before..."  WOO-SUNG relieves the stress from work calling phone sex hotlines. One day, he goes on a blind date and meets the woman of his dreams. However he soon realizes that his date's voice sounds very familiar..  (Source: TOPTOON+)

title: Wonna Do It?!
description: Following an uncomfortable run-in at a bar, Won wakes up at a hotel to find a strange man with crazy eyes fondling him under the sheets. Despite his initial disgust, Won is too easily provoked by the wacko's onslaught of snarky comments, and is soon forced back into bed for a chance to prove himself...!    (Source: Lezhin US)     Note: Chapter count includes a prologue.

title: Escape Devildom
description: Past the grey desert and across the ocean lay the demon lands. Bloodthirsty and savage, they've waged war with the humans since anyone can remember. And seated on his throne, behind castle walls and royal guards, sits the demon king. At least, that's what everyone thinks. And if Merlin ever wants to see his brother again, he'd better make sure everyone goes on believing he's the demon king. Otherwise, who knows what the demons will do if they realize a human has been masquerading as their king?     (Source: Lezhin US)

title: TAKE OFF
description: Jaekyung, who has a hard time forming deep relationships with people, takes charge of the remodeling project for an amusement park and hotel enterprise. While taking a look around the park to gain a better understanding for the project, he comes across lighthearted Taehee who is dressed as a bear mascot, and is drawn to him despite not wanting to be. Taehee approaches the typically detached Jaekyung, and proposes a no-strings-attached relationship for the two to enjoy. However...  (Source: BomToon, translated)

title: Race to Steal the Emperor's Heart
description: Ra Hyeon just got the exciting news that she's passed the Bar Exam and is headed to law school. But what should've been one of the best days of her life turns out to be the worst as the shock causes her to have a heart attack and die. As she pleads for her life in her final moments, she is given one last chance to evade death. All she has to do is live as Daphne Kerrece, the daughter of a noble household, and win the heart of her new husband, the emperor. But with a looming deadline, a husband who's already cast away four brides before her, and many hoping to see her fail, this won't be as easy as it sounds. And, when all is said and done, is it even what Ra Hyeon really wants?    (Source: Tapas)

title: I'll Choose My Husband
description: Adele Leopold has perished at the hand of the emperor three times now. As soon as her fourth life begins, she vows she won't go down the same path again. Filled with vengeance, Adele starts her new life with a plan to get back at those who wronged her. In all her lives, the one thing in common is that emperor wants her married into his family. This time, Adele will choose her husband and get the revenge she has been waiting for. But the person she decides to marry is no one anyone expected...    (Source: Tapas)

title: The Roommate Agreement
description: Lately, Yeji's life has been less up and more down. She's barely making ends meet with a dead end part-time job, school's been rough, and her roommate is the worst. Moving in with an old friend just meant that after a year, she had one less friend. Things quickly take a turn when her roommate/former-friend/"frenemy" announces she'll be moving out. Too bad Yeji's new roommate wasn't exactly what she was hoping for.    (Source: Lezhin)

title: Steamy Studies
description: How do you keep from falling asleep during math class? Well, fall in love with your teacher of course! That’s exactly what’s happened to the school stud, Subin. He’s a guy who could have any girl he wants but Ms. Lee is the one he’s after. However, because of a big misunderstanding, he’s suddenly expelled from school and that seems to be the end of that. But years later, pulled by both guilt and curiosity, Ms. Lee finds Subin once again. She wants to make things right and finally get closure on the past. But seeing each other in person again seems to reignite a spark within them... Will what was once forbidden become the start of something steamy…?  (Source: Lezhin X)

title: Wrong Night Stand
description: What does it take for a guy to get laid, you ask? Well, a hell of a lot of tries is the answer. Lee Si-Hyeon is a 21-year-old virgin who has been in the bottom rungs when it comes to getting laid—and it’s not the kind of bottom he aspires to be. After four failed attempts at having sex, Si-Hyeon’s fifth attempt is finally successful. Kind of. He wakes up in bed with his former-childhood-best-friend, present-arch-nemesis, Han Baek-Kyung. Baek-Kyung may not have been the top of Si-Hyeon’s list of eligible boys, but he could be the top Si-Hyeon needs to undo the curse on his sex life.    (Source: Lezhin US)

title: Welcome to the Big City
description: Gildong is a country boy that needs some fresh inspiration. He has aspirations of becoming a famous comic artist but he wants to draw women and the only ones he knows are his mom and grandma. He has a solution in mind, however. Move to Seoul, the land of opportunity, where voluptuous and scantily clad “inspiration” abounds! No more old ladies and nights alone. A new life awaits the bright-eyed and bushy-tailed pushover from the boonies when he starts fresh in the big city!  (Source: Lezhin X)

title: Monochrome Diary
description: Yoo-Joon is a good boy. That's why he was destined to fall head-over-heels for the handsome and charismatic Ji-Ho. When Ji-Ho says "Jump," Yoo-Joon asks "How high?" And as the pair become more inseparable by the day, they solidify their master-dog dynamic. But little do they know, each boy is harboring his own dark secret. Ji-Ho, who suffers from severe apathy resulting from childhood trauma, is using Yoo-Joon as an expendable toy, and Yoo-Joon is intensely and obsessively in love with Ji-Ho. Despite that, can the two boys successfully remove each other's masks and break the cycle of abuse?  (Source: Tappytoon)

title: Daily Witch
description: The current world no longer has any need of special powers. Thus, witches have lost their value and are not that different from humans. That's why Misty lives a normal life with her fellow witches, Eve and Baba Yaga, while earning a living as a BL genre comic artist. One day, a mysterious group kidnaps Misty and all of a sudden their once normal life turns "abnormal!"  (Source: Lezhin US)   Note: Includes two extra chapters.

title: Isanghago Areumdaun
description: The secret behind the goblin's wife who appears once every one thousand years....

title: Saving a Mercenary Unit from Bankruptcy
description: Ji-Hyeon, a business consultant from Korea, ends up stranded in another world. She is rescued by the members of the Nio Mercenary Corps, only to find out that the unit is on the verge of bankruptcy. A passionate professional, Ji-Hyeon cannot ignore their dismal financial state. To help the corps, and in hopes of returning home, she volunteers to serve as the corps’s financial officer. Turning around a struggling mercenary corps is no easy feat, but Ji-Hyeon and the corps members stick together through thick and thin. Her chance of going back home, however, remains elusive.    (Source: WEBTOONS, edited)

title: Once a Hero
description: "Had he been a hero in his past life or something...?" "That's right. I once rescued this nation from destruction." When Ja-In is kidnapped due to his family's massive debt, Un-Jo happens to walk by and save him from his kidnappers. From that day onwards, Ja-In's life is never the same... (Source: WEBTOONS)

title: Yuworui Bada
description: Busan, 1936. Yeon Jeong lives her life without fitting in anywhere, until she meets a mermaid by fate. The mermaid tells her that she has come to pick her up as promised, and asks her to follow her to the place where eternal happiness lies.   "Can I be happy there at last, living as myself?   (Source: Bomtoon, translated)

title: Devil's Knight
description: Risbel Benedane is a top student at the paladin academy, Deravilael. He’s smart, agile, and hard-working. Everything was going well until Kendon swooped in and took his top spot. Risbel, as the son of the deputy commander of the paladins, cannot just sit there and pretend everything is fine. He summons the mare to go into Kendon’s dreams and mess with his mind. The mare accepts Risbel’s offer in return for his vitality. The plan seemed perfect. But wait, why is Kendon looking at me like that? Is he…blushing?    (Source: Lezhin)

title: Yongbyeong Maluhan
description: Mercenary Maruhan... the man who roams the darkness in the time of humanity's doom!   In the ancient era of the super-continent, where no border exists between the East and the West -- the race of Demonic Beasts begins an invasion against the human race, breaking the mutual non-aggression pact! And as humanity takes to the road to seek refuge, some gather to form the ultimate army for an attempt to kill King Rhode, the Chief of the Demonic Beasts... The intense story of one certain mercenary starts there!!

title: A Kiss to the Prince
description: Everyone always says to set high goals for oneself. Sei-Ann, an orphaned young lady who was raised in the care of a noblewoman, does just that when she decides she’ll become the prince’s bride. With above average looks and ambitions that would rival that of a king, Sei-Ann is determined to leave her social status behind and become the wife of the next Crown Prince. Ever since she was a child, she knew that she was somehow special and was meant to go places. And even if it meant enduring a marriage with the most hideous looking prince, she feels it would be a small price to pay to claim her fate as the First Lady of the kingdom.

title: Raising a Sacrifice
description: "It seems I must kill you, Your Grace."   Inas has always been Duke Nigel Montestein's most faithful knight. But when Nigel is betrayed and killed by Inas, he wakes up a year before his supposed death. Nigel's quick to realize this isn't a mere case of time travel however, and the only one who has answers is the man who betrayed him!    (Source: Manta)

title: Agi Hwanghunim
description: The child of a prophecy is born to save the world. "I need to get married to save people...? I'll do the marriage!" The emperor is a young and innocent boy. But... My father interfered with my marriage! "I can't give you my daughter! She will not be becoming empress." "Is my sister just a toy to you?" And my brother too! Will I be able to save the world? Note: This is a one-shot promotional manhwa for the novel of the same name.

title: For Stella
description: The romance between the heroine who must die to go back and the hero who returns to stop her death Hero Arcane and Dana who is fated to die for heroine Stella. She must most faithfully live and die in order to go back to her own reality. But, why would the hero be so obsessed with me?! Also, is it just me or is it actually going way off the track...?! "I will never let you die because of me again, Dana!"    (Source: Lezhin)

title: Beware the Ides of March
description:
Ex-convict Park Mok-Hwa wants nothing more than to keep his head low and stay out of anything that has to do with his past. However, his new-found tranquility as a florist is shattered by the appearance of Kim Nak-won, corrupt cop and unabashed hedonist. Nak-Won is sure that Mok-Hwa’s the key to cracking an important case, and he’ll do anything to get the taciturn man to talk. The best way to make someone confess is to cause them pain, and Nak-Won thinks he knows just what’ll hurt Mok-Hwa the most. But despite Nak-Won’s best efforts, Mok-Hwa continues to stay silent. It’s not often that life doesn’t go the way Nak-Won wants it to, so his obsession with Mok-Hwa only grows stronger...

(Source: Lezhin US)

title: No Goddess, No!
description: Yoon Heeji is serving as the nation’s current goddess, granting wishes to those that pray to her. But being a goddess isn’t all it’s cracked up to be: there’s paparazzi, constant criticisms from the public, and, well... granting wishes isn’t so easy, either. As Heeji soon discovers, sometimes satisfying a wish client means having to go further than you ever planned...   (Source: Lezhin US)

title: I Became the Duke’s Male Servant
description: In the original story, Roselia was a maid in the duke’s household, used as a mere pawn in his schemes before being executed by the crown prince after being framed as a traitor. But this Roselia is different. The heroine, now in the body of the doomed maid from the novel and fully aware of how the story ends, is determined to change Roselia’s fate—disguising herself as a man to avoid the duke’s attention. But wait… why is she still being taken?! Somehow, Roselia still ends up in the duke’s estate—not as a maid, but as a manservant!    (Source: WEBTOONS)

title: Age of Innocence
description: The world has lost its innocence, and it seems that I am the only one who hasn't... Can you resist the temptation of young, hot college girls?  (Source: TOPTOON+)

title: This Wolf Won't Bite
description: Lucy Leopardi has no friends. But of course she doesn’t—she’s a lamb born into a family of lions! Lonely, insecure, and desperate for friendship, Lucy can’t wait to make her first friend. One fateful night on a ballroom balcony, she meets Roman, a charming, young dog with whom she makes an instant connection. But when his association with the infamous House of Baskerville comes to light, will their newfound friendship blossom, or will dishonesty bite into their budding relationship?    (Source: Tapas)   Note: Chapter count includes 20 side story chapters.

title: Sextealer
description: Having lost all his savings to a female con-artist, Han Taeil prepares to commit suicide. At that point, a mysterious man appears and extends a contract that takes Han Taeil back to his past. Given this seemingly golden opportunity, Taeil is excited to rectify his past. What he didn't know was that the contract came with a very crucial stipulation..  (Source: Lezhin US)   Note: Chapter count includes a prologue.

title: I See Your Money
description: To Sungchoon, seeing how much assets a person has and will have in the future comes in handy when dealing with all kinds of situations. He then meets Jihyang, a daughter of a conglomerate owner and approaches her, hoping to change his fate of having to live paycheck to paycheck. Little does he realize that Jihyang also shares this ability.    (Source: Lezhin)

title: Starlight Scandal
description: In showbiz, anything can make or break you -- top actor Eunseong knows this all too well. A video of him confronting a stalker fan has gone viral and it could derail his career! His managers insist he needs to boost his image somehow. Enter Woojoo, the main dancer for a struggling idol group called Noble. They're total opposites: Eunseong is cold and commanding, while Woojoo is sweet and naive. But they're perfect for a “show-window bromance,” a fake friendship to make Eunseong look more appealing as he pretends to take Woojoo under his wing. As the unlikely duo becomes more popular, the stalker's return could destroy not only their fame but their very lives... But is their bromance really all an act and nothing more?    Chapter count includes two special episodes    (Source: Tappytoon)

title: Age of Innocence
description: The world has lost its innocence, and it seems that I am the only one who hasn't... Can you resist the temptation of young, hot college girls?  (Source: TOPTOON+)

title: Words & Kisses
description: Just as I was about to get into another ambiguous, half-hearted relationship, I met her. Hyun-Jin Go. I couldn't take my eyes off her. I had been treading a dull path, and she knocked me right off.  Then I felt it — a little piece of my heart, breaking off and slipping away.  "She's so pretty..."    (Source: Manta comics)

title: Flying High
description: College student Jung-hyuk just finished his military service and is ready to find a part-time job to pay for his expenses. To celebrate their discharge, he and his best friend Yong-il go clubbing together. Be it a coincidence or not, they meet Jia, Jung-hyuk’s unforgettable first love, and her sexy friend Soojung. Contrary to his wishes, but still unable to refuse, Jung-hyuk ends up having a one night stand with Soojung. As if his life wasn’t already complicated enough, now he keeps running into Soojung and Jia all the time, and he just can’t seem to refuse Soojung’s advances. He is torn since his body wants one thing, but his heart wants another. Add his best friend, his best friend’s little sister and his newly found boss to the mix and things are sure to get even more complicated. Love triangles, steamy nights and unrequited loves. Who’ll be flying high in the end?  (Source: Lezhin X)

title: An Unsettling Scent
description: While trying to hide the fact that he’s an alpha, Hayden is approached by Brett for help on a class project. However, it turns out that Brett is not only a fellow alpha, but one that doesn’t use scent blockers. The two naturally butt heads and continue as a series of unsettling encounters unfold…until Brett takes things one step too far.    (Source: Lezhin US)

title: Let's Stream Together!
description: Jin-Ho, a jobless loser, is jealous of the handsome streamer who invites sexy girls on his stream every night.   "I wish I could be him, just for a day!"   And... it happened?!  (Source: TOPTOON+)

title: Amkeonneukdaeui BOY
description: Eun-soo Cha is the main character of the story.   Eun-soo has hated her Mother ever since she was abandoned by her. Raised by her Grandma, she became a wild child that likes to fight.   She has even disguised herself so well as a guy that people won't believe her even if she says she's a girl. She can fight well, and is even referred to as hot by girls. One day, however, her Grandma's already bad health worsens, and she promises not to fight anymore.   When Eun-soo's grandma dies soon after, she decides to leave Dae-Jeon (where she lives) and goes to Seoul to live with her Mother, despite still hating her, because she has nowhere else to go.   There, she runs into one of the best fighters, at her new school, and immediately gets on his bad side. What will happen? Will she break her promise to her grandma? Will love bloom?

title: My Boyfriend is a Vampire
description: Being beautiful is never easy, especially if you’re an eighteen-year-old boy like Gene who is constantly mistaken for a girl because of his delicate good looks. Gene is, in fact, anything but delicate. He is the ringleader of a group of tough kids in an all-boys school, and he’s quick to beat the living daylights out of anyone who even hints that he resembles a girl.    His life is about to take a shocking turn. When Gene stumbles upon strange happenings in the forest, he gets sucked into a world of vampire intrigue and sinister romance that he never knew existed. And he learns that he’s facing more than being turned into a vampire: like being turned into a girl?!    (Source: Seven Seas Entertainment)

title: Sarah, I'm Sorry: Welcome to Our Galaxy
description: What if those tragic events never happened? What if no one was sick, no one had an accident, and everyone lived a normal campus life? If only there was a world just like Sarah’s wish... When Sarah opens her window, another window appears, and she discovers a different world inside, a world with an exciting campus life that she had always dreamed about.    (Source: WEBTOON)

title: In Your Wake
description: Yun-Oh has only one person in the world who he can rely on: his hyung, Hae-Won. For years, Yun-Oh has harbored a secret, unrequited love for Hae-Won, who is not only someone he considers family but also his sole protector. As a beta, Yun-Oh believes a future with Hae-Won, an alpha, is impossible, so he keeps his feelings buried deep and stays quietly by his side. But when Hae-Won unexpectedly goes into rut, Yun-Oh is caught up in the whirlwind, and his carefully hidden emotions are laid bare.    What will become of their fragile bond when Hae-Won discovers the truth Yun-Oh has tried so desperately to conceal?    (Source: Lezhin US)

title: The Wilting Light
description: What lies in worlds beyond our own? Is it a bright light and then… nothingness? Or is it another land populated with gorgeous beauty and eldritch horror beyond our recognition? General Hwee-un falls in battle, leaving behind his unspoken love and a life unlived and awakens in a… forest? Malevolent spirits and demons vie for his life until a handsome goblin whisks him away to the Goblin Village and into the court of the Goblin King. Whatever life may exist in the beyond, death is only the beginning.    (Source: Lezhin US)

title: Temptress
description: Haeyo can’t help herself - she gets aroused whenever, wherever. Whether she’s on her way home, in the gym, or in a bar, she’s ready to entice anyone who’s brave enough to accept her advances. Equipped with a sultry stare, she woos unsuspecting targets who can't say no after getting a glimpse of what she has to offer. Well... Are you ready to get tempted?    (Source: Lezhin US)

title: No More, No Less
description: The teacher's assistant from my high school called me out of the blue... What does she want?  (Source: Toomics)

title: Lying in a Dream
description: Hae-Seo seems to have it all: good looks, a caring personality, and a promising career as a speech coach. And, oh yeah, the ability to control people’s minds and see into the future! The only problem is, whenever he uses his powers, he develops a certain *ahem* rock-hard condition. So when stunningly handsome Do-Hyuk offers to lend a hand, Hae-Seo must learn to lower his defenses and open his heart—that is, until he discovers that Do-Hyuk has been keeping secrets of his own...     (Source: Tapas)

title: Sweet Dream
description: Sweet Dream's second season.     Tae is a popular photo model, and a succubus. She is intrigued by the handsome young man Hyesung she met at a reception, and she enters his dreams to feed on him. She was surprised when the innocent-looking Hyesung made her see stars in their dream coupling. And she could still feel sparks between them when they meet again in real life.    (Source: Ridibooks, translated)    Note: Includes a prologue.

title: Gavin's Bosses
description: Acknowledged for his skills, Kang-Cheol is hired by a group of lovely women. But when faced with their alluring temptations, he ends up crossing the line...  (Source: DAYcomics, edited)

title: Idol House
description: Living with 4 hot guys? She hates it. I-Rei and her mother become the center of attention when her mom wins a contest where a k-pop idol group comes to stay with them. Now I-Rei must deal with living with 4 extra family members and a love-struck mother.     (Source: Manta)     Note: Chapter count includes a prologue.

title: It Was All You
description: In a near-future Pyeongyang, clones have become an indispensable part of human life. Tasked to test XYZ Corporation’s latest prototype, biomedical engineer Dr. Yuri Lee is marveled by LPC-6, a physically perfect and intellectually superior clone designed for a single purpose -- to give unconditional love to his master. As she uncovers the depths of her unfaithful husband’s depravity, she finds solace in “Victor” and his extraordinary capacity for empathy. Will her desire for retribution and love set her onto a path of no return?   (Source: WEBTOONS)   Note: Chapter count includes 2 prologues.

title: Eighteen's Bed
description: There are people in the world who particularly catch others' attention. Jun Kang, who lived as the 'good model student' while secretly hiding his miserable one-sided love, finds himself entangled with Yohan Go, a classmate he now shares a class with in the second year... What if he had liked Yohan Go instead?    "Jun, how is it? The taste of first love."    (Source: Mr.Blue)

title: Secretary's Escape
description: One indispensable secretary, two irresistible heirs. I-Yeon Chu, the most sought-after personal assistant in Jaekyung Group, has the two would-be heirs vying for more than just future ownership of the company. And while I-Yeon is balancing the precarious love triangle, she’s also digging into the mysterious death of her father who used to be chauffeur to the former Jaekyung Group chairman. Will I-Yeon find both truth and true love?    (Source: WEBTOON, edited)

title: Donnaenwa
description: As someone who lived a normal life after being forcibly discharged from the special forces, one day Ju-Hyeok receives sudden and strange missions through his glasses.    While carrying out the missions hoping for the best… His money starts multiplying like crazy…?!!    After getting the taste of money, Ju-Hyeok begins to participate in the money survival game in earnest and becomes a regular that overwhelms all the other participants thanks to his overwhelming physique!!

title: The Regressed Empress’s Abduction Marriage
description: Eliano, the daughter of a powerful duke, marries the seventh prince of Jakador, and they fall in love. But their happiness is short-lived when the prince ascends to the throne. After suffering a miscarriage, she is cruelly poisoned by her husband and dies. Eliano miraculously wakes up to find herself 21 years old and is now determined to avoid the tragic future she once lived. Will she be able to find happiness in this new life?  (Source: WEBTOON)

title: Within My Shadow
description: Having grown up in the same household, Sin Cha-On and Mun Se-Han were once inseparable. However, everything changes after the two reach adulthood. Between attending college classes, Se-Han is busy learning the violent ways of a gang boss like his father. Meanwhile, Cha-On has been occupied with his own “extracurricular activities” in hotel rooms to satisfy his inner masochist. But unbeknownst to Cha-On, his childhood friend is fully aware of his dirty little secret and he’s had enough. It’s time Se-Han stops hiding his sadistic desire to break Cha-On and bring him under his complete control...    (Source: Tappytoon, edited)

title: Everybody Loves the Villainess
description: High priest Sia awaits her peaceful death after leading a life devoted to helping other people. Instead of finding herself next to Lord Pleon the God, she finds herself in the body of Elena, a woman known to be wicked.  While adjusting to her new body and new life as a universally hated figure, Sia continues to encounter men she had acquainted during her day as a high priest. What's even more surprising is that those men seem to get increasingly obsessed with her.    "I am no longer the high priest on whom everyone depended, so why are these men still getting obsessed with me?!"    (Source: Pocket Comics)

title: For Your Murder
description: Elementary school teacher Gi-Jeong Go has lost almost everything: her parents when she was a child, her freedom when she had to support her shut-in younger brother, and now her very dignity as the class bully among her students and his mother threaten to turn her life into a living hell. Upon meeting the mild-mannered yet inscrutable lawyer In-Seop Oh, Gi-Jeong begins to find her life changing, though little does she know that wherever In-Seop goes, death follows…  (Source: WEBTOON)

title: Gancheom 18-se
description: An orphan named Hajin, trained in North Korea ever since he was little. North Korea had sent young children down to South Korea to climb up the social ladder and take high-ranked places on the social hierarchy. Hajin was chosen for this operation and was sent over.    <I>"To not be used, you must be the one that uses people from above."     Hajin did not want to be used by the North Korean government but make decisions for himself. To save his younger sister who was taken away from him, he begins to swallow up both the North and South's organizations one by one.  (Source: Naver, translated)

title: I'm the Corrupted Side Character's Wife
description: What would you do if your fiance holds the demon's power inside him and could kill you with it? The answer is clear for the reader who wakes up as Lucian's fiancee, Pernia. That is, she must help Lucian confess to the novel's heroine, Estelle, so his unrequited love won't trigger the demon! Whether it's teaching Lucian to dance or inviting Estelle to her own engagement ceremony, the plucky Pernia is willing to do whatever it takes to get them together. So why is the deadly Lucian turning his eyes toward her instead...?   (Source: Tappytoon)

title: Accidental Warrior
description: Eun-Ha Cheon was just an ordinary teenage girl until she woke up one day and discovered that she was not Eun-Ha Cheon anymore, but a witch named Blythe in a magical world. Fearful of prejudice and desirous of a quiet life, she hides the fact that she’s a witch, but this becomes tricky with the arrival of a beautiful fairy who won’t stop calling her a warrior. She doesn’t want to be a warrior or anyone’s hero. All she wants is an ordinary life… But as she learns more about her identity and her world, will she ultimately get what she wants?    (Source: Tapas)

title: You Can’t Kill Me: The Secret Bride of the Black Wolf
description: Yeon-U Chae, a talented yet lonely composer from Korea, finds herself and her family trapped in the underworld after a car crash. In her first life, she marries Hyo-Jo, who ultimately kills her. In her second life, she takes revenge by taking her own life in front of him. But despite her desperate wish for an end, she’s given another chance at life. However, this time, instead of encountering Hyo-Jo, she is discovered by Hwi-Ta, a mysterious man with a black wolf as his guardian spirit. Can Yeon-U break the cycle and find true safety in this treacherous underworld?    (Source: WEBTOON, edited)

title: From Maid to Queen
description: ​​Urania was just a lowly maid until she captured the attention of King Kraus III and became his concubine. The nobles and the other maids, however, despised their love and dragged Urania down. Heartbroken and at her wit’s end, she was ready to accept her death, but then a mysterious entity returns her to her past when she is still a maid. With her second chance at life, Urania is determined to become the king’s concubine once more, but this all changes when she meets Oscar, who pushes her to aspire for greater things…      (Source: Tapas)

title: Eonniga Namja Juingongeul Juwo Watda
description: The main character reincarnates into a side character of a novel that she had once read. She becomes Amy, a young landlord, who has an older sister. From what she recalls in the original novel, her sister becomes the first love of the male lead she picked up and gets brutally murdered in the near future. The male protagonist has a disposition that of a sociopath, which stemmed from the unloved environment he grew up in. He has also been inflicted with a curse, where his body and mind would transform into an adolescent during the day. Can the curse of the male lead be lifted? What will happen next?

title: I Adore You, Teacher
description: Seon-Min seems like an ordinary college student, but behind closed doors, she lives a secret life as her professor's plaything. When Yu-Jin, the student she tutors, discovers her darkest secret, everything begins to fall apart. Seon-Min's campus life begins to unravel, plunging her once-stable existence into chaos.  (Source: Lezhin US)

title: Sasaengdol
description: Top Idol and school bully switched bodies?!    Hong Joo-Ah, a school bully who is bullied every day at school. Yo-Han, a top idol loved by the entire nation. Joo-Ah envies the life of a beloved idol, while Yo-Han envies the life of a normal, free person. One day, their bodies are switched!   A spectacular body-swapping romance, Sasangdol!    (Source: Naver, translated and edited)

title: Immoral Ties
description: A pretty girl popular in college is even popular in her own home! Her stepfather is always in pain trying to control himself not to cross the line. Will he be able to hold it in, or will his instincts drive him wild?  (Source: DAYcomics)

title: Tendering Resignation
description: 3 women, 1 messy love triangle!   Geum-Hui has always felt safe and comfortable working at her best friend Tae-Ri's company. But everything changes when Bo-Ra comes and stirs things up — Tae-Ri suddenly goes into hiding, and Geum-Hui gets thrown into the middle of... a police investigation and a messy lesbian love triangle!    (Source: Manta, edited)

title: What Death Taught Me
description: As if being framed by her love for plotting a murder weren’t enough, Rinette learns that her stepsister, Kanna, is the true mastermind behind it all. As she’s burned at the stake, Rinette makes a desperate wish for another chance…and wakes up as her younger self. Determined to change her fate, she vows to stop Kanna’s schemes and protect her family this time around. But rewriting the past is far from simple. Each choice she makes brings unforeseen consequences—some more devastating than she could imagine. Can Rinette escape the shadows of her past, or will they consume her once more?  (Source: WEBTOONS)

title: Jigeumui Urineun
description: Former High School friends turned roommates, Ah-Young Jing and University arts student Nara Kwon have developed a close yet ambiguous relationship. What course will their desires and uncertainties take after Ah-Young Jing asks Nara Kwon about "Friendship Night"?

title: Meogi
description: Ominous beings are intruding into our reality...    Park Yun-yeong has a mysterous power which allows her to see ghastly creatures that seem to inhabit our world but not interact with it - unless they notice you acknowledge their existence. That’s when they stop being harmless.    (Source: Naver, translated & edited)

title: Made Into the Main Character
description: After Tiarosetti learns from her Guide that sacrificing herself to save the male lead, Lexion Spero, and following the plot is the only way to return to her world, she desperately carries out her role. But confusion strikes when she wakes up where her story starts, and Lexion saves her before he should. The Guide states she's now the main character, and Lexion isn't the male lead! Can Tiarosetti find her way home, or will Lexion's inconsistent behavior shackle her to his world forever?    (Source: Tapas)

title: Four Ways to Find a Wife
description: It started with a chance encounter in a secluded garden. You know, your typical boy-meets-girl romance. So then, why does he keep chasing her down and asking to see her photos? And hold up—he’s advertising for a wife?! Jeong-Won just wants to survive her college years, but this business executive isn’t making it easy! She doesn’t have time for distractions between taking care of her siblings, working part-time, and studying for classes. But there’s another thing bothering her... who is the mysterious person leaving her notes?    (Source: Tapas, edited)

title: Family Adjustments
description: My love left a gift before she went to heaven. She's the spitting image of my step sister. Is this my second chance at love?     (Source: Toomics)

title: Wolsebang Sinbudeul
description: A monthly rental apartment owned by my parents, with only female tenants. And I’m going to manage it…? And I was told to choose a bride from among the women…?! Getting reading for my monthly rental bride!  (Source: Lezhin, translated)

title: The Emperor is HARD to Please!
description: Wealth, power, glory. Emperor Eric Dyk has it all... except his "Dyk" refuses to get up for some reason! Unfortunately, he must choose a wife to produce an heir, or the empire he toiled to unite will collapse. Then, Eric's prayers are answered in the form of Cindy, a foul-mouthed spunky young maid who can somehow get him stiff with sheer abuse. After some convincing, Cindy joins hands with Eric to discover the issue behind his dysfunction. Will they be able to find the cure to this hard situation, or will the empire be doomed to a permanent dry spell?    (Source: Tappytoon)

title: Big Life
description: Jaegun Ha is an unsuccessful novelist at 27 years old with nothing to show for himself. That is until he discovers a mysterious box of items and a cat in a graveyard! Now Jaegun is able to channel the extraordinary writing abilities of a dead writer named Gunwoo Seo, and Jaegun’s career is propelled to celebrity status. But with the perks of success come new challenges...    (Source: Tapas)

title: Gold Gray
description: The last surviving omega, and the man who desperately needs him! Fifty years go, a virus sweeps through the world, wiping out all the omegas from the face of the earth. Rain, the sole surviving omega, lives his whole life hiding his identity - until he accidentally runs into Lukas. As the chairman of the facility that used to produce artificial omegas, Lukas has to produce an alpha heir in order to succeed his father's business. And while he has his mind set on winning Rain over, things don't seem to go so smoothly...    (Source: Lezhin US)    Note: Includes 16 extra chapters.

title: The Perfect Duo
description: The cutest girl in our school isn't so innocent after all! Will she and I be able to create the perfect cartoon?    (Source: Toomics)

title: Akan Gisa
description: Born as the eldest daughter of a duke, she was raised and educated only to become Queen. Even though she had excellent fencing skills, she was not allowed to wield a sword. Nevertheless, she was happy. As Queen of the Kingdom of Mont, she was able to stay with her beloved King. But her happiness did not last long. The king betrayed her and had her executed. When she opened her eyes again, she found herself on the witch hunting ground outside the castle! People are calling her a witch and are trying to kill her. What is even going on?

title: The Delivery Rider
description: A new town, a place of new beginnings... and as one of the very few delivery riders, I'll make sure it's worth my while.  (Source: Toomics)

title: When Two Villains Meet
description: Atalante is the boss of a notorious organization that works in the empire’s shadow. One day, she receives a request from the emperor to assassinate a new target: the tyrant archduke Lionel Vianc. Reluctantly leaving behind her simple life with her members, Atalante heads off to perform the assassination, but for some reason… the archduke doesn’t die. After a mixup between a love potion and poison, Atalante finds herself in a frustrating predicament as the tyrant archduke not only refuses to die… but has also fallen in love with her!  (Source: WEBTOON)

title: The Delivery Rider
description: A new town, a place of new beginnings... and as one of the very few delivery riders, I'll make sure it's worth my while.  (Source: Toomics)

title: A Bona fide Killer
description: Yu Bona is no ordinary mom returning to the office after maternity leave. For her first assignment back she heads to a rooftop, points a sniper rifle at her target in a nearby hotel room, and “bang!” the legendary assassin “Kingfisher” is back. But as Bona takes on a series of new targets, her news reporter husband Taesung is ordered to investigate Kingfisher’s return, and as the bodies pile up, the line between personal and professional slowly starts to blur.    (Source: Tapas)

title: I Bought Land, Not a Man!
description: Living as a fictional heroine is stressful, so why bother? Having read the story in her past life, Eliana, faithful maid to heroine Eslyn Arnele, knows it’s far better to be a well-paid extra. While serving Eslyn, Eliana uses her knowledge of the story to buy some land. This catches the eye of Sortain Bisto, the villain set to steal Eslyn’s fortune, who takes a liking to Eliana. Disinterested, Eliana vows to protect Eslyn and make it big in real estate, but will pesky Sortain spoil her riches?    (Source: Tapas)

title: Villain Fiancé is in My Way of Happiness
description: Thisbe was tired of being the Saintess of Prophecy from day one. Years after being reincarnated into a novel, she navigates a new timeline where, instead of being a murderous has-been Saintess, she chooses peace. And yet she somehow still ends up framed for murder--by her own fiancé, no less! Determined to prove her innocence, gain her freedom, navigate her love life (and maybe help save the world in the process), Thisbe will clear her name not as a Saintess, but as the main character!    (Source: Tapas)    Note: Includes five extra chapters.

title: The Tears of a Jester
description: Two princesses, one throne. Life is hard for a court jester. Not only do I serve as an emotional punching bag for the royals and aristocrats, forced to indulge their every whim, but now I'm also caught between two princesses. Is this a comedy? Or will this tale end in tragedy?    (Source: Manta)

title: Purity Reversed
description: I woke up one day to find a world where male and female values of chastity were reversed... From married women asking for penetration with cash in hand, to college girls offering their virginities... Am I in heaven. My fuck journey is officially about to kick off!   "Who, the...? I've never seen such shamelessness..."  (Source: DAYcomics)

title: Human Trash
description: "The world has ended now, so how about I try keeping human pets?"   I don't know why, but the world has come to an end. People don't hesitate to murder their friends and family as survival and desire are the only values that rule over them. All the survivors of this new world were given a single skill of their choice. Seong-Cheol, suffering from insomnia, chose the skill "sleep." Using his skill, he begins to hunt women and rape them after he puts them to sleep!  (Source: DAYcomics, edited)

title: Creatures in the Mist
description: A thick layer of mist shrouds the world and turns people into zombie-like monsters. Without knowing its cause or the solution, the only way out is to sneak into the capital city built for the privileged. While struggling for survival, Hayeon, a talented biologist, finds out that his crush Myung Woon has something to do with the virus...    (Source: Pocket Comics)    Notes: The chapter count includes a prologue and 16 side stories. The side stories contain mature scenes.

title: Geon and Suo's Unholy Love Affair
description: Geon is a strict top known as the “Sexergizer” who will only sleep with someone once. But his promiscuous life comes to a halt when his fed-up mom drags him to church, where he thoroughly gets his manhood exorcised! After four years of seeing no action down south, Geon seems doomed to live an impotent life... until a chance encounter with his high school crush, Suo, has his vigor soar back high to heaven! But it isn’t all up from here, as bottoming turns out to be Geon’s only solution to overcoming his (un)holy intervention and finding true love...!    (Source: Tappytoon)   Note: Includes two extra chapters.

title: Roommate 101
description: Lee Hyuk’s a medical student at a good university, but his goals are more artistic. So he decides to chase his dreams by stealing his sister’s money and running away from home! He lands himself a teaching job and a place to stay, and everything is going great until he discovers his landlord is his student and school delinquent, Lee Biru. Hyuk may be the adult, but he has no real life experience. Biru, on the other hand, is independent, and more than capable of fending for himself. A coming-of-age story about two men who hate each other, but are exactly what each other needs.    (Source: Lezhin)

title: Where the Wind Stays
description: To break an ancient curse that plagues the royal bloodline, young Prince Tasara is destined to be sacrificed in death. Nara is enlisted as a palace servant to carry out the prince’s execution when the time comes. But he develops a soft spot for the cursed prince, and after committing an atrocious and unforgivable act against Tasara, Nara is desperate to right his wrongs. Soon, their lascivious relationship that had been kept under wraps tests his resolve. Will Nara be tempted away from his original mission? There’s no telling how far he would go to earn Tasara’s forgiveness.    (Source: Tappytoon)    Note: The chapter count includes a prologue and 5 extra chapters.

title: Spinel
description: In a world divided into slaves (Spinels) and masters (Pels), Rowell is a young duke who refuses to abide by the established rules. His parents died defending the rights of Spinels, and he, too, has never bought or sold a slave in his life. Then one night, a runaway Spinel named Dev steals an heirloom pendant of Rowell’s and blackmails him into purchasing his services. Dev plans to use Rowell’s wealth and authority to find his lost family, so he does everything in his power to dominate the kindhearted Rowell. With years of bad blood between Pels and Spinels, will the two be able to see each other beyond their labels? Or will their differences be too great to overcome?     (Source: Tappytoon)

title: Chunchu: The Genocide Fiend
description: In a time of chaos and war, a godforsaken era, twin sons are born to an emperor. But legend states that the son of the emperor shall be born a demon! But twins? Who is the demon, and who shall reign as emperor?    Chunchu is the story of a young man saved from death by his mother, banished by his people, hunted by his brother, and tortured by the demons within. Living and fighting with a low-born warrior tribe who can never trust him, Chunchu lives a life of blood and violence, every day a struggle to survive. But something mysterious lurks within his cold exterior, something that could be awakened by the touch of a woman.    (Source: Dark Horse)

title: Toying With Daddy
description: Growing up with a silver spoon, Rosa has lived a flawless life as the perfect modern-day princess. She’s always gotten everything she wanted - except for one thing: Kim Yeonwoo, the boy from the orphanage who once slipped through her fingers.Ten years later, starved for something to stir her restless heart, Rosa finally sees Yeonwoo again. But there’s just one problem...he’s now the man by her mother’s side. Though she knows it’s a dangerous love she can never have, Rosa can’t resist toying with her new father-to-be, both in body and in mind…  (Source: Lezhin US)

title: Starts From Baby
description: Kim Jun, an adult man who strongly dislikes kids, is contacted by his unrequited love, Min Ji-Hwan. Ji-Hwan asks him to move in together to raise his baby nephew, and Jun accepts to stay close to him    (Source: INKR Comics)    Note: The chapter count includes 2 extra stories.

title: Terror
description: It's midnight, what are those sounds?

title: The Vault of Horror: A Collection of Nightmares
genres: Drama, Horror, Mystery, Psychological, Supernatural, Thriller
description: In the mood for a scare? You've come to the right place. Welcome to a world of nightmares and terror, created by the masters of horror at LINE Webtoon. Enter at your own risk. (Source: WEBTOON) Stories featured: 1) Research (HWANG Joon-Ho/YEON Je-Won) 2) Lovers (HWANG Joon-Ho) 3) The Profile (Lee Seung Chan) 4) The Maze (TGM/Linda) 5) Ok-su Station Ghost (HORANG) 6) The Spider and The Mantis (KIM Eun-hyo/KIM Yeong-ji) 7) The Nightmare (ImInSu/SONG Rae-hyeon) 8) A Bathroom Tale (Hwang Youngchan) 9-10) The Moon Below (Yuria) 11) First Acquaintances (Lee Seung Chan) 12) The Visitor (Mirchi) 13) Insomnia (Go Ara/YEON Je-Won) 14) 04 : 44 (CHOI Yoon-Jin) 15) A Summer Ghost (SIU/Kang Im) 16-17) Tatoo (YU Sang-Mo) 18-19) A Tale of Cat and Mouse (Hye Jin Yang) 20) Bongcheon-Dong Ghost (HORANG) 21) How to see a ghost (Lee Seung Chan) 22) Mosquitoes (HWANG Joon-Ho) 23) At Our House (Sael Bi) 24-25) Beneath the Glass (Jude Friday) 26) The Author (YEON Je-Won) 27) A Ghost Photograph (Oh Chang-ho) 28) The Guest House (Radiya) 29) Author Extermination (Kkomabi) Note: The original published version on Naver contains 29 chapters. The WEBTOON version contains 23 chapters as some were not officially translated for English release.

title: This is a Campus Romance Series
description: My name is Ha-Yun Lee, and I'm an ordinary college student. I decided to go on a spontaneous trip before school resumed and met this guy named Kang-On. He asked me out on the first day we met, but of course, I rejected him. I thought I'd never see him again, but guess what? I ran into him during the school club recruitment event! And wait… What? Even Ji-Il, the president of the student club "You," also has a crush on me?! I swear I'm not delulu. I swear!    (Source: WEBTOONS)   Note: Includes four side story chapters.

title: Defense Breaker
description: Jihun is pulled into Knight Defense, a game where he must lead the kingdom’s knights against endless waves of monsters. Weighed down by the scars of his real life, Jihun chooses not to fight and turns his back on humanity. But as soon as he does, the system unveils a new path: the Monster Faction. Defense is over. It’s now time for offense.  (Source: WEBTOON)

title: Top Of The World
description: College graduate Gi-Un creates a hiking club with his friend Jae-U. After having a drink with the queen of the club Jin-Sol and the cute newcomer Da-Hee, Gi-Un blacks out...   “Don't you remember what you did last night?!”  (Source: DAYcomics, edited)

title: Renia, the Crazy Princess
description: Princess Renia Alesdubois had finally found happiness with her husband Clovis Jenoff, the Grand Duke. But when the empire finds her guilty of her husband's murder amidst political chaos, a dying wish to set everything right sends her back before it all began. Armed with memories of the past, Renia decides to call off her engagement in order to save her beloved. As she goes to extreme lengths to keep the past from repeating, she finds that some things are not at all what she expected.    (Source: Tapas)

title: Leash Me Up
description: Meet Noel, a part-time worker at a pet store who’s completely and utterly obsessed with puppies. Noel loves puppies so much that he decides to join a chat app to find a friend who likes them as much as he does. Just his luck, he manages to find "J," a user that seems to match Noel’s passion for cuddly creatures. After Noel decides to send J a collar as a gift, J suggests they meet in person. When J shows up wearing the collar around his own neck, it’s evident there has been some sort of misunderstanding between the two…    (Source: Lezhin US)

title: HYPNOMANCER
description: A sexy married woman visits a struggling hypnotherapy clinic. She mistakes JEONG-TAE for her husband under hypnosis, and even asks for sex. Using this power… He plans to get his first love back…!  (Source: TOPTOON+)

title: Geu Namjaui Gongbubeop
description: Su-Min O, a student who has been studying to get into a prestigious university, is concentrating on studying and aiming for gold for the final college entrance exam… But his sexy next door neighbor is his tutor?!  (Source: TOPTOON, translated)

title: Prince Maker
description: A princess trapped in a tower, guarded by a dragon, awaiting rescue by Prince Charming. Sound familiar? But what if the rescue doesn’t arrive in time? After ten years of waiting, Princess Elina is finally saved at the age of 28 by Prince Louis. Sure, he’s from a faraway kingdom that Elina’s never heard of and has a few weird personality quirks, but at least she’s not alone anymore! That is, until a jealous witch curses him and turns him into a five-year-old child…    (Source: WEBTOONS)

title: VR & RPG
description: Mov Saga Online is an MMORPG based in virtual reality. Zerry has been a player since the game’s early days, yet he’s still stuck as a low-level novice. That’s because the idea of running through dungeons and completing quests has never interested him. He’d much rather stay cooped up in his virtual home, eating snacks all day. However, his gaming life takes a one-eighty when he suddenly stumbles upon a rare weapon that grants him exclusive access to an epic quest! With the encouragement and anticipation of his friend, Tana, Zerry finally begins leveling himself up to take on the challenge. But this epic quest will soon turn out to be much more than both players bargained for…  (Source: Tappytoon)

title: Why Yuria Hid Her Wealth
description: As Yuria takes her dying breath, she realizes she had just lived through the events of a novel she read in her past life. She laments that she didn't remember early enough to change her fate, so when she wakes up having returned one year in the past, Yuria vows she won't meet the same end again. This time, she will expose the female lead of the novel, her half-sister Lilica, for the true two-faced villainess she is! Will Yuria be able to outsmart Lilica? Or will she lose everything once again?  (Source: Tapas)

title: Scandalous
description: Who says a woman can't be smart and sexy at the same time? But can a woman get away with cheating on two men at once? Saeeun's simply SCANDALOUS!  (Source: Lezhin US)   Note: Includes one extra chapter.

title: I Became the Dying Female Lead's Sister
description: In a twist of fate, a girl wakes up as Lynzelle, twin to her favorite novel's dying female lead, Lykke. To secure Lykke's happiness, she volunteers to wed the fearsome prince, Hernan, in her sister's stead. But hold on... The scary prince turns out to be super cute, sparking unforeseen feelings! Everything seems perfect until Lynzelle's health mysteriously deteriorates more than Lykke's, and the story takes an unexpected turn. Is this cute twin tale hiding more secrets than meets the eye?    (Source: Tapas)

title: Want a taste?
description: HO-CHAN arrives at the kimchi factory his mother told him about... and the first thing he sees... are the manager's huge breasts! Also, his young, sexy co-worker is trying to seduce him as well! Stuck between a mature woman and a young, fresh girl... This is the best place to be!  (Source: TOPTOON+)  Note: The chapter count includes an epilogue.

title: Colorless Girl
description: Jin-A is a girl who’s always alone and has a depressed expression. Eun-Woo feels uneasy about her behavior and is concerned that she’ll commit suicide so he constantly hovers around her.  (Source: WEBTOONS)

title: To a Happy Ending for the Tragic Novel
description: When Rosiana Evenheider opens her eyes as the villainess of the tragic novel, “The Miracle of Dawn,” she knows she has to do something if she wants to live. She must find a way to escape her evil adoptive father’s grasp while also helping the male leads one by one so that they don’t take drastic measures to claim the female lead. Will Rosiana be able to find a way to change the narrative so that everyone finds their “happily ever after”?    (Source: Tappytoon)

title: Hold on, Crown Prince!
description: Hold on, Crown Prince! Why are you doing this to me?! With a charming face and a not-quite-so attitude, not a day passes in the life of a beautiful boy Ray without some trouble. Seeing Ray get repeatedly fired from various jobs due to his fiery temper, Edward lets him in on a must-have item(!) for noble ladies that is sure to bring in a big sum of money. While searching through the forest for the material for the item, Ray is injured, though lightly, by an arrow out of nowhere. He runs away refusing any treatment. The arrow's owner is none other than Crown Prince Lucas of Luvecia. Having saved Ray from his troubles time and again, Lucas makes an offer Ray can't refuse--the terms of which dictate that his life will be spared, should he grant Lucas his wishes.   (Source: Tappytoon, translated)

title: Sora's Eyes
description: "Just stay alive, young master."    Sora has descended from the mountains to guard the sickly Jungha. The two have a set of rules to guide them: One, Sora decides what is considered an emergency. Two, Jungha must listen to Sora in an emergency. Three, Jungha must not bully Sora. Will they be able to stick to them?    (Source: Manta)    Note: Includes a prologue and 3 side stories

title: Money Game
description: Eight participants, 100 days, and a shared pot of money amounting to 44.8 billion won (around 38 million USD). This is Money Game, a reality TV show, where participants try to spend as little as possible to walk away with as much as they can. Marooned in a specially designed TV set with nothing but a set of clothes and a rule book, every item they purchase is 1,000 times the original price. How much money will the participants manage to keep?    (Source: WEBTOONS)

title: The Wicked Ladies-In-Waiting
description: Commoner orphan Julia Arte is cursed with repeatedly dying and being reborn on the same snowy mountain trail. Now on her ninth life, she is determined to break the curse by getting revenge on her former lover Vasily Marjoram, who not only left her to die but sent assassins to kill her. After becoming the second lady-in-waiting to House Marjoram's sworn enemy, Prince Lewisia Ortega, Julia pulls out all the stops to take down Vasily. But will her scheming bring more trouble than she bargained for?  (Source: Tapas)

title: Love Factory
description: Peter starts working at a factory, where he finds more than just a job...    (Source: Toomics)

title: My Sister's Private Life
description: A woman wakes up in a hospital with no memory of who she is. She doesn’t even recognize herself in the mirror. She hit her head while falling down the stairs and suffers from temporary amnesia. As she gets to know herself, she is disappointed to find out that her handsome husband doesn’t even want to touch her and her career as an influencer is falling apart because she is suspected of murder. But it turns out she is living the life of her twin, Hae-Mi.    (Source: WEBTOONS, edited)

title: Private Call
description: In a world where alphas and omegas are the stuff of urban legends, Do-Ha is a rare dominant omega who usually deals with his heat cycle through casual one-night stands. One day, he uses a matching service and gets paired up with an alpha named Ji-Hwan. Things get unexpectedly intense. Overwhelmed by pheromones, Do-Ha forgets about precautions and ends up knotted, leaving him in shock. However, Ji-Hwan seems entirely unfazed by the situation and boldly suggests they meet again, saying, "Don't tell me you're scared because I'm an alpha..."  (Source: Lezhin US)

title: Pearl Boy: Ignite the Dawn
description: Baek Seung-Hyun has lived in the shadows his whole life, nothing more than the deadly right hand of yakuza boss Shin Jae-Il. But now, Jae-Il is married. And Seung-Hyun, for the first time in years, is left behind. Drifting through empty streets on the night after the wedding, Seung-Hyun crosses paths with Yuta, a delicate ghost from his time in Japan. But what should have been a quiet reunion over a drink turns sharp fast. Yuta’s sweetness curdles, his words cut deep, and before Seung-Hyun can make sense of it everything begins to burn. Uninvited and unrelenting, Yuta storms into his life, dragging with him the weight of the past and something far more dangerous. Seung-Hyun begins to fear that dawn, when it comes, won’t bring light. Only fire.  (Source: Lezhin US)

title: Peony: Dreaming of the Dangerous Grand Duke
description: Rejected by her family, Princess Peony is sent to marry Grand Duke Ernst Eques, known as the cruelest man in the empire. No one realizes that’s exactly what she wants! Peony’s possessed by Gabriella Nasirette, Ernst’s beloved wife who was murdered by his enemies. Cursed to keep her identity secret, she sets out to protect Ernst and make him fall for her again... Only he still loves Gabriella! Can Peony make this marriage a lifelong love? Or will her dreams be dashed by the coldness of the duke?    (Source: Tapas)

title: Dubious Moon
description: A cheeky office romance that erupts out of a slip of the tongue.    Shi-Won finds herself still reeling from the shock of being dumped by boyfriend number four. Her pride is on the floor from having to deal with the consistently emotionless and nitpicking manager Mr. Moon at the office. During a night out with her co-workers, she drunkenly calls him out. She ends up confessing her feelings and asking him out when all she had planned to do was apologize. Surprised by Mr. Moon’s acceptance of her invitation to go on a date… a secret office romance is ignited.    (Source: Netcomics)

title: Useon Namdongsaengbuteo Sumgija
description: Note: This is a promotional one-shot for the web novel of the same name.

title: Lucid Encounter
description: Regen Hagart discovers her dead genius Royal alchemist aunt's recipe of the Dream Potion which allows the contractor to enter the drinker's dream. Hoping to hold her crush, Daniel's hands at least in her dreams, Regen creates the potion. However, Kaiden Roose, her long time Royal Academy rival accidentally ends up drinking the potion. The effect of the potion was suppose to last for one dream but Regen keeps on entering and appearing in Kaiden's dreams. What will happen to these two?    (Source: Pocket Comics)

title: Placebo Memory
description: For ages, Ha-Min has secretly pined for his childhood friend Woo-Jin but never had the guts to confess. When Woo-Jin loses all his memories of Ha-Min in an accident, Ha-Min jumps at the chance to fake a relationship, hoping to make his dreams come true. Woo-Jin eagerly embraces the lie and can’t keep his hands off Ha-Min. But will their steamy, newfound romance survive if Woo-Jin’s memories come flooding back?  (Source: Tapas)   Note: Includes six extra chapters.

title: Angnyeoinde Yorireul Neomu Jalhae
description: She became the villain of a novel. And not just any villain, but one who committed several crimes and was expelled from her family! Having no other choice, she started selling food on the streets to survive... But, suddenly, she was kidnapped by the prince of the empire and the villain of the novel. “I want you to be my personal cook,” he said.    But why is he interested in me? After many twists and turns, she became the emperor's exclusive cook and followed a quiet but dull path... Until she discovered that her food had a special effect on people. A genius alchemist, a rival chef, a mysterious fox... Everyone fell in love with her food and with her. And, above all, the emperor, who was the supposed villain, was very kind and protective of her. But, she just wanted to cook in peace!    (Source: KakaoPage, translated)

title: The Sound of Your Voice
description: Ethan Hyun is a huge fan of a voice actor by the name of Jimmy Kwak. When he's given an opportunity to work with him, he can't believe his luck. But a series of unfortunate events forces them to live together...

title: The Stand Up Guy
description: By anyone’s standards, Minhyeok is a good egg: he’s a reliable coworker, a faithful fiancé… a real stand up guy! The future looks rosy until one day he’s unceremoniously dumped by his future wife. As his dreams of domestic bliss go up in flames, Minhyeok goes off the rails. Strange thing is, his new devil-may-care attitude goes down extremely well with the ladies. And there are plenty of stunners around him who have been biding their time, waiting to pounce. Soon enough, Minhyeok learns that when the chips are down, you gotta rise to the occasion!  (Source: Lezhin US)

title: Extremely Rich Family
description: Daniel Park is betrayed by his boss and killed. But instead of dying, he now possesses the body of a famous celebrity, Daniel Wu. Using his new body, Daniel vows to take revenge on his boss.  (Source: Toomics)

title: Pendant of the Nymph
description: Being the new kid at school is tough. Bayul’s a target for gossip, arrogant bullies, and strict teachers… and he’s also burdened with being the son of a famed war hero and dealing with a chronic illness. Life just isn’t easy for him at Carringston Academy, but luckily, he has a few steadfast friends watching his back! He’ll need them and all the help he can get as he learns that his late mother’s pendant may lead to a power and a past he never knew he had. Can this be the path to a destiny greater than he could have ever imagined?    (Source: Tapas)

title: Count Tachibana
description: During the period of Japanese colonial rule, a young Korean boy, Yong-Hyeon, is invited every summer to a royal residence in the mountains behind his village. The residence of one Count Tachibana. The peculiar Tachibana Sho is a complete mystery, as it seems he’s never left his mansion, not even once. But over the summers, Tachibana Sho and Yong-Hyeon have made a strange but solid bond with each other. Now Yong-Hyeon is devising a plan to help Sho escape his mansion but it won't be easy. Adults with their meddlesome ulterior motives and the giant mansion itself all present challenges to their idea. How will the two boys break free and what will they learn about each other...?     (Source: Lezhin US, edited)

title: North X Northwest
description: Forbidden romance on the high seas!     It was all smooth sailing for Lil Schweiz, a famous pirate captain, until some shocking news almost threw her overboard. The notorious Admiral Retiro, known for scalping and feeding his pirate captives to flesh-eating fish, is on his way... And he's coming for one thing only.    (Source: Manta)

title: Why Are You Sorry, Darling?
description: Tareya DeLov awakens in a novel to find herself married to the cold and aloof Duke Anteros Mel DeLov, who's cheating on her with a mistress! Appalled, she immediately petitions for divorce, hoping to keep her share of wealth and win the public's sympathy. But as the divorce comes closer to being approved, Anteros won't leave Tareya alone, remorseful and relentlessly begging her to reconsider. Will Tareya succeed in separating from her husband? And what's with Anteros' sudden shift in attitude?   (Source: Tapas)

title: Subtle Disaster
description: A webtoon writer, Songshin Ha, lives in the apartment, at the top of the hill, that has serious problem with neighbor's noise; and he desperately wants to solve the problem with his neighbors.   (Source: WEBTOONS)

title: The Grand Duke’s Bride is a Warrior from Hell
description: Alicia Sirius Rayne, a timid, stuttering spinster betrothed to the rumored "Grand Duchess Serial Killer," falls into Hell after opening a mysterious artifact. Now, she must adapt to survive. Years later, she has become a fierce warrior. But as she sets out to conquer all of Hell -- she wakes up in the past. Armed with a second chance at life and a new goal, Alicia must actively pursue the feared Grand Duke Reikart Tessen to secure her destiny. Can this fierce warrior from Hell win the heart of the man who has "killed" six grand duchesses?!  (Source: WEBTOON)

title: Top Star Jaeneung Seogo
description: Sang-Jun, a talentless idol trainee, wished to transfer to a new entertainment company. Then, the day he asked his director about it, Sang-Jun received a book which unlocks access to a "talent library", allowing him to quickly learn various skills.    With this book and his newfound "talents", Sang-Jun is going to become a top star!  (Source: KakaoPage, translated)

title: The Flower of Prencia
description: Sabin is ready to say goodbye to life on this earth--that is, until she's thrust into the magical realm of Prencia and reborn in the body of a rare pure-blood named Leah Blesha. Rediscovering life as a witch training among devils, she is now a lowly human competing for a place by the very throne of Prencia. Can this hopeless mortal learn to navigate Devildom and hone her magical skills without sacrificing her own humanity? And will the handsome new devil with amethyst eyes help or hinder Leah on the path to become the royal bride?   (Source: Tappytoon)

title: Gudokgwa Joayo
description: Ju-Han, who got tricked by the words of his senior, became an editor for Toptube. What pretty girls...? All he did was stare at the girls on the screen. One day while working, he saw his senior having sex in the office and got an erection. He tried to run away, but ended up colliding with the popular Toptuber, Mi-So.   "Not there, Oppa... Have you hit the like and subscribe button?"  (Source: TOPTOON, translated)

title: The 100 Curses of Illeston Manor
description: A hungry tree, a shapeshifting rat, and a forgotten boy... These are just three of the 100 curses that haunt Illeston Manor. House Illeston thinks they'll be plagued by their curses forever until Simone the necromancer shows up to break them. All she asks for in return is a lavish life and protection from anyone who might harm her. But with every ghoul she defeats, Simone realizes that the true dangers lie within the manor itself. Can Simone save House Illeston? Or will she die trying...?  (Source: Tapas)

title: My Life As A Loser 2
description: This isn’t the life I wanted!!! After reliving high school as Jin-U, the boy he once bullied, An-Cheol is now a new person. But his new life takes an unexpected turn. Once again, he is sent back in time to live as Jin-U. But this time, Jin-U is also back... as An-Cheol!  (Source: WEBTOON, edited)

title: I’m a Villainess with a Handsome Husband
description: Newlywed life isn't so great for the heroine who wakes up as Lamaine, the villainess in the novel "The Blue Flower at the Duke's Estate." Although Lamaine's husband, Cedric, is handsome enough to make her nose bleed, he is unfortunately in love with the novel's female protagonist and despises Lamaine. But Cedric must stay married until he inherits the family title, and promises Lamaine a future divorce and hefty alimony in return for her cooperation. Meanwhile, Lamaine uses her skills as a doctor from her previous life to help people around the estate, blissfully unaware that Cedric's frigid attitude toward her is changing...    (Source: Tappytoon)

title: Hero the Maximum
description:
Gang-Chi Han is a failed student who couldn’t excel in any field. His GPA hits the bottom, ranking last among his classmates. His skills, whether it is soccer or computer games, are scorned by his peers. Whatever he does, he doesn’t seem to do well. But he lately comes to a realization that his punching power is out of this world. With a little help from his father, the Handsome Bum, he enters the First Branch of Heroes. Now, the villains must shiver under his might, but will they? (Source: WEBTOONS, edited)

Note: Chapter count includes a prologue chapter.

title: Baljak
description: Jo Pae, a slightly off-kilter boy, wants to become emperor of Korea... His first step when he enters high school is to become the leader of the strongest school there is. No one expecting it, he actually takes down all of the school's yankees. Jo Pae is now the enemy to kill! All rival schools wants his head whatever the means!

title: Only Virgins Left Alive
description: Choi Gyutae is a French high schooler who comes to Korea as a transfer student. On his first day of class, he meets Lin Seok: a handsome student who just so happens to be in the same class. Lin Seok’s friendly disposition and irresistible charm leads Gyutae to fall head over heads the moment he lays eyes on him. However, on their way back home Seok says something that makes Gyutae lose all hope of the two of them ever dating: “Guys who don’t keep their virginity...should really just go die.” Taken aback by this unrealistic condition for love, Gyutae decides to settle for the two of them remaining platonic for the rest of their lives. Six years later, they’ve become good roommates and even better friends. But when Gyutae witnesses something that shocks him to his core, their relationship might be in danger. Will a misunderstanding cause their friendship to be dead in the water? Or will their relationship be able to survive the competition?    (Source: Lezhin US)    Note: Includes ten extras

title: This Life's Universal Superstar
description: Hard-pressed to find good luck in this universe, Sun Woo-Joo gives up on his dream of becoming an idol in favor of living a normal life. That is, until he finds himself waking up from a car accident on his exam day! But as luck would have it, Woo-Joo can now copy any move exactly as he sees it, and his two left feet that kept him from debuting are now moving to the beat! With this newfound skill, will Woo-Joo be able to turn things around and become the star that shines the brightest on stage?  (Source: Tapas)

title: Étrangère
description: A standard parachuting drill turns deadly for Commander Kang San and Lieutenant Kim Biyeon when they land in a mysterious dimension filled with bloodthirsty monsters. The only help they have comes in the form of mysterious texts and rewards for completing missions. As the two soldiers push themselves to their limits to survive, they unlock mysterious abilities that are powerful beyond their control. Can they learn to harness these powers to stay alive and make it out of this twisted game?    (Source: Tapas)   Note: Chapter count includes a prologue.

title: The Empress’s Two Wolves
description: In a world where destiny is branded on their skin, Sepia, the human empress of the beastkin empire, is threatened by a new rival: Titié, a white deer, with Demios the emperor’s name emblazoned on her chest. Amidst Titié’s malicious attempts, Sepia clings to her role as empress and the Star of Ishtar, determined to fulfill her destiny as the empire’s savior. Enter Roxan, a wolf beastkin and cousin to Demois, whose allure stirs Sepia’s feelings. In a web of love, loyalty, and deception, can Sepia reclaim her power and discover the truth of her heart?  (Source: WEBTOON)

title: ODDEYE
description: When he opened his eyes, he had a knife in hand and there was a female corpse lying next to him. He couldn't remember anything, who he was, why he was there, and why he had superpowers. In a panic, he could only try to avoid police pursuit and investigate the matter in private. But when he came face to face with the truth, he didn't know what he should do anymore...     (Source: QQ, translated)     Note: Series co-produced by Kenaz (South Korea) and Tencent (China). It was released a day earlier in Korea, so it will figure as a South Korean series in AniList.

title: Amkeot Gildeuryeo Sinbunsangseung
description: The MC is summoned to a matriarchal society. Due to his massive penis, he is enslaved by a baroness. Can our MC live a happy life by dominating high class women in this female-dominated world?  (Source: TOPTOON, translated)

title: Protecting the Witch's Son
description: I'd give my life to protect you. To others, she was a witch to be feared. But to Elaine, Bella was her savior. After a night of tragedy destroys the life she knows, Elaine wakes to find Bella's heart now beating in her chest. Startled, she sets out to find Rhys, Bella's son, only to discover he is no longer as he once was...    (Source: Manta)

title: Cairo
description: Ancient Egypt... where the pharaoh Cairo, the son of the sun god, resides. Perfect face, perfect physique, endless treasure of silver and gold ? but still, Cairo has worries. Life for him is simply an endless cycle of death and resurrection and he's getting bored of it. And so, he wants to find out the meaning of life. He wants to find a purpose! This is where the ever helpful Imhotep steps in, to suggest that the Pharaoh should, then, try going on a blind date!

title: Pungyoui Yeosingwa Cheonjae Mangnani Sadonim
description: I broke through 0.0000001% and became an apostle serving the [God of Abundance]. It's clearly a god related to agriculture... but his basic skill is decapitation. When you decapitate someone, farming starts. Crop processing also starts. - I'm selling a health functional food that's so good, I can't even describe it.  (Source: Naver, translated)

title: Escape into Oblivion
description: Woojin wants nothing more than to escape reality. Hwon wants nothing more than to be with Woojin. Baffled by the intensity of Hwon’s love, Woojin makes a series of absurd demands to push him away. But no matter how cruel the demands are, Hwon never gives up.    (Source: Lezhin)

title: Shameless
description: Emperor Yi Yeon is famous throughout the kingdom of Hochang for his outstanding political prowess and ruthless attitude towards sycophants. After relentlessly bullying his palace cleaners into fainting on the job, junior eunuch Yoo Yak-woo is called upon to fulfill the cleaning duties, which he enjoys to the point of being nicknames Sogwija, aka “the cleaning demon”. Immediately, this young, fresh-faced eunuch and his delectably juicy buttocks catch the emperor’s eye. One night, Yi yeon calls Yoo Yak-woo to his room for a very “special” cleaning service and the shenanigans begin to unfold…    (Source: Lezhin US)   Note: Includes five extra chapters.</>

title: Hand in Hand
description: While running a small pharmacy in the outskirts of the city, Sam meets a mysterious and out of place patient. Is that all there is to him though?    (Source: Toomics)

title: Seongseureoun Idol
description: Rembrary, the deputy of God loved by all and the holy high priest. When I woke up while fighting against the Demon King who invaded my world, I woke up as an underrated idol in Korea..!    Will he be able to safely adjust to the idol life and return to his original world?  (Source: Naver, translated)

title: Elaine's Unique Situation
description: After giving up her dream to become a priestess, Elaine resignedly applies to work as a maid in the imperial palace and earn money for her family. While working, she runs into a mysterious man who treats her with unusual kindness. Moved by his gestures, Elaine begins to fall for him... until she finds out he's none other than the war hero, Prince Theo Veronica! But just when she tries to distance herself from the prince, he offers her a unique deal that will change her life forever.    (Source: Tapas)

title: Seopinghareo Gallae?
description: How did the phrase "Surf with me" became a connotation for "Sleep with me"? There are strange rumors​ surrounding Ha Doyoon, and Sung Jin, curious to find the truth behind those rumors, approached him. The events that unfolded during the 3 days that followed only made him more and more confused.    (Source: Bomtoon, translated)    Note: Part of Kidari Entertainment's "Yeoreumdanpyeonseon: Some in Summer (~키다리이엔티 여름단편선~ 썸인썸머, Kidari Entertainment Summer Short Story Collection: Some in Summer)"

title: Want to See My Cat?
description: Cha-Yeong Mun had the perfect life -- a peaceful life in the countryside with a loving husband, three cats who run the house, and two dogs who think they’re cats. One day, she goes into the city to meet her friends and dies while saving a student from being hit by a truck. The god in the afterlife gives her the incredibly rare chance to go back to her wonderful life, but only under the condition of going back 10 years in time. Given the second chance, Will she be able to marry her husband again and rebuild that perfect life she knew?    (Source: WEBTOON, edited)

title: Feel My Benefit
