description: "Joohyun dreams of a romantic first time with someone he truly loves. Enter Seojun, a shameless flirt with undeniable charm (and a body to match). Determined to stick to his ideals, Joohyun finds himself wavering as Seojun’s relentless allure tests his resolve. Will his heart win over his head, or is this just a disaster waiting to happen?"    (Source: Lezhin)

title: Mom Cam Yeochin
description: Nam-Wook, of the clothing department, loses weight in the military and returns to school as a super-stud returning student. Nam-Wook, who barely returned to his school after an excruciating time in the military can’t cope with the sudden rise in his status. He inadvertently checks his smartphone and receives secret messages from a mysterious woman.  (Source: Toomics)

title: Chongaereul Geojeolhaneunde Wae Jipchakanayo
genres: Comedy, Drama, Fantasy, Slice of Life, Supernatural
description: The extra who sacrifices herself for the beloved female lead. Princess Shuelina who is tossed aside by her biologically related father and older brother. Now I’m the main character of this odd situation. In regards to hope, I’m still neglected at this orphanage. Just as I was going to run away before the imperial family found me–    “Did you hear? The House of Grand Duke Vailot came to sponsor an orphan.”    To find a way to live, I threw myself at the villain's family, the Grand Duke’s, and-    “You can do whatever you want. I, as the Grand Duke, will protect you.”    “You’re not an orphan. You’re my younger sister.”    Why do they love me?    Just as I made up my mind to live well since I'd already become a lady of the House of Grand Duke Vailot...    "I have searched for you for a long time, my child."    This time my biologically related father, the Emperor loves me. Why are you acting like this? I said, I don't need you guys who wouldn't have listened to what Shuelina had to say. I refuse to accept your love!   (Source: KakaoPage, translated)   Note: Promotional prologue for the homonym web novel.

title: Bittersweet Con Panna
genres: Comedy, Drama, Romance, Slice of Life
description: Graduate student Song-Ah thinks her girlfriend Yoo-Sung is the cutest girl in the world. It doesn't matter if she's actually more sophisticated than adorable; Yoo-Sung is number one in her heart! So how is she supposed to react when some hot childhood friend suddenly enters the mix?!  (Source: Manta)   Note: Includes 19 extra chapters.

title: Dear Teddy Bear
description: Min-Hyung's lifelong desire is simple: to wholly possess Yi-Jae, the man who raised him. Cunningly concealing his dark devotion, Min-Hyung eliminates any obstacles in his path until Yi-Jae becomes reliant on Min-Hyung alone. That is, before the arrival of a man named Hyeon Ho disrupts everything. Will Min-Hyung's meticulous plans withstand this bold interloper, or will he be forced to confront the harsh reality that some childhood dreams may remain unfulfilled?    (Source: Lezhin US)

title: Study Buddies
description: Min-Ho ends up living with his two childhood friends after his dad asks one of them to tutor him for his college entrance exam.  (Source: Toomics, edited)

title: Carnelian: the Sille Dragon Odyssey
description: Julitan is a cook who's never left his tiny fishing village. That is until one day, when he slices open the belly of a giant fish and finds a mysterious lady sleeping inside, cradling a giant sword. Julitan bestows her with the name Carnelian, only to accidentally awaken a powerful "sille" being. But Carnelian the sille soon discovers her new tamer and master Sir Julitan is no match for her superior power. Now the two must embark on a long quest to find this fierce sille dragon's true knight!    (Source: Tapas)

title: Yeonaehakgaeron
description: Doyun followed his high school crush Hosu to university! Hosu gets drunk at the welcoming party, and Doyun tries to help him get home, but Hosu's so drunk they end up having to stay at a Motel. Doyun picks up a condom he randomly found, but Hosu just so happens to wake up at that moment...! Will Doyun be able to confess to Hosu despite his shyness?

title: Teach Me How to Please You
description: From cooking skills to blowjob techniques, it’s Chang-nam’s job to make sure the robots at his training facility know how to act both in and outside the bedroom. But teaching these robots how to please their masters proves to be more complicated than programming a few commands…  (Source: Lezhin US)

title: Thirst: For Lust
description: Sex is so important for a healthy relationship. So when both sides are dissatisfied, it's easy for hussies to sneak in and try to make things worse. Both husband and wife will have to make a choice...  (Source: TOPTOON+)

title: Aristité was Blessed with a Curse
description: In the Kingdom of Strandeon, one man from each noble family is required to serve in the Order of the Royal Vine, and Aristité is chosen to fulfill this duty for House Theseus. One day, while the order is carrying out a mission, a witch places a curse on Aristité, saying that he’ll lose something important. Everyone in the order thinks that this curse is what transforms Aristité into a woman, but little do they know that Aristité, whose real name is Ariel, was a woman from the start. All the curse did was take away her special medicine that changes her voice. With the help of her friends and cousin, Ariel struggles to protect her secret, but someone in the order seems determined to expose her and land her in trouble...    (Source: TappyToon)    Note: The English translation was pre-released on Tappytoon before the Korean version was published on Naver on October 7, 2022.

title: Yamanui Sidae
description: I found someone who looks exactly like me on SNS! He seems to have everything unlike me who grew up in an orphanage. Maybe he could be my twin?! When I was about to find him and solve my life problems, I got into huge trouble!!    (Source: YLAB)    Note: Belongs to Blue String universe.

title: Ending This Marriage for Your Happiness
description: Having forced her husband, Alfonso, into a loveless marriage, Charlotte accepted when he sought solace from another woman. So when she wakes up in the past with a second chance, Charlotte hopes to sever ties while uniting him with his true love. To her dismay, however, any attempt to guide him away leads him right back to her! With Alfonso's gaze shifted to her, Charlotte is stuck between fixing her past regrets and shaping this new present into the future she had once hoped for with Alfonso.    (Source: Tapas)

title: Business as Unusual
description: Kim Minjun is your average 30-year-old office worker. Now that he’s older, Minjun is feeling the pressure to accomplish more in life, and he can't shake the feeling that something is missing amidst the monotonous routine of his 9-to-5 job. Out of nowhere, his ex-boyfriend Jinhwan shows up as a new co-worker, looking as handsome and charismatic as ever while Minjun feels like he hasn’t progressed at all since their breakup 10 years ago. Determined not to let an ex from a decade ago mess with his work life, Minjun just wants to carry on with business as usual. But it seems that Jinhwan has other plans in mind...    (Source: Lezhin)

title: Gun Gaek
description: The No.1 Hitman, Kim Gun, finds himself plunged into the world of martial arts due to a mysterious accident. To return to his original world, he must complete a mission called 'Martial Arts Conquest.' With a total of 2 guns, Kim Gun's adventure to subdue the unfamiliar martial arts world begins.  (Source: Naver, translated)

title: Sekdareuge Haeyo
description: Yu-Jun and Geon-U have been a couple for 3 years. While Yu-Jun worries that Geon-U  might have gotten tired of their time together, he looks for ways to spice up their relationship in colorful ways. A feast of a couple's sweet play!     (Source: Bomtoon, translated)

title: By Chance
description: My dumb friend took me to a karaoke for no reason. But wait the girls here are super hot...And is that...That girl from high school? She used to be so kind and pretty...Why is she bouncing on some guy's dick? I want to reconnect with her.  (Source: TOPTOON+)

title: The Flower of Veneration
description: Lady of Vengeance and the returned Prince.   Cecylia Saryan, liege to the order of Hearthtread and heir to the Dukedom after her father's sudden death, discovers a young boy hidden in his legacy — the Crown Prince Ethan, thought to have drowned 5 years ago. Will Cecylia be able to keep her House intact while helping Ethan reclaim his throne?    (Source: Manta)

title: This face genius is good at soccer
description: One day a goddess asked Min-Jun, who loved football and chased his dream harder than anyone else, but was left behind due to slow growth and an unimpressive appearance.   "I'm the goddess of soccer. What is your wish?"   "Sex"   On that day, his ordinary life completely changed.  (Source: DAYcomics, edited)

title: Bloodbound
description: "Fabian is a seemingly ordinary man who suddenly manifests abilities as an Esper one day. On top of dealing with his newfound powers, he must deal with Konrad: his S-class guide who treats him with an unusual level of care and attention. Initially confused, Fabian finds Konrad’s purpose for openly treating Fabian with such benevolence is to take advantage of his S-class abilities, his healthy body, and... blood?!    “Yours is the best I've ever tasted.”    Can Fabian defend himself against a guide who wants both his body, his brawn, and his blood?"    (Source: Lezhin US)

title: My Fantasies Are Cumming to Life?!
description: Park Seojin is the very picture of a ladylike woman. She’s elegant, modest, and works harder than anyone at her successful job at a large corporation. Or, at least that’s the image of herself that Seojin has carefully crafted in order to indulge in her actual hobbies: reading hardcore smut! In reality, Seojin is just your average 'otaku,' fangirling and obsessing over steamy romance novels every night. Lately, her new obsession has been the one man in her life who remotely resembles a male lead in her romance novels - her boss, Yoon Taehyun! However, Seojin knows that her fantasies are destined to stay just that - fantasies. They're employee and boss, and nothing could change that. But when Yoon Taehyun discovers a crack in her perfectly curated persona, could their relationship potentially change into something else?  (Source: Lezhin US)   Note: Includes one extra chapter.

title: Bloodbound
description: "Fabian is a seemingly ordinary man who suddenly manifests abilities as an Esper one day. On top of dealing with his newfound powers, he must deal with Konrad: his S-class guide who treats him with an unusual level of care and attention. Initially confused, Fabian finds Konrad’s purpose for openly treating Fabian with such benevolence is to take advantage of his S-class abilities, his healthy body, and... blood?!    “Yours is the best I've ever tasted.”    Can Fabian defend himself against a guide who wants both his body, his brawn, and his blood?"    (Source: Lezhin US)

title: Reality Lover
description: Chunghyun is known as the scary and strict team leader, but secretly he loves BL novels. In his latest BL novel purchase, the main character looks like his junior Taein, making him uneasy. With Taein discovering his secret, he uses this as his chance to tell his feelings and pounce  (Source: INKR)  Note: Chapter count includes nine side story chapters.

title: HOME5
description: When Do-ha has been kicked out of his parents’ house and is in dire need of a place to live in, he finds his sanctuary in a beautiful, brag-on-social-media-worthy shared house in Home5. It’s the perfect place for him! There’s exactly one catch: the owner of the place is Si-woon, his first love from high school. It should be fine, though. They’re cool with each other now, they both have their own lives, and there’s no lingering feelings whatsoever, right? …Right?    (Soruce: Lezhin US)   Note: Includes 12 side story chapters.

title: Lovesick Dog
description: “About 14,000 years ago, certain wolves caught a disease called “lovesickness.” And when they met people, they became their companion dogs.”    If one word could encapsulate Noh Ye-gyum, it would be “lovesick.” Despite him loving people with all his heart, Ye-gyum finds himself trapped in an endless cycle of being used, betrayed, and ultimately abandoned. This time proves no different for him, as the family of his current ""master"" Jooyung drives him away to pave the path for Jooyung's advantageous marriage and future spouse. Alone once again, Ye-gyum is left to gather his belongings and leave. Or is he? Suddenly, a mysterious man named Jooin appears, sweeping Ye-gyum away to his home. There, he is fed, clothed, and showered with an overwhelming amount of affection. As Ye-gyum senses the telltale signs of his lovesickness resurfacing, an uncertainty lingers: will this man also leave him, or could he finally hold the cure to this lifelong affliction?    (Source: Lezhin US)   Note: Includes eight side story chapters.

title: Salty Lust
description: Saying bye-bye to Earth and blasting off to school in space was a dream come true for Nux. But no one told him how mediocre he would seem stacked up against the brightest minds in the universe. With lackluster grades that could never afford him a scholarship, he's forced into illegal part-time work just to pay the bills. But when a handsome alien propositions him with an offer to make his money problems disappear, he realizes it comes at an astronomical price.    (Source: Tappytoon)

title: Put a Smile On
description: For Lee Kang, the captain of the swim team, life is a constant power struggle. And whether it's in sports, or in bed - he always wins. But when Junho from the baseball team accidentally witnesses him having sex with the TA, Kang finds his unyielding new opponent. Will Junho get destroyed just like the others, or will he remain standing with a defiant look in his eyes?    (Source: Lezhin)

title: Too Cute to Handle
description: Forget "saving face," this is "saved by face!"    Roseny has been masquerading as a boy for years at the orphanage. But when the duke chooses her to be a playmate for his son, it isn't long before her secret is revealed. Instead of being sent back, her adorable complexion results in Roseny being adopted! What will this new future hold for her?    (Source: Manta)

title: God Bless You
description: Marriage is not on her agenda! When a two-time mixed martial arts champion dies and wakes up in the body of the petite Lady Grace Rambler, she quickly decides to make the best of things -- to attract a so-called “unicorn man,” the rare kind of gentleman who’s modest, exciting, and handsome! But her dreams are crushed when she finds out Grace is set to marry Duke Aston Blade, a perverted and ugly old geezer… Or is he?! Not willing to risk it, she rejects the marriage and sticks to her guns. It’s either a unicorn man or bust!    (Source: Tappytoon)

title: The Stand-up Guy
description: Lovelyn, a company where all the employees are underwear models... I thought this was my dream job, but why are these girls looking at me like that?  (Source: Toomics)

title: Sub Complex
description: When I opened my eyes, I had become the heroine of a romance comic!    I may have become the heroine, but I prefer the second male lead!

title: Gyeyakhasigetseupnikka?
genres: Action, Drama, Mystery, Slice of Life
description: “This is for the chairman. Is there a problem with that? "     These words came back like a dagger, and that day, I died and I came back to life. From Yoon Suk, who was the director of the best real estate investment company in South Korea, to Kim Dong-kyu, who was a loner and a loser, in momentary frustration, I rose again for revenge.    Wait for me. I’ll make sure to make them pay for what they did to me. Today, I plan as Yoon Suk and execute it as Kim Dong-kyu. For the sake of revenge.    (Source: KakaoPage, translated)

title: Like No Other
description: Stacy and I have a mutual agreement... to "help" each other when in need... What could possibly go wrong... right?  (Source: Toomics)

title: You Are So Lovely
description: Feared by name alone, Shin Juhyeok never expected his toughest challenge to be... raising a kid? After rescuing a young hybrid named Lee Hae-on from an accident, Juhyeok planned to keep him around just until he recovered. But the once-scrawny stray grows up—fast—and now towers over his reluctant guardian, refusing to leave his side. Juhyeok can handle gangs and thugs, but nothing could prepare him for this: Hae-on’s first heat. Sweet, clingy, and completely unaware of personal space, Hae-on’s affection is anything but subtle. Raising a hybrid was never part of the plan—but neither was falling for one.    (Source: Lezhin)

title: The Bird Empress
description: A bird is the sacred symbol of the great empire Apollinaire. In fact, legend has it that one day a sacred bird of silver and gold will come to earth and bring glory to the empire. Nowadays, the thing on everyone’s mind is when the emperor will find a wife. Since Richard Apollinaire is a romantic, he wants to fall in love instead of marrying for politics. Then one day, a small egg appears and from it hatches... a tiny silver and gold bird.    (Source: Tapas)   Note: Includes one extra chapter.

title: Jeongnyeoni
description: Jeong-Nyeon has no money or education, but she is a Mokpo girl with a talent for singing! Her dream is to join a women's traditional theater company, and make it big. But she has a lot to learn and a long way to go before becoming a lead actor. Will Jeong-Nyeon achieve her dream of becoming a big star and getting rich?    The story begins in 1956 (post-war Korea) in the southwestern port city of Mokpo.

title: Girls I Used to Teach
description: "My students were this lewd?" Jun-Hyung got fired from the school after a shameful incident and ends up working at a convenience store. Meanwhile, he runs into his old students one by one who looks sexy and arousing. (Source: DAYcomics)

title: Trust Me, I'm Lying
description:
Getting ghosted is the worst way to break up, no contest. After years of heartbreak, Eun-Kyo finally gets to enjoy a quiet life running a café with her best friend. But peace shatters when Jae-Heon, their new basement tenant, barges into her life. Wild, handsome, and maybe a bit of trouble, he begins to test Eun-Kyo's resolve to swear off dating.
(Source: Manta)

title: Zombie Revelation: 82-08
description: A mysterious virus breaks out on board the Boat 82-08 out at sea. The people who find out about it first only want to use it as a weapon but quickly lose control over the virus. Will the Trio survive long enough to rejoin their friend Jinu? Or will it be Jinu who doesn’t make it out to meet his friends?    (Source: WEBTOON)

title: The Genius Spirited Streamer
description: Gyeong-Bok Lee possesses a gift that grants him a sixth sense and supernatural foresight -- however, this ability comes at a steep price, debilitating him each time it is used. But when Gyeong-Bok tries virtual reality gaming for the first time, he makes a startling discovery: not only could he leverage his psychic ability to gain a significant advantage in the virtual world, but he was also entirely free from its afflictions. Seizing this opportunity, Gyeong-Bok sets out to become a legendary video game streamer, turning his curse into his greatest asset.   (Source: WEBTOON, edited)

title: Substitute Boyfriend
description: Haegeum's fiancé offers her an outrageous proposal... he wants them to each have one last steamy fling with other people before getting married. After her initial heartbreak and shock, she agrees, but for only one reason—revenge! She wants him to regret this selfish decision, and the best way to accomplish that is with a younger, sexier boyfriend. Luckily, the perfect guy just moved in next door. Sihoon is accomplished, handsome, and charming... but he's her younger brother's best friend. Can Haegeum get her revenge AND keep the guy?    (Source: Tapas)

title: Haksaenghoejangui Sumgyeojin Eommuneun Yeohagudeurui Seongjeok Hyangsangimnida
description: As soon as U-Ju becomes the student council president, all the female students who were supposed to help him resign. By chance, he discovers a tablet in a warehouse that can control women, and uses the power of the tablet to take revenge... [Fuck all the female students by command.]    (Source: TOPTOON, translated)

title: Shriek
genres: Drama, Horror, Mystery, Psychological, Supernatural, Thriller
description: Prepare to swallow your screams. This horror anthology is loaded with special effects for maximum scare–just in time for Halloween. (Source: WEBTOONS) Stories Included: 1. Gwisinalba (귀신알바, A Ghostly Job) [DEY] 2. Live (라이브, Live) [Dan-Woo] 3. Sontopdal (손톱달, Stratching) [Jin-Guk Im] 4. Ttogakttogak (또각또각, Footsteps) [Karin Park] 5. Bunsinsaba (분신사바, Spirits) [Yong-Jin Kim] 6. Usan (우산, The Umbrella) [Yetsaram] 7. Jjirasigoedam (찌라시괴담, Tabloids) [Yeowon] 8. Nae Kkumeun Hyeonmoyangcheo (내 꿈은 현모양처, Good Wife) [joana] 9, I Black Dress (아이 블랙 드레스, I, Black Dress) [Bo Ri Cheong] 10. Hwanhyangnyeo (환향녀, The Returned Girls) [Il-Gwon Go] 11. Hyeolgyu (혈규(穴竅), The Hole) [Story: Oenunbagi x Art: Sihyun] 12. Gyegok(계곡, The Creek) [Soohun] 13. Danjjak (단짝, Best Friends) [Story: Se-Jun Park x Art: Jae-Il Seo] 14. Imyeong (이명, Tinnitus) [Yun-Jin Choi] 15. Siljong (실종, Missing) [Hong-Jun Choi] 16. Jumeonigwisin (주머니귀신) [Chyupeuretji] 17. Ppalgan Yeojaui Sup (빨간 여자의 숲, The Red Woman's Forest) [Rangddo] 18. Maengin (맹인) [Story: Massstar x Art: Jin-Guk Im] 19. Jeonsaenggeim (전생게임, The Past Life Game) [DEY]

title: Don't Be Too Nice
description: Just four years ago, Rustica Genas was the most gifted knight in the Caleta Empire and one of the emperor's most trusted servants. But after challenging his will one too many times, all of her fame, glory, and power were stripped from her. Then what can poor Rustica do but shamefully fade into obscurity? Well, when the rival empire's ruler sets his sights on winning her heart and freedom, she might have a chance to reclaim more than just her reputation. What could be waiting for her just beyond the Great Barrier?   (Source: Tappytoon)

title: Your Ryan
description: In the quiet village of Feltham, Eloise Surbiton leads a peaceful life far from the hubbub of the city, tending to geese and secretly fawning over dashing war hero Lt. Col. Ryan Wilgrave from afar. When her father mentions that a certain military man named Ryan will be moving to the nearby town of Cambourne, Eloise is thrilled — only to have her hopes dashed when she meets her new neighbor Ryan Thornton, a gruff soldier who is the opposite of the Ryan Wilgrave she knows. Little does she realize, there may be more to Ryan than meets the eye…  (Source: WEBTOON)

title: LOVE WINS
description: Da-yeon was excited by the news of legalization of same-sex marriage. She ended up filing a marriage registration with a woman she didn't know because she was drunk...?!

title: Step Into the Past
description: Jae-Hyeon's life was ruined by his stepmother, the woman who drove his mother to death and later caused his father's downfall. Consumed by hatred and forbidden desire, he takes revenge on her, only to die in a tragic accident. But fate has other plans... Awakening 25 years in the past, before his family’s destruction began, Jae-Hyeon must change the course of his life. Will he break free from his past, or repeat the same twisted destiny?   (Source: Lezhin US)

title: Pokgunui Haengbang
description:
Once upon a time, there was a handsome king who was greedy and cruel. When God reviewed the record of his life, God shook his head and asked the three women who suffered the most because of the king, "What punishment would you like him to receive?" The three women, glancing at one another, answered in unison, "Please send all of us back to Earth."

The women took away his beauty, his swordsmanship, and his uncaring attitude, and the king is reincarnated as Ji-En the maid. The three women are reborn as men, and when they meet Ji-En, the tangled relationships from their past life reemerge…!

"What did I do in my past life to deserve this mess!"

(Source: Kakao Webtoon, translated)

title: Hwaryongwang
description: Seo Moon Moo-hui, who had no choice but to look at the world with a different eye from his childhood, unfolds a new world from the tip of his brush, who unexpectedly went out to Kang-Ho!     (Source: Kakao, translated)

title: Biting the Tiger - Side Stories
description: “Lord Tiger, are you going to eat me?”     After Han-Ul finds his way back to Yun-Ho, they spend some much-needed romantic time together. But, as Yun-Ho falls back into his routine of practicing and performing with his band, Han-Ul finds himself feeling a bit lonely. So, Yun-Ho and Han-Ul decide to head out on a relaxing trip to a waterpark with Na-Ru and Han-Ul. While on the trip, Na-Ru decides to help Yun-Ho bring Han-Wool's fantasy to life with the introduction of a steamy present! Dive into the tempting and enchanting side stories of <Biting the Tiger>!    (Source: Netcomics)

title: That Which Flows By
description: Dan-i, a Jurchen girl who was saved by General Gyeol Seo during a bandit attack, has to serve tea for him in his house in Hanyang. However, she has to hide her true identity and pretend to be from Joseon, due to the rumors that the general slaughters Jurchen people, regardless of gender or age. Gyeol on the other hand, cannot drink clear water because of a tragic incident that happened when he was young, and has a lot of enemies who want to kill him. Can Dan-i and Gyeol Seo survive against all odds?    (Source: WEBTOONS, edited)

title: If You Can't Kill Me, Love Me
description: In a kingdom scarred by a historical rebellion, Penny, an assassin masquerading as a servant, aims to break free from Queen Nyla's grasp by executing a perilous mission: the theft of the king's ring from Princess Cher, known as the wicked Princess of Death. Yet her intentions take a turn as she slowly becomes captivated by the princess. As their destinies become entwined, Penny grapples with a dilemma, torn between her pursuit of freedom and the unexpected connections she forges with Cher.    (Source: Tapas)

title: Beloved Golden Light Gratia
description: Gratia has never known the warm love of family. But one day, she suddenly finds herself surrounded by everything she doesn’t have: riches, nobility, and most of all, a loving family. Before the vision ends, they tell Gratia they love her and will see her soon, but that she must first face hardship. Hearing news of a missing child, a man takes her to Luchiffalo Manor, where she meets the same family from her vision! Is Gratia the lost child of House Luchiffalo, and did she really see the future?    (Source: Tapas)

title: The Forbidden Marriage
description: It’s been seven years since King Heon Lee declared a marriage ban in Joseon after the death of his wife. But one day, he comes across a woman named So-Rang Ye who claims she can summon the spirits of the dead. Though So-Rang was lying about her spiritual powers, she now has no choice but to put on an act for the king. As the secrets behind the mysterious death of the king’s wife and So-Rang’s past start unraveling, the red thread of fate becomes more entangled…  (Source: WEBTOON, edited)    Note: Includes eight extra chapters.

title: Spring, the Color of Love
description: "Je te veux. I want you."    Cheongsun and Gonghyeon meet as college students, but their differences in station and experience lead to a painful falling out. Ten years later, the two meet again in the world of hotel management and get to reminiscing about their short spring love all those years before...

title: The Vanished Duchess
description: Mable Ra Robin, once a duchess to house Quintrell, disappeared without a trace. 5 years later, she shows up at her family's house in the middle of the night. But her name was no longer Duchess Quintrell, she's now Lady Robin because she left her husband. But there's one more surprise, she brought a boy with her. The name is Patrick, and he's the child of a heartless duke and her ex-husband, Percival De Quintrell.    (Source: POCKET COMICS)

title: Sexcape Room: Wipe Out
description: The first in the "Sexcape Room" series!  Eun-Hyuk finds himself in a room with his old crush and muse, Anna. Since the two parted on bad terms, the situation isn’t ideal. But if that isn’t bad enough, turns out that in order to get out of this room, they need to…have sex! With so much on the line, will the two be able to break out?    (Source: Lezhin X, edited)

title: The Thread Never Burned
description: Jo Ji-Won is just your average college kid—well, except for the part where he scams people by pretending to be a shaman. Thanks to his silver tongue and some lucky guesses, he gains a reputation as a spiritual powerhouse. Unfortunately, word gets around… all the way to Jeong Tae-Oh, a superstitious mob boss who actually believes in that stuff. When Tae-Oh shows up demanding help, Ji-Won pretends to take the job—then immediately tries to run. Too bad he gets caught.    He wakes up in a sketchy motel, staring death in the face. Thinking fast, Ji-Won blurts out: "Y-you need me as a talisman! To stay alive, we have to… sleep together!"   He’s sure a tough guy like Tae-Oh would bolt at the thought. Instead, Tae-Oh just shrugs.   "You should’ve said so earlier. Is once enough or do we need more?"  (Source: Lezhin US)

title: See You Again
description: Shiwoo always used to say, “Yujin, you’re my favorite person in the whole wide world.” And Shiwoo always believed he was truly special to Yujin. After all, Shiwoo never really liked all those girls he dated, anyway. But when Yujin finally confesses his love, he finds himself rejected and alone... Years later, Shiwoo is a celebrity. The hard-to-manage celebrity gets a new manager that seems so familiar... her name is even Yujin... It takes but one night of too many drinks for Shiwoo to discover she isn’t really what she seems.    (Source: Lezhin)    Note: Include ten extra chapters.

title: Hwangjeneun Yeogi Iss-eo Gisaneun Toegeunhal Geoya
description: "Sir Leon, please guard my bedside tonight."  "Give me a bonus. I'll just leave if you don't."   The guard leader Leon, who appreciates a good work-life balance, and Emperor Oso, who wants to spend all his time with Leon. Will these two ever escape their current employer-employee relationship?

title: Defeating Dungeons via Copy Paste!
description: Han-Jun is the weakest hunter alive. While others wield powerful skills, he’s stuck with a useless copy-paste ability and mocked by everyone around him. Cursed during the Great Calamity, he has only five years left to live… but Han-Jun refuses to give up. When a chance discovery reveals his skill’s hidden potential, everything changes. As he rises through the ranks, a new calamity begins to stir. Time is running out, and Han-Jun may be the world’s last hope—an unlikely hero with a power no one saw coming.  (Source: WEBTOONS)

title: Sonyeo 180
genres: Comedy, Drama, Romance, Slice of Life
description: 184 cm tall and known by the titles of “flower boy beauty” and all-around male fashion model is actually a girl!

title: Romantic Captain Darling
description: Rafael Heinsworth might be the most adorable recruit Captain Dante has ever had. Sure, Dante likes him. Who wouldn’t like someone so beautiful and sweet? And if Rafael wants to profess his eternal love for Dante, that’s fine too. Dante doesn’t date his recruits. Even when they’re no longer recruits. Even when they’re in his bed most days. Dante will absolutely not budge on this, no matter how romantic or skillful Rafael becomes. Absolutely, probably… not.   (Source: Tapas)   Note: Chapter count includes 4 side story chapters.

title: Mr.Miss
description: After being outed by his first love in high school, Juho has been struggling in his romantic endeavors ever since. One evening after a distasteful phone call with a cheating ex, Juho sees someone has been staring at him. Juho recognizes Kang Jaemin, an old high school classmate. Juho and Jaemin briefly catch up on each other's lives when Juho makes a surprising offer for Jaemin to stay the night at his place to which Jaemin agrees.    (Source: Pocket Comics)    Note: Chapter count includes 8 side stories.

title: Serenade
description: A professor living a successful life with a secret. Two students who each have a hold on their mentor: one who knows her secret and another who reminds her of her first love... A romantic thriller that will leave you hanging for more.  (Source: Lezhin)  Note: Includes 1 extra chapter.

title: Doseogwaneneun Manyeoga Piryohada
description: A sudden arrival of letter to her one fine day. By the request of the letter, the witch Bessi Ale returns to her homeland, Veyron Empire after having left it 16 years ago.    After becoming the newly appointed manager of the National Library which was on the brink of closure, she has a premonition that she will be entangled with the secret that's kept hidden in the imperial palace.......    "From now on, I promise to be by your side."   "You are special to me. More special to me than anyone else in the world."    A small spark appears in the curious relationship she has with the knight Justin, who experienced a terrible ill-fated relationship in the past. Amidst all that, Bessi comes closer to revealing the truth that could shake the whole empire.    In the world where only women are able to use magic, shows how the super powerful witch Bessi survives as the manager of the library!"   (Source: Kakaopage, translated)

title: Into the Rose Garden
description: Count Aeroc Teiwind, a youthful aristocrat of noble lineage, finds himself captivated the moment he sees Kloff Bendyke, baron of a small countryside estate. Despite the disparities in their social standings, their wealth, and the unusual circumstance of them both being alphas, Aeroc still boldly professes his affections. However, Kloff chooses to wed one of Aeroc's kin instead. Consumed by jealousy, Aeroc calls for a harrowing punishment. Reeling from the consequences of Aeroc’s actions, Kloff swears to seek revenge…no matter the cost.    (Source: Lezhin US)

title: Why Is it You?
description: After getting a divorce, Jordyn slowly starts getting involved in the gay community with the help of Owen, his first gay friend.    (Source: Toomics)   Note: Includes five extra chapters.

title: Saengsagyeol: Kkaeeonaneun Jinin
description: Weak-looking Hwasan doesn't seem to be a man that fights on the front lines. Instead, he is a brilliant man who passed the civil service examination twice due to his outstanding character. Furthermore, he is also respected for his close connections with various kings and officials. But his identity is none other than the only successor to the HwaSan sect. He usually stays in his room and reads. However, in the rare instances that he does use his body, it is only to clean the yard or do light exercises. One night, he shocked everyone by entering a conflict to save disciplines of the HwaSan sect and fought on the front lines. In that event, the ridge where the HwaSan sect was located burned to the ground, leaving their threshold destroyed. A bunch of fake masters appeared and massacred all of the disciples and even the young. In response, Hwasan displayed great combat skills to take them down and protect the disciples of the HwaSan sect. To find out the mastermind behind the attack and what their purpose was, Hwasan revealed his identity to the world. After hiding his identity for countless years, high-ranking officials and powerful forces began tearing each other apart, collapsed in front of him to make the Hwasan sect a powerful group

title: Perfect Body Partner
description: Baek Shiwon is swole but always getting himself injured. Oh well, at least this physical therapist is hella cute… But wait, this person is a man! Still, something about him is so attractive, let’s just see where this goes… Things are looking promising until a certain someone that Shiwon is all too familiar with enters the picture…but Shiwon won’t back down without a fight. In the end, who will end up as perfect body partners?   (Source: Lezhin)

title: To You Who Doesn't Love Me
description: Ages ago in a land of myth and legend, a young girl called Rose stands tied to a stake, awaiting her cruel fate as a sacrifice to the sea serpent known as Leviathan. That is, until a dashing hero suddenly appears to defeat the monster and save Rose’s life. Eternally grateful, Rose becomes devoted to her rescuer Mikhail, who is the demigod son of the moon goddess, Diana. She joins his party of adventurers, but soon comes to realize that her savior may not be as noble as he seems…    (Source: Webtoons)

title: All for Me
description: Kang Jihan’s perfect gay life comes crashing down after drunkenly making out with Moon Heeseop, the nerdiest loser in his major. Though Jihan has sworn off dating, Heeseop begins following him everywhere, thinking their kiss has made them boyfriends. And Jihan isn’t faring any better with his casual partner of one year, Ji Jinyeong, who keeps wanting something more. With two obsessive guys begging for his love, Jihan could just cut things off with them both. If only they weren’t so packing where it counts, especially the nerd! But maybe Jihan can make a three-way work...?  (Source: Tappytoon)

title: Luck Be A Lady
description: Yun Hyeok, a convenience store clerk who's been single his entire life, never expected much from life—until he hits the jackpot, literally. Winning the lottery and becoming a wealthy landlord overnight, he finally works up the courage to confess his feelings to his longtime crush. But there’s a catch—she’s only into men who wax. Determined to become her ideal type, Yun Hyeok heads to a waxing salon run by his old classmate, Lee Ha-eun. What starts as an awkward grooming session takes an unexpected turn when Ha-eun, noticing something…impressive, makes a shocking offer:   "Would you like me to take care of this for you?"  (Source: Lezhin US)

title: Legend of the Holy Sword
description: The Holy Sword is the only weapon that can defeat the Demon King… and Knight John Forkinstrong lost it. From the desolate Forgotten Fortress to the eldritch hellscape of the Super-Huge Cursed Ravine That You Can Never Leave Once You Enter, John has searched high and low for decades, but to no avail. And the only thing that continues to fuel John's unwavering willpower... is the fact that it's literally embarassing that he lost his own forking sword.  (Source: WEBTOONS)

title: Not a Peep!
description: With the press of a button, Yu Sol’s life is about to turn upside down. When a mysterious post with the power to transport the user to their favorite fictional universe pops up on his feed, Sol clicks “share” and falls asleep…only to awake the next day as a round, winged puffball! Try to speak as he might, he can only mutter one word- er, sound: “Peep!” With his new avian appearance, Sol must navigate the land of Sevon under the guiding hand of his new (strikingly handsome) owner, Karhan Barthés, while trying to find a way back to world from which he came.  (Soure: Lezhin US)

title: Rewriting My Tragic Ending
description: A turn of fate... by your own hand.   Alicia Melfont vows to restore the former glory of her house after the Dark God's agent massacres her family. But when a mysterious book reveals that she's only a supporting character meant to die for the true protagonist of the story, Alicia decides she won't let some silly book determine her fate.   (Source: Manta)   Note: includes one prologue.

title: Yang Ilwoo and Me
description: Jang Baek-Hee is counting the days until he can escape Gicheon before his deadbeat father is released from prison. But then Yang Il-Woo arrives: a delinquent transfer student with a cheap perm, brassy hair, and a loneliness that mirrors Baek-Hee’s own. Slowly, their uneasy friendship deepens into something tender. But Il-Woo came to Gicheon with a secret that could shatter the fragile comfort they've both found in each other. And when the past comes calling, can two broken souls survive the truth?  (Source: Tapas)

title: Marriage Situation
description: Kim Yoo-Young is sick of playing the nice, boring lawyer and daughter. So when her overbearing mother books her a hotel room the night before an arranged blind date, she steps out of character and spends the night with a seductive stranger from the hotel bar. Only this stranger turns out to be none other than Cha Ji-Hoon, her blind date and the hotel's high-class owner! Yoo-Young will do anything to keep their "bad deed" a secret... but can she really marry her first one-night stand?    (Source: Tapas)   Note: Includes a prologue and five side story chapters.

title: My Virtual God is a Teenage Girl
description: From good looks, brains, hot body, wealth, and a gorgeous family. It seemed like Jumin’s life was god perfect. Until he realized that his world was merely a simulation controlled by… well, a teenage girl! With just a click of her mouse, Jumin loses everything and returns to high school! Will he break free from the program and reclaim what he lost?    (Source: WEBTOON)

title: A Fake Princess's Survival Diary
description: Many people imagine living the life of a hero/heroine within their favorite fantasy novels. However, what if you wake up in the body of the main villain/villainess instead?    Our main character goes through a seemingly fatal air crash and wakes up in the body of Letisha de Arcadia, the main villainess within her favorite fantasy novel. What's even worse is that she already knows how this story is going to end: Letisha's beheading after her identity as a fake princess gets revealed. To evade her tragic fate, our character must continue living as a fake princess while attempting to forge an amicable relationship with the original protagonists of the novel, Amelita and Sighard.    This is a story of survival.    (Source: POCKET COMICS)

title: My One and Only
description: A-Rim was returning home after work, drunk and wasted when a handsome man appears in front of her and introduces himself as a "Werewolf". He asks A-Rim if he can stay in her house for a while. Due to this wolf-man's request, A-Rim, and Ten begin their dynamic cohabitation. The gorgeous werewolf, Ten, is attracted to A-Rim's scent and chooses her as his "mate". A-Rim teaches Ten about the human culture and society and starts feeling some kind of warmth in her heart when she pends time with him. Will A-Rim eventually all in love with Ten?  (Source: Pocket Comics)

title: Gwangyeyeokjeonbeoteun: Geonbangjin Geunyeoreul Chiryohaeboja
description: At the hospital where I sought treatment for insomnia, an arrogant female doctor caught my attention. Unexpectedly, I pressed a button I hadn’t used in a long time, and the arrogant female doctor suddenly changed her attitude, spread her legs, and asked me to treat her…  (Source: TOPTOON, translated)

title: The Unintentional Villainess
description: After being reborn in a novel, Renee Blair is determined to transform her reputation as "the villainess of the century," which will prevent her death at the hands of Sir Dywen the dragon slayer! But then she learns that the original Renee had been controlled by a pop-up game system of daily missions that forced her to either commit evil deeds or face painful penalties for declining. With this system continuing to affect her as well, can the new Renee outsmart the game and reset her evil legacy?    (Source: Tapas)

title: You're So Handsome!
description: A plastic surgeon who is even hated by his own patients because of his ugly looks goes over an entire body overhaul after being dumped by the love of his life, and his life is soon turned upside down.  (Source: TOPTOON+)

title: Stay Out of My Head!
description: Moon Ah-Rim has a secret. One accidental touch, and he can hear exactly what you're thinking. So when he accidentally brushes against his longtime crush, Tae-Hun, he expects butterflies…not full-blown NSFW fantasies! Sweet, gentle Tae-Hun isn’t supposed to have those kinds of thoughts, and especially not about him! Ah-Rim is horrified...and maybe just a little intrigued. Because no matter how much he tells himself not to feel anything...his body’s saying otherwise.    (Source: Lezhin US)   Note: Includes seven extra chapters.

title: Combat Ward
description: Seon-U Kang, a high school student, single-handedly takes down a group of illegal loan sharks who show up at his house. While being treated at the hospital, he encounters a mysterious man who offers him an invitation to a suspicious secret fighting tournament with a massive cash prize. The prize money is his only hope to save his family. Seon-U must survive in the combat ward at all costs! Will he be able to defeat all other fighters and become champion?   (Source: WEBTOON)

title: Dawn After Darkness
description: Can a single night with a single person change your life forever? Hyeon-oh’s answer to this question is yes. Ever since a night he spent with Seo-hyun, he’s clung onto the memories of it to keep himself going in the dark world of the yakuza. Years later, Seo-hyun appears in his life once more. Could it be a sign that dawn is here to chase the darkness away once and for all?   (Source: Lezhin US)

title: Sparkling Baby
description: While in New York, Yujin, a talented young photographer, is captivated by Hanjoon, a renowned fashion magazine director. They share a few drinks and a hotel bed, but Hanjoon leaves in the morning without a word, not expecting to see Yujin again. Years later, Yujin, now a prominent figure in his field, lands a job at Hanjoon’s magazine in Korea. As Yujin’s feelings for Hanjoon grow, Hanjoon can’t seem to get over his ex. Will Hanjoon be able to move past his previous heartbreak and find new love?    (Source: Tapas)

title: Marriage B: Wed to the Enemy
description: Goyoh Rubiet did everything in her power to avoid an arranged marriage with the power-hungry Marquess Anthe Betelgeuse. Instead, Goyoh's sister is forced to marry him, but it's not long before Goyoh learns that her sister has been murdered by the marquess. Soon after, as she's struggling with guilt, Goyoh wakes up as a past version of herself. This time around, Goyoh is determined to accept her arranged marriage to save her sister. But is there any way she can avoid meeting the same grisly fate?    (Source: Tapas)

title: Prison Love
description: There's more to her than meets the eye... Having always been a good girl, Shushu is horrified when she's suddenly framed for murder and locked up in an all women's prison. To survive, she becomes the prison wife of her intimidating yet beautiful cellmate, Minicat. But is Minicat all that she... or he appears?  (Source: Manta)

title: How to Be the Chosen One
description: Cho Sun-won finds his life boring and tedious. Sex is the only thing he isn’t sick of, but it’s getting a little too easy to talk any guy into bed. He wants a new life, a new world, and a new challenge…and he totally gets all of those when he’s summoned into another world as the so-called god of Abroria! Awesome, right? Except, nobody seems to fall for his bedroom talk, and there’s a sexy king hell-bent on exposing Sun-won as a fraud. Seducing the gorgeous men around him without blowing his cover is going to be quite the divine challenge. Can Cho Sun-won actually become the Chosen One?    (Source: Lezhin US)

title: Falling into the Arms of a Mad Villain
description: Instead of being caught by Prince Charming, I've fallen into a complete nightmare! Not only did I transmigrate into a trashy romance fantasy novel, but I fell from the sky and ended up in the arms of the mad villain, Edwin Crawford. Before I knew it, he called me his wife from the heavens and was raving about some prophecy. I don't even know who I am, so how can I be his wife?! Until I figure out what is happening, will it be safe to stay in the embrace of the Mad Dragon of the West?    (Source: Tapas)

title: The Chart of Priest
description: Edward the priest is asked to care for the legendary hero who carries a deadly curse. Will the young priest be able to cure the hero of his curse?   (Source: Toomics)

title: Yeonggwangui Haeillo
description: Halo, the greatest musician of his time, gets into a car accident on his way to the Grammy Awards. When he comes to, he finds himself in the body of a young Korean boy named Noh Hae-Il. He is left in a place where the surroundings and the times are different. After confirming that Noh Hae-Il's English name is Halo, he feels a strong sense of destiny. Halo enters Hae-Il. He demonstrates his genius even in this era.  (Source: Naver, translated)

title: Azure Night, Waltz of Rapture
description: When a night out to a piano recital turns into a literal nightmare for Seo-Yun, she's unceremoniously inducted into a world of horrifying beings. There, she meets Hui-Won, a charming "superbia" who informs her that she is nothing more than food for these creatures born of sin. Now, she must succumb to the likes of vampires and incubi as they feed on her for sustenance. Can she escape the darkness that lurks under the cover of night, or will she find a reason to stay inside this sinister realm?    (Source: Tappytoon, edited)

title: Revenge
description: Kwon Jiwook's monotonous daily life takes an unexpected turn at a club meeting when he becomes drawn to a mysterious new freshman. Captivated by the freshman's sweet looks, Jiwook tries to approach him, only to be met with a cold and dismissive attitude. Annoyed by the response, Jiwook resolves to teach the freshman a lesson in his own way. However, things take a shocking twist that Jiwook never saw coming.    The next morning, Jiwook wakes up covered in someone else’s fluids, staring at an unfamiliar ceiling, only to realize he’s now trapped in an unimaginable and humiliating situation.    “You're all the same...how you let your urges take over...”    Once a domineering and fearsome figure who thrived on intimidation, Jiwook finds himself powerless against the alluring yet dangerous freshman, Park Juyeon. With no clue about Juyeon’s true intentions or the deadly game that’s about to unfold, Jiwook is dragged into a personal hell designed just for him.    (Source: Lezhin US)

title: Blind Passion
description: The royal palace is no place for fun and games—here, only the most cunning and powerful survive. After Soon-ock becomes queen consort thanks to the machinations of her scheming father and his allies, she finds herself in the middle of a bloody fight between the king and the crown prince. Despite her precarious position, Soon-ock is determined to survive and will do anything to ensure the safety of herself and her lover, Hyang-yi. She soon makes a deal that could either make her life heaven or hell. The only catch? Part of the plan involves using her beloved Hyang-yi. A gripping tale of conspiracy, lust, and desire set in the royal court of medieval Korea.    (Source: Lezhin US)    Note: An adaptation of the 2016 novel of the same name by Eun-Mi Hyeon.

title: The Two Eves : The Girl Trapped in the Wall
description: What happens when a guy and a girl end up in an underground bunker together after the apocalypse? It seems like there’s only one inevitable answer when the Bongjoon finds himself locked in together with cute, curvy Hyun-mi for the rest of the foreseeable future. But things get complicated when sexy Nan-hee ends up joining them in the bunker with them. What happens when a guy ends up in an underground bunker with two busty babes? Bongjoon is about to find out the hard way!  (Source: Lezhin US)

title: Ladies' Man
description: When you have good brains and ever better looks, life can be pretty cushy. Jang Wooseong knows this all too well, and he soon finds himself leaving country life behind and heading to the big city for university. A family friend even offers to take him in, and before long he’s living in a house filled with smokin’ hotties! Between the temptations at home and the plethora of eye candy on campus, Wooseong is truly living his best life. But when you have the pick of the bunch, choosing just one almost seems unfair! You see, Wooseong is a ladies’ man through and through, and he’s not going to leave a pretty girl disappointed. After all, college is all about the experiences, right?  (Source: Lezhin US)

title: Dragon Ego
description: Inside the world’s most popular MMORPG, the fearsome Dragon of Despair Taphras is raided by the game’s most powerful guild, composed of six top-rankers. Upon Taphras' defeat, he is divided into six items and split between each of the guild members. Little do they know that Taphras’ sister, Ignis, the Dragon of Destruction, has been awoken. Now, to resurrect her brother, Ignis must take down the guild members one by one and unite the missing items in this dragon-sized tale of revenge!   (Source: Tapas)

title: Kim Daeri Chatgi
description: Note: Part of the 2023 Postype Winter Anthology (포스타입 앤솔로지 | 겨울).

title: Jungnyeojuneun Boksuseoneon
description: A man named Lee Jeong-Yul appears out of nowhere in Han Gi-Tae's detective agency, and Gi-Tae suddenly finds himself under threats to cooperate with his plans...! What exactly is the massive conspiracy that involves the two of them? And what will become of these two?    Note: Includes 4 extras.

title: Obsessive Romance
description: There is nothing more entertaining than making women realize their fetish and breaking those pretending to be innocent!  (Source: DAYcomics)

title: Beloved by My In-Laws
description: Reina, a fallen noble's second daughter, works tirelessly to support her family and seeks their love. Yet her life takes an unexpected turn when her desperate parents marry her off to a viscount she's never met to avoid financial ruin. But though she expects a harder life, Reina finds unexpected solace when she is welcomed by her caring in-laws. And then there is Felix, her charming husband-to-be, who has admired Reina from afar. As Reina navigates her new life, can she heal from the past and find the love she's always longed for in her new family?  (Source: Tappytoon)

title: Two Households
description: Min-Seong became a landlord at just twenty. When he visits the house to check on it, he's shocked to find three gorgeous sisters already living there. What starts as a simple arrangement slowly turns into something far more dangerous... and irresistible.  (Source: DAYcomics, edited)

title: Sticky & Sweet
description: After being betrayed by his ex-girlfriend and former coach, a former MMA fighter, Hyung Dojun, spirals into a life of aimless wandering. One day, he stumbles into a small eatery called Sticky & Sweet and finds himself surrounded by a new set of intriguing women. Hyang-Gee, the shop owner, struggles with debt. Hyunah, the head cook, is free-spirited and bold. Jinha, a regular customer, grows increasingly interested in him. Even Okjoo, a loan shark, gets involved in his life. One man, five women. The tension is thick. The chemistry is sizzling. But can this sticky & sweet atmosphere last?  (Source: Lezhin US)

title: My Friend's Girl
description: When we first met, Yun-Hui was my friend's girlfriend.  (Source: DAYcomics, edited)   Note: Includes one extra chapter.

title: Pungnoedo
description: Dongbang-Mui, Son of The Deadly King, Dongbang-Go Jin who is called The War God. In the secret of his birth, he followed in his grandfather’s footsteps and became the lower rank guard of The Murim League. Together with the bounty hunter’s Ruthless Slashing Sword, The World Best Assassin’s Snake Fang Sword made of The Snake Poisonous Sharp Fang, and inside the love of Bicheonri- Ya Eul who possessed the Plum Flying Sword, he lifted his Blade of Wind and Thunder to the world.  (Source: KakaoPage, translated)

title: Dajeonghan Bam-e Eoseooseyo
description: Leo is left for dead after a robber stabs him with a knife and runs away. But, up until the very moment he passes out, he keeps a firm grasp on his desire to live. He wakes up in someone else’s bed, and he finds out that he was saved by Owen Bentley, a popular celebrity. He also finds out that Owen is a vampire—and that he had to turn Leo into a vampire in order to save him! But Owen harbors another secret, one that he seems to hide desperately… What is this secret? How will Leo find out?

title: Heartthrob
description: Being the new kid in school is never easy. Especially not for a wallflower like Eun-jae, who has spent most of his childhood in and out of hospitals because of his weak heart. Now, his only wish is to live and experience life as a normal high schooler. Unfortunately, the high school experience for him not only means attending classes and making friends, but also getting bullied for looking like an omega. But things aren’t all bad. Not when you consider his regular encounters with Jin-hyeon, the popular kid in school. As accidents and coincidences keep bringing them together, Eun-jae realizes he had met Jin-hyeon a long time ago… even if the latter doesn’t remember. And although a throbbing heart has always been a cause for concern, Eun-jae discovers a heart can throb for sweeter reasons too.    (Source: Lezhin US)

title: Jjaksarangeul Kkeunnaeneun Bangbeop
description: Kim Bok-Sil, is better known for having no success at love having gone with unrequited love for 20 years now. She's now on her 9th failure of unrequited love since graduating from high school. Bok-Sil, who vows that she will have a wonderful relationship when she becomes a college student, falls for her kind and handsome sunbae, Do-Yun.    (Source: BOMTOON, translated))  Note: Includes 8 extra chapters.

title: Sinininde Cheonmanbaeu
description: Mu-Yeong spent his childhood under his stepfather’s oppressive rule, a life that felt like living in hell. A mysterious voice in the living hell showed him the way to survive.     <I>“Live someone else’s life instead of yours.”    That’s how his acting journey began… Was it a survival instinct? Even when he did well, he excelled too much. Through acting, Mu-Yeong gained a new life. This is the story of Mu-Yeong, the overwhelming acting genius, embarking on a challenge in the entertainment industry!    (Source: KakaoPage, translated)

title: Could the Boy Next Door be a Vampire?
description: Navigating the uncertainty of early adulthood is no easy feat, as Hong Wooree is realizing on his year off from college. Not only is he trying to make it as a published author, but he also thinks that his best friend, Gong Minnee, is a vampire! After making some flawed assumptions, Wooree believes that Minnee's secretive behavior comes from hiding his "true" identity-- he's completely unaware that Minnee isn't actually a vampire, and just has a huge crush on him. While Wooree struggles to get his writing published and protect Minnee's "secret," Minnee must find a way to confess his feelings for the oblivious Wooree. Will these two be able to reconcile their misunderstandings and allow for a real relationship to blossom?    (Source: Tappytoon)

title: Access All Areas
description: The new boy group sensation “Poison” is out to conquer the K-Pop scene with their buff bodies and sexy charm. With a successful debut and thousands of eager fans, everything seems to be going well…or is it? As the group’s prim and proper leader, Sihyun should be dreaming of chart domination. But instead, his dreams are filled with fantasies about his groupmate, the sullen and mysterious Seong-eun. As the two spend more and more time together, they get caught up in a whirlwind of muddled passion and sweaty tension, both on and off the stage. Will they manage to keep things together? And will those dreams be fulfilled?    (Source: Lezhin)    Chapter count includes three special episodes and a prologue

title: Can the Grand Duke and the Marquis be Friends?
description: Obet has no idea what she signed up for when she attends the prince's oath ceremony disguised as her sick twin brother. Before she can make a good impression on the prince, a snooty young lord pokes fun at her, and the two of them spend the day bickering with each other. As it turns out, the lord is none other than Hinn, the son of the grand duke. To make matters worse, he instantly recognizes Obet when he visits her estate! Once he threatens to reveal what she did and bring shame to her family, she has no choice but to be nice to him. It's easy enough to avoid him at first, but this becomes harder when they start attending the same academy. Will Obet be able to keep Hinn from exposing her secret, despite the fact that he seems to be on a mission to annoy her 24/7?    (Source: Tappytoon)

title: Yeochingongyu
description: Jung Tae is living with her girlfriend Yujin. One day, Yujin's hometown friend, Eunha, lives together in the two's home. Jung Tae is always attracted to the simple yet glamorous appearance of the galaxy...    (Source: Toptoon, translated)

title: Elizabeth
description: Despite possessing beauty that could guarantee her an easy life, Elizabeth was forced to forge her own path from a young age, living alone in the Forbidden Forest and selling strawberries to get by. But everything changes one day when a handsome duke appears before her. Although he is taken with Elizabeth, she isn’t exactly seen as marriage material by those in the Duke’s circle. Persistent, he invites her to work at his uncle’s mansion as a maid. It’s purely professional, what could go wrong!    (Source: Tapas)

title: Juingongui Kkotgire Ollataneun Bangbeop
description: Life never goes the way you plan it, but back then, I didn’t know that. ‘Kang Nahyun’ found herself reincarnated inside a male-oriented fantasy novel (a.k.a. harem story) she had grudgingly read because of a friend in her past life. Special perks usually granted to reincarnators? Not a chance! With no money and no backing, she had to endure a hardcore life. But in the winter before entering high school, after awakening to the role of “sniper”, she was given the chance to enroll in the Awakeners’ Academy. “If I can’t be the main character, why not just sneak onto the protagonist’s path to success?” So she stuck close to Na Yuhan, the protagonist attending the Academy, planning to grab some crumbs from his achievements and quietly vanish afterward... But something feels off. Day by day, it seems she’s drifting further and further from her original plan… The tumultuous academy life of Kang Nahyun, the sunshine heroine! How to Hop on the Protagonist’s Path to Success begins now!  (Source: KakaoPage, translated)

title: Killing Killer
description: The main character, Si-U Lee, lost his parents to a murderer ten years ago. Finally, he meets Jack, the one who killed his parents, and beheads him. “It wasn’t me who killed your parents.”    After learning that the real culprit is a "contractor" belonging to a group of killers using superpowers, Si-U Lee decides to hunt down the registrants with Jack’s help.    (Source: Naver, translated)

title: 15 Minutes
description: You are now the protagonist! The secret of the 15 minutes is revealed.  (Source: Toomics)   Note: Includes one extra chapter.

title: Rewriting My Dark Past
description: Please let this be a bad dream! Our protagonist wakes up to find herself in the world of a novel she wrote in middle school—one she's tried to burn to ashes! Follow Rayna Solei as she navigates her new reality with her loyal servants and a trusty black dragon! Will she ever find her way out of the novel and back to real life?  (Source: Manta)

title: How Sweet is a Sugar Daddy?
description: Si-Hun is handsome, cultured and rich. What else would you expect from an established doctor? He's everything that Jun-Yeong wants to be, once he gets out of college.    Oh, and Jun-Yeong's not gay. At least, that's what he says... While he's more or less having sex with Si-Hun. A man. A married man. A married man who happens to be dating his his best friend, Ma-Ri.    (Source: Lezhin US, edited)

title: Scent of a Witch
description: Beyond the borders of the kingdom of Yarke, is the blighted land of Uren. Peasants and nobility listen with open ears as travelers recount tales of witchcraft under the moonlight. As tensions mount, the third prince of Yarke travels outside of his kingdom under a full moon only to encounter a beautiful woman. While the prince is charmed by her graceful appearance, she isn't all that he seems.    (Source: Lezhin)

title: The Unfinished Match
description: Jae-Hyeong and Min have been friends and rivals in judo since childhood. Min always believed they would continue their journey in the sport together, but one day, Jae-Hyeong suddenly disappears without a word. Years later, Min enrolls at Jae-Hyeong’s university and tracks him down, only to discover that Jae-Hyeong has quit judo entirely. Determined to bring him back, Min challenges Jae-Hyeong to one final match—but the stakes are anything but ordinary. A tense and emotional story of friendship, rivalry, and unresolved feelings unfolds...  (Source: Lezhin US)   Chapter count includes five side story episodes.

title: Eonniui Chwihyang
description: Unrequited love! Who is the one who makes the bottom of the heart every day? Until the taste of an adult's taste to the taste of a sister's sister.    Note: Includes 3 side stories.

title: Heungmang Nampyeongwaui Ihone Silpaehan Geon Gatda
description: I've been reincarnated as the extra character who stalked her husband, the male lead, for 10 years and died. Of course, I tried to divorce him before the female lead appeared.    But, I found out that my young husband's household was secretly abusing him. At that moment, I immediately became overwhelmed with the responsibility and sense of duty a modern adult would have.    Aiden had his back turned away from her and suddenly grabbed her arm forcefully. The strength of his hands alone could have ripped her arms off. Erin timidly called his name and spoke.    "I already reminded you yesterday. We're a married couple, so I'm always on your side."    "..."    "So, everything is alright."    She comforted him with these sweet words like it was a spell. And as if he was under her magic, Aiden stopped trembling.

title: Miraeui Neoege
description: What if you could see your future boyfriend that you didn't even know of..?  The school romance of a girl who can see the future.

title: Free Draw
description: A diverse group of youths' spectacle school sitcom drama revolving around Han Tae Sung.    Note: Chapter count incudes a prologue and a bonus chapter

title: Where the Heart Is
description: Min Harang’s future is clear. Go to KNU law school, become a prosecutor, and be successful. At least, that’s what her mother wants. But when Harang fails the entrance exam, she has to come to terms with the fact that her mother’s wishes might not line up with Harang’s own. Out sulking in the rain after an explosive argument, help comes in the form of her sex-crazed neighbor - the very man who’s constant moaning distracted her from studying! And since it’s his fault anyway, it’s only fair that he take responsibility, right? But there’s more to the man that first appears, and soon Harang finds herself coming face to face with a different form of family. It just goes to show that home is truly where the heart is.  (Source: Lezhin US)

title: Logging in as a Monster
description: Lee Jinhyuk has enjoyed his decade-long reign as Cornsilk, the undefeated number one PVP player in virtual reality game "The Abyss." But with the sequel "Abyss World" resetting all players as newbies, Jinhyuk accepts a sudden sweet deal from his Abyss Studios developer half-brother Jinho to log in as the infamous boss monster Black Knight. After slaying 100 rankers during the opening event, Jinhyuk agrees to keep the monster login scheme going... but will his unmatched talent blow his cover?    (Source: Tapas)

title: Men Are Rare
description: One day, Seon-Ho Kang lost consciousness in an accident, only to wake up to:   "Alright, time to collect your semen, sweetie!"   Wait a second... Men are rare in this world?! With women throwing themselves at him... Well, if this is how things are, guess I'll just enjoy the feast, one by one!!!  (Source: DAYcomics, edited)

title: Gajeongbu Arubaito!
description: Fired from his part-time job and out of money, Han Jaemin ends up having a one night stand with a rude but handsome guy. But when he finally gets a new job, Han Jaemin finds that he is his new boss?!

title: BELIEVE MY SIGN
description: Soo-jeong is always getting on the self-absorbed Eunchan's nerves since he first appeared before him out of the blue.    Soo-jeong feels the same way towards the socially inept Eun-chan, who is often harsh towards him. Their ironic relationship develops as they try to survive together, even though they don't trust one another.    What should you trust? Your past experiences and memories, or intuition?    <I>Note: The chapter count includes five side story chapters.

title: Between Seasons
description: Night after night, a mysterious woman runs through Yoongun’s dreams. So when he happens to catch a glimpse of her in the flesh, he devises an intricate plan to lure her into his arms, determined to bring his subconscious fantasies to life. In a twist of fate, Kyu-young is searching for a way to nurse her broken heart when Yoongun makes his timely entrance. Seizing the opportunity, Yoongun proposes a tempting solution to Kyu-young’s heartache. He suggests becoming her rebound, a tool for revenge against her unfaithful ex-fiancé. Seduced by this irresistible offer, Kyu-young’s life takes an unexpected turn. Will he be her unwitting destroyer or an unexpected savior?  (Source: Lezhin US)   Note: Includes 19 extra chapters.

title: Does Love need a Translator?
description: College student Hadam desperately needs a recommendation letter from her professor. The only way to get it? Be a mentor to an exchange student and house them for a full semester. Hadam was expecting a female, but the exchange student turns out to be… a handsome French male?! What will happen when Hadam has to live with him under the same roof? Will they be able to overcome the language barrier to find love?    (Source: Manta)

title: DASH
description: Jeong Ji-Heon, a once-promising swimmer, retired early due to an injury and now works diligently at a sports agency. The hottest topic in the sports marketing world is none other than Kwon Jae-Kyoung, and agencies are fiercely competing to win him over. Ji-Heon’s boss orders him to secure a meeting with Jae-Kyoung at all costs. Using a trivial connection from a decade ago when they briefly trained at the same aquatic center, Ji-Heon miraculously succeeds in arranging a meeting. However, when they finally meet, Jae-Kyoung shows no interest in contract terms and instead seems strangely fixated on Ji-Heon’s genetic traits…  (Source: Lezhin US)

title: Bad Apple
description: As an S-Class agent at the top-secret intel firm Vulture, Adrian "Killy" Rosebarton (Codename: Uno) is the master of seduction, able to charm secrets out of literally anyone regardless of age, gender, or profession. But when he sets his sights on his newest target, Lorenzo “Loren” Stefano, things take a rotten turn. No matter how hard he flirts, Loren just won’t bite - and Uno’s pride (and mission) are about to crumble. If one thing is certain, it’s that this is no ordinary mark. This one’s a bad apple: poisonous if swallowed, impossible to spit out, and dangerously tempting.  (Source: Lezhin US)

title: Bulgeun Kkochui Jeongwon
description: A story that reincarnates as a happy [supporting] in a friend's novel, but takes on the misery of [the main character].

title: Your Wildest Fantasies
description: Looking to bust out of his oppressive home life, Gi-Hyeon has decided to work at the amusement park. He’s living in the workers’ dorms and trying to start fresh. That means making new friends, getting the hang of work, and with all the hot girls working here, maybe even land a girlfriend! Things are looking promising when he makes friends with a sweet girl named Hye-Sol. He just has to bide his time and not mess things up! But when a mystery girl, who he first saw in the woods, comes into the picture, could Gi-Hyeon’s wildest fantasies be ruined…or is this just the beginning?  (Source: Lezhin US, edited)

title: Sinjangsanbeom
description: No luck in love, no luck in money, no luck in family, no answer, Hong Sia. One winter day, I picked up a cat, or rather a Jangsanbeom?! Eh?! I imprinted on Jang Sanbeom, a monster with transcendental abilities?!! “I decide who my contractors will sell to.” A life-changing romance thriller with a beast man, no, a real beast!    (Source: Naver, translated)

title: It's Okay If There's No Male Lead
description:
When she was young, Chelsea set all her hopes, dreams, and efforts into achieving the perfect love with her perfect fiancé. However, she later learned that he wasn’t in love with her. Rather than let her world come crumbling down, she was determined to find something else to put her effort into. And that was when she remembered she was a pretty great summoner...

(Source: Tapas)

title: My Sweetheart Duke Has a Secret
description: Noel—the adopted anthropomorphic daughter of the Miceria family—is abused and neglected by everyone after her mother passes away from an accident. Alone and grief-stricken, her only source of comfort is her secret wizard friend Sion.    But when Noel accidentally hears about her step-father's horrific plan, she begs Sion to help her escape the Miceria household. Turns out that Sion is a magical duke who can easily get rid of people in the blink of an eye! Sion then offers Noel to work for him as his assistant. Is this an offer of a lifetime, or a trap? What is Sion planning to do with Noel?    (Source: POCKET COMICS)

title: Thundercloud Rainstorm
description: At his uncle’s funeral, Jeonghan is reunited with Iljo, a man he hasn’t seen in years. It turns out Iljo’s struggling to stay afloat. Stirred by pity and charitable impulse, Jeonghan invites Iljo to move in with him. The problem is that Iljo catches feelings like a match to fuel. To top it off, Jeonghan isn’t keen on dating him, but somehow, he’s a pro at accidentally making things a lot messier for everyone involved. Is this a love story in the making, or a disaster waiting to happen?    (Source: Tapas)

title: Spring and Winter
genres: Comedy, Drama, Romance, Slice of Life
description: Outed in high school?!   In the middle of the night, high schooler Jung-Yoon sends a teary text to her ex-girlfriend in the hopes of winning her back. But much to her horror, she discovers that she's actually sent it to Do-Young, the most anti-social girl in her class! Will she be outed at school?!  (Source: Manta)

title: Young Mom and Daughter
description: Jun-Woo lives in a share house ran by a young mother and her daughter. However, everything changes when his twin brother with a completely different personality comes to live with him. "Why are you girls doing this to me?!"  (Source: TOPTOON+)

title: Tenth Time's the Charm
description: A shy returning student who loves caring for flowers, Hyunwoo has a condition that makes him pass out in the presence of excessive stimuli. For example, he nearly fainted at a bar recently because of some freshman who’d doused himself in cologne. Thankfully, he got some fresh air in time, as well as a glimpse of that same freshman making out with another guy. Hyunwoo doesn’t think much of it, but a few days later, he’s overwhelmed by the same dizzying yet irresistible scent. But this time, he’s not at a bar—he’s at a flower-themed cafe, to interview for a job he desperately wants and needs. What will Hyunwoo find in this garden of memories?    (Source: Lezhin)

title: Hair Salon Sisters
description: He thought it was all over when he got stuck in a small town to study for his university exams. But the girls at the hair salon he found changed everything..."What would you like today? Just ask!"  (Source: TOPTOON+)

title: A Very Personal Revenge
description: The bewitching wife of my former classmate, and her daughter who is growing more and more into a mature woman... Yeong-Jin starts to work as a private tutor at his high school friend Darren's house. Upon finding out about the secrets of the mansion, he starts an uncontrollable relationship with the ladies of the mansion.  (Source: DAYcomics, edited)

title: The Noble Pirate
description: From the high seas to high society.    When the infamous pirate Rosetta gets poisoned to death, she wakes up in the body of noble lady Leah. Now, to avoid a second death, Rosetta must play the part of a noble and... get engaged?! But to whom? Could it be to the strange admiral who has suddenly come chasing after "Rosetta"?    (Source: Manta)

title: Quiet in the Office!
description: There's no such thing as work-life balance for poor Nayul, thanks to her evil boss, Sijin. Not only does he make her work overtime constantly, but she's also dumped by her boyfriend because of it. Fed up with Sijin's demonic ways, Nayul storms to his office to complain... and finds him jerking off! Though the sight is initially grotesque, Nayul finds herself oddly turned on. Somehow, she ends up banging her boss on his desk, which leads to an irritating yet steamy colleagues-with-benefits relationship. But how long can Nayul keep this shameful secret from her prying ex and gossipy coworkers?   (Source: Tappytoon)

title: Heonsineun Guwoneul
description: Police officer Reinholt who went to a 5-star hotel for a vacation wanted a one night stand at first sight with a man who introduced himself as “Milo”. In that passing moment when Reinholt thought of how he wanted to have a special relationship with him, he saw Milo with an unusual crowd… Is that guy part of the mafia…? Even when Reinholt teld himself in his mind that he shouldn't, his heart was doing the opposite and it kept reacting to Milo. Kill or be killed… This is the dizzying romance between a police officer and a mafia!

title: Geommado
description:
While the Great War between the Jeonggeomryeon and the Jipmacheon was at its peak, Sim Ho lived in the peaceful village of Baekriju. At the age of twelve, he was caught up in Je Gal-Hui's plot to take over Baekriju and was conscripted and sent to the war's frontline. In the midst of a desperate battle, he runs into the Black Ox Fighters, and they save his life. He then joins the Black Ox, and begins the arduous journey to becoming a powerful warrior and return home to Baekriju…!

(Source: KakaoPage, translated)

title: Jungganeseo Manna
description: "I can make your life more fun." A mysterious young man appeared one day in front of Yeo-Reum, who is living a dull life as a 30-year old! The way he acts straight-forward and to-the-point is very strong, kind of cute, but maybe a little overboard? What the hell do you want from me?! It's a heart-pounding, back-and-forth romance comedy! (Source: Naver Webtoon, translated)

title: Eoreunui Mat
description: “I’ll do whatever you want so experience as much as you want!”   Joon-shik, a contracted librarian, has given up on dating women because of an accumulated disappointment towards the women who have left him due to his job title.  (Source: TOPTOON, translated)

title: Mr. Kang
