description: The ugly loser completely changes after he meets a "savior"! Will he finally get a girlfriend?     (Source: Toomics)

title: Lifeless Man
description: Jun Ha is a genius surgeon with the highest success rate in his operations and has a special ability to see the lifespan of a person he faces. Sekwang, a ruthless gangster, mistakes Jun for a hitman and digs his past. Strangely Jun can't see Sekwang's lifespan and becomes curious about him.    (Source: Lezhin)

title: May I Touch It?
description: Living with a sexy landlord, and even sexier neighbors is just so fun! Enjoy a night full of lust!   "Hey... You are the only guy here."  (Source: TOPTOON+)

title: Knock Knock
description: Unforeseen guests and unforeseen temptations are in the air!  (Source: Toomics)

title: Breathing the Same Air
description: "I don’t want to even breathe the same air as you!" ...are the last words Jeong Sang-Heon says to Yun Hae-Sin before they part ways. But after ten years, the two reunite and end up living together under the same roof. Sang-Heon is the worst roommate one could have. He makes a mess wherever he goes, constantly breaks things, brings over uninvited guests, and even smokes inside the house. When Hae-Sin is at his wit’s end, he finally finds out a weakness that helps him put a leash around Sang-Heon's neck. Will Hae-Sin successfully tame Sang-Heon so that they can live in peace together while breathing the same air? (Source: Tappytoon, edited)

title: One Thousand and One Nights
description: Everyone knows about the story of Shahrazad and her wonderful tales of the Arabian nights. For one thousand and one nights, she entertained the mad Sultan with the adventures of Aladdin, Ali Baba, Sinbad, genies, and many other mystical creatures. But what if Shahrazad was actually a boy desperate to save his sister's life? What kind of strange things would he do to make sure that he survives to tell the tale? This new twist on one of the greatest classical folk tales just might keep you awake for another One Thousand and One Nights.    (Source: Yen Press)

title: Infinity
description: Sometimes, we only discover our true gifts when we hit rock bottom. Take Da-Min Lee -- he’s a terrible soccer player, due to his almost supernatural talent at dodging any object thrown at him. But in another sport? It’s a whole other story. When Da-Min leaves the soccer team in disgrace after failing to save the game-deciding goal, he’s discovered by Tae-Gyun, captain of the épée team in the school fencing club. Impressed by Da-Min’s agility and evasiveness, Tae-Gyun offers Da-Min a chance at redemption in fencing. Will Da-Min find his true passion and make some friends along the way?  (Source: WEBTOONS, edited)

title: Boy Meets Girl
description: In high school, Cheol-Ho's obsessive behavior towards Jin-Tae led to a fateful comment: ""I'll consider it if you ever turn into a girl."" Years later, as adults, their paths cross again under shocking circumstances. Jin-Tae wakes up one day to find his body has inexplicably transformed. As they navigate this new and twisted dynamic, Jin-Tae must confront his transformed identity and the dangerous desires Cheol-Ho harbors. Will Jin-Tae find a way to reclaim control over his life, or will he be ensnared by Cheol-Ho's possessive grip?"  (Source: Lezhin US)    Note: Includes prologue and four side story chapters.

title: Doppio Senso
description: Nothing tastes sweeter than revenge, and Lee Eunha is dying to get a bite. Following the assassination of her father by rival thugs working for Noh Hyungchul, a distraught Eunha takes his place in the Serim Family gang, eager for a chance to bring down the man responsible. That opportunity comes when she is asked to infiltrate the life of of Shin Kyunghyung; Hyungchul’s right-hand man masquerading as an executive at Yongsung Family's puppet company. A thrilling tale of deception and seduction unfolds, with Eunha willing to do whatever it takes - and become whoever necessary - to follow through with her mission. But as the femme fatale weaves her web of lies, will she lose her sense of self along the way...?  (Source: Lezhin US)   Note: Chapter count includes a prologue and 9 side stories.

title: The Fake Saintess Awaits Her Exit
description: I've already died once, I won't die again! I've been reincarnated as Evelina, a saint in a fantasy novel who has lost her powers. The only problem is, this wicked saint is supposed to meet her end by burning at the stake! To escape her fate, I must use my powers of seduction to win over the three men who drove me to my demise!    (Source: Manta)

title: Rise and Shine, Hero!
description: Ah-In, as the winner of the Kingdom Warrior Tournament, is tasked by the king with finding the missing princess. During his journey, he encounters various buxom beauties who are more than willing to help him however they can! In fact, most of them want to ravish him, including his childhood friend and companion, Garnet. Will Ah-In be able to complete his quest with so many girls vying for his attention?  (Source: Lezhin X)

title: The Hero's Ready to Retire
description: Everyone's shocked when 9-year-old prodigy Adelia Ester suddenly refuses to enroll in the elite knights' academy. They don't know that Adelia was magically sent back in time after wasting her life on the battlefield and suffering an early death! Now, Adelia's out to protect her peace from her ex-boss, the evil future emperor, by setting her ally on the throne instead. Will Adelia succeed in one last mission and finally retire for good? Or will she find herself forced to be a hero once more?    (Source: Tapas)

title: My Clueless Love Diary
description: "I'm gonna live a normal life!" Cho-eun, the heir to the powerful underground clan, Hongsal, has entered university. Her only wish? To make lots of friends and enjoy a peaceful, ordinary college life. But who are these four mysterious guys constantly hanging around her? "Are you my enemy? My ally? Or... do you like me?" Thrown into a whirlwind of emotions at twenty, can Cho-eun finally achieve the campus life she's always dreamed of?    (Source: WEBTOON)

title: The Villainess's Dazzling Debut
description: For a princess, Ethela Inuas has led a pretty miserable life. Her fiancé ran off with her cousin, and her other cousin stole the throne from her, condemning her to die in the Ice Palace. However, after death, Ethela finds herself waking up several years in the past! This time around, two things are different. One, she has the ability to tell when someone is lying. Two, she's out for vengeance! Can Ethela reclaim the life she deserves and be the most dazzling princess the kingdom has ever seen?    (Source: Tapas)

title: Devil Drop
description: One day, Joan, a young and sexually frustrated jobseeker, wakes up from a highly erotic dream only to discover that the star of that dream, a she-devil, is lying on her living room floor. So what does she do? Ask her to be her roommate, of course! With Lakam, a civil servant from Hell, she gets to enjoy all the perks of having a beautiful and perfect roommate. Large breasts, a wonderful physique, she even helps with the chores! But Lakam seems a bit too perfect. Is this arrangement truly a match made in heaven…or the beginning of hell on Earth?    (Source: Lezhin US)

title: So What If the Dark Lord's a Goblin?
description: Alex, vengeful Elf is on a vendetta against the so-called "Chosen ones" who keep the peace of the land ever since their ancestors vanquished the Dark Lord Gob-Khan a millennia ago.   Seeking to destroy the world that has betrayed her, Alex awakens the Dark Lord from his thousand-year-old slumber only to find that a goblin.   Will this pathetic little green creature manage to live up to his seemingly unjustified reputation and help Alex bring apocalypse upon the world?    (Source: Pocket Comics)

title: Chemistry Experiments
description: Do-Hae is pretty sure his girlfriend is the one. She’s the perfect chick for him… except in one crucial way: there’s no chemistry in the bedroom. After the inevitable breakup, Do-Hae’s left alone and desperate for answers. Luckily, an opportunity presents itself in no time: he agrees to discuss his sex life on a show, hosted by the voluptuous Kim Ha-Yan. Soon enough, the sexual sparks begin to fly as Do-Hae begins his "chemistry experiments"…   (Source: Lezhin X, edited)

title: He's Definitely My Son!
description: After a one-night stand with Duke Klauzner, Baroness Claire Delford flees the capital when her sweet sister Elisa gets caught up in a dangerous political conflict. Five years later, Claire stirs up high society when she returns with her nephew, Elliot. Despite her adamant denial, everyone believes Elliot to be the duke's son. Can Claire clear up the misunderstanding and protect her nephew from scheming nobles? And does this mean she has to join hands with the prideful Duke Klauzner to do it?    (Source: Tapas)

title: Wish Made by a Star
description: "People become ugly when they're in love."     Those are the feelings both Yeon-Ji and her closest friend Mu-Re shared when it came to romance. Despite that, Yeonji risks their friendship by asking out Mu-Re before being brutally rejected. Cursing her former friend's name, she wakes up the next day with the ability to read a person's romantic feelings as though she were in a dating sim!    (Source: Tapas, edited)

title: The Fitness Villainess
description: Being reincarnated into your favorite game isn’t so bad, but what if you’re now the main villainess who is destined to die from bad health in almost every ending? After spending her past life in a hospital, Aslan is determined to make her new body healthy, even if she has to become a fitness fanatic… After she conquers that, she’ll work on an important aspect of surviving the game—her likability. However, can she succeed when everyone expects her to be a villainess?     (Source: Tapas)

title: Cannot Help It
description: I-Tae Jung, a Beta, suddenly finds himself being pursued by Dan Ge-Um, a rich and famous Alpha from his school. They say an Alpha can never truly be attracted to a Beta, but considering the strange offers Dan keeps making to get closer to I-Tae… Is it just a hormonal malfunction, or could it be real love?   (Source: Manta)   Note: Includes 24 side story chapters.

title: When You're in Love
description: Duchess Helena Thordel has many secrets. One, her real name is Lila Violet. Two, she’s not actually an aristocrat. And three, she’s supposed to be in a loveless, contractual marriage with Duke Aslan Thordel, but in fact, she’s deeply in love with him. So when Aslan brings another woman into their home, Helena leaves so he can be happy. Or at least, that’s the plan until Aslan gets into an accident trying to chase after her! What if Helena’s one-sided love for her husband is two-sided after all?    (Source: Tapas)

title: Full-Force Release
description: "Is it really this hard, just because of me?"   After finishing his military service, Gi-Chan develops a strange condition. Once he gets hard, he doesn't go down until he cums. And when he finally does? He releases an explosive amount of cum. With this dangerous condition, Gi-Chan returns to his hometown... where a seductive new family is waiting for him.  (Source: DAYcomics, edited)

title: Beolsae Hyogwa
description: A few generations ago, a mysterious phenomenon occurred. Humans now die after 1.5 billion heartbeats; half the heart rate they originally had. Schools began teaching students how to control their emotions and regularly performed heart rate tests. No one is allowed to use more than the number assigned per week.    The story of two girls who chose to love regardless of their finite heartbeats.

title: Red Limit
description: “If you ever develop feelings for me, then show me the face behind the blindfold…”  Baek Myeongdo has never been particularly good with people but, fortunately, he’s also never really cared. Relationships are confusing, messy, and Myeongdo would really rather just avoid them all-together. Still, he finds it awfully hard to resist a beautiful pair of hands when he sees one... When Chung Oak accepts his proposition to meet him in a hotel one night, Myeongdo’s plan is to never see him again. However, Oak finds this mysteriously blindfolded man far more intriguing than he’d anticipated. Soon, their “one night only” becomes many nights and often, but just what will it take for Oak to make it beyond Myeongdo’s self-imposed limits?    (Source: Lezhin)

title: Prince Cinderella
description: Outgoing and athletic, Da-Rim’s always surrounded by friends. But back in elementary school, she used to be a social outcast—she only started making friends when Tae-Hoo brought her into the fold. Now in high school, the two have drifted apart, but Da-Rim is waiting for a chance to reunite with her icy Prince Charming. There’s just one issue: Da-Rim's body transforms into a boy’s at noon every day, only to turn back at midnight! Well, if she can’t get close to Tae-Hoo as a girl… Why not try as a boy?!     (Source: Lezhin)

title: What's Wrong With Your Online Life?
description: As far as eligible bachelors go, most people would call Lee Ho-Jin a “real catch.” But like any young professional in the 21st century, he has a well-kept secret. Lee Ho-Jin (alias: Scholar10) is an insecure internet troll who prowls an Internet forum where people post the craziest everyday stories they can come up with. On the other side of town, a pretty but sheltered girl named Han Seo-Jeong is active on the same forum. When she’s online, Seo-Jeong adopts the persona of “Omo,” a vulgar and extroverted young man. Ho-Jin and Seo-Jeong, who are already bonded anonymously through the website, become intertwined in real life when they are paired up to potentially be married. When both parties have ulterior motives for their prospective marriage, can either one make their wish come true?    (Source: Tappytoon, edited)

title: The Cafe Owner is an S-Class Guide
description: A newly awakened guide slash cafe owner fights an uphill battle trying to protect her business from a handsome yet explosive esper, who finds both her and her powers as addicting as caffeine.    (Source: Tappytoon)

title: Incomplete Combustion
description: For weeks, a mysterious man has been setting Gyeol’s dreams on fire. By day, Gyeol lives a quiet life as a construction worker. But after locking eyes with a stranger at a job site, his nights are consumed by vivid, erotic dreams that leave him shaken - and wanting more. When he unexpectedly runs into the man again, reality begins to feel just as charged as his fantasies. The stranger introduces himself as Ye-Sung: handsome, magnetic, and impossible to read. His smile is too perfect, his gaze to knowing. He crosses lines without hesitation, drawing Gyeol into a game with no clear rules. As tension smolders between them, Gyeol finds himself spiraling deeper into Ye-Sung’s world, unable to tell where desire ends and danger begins. But play with fire too long, and one is bound to get burned.  (Source: Lezhin US)

title: Ttokttok, Santa Wasseoyo♥
genres: Drama, Fantasy, Hentai, Romance, Slice of Life
description: A winter special short story that is set at Christmas.   Note: Chapter count includes 5 prologues.

title: Aisopos
description: Ellios, a fiancee of Yadmon, the powerful man of Samos, elopes with her lover, Frontis. Years after, Yadmon’s soilders find them in Athens living with their son, Aesop. Ellios and Frontis get killed by the soldiers and Aesop becomes a slave of Yadmon. But Aesop grows up as a strong man in hardship.

title: Heavenly Roommates
description: As a rabbit who lost her baby to a tiger, Myo-Ryeong is infuriated by the cruel ways of the jungle. She delves into spiritual training to become divine and create an ideal world, but her resolve weakens with time. Just when she's settled for the status quo, the god she serves sends her down to earth with an impossible quest: finding the "udumbara," a mythical flower that will save the human world. Her partner is none other than Han-Ho, the very tiger responsible for her baby's death! Will the two enemies set aside their past conflict and rescue humanity?  (Source: WEBTOON)

title: Master of Intimacy
description: Writing a manual on lovemaking seems to be the only way Sungjae can leave the Joseon era and get back to his original world! But can he really do it?!  (Source: Toomics)

title: Earthbound God’s School Life
description: The strongest god in the world craves just one thing: the thrill of a real fight. Tired of being unbeatable, Mu – god of Earth – possesses the body of a weak high schooler to relive the joy of combat. But when his divine form is sealed by his enemy, Mu must grow stronger in his new mortal body to fight back. Can fists alone satisfy a god’s hunger... or will his obsession be his downfall?  (Source: WEBTOON)

title: Surviving as a Prince’s Fiancée
description: On her way back home late one night, office worker Sophie stumbles into another world where she's a princess?! Well that's what Alan, prince of the Lapis Kingdom, says. To return to her world she must fulfill the prophecy and help Alan become king. Sophie agrees but...amidst a war for the crown, can she survive?    (Source: Tapas)

title: Jack the Ripper: Hell Blade
description: London, 1888 A.D. The entire city is consumed by fear of a serial killer known only as Jack the Ripper. He mutilates female prostitutes with extreme brutality. However, his victims hide a terrifying secret and Jack’s destiny is to continue hunting them down.

title: My Gorgeous Fiance
description: Woojoo's parents have always been a little kooky, but this time they've clearly outdone themselves!  When Woojoo begrudgingly comes back home after running away for the Nth time, he finds out he has a fiance. Lucky for Woojoo, he now has to share his room with the guy - a fairytale prince, yes, but a straight one.    (Source: Lezhin)

title: The Perfect Classroom
description: Two siblings who have brought several secrets along with themselves. With these two as the center of attention, the class gradually begins to change.   Note: Received the Comico 2015 Global Rookie Project Award and began serialization in 2016.

title: Cheongchunilji
description: After overcoming a miserable life, she entered the university full of excitement. Da-Bom, who had countless dreams and desires about university, encountered a villain on her very first day... And it's somewhat awkward from the start!    "Is my campus life going to be okay?!"   (Source: Naver, translated)

title: Her Majesty, the Witch
description: Sistina had a nice, quiet life, flying around on her broomstick and delivering delicious bread. But when the emperor dies, this unassuming witch learns she’s his granddaughter and now she’s tasked with running the empire! With all the tips and tricks she’s learned through her bakery, she's starting to get a taste of how to get it all done… but she still has to figure out her destiny as a witch, and then there’s this knight she can’t figure out, too! Will she find a recipe for success to take care of the empire, her fate, and maybe even her love life?  (Source: Tapas)

title: My Girlfriend
description: One day, Ji-O is horrified to witness his girlfriend, Mi-Ho, devouring human flesh. How could this be happening? He's struggling to understand the events that transpired when Mi-Ho killed his close buddy. Ji-O flees in panic, only to run into his friend—whom he was sure was dead—still alive. Ji-O grapples with doubt, struggling to maintain his grip on sanity. Is Mi-Ho really the monster, or is everything just a horrible nightmare?    (Source: WEBTOON, edited)

title: Gonggongui Iik
description: O Jin-Deok, a public service agent who was ignored by Park A-Yeong, a sexy but bad-natured woman, accidentally finds out about the corruption of Park A-Yeong and makes a secret deal with her…     “Se… Sex is only once a month!”    (Source: TOPTOON, translated)

title: This Life to the Next
description: Isaeng and Jeongto were inseparable childhood friends until Jeongto’s father died tragically at the hands of a bitter soul. These two friends reunite ten years later as adversaries: Isaeng guides souls to the afterlife, while Jeongto gives souls another chance to live. After all this time, can these two work out their issues? And what do the Kings of Hell have to do with all of this?    (Source: WEBTOONS)

title: Marchioness Maron
description: Once reviled as the wicked magician Hailey, the most hated woman in the realm, she was cast into a poisoned wasteland to die. But death never came. A year later, she’s alive and farming, bickering with a tree fairy, and somehow the new Marchioness Maron. As secrets of the contamination zone begin to surface and the ghosts of her past return, Hailey must decide whether to seek vengeance or build something new from ruins. When survival itself becomes the greatest twist of fate, who needs revenge?  (Source: Tapas)

title: HONBUL: Flame of the Soul
description: The Exorcism Agency is a state-run secret organization whose mission is to protect humans from demonic possession. Taehee Yoon, an exorcist from the Execution Department, is looking for a "genius" who can see and hear ghosts to be his new subordinate. While operating undercover at a high school he meets a mysterious boy...   "By the way, how old are you, buddy?"    (Source: Manta)

title: Daughter In Law
description: I just lost my son, but his bride-to-be, my almost daughter-in-law is still living with me. What should I do?  (Source: Toomics)

title: Taming My Master Mage
description: Kinemia Lyon's got two rules for surviving a novel: recruit talented geniuses to save her territory and don't get involved with Ayan Krotz, a dangerous mage. But when Ayan gets captured for trespassing on her land over and over again, she decides to hire him as her bodyguard instead. Unfortunately, letting Ayan into her life means dealing with his erratic magic and even more concerning personality! Can Kinemia come to tame this master mage? Or will she regret not kicking him out for good?  (Source: Tapas)

title: Nae Chwihyang Angyeong Geochidae
description: "I like that sunbae who looks good in glasses!!!"    Sungbin, who has a glasses fetish, has a one-sided crush on his sunbae, Ahn Gyunghoon, who looks good in glasses. Gyunghoon mistakes Sungbin to be a stalker as he suspiciously lingers around him.    The moment Gyunghoon throws Sungbin out, a drunk Sungbin confesses his feelings. To Sungbin who clings onto him saying he likes sunbae who looks good in glasses, Gyunghoon gives a headbutt but...

title: Agatha
description: Despite her title, Princess Agatha was a sweet and unassuming girl who lived with relatives away from the royal palace. When her father’s sudden death put her on the throne, she was happy to become the Queen Consort instead, letting her husband Halon rule as the King of Zerlasha. Little did she know that Halon would scheme behind her back, allying with the powerful Kingdom of Cavenia, an erstwhile enemy. With her country Zerlasha falling prey to corruption and crime, the time arrives for Agatha to step up as a true queen and leader. Will Queen Agatha take a stand against King Halon to save her country and protect her people?   (Source: WEBTOONS)

title: Michin Hwangjega Doeeobeoryeotda
description: Emperor Exceltrion brought the world to destruction with his cruel anger. Of all people, I became that emperor!    (Source: KakaoPage, translated)    Note: This is a one shot prologue for the web novel of the same name.

title: Don't Trust the Female Lead
description: Susan is the perfect and sweet female lead–or so the novel says. Because of this, the newly possessed Lady Medena Rodenherg doesn’t think twice about supporting the protagonist on her journey. However, the story Medena knows isn’t the entire truth, and Susan is actually far from the kind girl she’s been portrayed to be on the pages. This becomes most apparent when she ultimately betrays Medena and has her unjustly executed. Now back in time before ever meeting Susan, Medena decides to take the opposite approach in this life and team up with the novel’s antagonist, Pharren. Lucky for her, Pharren may not entirely be the wicked villain Medena has read about in the original novel…   (Source: Tappytoon)

title: Be RF Savvy or Die
description: What could make a romance fantasy superfan happier than getting pulled into a fantasy world? But Daline Este’s dreams of being the protagonist in her story come crashing down when reality sinks in. She hasn’t been pulled into one of her favorite novels like she dreamed—instead, she's landed in a world on the cusp of crisis as several novels tangle together and threaten to tear it apart. Now, Daline must use her expertise to set the stories straight before her happy ending goes up in flames.    (Source: Tapas)

title: You're My Flame
description: After being reborn as a desolate fire witch and villain destined to die a tragic death, Chersinia creates a plan to avoid her fate by gambling at a casino to become a wealthy recluse. The only problem? She somehow ends up with a slave boy named Ben instead of the money she needs! But much to her surprise, she starts to warm up to Ben, who provides the perfect joy and comfort in her lonely life. Little does she know that Ben has a dark secret that will change her life forever...    (Source: Tapas)

title: Two Souls
description: On Suyoung is working as an officer of the Royal Pharmacy, and when he finds out about the emperor's plan to behead the king for the treason charges, he feels sympathetic and gives the anesthetic potion to the king to lessen the pain. And during the execution, the king thanks Suyoung and curses the emperor as he dies. The next day, Sooyoung wakes up in a strange place and realizes that he is living in the emperor's body! Shivering with fear, Suyoung hurries to the Royal Pharmacy and finds the emperor in his body. And from that point and on, a spectacular drama takes over the palace.

title: Prison Breakfast
description: When Cha Yoonwoo intentionally gets arrested in order to smuggle drugs into prison, the last thing he expects to find out during intake is that he's pregnant. With no other option, he requests a meeting with Nam Soohyeon, the manipulative prosecutor who knotted him. But Yoonwoo's incarceration takes a surprising turn when none other than the man who put him up to this whole thing shows up in handcuffs. Just how will Yoonwoo make it through his sentence with such an unlikely cast of inmates, no alpha by his side, and a baby on the way?    (Source: Lezhin US)

title: The Psycho Duke and I
description: The Duke just kidnapped her — but little does he know, this is all going exactly according to her plan… When Diana initially lets herself get kidnapped by a bloodthirsty duke from an enemy empire, it's to avoid a certain death that will reduce her character's significance to nothing. Although the duke doesn't realize that she's enjoying her captivity, he's also not as ignorant as Diana thinks. How far is she willing to go to keep this story plot line exactly where she wants it to be?    (Source: Pocket Comics)   Note: First released in English, with the initial eligible release in Japanese followed by Korean, making it a manga by our standards.

title: Swing Baby
description: Baby can’t get promoted. He’s been languishing as the most junior member of his team for years. When he gets a new boss, he’ll do anything to suck up to him and get noticed. But this new boss is awfully sweet and charming, and somehow, he even perfectly matches the love interest of the dating sim Baby’s playing...! If Baby can play the game right, he may just win both his way up the corporate ladder and into his boss’s heart!    (Source: Tapas)

title: Pheromone Phobia
description: Jeong-oh is a beta who lives with his alpha friend, Yeong-won. They’ve maintained a close friendship for years now, and everything seemed fine…until Ha-yeon, the newly hired alpha at Jeong-oh’s office, brings a crucial fact to Jeong-oh’s attention: Yeong-won has been secretly showering Jeong-oh with his pheromones to keep other alphas and omegas away. As the trust in their friendship cracks and reveals hidden depths underneath, Jeong-oh must navigate his rapidly changing relationship with Yeong-won—which is going to be infinitely harder with Ha-yeon entering the picture.    (Source: Lezhin US)

title: Take Me In
description: One day, Yun-Hyeok suddenly finds himself with a younger brother—Yun-Jae, a sickly child diagnosed with an incurable disease. Determined to protect him, Yun-Hyeok takes on the role of Yun-Jae’s guardian, raising him with unwavering devotion for the next 15 years. But as Yun-Jae grows older, he begins to push the boundaries of their sibling relationship. Then one day, through the security cameras Yun-Hyeok installed to keep an eye on Yun-Jae, he witnesses something he was never meant to see…  (Source: Lezhin US)

title: RPG Comic
description: ESPERA! The most popular virtual MMORPG of the century!! But the game loses its momentum (even stopped updates and patches) when the legendary player quits... only to return 2 years later for no apparent reason! What will become of ESPERA now?!    (Source: Lezhin)    Note: The chapter count includes a prologue and an epilogue.

title: Roommates
description: Kisub is Jinwoo's slacker friend - and secret crush. So when Kisub asks to crash at his place, his heart tingles to be near him everyday. But as the short stay turns into permanent mooch, how long can Jinwoo keep his true feelings under wraps and hold back from confessing?    (Source: TappyToon)

title: Han Beon Deo
description: Chae-Yi ended up staying at the home of Gun-Woo, a close friend who had eloped with his girlfriend to avoid a family custom. As she enjoyed her solitary hours, soaking in the bathtub and watching the Manhattan night scene, she didn't know that a man was approaching her...   "You approached Noh Jae-Hyuk to jump into bed with him, didn't you?"  "That's the most ridiculous thing I've ever heard!"  "Does that sound like a lie to you?"

title: Kkumsogui Juinnim
description: The novice "succubus" Lilu aims for the strong spirit of dreamy boy Mong-gil, but the "Nightmare" announcer interrupts along the way and a triangular relationship in the dream takes place!     (Source: Lezhin, translated)

title: May God Bless Your Demise
description: Will you still love me once you know my secret?    Angie enjoys an idyllic life of reading and embroidering on Cullinan Island. But everything changes when she's selected as the companion to Kylek, the enigmatic heir of House Blackwell. As their bond grows, extraordinary events unfold, unraveling Cullinan Island's long-kept secret.    (Source: Manta)

title: Han Beon Deo
description: Chae-Yi ended up staying at the home of Gun-Woo, a close friend who had eloped with his girlfriend to avoid a family custom. As she enjoyed her solitary hours, soaking in the bathtub and watching the Manhattan night scene, she didn't know that a man was approaching her...   "You approached Noh Jae-Hyuk to jump into bed with him, didn't you?"  "That's the most ridiculous thing I've ever heard!"  "Does that sound like a lie to you?"

title: His Return
description: Is he really the guy who weighed over 100 kilos? Kim Jin-Su returned to school and he’s back to get revenge on his bullies.     (Source: Toomics, edited)

title: Scan Here!
description: There is a barcode that tells information about a person?! If this is true, wouldn't it be possible to have all the women and riches in the world?!  (Source: DAYcomics)

title: Mollakan Myeonggaui Player
description: Lee Yun, the youngest son of the Sermin family, a prominent house on the Dreia Continent. The once peaceful family descends into ruin after the disappearance of his father and brothers. And in the moment everything collapses, Lee Yun is captured by the Paton family and meets his end after horrific torture. But when he opened his eyes, he found himself not in reality, but in Adeon; an endless battlefield and playground of the gods. In that place where countless players lost their lives, Lee Yun grew into the Ghost King, a master player who mastered all classes: Assassin, Necromancer, and Ghost. He challenged the gods. He met his end in defeat, but his story did not end there. The moment he awoke again, he had returned to his childhood at age twelve, retaining the power of a player. To prevent his family's downfall and reclaim everything lost, Ri-yun now begins transforming reality into his own game board. His first target is bloody vengeance against the Paton family, another great clan that destroyed the Sermin family and killed him.  (Source: KakaoPage, translated)

title: Heart Racer
description: Kim Shi-yoon and Kang Taesung have always been like oil and water. Shi-yoon, a doctor at a prestigious hospital, could never understand how Taesung would risk his life in competitive motorsports. Taesung, the heir to Fidus Family, found Shi-yoon’s obsession with his work more depressing than it was valiant. Yet despite this, the flames of their love somehow burned brighter than the contentions they held. But when their egos get the better of them, Shi-yoon makes the decision to break things off. Three years later, Taesung runs into Shi-yoon again…with no memory of who he is or what they once shared. Determined to jump start their love, Shi-yoon must navigate the seedy underground of Taesung’s hidden life in an attempt to make his heart race once again.    (Source: Lezhin US)

title: To Those Who Long for My Destruction
description: From parents forcibly married, whose only shared passion is mutual disdain, a neglected child is born—Leoni. Yearning for affection as a child, Leoni loses her mother to illness, only for her father to auction her hand in marriage. Enduring three arranged marriages, Leoni faces further hardship when she is falsely accused of a capital offense, seemingly destined for a bitter end.    "Those who orchestrated my misery... Every single one of them... shall pay...!"   Perhaps by force of will, Leoni finds herself back in childhood, with memories intact—and her ire. Now, she must reclaim her life and seek long-awaited happiness. But first, there are debts of suffering to be paid. And Leoni is coming to collect.    (Source: POCKET COMICS)

title: People of The Dark
description: A landlady offers her friend's younger brother a tempting deal. But when more people enter the picture, things get more complicated.  (Source: Toomics)

title: The Cup of Vengeance Is in Your Hands
description: Princess Eudith’s story begins when her cruel brother, the king, sells her off to the neighboring kingdom to marry the queen’s powerless stepson, Prince Franz. Eudith becomes a pawn in the queen’s plot to discredit Franz and place her biological son, Krald, on the throne. Desperate, Eudith attempts to end her misery but wakes up on the day of her fateful journey. Armed with knowledge and experience from her past life, Eudith seizes the chance for revenge by helping Prince Franz take his rightful place on the throne. Will Eudith succeed in her revenge and find happiness?    (Source: WEBTOON)

title: Love Interest Zone
description: Myungha Tae is going to die in 300 days. Well… maybe. After getting sucked into his friend’s novel, "Love Interest Zone," 29-year-old Myungha becomes a 19-year-old high schooler again with one mission—make Yeowoon Cha happy or die. With only 300 days to succeed, Myungha must break past Yeowoon’s barriers and prevent him from experiencing the same tragic fate as he did in the novel. But with Yeowoon’s favorability toward him in the negatives, will he be able to survive?    (Source: Tapas)

title: The Village's Special Rule
description: In a rural village where he was always ignored, Jun-Hyeon one day discovers a mysterious megaphone with strange powers. The moment he uses it, the villagers begin to flock to him...  (Source: DAYcomics, edited)

title: Run, Meil
description: After Meil von Biseart has an ominous dream that Princess Riella destroys her home upon being rejected by the emperor of the Helberne Empire, she runs after Riella to stop her from joining the selection for the next empress. In the midst of her efforts, she meets a mysterious masked man in the palace garden who seems to know an awful lot about the emperor. As she uses this new intel for her plan, Meil begins to draw some unexpected attention... At this rate, her dream might come true!    (Source: Tapas)

title: Seasons in Bloom
description: Two young girls at a renowned boarding school depend on and despise each other for the attention they both desperately want—and the love they cannot sustain. Every rose has its thorns, each dazzling flame burns in this period thriller set in turn of the century Seoul, during Japan’s colonial occupation of Korea.   (Source: Tappytoon)

title: The Rotten
description: The rampant spread of a virus has turned most humans into grotesque beings called “the Rotten.” Amidst the ruin, Seonho leads a small group of survivors and protects his companion Haesoo, who is bullied for being weak and timid. Seonho’s group is thrilled to meet more survivors with a large stockpile of supplies—until they realize that this new group is shockingly barbaric and cruel. By far the most twisted is their leader Won, who has his dangerous eyes on Seonho. Determined to shield Haesoo, Seonho makes a deal with Won... but will any of them make it out alive?    (Source: Tappytoon)

title: The Empire's Cutest Little Hostage
description: When life is so bad that you'd rather be held hostage, your next step is obvious. That's what Elaine realizes after a fatal accident slings her back to the past, where she wakes up as her powerless child self. All it takes is pretending that she's the daughter of her evil uncle the king to be captured by the enemy empire's tyrant. However, Elaine knows that she must struggle to prove her value as a hostage in order to survive. Or so she thinks... the last thing she expects is to take the emperor's heart hostage with her cuteness, of all things! It's not long before Elaine is adopted into the imperial family-- which includes a scary empress dowager and three equally intimidating princes. Earning their approval as an outsider seems like an uphill battle, but now that she's come this far, Elaine is determined to win over these formidable royals!    (Source: Tappytoon)

title: Baby Dragon
description: Na Hui-Ju, a 19-year-old girl that was bullied at school was reborn as 'Aileen de Sheia', a dragon. She's happy to feel the strong power that no one has experienced and to feel the love and kindness of the people around me for the first time.     As some make their every effort to get ahold of her, some also make their every effort to get rid of her.     (Source: Kakao, translated)

title: Liebling!
description: One day, Tae-Hoon was bound by a powerful curse... If he wants to break free, he'll have to sleep with the old knight!    (Source: Toomics)

title: Veiled Desires
description: "It's okay if you try it... I promise it'll taste good..."   She had kept her sexual desires hidden, not wanting to disappoint the one she loved. But the more her husband cherished her, the harder it became to suppress her instincts. And when her pent-up lust finally exploded, it wasn't directed at her husband, but at his secretary.  (Source: DAYcomics)

title: Ms. Master
description: A boy was raised by his "Aunt" into a fine young man. He thought they would have the same relationship forever. But one day he sees something he shouldn't have, and their lives will never be the same again.  (Source: TOPTOON+)

title: Angel Diary
description: The only Angel Princess of Heaven is betrothed to the Emperor of the Underworld. Unable to accept her future with the Demon King, she realizes that her only choice is to run away. Her plan is to join the human world disguised as a schoolboy! Now all of the Gods from Heaven and Hell are searching high and low on the earth trying to make sure that a wedding happens.   (Source: Yen Press)

title: Tempest Night
description: A romance of temptation and trepidation. Eunha, a peasant girl, is asked by a blind nobleman, Jihak, to become his reading assistant. Though reluctant, she accepts the shady Jihak's offer in hopes of earning enough money to free her sister from the courtesan life. And thus begins a dangerous romance of hidden intentions and passion.  (Source: Manta)

title: Ssangdungi Eonnineun Mitji Anayo
description: The richest woman in the world, Laurencia Aztane, had success in both work and beauty, but her life was miserable. She worked day and night to protect the one and only family, her weak twins, Erusia. However, she discovered a cruel truth that the illness of her sister, Erusia, was a complete lie, and that she was cooperating with her fiancé to buy all of her property.    At the moment Laurencia was forced to turn her back on her pain and remorse, she had gone back eleven years before her engagement. Her faith in Erusia, her affection for her fiancé; all of it could go to hell. Listen carefully, Sister, there is no good sister now. I pledge to redesign my life.    The first thing is, I have to be tied up with a national hero whom the scumbag in the past cannot possibly deal with    "I'll take care of the debt that you took unfairly. Instead, be my marriage partner, Grand Duke Verdian."    (Source: Kakao, translated)    Promotional one-shot of the novel of same name.

title: Paljae, Child of Winter
description:
It's more than just coincidence.
Young Pal-Jae drifts to the isle at world's end to be taken in by Mun-Ryeong, a hermit with a mysterious past. But when Pal-Jae begins to waste away in the sun-bathed climate, Mun-Ryeong takes his little companion on a journey to the cold north that uncovers their forgotten past encounter.
(Source: Manta)

title: They Wish to Take Away My Child
description: When Iris Locha gazes into the enchanted mirror inherited from her parents, she's met with a haunting glimpse of what lies ahead. A future where she grapples with a terminal illness, and her husband's mistress relentlessly pressures her to abandon her husband and child. Amidst the dark secrets, sinister plots, and misunderstandings, can Iris carve out her path to happiness?    (Source: WEBTOONS)

title: Agineun Akdangeul Kiunda
description: Lablaine had already lived her life three times, and was now living it again. Due to a misinterpretation of an oracle, she had been raised as a "Child of Fate" and was asked to choose a guardian. During the first time she lived her life, she lived in a strict knight's household, but when the real "Child of Fate" appeared, she was sacrificed as a scapegoat for them. During the second time, she was abused by an outwardly respectable scholar; the third time, she ran away and lived as a beggar. Since the country seems to not be safe for her, she decided to leave it this time. To that end she chose …a family of the biggest and coldest villains in the kingdom. She just tried to get along with them for the time being, but her family has turned out to be absurdly overprotective and doting?!

title: Night of Muheun
description: The Seo family is cursed with short lives, but Seungjoo seems to defy fate. That is, until a drunken night with his lifelong neighbor, Kim Muheun, changes everything. Awakening beside Muheun, Seungjoo discovers he can suddenly see ghosts. As the eldest son of a prestigious exorcist family, Muheun vows to protect Seungjoo at all costs, even if it means facing deadly spirits. Bound by a deep connection that feels almost predestined, their intertwined fates lead them on a perilous journey of exorcism, danger, and the fight against an ancient curse.  (Source: Lezhin US)

title: Fiance in Crisis
description: Marianne Pon Cling, a beloved daughter of house Cling and the wife of marquess Chester, was betrayed and murdered by her husband one gloomy night because she knew about the marquess's plot against the emperor. When she was brought back to life, she decides to pay a visit to the emperor to report her husband's future coup, the emperor makes the offer that she can't refuse. "Be my fiancee and spy on marquess."  (Source: Pocket Comics)

title: Catching Two Birds with One Sweet Princess
description: After awakening in a webnovel as Princess Clara, this former office worker isn’t getting the royal treatment. As the shy sister of the tyrannical King Bastian, she’s immediately faced with disdain and so much drama! Plus her character's destined to be seduced by his latest hostage, Crown Prince Daniel, accused of betrayal, and executed. But Clara’s got a backbone and a plan to win over her brother. She’s ready to take control, slap some sense into meddling nobles and servants, and resist the charms of her handsome (really handsome) charge!    (Source: Tapas)

title: From Sandbox to Bed
description: After catching her fiancé cheating, all Seo-Ha wanted was to drink the pain away. Drunk and heartbroken, she shouted she'd sleep with another man too – only to wake up in a stranger’s room, in just her underwear. But the man isn’t a stranger at all… it is Do-Hyeon, her childhood friend turned longtime nemesis. What the hell is he doing here?  (Source: Manta)

title: Beauty and the Raven
description: Born ever so gracefully, but destined to be a disgrace.   The Grand Duchess Evelyn Ra Royceite of the house Royceite was promised to a graceful life from her birth. And yet Her dark-colored hair and eyes made her repulsive by the people of the Theian Empire since they were considered as an ominous sign. Despite all that, her family makes her attend the debutante hosted by the emperor to change her misfortune. On that day, Evelyn meets the grand duchess of Ansian of house Casablanca, the heir to her rival house Casablanca and by far the most beautiful girl that Evelyn has ever seen. Witnessing the hostility and discomfort at the debutante, Evelyn decides to put an end to her miserable life as a caged crow in the house of noble and pursuit her long lost dream of living the wanderlust life as a hired sword. After a few years later, an unexpected person visits at her doorstep.  (Source: POCKETCOMICS)   Note: Includes one extra chapter.

title: Got It?
description: Seung-Jeong inherits a shamanic power that only activates through intense pleasure shared with someone on the same wavelength. After a chance encounter at a casino ties him to Ga-Yoon, the two reunite under dangerous circumstances when Ga-Yoon’s adoptive father dies in a suspicious accident. Bound by desire and a dangerous power, they grow closer as they search for the truth.   (Source: Lezhin US)     Note: Includes 18 extra chapters.

title: Sagi Chin Gongjangnimeul Yuhokaebeoryeotda
description: Maria fulfills her duties as a guild member while hiding her identity as a fallen count's daughter to make a living.  One day, she receives a request from her to break up the wedding of the Duke of Berry Winter.    "This marriage is invalid! I... have the Duke's child!"    At Maria's shocking declaration, the wedding hall became agitated and she was just about to leave,    "Baby, why are you so late?"    The Duke of Berry Winter calls me that during our first meeting...?    Will Maria, who has suddenly become the duke's wife, be able to fulfill her wealthy dream?    (Source: Naver, translated)

title: Sarangui Heonotsugeoham
description: No more unrequited love! The hottest rumor in Going High School is that if you put money in the old clothes collection bin and shout out your favorite person's name, it will tell you how the other person feels...!   Song A-Ram, who is only interested in grades and money instead of dating, is not swayed by such rumors. Then Jeong Jin-U, a popular guy at school, suddenly enters A-Ram's daily life. Now what is she supposed to do with a guy who doesn't know where he's going?   (Source: Naver, translated)

title: Semonyeo
description: Gi-Cheol, after completing his training camp, is tasked by his battalion commander's wife to tutor their second daughter. However, he also has to soothe the loneliness of the wife and three daughters.  (Source: TOPTOON, translated)

title: Muhyeok and Naui: My Irresistible Neighbor
description: Just because Naui’s next-door neighbor is tall, tattooed, and sexy as hell doesn’t give him the right to be loud all night! Naui can’t get any sleep because of the moaning and humping going on next door, and he can’t seem to confront his horny neighbor either. Will Naui ever get any rest, or will he find himself up all night in his neighbor’s bed instead?  (Source: Tapas)  Note: Includes 10 extra chapters.

title: Baedeogui Bam
description: Eun-Seol, who had wandered the battlefield living as a juvenile soldier, sets foot in the family as the daughter-in-law of Baek Empire's Imperial General, Ki Hae-Woon. No one expected to learn the truth that Baekwoon, the eldest son of Haewoon, has already become married. In addition, Hae-Woon declares that he will make her unborn child, who also doesn't exist yet, as the successor. And on a bright moonlit night, he came to visit her place!

title: Friday: Forbidden Tales
description: Every Friday, forbidden tales will be revealed.    (Source: WEBTOONS)

title: College Coeds
description: After years of being holed up in his room, Cheol-Jin finally attends his first college outing, and by chance, he discovers a lewd secret hobby of his gorgeous classmate.  (Source: DAYcomics, edited)

title: Pygmalion
description: Max, a now-former captain of the Royal Knights, went on the quest to slay the great monster Medusa. Unfortunately for Max, it ended in great failure, and he ended up being turned to stone. At first, everyone celebrated his great sacrifice, and his statue was placed in the center of the town square. However, after just one week, the town was ready to throw him away. That’s when Eden, an Elf from the mountains, steps in and decides to care for the frozen Max. Eden had always been cold and aloof to him, so what exactly are his intentions with this unexpected kindness…?    (Source: Lezhin US)    Note: Includes 31 extra chapters.

title: Dearest
description: There’s no laws when it comes to love. Attorney-at-law Theo Ju is haunted by the disappearance of his ex-lover, who disappeared without a trace while in possession of important evidence. Compounding his despair, the purchase of his long-desired Green House falls through, leading Theo to try and blow off steam via a one night stand with Dylan Lowell: a famous a-list actor he runs into by chance one day. But Theo is soon to learn that what once seemed to be a serendipitous encounter may instead lead to a winding path of regret…    (Source: Lezhin US)

title: Knock on Wood
description: Two childhood friends, Eunchae and Jiho, decide to hit each other with a backscratcher to beat away bad luck. And why not? Nothing weird about a couple guys doing favors for each other — you scratch my back and I scratch yours! But sometimes it takes a hard hit to knock some sense into you... or some feelings into your body. Some very good feelings. As their bodies suddenly react to each new bump in their relationship, will their hearts also be tied together? For good luck, knock on wood!    (Source: Tapas)     Note: Includes five extra chapters.

title: A Secret Romance Between Us
description: Due to his phobia of women, Inhwee has never dated anyone in his life, despite lying about being a "relationship expert" to everyone at school. So when Jeongwon comes to him and asks for "kissing lessons," Inhwee reluctantly agrees. But why do Jeongwon's "lessons" keep getting more specific and intimate? And why does Inhwee find himself actually aroused? While Inhwee spends more time with Jeongwon trying to figure all of this out, he is terrified his friends might get suspicious. As long as he keeps up his macho act, no one is going to catch on... right?    (Source: Tappytoon)     Note: Includes four extra chapters,

title: Secondo Piatto
description: Save room for the main course.   Hyunwook is a coward when it comes to his longtime crush Heesun, who suddenly announces that she’s getting married. He helps her plan her wedding at a restaurant called Secondo Piatto. There he meets Wonyoung, an old friend of Heesun’s fiancée. But why is Wonyoung crying on the day of the wedding?     (Source: Manta)

title: Charming You
description: Ji-Min’s new goal in life is to get her hands on her crush’s underwear, but not for the reason you might think! She has been advised by her fortune teller that she’ll have a chance with him if she manages to stick a charm on his underwear. But how’s she supposed to do that when even just looking at him makes her tongue-tied? Luckily, Ji-Min has a plan, but will things go the way she wants, or will she end up making her crush hate her before she even gets a chance to use the charm?    (Source: WEBTOONS)

title: Young Lady's Knight
description: I'm here to protect the lady of the Ruslan household... through all dangers and perils.  (Source: Toomics)

title: Gepetto
description: After a decimating war against the androids they had built, humanity, though victorious, was forced to start living in shelters, isolated from the wastelands of the rest of the world, created by the damage the confrontation brought to the world.  Dr Gepetto, one of the brightest android creators of his time, died and left behind an inheritance of untold proportions, the only clue as to how to get it being a blue haired gynoid the old man had built and preserved for as long as possible even after his death.  The gynoid was reactivated, and she's attempting to escape the grasp of the new government. And a hunt for the inheritance begins.

title: Wangsinhwangje
description: Hae-Jin is a young boy with an unyielding spirit, even in the face of relentless school bullies due to his frailty. His determination to grow stronger knows no bounds, but his body refuses to comply. Yet, Hae-Jin’s tenacity prevails.    One fateful day, he crosses paths with a homeless general, and a random act of kindness unveils hidden potential within Hae-Jin. The enigmatic general utters the cryptic phrase, “Martial arts do exist! ”    Join us on a journey as Hae-Jin, a prodigious talent in the realm of martial arts, sets out to conquer the modern martial arts world. His story is a testament to his unwavering dedication and the mysterious power that lies within.    (Source: Naver, translated)

title: Talk to Me Tenderly
genres: Comedy, Drama, Romance, Slice of Life
description: I only called to complain about the issue with my product… Yeong-Ha fell in love with the voice of the customer service operator. What if the man with that same voice appears in front of Yeong-Ha?! Yeong-Ha had just found the voice of his dreams. Eun-Seong, a man with a perfect and dreamy voice, who'd rather devote himself to work than be in a relationship. Seon-Nam, owner of the adult shop, "Adult Angel." Seon-Su, Yeong-Ha's first crush and judo athlete! A romantic love square between the three men and Yeong-Ha!     (Source: Wutopia Comics, edited)     Note: Includes nine extra chapters.

title: My Sweet Home
description: Jinsoo lives in a boarding house, away from his parents. Luckily for him, he’s got two hot housemates to keep him company, who are more like family than family. But as more and more guests start filling the boarding house, Jinsoo’s life is about to get a whole lot harder - in more ways than one!  (Source: Lezhin US)

title: Samgagkimbapeul Kkaneun Beob
description: A youthful romance for those who think they are unhappy.    (Source: Go Manga)

title: Dating to Survive
description: Would you confess your love for someone if it meant saving your life? Well, that's what I did. I’m a ghost named U-Min, and my girlfriend is a ghost hunter. Quite the cliche, I know... Honestly, I don’t know how I’m gonna get rid of her, but I can’t just let her kill me, either!    (Source: WEBTOONS, edited)

title: My Sister's Happy Ending
description: Yoon Bom-bit loves one thing above all else – dating simulation games. Her most recent obsession? A feudal-era game called “The Lonely Hawk Sings in the Absinthe-Colored Cage” starring Anette De Valois. Bom-bit would do anything to give Anette the happy ending she deserves…but her plans are consistently ruined by Mariette: Anette’s twisted stepsister who leads Bom-bit to getting a bad ending over and over again. One day, Bom-bit starts her computer up, only to be transported into the world of the game – and inside Mariette’s body! With this newfound chance, will Bom-bit be able to help Anette finally get the happy ending of her dreams?   (Source: Lezhin US)

title: App
description: Aside from the guy’s tastes in bed, Taesik doesn’t know anything else about his current partner. Not his real name, his appearance, or even his voice. How long is that kind of relationship going to last?

title: Beauty Brings the Predator
description: The new semester at the prestigious art school begins with each of the four characters coming to face their newfound ambitions and desires. But while desire turns into insanity, those who thirst for more find themselves heading to even greater ruin...  (Source: Lezhin US)

title: Good Night
description: I used to only obsess about money... But that changed when I met my childhood friend again... In the worst way possible...    (Source: Toomics)

title: Summer Breeze
description: In an unfamiliar place I met a boy with a not so unfamiliar gaze. After the summer breeze passes, we will be...     Han Gyeong-Chal's new summer special!     (Source: Naver, translated)

title: Toxin
description: "Imae," born to a human father and an Imae mother, endures various persecutions and grows up without ever obtaining a name. One day, the notorious Black Martial Emperor, the merciless king of the Baedal Kingdom, destroys the Imae village. After his beloved mother dies at the hands of the cruel emperor, he is determined to seek revenge, posing as a painter to paint his portrait…  (Source: Lezhin US)

title: Ultimate Legend: Kang Hae Hyo
description: Delinquency has become a major problem among the youth, especially the high school population. Taking the matter into their own hands, the government has created a special school just for these troubled youths. Kang Hae Hyo, a seemingly normal high school student who is bullied frequently, somehow ends up in the school! He's not sure he belongs there, but something him, and his past, may be discovered at this school...

title: Something Between Us
description: Even after fulfilling her dreams of becoming a magazine editor and living in Seoul, Go Su-A can't seem to shake the feeling that something is still missing. When a difficult day at work and an argument with her mother drives her to get a tattoo, Su-A bumps into the last person she expected to see: her first love, Baek Hu-Beom. This encounter rekindles old feelings and sparks questions about what happened between them nine years ago, but will Su-A be able to muster up the courage to ask them?    (Source: Tapas, edited)

title: Taebaek: Tutorial Man
description: Beginner skills Lv.999! The adventure of a Tutorial NPC who has an ego! (Source: Naver, translated) Note: Includes one extra chapter.

title: Dr. Kim of London
description: A state-of-the-art operating room with pristine surgical equipment? No can do; just a rusty bone saw in front of a jeering crowd for you! Sound like a waking nightmare? Well, that’s the best that the finest 19th century British medicine has to offer Taepyeong Kim, a young student from Joseon who retains the memory of his past life as a surgeon in modern-day Korea. For Taepyeong, London’s supposedly cutting-edge medical education is nothing but one barbaric display of malpractice after another, and he vows to drag the profession kicking and screaming into the modern age.  (Source: WEBTOON)

title: I Just Want My Happy Ending!
description: My fiancé just broke off our engagement, but I’m done crying over pathetic guys. I don’t need a man to lead me to victory—I’ll find my happy ending on my own! I’ve been trapped in a fantasy dating sim for three years and still haven’t reached a good ending. After all, it’s hard to win when I’m Serdel Loeveste, a forgettable side character. In this next playthrough, I’ll have to take more risks instead of simply doing what I’m told. Will I finally be able to escape the game this time?    (Source: Tapas)

title: Mastering the Secretary
description: Secretary Han has been working for the same family for years, so he watched the young master of the house grow up and has always doted on him. But now his beloved young master has taken a special interest in him. Unable to say no to his beautiful young master, they start a steamy sexual relationship. However, Secretary Han is in for an unexpected surprise because his master is going to show him what it’s really like to be under him.    (Source: Lezhin US)    Notes:  - Chapter count includes a prologue  - First published on the author's Postype in 2020

title: Love Derailed
description: For years, basketball player Lee Ahn has kept his feelings for his older friend Geon-U locked away. But when he hears the sudden news of Geon-U’s divorce, his heart starts racing all over again. When Geon-U reaches out to ask him to model for his company, Lee Ahn knows he has to take his shot.   "I'm too horny to focus on basketball... Could you help me out?"  (Source: Lezhin US)   Note: Includes six epilogue chapters.

title: 2Gether: The Series
description: What if this incredibly hot guy becomes my boyfriend...?    Now that he's a college student, Taein's interest is solely focused on getting a pretty girlfriend. In reality, he not only gets a confession of love from a dude, Green, but he just can't get rid of him! After searching for ways to get rid of him, Taein and his friends find one solution, which is to date the most popular guy in his university: Soohyuk Yoo. Taein finally approaches Soohyuk without realizing the two of them are getting closer than he had expected...    (Source: POCKET COMICS)

title: Americano Exodus
description: In a world where only females are born with the ability to wield magic, a boy, Americano (Amel), is the only exception. In this world, he must conceal his gender to protect his legitimacy. From the prestigious Beans family, he must prove himself to be the most capable practitioner of the magic arts in the process of capturing illicit escapees of his home land.    (Source: Comikey)

title: Refrain Love
description: For Park Ki-Yoong, someone who’s reached the peak of his sex drive, having an orgasm was the best joy of his life. After serving his compulsory military service, for two years, he is now about to be discharged from his duty, and into the civilian world. As the saying goes, patience will persevere, Park Ki-Yoong desperately aims to enjoy the free night with the girl he loves, whom awaits outside ut, what’s this dream? Whenever he has an orgasm, the time rewinds. Will he ever be able to shift himself away from the time rift?  (Source: Lezhin, translated)

title: Eunsuk & Jung-gu
description: Eunsuk and Jung-gu have a complicated relationship. The easiest way to describe it would be "roommates." Of course, not all roommates have sex. And most of them don't visit bathhouses together. And only a small few of them have sex at bathhouses.  (Source: Lezhin US)   Note: Includes seven side story chapters and two special side story chapters released in 2025.

title: Vows and Vendettas
description: After a prophetic dream foretells her sister’s death in a political marriage, Arasilla Hugo takes matters into her own hands and marries in her place. Her groom? Demian Vandermeer, the knights’ captain and the brother of her sister’s former betrothed. The only problem is that mages and knights are sworn enemies, and their sharp tongues and stubborn hearts turn every situation into a competition. Arasilla races to save her sister from a tragic fate, while Demian fights for the dukedom. Will their rivalry stay just that? Or will their contractual marriage burn into something more?  (Source: WEBTOON)

title: Be By My Side
description: Aylah Goldwyn’s destiny had been determined since her birth: she was to marry the crown prince. However, on the day after her wedding, the prince asks for their marriage to be dissolved. Now, she suffers from near-constant headaches and insomnia, made bearable only through the embrace of a man. One night, she discovers a man who can make her headaches disappear entirely with nothing but a touch. But the next morning, she discovers that he left without a word, and she doesn’t even know his name. Will she be able to find this mysterious man, her “cure”?  (Source: WEBTOON)

title: Kidults
description: Five childhood friends -- Da-Bin, Jae-Ha, Tae-Hyeon, Se-Hui, and Han-Bin -- make a promise to always stay friends, even after they become adults. Fast forward to the present, where they are now 24-year-olds facing pivotal moments in their journey into adulthood. As they face different challenges, the five friends try to carve out their own paths and figure out what they want for the future, lending each other a helping hand or offering a shoulder to cry on along the way. And amidst it all, unfamiliar feelings begin to blossom where there was once only friendship…    (Source: WEBTOONS)

title: Becoming Her Bride
description: In a world of money, fame, and secrets, Sherry finds herself being the bride of a wealthy family... However, it's far from simple.    (Source: Toomics)

title: Wanpannyeo
description: Hae-Jin's team is always at the bottom of the leaderboard. Mi-Ho, the new ace salesperson on Hae-Jin's team, is at odds with the inflexible Hae-Jin. "Team leader, you're too rigid". An ace saleswoman who sells every policy and a rigid team leader.    (Source: TOPTOON, translated)

title: Celeb Lady
description: The ugly duckling will become the Empire's greatest celebrity in high society!

title: Gureumui Norae
description: These people have been living unhappy lives because they've never been able to do what they want.   Ga Yeon's smart, but wants to become a singer. However, the Korean educational system strongly enforces studying to students without considering the goals and dreams of the student. She's been forced to live a life of suppression.   Jae Hee is a piano player, but he's been living in constant delusion of his life. He has mental problems and cannot distinguish reality from a dream.   Dong Woo and Min Seo are a couple who are talented musicians but cannot make music they wish to make because of the current situation of the Korean music industry.   Hyuk's a very good guitar player, but is forced to be in an idol band, rather than what he really wants to be.    The 5 come together to make a band of their own.     Note: originally a webcomic later published by Random House Korea.

title: Stuck Living with My In-Laws
description: After his wife leaves, a man moves in with his mother-in-law and sister-in-laws, where tensions start to rise.  (Source: Toomics)

title: Jugeun Kkamagwiui Siseon
description: Jin-U is a weak coward left in a world full of zombies, ruled by survival of the fittest. Then, there are those other survivors who would use him, or perhaps even protect him. In the midst of survivors fighting for the sake of survival, fun, and desire, what will Jin-U's fate be?     (Source: Peanutoon, translated)     Note: Chapter count includes 2 prologue chapters and 2 extras.

title: Divorce Proposal
description: To save her noble family from a massive 100 million debt, Ariana Astaroth marries the wealthy commoner Rowen Green, making him the new Count Astaroth in exchange. But after five years of marriage, he impregnates her best friend, and Ariana demands a divorce, stating that she'll pay him back. She goes to a guild run by a man named Rowen for help, who promises to help her escape the marriage. Can Ariana divorce her disloyal husband, or will the overwhelming debt crush her in the end?    (Source: Tapas)

title: Perversion: Dirty Confessions 2
description: Suffering from a thirst that can't be quenched with a one-off encounters, I'm still hooked on these dirty confessions.  (Source: TOPTOON)

title: Hello, Mr. Veterinarian!
description: The night before Lee Jun is set to open his own animal hospital, his childhood pet Pebble visits him in a dream, giving him a mysterious gift. Jun successfully treats his first patient, but when the dog thanks him for saving his life, Jun realizes he can speak to animals! Word about the vet who can understand them spreads quickly among the four-legged residents of the neighborhood, and they come flocking to Jun’s hospital. With his new ability, will Jun be able to save all these furry friends?  (Source: Tapas)

title: Her Mannequin
description: A walking, talking mannequin. Is this an opportunity to use, or an opportunity to be used? Bo-Ra simply wants a chance to get close to the fashion designer, Hong-Rin Da. Yet it would seem that Hong-Rin wants something more from Bo-Ra. Will Bo-Ra’s struggles to become a fashion designer pull at Hong-Rin’s heartstrings? If she even has any to begin with...    (Source: WEBTOONS)

title: Sweet Not Sugar
description: For all his life, Lee Dan has often found himself abandoned. It began with being left in a box outside as a baby and most recently when his boyfriend and roommate cheated on him. While feeling lost on the streets, he is picked up by Yeo Jeongheon, who allows Dan to stay at his place for as long as he requires. Since Jeongheon is an alpha, his intentions of bringing home Dan, an omega, seem obvious. But when Dan offers to repay him with his body, Jeongheon firmly rejects him and instead tries to care to his every need. This confuses Dan as the only alphas he’s encountered are ones who tried to take advantage of him. Perhaps Jeongheon has some other hidden motives, or he actually could be the sweetest alpha Dan has ever met…    (Source: Tappytoon)   Note: Includes 20 extra chapters.

title: Jigu-eui Juin-eun Goyang-ida
description: Though Chichi the cat looks very cute, he has one goal: eradicate humanity and take over the world! He decides to recruit comrades to aid him in his quest, but it looks like world conquest won't be that easy?! Follow the adventures of Chichi the ~tyrant~, Dunno, the dog who loves humans, and Kaiser Kang Taeshik, the hard-boiled wild hamster, as they face many hardships on their path to absolute dominion!    Note: The chapter count includes 8 side stories.

title: The Law of Immutability
description: Woo-Ri Nam has always been the golden boy—wealthy, carefree, and untouchably lucky. But on the leap day of 2028, his 7th real birthday, everything changes. A seemingly harmless reunion with an old classmate, Su-Bin Shin, ends in a brutal murder. And then, inexplicably, Woo-Ri wakes up back in high school, right beside Su-Bin who has no idea that he just killed his deskmate. Trapped in a deadly time loop where almost every timeline ends with his death at Su-Bin’s hands, Woo-Ri becomes desperate to escape his fate. After multiple resets, Woo-Ri finally comes to the conclusion that the only path to survival may be ensuring Su-Bin’s happiness. With just one life left, Woo-Ri sets out to give Su-Bin the happiest life possible.  (Source: WEBTOON)

title: How Dare You
description: The young president of the Dibicci bank, Lawrence Dibicci, controls the economic world of the Cosimo Empire. One day, a girl named Rahui is thrown under his wings instead of her father's debt.  (Source: Copin Comics)

title: Twice the Love
description: My wife’s identical twin moved into our house. But she’s a little naughty… Is the one seducing me my wife or my wife’s sister?!   (Source: Toomics)

title: Four Options
description: To Yoonha, a model student at an elite high school, romance has always felt like a frivolous distraction. But when four surprising choices for love appear, her pencil begins to waver. Will she choose the right answer and ace the ultimate test?   (Source: WEBTOON)

title: Back to 2002
description: Kim Moojin's job was to support the supernatural beings known as "vagrants" on missions, cleaning up the messes they leave behind. Then one day, he is killed in a fight between vagrants, but to his surprise, he wakes up in the year 2002, the peak of his youth! Though excited to relive the good years, he finds out that, unfortunately, he's been cursed by a demon! Now, the only way for Moojin to cure himself is by working with the ones he hoped to avoid the most... the vagrants.    (Source: Tapas)

title: Goyangireul Saranghan Mulgogi
description: The heartwarming story of two young people who love each other but can not be together.

title: A Tipsy Marriage Proposal for the Emperor
description: Whether it's beauty, status, or a Ph.D, Elliere has it all. But one thing she doesn't have is luck with men, which she discovers when her prideful fiance dumps her for "being a know-it-all." Enraged, Elliere storms to the bar and drunkenly rants about her troubles to a mysterious stranger, whose good looks inspire her to ask for his hand in marriage. Unfortunately for her, the man is none other than the cold-blooded Emperor Ropherce, who actually accepts her proposal! Poor Elliere has a feeling she'll need more than liquid courage to survive as the tyrant's unlucky new empress...    (Source: Tappytoon)

title: Fall For Me
description: Jihoon is confident that he can easily make guys, even straight ones, fall for him. It worked quite well up until he met Gyungwoo.    Jihoon works as a nude model and is introduced to Gyungwoo for his personal photograph project. Gyungwoo appears nonchalant to Jihoon's looks, deeply hurting his pride.  Now, Jihoon is determined to make Gyungwoo fall for him.  (Source: Netcomics)

title: ASURA
description: ASURA is the champion of the hot narakas (hells), but there’s no one left for him to fight anymore. Then he hears Indra, the strongest being in the world, has appeared…    (Source: Toomics)

title: Green Boy: Shouting to You
description: Jane is an irrepressible girl who aims to be a champion, and Tae-Jin is the innocent boy who loves her. This is the story of their challenges on the road to the championships, and an unlikely summer-time love.     (Source: Naver, translated)     Note: Chapter count includes a prologue, 3 epilogues, 2 extras, and a side story.

title: Magical 12th Graders
genres: Action, Comedy, Drama, Mahou Shoujo, Supernatural
description: After the death of her older sister, Yeo-Reum Han enters her final year of high school. But when a nap in class runs long, she wakes up to find her biology teacher and best friend in cosplay... fighting monsters?! Faced with death, Yeo-Reum chooses the path of a magical girl, and resolves to find out the truth behind her sister's suicide. With SATs approaching closer and closer, can she protect the love and peace in this world?   (Source: WEBTOONS)    Note: Chapter count includes prologue and epilogue.

title: Killed Once, Back for Blood
description:
Lee Ju-hyeok, an undercover detective, has spent 15 years infiltrating the corporate-style gang ‘DG Group’. He wanted to reveal the evils of the DG Group to the world and topple them…
“Have a nice trip.”
But his true identity was discovered, and he was executed by the organization. Just as the life was fading from his eyes, the ghost of his deceased father, a heroic figure, appeared to him. “Son, it's not your time. Return here only after achieving your dream.” With that, Ju-hyeok was sent back to the year 2005.
“This time! I will bring you down with my own two hands!”
In an era where scoundrels run rampant, I will become a villain, in order to eliminate the root of all evil. (Source: Kakao Webtoon, translated)

title: Golpanji Sangja An Goyangi-ssi
description: After the loss of his loyal dog, Winter, Ji Seung-Woo is wounded by an irreplaceable loss and sadness of his 22 year-long companionship. But one day he finds an adorable little kitten waiting in a cardboard box next to his front door. Being the gentle and kind-hearted man he was, he decides to bring him home. However, upon waking up the next morning he is no longer in bed with a cute baby kitten, but a grown, handsome man?! “I am this person’s owner!” he says! Stay tuned to watch how Seung-Woo and Mr. Cat’s relationship develops…!

title: Blood Blade
description: After being caught in an explosion caused by a meteor collision, Red wakes up to find that everything has changed.   (Source: Toomics)   Note: Chapter count includes a prologue.

title: Killed Once, Back for Blood
description:
Lee Ju-hyeok, an undercover detective, has spent 15 years infiltrating the corporate-style gang ‘DG Group’. He wanted to reveal the evils of the DG Group to the world and topple them…
“Have a nice trip.”
But his true identity was discovered, and he was executed by the organization. Just as the life was fading from his eyes, the ghost of his deceased father, a heroic figure, appeared to him. “Son, it's not your time. Return here only after achieving your dream.” With that, Ju-hyeok was sent back to the year 2005.
“This time! I will bring you down with my own two hands!”
In an era where scoundrels run rampant, I will become a villain, in order to eliminate the root of all evil. (Source: Kakao Webtoon, translated)

title: A Mark Against Thee
description: Innocent man framed for murder and sentenced to death. Released 17 years later after his name was cleared. The times have changed. Yeop has changed. His friends and family have changed. Nothing is the same anymore. The harsh reality surrounding him turned Yeop from a grateful young man to a stoic, skeptical person. And now, he wants to exact revenge on everything that worked together to ruin his life.    (Source: WEBTOON)

title: From Weakling to Nemesis
description: A weak guy wishes to be stronger—and his wish is granted, but with a twist. Instead of raw power, he gains the ability to create clones, doubling his strength with numbers. But there’s an unusual way for him to grow even stronger… and it involves something far more intimate.  (Source: Toomics)

title: My Own Naughty Scenario
description: I had a crush on my friend's girlfriend for 7 years... And she became my girlfriend overnight! How was that possible? It's all thanks to a well-written script. A good scenario that can mesmerize the actors. Ready... Action!    (Source: DAYcomics)

title: Loser
description: A man who gets neglected at home and at work. The loser's rebellion has now begun.  (Source: TOPTOON+)

title: Counter Offensive
description: Heesuh hates Jinmoo, always has and always will. However, his plan to destroy Jinmoo’s life flops because instead of humiliating Jinmoo, the pair spends a passionate night together. Jinmoo wants to take responsibility for his drunk actions, and Heesuh is definitely only dating him for another shot at revenge because there is no way Heesuh is falling for his sexy, sexy enemy.    (Source: Tapas)    Note: Chapter count includes 12 side stories

title: Vampire Chef
description: Despite cooking up mouth-watering entrées as a master chef, Kijun is still a vampire that thirsts for human blood. Lucky for him, the young girl who was his “first bite” has stumbled into his restaurant, and into his trap! Finally after 25 years Miro will be his to enjoy once again, but… her blood tastes terrible! What has she been eating?!
