Time for Chef Hong to put his culinary skills to good use: to lavish her with delicacies and prepare a most succulent meal for himself!   (Source: Tappytoon)

title: The Dawn in Moscow
description: After giving up everything and going against his parents' wishes to pursue his dream of becoming a concert pianist, Lee Siyoon is met with a crippling end to his short-lived career when a car accident leaves his right hand immobile. Finding no reason left to live, he attempts to end his meaningless life. But, instead of meeting his maker, he awakens in the company of a large group of Russian servants. Thrown into this new life as Russian heiress, Tatiana Yuryevna Belchenova, there is one thing that's still familiar, the piano. Unable to give up his dream, Siyoon decides to embrace being Tatiana and attends the most prestigious classical music school in Russia. But, with Tatiana's body refusing to cooperate with Siyoon's mind, will he manage to make it to the top this time? To make matters worse, he's surrounded by some surprisingly tough competition and they're all still just teenagers! Confronted with Tatiana's dark secrets, family and classmates who despised the old Tatiana, and teenage boys who are overly interested in the new one, Siyoon has a long road ahead of him.    (Source: Tappytoon)

title: Sugar Rain
description: One day, after two months of working cleaning bathrooms at a hotel, Johan's predecessor asks him to leave because he's coming back. All Johan has left is his younger brother, Philip.     A man says to Johan that he resembles someone he knew well, and suddenly offers him a job. Maybe it's a scam or something dangerous, but it pays $5,000 a month.     Johan now lives in a shabby, crumbling hut far away from the ridiculously huge mansion, but he's happy. That is, until he meets Herbert...    (Source: Ridibooks, translated)

title: Jageun Assideul
description: Elizabeth March is one of four daughters from a prestigious family. The only reason she stands out from her sister's extraordinary beauty, intelligence and talent is because she's talentless. Her sisters, Meg, Jo and Amy are extremely popular, but Elizabeth isnt popular at all. She decides to attend the same school academy with her sisters and her adventures begin... specially when she meets a certain noble arrogant boy named Adrian!   This manhwa is loosely based on the novel "Little Women" from the author Louisa May Alcott.    Note: This series is on hiatus.

title: Re-Blooming
description: Dinner with friends takes a turn when Yeon-Ji’s coldhearted college ex shows up. After all those years, Hwa-Jo wants to try again… and to date like they used to. Should Yeon-Ji give it a second chance, when all Hwa-Jo did was leave her broken and humiliated? And why is Hwa-Jo reaching out now, just as their old college friend, Mo-Ju, has returned from abroad? The timing’s peculiar, but something’s different about Hwa-Jo. Will the two rekindle a broken love? Or will dark secrets of the past stand in their way?    (Source: Tapas, edited)    Note: The prologue included in the English version in Tapas is exclusive of that version and will not be taken into account for the total chapter count once the series is over.

title: Zenith
description: Left bitter and jaded after being betrayed by her fellow operatives, former agent Zero is reborn as Zenith, the daughter of a count in the Tioren Empire. Despite her disdain for aristocratic life, she does her best to attend school as a noble lady. But when a mysterious tragedy befalls a classmate and sets off a chain of misfortune, Zenith abandons her usual indifference to protect her friends. As her cold heart softens, Zenith may start to realize just how dangerous loving someone can be...    (Source: Tapas)

title: Hold Over You
description: Choi Kwon is haunted by nightmares and cursed to watch those he cares about face tragic fates. Wracked with guilt, he isolates himself, until one day he decides to take a chance - only to see his classmate get hit by a car right in front of him. Though Shin Yooyoung survives, he now claims they were married in a past life—and that breaking this curse is within Kwon's reach. Faced with a strange new reality, Kwon must decide what to believe and just how far he'll go to end his torment.    (Source: Lezhin US)

title: Talk Dirty to Me
description: Yeon-hwa has always dreamed of being a top k-pop idol, and she’s worked hard to make it to her debut. But she’s certainly never dreamed of having her idol group partner to be a hell of a masochistic pervert. Insoo is uncooperative, but she’s infinitely easier to control when you become her master. Now, Yeon-hwa is determined to make Insoo an ideal idol partner—and to do that, she’s going to be Insoo’s ideal partner in bed. But this solution might not be as simple as she thinks…     (Source: Lezhin US)

title: Eotgallimui Bada
description: The enthusiastic Suhyeon was the first one to approach Ai, who was shy around strangers, and they became friends fast. One day, Suhyeon confessed his romantic feelings to his friend, but Ai ran away. When Suhyeon tried to stop him, he got into an accident…   Note: Includes 10 extra chapters.

title: Pungunmurimjeon
description: The protagonist, who was thoroughly enjoying training female characters in a game, unexpectedly finds himself falling into the world of murim. At first, he was bewildered and desperately striving to survive. However, as time passed, he become stronger in the murim realm and made a vow to build his own harem while traveling through the murim world, training various talented female warriors…  (Source: TOPTOON, translated)

title: The Countdown of My Death Is Spamming My Status Window
description: The Repentance Before Death is a webnovel widely hated for its awful quality. This never kept Yul-jeong Kwon from loving the series...until the author decided to kill off her favorite character. Ready to fight for her fave, Yul-jeong borrowed a backhoe to wreck the writer’s house. Unfortunately, she met with an accident and, when she opened her eyes, found herself in the world of her favorite webnovel as Mitchelle Nephthys, one of its most notorious villains.  (Source: Tapas)

title: Bad Mom
description: Ryan has a new stepmom. She's beautiful, smart and his age. What will happen when she decides to play with him?    (Source: Toomics)  Note: Includes one extra chapter.

title: Be My Baby
description: Dr. Lee Sunwoo is one of the nation's finest scientists, who dreams of a world where every human (including men) can conceive a child. Unfortunately, he eventually has to shut down his project. During his now ample free time, he happens to run into an old crush, a friend's older brother, Eungyo. In any other world, this situation may be normal, but not when Sunwoo's (extremely vocalized) desire is for Eungyo's sperm!    (Source: Lezhin)

title: Ice Man
description: Having to work a part time job in a Bom-Mart, Hajun gets harassed by his manager Wookyung without a reason. One day, he was ordered by Wookyung to arrange the cold storage and gets trapped with Wookyung, who came to check on him. But thinking that they'll die in the cold storage, Wookyung suddenly starts to confess to Hajun that he harassed him because he liked him?!

title: DARK MOON: THE GREY CITY
description: After narrowly escaping the threat of the vampires, the werewolf boys try to settle down in a seaside village. They hope for a peaceful school life but instead meet Khan, a boy who has been branded as a devil and is bullied because of it. There's been a death in this quiet village, and with Khan's deep-rooted secret, the boys may be faced with yet another danger...    (Source: WEBTOON)    Note: Includes two extra chapters.

title: My Fake Crush
description: Rai has been secretly crushing on her childhood friend Dogyeong for years. To hide her feelings, she pretends to be a die-hard fan of the K-pop group DIMPLE, especially of Neulchan, her "ultimate bias." It's all just fun and games to make Dogyeong a little jealous... until Neulchan suddenly transfers to her school. With her fake idol crush now a real part of her life, her friendship with Dogyeong starts to spiral. One fake crush, and one real crush—can Rai keep up the act, or is her secret about to come out?   (Source: WEBTOON)

title: Seongjidogwanri Gongmuwon
description: Sunghoon confessed to the club goddess Hyena. However, Hyena rejected him, saying he doesn’t know his place to be liking her. When his drunk self cursed at the void… Ding! ‘Congratulations, you have been elected as Sexual Guidance Officer'  (Source: TOPTOON, translated)

title: Romance Is Dead
description: Luce Granzia was a Cinderella that almost was. But just a night before the wedding, her engagement is broken off and she finds herself guilty for something she hasn't done. Her life plummets, and Luce finds a job at the national laboratory in order to pay back a mountain of debt. Five years later, she's build for herself a new life, new relationships—but with the crown prince's orders, she must head back into high society.    (Source: POCKET COMICS)

title: I'll Protect You, Daddy!
description: Hanelope knows her dad, Prince Hart von Reinhart, is a good person, it’s just that the world doesn’t know it! The cunning Saint Asta has fooled everyone into thinking the prince is a cruel monster, so Hanelope is determined to put a stop to it once and for all! Hiding her quick wits behind a cute smile, she fights against pesky vassals, malicious rumors, and the manipulative Asta for her dad's happiness. Can Hanelope give her dad a happy ending? Or is this too much for a little girl to handle?    (Source: Tapas)

title: Erotic Manga Café Girls
description: I'm a no-good bum who reads manga all day. On my birthday, my uncle made me the manager of a manga café! Ji-Yeon Lee, the girl who used to bully me was a part-timer there...   "I'm looking forward to working with you for the summer, Ji-Yeon"   (Source: DAYcomics, edited)

title: Pink Lady
description: Gyeo-wool, an art student, is having having trouble drawing. One day, she bumps into a handsome guy and takes his notebook by mistake. The notebook had drawings with an art style she is not used to and tries to draw better than him. But, it turns out that the guy knows who she is...!

title: Loplop
description: Felix, who likes to observe people and things on the subway, finally picks his paintbrush back up again after two years. Felix's roommate Harry is an eccentric genius, and even someone as simple as Felix understands that their interactions are bizarre, but he has no idea that Harry is watching his every move. Then Felix's artists' block suddenly resolves itself. Is this a coincidence, or...?

title: 19 Segimal Bimangnok
description: Two siblings who were separated at a young age due to the death of their parents reunites again with many mysteries muddling their past.

title: Red Hot Revenge
description: A good girl. An obedient daughter. A submissive wife. Scarlett spent her entire life being the prized doll on the shelf; first for her father, and now for a cruel duke who is to be her husband. Tired of the belittling and manipulation, Scarlett finally decides to take matters into her own hands and fight for a life of freedom. And that's the thing about girls who've been forced to be quiet their whole lives - no one's ready for what'll happen when they finally decide to speak up.    (Source: POCKET COMICS)

title: Date Me, Too!
description: At a college welcome party, Kang Ju-Yeong overhears a juicy rumor about Choi Hyun, a popular student from the Physical Education department—apparently, he accepts professions of love from almost anyone, even strangers. As the drinks flow, the conversation escalates into a daring bet: whoever confesses their love to Choi Hyun wins 100 dollars. Uncomfortable with the vibe, Ju-Yeong leaves the party, only to run into Choi Hyun as he's breaking up with someone. Seizing the moment, Ju-Yeong blurts out:   "Go out with me too!"   But unlike the others, Ju-Yeong’s profession isn’t just a spur-of-the-moment gamble—he’s been secretly in love with Choi Hyun since high school. With Hyun caught off guard and no way to take it back, the two start dating that very night. Will Ju-Yeong’s long-time crush turn into a lasting relationship, or is this love destined to be just another fleeting romance?  (Source: Lezhin US)

title: Chaeng Meongneun Baeunim
description: "Jae-Hee, why do you always carry two copies of your script?" "Well, you might lose them."    That's a lie. One is for carrying around to the filming set and showing it to others. The other is. [The drama 'Youth Train' can be absorbed.] [Would you like to absorb it?] It is for my own consumption. I devour the script and make it mine alone. The story of Jae-Hee, an actor who can absorb a script 100%.   (Source: Kakaopage, translated)

title: Moralless Scandal
description: Lorena chose death to take revenge on the husband who ruined her life. Thrown back in time, she is determined to rewrite her destiny, protect her family, and destroy her husband. There’s only one way to win: a scandalous divorce.   “I need a wild dog… because I’m going to hunt down a hound.”   A dangerous alliance. A deadly deal. Will she be able to take everything back this time?  (Source: WEBTOON)

title: Back to the Highteen
description: Bo-Young is 28 years old and still struggling to finish college because she can’t afford the tuition. After being unceremoniously dumped by the boyfriend she had supported over the years, Bo-Young gets the chance to get herself out of her stagnant life when she accepts a position to pose as a high school student for a year. All she has to do is avoid getting caught.  (Source: Spottoon)

title: Love and Let Lie
description: Taeyoung’s life takes an unexpected turn when he’s taken in by the secretary to the chairman of one of Korea’s most powerful conglomerates, H Corporation. Though grateful for this fortune, he’s determined to build his own path, without relying on anyone for anything. While he leads what seems like an ordinary life, he holds a secret longing within - the desire to reunite with his first love. Pervasive thoughts of the mysterious man have consumed his mind since the day they crossed paths as children. But when the two meet again by chance, he discovers a disappointing truth: his cherished first love is Heo Minjae, the reckless black sheep of the H Corporation’s main family. Can Taeyoung find the sweet guy he fell in love with, or is the Minjae from his past lost forever?    (Source: Lezhin US)

title: Caffeine
description: Chan-Woo owns a coffee shop in Seoul. His little brother Jung-Min is living with him while he looks for jobs. These two brothers share something in common. They both have the hots for one Da-Yeon Sung. She’s a childhood friend of theirs and now lives in Seoul as a model. Jung-Min’s the one who got there first however, and is now dating Da-Yeon. Looks like Chan-Woo has to just wonder what could have been… But Jung-Min’s cheating ways end up bringing Da-Yeon into Chan-Woo’s arms. And when Jung-Min discovers the two together, things look like they’re about to get ugly. But…is this really happening? Is seeing his brother sleep with his girlfriend really turning him on?! Still, Jung-Min can’t let his brother get away with this. Like the bitter taste of caffeine, these sexy thrills can be dangerous but addicting...  (Source: Lezhin US, edited)

title: Gijeog-ui Mullichiryosa
description: Physical therapist Lee Ki-jeok. The center is failing, and his girlfriend has dumped him! On a day when nothing is going well, he gets hit by a falling star and starts showing a status screen?! The story of Lee Ki-jeok growing into the best physical therapist!   (Source KakaoPage, translated)

title: Simjangeun Joyonghi
description: A high school boy whose heart doesn't beat meets a man that stirs up his heart.  (Source: Foxtoon, translated)

title: Daemabeopsa Curriculum
description: Eugene, a kind and righteous, yet somewhat intimidating wizard, takes in his master's daughter, Ain, as his apprentice and aims to raise her into a great wizard. In a world both saved by magic and thrown into chaos by magic, join Eugene and strive towards becoming a great wizard!  (Source: Naver, translated)

title: Scentless Trail
description: Childhood tragedy turned Lee Ju-Hyeok into an angry, omega-hating alpha. He has enemies, his partners can’t pleasure him, and he can’t remember the one dearest to him. However, his right-hand man, Kwon I-Hyeon, knows who he once was and chooses to stay by his side. But after an incident results in the two eloping,  Ju-Hyeok’s urge to have I-Hyeon all for himself begins to grow. His demands are getting worse, and it’s only a matter of time before there’s nothing left of I-Hyeon… not even a scent.   (Source: Tapas)    Note: Includes one special chapter and six side story chapters.

title: Choeganggeunyeo
description: Sae-mi is a cute girl with a small body, but she also hides a very big secret. She's the strongest girl on Earth!! Can she keep her identity a secret and confess to her crush, Yeong-min!

title: Confessions
description: The ultimate revenge.  "From now on, I will refer to them as Suspect A and Suspect B."  Ms. Jang is moving on from teaching after her daughter was found dead in the school pool. Her death was deemed a tragic accident but Ms. Jang suspects otherwise. And before she resigns, she's about to reveal a shocking truth.   (Source: Manta)  Note: Includes 1 extra chapter.

title: Solo for Two
description: It's love at first sight for Karel when he sees the bedraggled but beautiful Sasya during his travels. Although Karel offers him food and lodging, Sasya slips away without leaving any hints about his identity. But fate pulls them back together when Karel finds a photo of Sasya in a Russian duke's home, and tracks him down in Paris. Once he learns Sasya is a talented ballerino who fled Russia under difficult circumstances, Karel takes him in with the help of his wealthy friend, Julian. However, Sasya knows Julian's sponsorship offer only stands as long as Karel stays interested in him...    (Source: Tappytoon)   Note: Chapter count includes nine side story chapters.

title: Short Stories, Big Secrets
description: Jun-Gi is a short college student that dates Eun-Ju, a girl that is much taller than him. He is insecure about how she feels about him, but after a date he musters up the courage to invite her to spend the night with him. And that is when Eun-Ju finds out Jun-Gi's big secret. After a hot first time, their relationship improves and they spend many steamy nights together. Find out what naughty secrets Jun-Gi and some of the people around him are hiding in this romantic comedy.    (Source: Lezhin X, edited)   Note: Chapter count includes 1 special chapter.

title: Cross My Heart and Hope to Die
description: Silvia Florette wants nothing more than to die. In fact, most days, she can’t even be bothered to get out of bed. Sentenced to repeat life 99 times, she agrees to marry Duke Randall in an attempt to appease God and die at the earliest convenience. However, while Silvia is eager to consummate the marriage, her husband insists they must first fall in love before they can finally sleep together.  (Source: WEBTOON)

title: My Dazzling Downfall
description: Almost overnight, Graciella Wasslet went from being a princess to being a criminal in exile. Now, she lives on an island with her trusty maid under the constant surveillance of her vengeful brother. When she encounters a rival empire’s prince, she hatches a plan to win his trust and start anew in his land. However, it seems that there may be a dark history behind his stay on the island, too. With the odds stacked against them, can these outcasts really escape to a better life?      (Source: Tapas)

title: Narae's Fantasy
genres: Comedy, Hentai, Romance, Slice of Life, Supernatural
description: Sweet, adorable Narae. The girl next door that everyone loves! Except, she has just one little secret- she fantasizes about having sex with anyone and everyone! Men, women, BDSM, toys, you name it, it’s in there. Nothing is off limits for Narae. Now these fantasies are starting to get out of control and affect her dating (and social) life. With help from the mysterious shamaness Nokjoo and the influential Miss Miso, Narae will find a way to make these fantasies a reality and finally get herself a boyfriend.  (Source: Lezhin US)

title: Seven Knights: Alkaid
description: A story that took place during a hiatus since the fall of the Skytrian Empire, before the war of destruction broke out. It was thought that the story had disappeared beneath the records.  The jewel that gives the owner great power... After a war over the jewel, six countries on the continent of Asd decide to sign a peace treaty. Then the six fragments of the jewel got stolen and now the world falls into an even greater chaos...  Prince Caleb of Tanesia, who was the only one who knew the kidnapper's face, was rescued by Serrea and Shan, the Holy Kingdom's investigative team, has all but lost his memories! Sabrina, the Knights Commander of Tanesia, has an offer for those who can recover fragments and stop the war.  (Source: Kakao, translated and edited)

title: High Class
description: Wang Dam left his hometown and came to Seoul without a plan. In order to receive settlement funds, he had to be the top student in his entire school! However, the school he was transferring to was a so-called 'hard-working' school filled with the worst students who only bothered him when he studied... Will Wang Dam be able to become the top student in his entire school in the worst environment?  (Source: Naver, translated)

title: Unstoppable Hayeong
description: Yeon-Ji, a high school girl who tries to help her classmate from abuse, ends up making herself the target of a bully. Her struggles only seem to get worse until the new girl Ha-Yeong steps in for support, declaring war on the bullies. But the more Ha-Yeong fights against mistreatment, the more hostility she attracts, and she must fight her way to keep the ones she cares for safe.    (Source: WEBTOON, edited)

title: Extraordinary Attorney Woo
description: The adaptation to the live drama hit! Woo Young-woo is a rookie attorney on the autism spectrum at one of Korea’s most prestigious law firms, Hanbada. Using her encyclopedic memory and creative thought process, she can find unconventional solutions to the toughest cases — but can she succeed while facing discrimination and stigma?    (Source: WEBTOON)

title: Swim in the Cherry
description: During his innocent and ignorant high school days, Suyeong had a very awkward first kiss with his first love, Chaeri. Before he could resolve the misunderstanding, Chaeri transferred to another school, and years passed by, with his first love buried in his heart. After completing his military service, Suyeong goes to an opening party and encounters Chaeri, who had come in as a transfer student. He is swayed by Chaeri’s advances and realizes he’s in for a surprise…   ”What would you do if I gave you a chance to make up for it?”  (Source: Lezhin, translated)

title: Uri Heeojyeosseoyo
genres: Comedy, Drama, Romance, Slice of Life
description: Everything starts after a break up? The intriguing story of an ex-boyfriend and girlfriend living together.

title: The Perfect Relationship
description: Minjae is smart, handsome, and thoughtful. He wakes up early to cook Hyukjoon breakfast and gets home early enough to make him dinner. He cleans around the apartment and makes sure to take care of his adoptive father. And like any dutiful son, he wants to follow in Hyukjoon's footsteps and become a teacher. He'd make any father proud. But Hyukjoon isn't proud of Minjae. Hyukjoon's son died years ago. And the one responsible for his death lives with him. Minjae isn't Hyukjoon's son. He's his target.  (Source: Lezhin)

title: Na Naemsaena?
description: The story of Ji Ho-Jae, who was cursed with an unidentifiable smell, and his friend who's followed him like a sunflower for 10 years, Han Geon-U. Because of a strange professor, Ho-Jae begins to feel self-conscious and suspicious of Geon-U, as though he has never known him before. Soon, he ends up having a very lewd dream, however...    (Source: BOMTOON, translated)

title: Unstoppable Hayeong
description: Yeon-Ji, a high school girl who tries to help her classmate from abuse, ends up making herself the target of a bully. Her struggles only seem to get worse until the new girl Ha-Yeong steps in for support, declaring war on the bullies. But the more Ha-Yeong fights against mistreatment, the more hostility she attracts, and she must fight her way to keep the ones she cares for safe.    (Source: WEBTOON, edited)

title: Crowning My Feral Prince
description: Some people start off their possession stories on an epic journey of discovery and growth–but not the newly awakened Trixie Giuseppe. She’s not even five minutes into her novel but is already married to the biggest creep ever and disowned by her parents. Wishing to free herself from the shackles placed by her awful husband, Trixie takes a job as a servant at a remote estate. But she discovers too late that the “young master” she has to serve is the empire’s foolish prince, Leone Atarta. The novel’s author must’ve misspelled the word “feral” as Leone turns out to be much more of a beast than a simple beauty. And thus begins Trixie’s tale of trying to tame her new “dog” and make him the shining crown prince he’s meant to be.    (Source: Tappytoon)

title: Puss in Suit, Pup in Tie
description: Sunwoo looks like a harmless little puppy on the outside, but everyone in the office knows he's more of a feisty cat - sensitive and aloof, through and through. Hyunjin, on the other hand, is like a big friendly dog - always ready and oh-so-eager to befriend Sunwoo. After his fruitless efforts to avoid Hyunjin within the office, Sunwoo gives him an ultimatum that results in their unlikely new friendship. Rocky roads await the puss in suit and pup in tie!    (Source: Lezhin US)

title: Heroine's Shares for Sale
description: After finally escaping her unhappy marriage, Lorella is ready to enjoy a single life. Marriage certificate burned? Check. A gentle, handsome knight willing to help her in any way? Check. Everything seems to be going smoothly until a message suddenly appears before her eyes. “Dear Lorella Mayred, congratulations on becoming a heroine candidate!” If she fails to become the final heroine, she’ll be wiped from existence and the memories of everyone who knows her. Will Lorella be able to surpass her rivals and become the heroine of this world, all while being caught up in a love triangle?    (Source: Tappytoon)

title: Miss Overprotected
description: After experiencing trauma at a young age, Iselle Blisha is constantly overprotected by her father and older brother. She spends most of her days confined to the Blisha Estate, only finding freedom during her secret visits to her sculpting master to pass on her blessed works of art. As if her ventures outside aren’t worrying enough for her family, Iselle runs into a bit of trouble one day and gets saved by the bloodthirsty grand duke, Lahan El Canox. And what’s more, Lahan soon visits the estate to ask for Iselle’s hand in marriage! Thankfully, the scary rumors surrounding the grand duke aren’t entirely true, and Lahan just might become the greatest shield of all for the always overprotected Iselle…    (Source: TappyToon)

title: Surviving a Harem
description: Jun Yu, a WBA lightweight champion, gets dumped by his girlfriend, then gets hit by a car… and wakes up in a dating simulation game as Yu-Jun Russell, the adopted DAUGHTER of a noble family! The game tells Jun that he can be reincarnated, but only after playing to win over the love of his target characters. Determined to see his ex-girlfriend again, he eagerly accepts the challenge. Will Jun be successful in winning the hearts of his suitors, and manage to return to the world he came from?    (Source: WEBTOONS, edited)

title: Legend of Tyr
description: Fantasy Action Legend that follows his brother's diary!!   After his brother Loki's death, on Tyr's 17th birthday,  Loki's diary is delivered to Tyr. When following the diary step by step, Tyr realizes that everything that's happening around him is already recorded within the diary.

title: Stained Blue
description: After proposing to his girlfriend, Do-Jin wakes up the next morning in a strange house with no memory of how he got there. When he asks about his fiancée, her brother Ju-Yeon gives him a chilling answer: “She’s dead.” But Do-Jin can tell immediately that Ju-Yeon is hiding something. Stranger still, Do-Jin has been having vivid, recurring dreams in which he and Ju-Yeon share a bond that goes far beyond a typical in-law relationship. As he digs deeper, the secrets Ju-Yeon reveal will turn Do-Jin’s entire understanding of his love and his life on its head.  (Source: Lezhin US)    <I>Note: The chapter count includes 4 extra chapters.

title: Wish Me Love
description: Yijin couldn't have lucked out more, getting a job working for the charismatic Joohyuk, one of the most influential figures in the restaurant franchise industry. He's the perfect boss* until Yijin catches Joohyuk kissing a man and finds out he's gay. But when his father gets in trouble with debt collectors, Yijin turns to Joohyuk for a huge favor. As a businessman with prior experience in such matters, Joohyuk agrees to help... but he wants something physical in return?!  (Source: TappyToon)    Main story: 1-41 + Prologue  Side stories: 42-81

title: Cash or Credit
description: Keith, a legendary con artist who made a career out of swindling mafias and criminal syndicates, finds himself cornered by the police. To avoid capture, he hides in the most unlikely place—prison. But the temporary safety of his self-imposed confinement is short-lived when he catches the attention of the prison's ruthless warden, Della, the most feared guard in the joint. Now, Keith must navigate a new power struggle where he might be forced to lose more than just his freedom.  (Source: Lezhin US)

title: The Mating of Elves
description: Pania Elarona, an average elf with the special ability to see people's status windows, idolizes the infamous lone wolf Naos Shalia. When a new law forbids solo dungeon adventuring, she volunteers to pair up with him. Reluctantly, Naos agrees, but a hidden lust demon curse triggers in the dungeon, trapping him in a passionate haze! Pania checks his status window, and a mission appears saying... he needs to get off?! Can these elves conquer the curse, or will the lust be too strong to overcome?  (Source: Tapas)

title: Kiss on the Piano
description: Sandeul is an ordinary college student staying in Australia on a working holiday visa. There’s nothing special about working on a farm, and there’s nothing special about accidentally having a drunken one night stand with the CEO’s son, Lahn, right? Except, there’s nothing ordinary about fleeing a country to escape the guy you had a one night stand with…and having that guy follow you all the way to South Korea. Now, Sandeul’s life is about to become very, very interesting…    (Source: Lezhin US)

title: A Heartfelt Andante
description: One man’s death led to another man's salvation. After years of suffering from heart disease, Da-Ul receives a heart transplant from young and renowned pianist Yu-Won, who has died an unfortunate death in a car crash. Da-Ul’s life has been forever changed by this priceless gift, and he pledges to make every second of his life count in gratitude. But when he meets Yeon-Jo, the woman his donor was deeply in love with, and finds out that she has been living in despair, he begins developing ambivalent feelings towards her. Is it guilt, or could it be something else?    (Source: WEBTOON, edited)

title: The Housekeeper's Load
description: From cooking, to cleaning, to everything in between, Ha-yeon is the perfect housekeeper! There’s just one issue… Woojin, who translates erotic novels for a living, keeps seeing his hottie of a housekeeper in his fantasies! Maybe it’s just Woojin’s lack of bedroom experience making him sexually frustrated but he’s gotta take care of this situation before things get out of hand. Woojin’s old friend, the mischievous Sol, sends him something to try to help him out, but when Ha-yeon catches Woojin in a most compromising position with the gift, will this shocking discovery be too big a load for the both of them to bear?!     (Source: Lezhin US)    Note: Includes 22 side stories.

title: Rasud
description: A world where 11 Kings with absolute reign live protected by knights. Apprentice knight Hinta, together with his partner Kanut, venture on a journey to become appointed as formal knights. An action-packed fantasy story of two boys as they fight to become real knights!    (Source: Naver, translated)

title: Dongbangbulpae
description: The Fourth Heavenly Demon, who was also known as the Heavenly Enlightened Warrior, a match for ten thousand enemies, and the Sacred Saint of the Sun and Moon Cult, found himself in an unexpected predicament. During the unification of Jianghu, a mishap occurred with the Soul Splitting Grand Art, resulting in his soul being mistakenly transferred into the body of the 14-year-old son of Mount Hua's Shadowless Sword Warrior.    Tsk, what is this miserable body...    Doesn't matter. I am the Invincible of the East, and all the martial arts in the world are in my head. I will unify the Jianghu once again!    (Source: KakaoPage, translated)

title: I Became an Apartment Manager
description: "Sleep with the women living in this building- whether through blackmail, seduction, or even force."   Lee Han accepts the sweet but dangerous offer that could turn his miserable life upside down...   "Apartment 301, the married woman Su-Jin Han. I need to find this woman's weakness fast!"  (Source: DAYcomics, edited)

title: Jopokdo Toesaga Doenayo?
description: Hyeongwon, a member of the Viper Gang, decides to leave the gang and flee the country. He still has a long way to go, but in a weak moment, he ends up having a one-night stand with  Seongjin... But who is really Seongjin?

title: The Uncanny Counter
description: In this world and the next, both good and evil exist. But who do you call when evil spirits from the afterlife escape to prey on innocent human lives? You call the Counters, people with supernatural abilities, who also happen to run a noodle shop. When one's killed, an ordinary high school student is unexpectedly chosen to take their place. The seemingly mundane life of So Mun takes a drastic turn as his body changes (curly hair now included) and he starts to show a talent for his new role.   (Source: Tapas)

title: Let Me Stay Over Tonight!
description: 28-year-old Gyu-Ri Gam has never dated anyone before in her life. When she wakes up one morning after a night of heavy drinking, she suddenly recalls that someone at work asked her out but can’t remember who it was! Gyu-Ri narrows it down to three possibilities: Seung-Hu, her hot co-worker who is nice to her; Myeong-Seok, her talented but cranky boss who she’s sure hates her; and Leo, a popular actor who anybody would kill to date. At first, Gyu-Ri thinks the identity of her secret admirer is obvious... but is it?    (Source: WEBTOONS, edited)

title: How To Survive Downsizing
description: Despite his hard work, Lee Eunho finds himself laid off due to company downsizing. Before he can even consider what's next, ominous messages appear, claiming Earth has been bought out. Now, only survivors of life-or-death missions will make the cut, turning even friends into foes. As all hell breaks loose, humanity must decide between using one another to get ahead or working together as a team. Can Eunho survive Earth's sudden downsizing, or will the pressure to move up leave him in the dust?  (Source: Tapas)

title: A Good Day to Go Crazy
description: The TV star showed up and changed everything! A dazzling star appears in front of Ho-Soo, who lives his life for his sick little sister. It's the famous singer Esau, who is about to make a comeback soon. But Esau was facing a sudden crisis, as some woman appeared declaring to be his blood-related mother... Esau was going through so much pains behind all the stardom and Ho-Soo becomes the only one he can rely on. So, from that day on, Ho-Soo's life is anything but ordinary.    (Source: NetComics)

title: Spoiler Boneun Deulama Jagga
description: Jang Yeon-jae, a drama assistant writer for 6 years, desperately wanted and tried to be a main writer, but ahead of his debut, his teacher the main writer Kim Tae-jin stole his script.    "Sir! How could you do this! That's my script!”  “Yeon-jae. It is true that I was a little influenced by your ideas. But that is definitely my work.”    After leaving the assistant writer job out of anger, he looked for a way to knock Kim Tae-jin down, but there seemed to be no hope. But at that moment...    A miracle happened.    [You can purchase 200 characters of the script with a rating of 0.1%.]  [When broadcasting with this script, the expected average rating is 15.2%.]    [Do you want to buy?]  [Yes / No]    "On-air shooter" required!  Assistant writer Jang Yeon-jae's high-rating drama, "Drama Writer Who Reads Spoilers".    (Source: KakaoPage, translated)

title: WOMEN of ZEUS
description: Zeus is reincarnated as a lowly human, Je-U. To go back to Olympus, he needs to conquer all the goddesses...   "Just you wait. It's easy to make you mine once I set my mind to it!!"  (Source: DAYcomics, edited)

title: This Wasn't My Plan
description: In a twist of fate, Ro-A finds herself thrown back a decade in time. This isn't just a trip down memory lane. She's faced with a younger, naive Si-Hyeon, the future superstar who would brutally wrong her. Armed with knowledge of what's to come, Ro-A sees a golden opportunity: a chance to rewrite their history. Can she resist the allure of revenge and change Si-Hyeon's destiny before he becomes her nightmare?   (Source: WEBTOONS, edited)  Note: Part of YLAB's Red String Universe.

title: My Wife's Sister
description: My wife lost her sight due to an accident. Was surviving actually better or worse for her? Living with the sister-in-law is harder than I thought.     (Source: TOPTOON+)

title: Polar Attraction
description: Swept up in a housing swindle, Bi-Ya and Chang-Sik end up as unlikely roommates - but Bi-Ya has a secret that doesn't bode well for her tricky co-ed housing situation... When Chang-Sik wakes up one night to find her straddling him, completely naked, she admits to being able to see ghosts - needy, horny ones with very specific bodily needs. With ghosts flocking to their room every night, the two newly met strangers must figure out a way to fend them off!    (Source: Lezhin US, edited)

title: My Little Villainess
description: Roelle Chloe has never been able to feel emotions. Even during her past life, living as an outcast in the back alleys of the capital, the empire's most hated mage didn't shed a single tear. And dying at the hands of her father didn't improve her inability to feel empathy. But after being given a second chance at life after death, Roelle realizes that she might be able to use her magical gifts to change her bitter fate. From friendship to romance, and even family... Can Roelle use her blood magic for good while learning to love and be loved?    (Source: Tappytoon)

title: Chunshik the Old Newbie
description: Chun-Sik Kim is the CEO of Novis Company, the company behind the VR RPG Novis World, but he has never played his own game before. After claiming that he could become a top ranker without paying any money at an update preview event, he starts Novis World with only his secretary and passion by his side. Will this old dog be able to learn new tricks and become the top ranker in Novis World?     (Source: WEBTOONS, edited)

title: The Regressed Doctor Just Wanted to Live Quietly
description:
In the operating room, Dr. Jin-Hyeok Lee is flawless—unyielding, brilliant, and untouchable. But outside, he’s a ghost to his family and loved ones. He misses everything, even his mother’s final moments. By the time he understands what he’s lost, it’s too late… until it isn’t. He wakes up 27 years in the past. Now armed with a lifetime of memories, Jin-Hyeok vows to live differently. But peace won’t come easy. Old rivals, new battles, and countless lives await. Scrubs on. Lights up. Scalpel ready. And this time, Primum non nocere.
(Source: WEBTOONS)

title: Why the Villainess Wields the Sword
description: No one knows how the pampered and wicked Erin Lisus suddenly becomes a top swordsman at Atenz Academy. That's because they don't realize that Erin was actually transported to the past after being killed by her stepmother and was reborn into different worlds. Now, with her past experience as a swordmaster, Erin's out to get revenge and rescue her allies from her stepmother's grasp. But with foes at every corner, can Erin save her loved ones? Or will her reason to wield the sword vanish with them?  (Source: Tapas)

title: Survival Marriage
description: Next to impossible coincidences seem to be connected to a shared dream… Is this destiny?   Chayee springs out of bed after one of the most realistic and steamy dreams she’s ever had. After bringing herself back to reality, she goes to work as a T.A. at her former university. But, while on an errand for her professor, she meets Dohun and gets the shock of her life. He… seriously resembles the man she spent a hot night in the dream. She finds herself unable to face him since every glance brings back the very realistic feelings of the night before!   “By any chance, have we… met before?”   Dohun also has unexplainable feelings of discomfort towards Chayee and puts as much space between them as he can. But, no matter how hard they try, fate keeps dragging them back towards each other. What’s going on?! When dreams and reality intertwine, anything can happen!   (Source: TappyToon)

title: Adelia: Fetters of the Flower
description: Adelia Gerard had lost everything. The man she loved was dead, and her home was reduced to ashes. The person responsible for her misery? Her fiancé and crown prince of the empire, Elkarion Yearis. Heartbroken, Adelia vowed to knock him off his throne, but unbeknownst to her, the gears of fate had already begun to turn, sending her unexpectedly back in time. Now 19 again with her world back to normal, will Adelia be able to save her loved ones and bring down the crown prince once and for all?    (Source: Tapas)

title: Reincarnated into a Cursed Game
description: An overworked game developer dies and is reincarnated as the weakest character in the game he created himself. Challenged by Jaeseokcheon, the ruler of the game universe, he must complete a series of quests to survive and prevent a second death. Epic battles between monsters, celestial beings with magic powers, and Jaeseokcheon ensue. In this tug-of-war between the omniscient game designer and the hidden mastermind ruler… Who will win?    (Source: WEBTOON)

title: Seventeenth Son
description: Ahn Dongha is next in line to take over his village, but there’s just one problem: he can’t do so without a wife. The women of the village are clamoring at his feet to get a chance to convince him to wed…by any means necessary.  (Source: Lezhin US)

title: Rainbow
description: The legend want that when the world will sink into chaos 7 valorous leaders will appear to save it. The Earth is about to be conquered by the evil, when two guys come in contact with a mysterious robot, the Rainbow Metal Ranger, whose task is to find and protect the seven Rainbow Warriors. The group then starts a long journey trying to save the world.

title: Agi Hugungnimeun Joyonghi Salgo Sipeo
description: I possessed a supporting character in a reverse harem novel.    As a young concubine who gained the interest of the empress. The concubines and male lords, eventually killed her for treason.    Fortunately, I possessed her just as she was entering the Imperial Palace. Everyone in the Imperial Palace was wary of me, but didn't hate me yet. I don't need, nor do I want to be loved by the empress.    "Come to my room tonight. I'll read you a fairy tale!"  'Woo, don't cry. I'll give you this."    But why is everyone so kind to me? I couldn't understand.   (Source: Kakao, translated)   Note: This is a promotional one-shot for the homonym novel.

title: Chwihwajeom
description: Can spying on women’s naked bodies while bathing really be considered training…? Chwihwa Point, an acupuncture pressure point that ignites a woman’s lust. Even a mere slave can have any woman of the 8 provinces of Joseon, if they learn this technique!  (Source: TOPTOON, translated)

title: Make a Wish
genres: Drama, Fantasy, Hentai, Romance, Slice of Life
description: TAE-MIN HAN, had to break up with his girlfriend because his dick is just too big. After finding out about a statue that grants any wish, he goes there, hoping to make his dick smaller... However, he meets the most popular girl on campus there... and now they have to make a wish together?!  (Source: TOPTOON+)

title: Hakwonmul
description: A love story of a struggling crush. Can Minho’s love be achieved?

title: Behind the Scenes
description: Straight-laced honor student Jin-Woo decides to break the rules just once, and steps into a club for the first time in his life. One drunken mistake leads to him spending a passionate night with a strikingly handsome stranger - the next morning, he wakes up alone in an empty room…with a pile of cash on the nightstand. Shocked and humiliated, Jin-Woo assumes the worst, and buries the memory deep in his heart. Back at school, Jin-Woo volunteers for a student performance…only to lock eyes with someone on stage. It’s him. The man from that night, and the king of campus: Kwon Tae-Yeong. It’s then that, in front of everyone and with a glint in his eye, Tae-Yeong smiles and utters two words that will change the course of both of their lives forever: “Found you.”   (Source: Lezhin US)

title: The Good Manager
description: I'm a celebrity manager, but one day, I awakened a new power...! With one glance from me, all are powerless to resist...!   (Source: Toomics)   Note: Chapter count includes a prologue.

title: Teach Me!
description: They say third time’s a charm, but what Jaehong needs is a miracle. After failing the notorious college entrance exam twice, he’s determined to succeed and finally experience the ultimate campus life. However, he can’t do it alone. His new math tutor, Han Eunsung, looks like he’ll be Jaehong’s best ally. The thing is…Eunsung isn't actually Jaehong’s tutor! The misunderstanding gets cleared up quickly, but that doesn’t change the fact that Eunsung was the best tutor Jaehong’s ever had. Now Jaehong has a new objective: to persuade Eunsung to teach him. However, Eunsung doesn’t seem too keen...    (Source: Lezhin)

title: Protect the Knight
description: Ye-eun is a young high schooler who fantasizes about one day having the perfect first kiss with her crush. A practice kiss on her sister’s action figure, Bryk, turns her world upside down when it magically brings him to life. Bryk, a once-legendary and most definitely human knight, finds himself perplexed as to how he woke up as an action figure. Though he sets out to find the witch who he suspects is to blame, he quickly gets caught up in Ye-eun’s attempts to keep her sister happy and her crush interested. Bryk and Ye-eun vow to figure out what turned him into a doll and how to return him to his world as a human man. That is, of course, if he doesn’t get broken, eaten, or stolen first.   (Source: WEBTOON)

title: See You in My 19th Life - Special Spin-offs
description:
A special side-story to commemorate the release of the live-action adaptation of See You in My 19th Life.

Ju-Won takes Seo-Ha on a trip to the countryside, where his mother used to visit often. What will they see, and who will they meet there?

(Source: Naver, translated)

title: Sesange Nappeun Yeongaeneun Eopda
description: Aristocratic young ladies are either rude and ill-mannered, or have nothing but flowers in their heads. Even in an era when talk like that was aplenty, there was someone who taught them. A commoner named Derrick realized he has talent for magic and made a name for himself as a mercenary. One day, he was invited to become the magic tutor for aristocratic young ladies. Thanks to Derrick, the star lecturer who turns those rude young ladies into a "proper person," prestigious noble houses start bombarding him with offers.   “There’s no such thing as a bad young lady in the world.”   At least, not in front of Derrick.  (Source: Naver, translated)

title: See You in My 19th Life - Special Spin-offs
description:
A special side-story to commemorate the release of the live-action adaptation of See You in My 19th Life.

Ju-Won takes Seo-Ha on a trip to the countryside, where his mother used to visit often. What will they see, and who will they meet there?

(Source: Naver, translated)

title: Mr. Delivery Knight
description: Binge-reading my favorite romantasy novel is my one and only solace after late-night shifts at my part-time job. I was just reading my novel while walking home from yet another long shift, when suddenly a truck…! Huh? Delivery truck driver Taekjin’s struggle to return back to Korea after waking up in a strange world begins!  (Source: WEBTOON)

title: KEEP A DOG
description: Ryu Ji-Woo wakes up to a nightmare: blindfolded and leashed, he awakes in the basement of a madman. In order to see the one he loves again, he will have to bend to his master’s will, forgoing his sense of decency for the chance to escape and see the sunlight once more…  (Source: Lezhin US)   Note:   - Chapter count includes a prologue.  - Part of Lezhin's Gwanggong Collection (광공단편선). A gwanggong (광공, hanja: 狂攻) character is obsessed with the object of their desire, similar to the Japanese "yandere". Scanlations have erroneously translated this to "GwangGong Apartment/Industrial Complex", which may have caused confusion.

title: Delicious Blood
description: Due to an unexpected accident, Choi Yu-Jeong, an ordinary college student, owes some money from the owner of a cafe called "Delicious Blood." Daniel, the owner of the cafe, tells Choi Yu-Jeong to pay off her debts by working part-time at his cafe. Choi Yu-Jeong eventually starts a part-time job, but the handsome boss Daniel, doesn't let her off the hook.  Who is Daniel? And what will happen to Yu-Jeong?  (Source: POCKET COMICS)

title: Roommates with Benefits
description: Choi Taeshik lives a quiet, normal life. He works hard at the office, takes good care of his body, occasionally goes on dates, and tries his best to be a responsible adult. One day two sisters down on their luck show up outside his work and ask for a place to live. Even though he finds out they are old family friends, how can Taeshik live with two girls? Just the thought makes him uncomfortable. After originally agreeing to let them stay for just one night, one of the sisters tempts Taeshik with a mutually beneficial offer he just can’t refuse! Will Taeshik be able to successfully navigate the sudden addition of two tantalizing roommates?  (Source: Lezhin X)

title: Pixel of Life
description: After finding out her boyfriend has been cheating with her boss, Hana loses her menial desk job of 5 years. Countless rejections later, she finally lands an interview at a small art gallery. Hana jumps at the chance to leave the drama of the past few months behind. But her high school friend (and worst enemy) Jiyeon is the gallery owner? Their most peculiar romance is about to begin- or not?!     (Source: Tappytoon)

title: Extra Credit
description: Harry is one tardy away from failing his class, so his professor offers him a chance to make up for it in a special way.  (Source: Toomics)

title: My Favorite Novel Has a Weird Epilogue
description: Fencing champ Rina is on cloud nine after winning gold at the Olympics, but is pulled down to earth when she wakes up as an extra in her favorite novel. Though she thinks she'll have a front-row seat to the hero and heroine's romance, Rina learns that it's been 25 years since they both tragically died. On top of that, their son, Leo, is being treated like a traitor by the very royal family his parents fought to protect! Fueled by her fangirl determination, Rina raises her sword to clear Leo's name and give him the happy ending he deserves.   (Source: Tappytoon)

title: Woryahwandam
description: After losing everything to the Vampires, Segun meets the Vampire hunter Silvester to become a hunter for himself. "Welcome to the world of the psychedelic moon".    (Source: Lone Manga)

title: Ghost Gate
description: After staying late to work overtime, Lee Gi-Yun stumbles upon his boss, Jeong Yi-Tae, masturbating at a coworker's desk. Horrified, he tries to leave, but a disembodied voice urges him to stay. When Gi-Yun tries to record Yi-Tae’s depravity, he is caught, and something about his boss seems disturbingly off. From that moment, Gi-Yun is pulled into a warped reality where nothing feels certain. As his relationship with Yi-Tae takes a dark turn, strange and ghastly events begin to plague the office, ensnaring both Gi-Yun and his coworkers.    In this story of erotic horror and psychological dread, Gi-Yun must uncover the truth before reality slips away entirely..  (Source: Lezhin US)

title: A Single Round at Romance is Enough!
genres: Comedy, Drama, Fantasy, Romance, Slice of Life
description: Romance simulation video games are usually a mess-free way to date handsome men, but after Shiyeon Choi wakes up in one, she wants out! In her new gamified life, she quickly realizes how rude the male leads are. Thus, Shiyeon decides to “Bad End” all of her love interests, determined to give them a taste of their own medicine. But despite beating the game, she finds herself back at the beginning once again. In this round, she plans to live freely and blow off the MLs... but will she succeed, or is romance in the air after all?    (Source: Tapas)

title: Pandora's Choice
description: 19th century America isn't exactly the best place for a half-Asian child and her alcoholic single father. While the daughter struggles to make sense of the world, her father finds comfort in isolating himself. And of course, they fight. Against each other. With fists.     (Source: Lezhin)    Note: 2nd Lezhin Comics World Comic Contest Winner.

title: The Sea's Nocturne
description: College student-cum-pianist Su-yeon goes into a destructive spiral after he messes up his piano performance. And he's decided getting into bed with strangers is the best way to cope with his anxiety. When he's sleeping with someone, it's like all his troubles just melt away—like he's underwater. During one of his meltdowns, he ends up sleeping with Hae-su, a student-athlete. Except Su-yeon has no memory of the incident. Hae-su remembers it all however, and when the two end up working together on a group project, he is determined to break down Su-yeon's walls. Hesitant at first, Su-yeon gradually discovers that there's more to life than just being surrounded by shades of blue. Will Hae-su be able to pull Su-yeon from the water he's submerged himself in or will the current be too strong to...resist?    (Source: Lezhin US)   Note: Includes 14 extra chapters.

title: Young Madam
description: Isn't it exciting to imagine doing it with an innocent teacher? I wanted to confess my feelings to the perfect teacher who has it all once I graduate. But she just said that she is quitting her job to get married...!  (Source: DAYcomics)

title: Barrel
description: Eun-Oh Nam, a member of the corporate organization Jin Hong-pa, was a spy planted by the rival organization Deok-un-pa, and was working to steal items managed by Jin Hong-pa to secure funds and manipulate the ledger. Then, at the order of the boss of Jin Hong-pa, he was given the task of spying on his daughter Cheon Hee-Min. Eun-Oh is bewildered by the existence of Hee-Min, who is unknown to the outside world, but soon faithfully carries out the assigned task. In a wide, dry room with no human smell, the two develop a strange bond behind the firmly closed front door. However, their deepening feelings shake their reason, and the two eventually make an irreversible choice...  (Source: Lezhin, translated)   Notes:   - The chapter count includes a prologue.  - Part of Lezhin's Gwanggong Collection (광공단편선).

title: Bulwanjeon Cinderella-mul
description: Jung Eon is a maid who works in the house of a rich and powerful family. She dreams of escaping a life of servitude and saves every penny she earns. One day, she receives an unexpected proposal from her childhood friend and boss, Hyun Mae-hwa. He's as pretty as a flower, but has a horrible personality. Mae-hwa says he wants to marry her because of a prophecy that says Jung Eon has six benefactors in his destiny. He thinks she is the source of his financial luck. She accepts, thinking it's a chance to change her life.   Note: Includes six extra chapters.

title: Call Me Master
description: If you cannot remember, listen to your body. If anyone discovers that slave master Ananse has lost her memory, she will be killed. So to save herself, she ropes in Solteo, a slave who hates her beyond compare. Her proposal?    "Help me uphold my old image, and you'll be freed."    His reply? "I'll make you regret ever requesting that, my master."    (Source: Manta)

title: Hellen
description: Hae-In, or Hellen, got his nickname for one simple reason - it sounds like Hell. Hae-In’s specific hell begins after he is kidnapped, finding himself constantly drugged and made dependent on his master, Phillip. But Phillip seems to have a different reason for choosing the name Hellen. Did he really take Hae-In because he wanted a rare beauty, or is there more to it than Hae-In realizes…?  (Source: Lezhin US)   Note:   - Chapter count includes a prologue.  - Part of Lezhin's Gwanggong Collection (광공단편선). A gwanggong (광공, hanja: 狂攻) character is obsessed with the object of their desire, similar to the Japanese "yandere". Scanlations have erroneously translated this to "GwangGong Apartment/Industrial Complex", which may have caused confusion.

title: Would You? Could You?
description: "Why didn't you accept my bouquet?", she asked years later like it was the simplest thing. Chance brought Ju-Na back into Yun-Seo's life but things were much more complicated now. They were no longer in college where the only obstacle between them were the truth yet spoken. Luna was married with a child, what could Yun-Seo do? As Sae-Ha chases after Yun-Seo, Yun-Seo discovers even after all these years she'd still love Ju-Na at the drop of a hat. The three women navigate through their feelings for another, each desperate and yearning for a chance to be accepted.   (Source: Pocket Comics)

title: Gosuui Lesson
description: When Mr. Joo and Mr. Young tried to have sex, things went awry due to Mr. Young being too big down there. Eventually, Mr. Joo gave him a second chance due to how besotted Mr. Young seemed to him. The meticulously prepared Master's Lesson is finally starting!  (Source: Peanutoon, translated)   Note: Part of Peanutoon's Gosuwi BL Danpyeonseon (고수위 BL 단편선) Collection.

title: The Family Tree
description: Things are about to get complicated when two brothers end up with a widowed stepmother.    (Source: Toomics)

title: Jim Jalmon Chajaosyeosseoyo, Agyeongnim
description: As if being reincarnated in the slums wasn't bad enough, I became the test subject of a cruel experiment in a crime-plagued city.    One day, a man destroyed the research facility I was in, and upon recognizing him, I discovered I was in the world of a hopeless reverse harem novel. After I escaped from the research facility, I was living a normal life--until I moved in right next to the female lead’s house. I realized I’d become an extra from the novel, as well as the female lead’s neighbor!    If everything goes according to plan, the female lead would save the villain, who fainted after being fatally injured, and would become the subject of his fanatical obsession. But why is the sub male lead villain here, unconscious in front of my house? Lakius Avalon was the king of the dark world, as well as the fearsome man I'd met at the research facility.    I looked around quickly, then shoved his body with my foot. "You've come to the wrong house, villain."

title: My Little Sister is the Demon Lord!
description: After their parents' sudden passing, Gyeon-U finds himself in the role of caregiver to his younger sister, who harbors a startling secret—she's the Demon Lord with plans for world domination! Undeterred, Gyeon-U is committed to nurturing his sister with love and guidance. Join them in this unique tale as they navigate everyday life amid their extraordinary circumstances.    (Source: WEBTOONS, edited)

title: Change Guy
description: It's nature vs. nurture when a nerd swaps bodies with the toughest guy in school! Tuji and Usoo have swapped...their bodies! After becoming the subjects of a mad scientist's experiment with her latest invention - the quantum teleporter - their bodies are switched, leaving only their minds and spirits intact. Usoo, who was once a model student, must face the life of Tuji, a teenage menace. Never having an enemy in his life, he now has to deal with the handful of Tuji's list, but will his kinder, gentler demeanor ward off his rivals? Or will survival determine his future? Will he become the hardened fighter that matches his new exterior?

title: Creating Hidden Endings
description: After beating "The Return of the D-Rank Hunter," the game, Seon-Woo wakes up as the game's NPC, kidnapped by the insomnia-ridden protagonist Jae-Hwi, who demands Seon-Woo become his Mentalist via a one-sided contract. To return to reality, Seon-Woo must unlock the game’s secret ending. Will he make it?  (Source: Manta)

title: Cheongwangmyeongwol
description: The Murim Warring States period is where only the strong survives. This is the war slave Cheong Gwang and Myeong-Wol’s Murim Survival Story.

title: Beautiful Days
description: People live their lives hiding their personal desires and circumstances in silence, but deep down, they all long to bloom one day.   "Let me strip away your skin, your sweat... your scent, and every breathy moan."  (Source: DAYcomiccs)

title: Married to a Duke Called Beast
description: Nadia Lancaster is the youngest daughter of a humble baron, and a proposal from the infamous Duke Staton was the last thing she was expecting. Afraid to refuse such a powerful man in the empire, she is forced to accept despite the chilling rumors that swirl around him. Before she knows it, it’s their wedding night and her mind is filled with nothing but anxiety. Will Nadia be able to look past the rumors and give her new husband a chance, or does she found out that he really is a bloodthirsty beast and live out the rest of her marriage life in constant fear?    (Source: Tappytoon)

title: The Monster Dame Requests Maternity Leave
description: Lucia is the captain of the imperial knights and a swordmaster famous for her extraordinary achievements. However, she regrets something on her deathbed: unknowingly aiding a nefarious group in their plot to sacrifice the saintess for profit. So when she wakes up in the past as her 25-year-old self, Lucia is determined to rescue the child saintess and keep her safe until she’s old enough to protect herself. But the formidable knight is completely clueless when it comes to raising a child... Will six months of maternity leave be enough time for her to figure things out? The following series contains depictions of child abuse that may be upsetting to some readers. Viewer discretion is advised.  (Source: WEBTOONS)

title: S-Mate : The Share House
description: What kind of loser can't get into a single college? Well, one guy knows the feeling. But hey, chin up dude. Your older brother is letting you manage a share house full of college girls. Maybe things aren't as bad as they seem?  (Source: DAYcomics)

title: Bully Girl
description: Exposing his gigantic dick by accident in campus, Nam-Hyeon is too embarrassed and is thinking of taking a break from school. But what the teaching assistant Han-Yeong, said might be right. He keeps somehow getting linked to the popular girls.   "Hey, they all want a taste of it~!"  (Source: TOPTOON+, edited)

title: Epilogue
description: What would you do if you discovered that the third-rate story in your free daily newspaper was actually an account of someone’s murder? As Hae-Su Choi goes through his daily morning newspaper, “Rotary N,” to look for jobs, he stumbles across an ongoing serial thriller called “Epilogue.” At first glance it just seems like pulp fiction, but as the story progresses, the characters turn out to be real-life victims. Get ready for a series full of twists and turns, with murder around every corner.    (Source: WEBTOON, edited)

title: Rebirth
description: Three hundred years ago the Dark Magician Deshwitat Lived Rudbich, a vampire, was sealed in limbo by the Light Magician Kalutika. Resurrected in the present day, Deshwitat has vowed to destroy Kalutika, and now, with the help of a team of spiritual warriors, seeks the means to use Light Magic to achieve his ends.    (Source: Tokyopop)

title: Falling
description: When lifelong criminal Seung-Ji finds herself betrayed by her old boss, she joins an upstart smuggling business to lay low. Her goal is to find the opening to take advantage of the business to score cash and flee the city, but a wrench by the name of Yeong-Won is thrown into her plans. Inexperienced and naive, Yeong-Won is working in her aunt’s stead as Seung-Ji’s superior. Falling in love is a luxury for people in their line of work, but Seung-Ji’s desire for financial gain might be changing into a desire for something that she can’t afford...    (Source: Tappytoon)

title: My Dear Friend
description: In the novel "My Dorothea," Maristella La Belflair is written as the titular character’s “dear friend,” but is more like her doormat. Ultimately executed due to Dorothea’s plot, she is given another chance at life after her death and is determined to survive this time. The problem is, she’s caught the eye of the male lead, Xavier, who is supposed to end up with Dorothea! With a love triangle and Dorothea’s schemes to deal with, can this former doormat step up to the challenges in her new life?    (Source: Tapas)

title: Jujeong Gwangye
description: "Unnie… I really like you." Those were the words that Fine Arts student, Shi-Bi tells Ye-Ju, her former teacher and current sunbae. Only having eyes for Ye-Ju, she blurts out a drunken confession, and the two of them later spend the night together, but a rumour that a girl named Jay is trying to approach Ye-Ju begins to circulate and reaches Shi-Bi's ears, which complicates her love life. A romance between two art students that get intoxicated with drunken love commences.

title: Teacher's Pet
description: Seungmin used to have a crush on his high school teacher. Maybe he still has some fantasies about her. So what? A fantasy is just a fantasy. High school was ages ago, and he has a girlfriend that’ll marry him in a few months. That’s his reality. But fantasy collides with reality when he meets his old high school teacher at a reunion and accidentally takes her phone instead of his own. The photos on that phone show him there’s more to Mrs. Jang than he’s ever dreamed about, and that he just might get to indulge in his old teenage fantasies after all...  (Source: Lezhin X)

title: Digitalis
description: Cha Jinwoo coincidentally met Oh Yoosung, a class friend of his little sister he went to pick up after she finished her SAT and he, his work. Jin Woo got into a car accident after dropping off his sister and giving a ride to Yoosung. After the accident, Jinwoo realises that he is somehow connected to Yoosung from his previous lives.

title: Melting Point
description: "Who could love someone like you?"     These few words spoken to Choi Hyun in high school have haunted him ever since. Unable to succeed in either his career or his relationships, Hyun sets all his hopes on one final job interview. But upon arriving at the office, he comes face to face with Kang Myungook, the source of his past trauma... Now on the same team, they'll have to work out their past issues first. Can the two heal old wounds or is this relationship destined to go down in flames?    (Source: Tappytoon)

title: Campus-en Bimiryeochinto ♡
description: Returning student, Junseob, boasts in front of his juniors about dating the campus goddess, Seryeong. However, Seryeong's true identity unravels, revealing a cross-dressing man who, instead of playing along as Junseob's pretend girlfriend, demands a real relationship.

title: Akdangui Eommaga Doeeobeoryeotda
description: Summoned into her favorite novel as the infamous Duchess Roselia Chade, Haena is bathed in riches, power, and a family of her own. Life couldn’t be better, save for the small detail that her beloved stepson, Einspanner Chade, is also the evil mastermind destined to kill her. At this point in the story Ein is still just an adorable child yet to reach his cruel awakening, and so Roselia is determined to stop him from becoming a ruthless killer. But with the duke getting in her way and trying to poison his own son, safely raising a child that was primed for villainy may prove harder than she originally thought. The survival of both mother and child depends on whether Roselia can successfully rewrite their tragic ending!      (Source: Tappytoon)    Note: This is the promotional webcomic prologue of the homonym web novel.

title: Night With My Sister
description: After his grandmother, his only remaining family, passed away, Cheol-Woo falls deep into despair. Ji-Yoon, sister of his friend, comforts him every night with her huge breasts…   “Your skin smells so nice…”   (Source: TOPTOON+, edited)

title: Full House
description: Ellie is an aspiring screenwriter in London, far from her home in Korea. While her life is a bit lonely, her one comfort is Full House--the estate left to her by her recently deceased father and the only tangible memory of him she has left. Meanwhile, world famous actor Ryder Baye is the obsession of many a stalker and tabloid reporter. Ellie barely remembers who he is, until the day she is unceremoniously evicted. Somehow, Ryder Baye manages to purchase Full House. Ellie will stop at nothing to reclaim her home. Ryder vows to stand his ground and hold onto his new purchase. The battle for Full House is fiery, with tempers ranging and sparks flying. What are two enemies to do when there is an intense attraction burning just below the surface? Ellie and Ryder may discover that their explosive chemistry under the same roof may turn them into a happy couple...as long as they can refrain from killing each other!   (Source: Netcomics)

title: Sambong Barber Shop
genres: Action, Drama, Romance, Slice of Life
description: The "beauty" virus is spreading around the nation, targeting ugly girls and driving them to madness. Park Jangmi wonders - why must life be so unfair? As she ponders, she stumbles upon a mysterious barber shop, with a mysterious barber...

title: A World Without You
description: There’s only one thing that’s keeping Han Sekye alive: the blond man in his dreams. No matter how bad it gets, how lonely he is, he can count on the man to come meet him in his dreams and make it all okay. So what is he to do when the man suddenly stops coming? Sekye falls apart and for years, he struggles with depression living on in a world without the man. Then one day, Woo Yijun appears in front of him, looking just like the man in his dreams. And seeing that he is an aspiring actor, Sekye hires Yijun to act out for him the man from his dreams. Sekye knows that it isn’t the same, that this can’t go on, but he so needs the world that used to be his…     (Source: Lezhin US)

title: Pride Complex
description: Park Chang-hyun had to move and move again because of his father's business.For the first time in 8 years, he's returned to the village where he grew up young. On the first day of his highschool a certain beautiful young girl catches his eyes. Her name is Yang Surh Hee. She currently reigns as the school's idol but in the past they both went to the same school. Before his transfer he had a big fight with Surh-hee but their reunion went smoothly and he returns home... to find Yang Surh Hee!?!?!? "Yang Surh Hee is my house maid?!" "If you tell this to the school I won't forgive you, Park Chang Hyun!"

title: Ugly Duckling Complex
description: A-Jin is a carefree high school girl interested only in baking and is a loyal friend who values her bonds above all. Despite her ordinary appearance, she garners the interest of Jun-U, one of the most handsome guys at her school, adding a newfound excitement and unpredictability into her life. Will they be able to overcome the jealous manipulations of others and realize their feelings for each other?  (Source: WEBTOON)

title: The Librarian of St. Bright Tower
description: Vahlen dreams of being a magician at St. Bright Tower—the greatest institute of magic in the Paula Empire. Too bad he's just a lowly librarian there... until one day when he stumbles upon a magical book that promises to bring him glory. Now he is caught in an endless cycle of horrific events, doomed to repeat the same days over and over unless he can manage to figure out how to save Princess Elyse and achieve his fated destiny.     (Source: Tapas)

title: The Path of a Star
description: Flashing lights, adoring fans screaming your name, the exhilaration of being on stage…     Gyeol-Namu, also known as Gyeo-Wool, knows that he was born to be a star. And he’s more determined than anyone to follow the path that was destined for him. But regardless of all of Gyeo-wool’s efforts, the enormous amount of pressure he puts on himself as the leader of his new idol group, “Pale Green,” causes him to spend his days wallowing in anxiety and self-doubt. That is, until one day, Gyeo-Wool discovers a gentle hand repeatedly helping him from the shadows. A hand that belongs to “Gyeol,” an experienced idol belonging to the massively popular group, “Kimberly.” Although Gyeo-Wool is grateful for his reliable and handsome sunbae, he can’t help but wonder… Why is Gyeol treating him like he’s special?    (Source: Lezhin US)    Note: Includes four extra chapters.

title: Myeonsaporeul Sseugopeun Namja
genres: Comedy, Drama, Psychological, Romance, Slice of Life
description: Meet Aimu Hanamichi, a young man who towers just over 2m10cm tall but has a heart as soft as a teddy bear. He constantly battles stereotypes and the harsh judgements of others. Will Aimu learn to love himself the way he is, will he change, or will he drown in the pressure and misery of all the misconceptions surrounding him?

title: Yuri’s Part Time Job
description: Yu-Ri is the perfect college student, so no one suspects she’s living a double life at night. Until Professor Baek finds out about her secret part-time job...  (Source: Toomics, edited)   Note: Includes one extra chapter.

title: Life as the Maid of the Prisoner Prince
description: Yu Jeong-In is a typical office worker until she meets a sudden end and wakes up mid-kiss… with the male lead of the novel she was reading, Prince Albert! To her dismay, she realizes she is the villainess Rosé Atiers, a lustful maid locked in a tower with Albert by a king set on ruining the prince. Fated to die by his hands, Rosé strikes a deal to help him escape in exchange for money to live comfortably. But will Rosé be able to stick to her plans while living with such a handsome prince?    (Source: Tapas, edited)

title: Match Made In Heaven
description: Self-proclaimed “happy single” Jiwoo is eager to inherit her grandfather’s business. But first, she's being forced to marry an employee at the company: a bachelor named Minwoo Kang! In a twist of fate, she suspects that he may actually be a boy from her childhood. Determined to uncover every little detail about her future husband, she'll disguise herself as a man and follow him to the new employee orientation. Everything seems to go according to her plan… But, wait! Are there really two different men named Minwoo?! A comical romance about a woman searching for the truth behind her partner!   (Source: TappyToon)

title: Naui Namjasaramchingu
genres: Comedy, Drama, Romance, Slice of Life
description: Normal 21-year-old college student A-Ra has been close friends for 15 years with a hot guy who catches the eye of all girls, Gyeong-Hun. More comfortable hanging with him than any other girl, this is the story of love that begins with this one male friend.

title: All That We Hope to Be
description: Sometimes we just can't get out of a ditch; yet we still hope.   (Source: WEBTOONS)

title: Snowman
description: Gi-woo has always been a merciless go-getter. He was a top student in school, and now he’s playing all his cards right at work. He gets the ladies, too, of course, and though his marriage is loveless, you can’t tell from the outside. One day, he receives news that an old professor of his, a father figure, has passed away. Gi-woo rushes to the funeral and meets the beautiful widow and her gorgeous daughter for the first time in years. Soon enough, desires old and new begin to snowball beyond control… A new series from the creator of “Redemption Camp” and “The Seagull and the Hunter”!  (Source: Lezhin US)  Note: Chapter count includes an epilogue.

title: Kitsch Wedding
description: Laehwa Lee lost all her childhood memories after a terrible incident, and now that she’s an adult, she’s on a mission to recover them. But some people, like her rich and powerful stepfather, will stop at nothing to keep Laehwa under control. Out of options, Laehwa hires mercenary Itae Gwon to enter into a contract marriage with her. Though Itae is her shield, he also has an intense bloodlust. Will Laehwa be able to keep her cool as sparks begin to fly?  (Source: Tapas)

title: I Don't Hate Us
description: "Break up with him." – What kind of a friend would say stuff like this to his best friend?! Jaesu Sang, a male friend of mine who wants me to break up with my boyfriend, and I, Wonsu Ha, who can never be strict with him, am now getting a love confession. Thanks to that, our relationship gradually began to crack, just like the cell phone screen he broke.     (Source: WEBTOONS)

title: Eumagui Sindeulgwa Hamkkehanda
description: A producer who wanted to succeed as a singer, but had no talent. Death came on the day he thought was his last chance, but the gods of music did not turn away from him. If the gods of music do not abandon you, can you really do it? Change began with the gods of music.  (Source: KakaoPage, translated)

title: Fantasyland
description: Old friends get together and share their stories about the lady in their life. From the way they tell it, it sounds like a fantasy, too good to be true.  (Source: Lezhin US)

title: Getting to Know Mila
description: My first love... Reunited... However, she wasn't the girl I thought I knew.  (Source: Toomics)

title: Top Corner
