description: An Si-Jun, a math genius boy with a dream of becoming a novelist, coincidentally meets Heo Do-Hyeong, a promising player on the Gwangjin High School soccer team. Do-Hyeong discovers Si-Jun's latent soccer talent through an unexpected incident. In order to save the team, he proposes a secret deal to Si-Jun, but...  "... I've never played soccer before..?"  Will Si-Jun be able to become the savior of the Gwangjin High School soccer team in crisis? A soccer drama about boys chasing their dreams. The kickoff of the math genius begins!  (Source: Naver, translated)

title: Adopted by My Enemy
description:
Liana Le Merdi, the last remaining pyromancer, hopes to avenge her family's murder by the great Alseid Hallias. At death's door, she is given a second chance at life by the fire god... as her three-year-old self? When she stands in front of Hallias again, instead of being killed, she ends up being adopted! She must now work with her enemy to uncover the truth behind her family’s death while escaping those who want to abuse her power. How will she survive when she can’t even pronounce her r’s?

(Source: Tapas)

title: Finding My Place
description: During a chance meeting, Princess Asché shares an unforgettable kiss with Ethan, the second prince of a nearby empire. Years later, Asché’s brother arranges a marriage that will force her to become the Emperor’s ninth wife. Rather than suffer in a loveless union, Asché poisons her brother, and is imprisoned in the palace for her crime. But as revolution stirs, Ethan, now an anti-imperial rebel, suddenly reappears in her bedroom, and a steamy romance fraught with political implications begins.   (Source: Tapas)

title: My Last Love Scenario
description: College is a time of freedom, learning, and, let's be honest, sex. Juhyun and Jigoo spent most of their high school years studying and keeping their relationship a secret from everyone in their lives. But now, they've moved out which means no curfew, no rules, and no roommates. But they're about to learn that taking their relationship to the next level means taking on some new challenges, too.   (Source: Lezhin US)

title: Footsteps in the Snow
description: In a world where blue snow freezes everything it touches, humanity has long forgotten what warmth feels like. Seonu, a teenage boy with a prosthetic leg, carries the lifeless body of Iseo through the snow-covered wasteland, determined to bring her home one final time. The snow will soon erase his footsteps but not the promise that keeps him moving.  (Source: WEBTOON)

title: Deep
genres: Action, Drama, Horror, Mystery, Supernatural, Thriller
description: Families that went missing decades ago... started to resurface.    (Source: WEBTOONS)

title: Beastly Things
description: In a world where werewolves live among humans in secret, Ji-u Han, a detective agency owner and a powerful werewolf, crosses paths with Yuseung Cheon, a famous actor, when he “accidentally” hits her with his car. And when they run into each other again “by chance,” one thing becomes clear to Ji-u: She must have him —whatever that may entail. Ji-u wants Yuseung’s rare ability to make werewolves stronger through touch. Yuseung, on the other hand, wants information on key figures in the werewolf world to eliminate them. Will they each get what they’re after? Or more importantly—will they fall in love?  (Source: WEBTOONS)

title: My Naughty Deity
description: “The higher you climb, the harder you fall. So let’s just stay level.”     Haetsal’s life motto has worked so far, so good... that is, until she discovers that the ancient god of lust and pleasure has moved in as her next-door neighbor. Although she has vowed to live a life of peace, free from all the risks and dangers of the modern world, she just might take her chances with this one.  (Source: WEBTOON)

title: Transference
description: Su-a, a college freshman in Creative Writing, struggles to understand and express her emotions, leaving her isolated from those around her. When she meets Taeyang, a second-year Sports Coaching student who can sense emotions through touch, their unexpected connection sparks a journey of discovery. Paired for a class assignment that involves a "date," their bond deepens. This is a story about a man who feels too much and a woman who feels too little, and their journey toward emotional growth.    (Source: WEBTOON)

title: Stay With Me
description: “Are you prepared to handle what I’m about to do to you?”    For Choi Bom, running into Kang Doha for the first time seven years causes him great emotional unrest. On the one hand, he’s glad that Doha is safe and sound, but on the other, he’s angry. Angry at Doha for disappearing for so long, and angry at himself for still caring. So when Doha says he wants to apply for the position as Bom’s housekeeper, Bom wonders if this might be the perfect chance to sort through his tumultuous emotions. Except, Doha refuses to answer any personal questions, leaving Bom more confused than ever. Just why did Doha disappear, and what is it that’s brought him back? Any most importantly, how can Bom be sure that Doha will stay?    (Source: Lezhin US)

title: A Kiss Before I Sleep
description: Jiho has a superpower that causes explosions whenever she gets excited, making dating and fun nearly impossible—until she discovers that touching her new neighbor, Yechan, miraculously helps her control her ability. Determined to maintain physical contact without outright harassing him, Jiho embarks on a mission to “seduce” Yechan and become his girlfriend. Along the way, ghostly advice and a whirlwind of chaos lead her to uncover the mystery of their unique connection in this unpredictable romance.  (Source: WEBTOONS)

title: Winning Shot!
description: Ahn Si-Yoon, a pitcher who does not hesitate to play the role of a losing team if it is possible to play baseball. After continuing his junior high school career with poor results, his baseball life begins to change when he meets 'Baek Tae-oh', a catcher of the opposing team.    (Source: Naver, translated)

title: Isegye Dumptruck
description: Yul, the manager of the interdimensional dump truck office, accidentally kills an innocent man named Kwon Yu-Jun. In order to make amends, Yul enters a romance fantasy novel where Yu-Jun is the villainess and tries to send her back to her original world. However, due to various complications, Yul becomes trapped in the novel. With the office staff scattered and no knowledge of the novel's plot, Yul desperately searches for a way out. But, Yu-Jun, who is now pretending to be a noble lady in the new world, causes Yul a headache.

title: Witch's Island
description: When Hannah gets a high-paying job as a tutor for Eilie, a noble young lady, she expects to start a new, peaceful chapter of her life. However, strange things begin to occur at the mansion, and she quickly realizes there’s more to it than meets the eye. What secrets are the inhabitants of this remote island hiding? In the darkness of mystery, there may be witches playing tricks.    (Source: Tapas)

title: His Enemy Downstairs
description: Spin off of BL ‘The Voice Next Door’ - After meeting in college, Yoonsung’s sultry voice is what brought us together. Sure, being a long-time couple can get dull, but cheating on me?! It’s over and I’m out, moved to a new apartment. So why is my mortal enemy living downstrairs?!  (Source: Tappytoon)

title: Dream Sign
description: Hangyeom, who was an ordinary college student, has the ability to have lucid dreams as he wishes for some reason and dreams of sharing a relationship with his unrequited love partner, Lee Jun.    At the same time, the contents of his dream were shared with Jun Lee, and Jun Lee was confused about his identity and encountered him at the bar where he worked. Later, after learning that he was attending the same college, Lee Joon wondered about the relationship between his dream and a man, and suggested to make a relationship with himself...    (Source: Bomtoon, translated)

title: Bad Friends
description: Jin-Ju is bad. She smokes, drinks, runs away from home, and has no qualms making her parents worry. Her mother and sister beg her to be a better student, sister, daughter; her beleaguered father expresses his concerns with his fists. Bad Friends is set in the 1990s in a South Korea torn between tradition and Western modernity and haunted by an air of generalized gloom. Cycles of abuse abound as the characters enact violence within their power structures: parents beat children, teachers beat students, older students beat younger students. But at each moment the duress verges on bleakness, Ancco pulls back with soft moments of friendship between Jin-Ju and her best friend, Jeong-Ae. What unfolds is a story of female friendship, a Ferrante-esque connection formed through youthful excess, malaise, and struggle that stays with the young women into adulthood.     Served by a dry and precise line, Bad Friends viscerally captures the adolescent years of two young women who want and know they deserve something different, but, ultimately, are unable to follow through. In a culture where young women are at a systemic disadvantage, Ancco creates a testimonial to female friendship as a powerful tool for survival. Jin-Ju forgets her worst adolescent memories, but she cannot ever shake the memory of her friendship with Jeong-Ae during her most tumultuous years.     (Source: Drawn & Quarterly, edited)

title: Eojangnyeo
description: "Another fool secured~"   I met my first love at college, and I believed it would last forever. However, I soon realized that I was just one of the men being toyed with by her. After this revelation, Chanwoo decides to treat trash like trash. Observing this change, Jeonghwa does her best to maintain control over him. Nevertheless, Chanwoo still has his friend Soyeon, his cute underclassman Jihye, and his professor Yura... What will unfold for the five of them?  (Source: Lezhin, translated)

title: My Irresistible Ex
description: As Korea’s hottest celebrity, Eunseol seems to have it all! But there’s one minor setback in her seemingly perfect life: her charismatic ex-husband Yunjae is back in town. After their divorce, she vowed to bury her past and focus on her career. That’s easier said than done when you have your ex constantly trying to win you back. Just what is his deal? Will Eunseol be able to resist Yunjae’s seduction?     (Source: WEBTOONS)

title: Her Bodyguard
description: Step into the scandalous life of a private bodyguard, where hidden desires clash with professional boundaries.  (Source: Toomics)

title: Kill Me, Kiss Me
description: When Tae Yeon Im finds out that the idol star that she's adored for ages is currently attending the same school as her identical cousin, Jung-Woo Im, she convinces her cuz to exploit their similitude and switch places, she will dress as him, attend his school and try to get close to her lover boy. And he will dress as her, attend her school and revel in its sea of babes. Or maybe he just likes wearing a skirt? The plan seems flawless until Tae learns of a bully named Ga-Wun Kim who likes to beat up on poor Jung-Woo. Meanwhile, Jung-Woo finds that being a woman might not be as thrilling as it seems.   (Source: Tokyopop)

title: Sexcape Room: Pile Up
description: The second in the “Sexcape Room” series!  Yu-Jin is the new guy at work with a boss who harps on him constantly. It’s not that Eun-Jae is a horrible boss; she simply catches Yu-Jin at his worst moments because his luck is horrible. In fact, he’s so unlucky that he ends up in a room that he can only escape if he has sex with Eun-Jae. Will Yu-Jin’s luck and his relationship with his boss improve as they try to break out together?    (Source: Lezhin X, edited)

title: Mot Jabameogeo Andal
description: The not-so-normal daily life of a pair of twin siblings.

title: Scroll if You Dare
description: Think you can make it to the end? Blood-thirsty spirits, vicious curses, and sickening twists haunt these individual horror stories from 29 different creators. Scroll if you dare. But whatever you do, don’t scroll alone! (Source: WEBTOON) Stories featured: 1) Neulpureun yoyangwon (늘푸른 요양원 - Evergreen Nursing Home) by Ryoung) 2) Gosulsa (고술사 - The Shaman) by Hwang Jun-Ho 3) Bidulgi (비둘기 - Pigeon) by Hoodbird 4) Jasing nongsa (자식 농사 - Raising a Success) by Mangsoon 5) Boinda(보인다 - I See You) by Kim Lee-Yeon 6) Junggogeorae (중고거래 - Buying Used)by Kingsnal/Jui-Joo 7) Geugeotdeul (그것들 - Them) by Cyclops/Kim Do-yeon 8) Uri gajok (우리 가족 - My Family) by Su Ri-bu 9) Gongpoui Saengdongseong (공포의 생동성 - The horror of Vitality) by Jin Ja/Jeong Saeng 10) Sungnyeokkeseoneun Bimireul Sireohasinda (숙녀께서는 비밀을 싫어하신다 - The Lady Hate Secrets) by Go Tae-ho 11) Angwi (안귀 - The Eye Phantom) by Aeon 12) Hum (훔 - Hum) by Lee Su-Min 13) Back Rooms no.0605 (Back Rooms no.0605 - Backrooms no.0605) by Won Ju-Min 14) Mimi (미미 - Mimi) by Im Mok-won 15) Mising (미싱 - The Sewing Machine) by Huinari 16) Sikkeureoun Jip (시끄러운 집 - Noisy Tenants) by Digeut 17) Meori (머리) by Sam-Chon 18) Mongyubyeong (몽유병) by bunny 19) Hosu Gongwonui Yeoja (호수 공원의 여자) by Spring 20) Popi Mom (뽀삐맘) by Gong Yuk 21) Geokkuro Seoneun ja (거꾸로 서는 자) by Dan-woo 22) Doro Wiui Angma (도로 위의 악마) by Lee Daeyang 23) Gyedan, Mureup, Dalmasian (계단, 무릎, 달마시안) by Mapache 24) Suhagyeohaeng (수학여행) by Seo Irae/ Yeong-I Yeong 25) Misikga (미식가) by 247 26) Inganui joe (인간의 죄) by Seon Taek-gil 27) Mijiwaui Jou (미지와의 조우) by Kim Yong-Ki 28) Bulchibyeong (불치병) by Rangddo 29) Busan Noraebang Gwisin (부산 노래방 귀신 - The Busan Karaoke Ghost) by Horang

title: Lost Princess
description: For as long as Olga can remember, she's dreamed of setting sail and chasing down the hidden treasure that her father always told her about. But after her father and older brother go missing at sea, that dream seems like it too will be lost forever. That is, until pirates charge into her quiet English village, turning everything upside down! Now with a rag-tag team of sailors, can Olga finally unravel the mysteries of her family's disappearance and discover the treasure she always dreamed of?    (Source: Tappytoon)

title: Comfort Rewinder
description: By a strange twist of fate, Jin Yi Kwon, a photographer in need of a part-time assistant, ends up hiring Beom Jisoo, his first love. The two meet in a café after 13 years but instead of the tiny and adorable Beom Jisoo Jin Yi Kwon fell in love with, a muscular hunk shows up. Unlike Jin Yi Kwon who immediately recognizes Beom Jisoo, Beom Jisoo doesn’t seem to remember Jin Yi Kwon. What will happen to these two? Will Jin Lee Kwon finally confess his feelings towards Beom Jisoo after all these years?    (Source: Pocket Comics)    Note: Includes 4 extra chapters.

title: Hwangjaeui Geom
description: A young Emperor is cast out of his Empire by his uncle, who seizes the throne for himself. The young Emperor sets out to become the strongest among the living, and take back what is rightfully his...

title: One Too Many Supporting Male Leads
description: Drained of life after being sick for so long, Eun-Jae closes her eyes only to open them again as Roella Clemend, the female lead of the web novel she was reading in her final moments. While she may have gotten a second chance at life with a healthy body, there’s a catch. Roella has exactly one year to find “the true male lead” of the story to be able to continue living in this new world. But unfortunately for Roella, this task may be like trying to find a needle in a haystack…    (Source: Tappytoon, edited)

title: The Assistant
description: An aspiring cartoonist decides to become an adult cartoonist's assistant... but little did he know he'd fall in love with his teacher's wife.    (Source: Toomics)

title: Cheolbyeoknyeo Gwatabeun Majobyeontae?!
description: Taeyoung, who is always at the top of her class, is always surrounded by male students who want to take her. Until she puts up an iron wall and rejects their advances… Namju, who is in the same department remained as Taeyoung’s friend, but he’s always looking for an opportunity, but Taeyoung never showed any signs of liking or disliking him. On the other hand, Woori, the 3rd-time test taker who has no interest in studying and childhood friend of Namju for the past ten years, was reminded of her days of being Taeyoung’s classmate. She tells him about a shocking secret that might help to dominate her…  (Source: Lezhin, translated)

title: I Don't Need A Proposal
description: An ordinary woman is reading her favorite novel on her way home when she gets into an accident. As she loses consciousness, she hears a voice say, “my name is Elsia Artize. Please save him for me!” When she awakens, she finds she’s become Elsia herself! Destined to die early, the new Elisa knows the only way to escape death is to save her crush, Prince Ixion, from assassination. Though she succeeds and is now ready to live her own life, the prince complicates things when he proposes marriage!    (Source: Tapas)    Note: Includes one extra chapter.

title: Hush
description: It's the first day of the new school year and Ju-Hyun... Well, he's not exactly enthused. In fact, the only things on his mind are girls. The girls at his school, to be specific. Ji-Goo, on the other hand, wakes up early and gets ready and stops by Ju-Hyun's home on the way to school. And, as it turns out, Ji-Goo might not be as interested in girls as Ju-Hyun is.    Juhyun is about to find out that some secrets are hard to keep quiet. And sometimes, everyone needs a little help.     (Source: Lezhin US)

title: Royal Family
description: A regular employee is belittled by his boss, but when he uncovers her secrets, he gets a chance for revenge.  (Source: Toomics)

title: Glotoneria
description: In 17th century Europe, in the depths of a forest, lived a vampire boy named Isaac. He would devour all who entered his forest. Yet, he saved a girl named Livana solely because her flame-like hair resembled his mother's. In the process of this, memories of his mother are stirred up.   Meanwhile, Livana's family is continuously embroiled in a series of unfortunate events, and Livana herself is rejected by everyone due to her hair color. But Ethan has always adored her, and her brother seems to have unusual feelings for her. How will these people's feelings intertwine...?

title: Almost Love
description: Down on his luck voice actor Daewon finally lands a huge role, but the only problems is... it's homoerotica! Plus, he'll have to work with Hyunsoo who came out to him as bisexual. Having to move in with the brash guy makes matters worse, when he brings up a past heartbreak. To-do list: Get through the new job, sleep in the right bed, keep my clothes on, keep HIM away!     (Source: TappyToon)

title: The Great Rebirth
description: A life of kindness, and it all came to an end. If given another chance, will I live the same way?  (Source: Toomics)

title: Worth the Wait
description: Never again, Juhyun thinks. I’ll never fall for Shin Heeju again. But what do you know, he ends up running into Heeju again in college, his friend’s older brother whom he’s had a crush on for as long as he can remember. And this time Heeju’s all drunk and slamming his head against a telephone pole. And from what he drunkenly tells Juhyun… he’s just been turned down by another guy?! Juhyun knows he shouldn’t start, that he shouldn’t get his hopes up. He tells himself they’re just friends. But maybe, just maybe, this time will be different and he’ll get the only guy who he thinks is worth the wait.    (Source: Lezhin US)    Note: From season 2 this becomes Mature (R19), Season 1 is all-ages (R15).

title: The Third Perspective
description: Perpetually hiding behind a smile to survive his cruel family and stifling college life, Kwon Hyeon is drowning in anxiety and despair. It’s not like he chose to be born into money, but between his father’s demands to uphold the family’s reputation and his classmates’ constant gossiping, the only respite he has is Baek Do-Won, his psychiatrist. But everything changes when the mysterious Do-Won inducts Hyeon into his secret other life. Infatuated with Do-Won and driven by his self-destructive instincts, Hyeon is drawn into a world of twisted desire and pleasure.

title: Vanilla Taste
description: Let’s say that you’re an average college student living with your friend, who is totally handsome, very smart, and treats you well. He’s the ideal roommate. Now, let’s say that you accidentally find out that this friend is into BDSM, and then he propositions you for sex. Sounds wild, right? Well, that’s the exact situation Sodam lands in when his friend Hajoon turns out to be very into BDSM. But Sodam isn’t into that kind of stuff. His tastes run fairly vanilla…or do they?    (Source: Lezhin US, edited)

title: All 'Cause I'm Cute
description: To most people, being called “cute” is a compliment…but to U-Ju, it’s just about the worst thing imaginable! Haunted by his adorability even in adulthood, U-Ju puts up a barrier pretending to be a badass so that he won’t have to hear the dreaded ‘C’ word any longer. But this facade can only last so long when Koh Han-Gyeol asks him to prove just bad he can be - in the bedroom!  (Source: Lezhin US)

title: The Ladies' Associate
description: The antics of an unsuspecting, new apartment complex committee planner, and the comic swarm of headache-inducing women he must now deal with.  (Source: Toomics)

title: Isegye Ibwon Saenghwal
description: Kim Ju-Won was forcibly dragged into this world by the system and became a hero. After five years of hard work, he finally succeeded in defeating the Demon King, but due to a breakdown in the transmission device, he was unable to return to Earth for the next ten days. Ju-Won, who was trying to organize his life in this world for the rest of his time, collapses due to accumulated fatigue and is admitted to a hospital in the city… He meets the nurses Catty and Miyo, and a patient with a familiar face from the next room…    Ten days until I return to Earth, happy times with them are about to begin in a small hospital room.  (Source: Lezhin, translated)

title: Screengrab
description: Welcome to Screengrab, the ultimate app for succubi to extract essence from all kinds of men! Capturing and breaking in a man has never been easier, and the view has never been this good. Take a front row seat to watch loner succubus Sola conquer a whole collection of men as she delves into their deepest, darkest desires in this steamy comic from the creator of "S Flower".   (Source: Lezhin)

title: For You Who Grieves
description: Doyoon Kim should've died in the car crash, but fate had other plans. He wakes up in the hospital, trapped in a bruised and unfamiliar body. Upon returning to university, he crosses paths with his old friend, Hangyeol. However, Hangyeol is unrecognizable. He is consumed by grief and unwilling to engage with Doyoon. Yet, a haunting familiarity tugs at Hangyeol, as if this stranger is an uncanny reflection of the dead man he still loves...     (Source: Tapas)

title: Blood Rain
description: As the country’s foreign gangs expand their businesses with an influx of funds, the National Intelligence Service counters by planning to take control, using another gang. It’s a plan putting policeman Kang Hyuk undercover in a gang war to capture all those involved. But the plan is falling apart… a Tong and Dokgo crossover!

title: Maemiga Ul-eum-eul Geuchimyeon
description: Namwoo, heartbroken after finding out his first love will be getting married, bumps into a stranger during a drunken night out! The stranger, Yeoreum, turns out to be a fellow teacher. The most challenging project in Namwoo’s life begins when their books switch.

title: Vanilla Soda Sky
description: Taeha Oh loves to write smutty BL stories online. Why? 'Cause it's fun. Though he insists he's definitely not gay himself. But will things change after a surprise reunion sparks something inside of him…?    (Source: POCKET COMICS)    Note: Chapter count includes two special chapters.

title: Wrecker Driver
description: Welcome to the modern era, where someone’s life can be ruined over a malicious online rumor. Armies of trolls known as Cyber Wreckers gleefully tear apart every part of their victim’s existence for views, while Drivers stand ready IRL to steer the latest topic of online gossip to the Wrecker’s liking. When 17-year-old K-pop idol Ari Lee becomes the latest victim, it falls to her older brother Ajin to take revenge against those who drove her over the edge; a task that seems impossible until he meets a mysterious girl named Seol…  (Source: WEBTOON)

title: Murimmaengju Mangnaejeja
description: he strongest in the martial world, leader of the Hojeongdan, Lee Hwan! During a mission, he battles the Heavenly Demon of the Demonic Sect, Deung Gwang-cheon, and loses consciousness... When he opens his eyes, he's at home? No... This is my childhood home? It's hard to believe, but if I really have returned to the past, this time I won't just stand by and do nothing! On the night of August 8th, when he was 17 years old, a sudden, splitting headache strikes, and something comes to mind. "Cheonsu Ilgi Hap (Thousand Hands One Energy Unification), Deukwon Gang (Obtain Original Strength)..." he muttered absentmindedly and then paused. "Wait, this is the Absolute Demonic Art of the Heavenly Demon! How do I know this technique? Am I going crazy?!"  (Source: KakaoPage, translated)

title: Egoism
description: After his father remarries, Jaeun must now live under the same roof with his new stepbrother Jihan. However, life isn't easy when their abusive Alpha father is hellbent on controlling their lives. Things only get worse when Jaeun is revealed to be an Omega. Abandoned by his family and friends, Jaeun realizes he only has Jihan to depend on. Now as adults and living together, will this bond withstand the heat of an Omega?    (Source: Tappytoon)

title: Bisang! Cheongchungirokbu
description: Lee Cheong-Yeon, who boasts of being the top student in the entire school with perfect grades, school records, and class activities, has one flaw. That is his broken personality, character, consideration, sharing, and respect for others... Wait, isn't that one thing? Lee Cheong-Yeon, who can no longer ignore character assessments for the sake of college entrance exams, is given the outrageous task of rehabilitating Kim Soo-Han, the problem child and last in the entire school with zero points... Will these two be okay?  (Source: Lezhin, translated)

title: A Twisted Fate
description: Demi-drake, a mythical creature yearning to ascend to dragonhood, tragically falls short, harboring resentment in its serpentine form. A twisted fate unfolds as Baeksa, a white serpent demi-drake, sees its spirit instead transmigrating into the body of Yehwa, Muyeon's stepfather. This curse thrusts both Baeksa and Muyeon into a complicated situation, with Baeksa grappling with the unfamiliar physicality of a male prostitute, and Muyeon navigating the emotional turmoil of being deeply in love with the man who now houses Baeksa's spirit. As Muyeon grapples with conflicting emotions and the desire to retaliate against Baeksa, another complicating factor emerges – Yehwa's memories begin resurfacing in Baeksa, adding even more to their twisted fantastical tale.    (Source: LezhinUS)

title: Rowdy Reunion
description: Dating the hottest girl in your high school feels impossible when you’re an average no-name. Min-gi doesn’t have a shot, but that doesn’t stop him from ogling So-yul whenever he has the chance. But now, those days are behind him! College student Min-gi’s set on having fun, as well as meeting up with as many cute chicks as he can. Never did he expect that his high-school crush would appear out of seemingly nowhere, and this time, she seems to be more than a little interested...  (Source: Lezhin X)

title: 44th Period: Survival Class
description: Mysterious black circles have started appearing all over the world, and whoever falls in doesn't come back out. Then one day, a black circle swallows an entire school and everyone in it, turning it into a twisted maze of nightmares. Will Doyun and his classmates find a way out?  (Source: WEBTOON)

title: Slaves of the Safe Zone
description: After the zombie outbreak, the boss's stuck-up daughters, who used to look down on him, showed up at his shelter.  (Source: DAYcomics)

title: Changed: The Beta Count
description: Eleanor, a beta nobleman, finally weds his beloved Fenrir—but his joy is short-lived. Unable to bear children, he becomes a source of shame to the family and, overcome with despair, throws himself from a window. But instead of death, he wakes up as an omega… on the morning of his wedding day. With no idea how or why he’s turned back time—or changed sexes—Eleanor must navigate a new reality where his body, instincts, and even his relationship with Fenrir are shifting. As if that weren’t enough, three powerful alphas begin circling him with growing interest. In this second life, will Eleanor protect his love… or be swept into an entirely new destiny?  (Source: Lezhin US)

title: Psychic Gambler: Betting Man
genres: Action, Drama, Psychological, Romance, Sports, Supernatural, Thriller
description: What would you do if you had the power to see through objects? After using it to seduce girls, Jin-goo sets out to use it on gambling. What a good choice? Who would be able to beat someone with psychic powers? Well, things don't go as planned as his opponents are more than meets the eye.    (Source: Lezhin)

title: Namgungsega Sonnyeottarui Gwihwan
description:
Il-Hwa, the junior leader of the Blood Demon, destroys the Namgung family according to the will of her mentor, the Blood Demon. However, due to the Blood Demon's betrayal, she hears a shocking story before her death. "Now, you are the only Namgung left in the world." Il-Hwa learns that she was 'Seol-Hwa', a child lost long ago in the Namgung family, and that she was raised for the evil Blood Demon's schemes. After a heartbreaking death, Il-Hwa, or rather Namgung Seol-Hwa, returns to her thirteenth year and realizes that a chance to change the future has come, and steps forward to prevent the destruction of Namgung's family. Will Seol-Hwa be able to prevent the destruction of his family from the Blood Demon and succeed in her revenge?
(Source: Kakaopage, translated)

title: You Are My Destiny
description: Prom, a member of K-Pop group Destiny, has a secret. In his past life, he was Prometheus, cursed by Zeus for eternity to fear fire. This curse keeps messing with him—he can’t even blow out birthday candles! But one day he meets Sora, a college student, at a fan signing and recognizes her as Pandora! He knows Pandora’s box can save him, but she has no clue what he’s talking about. With his acting debut as a fireman at stake, will Sora remember who she is and extinguish Prom’s fears for good?    (Source: Tapas)

title: Love in the Hell
description: The prince of hell and the son of Hades, Ha Ji-wook (Haderius) appears in front Song Si-hoo, a student from the music department and names him as his bride. A reckless love story of the prince of hell that fell in love with a mortal!

title: There's Something Wrong About My Man's Morals
description:
After a fateful encounter as children, Evonne and the outcast prince, Theo, can’t deny their deep connection. However, their lives are torn apart when Evonne’s family is wrongly accused of treason, leading to their ruin. Cursed and forced to disguise herself as a man, Evonne struggles to survive until Theo finally finds her and uses all his power as emperor to take her with him. Together, they’ll start a journey facing challenges that’ll test their love as they try to start a life together.

(Source: Tapas)

title: The double life of a public official
description: James Lee, a grade 7 official, is trying to make it through each day dealing with Amanda Shin, a grade 5 official. One day, James finds out about Amanda's double life that he can use for revenge.   "Shall we do a roleplay? It's about forced sex volunteer."  (Source: DAYcomics)

title: The Boy Who Stole From the Fairy Lake
description: My name is Hyosin Lee, and I just want to get one thing straight: I am not a thief! I ran away from home to escape my stifling household but ended up lost in the mountains where I found a pile of clothes. How was I supposed to know that they belonged to the very handsome half-fairy, San Baek? He has (reluctantly) let me stay with him because I was badly injured. He doesn’t talk much, but he’s kind and I like being with him… However, I know it won’t be long until my family finds me and when that happens… I’ll never be able to see San again!    (Source: Tapas)    Note: Includes 12 side story chapters

title: The Sacred Life of a Webcomic Artist
description: Imagine you were a once-famous adult webcomic artist going through a career slump. Would you rather work with your stunningly sexy but jerk of a producer, Ju-Ho, or your first love and story writer, Min-Jun? Well, Ha-Yun has to work with both! With bills to pay and nothing but ramyun to eat after a string of failed series, Hayoon must successfully launch a new title with both of them on her team. Will she be able to navigate this professional nightmare and revive her career with a bang? And which man will end up taking the spot of her male lead?    (Source: Tappytoon, edited)

title: Inhyeongui Jip
genres: Action, Drama, Ecchi, Horror, Mystery, Psychological, Romance
description: A young man moves to a college town where everything is not quite as it seems. A mysterious and very beautiful woman takes an interest in him, but what is the price of her beauty?

title: Dear Summer Sky
description: Gi-Hu, a high schooler with a passion for photographing the sky, dreams of entering a photography contest. However, the contest requires a portrait photo, which he’s terrible at. He enlists the help of Ha-neul, a mysterious new transfer student who accidentally appears in one of Gi-Hu’s sky photos. Despite his struggles, he finds himself wanting to take more photos of her. As they prepare for the school festival, Gi-Hu becomes more intrigued by Ha-Neul, while she, initially misjudging him, helps him out of guilt after realizing she underestimated his abilities.    (Source: WEBTOON)

title: A Single Dad in Another World
description: OHis wife has gone missing. His baby daughter is terminally ill. But as Junhu falls to his death, he wakes up in his wife’s unfinished dark fantasy novel--a world infested with vile demons. Armed with knowledge of the story, he allies with powerful demon hunters to avert the tragedies to come. Yet every action rewrites the story in unpredictable ways, and Junhu must seek answers if he hopes to keep his daughter safe.  (Source: WEBTOON)

title: The Secret Life of Professor Ha
description: Jaeyoung is a young, promising professor of Business at K University. A long-time favorite among students for his excellent lectures and kindness, it seems like he has everything a man would wish for. But even he had a little secret - Jaeyoung is a big-time otaku of magical girl animes. Then one day, a student of his, Saewoong, finds him holding a dakimakura, effectively exposing Jaeyoung's otaku lifestyle. Desperate to keep his double life a secret, Jaeyoung agrees on a deal with Saewoong that would shake his life...   (Source: POCKET COMICS)    Note: The chapter count includes 11 extras.

title: No, I Want HER!
description: Su-Hyeok and Seo-Ha secretly like each other, but when Seo-Ha plans to move out, it's her mom who makes a move on Su-Hyeok.  (Source: Toomics)

title: The Ex-tra Hot Neighbor
genres: Comedy, Drama, Romance, Slice of Life
description: Finding the perfect guy isn’t easy, but looks like Eunseo just hit the jackpot. Seung-hyuk’s a handsome, hot hunk with a pretty face that anyone would fall in love with. How could you resist someone like that, especially if they feel so much like Mr. Right? Well, as with any good thing, there is a small catch. Apparently, Seung-hyuk is a friend’s ex-boyfriend. Not just any friend, but Eunseo’s new roommate, Minjae. What a fix. Eunseo wants to keep on meeting this hottie, but hurting his friend’s feelings isn’t right, right? Even if the hottie lives next door and they literally run into each other all the time? Right?   (Source: Lezhin US)    Note: Includes one extra chapter.

title: Welcome to Rose Manor
description: Sick and tired of her mother's ruinous debts, Richelle accepts a post as tutor to the illustrious Otis family. But upon finding a letter with strict, eerie rules on how to survive within the manor of roses, Richelle senses that something sinister is lurking. Now, she must pay the price for her choice.  (Source: Manta)

title: Boo-cket List
description: Desperate to escape his hellish grandmother’s house, Hyeonwu scrapes together every penny he can to finally live on his own. But his dream of independence doesn’t last long. His cheap new apartment already has a terrifying long-term resident, a restless virgin ghost who refuses to leave. Just when Hyeonwu thinks he’ll have to move out, the ghost makes him an unexpected offer. If he helps fulfill her secret bucket list, she promises to peacefully move on to the afterlife and vacate the apartment. This chilling and charming story follows a broke young man and a mischievous ghost as they team up to tackle her final wishes, one haunting favor at a time.  (Source: Lezhin US)

title: MASTER, MAY I TURN YOU ON?
genres: Drama, Hentai, Romance, Sci-Fi, Slice of Life
description: Three people working in the AI department of a global corporation get to test out the company's latest product... However, they didn't expect to spend 30 days with an android that looks exactly like a human!   "Are you having trouble getting hard?"   "I wanna have sex too! Buy me a pussy!"   "You have ingrown toenails(?)"  (Source: DAYcomics)

title: Lady Solea Just Wants to Go Home
description: Lady Solea's family can't figure out how she lost her memories or why she keeps raving about her "jackpot." They don't realize she's actually Yoon Jiyoon, a lottery winner who was suddenly brought into their world! Determined to return to her reality and claim her riches, Jiyoon sets off a series of shenanigans to send herself home. Yet when Solea's family proves more fun than expected and distracts her from the mission to leave, Jiyoon begins to wonder if family is worth more than a fortune...    (Source: Tapas)

title: Du Beon Saneun Eumakcheonjae
description: Even if a musician dies, he never dies. It's just covered. Singer-songwriter Kim Han-Seok, who became a legend in Korea with just a guitar... Waking up as a college student in the streaming era 30 years after his death!    (Source: Naver Webtoon, translated)

title: Terminus
description: It’s hard for omegas to find jobs, but Song Hayoon does the best he can. He spends all his time on part-time jobs just so he can pay back his father’s debts. It’s not easy, but he makes it work… but sometimes he wonders if there ever will be an escape out of this never-ending vicious cycle of a life. Then one day, he comes to learn that the prestigious Taewon Group has taken over all his debts. And none other than the Executive Vice President, Kang Hyun-tae, comes to offer him a job… as his personal boytoy. Will this put an end to Hayoon’s troubles, or will it be the start of his new misery?    (Source: Lezhin US)    Note: Includes 12 side story chapters.

title: Chowolgeup Extra-ui Gongnyakjip
description: The main character, Kim Gyeong-Sam, is an orphan who is preparing for the civil service exam while working part-time at a convenience store. While engrossed in playing the game 'God Forsaken World' and playing out the scenario of 'Gilosan Ello D'Baltic', the fallen Third Prince of the Empire, he was transmigrated into that character. The worst part was that by the time that happened, the fallen Third Prince, better known as the 'Prince Pig', had been kidnapped and was on the verge of execution…!    We will see how Gyeong-Sam uses his knowledge of the game 'God Forsaken World' to overcome various crises.   (Source: KakaoPage, translated)

title: Jugeodo Joa♡
description: Everyone would be happier if this boss was dead...

title: A Dangerous Deal, and the Woman Next Door
description: "My wife... once she's naked, it's really game over..."   A glimpse at CCTV footage reveals the neighbor woman - completely nude. Wracked with guilt he shouldn't feel, Scott is caught off guard when Harry makes a dangerous offer:   "Wanna have her? On one condition... Do it right in front of me."  (Source: DAYcomics)

title: Chew & Swallow
description: Minjae Kim was the kind of guy who caught your eye. That’s where all the trouble began for Taehwa Lee. The two met in high school, hit it off and then some. All the rumors said that they were together. Intimate. Abuse, betrayal, lies and love, if that was the only truth, they wouldn’t be in this mess.    (Source: Tapas)    Chapter count includes extras

title: Blood Type Love
description: Have you ever considered human blood is a premium ingredient for winemaking? Have you imagined blood according to different human races have different aroma? Modern vampires are no longer in lack of human blood, what’s more, they’ve begun pursuing a certain taste. Humans who owns sweet and tasty blood can exchange things they want from vampires with their blood. From Napoleon to Hitler, from Albert Einstein to Elvis Presley, whose blood are all listed in wine vintage chart, nevertheless, there is one girl living in the modern era who has the most aromatic and unique blood type which attracts not only mosquitoes but also vampires.  (Source: Mangatoon)

title: The Shameless Thief of Argus
description: Life is all about taking the easy way for Seokwoo, who feels zero guilt over robbing thousands of players as "Luke" in the VR game, Argus. Just when he's leveled up to a master criminal, however, he gets caught and is sentenced to life in prison! Luckily, Luke discovers the will of the vanquished Night King in his cell, which lets him start the game over in exchange for getting revenge on the king's enemies. Though his level and stats have been reset, it's only a matter of time before Argus' infamous thief steals his way back to the top!  (Source: Tappytoon)

title: Stack Overflow
description: What would you do if your life was taken over by an R-rated dating simulation game? That’s a question Gowoon never imagined he’d have to answer, but it’s happening to him whether he likes it or not. Somehow, a virtual reality dating sim has invaded his real life, and now he has three men vying for his attention—and his body. Gowoon would prefer none of them, thank you very much, but the game won’t stop…unless, perhaps, he were to clear it. Maybe the only way out is through. And there’s only one way to find out…    (Source: Lezhin)    Chapter count includes a prologue.

title: World's Best Gonryun Tavern
description: Finally, Byeokwu has mastered it—the Sacred Art of Grand Clarity, one of the most precious arts of the Gonryun Clan. But nothing he learned in seclusion could’ve prepared him to understand the state of things one hundred years later. Leaving his clan behind, Byeokwu starts a new life as a chef at the Gonryun Tavern, determined to help the owner turn a profit. And if his noodles are good enough to tempt the Divine Demon of the Bloody Heaven into changing his ways? Surely, there are worse things.    (Source: Tapas)

title: Yesulgo Eumakcheonjaeneun Hwansaenghan Paganini
description: Paganini's reincarnation, Moon Joo-won. He was once a prodigy violinist, but due to trauma, he distances himself from music and lives as an ordinary humanities high school student. However, as if it were a twist of fate... Moon Joo-won accidentally transfers to an arts high school music class and picks up the violin again... Will Moon Joo-won be able to overcome his trauma and be reborn as a true violinist?  (Source: KakaoPage, translated)

title: Academy Hwansaengyeongung
description: Joonwu Kim, the 1st generation hunter, a hero, and founder of the subjugation system and code against monsters, finally defeats Gigantiana at Black Tomb Dungeon, but it costs his life. As he lay dying, Gigantiana softly whispered, "I will be resurrected in 42 years and bring destruction to this world." 42 years later, Joonwu reincarnates into the body of another person, namesake Joonwu Kim, who has a young teenage physique. A moment to rejoice for a new peaceful world is short-lived. Joonwu becomes distraught, witnessing the subjugation system and Hunter's Law that he and his cohorts had built on their bloodshed and sacrifices in disorder. With this state, Gigantiana's resurrection will bring devastation to this world.  (Source: Naver, translated)

title: Yesulgo Eumakcheonjaeneun Hwansaenghan Paganini
description: Paganini's reincarnation, Moon Joo-won. He was once a prodigy violinist, but due to trauma, he distances himself from music and lives as an ordinary humanities high school student. However, as if it were a twist of fate... Moon Joo-won accidentally transfers to an arts high school music class and picks up the violin again... Will Moon Joo-won be able to overcome his trauma and be reborn as a true violinist?  (Source: KakaoPage, translated)

title: My Status Window Went on Strike
description: Monsters pour out of gates, wreaking havoc on the world, but Tae-Jun couldn’t care less. After seven years of failure and bullying in his hunter’s guild, he’s fired—until his dormant S-Tier power suddenly activates. Now, with newfound strength, Tae-Jun hunts monsters, exacts brutal revenge, and rises to fame. But as his power grows, so does the danger, and shadowy forces begin targeting him. Can Tae-Jun stay one step ahead and crush those who want him dead?  (Source: WEBTOON)

title: A Bias Girl
description: The antics of two high school girls: Kim Peongyon and Choi Boa. Kim aka "Bias Girl", is a foul mouthed, overactive girl and idiot who weird and strange, bias ideas on people and things and Boa is smarter and saner of the two who plays the straight girl everytime Kim does anything stupid.

title: We Only Held Hands
description: The Ki men can get pregnant if they fall asleep with a person while holding hands. Terry unwillingly saves Mike and passes out while holding hands. Is he pregnant?  (Source: Toomics)

title: Spirit Possession
description: A statue said to have been the home of a sex spirit was smashed... by me! And these girls think it moved inside me. Oh, I have an idea!  (Source: Toomics)

title: Stigma Effect
description: Uriel will give anything to be with Rafflet Mogris, the commander of the Paladins, her savior, and... her master. For years, Uriel happily served as his maid until he left to enlist. Uriel waited for him for seven years before deciding to journey to be at his side in the capital. What the world doesn’t know is Uriel is more than just a maid. In a world riddled with monsters, she has the ability to foresee monster attacks in her dreams. If being with Rafflet means Uriel must join the fight, will her desires be enough to overcome her fears?    (Source: Tapas)

title: Don't Fall for the Villainess
description: My name is Lee Sera, and I somehow woke up in the body of the beautiful but despised public enemy of the empire, Igna Larkbella. To make matters worse, a letter just arrived demanding payment on an overwhelming amount of debt Igna acquired after ruining her family's 500-year-old business. It seems like I'm not going back home any time soon, so I need to set things straight if I'm going to survive here. It's time to make this villainess the most popular girl in the empire!    (Source: Tapas)

title: Milk My Strawberries
description: After spending a lifetime drinking an absurd amount of strawberry milk, Song Seol-Ah thought the worst she’d ever have to face was a stomachache. Until her chest started leaking the stuff, that is! As strange new urges overtake her body and mind, she tries to deal with it alone…until an ill-timed encounter with Kim Yushin, her childhood friend turned national medalist, throws everything into chaos. When he offers to help relieve her unbearable desire, she’s thrust into a dangerously sweet arrangement that’s quickly spiraling out of control.  (Source: Lezhin US)

title: Hapbeopjeong Agyeogui Sajeong
description: The social outcast, Seria, had changed.    Seria Shuteren, the vile woman who had everyone trembling with fear at her feet, was now calm. Truthfully, the woman had not just changed; she was a completely different person. Realizing she had possessed the wicked woman's body in this romance novel, she decided to live on the low, having a hunch about the future.    She would end Seria's dreadful habits and successfully avoid her death by decapitation at the hands of Kalis, the sub male lead!

title: Say You Love Me
description: One fateful snowy evening, Yi-hyun lays his eyes on Serin, noticing her potential as an actress. While he has ambitious plans to catapult her into stardom, Serin can't help but hide her growing feelings for him - until one day, she decides to act on it. Drowning in her newfound pleasures and fears, Serin is faced with the single most important question that keeps pricking at her heart... Does he love her?  (Source: Lezhin US)   Note: Chapter count includes a prologue.

title: Class 1-9
description: In a twist and turn of events during a school trip to a rural, northernmost province of South Korea, Se-yeon and her classmates find themselves stranded on a remote island off the coast of North Korea. Extreme circumstances drive the youngsters to take extreme measures to survive. Who will live on, and who will fall victim to the harsh reality surrounding them?     <I>This series contains mature themes and depictions of bullying, self-harm and suicide, and graphic violence. Viewer discretion is advised.     (Source: WEBTOONS)

title: Dungeon Porter
description: In a world where adventurers raid dungeons for fame and fortune, Nagi is stuck as a lowly porter – overlooked, mistreated, and considered expendable. But armed with a mysterious magic bag and quick wits, Nagi begins to challenge the brutal hierarchy from within. Can he rise above betrayal, dangerous monsters, and a corrupt system – or will this ruthless world discard him like the baggage he carries?  (Source: WEBTOON)

title: My Brother's Lover
description: Jin-Ha meets his deceased brother's former roommate and lover, Won, at his brother's funeral, and falls for him instantly. Despite Jin-Ha's estranged relationship with his brother, he and Won share a passionate moment and embark on a romantic relationship. Won becomes Jin-Ha's only escape from the tragedy surrounding him. However, Won's charming demeanor begins to crack and reveals his possessiveness and manipulation, which seep into every aspect of Jin-Ha's life. As their relationship intensifies, Jin-Ha will have to face the reality of Won's dark side, or he might find himself trapped in something much more poisonous than he ever imagined.  (Source: Tappytoon)   Note: Includes three extra chapters.

title: Lover's Vain
description: Bae Songwoo is in a one-sided love with his longtime friend, Kim Sangjin. Living his life hiding his feelings, one day Bae Songwoo finds a suspicious book in his house, and written inside is Kim Sangjin's life story. But Bae Songwoo is just a passing extra...?! As he tries to ignore the book, Bae Songwoo soon realises that everything is going as written...

title: Goodbye, Mom
description: "Cold-hearted." That was the word Lee Eun-Young always used to describe her mother. But after her mother's passing, Eun-Young discovers a diary that shows her things she never even knew about the woman who raised her. Reading the entries allows Eun-Young to continue to feel her mother's presence and resolve their complicated relationship, but as the remaining pages dwindle and the visions that kept her company begin to fade, she's forced to face her new reality and say her final farewell.    (Source: Tapas, edited)   Note: Chapter count includes a prologue and an epilogue.

title: I Don't Wanna Work!
description: Rotieh Panderion has been entrusted with an important task: She must create "Nectar," an immortality-granting elixir. In return, she will be granted a position among the world's deities. After toiling away for a hundred lifetimes, she's had enough hard work and decides to go on strike! But her latest reincarnation is a poor, illegitimate princess accused of attempted murder. Now, Rotieh must clear her name and restore her lost wealth, but that's easier said than done when she doesn't wanna work!    (Source: Tapas)

title: The Blue Guardian of the Princess
description: The sickly Princess Yeong-Myung knew nothing of the violence and betrayal surrounding the royal court. Yet when the threat of a vile mythical beast and the machinations of the cruel Gaesi Kim loom large, she will do all she can to save her family from certain doom. Armed with only her wits and courage, Yeong-Myung must accept the aid of a stunning blue goblin who vows to be her loyal guardian. Can love win and save this unlikely pair from the vicious schemes that bedevil their every move?  (Source: Tapas, edited)

title: Prayers of the Vulgar
description: The servant of God, Saharo, breaks the biggest rule for an angel when she momentarily sympathizes with Evil. After letting Evil escape from heaven’s grasp, Saharo loses her angelic wings and won’t be able to reascend until she destroys the dark enemy once and for all. There’s just one problem: her target is reincarnated as a human boy named Yannick Unbrey. While angels have the power to eliminate Evil, they are forbidden from ever killing a human being. Thus, Saharo’s only choice is to watch over the boy and make sure the darkness within him never awakens. But the older Yannick gets, the more he becomes tainted by the wicked nature of the world. Will Saharo be able to protect Yannick from his slumbering demon, or will she end up giving in to its sinful call with him?    (Source: Tappytoon)

title: A Wife's Sweet Revenge
description: Da-Young Kim happily donated her liver to her mother-in-law, but all she got was betrayal in return. Her husband’s whole family nefariously used and abused her, kicking her out before she even fully recovered from surgery. They went on with their lives, blissfully unaware that Da-Young swore revenge. She begins to systematically destroy their lives as they did hers, but what happens when someone unexpected gets in the way of her best-laid plans? Will accomplishing her mission bring her happiness… or will it only get in the way of true love?    (Source: Tapas)

title: Melt Bless You
description: Melt, the sheltered daughter of a notorious mob boss, has spent her life like a fragile flower trapped in a gilded cage. On her 20th birthday, instead of receiving a gift, she is kidnapped by a mysterious man named Budd. Together, they are thrust into a citywide chase, with hitmen, hounds, and every thug in town hot on their trail. But why is Melt the most wanted woman in New Jersey? As secrets unravel and bodies pile up, this gritty noir tale spirals into a storm of love, murder, and betrayal. Melt Bless You!  (Source: Lezhin US)

title: In the Sunshower
description: Yun-Seul appeared in Sae-Byeok’s life for a brief moment, then disappeared like a fleeting sunshower. But mysterious circumstances have brought her back to the human world and into Sae-Byeok’s life once more. She needs to reclaim what was once hers. And in order to get it, Yun-Seul needs something from Sae-Byeok that’s more important now than ever: his love.    (Source: Lezhin US, edited)

title: Never Mind, Darling
description: After an intense night of drinking, Dawoon has a dream about the kiss he and Jin shared back in high school, something he had long forgotten. He feels uneasy but ignores it, blaming the dream on his long hiatus from dating—until he runs into Jin on campus the next day. Jin seems unusually playful and clingy, poking and prodding at feelings buried in Dawoon’s heart. When Dawoon confronts him about it, a casual reply—”We just kissed”—only adds fuel to the fire. As their long-standing friendship begins to blur into something more, Dawoon must confront his own complex feelings while Jin comes face to face with his heart’s desires.    (Source: Lezhin US)

title: Tenants from Another World
description: Hae-Seo Han is an ordinary, hard-working office worker whose main concerns revolve around being overlooked for promotions, smug colleagues, and workplace stress. That is, until she finds herself intertwined in a prophecy that will determine the fate of a fantasy world! In the realm of the Beiston Empire, Hae-Seo is seen as the oracle who will determine the next successor to the throne and bring peace to the country. Hoping to win Hae-Seo’s favor and become the next emperor, the three charming yet eccentric princes of Beiston cross over into Hae-Seo’s world to begin their lives together as housemates!  (Source: WEBTOONS)

title: Curveball and Splitter
description: A one-night mistake brings Yesol to the doorstep of Hanrim, a cold yet familiar face from his high school baseball team. Only now, Hanrim isn’t just cold—he’s holding a grudge. What exactly happened between them, and why can’t Yesol remember?    (Source: Manta)

title: The Merman Trapped in My Lake
description: Servaine Noxirel was never easily pleased, but that changed when her father gifted her a merman, named Mel. Mel became Servaine’s entire world, but as Servaine’s health worsened and before her death, she confessed her love but never heard his answer. A century passes by and, Mel, now a human, instantly recognizes Servaine’s great grandniece, whose resemblance matches that of her name. But the reasons behind Mel’s long wait and his true feelings remain a mystery. Is it love he seeks, or revenge?   (Source: WEBTOONS)

title: Non-Zero Sum
description: Seo Hae-young, the only light of Yoon Hae-won, who has no money, no family, and no future. After Ko Tae-gyeom, his "friend," reveals his feelings for him, Hae-won's life begins to fall apart.    Tae-gyeom demands a relationship through threats, Hae-young wields violence in an unknown manner, and another friend Joo Hyun-woo joins the ranks...    The broken relationship between the four people, the memories of the past that are now faded.    Who will win this irreversible game?    (Source: Lezhin, translated)

title: Signed, Sealed, Mistaken
description: A fateful mix-up brings an unexpected twist to a student's life at a cram school. When a mysterious package meant for his star lecturer, who shares his name, lands in his hands, an unusual relationship begins to unfold between them —one that blurs the lines between student and teacher.  (Source: Toomics)

title: Stanning 101
description: His last dream is within reach of a little journey through time! What could be better than submerging body and soul to worship a group of idols to brighten up his daily life a little?     Unfortunately for this fanboy, his favorite singer leaves to do his military service shortly after discovering his new passion for idols. The result? He will make a wish that will transform his life...    A jump into the past that will take him into the heart of the show!    (Source: PocketComics)

title: Eyes
genres: Action, Drama, Mystery, Slice of Life, Supernatural
description: “Juan Seo” is a high school student who was born with just one eye. He has an uncanny feeling that someone is watching him every day at school. Even though he's scared to death, Juan can't help but be curious... Until one day, he learns of the "avian humanoids" and falls into a state of great confusion. In the midst of this blood curdling tension, the war of the avian humanoids is set in motion!    (Source: WEBTOONS)

title: The Worst Villainess
description: Possessing a character in a fictional story is one thing, but possessing a character in your own story is another… especially when you’ve become a dramatic villainess in a typical K-drama series. The only way Mi-So can escape from this world is to live through all of the episodes, but she has to deal with cliché tropes such as an arranged marriage with the male lead and an unnecessary rivalry with the female lead. Will Mi-So be able to break away from this predetermined destiny and find another happy ending for all of her characters?    (Source: WEBTOON, edited)

title: Absolute Witch
description: Skyla is a young witch in a world where witches no longer exist. On her way to meet her husband she is picked up by an easily bored old woman and her servant, and a mysterious alchemist. What adventures will Skyla face on her way to Wells?

title: Erostica
description: After being summoned into another world, the Goddess of Mercy wishes for him to be a hero. But can he really be the hero of Erostica...?  (Source: Toomics)   Note: Chapter count includes a prologue.

title: The Search for Alosha
description: Kay, the quiet deputy captain of the guard in a remote, impoverished village, leads a peaceful and uneventful life - until the arrival of the Grand Duke Zigril shatters his world. Zigril is in pursuit of the legendary Alosha, a rare and mysterious bloom rumored to grant pregnancy to anyone who consumes it, regardless of age or gender. Drawn to Kay in a fleeting moment of desire, the Duke expects their encounter to be no more than a brief indulgence. But as Zigril finds himself unable to shake thoughts of Kay, their connection deepens in unexpected ways. Soon, at the Duke's command, Kay is entrusted with the dangerous task of guiding him to the distant city of Edor. Along the way Kay begins to realize that there may be far more at stake than just the mythical flower. What will they discover on this perilous journey - and what does Zigril truly want?    (Source: Lezhin US)

title: Kingdom of the Queen
description: Despite the Kingdom of Blenheim having a woman on the throne, it is a nation made for men. Women are restricted in what they can do, and those who think differently are reminded of their place. But now comes four ambitious girls with their sights set not only on the crown, but also on a revolution! Whose eccentric vision will shape the fate of this great kingdom?   (Source: Tappytoon)

title: Land of the Dead
description: A zombie apocalypse has begun...! Survivors are starting to expose their dirty desires in the face of death...!    (Source: TOPTOON+)

title: Not That Villainess!
description: Iris Sabrina sets out from home to the capital to fulfill her dream of becoming a knight. However, her journey takes an unexpected turn when she’s mistaken for her twin sister—whom she never knew existed—Arke Bright, a notorious villainess who’s been missing for months. As Iris struggles to navigate life in the capital and prove she’s not her sister, she meets a family she never knew she had and a handsome prince who helps her unravel the truth behind her sister’s dark past.    (Source: Tapas)

title: Vengeance Named Love
description: Leon Winston, Captain of the Western Command's Domestic Intelligence Division in the Kingdom of Riphon, is both feared and revered. Known as the Vampire of Camden for his ruthless treatment of rebels, he strikes terror into both allies and enemies alike. But beneath his noble and elegant exterior lies a man consumed by a dark desire, one that burns as fiercely as his rage against the rebels. Sally Bristol, the unassuming maid in charge of the interrogation room, is the one who awakens this uncontrollable craving, fueled by the scent of her blood. And after a rebel spy mentions her name, Leon realizes he no longer has to suppress his violent desire for her. Will Sally be able to beg her way out of Leon's deathly grasp, or will she succumb to the bloodlust he can't resist?  (Source: Lezhin US)

title: Lady Swindler
description:
To uphold her father's wishes, Seizel Aramis lived an honest and virtuous life, only to be betrayed by those she trusted, conned by crooks, sent to jail, and executed. But the moment she dies, Seizel wakes up in the past, right before her misfortunes began. This time, Seizel decides to live life differently by becoming the greatest swindler in the empire! Armed with a newfound goal and the determination to fulfill it, can Seizel succeed in going from noblewoman to con-woman?

(Source: Tapas)

title: Dispair
description: Miha has always felt like an outsider, even within his own family. Sohwa takes full advantage of that, forcing him to do his biddings. However, an incident takes place that helps Miha and Sohwa to reflect and figure out what they are feeling for each other.    (Source: Lezhin Comics)

title: The Remarriage Contract
description: Seoyeon and Geonha once had a loveless marriage of convenience for their families’ business ambitions. Or at least, they believed it was loveless. When Seoyeon leaves Geonha for another man, Geonha finds himself wallowing in lingering bitterness and resentment. Meanwhile, Seoyeon is living a new life abroad with her young son Junu, until everything changes when Geonha seeks her out on behalf of his ailing grandmother, a wealthy businesswoman who cared deeply for Seoyeon. As the two re-enter into a pretend marriage, this time to appease Geonha’s grandmother, they discover lingering feelings that had been buried in the past.    (Source: WEBTOON)

title: Gwanghae Yeonin
description: “I told you I would remember you.”  “It’s good to see you again, crown prince.”    There is a girl named Kyungmin with a special talent of time traveling in the Republic of Korea in 2020. One day, Kyungmin meets the 18-year-old Prince Gwanghae, who came to the present from the Joseon era.    Although it was only for a single day, the two of them leave each other with unforgettable memories.    After returning to Joseon, Prince Gwanghae is unable to forget Kyungmin for a long time, and waits for her while dreaming of reuniting with her.    And due to her father’s sudden death, Kyungmin carries out a life-threatening time-traveling journey. And there, she meets the 27-year-old Gwanghae.

title: Part-time Partner
description: Kyu-Ho has become smitten with new club member, Yun-Geon. Not only is Yun-Geon’s face gorgeous but there’s something about the way he stands his ground confidently. As the two classmates get to know each other, Kyu-Ho starts falling for Yun-Geon even harder. But when, out of the blue, Yun-Geon says, “you’re not my style,” to Kyu-Ho, the two start a love-hate relationship for the ages.    (Source: Lezhin US, edited)

title: Blunder Turned Wonder
description: Minkyu’s heart is pounding in his ears as he waits for Jung-yun, his dream girl, up on the roof of the school. Today, he got her number off the class contact list and finally mustered up the courage to text her. Now all he has to do is ask her out. Minkyu hears the door creak. Jung-yun’s here! Too embarrassed to look her in the eye, he blurts out his feelings for her and pops the question. “Okay,” a guy who is definitely not Jung-yun answers. Startled, Minkyu turns around to find Jung-hyun with an "h" blushing in front of him. Wait, wait, waaaait... Did he just ask out a dude? And did the dude just say yes? Does that mean he now has a 192 cm-tall, curtain-haired boyfriend? What the heck is going on?!    (Source: Lezhin)

title: Tell Me How
description: Boy-girl best friendships are hard. Will Taehyun and Jikyung's survive their stormy journey?  (Source: Toomics)

title: Here Reigns the Vengeful Villainess
description: In the grand empire of Tygen, Robellia's serene life takes a dark turn, catapulting her into a saga of vengeance. In a world of power and intrigue, she exposes hidden truths, navigating a tumultuous path between hero and villain. Armed with extraordinary magic, Robellia is steadfast in unveiling the obscured secrets of the empire and recovering her lost happiness.    (Source: PocketComics)   Note: This was first published in English on POCKET COMICS (11-20-2023), but its first AniList-eligible publication was in Japanese on Comico (2-12-24), and its Korean release was 4-28-2024 on KakaoPage.

title: Suhee0
description: Suhee is an average office worker. Her boss seems to hate her, and she shoulders the burden of looking after her two young siblings and aging father. After making an impromptu appearance on her brother's livestream, Suhee discovers her potential as an internet broadcaster. To improve her family’s financial situation, she dives into the exciting yet mysterious world of internet fame, as fans and industry figures show support for her. Her new career seems promising, but is everything too good to be true? Can Suhee lift her family out of poverty and change her life?    (Source: WEBTOON)

title: I divorced my wife
description: Divorce with a wife whom he wanted to give everything to. He started realizing how popular he was after he was freed from her grip.  (Source: DAYcomics)

title: Hole in One
description: Everything about Jungwoo is average…apart from his abnormal fetish for female pro golfers. Jungwoo knows that he can’t let his fetish get the better of him, so he decides to quench his obsession by working at a swanky golf club. However, the first girl he bumps into on the field is none other than all-time star golfer, Park Sojung, who also happens to be the reason he got this fetish in the first place! Between settling in his new job and keeping it in his pants around hot female golfers who seem to crave his touch, will Jungwoo be able to overcome his fetish and achieve his hole in one?  (Source: Lezhin X)

title: Pray!
description: A decade after the fall of Shin Oktaro, Frey, a back-alley thief, stumbles upon a clue to the sibling he lost long ago. But when Koo Ilyeong, the enigmatic CEO of SNT, crosses his path, a dangerous offer is made. Under the guise of benevolence, Koo dares Frey to earn his redemption, pushing him into a game where the rules are never clear, and the stakes grow darker with each move. What is Koo's true intent, and how far will Frey go before he's consumed by the shadows of his past?    (Source: Lezhin US)

title: Lavender Garden
description: After many years, Noah returned to the mansion of his first love to return what he took. However, Henry, Noah's first love, caught him and gave him punishment for leaving him. With words that were left unsaid and the lies spoken in the past, will the two have a happy ending?    (Source: INKR Comics)

title: The Guy with Pretty Lips
description: Roha, Hanbi’s younger brother’s friend and also her first kiss from ten years ago, one day comes back into her life as a perfectly grown man. With his pretty lips, he starts to seduce her with pretty words, breaking her boundaries and shaking her up all over again. Can they be friends again, or is one of them about to cross the line a second time?    (Source: WEBTOONS)

title: Lavender Garden
description: After many years, Noah returned to the mansion of his first love to return what he took. However, Henry, Noah's first love, caught him and gave him punishment for leaving him. With words that were left unsaid and the lies spoken in the past, will the two have a happy ending?    (Source: INKR Comics)

title: Sexcape Room: Snap Off
description: The third in the “Sexcape Room” series!  Eun-Sung and So-Ra are old childhood friends. They’re trapped in a room and are only allowed to leave if they have sex. However, another stipulation has complicated things further: If they don’t do it within three hours, Eun-Sung’s weiner will snap off! Will these lifelong friends bite the bullet and do the deed to break out or will Eun-Sung lose his schlong forever?    (Source: Lezhin X, edited)

title: Lion Heart
description:
As the ace heart surgeon of Seomoon Jaeil Hospital, Dr. Yoon Hae-Jun always puts her patients first. To give them even better care, she hopes to open a heart transplant center on the premises. But when one of her patients goes AWOL and saddles the hospital with his bills, the whole project is put in jeopardy. Her only hope? Become the fake girlfriend of the wealthy hospital chairman Seo Yi-Han! But as Dr. Yoon will soon learn, melting his frigid heart may be more difficult than operating on one!

(Source: Tapas)

title: My Dear Tyrant
description: In an attempt to overthrow her tyrannical brother and father, Princess Erinyes Taltal colluded with House Lowenthal... only to have the plot end with the family's death. Her last hope is Tristan Lowenthal, who managed to survive by becoming her slave. But her plans to have him become the leader of the revolt go awry when she discovers Tristan has no interest in reclaiming his family's title or fortune. With such dismal prospects, will Erinyes be able to emerge as the victor in this battle?    (Source: Tapas)

title: Dangsinui Wanbyeokan Ending-eul Wihayeo
description: Yun-Seom, possessed by a romance fantasy book, is killed by the obsessed male protagonist and returns to reality. One day, as she tries to forget her horrific past and start anew, the obsessed male protagonist who killed her in the book reappears before her eyes...?!  (Source: Naver, translated)

title: Delusional Dalliances
description: Step into a world where no fantasy is off limit, and no desire too delusional... Follow stories of guys getting exactly what they want, however they want it, whoever they want it with.  (Source: Lezhin US)

title: Delivery
description: A young man delivers food to the same house every day. However, the young woman who picks up the food starts wearing skimpy clothes day after day...   "Is she trying to seduce me?"  (Source: DAYcomics)

title: Dungeon Food Truck Boss
description: No one was prepared when the massive towers known as dungeons appeared, crawling with monsters and threatening calamity for the entire world. After she receives extraordinary culinary powers, the quiet and humble Ji-Eun is compelled to join some of the most skilled monster hunters in the world, seeing things and going places she never dreamt of before! Now, she’s making friends, having exciting adventures, and cooking up some of the tastiest dishes the dungeon has to offer!  (Source: Tapas)

title: The Quiet Game
description: Everyone has at least one dirty little secret.   As a result of a game started by her father, Ellie grew up unable to speak or write very well. Knowing her condition, three men disclose their deepest secrets to her. However, just as they begin taking an interest in her, Ellie disappears. She's eventually found, but this time, she can speak!   (Source: Manta)    Note: Includes one extra chapter.

title: DISFARMING
description: Imagine waking up in a room with no memory of how you got there. All that's there with you is a bound and gagged girl. What would you do? Well for some people the choice is clear...  (TOPTOON+)Note: Includes 2 extra chapters.

title: Kiss the Bride
description: Unrequited love bloomed for Jaewon Shin on the courts of an elite tennis training camp, but his feelings for his arrogant but irresistible practice mate, Javier, are as doomed as Jaewon’s tennis career. Years later, with a permanent knee injury and no prospects, Jaewon is stunned to find his old crush, His Excellency, Duke Javier Leoncino himself, at his door with a marriage proposal. Jaewon’s met his match for this love game.    (Source: Tapas)

title: An Insincere Idol's Blank Slate
description: K-pop idol Yoon Eden has wasted away for years under a mediocre label with an incompetent CEO. He is disillusioned and on the verge of quitting when he's sent back in time to the day of his debut. Now, Eden is determined to use his songwriting talent to rewrite his career and gain some well-deserved fame. Despite his CEO still pushing cheesy songs and tacky concepts, can Eden, with the help of his group members, truly reignite his spark and become a sincerely dazzling idol?    (Source: Tapas)

title: She's Too Much for Me
description: The girl I'd met 4 years ago came to work at my convenience store! A comical love story between the cashier and the manager!  (Source: TOPTOON+)   Notes:  - Includes one extra chapter.  -This webtoon was adapted into the South Korean television drama "Backstreet Rookie" in 2020.

title: Ice Lamp - The Chronicles of Kira
description: Life in a war-torn empire isn’t easy for a girl. That’s why Kira was raised and educated by her mother as a boy. But when her mother passes away, Kira is left to make her own way in the world, and the older she gets, the harder it is to maintain a masculine appearance. So when a magical being appears one night promising to grant any wish in return for a favor, Kira asks to be given a male voice. Now with a stronger disguise, she accepts a job as a page to a nobleman – and not just any nobleman, but the grand duke! However, the job isn’t nearly as simple as she thought, and Kira will have to work hard and face many challenges ahead if she wants to succeed.    (Source: Tappytoon)

title: This Is the Wrong House, Mr. Villain!
description: What do you do when a murderous villain ends up unconscious at your front door? For Yuri, the answer is simple: leave his body outside protagonist Anne-Marie's house and then live in peace as a background character! But for some reason, Yuri can't bring herself to let him ruin sweet, innocent Anne-Marie's life as is written in the original story, so she takes him in and slowly nurses him back to health. Little does Yuri realize the consequences of letting a villain inside her house...    (Source: Tapas)

title: Dealing with Demons
description: Staying alive is a new form of entertainment.   When Do-Kyung, disillusioned by the harshness of life, finally resolves to call it quits, a bored demon, Hwamyung, appears before her with a particular offer. Will Do-Kyung, having entered into a contract with the Demon of Disillusionment, be able to flip her disastrous life upside down?  (Source: Manta)

title: Baekjo Gongjunimui Heukjo Eommaga Doeeotseumnida
description: The possession that happens to others befell on me too. I’m pretty sure that I’m a supporting character… But what on earth is this novel? On top of being a widow with stepdaughters of my age, I’m living a cursed life in which I transform into a black swan every night because of black magic! I need to suppress my tears and change my fate… Not. Why should I? Why so serious? A duchess by daytime, and a carefree queen of the lake by nighttime. Bravo, my destiny! Life should be spontaneous! As much as I wished to continue living like this, I chanced upon a white baby swan.    “Mommy, awe you weally my mommy?”   What, you’re a human? And the tyrant emperor’s youngest sister moreover?   “I’m not your mommy! Can’t you tell from the colour of our feathers?”    I’m a black swan, you’re a white swan! But why’s she so freaking adorable?! As we endure the obsession and persecution(?) of her seven older brothers, including the tyrant emperor, can our mother-daughter love ever be fulfilled?    (Source: KakaoPage, translated)

title: The Butterfly Girl
description: Na Bibi and her only friend Da-Hee, both bullied by their classmates, have been enduring a painful middle school life. But after turning 17, Na Bibi gained the ability to transform like a butterfly and be reborn infinitely with a different appearance.   With a brand-new pretty look, she is now ready to start afresh as a high school student. But her transformation stirs tensions with Da-Hee who disappears on her.
