Struggling with her identity, Na Bibi enters high school. She coincidentally ends up in the same class as Bang Yeonwoo, a student from the same middle school.   (Source: Manta)

title: The Beast Emperor and I
description: When Princess Bellia Piolette is ordered by her father to marry Kastor's cruel crown prince who's known for killing his wives, she flees in the night. On the way, Bellia encounters a dying man named Khan and heals him before she's caught and imprisoned in the palace. There, she's miraculously reunited with Khan, who asks her to run away with him. But their time together is cut short when Bellia's forcibly sent to Kastor, where she discovers that her beloved Khan is not who she thought he was...    (Source: Tapas)

title: Don't Fall In Love!
description: Helplessly falling in love at first sight.    Jeong-Hyeon is a girl who easily gets carried away by her feelings. On her first day of work as a manager for actress Hee-Ra Ju, she falls head over heels for her! Jeong-Hyeon can't afford to lose her job, but her heart melts every time she sees Hee-Ra's face. Will she be able to hide her feelings?    (Source: Manta, edited)

title: I Want You!
description: Nina has carefully crafted an image for herself, but will sex ruin everything?  (Source: Toomics)

title: Simkungopiseureidihl S
description: To expand this exciting office life with five sexy and mysterious female bosses together!  (Source: TOPTOON, translated)

title: In the Castle: the Dragon's Erotic Education
description: When one’s life mission is to provide a mighty dragon with the sex education he deserves, one needs to really commit. Even if it means you have to spend the majority of your life alone in a castle with nothing but an egg for company. While some might find this solitary lifestyle daunting, Litz is fine. More than fine. He’s found a way to combat loneliness: by pouring his heart and soul into fathering(?) 1,697 sex toys. The day the dragon finally emerges from the egg will be the day that Litz’s babies will finally unleash their true potential...but can Litz bear to wait?    (Source: Lezhin US)    Note: Contains four side story chapters.

title: Date a Ranker
description: All Seong-a Myeong wants to do is spend her life playing video games. Unfortunately, after defeating a streamer in an online game and taking his money, she realizes that he is actually a boy in her class named Hanjun Kang, who also happens to be a terrifying delinquent! Determined to keep her identity a secret, she decides to request a class transfer, only to run into Tae-ui An, another classmate who looks exactly like her game character! Can she spend time with Tae-ui while keeping Hanjun from discovering who she really is?  (Source: WEBTOONS)

title: Toys of the Trade
description: Nobleman Park Hyowon is no stranger to the pleasures of the flesh. If anything, he’s actually quite experienced. So when a friend mentions an oh-so-secret sex toy workshop, Hyowon’s interest is thoroughly piqued. But the coarse Shinwoo is nothing like the refined artisan Hyowon expected, and he finds himself drawn in by the man’s almost rude nature. So much so, that he’s determined to get past that rough exterior, and what better way than by targeting his pride? Accusing Shinwoo of lacking confidence in his products, Hyowon demands a hands-on demonstration, and soon gets much more than he bargained for when Shinwoo shows him pleasure he could never have imagined. There’s just one thing Hyowon can’t figure out. Just how much of his pleasure is caused by the art…and how much by the artisan?    (Source: Lezhin US)

title: Escape, Ray
description: For Kile, it’s just a normal day at work until Lou walks in. Tall, blond and dashing, he’s not the type of guy that goes unnoticed. Lou eventually sweet-talks Kile back to his place… and that’s when the bomb drops. “Your twin brother is dead. Soon, you will become an esper.” At those words, Kile’s ordinary life is turned upside down. As the telekinetic powers begin to manifest, his body is overtaken by a fever. Wracked with pain, he finds the only thing that soothes him is Lou’s touch… Yet so much remains unexplained. What does Lou want? And what was his relationship with Ray, Kile’s twin brother?    (Source: Lezhin US)    Note: Chapter count includes 6 extras.

title: Coppelia-ui Gwan
description: On a snowy day, a beautiful transfer student named Anna, joined the boarding school. With Anna's captivating beauty, she became the object of everyone's envy. While Colette, who was the opposite of Anna in every way, builds a delicate love-hate relationship with her. All of a sudden, Anna leaves the school. A long time passes before Colette reunites with Anna, at the place where she starts working as a tutor for a noble family...  (Source: Bomtoon, translated)

title: I Think I Married the Wrong Guy
description: Our heroine is set up for failure when she wakes up in the novel "Betrayal of the Black Rose" as Lady Nadia, a side character who is killed by the murderous Duke Altair Gertrand. Poor Nadia's only hope of survival is leaving the capital and marrying an obscure baron in the countryside. Unfortunately, this baron turns out to be Altair before his days as a duke! Having stepped right into the lion's den, Nadia fears she might die even sooner than expected. Now, the only way she can survive is by steering her scary husband off his bloodstained path to villainhood...    (Source: Tappytoon)

title: Mabeopseosaeng
description: Certan was the prince of the demon world who wrecked havoc a long time ago. His father, the king of the demon world, had his soul sealed in an octagonal tablet and he sent to the human world…    By accident, he got stuck with a boy named Go Jin-Yeong…    ‘Let’s conquer the martial world with magic!’    The popular martial arts novel, Magic Scholar, returns as a webtoon!    (Source: KakaoPage, translated)

title: Mijeong
description: In Chinese, ‘Mijeong’ means ‘pure beauty.’ In the cold city, young people’s lives cross and spark for brief moments in this remarkably drawn graphic novel; Wounded characters, squashed by the daily hard realities of urban living whose destinies take sudden unannounced turns but their inner flames shine bright and wild, even for a brief time. This engrossing collection of stories will transfix and move you deeply.  (Source: NBM)

title: Special Guidance
description: A prototypical B-grade guide, Kang Yoon-oh is content with his ordinary life as an average guide. That is until one day, an S-grade esper, Kim Hyuntae comes to him for guiding. After finding Yoon-oh’s guiding abilities extraordinary and exactly what he needed, Hyuntae eventually requests that he become his very own personal guide. Now, working for Hyuntae, Yoon-oh’s life is about to go from simple to special…   (Source: Lezhin US)    Note: Includes two extra chapters.

title: The Duchess's Secret Boutique
description: When war tore Rubika from her life and her love, Armand, she thought everything was over... until she wakes up as her 22-year-old self! Though ecstatic at this second chance to reunite with her beloved, she discovers that she must now marry Duke Kleimore due to her conniving relatives' scheme. Unable to avoid the union, Rubika decides to just get the duke to divorce her instead! With a marriage to break up and a war looming in the near future, will Rubika be able to safely meet Armand once more?    (Source: Tapas)

title: Rent Boy
description: Anton, the heir to the Arnault family, has finally come of age. As is customary for nobles, he is given access to the Cyrene Salon, a cafe filled with pleasure…and secrecy. After just one unforgettable evening with Arwin, the parlor’s “number one," the normally reserved Anton has soon become filled with lust and curiosity. Who is Arwin? How did he come to such a place? What is his connection to the head of the Arnault family? But most importantly, why can’t Anton get enough of him? Find all the answers in this erotic drama by the creator of “My Mother’s Lover.”    (Source: Lezhin)

title: Leave Me Alone!
description: You don't know me. Got it?    After a rough three years in middle school, Doeun decides to return to her hometown and attend high school there for some peace and quiet. But with her old besties now the hottest, most popular guys in school, that might be harder than she thought. Why can't everyone just leave her alone?!    (Source: Manta)

title: Yukdojongmungi
description: Left alone in front of the monastery during a troublesome time, Yub SeJun was thought to be a normal, abandoned baby. However, he had the power to change the world in the way he wanted. In the world, everyone followed the classical cultivation; however, SeJun follows his morals and creates a novel cultivation method. Can he become the new hero who will bring the world out of chaos?

title: Campus Live
description: Jin-Tae was supposed to have a great time at college but because of a cruel girl named Da-Gyeong, his reputation is in the dumps. But one day, he discovers her weakness.   "Now how shall I get my revenge on her?"   (Source: TOPTOON+)

title: Lifesaving Romance
description: Eunhong is an actress -- just not famous yet. After being dumped by her boyfriend of 9 years, she gets involved in an incident with the CEO of LJ Pharmaceutical, Kang-il. And out of the blue, he wants to “hire” her as his fiancée. In order to save face from her ex-boyfriend and avoid being charged, Eunhong accepts his offer, but can she pull off the role of a beautiful yet mysterious French heiress without being busted?  (Source: WEBTOON)

title: The Villainess is Everyone's Favorite
description: After waking up inside a game, Minervina discovers that she has the ability to see information screens for everything within her new world. Unfortunately, she has also been given a quest to destroy this world, but she’s ignoring that. While Minervina wishes to use her near-omniscience to live a comfortable life, she’s continuously swept into chaos and political ploys. Her key to preserving the peace might be Exarch, the incorruptible Grand Duke. He seems to favor her, a trend that continues with everybody else, including the main system. Will Minervina be able to protect this world that loves her?  (Source: Tappytoon)

title: The Extra's Touch
description: Muzel Clave Laurent Morze is destined to die during the war caused by the heroine of the novel "Mesiria." In order to avoid her horrid fate and live a carefree life, she decides to change the future with a special ability that allows her to look at the memories of people and objects with a single touch. She soon gets involved in the dramatic events of the original story in an attempt to make things go in her favor... but will her touch be enough to ensure the happy ending she's always wanted?    (Source: Tapas)

title: Broken Season
description: The most traumatic event in Haero’s life was coming out to his best friend, Don. Growing up, they were like brothers. Closer than brothers. As they aged, they drifted apart, hiding each other’s mixed feelings. Back together again in college, can Haero come to terms with his true feelings? And will Don accept him? Or, will there be broken hearts in that ever-interrupted season of changes.  (Source: Tapas)

title: The Hate Trap
description: Yoo Sera, who once secretly indulged in the R-rated, grimdark captivity reverse-harem game "Who Trapped Our Lady?", suddenly finds herself thrown into the world of that very game. Not only is she forced into the body of the villainess Sera Ebott, but she’s also trapped under the same roof as the male leads who despise her. The condition for escape? Uncover the identity of the one who imprisoned her. To survive and gain the information she needs, Sera must seduce those very men with her own body…!! Will Sera find a way out and return safely?  (Source: Lezhin US)

title: Devil Shot
description: The moment I looked Death in the eye, I made a contract with the Lord of the Underworld.

title: The Graymark
description: Have you ever been so angry that you wanted to break the laws of physics and throw down with a cosmic being? Well, you might if you’re Great—no, not “great”; I mean Great the Executioner. On planet Graymark, where the law decrees that all sinners must die, Great makes a name for himself butchering criminals in their thousands. Except now the law is no more, and Great must stand trial before the King of the Cosmos, Lohumlagaha. Enraged by fate, Great takes up his sword. It's just one last time… Or is it?  (Source: WEBTOONS)

title: Hook, Line, and Sinker
description: Yang Kye-Soo and Yun Myeong-Tae are meant to be. Or at least, that’s what Kye-Soo had always thought. With Myeong-Tae following him around and practically begging for his attention since elementary school, how could he ever get the wrong idea? So when the burly boy babbles off a list of qualities for his ideal boyfriend, Kye-Soo is left shocked and stunned - because not one of them applies to him! In order to become the man of Myeong-Tae’s dreams, Kye-Soo enlists the help of the campus’s captain of charm, the sexily seductive Kang Shin-Joo. With Shin-Joo’s guidance, Kye-Soo will do his best to learn the tricks of the trade and reel Myeong-Tae in hook, line, and sinker!    (Source: Lezhin US)

title: Nae Haksaengieotdeon Hakbumodeul
description: Se-Jong, a middle school Korean language teacher, finds himself facing his former students, who are now parents. Back in their school days, these students liked Se-Jong, but even now as adults, they’re trying to win over their former teacher. Can Se-Jong resist the charms and advances of his past students?  (Source: TOPTOON, translated)

title: Die Melusine
description: My serenade, my Kieron.    During one of his conquests, the heartless Archduke Kieron discovers Melusine, a mermaid in captivity. Their bond deepens, but according to legend, mermaids must kill their lovers to return to the sea. Melusine cannot bear to harm Kieron and leaves instead. What cruel fate awaits the lovers?    (Source: Manta)

title: Dalkomhan Gajok
description: Moon-Tak is unemployed and has been living at his girlfriend’s house for two years after being discharged from the military. At the club that he secretly visits, he learns the secret of his prospective sister-in-law, “Young-Ah,” and received a secret proposition. I thought everything was a secret between the two of us. Did my girlfriend find out? What’s the fate between the two families that get tangled up the more I try to solve it?   “Young master… We’re family now, so you’re going to keep that secret, right?”  (Source: Lezhin, translated)

title: Disaster is Always By My Side
description: Everything seems perfect in Da-Mi Yun's life. Her career prospects look bright, and her childhood crush Ho-Won even moved back to Korea to confess to her. But her world turns upside down when an anonymous letter leads her to a mysterious house, where she ends up trapped for three hours… except in the outside world, a decade has passed and Da-Mi has been declared dead! Can Jae-Nan, the mysterious, surly god and owner of the home, help her navigate this chaos? Why does disaster strike wherever she goes? And why is this unhelpful god having prophetic dreams about them being together?!    (Source: WEBTOONS, edited)

title: Scammed and Rammed
description: Sun Mooyoung, a struggling fake fortune-teller, cons clueless chaebol heir Lee Jaeyi, who’s never dated, into a bogus love reading and rakes in big cash. But when Jaeyi realizes he’s been scammed, he sues Mooyoung for the fraudster he is! As if that’s not bad enough, Mooyoung’s boyfriend bails on him after hearing about the lawsuit. Now broke and desperate, Mooyoung hatches a ridiculous plan: make Jaeyi's fake love fortune come true to get the charges dropped. Can this hapless con artist pull off a miracle—or just dig himself deeper?    (Source: Lezhin US)

title: My Brother and His Gift
description: After losing his parents in a tragic car crash, college student Lee Si-Hyuk is left alone to raise his baby brother, Si-Ha. In order to do so, Si-Hyuk decides to follow in his father's footsteps and become a translator. While working to apply for the job, he suddenly finds himself knowledgeable about things he's never learned and starts to gain recognition as a translation prodigy! But even with his mysterious new ability, can Si-Hyuk really balance work and school, all while raising a 3-year-old?  (Source: Tapas)

title: Amtwaeji
description: By day, Ha-Rin is a sculptor and teacher. By night, she turns into the serial killer Sow who, along with her protege Soon-Hee, uses a chat app to ensnare men with sex. After the deed is done, the men are kidnapped and tortured to death, punishment for being adulterers or for using women as if they're objects. But Detective Kim and his team are on these murderers' trails - will the duo's reign of terror be stopped?  (Source: TOPTOON, translated)   Note: Chapter count includes a prologue.

title: Antidote
description: Two years ago, the great lord Sylhan was stripped of his title and status, reduced to a life of mania, amnesia, and slavery. He is resigned to his newfound lack of freedom, until a knight appears in front of him. A gentle hand around his waist, sweet lips pressed upon his own, and a deep connection forged in the unknowable past: Sylhan is confused, but unable to stop himself from being drawn ever closer to the mysterious man. The once proud lord can no longer lay claim to glory, wealth, or power…but what about love?     (Source: Lezhin US)

title: Tokkineun 3 Chomyeon Sajeonghamnida
description: After failing the auditions for a role he'd been preparing for, Lyle takes a trip to Korea for a change of pace. As a black-footed cat-man, he was not able to present himself as a top amongst the larger beastmen, but having travelled to this place with all sorts of small and cute animals that suited his tastes, he thinks he could be a top here. After downloading an online dating app, Lyle starts chatting with a rabbit-man with the handle "Kkyu," and steadily grows fond of him. Finally, the day they meet arrives! However, what appears before Lyle, as his heart pounds, is...a brute-like rabbit...?!    "Is this person...really my Kkyu...?!"    (Source: Bomtoon, translated)   Note: Chapter count includes 4 side stories.

title: Scammed and Rammed
description: Sun Mooyoung, a struggling fake fortune-teller, cons clueless chaebol heir Lee Jaeyi, who’s never dated, into a bogus love reading and rakes in big cash. But when Jaeyi realizes he’s been scammed, he sues Mooyoung for the fraudster he is! As if that’s not bad enough, Mooyoung’s boyfriend bails on him after hearing about the lawsuit. Now broke and desperate, Mooyoung hatches a ridiculous plan: make Jaeyi's fake love fortune come true to get the charges dropped. Can this hapless con artist pull off a miracle—or just dig himself deeper?    (Source: Lezhin US)

title: Namui Sarang Iyagi
description: A deep love that I wanted to try even if I was in pain, hurt and resigned. I had an unexpected encounter when I thought I wasn't lucky. Will it be love this time?

title: I Don't Want the Male Lead's Child
description: In the novel I was reading, my favorite character, Abril, had a tragic ending. After marrying the male lead, Asellas, she dies of magic intolerance while giving birth to his child. I only wished for her to be happy–but when I opened my eyes, I was suddenly in Abril’s body! Before getting married to Asellas, I came up with a simple plan to survive: “I’ll never have his child!” But of course, things aren’t that easy...    (Source: Tapas)

title: Youngest Daughter of the Ultimate Martial Master Namgung Family
description: Hui-Ran used to be the disgrace of House Namgung, shunned by all, including her siblings. But after political intrigue destroys her family, Hui-Ran dies trying to avenge them. All seems lost until she reawakens in the past... as an adorable baby! But how can she help anyone in a baby’s body? And why are her siblings being so nice to her? Time has been reset—using her knowledge of the future, Hui-Ran must rewrite history and thwart the sinister dissidents who seek Namgung’s downfall.  (Source: Tapas, edited)

title: Geu Chaege Maeumeul Juji Maseyo
description: Living for the sole aim of escaping!    ‘Light of Rusbella’ was a depressing romance novel.  Wishing for a new life, Asili Rosé was reborn as the 8th wife of the Estrian Emperor.  She thought she was born with a golden spoon, but it was actually just a gilded spoon?  Once she realized that nothing but ruin awaited, she found a diary foreshadowing the future...    It foretold Asili’s death by the hands of the Crown Prince, Castor!    [“What does the empire mean to you?”  After asking this, the Crown Prince smiled so very beautifully. And then he killed me.]    Unfortunately, Asili kept coming back to life, and continued to be killed over and over again. As she continued to relive her deaths, she slowly lost her smile and changed.    …Let’s try to survive first.  ----  “What can I do for my elder brother?”  “Well.”  ----  Pale sky blue hair fluttered finely in the wind. He smiled weakly, before parting his dry lips.  “Call my name.”  “...”    My head quickly snapped up.  “Call me… Amoru.”  His fingertips skimmed along my inner wrist.   (Source: Korean publisher, translated)

title: An Abyss: Poem of Chaff
description: “I…thought you were dead…”    For ten years, Cináed has lived solely for revenge, driven by the events of a decade ago. Despite the concerns of his long-time friend Rahman, he secretly prepares for his vengeance under the alias "Chaff," alongside his loyal retainer Yexing.  During his quest, Cináed discovers Albin, whom he believed to be dead, and rescues him. As they live together under the guise of protection, Cináed is struck by how much Albin has changed from their childhood days. This new Albin stirs unfamiliar emotions within Cináed, complicating his single-minded pursuit of revenge.  As Cináed’s feelings for Albin deepen, his thirst for revenge begins to wane. Will he choose the path of vengeance, or will Albin’s presence lead him to a different destiny?    (Source: Lezhin US)

title: Bed for Three
description: On the day he dumps his cheating ex, salaryman Taeyoon Han meets two gorgeous guys: friendly coffee shop owner Yehan and stubborn businessman Jaehyuk. The two couldn’t be more different, but one thing’s for certain: they both want to please Taeyoon in bed. Drunk and craving affection, Taeyoon gives in to his desires… which ends in a one-night-stand threesome! Taeyoon is sure it’s a one-time mistake, but wait! Yehan and Jaehyuk want to continue the threesome?! So begins not one, not two… but three times the fun in bed.    (Source: Tapas)

title: The Cheating Chatroom
description: Cheol-Nam works as a security guard in a large company and accidentally joins a secret chat used by married people for cheating. Realizing its potential, he decides to have his revenge on all the snobs that ignored him in the office by fucking their wives.  (Source: DAYcomics, edited)

title: Angsinui Gangnim
description: The story of a slave, called Zion, set in a Middle Eastern setting, who is training to become a great necromancer, to be able to fight on even grounds with Knights, to have his long awaited revenge as a chosen child(1 of 4) of Kronos...he became a slave on his own accord to achieve his goal...  Now... what has God chosen for his fate?...or was it the Devil?

title: Her Ladyship's Double Life
description: Lady Lilian Isilot, while being one of many young ladies of high society, is known for her beauty and composure. In the Arman Kingdom, women with thin arms and legs who dress well and have mild manners are more likely to marry into prestigious families. This is why Lilian, who comes across as poised and reserved, is an ideal role model for other noble ladies despite being unmarried. So when the holy lord, Luth, appears before her and warns her of approaching evil and that she is to be his chosen warrior, Lilian quickly declines. But upon realizing that she has no choice in the matter and that saving the world will land her a kind, sexy, and hot blond husband she only sees in Wananet Flixenchil’s novels, Lilian decides to accept the mantle of warrior and lead a double life!    (Source: Tappytoon)

title: He, Him & Us
description: For the fourth year in a row, Jungsoo failed his college entrance exams. Shunned by family and friends as a failure in life, his one remaining joy is the pretty girl at cram school. But when a new hottie takes the seat next to him, Jungsoo can’t help but take notice —he’s fallen for a guy! Why can’t he stop gawking at this handsome boy? Will Jungsoo be able to concentrate and get into college this time?   (Source: TappyToon)

title: The Spy Life in the Demonic Sect
description: Iseo Jang, the Murim Alliance’s prodigy spy, has spent 14 years deep undercover in the Demon Sect, earning the ruthless title of “Rabid Dog” for his work as their counterintelligence agent. But his newest mission is his most absurd yet: make the Sect’s laziest, most notorious delinquent -- Wu Ma -- the next Cheonma. To pull it off, Iseo ditches his post and applies to be Wu Ma’s official aide. In a world of betrayal, martial arts, and political games, can even a talent like Iseo turn a hopeless young master into an heir?  (Source: WEBTOON)

title: Social Media: NSFW Account
description: “Send me a DM at lunch. Pick the most secluded spot you know.”   Jeong-Han was enjoying his peaceful life as a high school teacher until he and the new student teacher, Chae-Rin, came to share their dirty secrets  (Source: DAYcomics)

title: The Dangerous Convenience Store: Eui-joon's Dream
Loelline Seizes the Future
description: One day, a near-death experience causes Loelline Deaz to remember her past life, awakening the power to see the future through her dreams. However, there is one vision in particular that weighs on her the most-- she foresees the murder of the empire’s hero, Duke Dante Van Benerit! Loelline is the only one who can save the duke, but as she gets closer to uncovering the conspiracy behind his demise, she realizes that her past may have more to do with the grim future than she could’ve ever dreamed…   (Source: Tapas)

title: 10th Dimension Boys
description: Short stories of boys in 10th dimensions.  (Source: WEBTOONS)

title: I Adopted the Male Lead from the Shelter
description: In a universe ripped from the pages of a story, Siena Robert, a self-aware villainess, strives to rewrite her fate. Daughter of a man running a therianthrope shelter, she discovers Ivan Levdilin, the captivating male lead, detained within. Aware of her scripted demise when Ivan's father arrives for his rescue, Siena defies her villainous destiny. She showers Ivan with kindness, a stark contrast to the original Siena's cruel persona. Her actions shield Ivan from her father's cruelty and forge an unscripted bond between them that changes their destiny in an unforeseen direction.    (Source: Tappytoon)

title: Jeonyaje
description: The story of 2 high school students and their growth as they have a hard time around immature adults.    Yoon Jungwon, the model student and class president, seems to be hiding a secret, and Kwak Gilsung, a rising Taekwondo player stuck in his rebellious phase. Why are these two drawn toward each other?    The tearful growth of two people exploring their youth!    (Source: BOMTOON, translated)

title: Mint Candy Love
description: At first glance, Yeong-Han seems like an ideal boyfriend, with stellar grades and good looks, but he’s actually infamous for his awful temper. On the other hand, Yae-Joon is mild-mannered and polite, and he loathes people like Yeong-Han. Unfortunately, they have to act as a couple for a college course that assigns pairs to recreate a dating relationship. Yeong-Han is displeased, and Yae-Joon even more so. As the two clash and bicker, they slowly wear down each other’s walls to discover their more vulnerable sides. Will this pretend relationship eventually turn into something more genuine?  (Source: Tappytoon)

title: Every Moment, It Was You
description: They thought they were inseparable. A terrible tragedy kept them apart. Forever? Unhappiness always strikes when you least expect it. And when it leaves a gaping void in the heart, how can we continue to live as if nothing had happened?   (Source: Pocket Comics)

title: Life, Once Again
description: Han Maru, an ordinary husband and father, dies tragically in an accident but is granted a second chance at life. With only vague memories of the past, he relives his high school days and rediscovers his passion for theater, a dream he once sacrificed. However, longing to find his wife and daughter again in this life, he fears choosing theater might steer him away from them. Juggling dreams and family, he navigates life's intricate choices, seeking fulfillment in this extraordinary second chance.  (Source: Tapas)

title: The Duke's Fake Sister
description: Fitting in with your family has never been harder.    To escape her brothel, Grizz Benedict is offered a fake identity as the Virenhague family's daughter. Her new "brother" showers her with gifts, and soon he attempts to give himself to her entirely. Despite feeling that this will all end in disaster, Grizz wonders if she ought to just accept it...    (Source: Manta)

title: HAPPY Twogether
description: Four years ago, the idol group Dream Boy disbanded after being embroiled in some kind of scandal. And now... Jae-Young, formerly known as "Happy" in Dream Boy, was struggling financially and working a part-time delivery job when he heard that the group's leader, Su-Kyum, had passed out drunk at a club, and he rushed to him. Although they share the same stage name, Seung-Min, aka "Happy" and the most popular rapper and producer these days, saves Jae-Young from collapsing from photosensitivity syndrome and suggests they work together...   "You know who I am, right? Let's work together."  (Source: Ridibooks, translated)

title: Life Reboot for a Gaming Addict
description: After six years, gaming nerd Lee Jinho finally finishes Reset Life, a brutal mobile game where you have to clear 99 different lives. Just as the thrill of victory fades and emptiness takes hold, a sudden message reveals the game has merged with reality. The true 100th round begins, marking the start of his real reset life. Now, armed with his knowledge from the game, Jinho sets out to reclaim all the skills he once mastered, living as a model, actor, chef, and more in his ultimate new life!  (Source: Tapas)

title: Never Too Late
description: There's a new student at my university who's always surrounded by guys... the only problem is, that's my mom!!  (Source: Toomics)

title: Builder
genres: Action, Comedy, Drama, Romance, Sci-Fi, Supernatural
description: Close to our future, humans have made a new way to dream whatever they desire. Those who seeks to become gods in this dream world are called "Builders". Why does she want to become a Builder?   Includes chapter 0.

title: Check In to My Heart
description: My boss wasn't supposed to fall for me!    Ajin, the newest intern at the ritzy HU Hotel, seems to have it all: looks, intelligence, and money. But when Seolmin, the CEO, discovers that she's living in the basement of his hotel, Ajin desperately makes a deal with him to avoid getting kicked out. But this deal might change her life forever!   (Source: Manta)   Note: Chapter count includes a prologue.

title: Wait, I'm a Married Woman!
description: Saeyeon was like a second mother to Wonhee. She took care of him since infancy, but now... Wonhee is a full grown man.  (Source: Toomics)

title: Lust and Found
description:
Seok-Jun only wanted one thing: peace and quiet. Tormented night after night by the nonstop sexcapades of his new neighbor, Ye-Chan, he reaches a breaking point and prays for the man’s “precious equipment” to disappear. The next morning, the moans are gone...and so is Ye-Chan’s manhood. Shocked by the eerie coincidence, Seok-Jun feels guilty enough to try to help…but Ye-Chan seems more interested in using him as a solution than finding one. What begins as a bizarre curse quickly spirals into a chaotic, heated romance between the man who wished it away and the man desperate to get it back.
(Source: Lezhin US)

title: The Perfect Contract
description: Jun-Won, a perfect man, and Ju-I, a woman who knows her abilities and charms, strike an unusual deal: they will date with one strict condition—no falling in love. What starts as a simple arrangement soon becomes complicated as unexpected feelings begin to surface. Can they stick to their promise, or will emotions get the better of them? Dive into a world where love is both the goal and the enemy, and find out if their hearts will follow the rules or break free.   (Source: WEBTOON)   Note: Includes nine extra chapters.

title: Before the Real Heroine Steps In
description: Once bitten, twice shy. That is Anastasia's motto when she awakes with a second chance in life as the Empress in her favorite novel. After realizing that even true love cannot change destiny, Anastasia attempts to help her husband, the Emperor, find his happy ending with the female protagonist--the true heroine of the story. However, it seems that the Emperor has other thoughts. She pushes him away so they can both live, but the Emperor is unsure if he wants to live without his queen.    (Source: Pocket Comics)

title: Fake Romance
description:
“Do you want to sleep with me?”

Baek Kwon-Young doesn’t like Nam Ju-Ha, no, not at all! But desperate times come for desperate measures especially when Kwon-young’s father announces that he wants Ju-Ha to become part of the Baek family. If Ju-Ha says yes to that proposal, that means Juha’ll basically inherit Ilbi Group, the Baek family’s conglomerate. Kwon-Young has to do anything to stop this from happening. Will Kwon-Young’s fake romance be successful? What will Ju-Ha become? The stepson or the sex partner? (Source: Lezhin US) Note: Includes six extra chapters.

title: The Emperor Thinks I'm Dying
description: As his strongest knight, Lindelle helped the emperor ascend the throne. But at his coronation, she coughs up blood–a side effect of her contract with the dragon Laroque, who promised to grant Lindelle any wish if she can find the dragon’s real body. Meanwhile, Laroque’s magic is destroying Lindelle’s body, and the only way to heal is to fulfill the contract. But the emperor’s word is law–and he says Lindelle can’t leave until he finds a cure!    (Source: Tapas)   Note: Includes one extra chapter.

title: The Knight Becomes a Black Flower
description: Diana Lesley, a renowned knight of the Agripana Kingdom, is killed by her rival Cornelius Heimann in the war against the Heverunia Empire. However, when she wakes up, she finds herself at 10 years old and decides to pursue the life of a proper lady instead of a knight—much to her family's disapproval. After becoming Princess Juliana's lady-in-waiting, she must contend with conniving noblewomen, the threat of oncoming war, and the affections of Cornelius who, in this life, dreams about her past life and falls for her. Can she keep her loved ones safe and live in peace?  (Source: WEBTOONS)

title: Gingerly in Love
genres: Drama, Romance, Slice of Life, Supernatural
description: Do you know the history of millennial ginseng? According to legend, this plant with magical virtues could be reincarnated as a human by reaching the age of 1000 years. But she is a girl-plant, not easy to get used to the unpredictable daily life of men ... While she thought she had found her place, here she is accused ... of murder ?!

title: The Taming
description: As the son of the fallen House Anatold, Michel's only duty is to help his family's social standing by marrying the prominent Duke Shelleg of the north. However, upon his arrival, he is met with the servant Ain, who is acting as the duke's stand-in to teach Michel what it means to be a northern husband. To his surprise, his most important duties take place in the bedroom! Michel is determined to be a proper partner, but what will he do when his newfound feelings for Ain start to get in the way?  (Source: Tapas)

title: Homestay
description: After going to live at his childhood friend's house to attend college in the city, he sees her doing something naughty. "It's not fair if only you saw, I should see something of yours too". Soon their relationship gets a lot closer than expected...     (Source: TOPTOON+)

title: As Leticia Wishes
description:
Stella, the beloved princess of Tyrien, was imprisoned all her life before being used in an eerie sacrifice. After her consciousness fades away, she wakes up to find herself hatching from an egg as a child! Despite her initial bewilderment, Stella quickly adapts to her new life as "Leticia" and becomes attached to Beth, a kind professor who may hold the key to finding out who and what she is. But does Leticia have what it takes to uncover the secrets behind both her lives?

(Source: Tapas)

title: Romantic Graffiti
description: There’s nothing more shocking than your crush turning into a meaningless doodle you scribbled in class. That’s what happened to normal college student Do-Yun Lee, who has feelings for his handsome roommate Ji-Won Woo. One day, Do-yun confesses to Ji-Won, who doesn’t exactly respond the way Do-Yun had hoped he would. The heartbroken Do-yun draws an “ugly” version of Ji-Won, and when he gets home, he’s stunned to find Ji-Won looks exactly like his drawing. To end the unexpected curse, the two will have to face chaotic obstacles - and their undeniable attraction to each other.    (Source: WEBTOON, edited)    Note: Includes 15 extra chapters.

title: Love Song for Illusion
description: Wol Yeon of the great Yeon clan in the Kingdom of Asatae is a spirited girl who dreams of becoming a general one day. Her dreams are crushed when the royal government mercilessly eradicates her clan, murdering everyone, including Wol’s parents. Wol is left with no one she can trust but her tutor Jae-i, who proceeds to raise and train her as a master assassin so that she may take revenge against the king. Eight years later, Wol successfully infiltrates the palace to kill the king, only to find that all is not as it seems…    (Source: WEBTOONS)

title: Our Complications
description: Mike gets a headache and sees a girl every single time he's with his girlfriend. Will he be able to find the cure for it?  (Source: Toomics)

title: Dawn of the God of War
description: Yu Geon is just a normal teenager, were it not for the fact that he's dying from a disease that gives him excruciating pain but also blesses him with supernatural strength. And despite his best efforts to focus on his illness and avoid the troublesome criminals and delinquents at his school, he has no choice but to intervene when their schemes cause a classmate to get kidnapped. Sick of their behavior, Geon decides to put an end to their crimes... even if it's the last thing he ever does.    (Source: Tapas, edited)

title: To Melt Your Frozen Heart
description: With his entire family either gone or missing, Adrian DeMonte must take the helm as the sole heir to the wealthy Velkra estate. By official decree of the emperor, Adrian is to choose a noblewoman for her hand in marriage. Adrian chooses the infamously ruthless Marchioness Frey Vuxia, known as the “Wolf of the Battlefield,” in hopes that she will reject his proposal. But to his surprise, she accepts! Now, Adrian must navigate not only the desolate corridors of the marchioness’s castle but also her savagely frigid heart. Unfortunately, the cunning emperor has held a lifelong flame for Lady Vuxia, and he will do anything to trap her once and for all, even if that means getting rid of Adrian. Will Adrian be able to win over the icy marchioness while avoiding the emperor’s clutches?    (Source:  Tappytoon)

title: Ctrl + Z
description: What if you had the power to erase people's memories? Would you use it to help those in need? Or would you use it to become the most powerful person in the world? For Kyle, this newfound power was going to change his life... for better or for worse.    (Source: WEBTOONS)

title: Common Sense Modifier
description: "I like you! Have sex with me!"   Seon-Ung, a new hire at a large company, has come across a program that changes what constitutes common sense for the people around him. He decides to use his newfound skill to teach his team leader a lesson for giving him a hard time over the past 4 years.  (Source: DAYcomics, edited)

title: Sister-in-law
description: I never asked for a sister-in-law. My mind is saying no, but my body just can't resist!    (Source: Toomics)

title: Are You Just Going To Watch?
description: Sung-Jae, a young university professor, can only find peace in the staff bathroom. One day he hears moaning coming from the stall next to him, and sees his beautiful student doing it through a hole...     "Don't just watch... Come in"    (Source: TOPTOON+)

title: Dawn of the God of War
description: Yu Geon is just a normal teenager, were it not for the fact that he's dying from a disease that gives him excruciating pain but also blesses him with supernatural strength. And despite his best efforts to focus on his illness and avoid the troublesome criminals and delinquents at his school, he has no choice but to intervene when their schemes cause a classmate to get kidnapped. Sick of their behavior, Geon decides to put an end to their crimes... even if it's the last thing he ever does.    (Source: Tapas, edited)

title: Love Song for Illusion
description: Wol Yeon of the great Yeon clan in the Kingdom of Asatae is a spirited girl who dreams of becoming a general one day. Her dreams are crushed when the royal government mercilessly eradicates her clan, murdering everyone, including Wol’s parents. Wol is left with no one she can trust but her tutor Jae-i, who proceeds to raise and train her as a master assassin so that she may take revenge against the king. Eight years later, Wol successfully infiltrates the palace to kill the king, only to find that all is not as it seems…    (Source: WEBTOONS)

title: Corner Shop
description: Dong-Jun has always loved Na-Yeon, who owns a small corner store. She never thought of him as anything but a very close friend. One day, she learns of his amazing hand skills, and asks him for a massage. The pleasure she feels will change how she views him forever…  (Source: TOPTOON+)

title: Virus
description: In order to live, you have to sleep with that man...!? The only treatment for the deadly virus is Yeon-joon Park, your body...!!    (Source: Bomtoon, translated)

title: Glorious Return
description: "He slept with his next door neighbor's wife whenever he went away on a business trip"   A small town near Seoul that our family used to live in was a welcoming place. At least that's what I thought until the people of the town revealed their true faces. Our family was driven out of town due to their devious planning, but now that I've gained power, I will make my glorious return.  (Source: DAYcomics)

title: Falling for Danger
description: I could kill you if I wanted.    Hale Windsor was a renowned hitman until he is betrayed and loses the love of his life. With nothing left to live for, he begins a war of revenge on the very organization he used to work for. That is, until he meets Marine, a girl who brings color back into his black and white existence.    (Source: Manta)

title: Looking for My One-Night Villainess
description: Time travel is the bread and butter of romance fantasy novels, but the reader who wakes up as Liberata has had enough after the first 19 times. Sure, she's the villainess of "The Highs and Lows of Leonie's Life," but she keeps getting killed even when she's not trying to be evil! Not expecting anything to change in her 20th life, Liberata gets blackout drunk at a party... only to wake up next to the novel's male lead, Archduke Gerlach Cygnus! And the more Gerlach falls for Liberata after their one-night stand, the more the world around them starts falling apart...    (Source: Tappytoon)

title: My Calypso
description: In the middle of a scuba diving trip in the sea around Malta, Hyun-Min finds himself kidnapped to the mythical island Ogygia, where the Greek goddess Calypso is known to reside. Except...Calypso turns out to be a god, not a goddess. Not that Hyun-Min cares. He’s going to escape this place and go back to the human realm! Or, well, that’s what he plans to do. But does he really want to leave this island and Calypso behind? Little by little, the two of them find themselves drawn to each other. Can there be a happy ending for a god and a human? Or is this all destined to end in tragedy?  (Source: Lezhin)

title: Fake Humans
description: Having escaped her abusive mother, twenty-year-old Ji-a lives a modest life with her little sister, Su-a. When Su-a does not return from her field trip under sinister circumstances, Ji-a vows to do anything she can to get her sister back. As she and her high school friend Wonseung delve further into the mystery, they find that there might be a larger conspiracy under the surface -- a tangled web that includes a cult, a mystery, and powerful figures that might shake South Korea to its core.    (Source: WEBTOONS)

title: Teach Me How to Desire
description: In a war against demons for the fate of the world, even three chances at life may not suffice. Such is the fate of Lady Sacred Beryl, a divine maiden tasked with rooting out demonic corruption, only to be murdered and travel back in time -- twice. Upon her third attempt, Beryl realizes the truth: Her only hope to purify the realm is to face the fearsome House Vine, a lair of demons in mortal guise. Can Beryl survive in the domain of Duke Beleth von Vine, or will she find nothing but death and damnation once more?  (Source: WEBTOON)

title: Do It For Me
description: "Do it for me!"   So-In Han, a gloomy and awkward virgin, suddenly finds himself back in his college days. But now he's got one outrageous new power: the moment he pleads for it, no woman can say no. Surrounded by gorgeous women, his long-buried desires start to boil over, and nothing's stopping him from indulging every last one.  (Source: DAYcomics, edited)

title: Chwisabyeong Jeonseori Doeda
description: Korean scrapper representative, Kang Sung-Jae. He has an opportunity to become a legendary cook!  (Source: Naver, translated)

title: Look a Picture
description: Jisoo, who dreamed of becoming a fairy tale illustrator since she was young, dropped out to achieve her dream and went to her grandmother's house, where she meets Dowon.   Dowon, who was worried about not having a dream, is interested in Jisoo who is trying hard to achieve her dream.   "The farther you try to catch, the farther away you feel. When will the day you reach your dream come?"

title: Project Utopia
description: 12 men and 12 women are kidnapped and left on a remote island, where no laws exist. If they survive on this island for 10 months, they win $500,000. This is the story where true human nature is revealed. Welcome to project Utopia.    (Source: Toomics)

title: How To Diet As A Lady
description: Whether it's going on a diet or navigating high society, Yoonah never thought she'd have to worry about either... before waking up in the Brighton Empire as Lady Eleanor. Not only is "Eleanor" clueless when it comes to things like etiquette, but she also has to deal with snobby socialites who constantly ridicule her figure. Fortunately, the talented captain of the imperial knights and the most elegant lady in town agree to help her on her journey to health and grace. But is Eleanor prepared for the horror of eating salads 24/7 while minding all her table manners?    (Source: Tappytoon)

title: Ireon Ending
description: Separated from my lover for 10 years. His phone was piercing me, digging the ground ?! But why does he suddenly look younger ....?    (Source: Random Fujoshis)    Chapter count includes three extras

title: Anemone Theater
description: Seoul in the 1980s is an exciting place to be…that is, unless you’re Seong-Ho. His pushy father expects him to do nothing but study, so day in and out Seong-Ho buries himself in his books, oblivious to all the exciting new things happening in town. There’s one thing that’s been distracting him, though: these unidentifiable migraines that just won’t go away, no matter how many meds Seong-Ho takes. One day, after a particularly painful headache, he finds himself kissing a stranger. Horrified and appalled by his transgression, Seong-Ho immediately tries to erase that unfortunate happening from his memory. That would be the end of that, but…what if kissing is the only way to get rid of his migraines?    (Source: Lezhin US, edited)    Note: The chapter count includes 2 side stories.

title: Hanabakke An Boyeo!
description: Yoon Hana finds out that her family is moving out just before the high school entrance ceremony. At first she as worried about transferring to a new school, but her bright personality prevents her from being depressed for too long. However, the first day at the new school doesn't go quiet well how she would imagine. She quickly encounters trouble with her intimidating desk mate, Lee Chang-wook! But soon Hana starts to learn that there's more to Chang-wook than meets the eye. This is the story of the sunny Hana's project to help the gloomy Chang-wook make friends!

title: Trapped in a Circle
description: No-eul is searching for the traitor in his organization, but finds only Gang-jin, a man who claims to just be a regular old vagrant. Intrigued by Gang-jin's cool demeanor even in the face of his threats, No-eul decides to keep him locked up for the time being. But there has to be more to Gang-jin than he is letting on... In the end, what secrets is he harboring and what are No-eul's true intentions?    (Source: Lezhin US)

title: Please Be My First Boyfriend!
description: Baek Yu-Jun seems to have it all: wealth, status, and even good looks. Unfortunately, the one thing he truly desires but can’t have is a boyfriend. Having grown up under a strict grandfather, Yu-Jun was never allowed to honestly express his interests, and this included his sexuality. Even as an adult free from his rigid household, Yu-Jun only gets his romantic fix through television dramas. But soon, he’s thrown into a dramatic love affair of his own upon meeting Han Hui-Won. Things aren’t exactly sunshine and rainbows off the bat though. Not only does Yu-Jun make all the wrong moves to win his crush’s heart, but Hui-Won has met all the wrong guys and is now sick of dating altogether. Will these two be able to overcome their shaky start and achieve their happily ever after?  (Source: Tappytoon)

title: Hotel Ojakgyo
description: The Chilseok festival is coming soon and there will be a gathering at the Hotel Ojakgyo to celebrate the event. However, in reality, the event is actually for alphas and omegas to come together to have an orgy! Im I-Jun is a rare, high-quality omega. Omegas of his stature are desired by many. Even so, Im I-Jun has always liked his close friend, Kang Do-Hun, who is an alpha. However, Si-Hun, another alpha, has his eyes set on Im I-Jun. What is to happen when the day of the festival finally comes?

title: Punggeom
description: The world is riddled with beasts and demons, however little do people know that a magical barrier is currently sealing away high-level demons. There are those who wish to break the barrier and bring about the end of the world, and those who wish to protect it and its inhabitants. A great battle with heroes, villains, demons and magic is about to begin and will determine the fate of the world.

title: Eorinimo
description: Lee Min-Hyeok used to be a national Taekwondo fighter. However, he retired after suffering an injury. On a particular day, a young girl, named Na-Rae, appears in front of him. Compared to her younger self, she has transformed into a grown woman and happens to dorm with Min-Hyeok. However, on the first dorm night, he was caught having sex by the auntie, and…  (Source: TOPTOON, translated)

title: The Waiting
description: The Waiting is the fictional story of Gwija, told by her novelist daughter Jina. When Gwija was 17 years old, after hearing that the Japanese were seizing unmarried girls, her family married her in a hurry to a man she didn't know. Japan fell, Korea gained its independence, and the couple started a family. But peace didn’t come. The young family—now four—fled south. On the road, while breastfeeding and changing her daughter, Gwija was separated from her husband and son.    Then 70 years passed. Seventy years of waiting. Gwija is now an elderly woman and Jina can’t stop thinking about the promise she made to help find her brother.    (Source: Drawn & Quarterly)

title: My Little Bookstore
description: Do you have a dream you’ve given up on? Was it because you hit a wall? Was it because you’ve come to terms with reality? Or have you never given up? Fresh out of university, Jua starts freelancing for a tv show as a newbie writer. After her first tv show gets canned, she finds a strange bookstore and is reminded of her dream as a writer. Will she resume pursuing her dream? Or is her dream too far-fetched…   (Source: WEBTOONS)

title: Cucumber Market
description: Washing dishes were a pain so he decided to make someone else do it. But he didn't expect a beautiful woman to show up! It started with dishwashing, but he also had other chores in mind.  (Source: DAYcomics)

title: To Each His Own
description: Sang-Nam lives by one unshakable dating philosophy: “before you commit to it, you must hit it.” If the chemistry isn’t right, he won’t even consider a relationship. The problem is, finding someone who actually meets his standards is harder than it sounds. That’s when he notices Da-Ol, a potential hottie with a not-so-sexy body. Sang-Nam casually suggests that he might consider dating Da-Ol if he can “fix” him to suit his tastes, and a nervous but determined Da-Ol agrees. What Sang-Nam doesn’t know is that Da-Ol has a secret preference of his own…and one he definitely hasn’t told anyone yet.   (Source: Lezhin US)

title: Stigmata
description: Stigmata—bodily scars that appear on the same places where Christ was wounded. Rescued from his old village that underwent a terrible massacre of the residents, Sion suffers from memory loss. It seems Sion's troubles have come to an end now, with him living his days out peacefully as an apprentice priest. But things take another turn when he's accused wrongly of taking something from "the Holy King" Siennas Del Mayee, and dies a gruesome death...only to be reborn in the body of the king himself. Now Sion must navigate his way through living as royalty with only Pavel at his side, the very handsome but rather untrustworthy high priest...    (Source: Lezhin US)

title: Agnyeoneun Deulleorireul Huimanghabnida
description: Why do they keep killing him off? What did he ever do wrong?    A fan of the otome dating game <Arlandast Saga> finds that her ultimate bias, Rumins, ends up dead in every route but one.    After completing all routes of the game, a mysterious voice asks for her wish. Furious and choked up, she shouts to save her ultimate bias and to give him a happy life.    <Your wish has been received.>    Waking up as Senepin, the villianess who harrasses the main character, she enjoys her dream where she could talk to Rumins, alive and well.    That is, until, ‘Senepin’ realizes that her new self was not a dream.    Senepin remembers that the only time Rumins survived his damned endings was when he ended up together with the female lead, Belkina. Realizing this, she makes it her utmost priority to get Rumins and Belkina together.    But for some reason, Rumins seems more interested in Senepin than the original female lead. Will ‘Senepin’ be able to save Rumins?

title: Insatiable Lust
description: Taking orders from his boss, Namsoo goes to Baek-ho’s Gang in order to take care of some business. But little did he know that Baek-ho’s Gang’s namesake and leader would take a particular liking to Namsoo and capture him all for his own. Now Namsoo just desperately wants to escape but how will he break free from this insatiable lust…?    (Soure: Lezhin)

title: Beast 9
genres: Action, Comedy, Ecchi, Mecha, Romance, Sci-Fi
description: Eraser, the mysterious enemy that invaded Earth 13 years ago!! Before their overwhelming power, the entire Earth neared the verge of collapse. But at the last moment there suddenly appeared Earth's lone savior, The Beast: an ultimate weapon uniquely equipped to counter the Eraser's power!! The Beast is part of the MAGIC Brigade, whose commander-in-chief is also the founder of our Le Prince Academy... Ladies and gentlemen, I present to you, Mr. Vincent!   (Source: A-Team)

title: Paladin
description: The country of Greenland, after losing the war to the Imperial Army, were in agony and despair for what will the future bring them. They had hired mercenaries to help them during the war and now they’ve come back to collect their reward while the country were still picking up their pieces of their broken dreams. By that time, the King has passed away and his heir was still too young to take up on the throne. After hearing the news of the King’s death the mercenaries decided to take over the throne and rule in his place. But there was an obstacle in their way... The Oracle!

title: Uniform Wanjeonjeongbok
description: A collection of arcs 4 to 5 chapters long where each arc features a man and his humorous sexual encounters with various women in uniform. There is a police officer, an airline hostess, a fire fighter, a nurse, etc.

title: Ventham
description: The dark side of the psychopath and the "Holy" Father's intertwined story.  See how things aren't the way they seem.  (Source: Toomics, translated)

title: Killing Mr. Park
description: "Let's kill your husband... so you can come live with me."   (Source: Manta)

title: Do You Need Salvation?
description: Terminally ill Miena Sidus has the ability to enter other people's dreams. Knowing her time will be up soon, Miena decides to use her power to gather money for her loving parents as a last gesture of gratitude. But as she navigates the dreams, she finds herself involved with a mysterious boy, a young lord, and a great dragon. Moreover, they all seem to need her help and are intent on saving her as well. Will these new relationships change Miena's fate and give her a ray of hope in life?  (Source: Tapas)

title: I Don't Want to Be a Lady
description: I'll be the one calling the shots.  After enduring an upbringing full of torment, Lady Arianne refuses to be used as a means to anyone's end but her own. When her father moves to have her sold off as an additional mistress to the crown prince, she takes matters into her own hands by proposing a contract marriage with a duke instead!    (Source: Manta)

title: How Far Is Too Far?
description: After a painful breakup with her first love, Eunpyeong returns to campus still haunted by the past and burdened by a secret fantasy she’s afraid to reveal. When Nyeok, a younger guy, discovers her secret by chance, he responds with unexpected acceptance. Their bond deepens, but complications arise when another girl enters the picture, and Eunpyeong learns Nyeok has been denying their relationship. What will become of their romance, trust, and life on campus?  (Source: WEBTOON)

title: Sunday's Solace
description: Office worker Jeong Ra-Won has a humble dream: to make it through the workweek and enjoy his days off in peace. Unfortunately, he is just one drunk younger brother away from having his desires utterly crushed. After picking up his wasted sibling at a gay bar, he runs into his company boss, Hyeon Je-O, who soon takes an interest in Ra-Won despite his claims of not being gay himself. As if Je-O’s display of workplace harassment isn’t bad enough, Ra-Won is forced to go off on a long business trip with him to Jeju Island, which requires him to give up his precious weekends! Will Ra-Won’s once peaceful Sundays ever be recovered?    (Source: Tappytoon)

title: Wavering Worlds
description: Eunsae is an ordinary student who happens to meet her alternate self in her dream one day. Eun-i and Sae-i are both Eunsae, just from parallel universes! After a year of regularly meeting up in their dreams, Eun-i makes a tempting offer: to switch places and jump into each other's universes for a week. Sae-i, having been envious of Eun-i's perfect life, decides to accept the offer. However, Eun-i is nowhere to be seen when the promised week is over. Will Sae-i be able to keep pretending that she’s Eun-i until she can return to her own world?     (Source: WEBTOON)

title: The Fox's Love Refresher
description: Flynn is an upbeat fox selling homemade beverages to make money. While he’s looked down upon as a petty vendor from a cunning species, Flynn is determined to live an honest life while searching for his long-lost brother. However, when he catches the eye of the wealthy dragon Hugo, Flynn finds himself forced to become a pawn in a game of political chess where his brother’s life is on the line. Now, Flynn must give up his honest life and trick Hugo into a sweet trap… But can he really outfox the skeptical dragon?    (Source: Tappytoon)

title: Sajangnimeun Iutsachon
description: A third-rate manhwa author and the President of a large corporation head into a rather unsightly cohabitation work environment that's filled with fighting spirit!

title: Gone with the Bubbles
description: As an unexpected descendant of a cursed family of mermaids, Eun-Woo's only hope of survival is to never fall in love. For years this was easy enough, until one day he's forced to confront his childhood friend and first kiss, Tae-Ho. But why has he come back, toying with Eun-Woo's heart? Can Eun-Woo resist Tae-Ho's pull or will he succumb to his hidden feelings, and ultimately, disaster?    (Source: Tappytoon)     Note: Includes eight extras.

title: Flirting 9 to 6
description: When country bumpkin Kang Bong-Soo lands a new office job in the big city, he falls in love at first sight with Yoo Ji-Won, the refined and sophisticated deputy manager in a neighboring department. After initially resigning to silently pine for Ji-Won, Bong-Soo unwittingly spots him making out with a man at a gay club and decides to confess his true feelings. When Bong-Soo’s plans to form an emotional connection go awry as Ji-Won responds with a naughty proposition, the innocent and naïve Bongsoo is caught completely off guard. How will Bong-Soo handle the sudden onset of sexy workplace flirting?    (Source: Lezhin US)    Note: Chapter count includes a prologue and 22 side stories.

title: The Vampire's Sons
description: Years ago, vampire Im Su-I immersed herself in the human world and found true love that quenched her thirst for blood. Fast forward to the present, she is now the mother of three very handsome boys; the reliable oldest, Seung-Hyeon, the playboy CEO, Yu-Seong, and the trouble-maker youngest, Hyeo-Seong. Although they are half-human, they still have some vampire traits that are hard to shake off. Will these boys be able to find happiness amongst the humans, as their mother did?    (Source: Tapas, edited)

title: Smile Brush
description: With simplistic drawing and short dialog, the protagonist and the writer of the story Waroo succeeds in evoking the beauty and the slice of everyday life through gentle humor and sensibility. Even though there is no overreaction, the last lines of the comic that wrap up the event with wit and charm are especially memorable.

title: The Raider
description: In a world where humans and monsters are indistinguishable, the “True Raider” emerges! After the appearance of monsters that tear humans apart, society has divided into two parts, “Raiders” and “Non-Raiders”. 24-year-old Lee Se-Min, unable to become a Raider no matter how hard he tries, confines himself to a small room. One day, he stumbles upon a strange website. ｢ Welcome, new member. To Transcendental Network. A community connecting transcendent beings across dimensions.｣ They reveal to him the true world of martial prowess. Amidst the chaos where humans and monsters are indistinguishable, the “True Raider” is about to make their entrance!   “Bring it on, you bastards.”  (Source: KakaoPage, translated)   Note: Chapter count includes a prologue.

title: Serenity Film
description: Brow, a photographer, has a wonderful breath of fresh air come into his life.

title: Sonyeo Sinseon
description: The repeat test-taker Ha Beo-Deul becomes a shaman and meets the foul tempered lesser dragon, Gwangcheoli.

title: Bitter Sweetheart
description: Gye Yeo-wool has it all. Not only does she get to travel the world to write about it, but she can always count on returning home to her loving boyfriend of 12 years, Park Haesoo. But every couple has their problems, and Yeo-wool’s growing frustrated with being constantly diminished as the less-talented girlfriend of a famous Sci-fi novelist. Not willing to give up, Yeo-wool decides to take a casting offer for a TV show in the hopes of advancing her writing career and proving that she’s more than “Haesoo’s sweetheart.” But she didn’t expect change to come in the form of her fellow cast member, model Kang Woo. Kang Woo is charismatic, handsome, and something she’s never experienced before. Will his presence give her the bitter bite she needs in her sickly sweet life?    (Source: Lezhin US)

title: Prince Bari
description: Known as the "Prince Among Shamans," Yohan is famous for his supernatural second sight. But in reality, he uses social media to collect info on his clients as his personal spirit, Donga, is too lazy to help! One day, the CEO of a successful IT venture firm visits Yohan's shop, trailed by a powerful spirit! An unlikely romance takes flight, as Yohan tries to help this CEO come to terms with his otherworldly friend.    (Source: Tappytoon)    Note: Chapter count includes 93 regular chapters, prologue and 12 side story extras The side stories are R19.

title: Crimson Heart
description: The Unknown, a magical land teeming with blue fireflies, and Refugia, a highly-controlled city completely walled off from magic. One day inquisitive girls from Refugia discover a mysterious old book and a red necklace in a library. Without knowing what is in their possession, they curiously follow the blue fireflies out of the city, crossing barriers that no one has ever crossed before. With the help of the legendary Crimson Heart and a mysterious message, "Break the curse of Blue Firefly Island," they venture deeper into the Unknown uncovering the secret of Refugia and the truth behind the blue fireflies. What lies ahead for the girls from Refugia? (Source: WEBTOON) Note: Includes one extra chapter.

title: Sonyeo Sinseon
description: The repeat test-taker Ha Beo-Deul becomes a shaman and meets the foul tempered lesser dragon, Gwangcheoli.

title: Cheos Sarang Ibnidaman
genres: Comedy, Drama, Romance, Slice of Life
description: Reunite with him in a nightmare. A secret romance to be revealed.

title: My Prince's Healing Touch
description: As the male lead's older sister, Edna Luschen Demirette is destined to die from the void virus, a dangerous disease with no cure. Fortunately, Edna discovers that the virus can be purified by touching Prince Carlen, a poor outcast with divine powers. But as simple as that sounds, Edna's plans to befriend him go awry when he mistakes her for an obsessive fan during their first meeting. Armed with nothing but her sharp wits, will Edna successfully persuade the cold prince and save herself?     (Source: Tapas)

title: Taming My Boss
genres: Comedy, Drama, Romance, Slice of Life
description:
Eun-hyeon is the promising young CEO of RedFit, a vastly successful gaming company. But while he’s got the looks and the status, he’s also a chronic workaholic with a mean mouth, and his employees are always busy avoiding him. His secretary, Ms. Han, is the only one who seems to be capable of dealing with his insensible remarks... But even she has her limits. Having had enough of his tyranny, she storms inside his office ready to quit - completely oblivious to the words that would soon come out of her irritable boss’ mouth.

(Source: Lezhin US)

Note: Includes one extra chapter.

title: Ma'am, It's on Sale
description: Jin-Hong, starts working in a supermarket and experiences strange things from his first day. He gets close to a beautiful girl named Jin-Kyung, and ends up going to her place...   "We need to be quiet not to wake the baby... But I can't stand it anymore!"  (Source: DAYcomics)    Note: Includes one extra chapter.

title: The Requiem for Wandering Souls
description: In the Kingdom of Silla, ghost stories begin to bleed into reality, spreading fear across the land. Seolyeong, a hwarang accused of causing the terrifying occurrences, is determined to solve this mystery and clear his name. That is when he meets Jaha, a former leader of the hwarang who now harbors demonic energy. What dark secret is Jaha hiding? Without an answer, Seolyeong continues his journey to lay every wandering spirit to rest, unaware that the soul most in need of his help is close by…  (Source: Tapas)

title: All I Want is My Dream Home
description: Isabel lived and died as a doormat. After waking up in the past, she gets to work on dumping her terrible boyfriend and escaping her abusive household. However, financial and legal limits stop her from gaining total independence on her own. There is one potential solution: a policy that provides housing for newlyweds! This means Isabel has to find a man to marry. Enter Sir Dylan, the perfect catch. For reasons unknown, he volunteers to become her fake husband, and they earn Ishael’s dream house. But can they turn it into a real home together?  (Source: Tappytoon)

title: My Dud to Stud Boyfriend
description: You just wait. I’ll find a boyfriend who’s WAY better than you! After being dumped by her hot ex-boyfriend of two years, Sia is on a mission to find the ultimate boyfriend to join her on her NewTube Channel. To her dismay, however, Minho, an overweight, nerdy otaku who gets bullied at school, asks her out. Should she accept him as her boyfriend? Can she succeed in transforming this dud into a superstud?   (Source: WEBTOONS)

title: Goedam Dongari
description: Lee Joon was an ordinary high school student.    During the entrance ceremony, he was caught up in a strange phenomenon and died.    [You have died.] [Restarting from checkpoint.] [Loading…]    But then, a message appeared before his eyes.    『Congratulations on your acceptance at Nakseong Highschool, the school of secrets and mysteries. Uncover the shady secrets hidden within the school, or fight against the legends and ghost stories of the campus in order to earn points to unlock special abilities. Additionally, you must gather comrades to prevent the resurrection of the Demon King before graduation. The world is in your hands.』  (Source: KakaoPage, translated)

title: The White Lion's Secret Bride
description: He is a dark beast worthy of his name who’ll do anything for money. This is what Isabella Barret is told about Lion Black, the man she must marry while in disguise as his actual fiancée, Violet Lancaster. As dangerous as this gamble is, if Isabella manages to fool Lion until their one-year marriage contract is over, she’ll be freed of yet another contract that has kept her shackled for the past five years. But to Isabella’s surprise, she isn’t the only one putting up a fake act in the relationship, as Lion’s heart might not be as cruel as his reputation suggests. And what’s more, the longer Isabella looks at him, the more she begins to see in him a precious old friend who presumably died years ago…    (Source: TappyToon)

title: The Outcast is a Fighter
description: Mu-Gyeol Cha, a high-school student, is consistently bullied by a group of delinquents at school. Elsewhere, Mu-Gyeol, a mixed martial artist, has been set up to be left paralyzed and meets his demise. Two different lives are at their ends, but somehow, they both end up living on in the same body. Will they succeed in finding justice, and climb their way back up to achieve their dreams?    (Source: WEBTOONS, edited)

title: Chemistry
description: Riddled with student loans and debt, Han Jungwoo is dead broke. When he loses all hope of finding a proper job, Jungwoo agrees to participate in a clinical trial and swallows AF-12, a pill that gives him knowledge about chemistry and the ability to see chemical particles. The company that made AF-12 even offers to hire him for a large sum of money... if he can keep his condition a secret. With this last chance to turn his life around, will Jungwoo accept the offer despite the challenges?  (Source: Tapas)

title: Civilian A
description: Ordinary civilian Howoo's day turns into a disaster movie when a giant monster ambushes his city. All he hopes for is a quick and painless death, so he's pleasantly surprised when he's whisked out of harm's way by celebrity esper Yool. When the charming esper moves in next door shortly after, Howoo feels like he's living in a romcom. Not only does Yool know Howoo's name, but he also shows an oddly friendly interest in him when he's just one of the many civilians he's saved. And for some reason, Howoo feels a tingling sensation whenever their hands touch...    (Source: Tappytoon)

title: Doll Song
description: Lee Woo-hee was kidnapped and found under a plum tree with a faint memory of a man telling her, "I promise you that until the day we meet again, you will be reborn." After that incident, her father became protective and would only allow her to go from the house to the plum tree she loved. However, she would be allowed to venture into the village on the day of the new moon. One such day she meets a exorcist that warns her of a man dressed in black. Will she take this warning to heart? Or is it already too late...?

title: The Waning Moon
description: After his father’s death, Raymond seeks to find out more about his father’s work with werewolves, much of which was completed in secrecy. So he enters the Central Laboratory and meets Kata, the werewolf his father discovered years ago. He is one of three werewolves in the entire world to have been discovered by science. But Kata is a special specimen... in order for the laboratory to get the most out of their research, all of Kata’s needs must be met – including his voracious sexual appetite. Life at the lab has a long history of mixing work with pleasure, and it isn’t long until the lives of everyone at the Central Laboratory becomes tangled up with one another.    (Source: Lezhin)

title: Blood Strangers
description: Here are the key components of our story: two unusually beautiful boys (known only as Big Master and Small Master), an abandoned church, a blood-buying business, and a homeless young girl named Han-Su – who has unwittingly contracted herself to participate in said business. Big Master wants Han-Su out of the church as soon as possible, but it turns out that each of these characters needs something from each other. Big Master needs customers for blood (and Han-Su's blood asap); Small Master needs a link to the human world, and any way to aggravate Big Master (read: Han-Su); and Han-Su needs to keep away from Big Master long enough to stay in the church until she can afford her own place. It seems the boys might have a lot of time on their hands, but how long does Han-Su have to figure out what she’s gotten herself into?    (Source: Lezhin, edited)

title: Dragon-ui Simjangeul Gajigo Itseumnida
description: Sharon is a warrior who defeated a vicious dragon a thousand years ago. One day, an unidentified man appears in front of Aru, who grew up longing for Sharon. "What? Are you that terrifying dragon? Besides, I'm that hero?!" A cute and sad romance fantasy of a dragon and a hero who reunited after a thousand years!    (Source: Naver, translated)

title: The Acting Empress Still Spends the First Night
description: Zelda von Trova never wanted the title of Acting Empress, but when she's forced to wed the Emperor of the Raphion Empire in place of the runaway princess, she has no choice. Yet after sharing the first night with him, her divorce plans begin to waver. As their attraction grows, Zelda’s heart is torn-- will she be able to walk away when the time comes, or will love unravel all her plans?  (Source: WEBTOONS)

title: No Rose Without Thorns
description: Up-and-coming idol group member Rose goes on a secret date with her boyfriend for her birthday, only to be kidnapped and demanded money for their freedom. Her abductors seem far from stable, and her boyfriend seems to be more invested in his own freedom than her safety. Now that she realizes that she is completely on her own, Rose must outsmart her captors and fight for her freedom.   (Source: WEBTOONS)

title: Codename: GHOST
description: In a world with supernatural abilities, those with powers can be registered as “special humans” and are assigned missions shrouded in mystery. Hoyeon, one such person, lives a seemingly ordinary life as a college student while keeping his powers a secret from those around him. When he begins a new job as a tutor at the Special Human Resource Administration, he meets Moonsung, an agent who just so happens to be taking his class. A simple teacher-student relationship, there’s nothing more to it - that is, until a single touch from Moonsung causes Hoyeon’s powers to spiral out of control. As their connection deepens, Moonsung soon realizes there’s more to his tutor than meets the eye…but will he be able to unravel the mystery of the connection between the two of them?   (Source: Lezhin US)

title: What Is Your Love Forecast
description: As the unfortunate red-hair baby, Tilias is saved at the brink of her death by the beautiful yet penniless Linden family. Reborn as a baby, she's unable to speak or express her gratitude to the Linden family, but that's when she discovers that she sees weather signs on top of people's heads! After countless experiments, she realizes that the weather signs depict people's love affairs. She uses her special ability to read other people's love affairs to her advantage and return the love she received.    (Source: POCKET COMICS)

title: Gobbling the Goblin
description: A most loutish goblin named Heuk-ran is the master of Goblin Mountain. He’s a powerful creature who enjoys tormenting humans as if they were his personal playthings. The people tried all that they could to appease him but even the great shaman couldn’t get through to him. But as he finds his next victim to satisfy his whims, will he finally be outfoxed by the clever little Yeon?  (Source: Lezhin US)   Note: Chapter count includes a prologue.

title: A Black Rose Blooms
description: Dirt needs to be dug up on the Crown Prince Laurent.   Zigrien, having been appointed to work under commander Sir Idris Klyne, has the perfect opportunity to get on the inside and bring to light any incriminating information. There’s just one issue: Idris Klyne is a bloodthirsty maniac and a lapdog of the crown prince. Getting caught snooping by Sir Idris could mean the end for Zigrien. But having access to the royal palace now, this is Zigrien’s perfect opportunity to satisfy his father’s objectives and thus avoid being sent off to do military duty in remote lands.
