But what was supposed to be standard eavesdropping turns into a shocking revelation. Now Zigrien is caught up in affairs he had never anticipated. Will love and lust wither or bloom in this wicked royal web that Laurent has ensnared him in?    (Source: Lezhin US)   Note: Chapter count includes two Christmas extras.

title: Problematic Student Patrol
description: When delinquent transfer student Ban Tae-Hyeon, rumored to be the brawler at the center of a schoolyard fight, walks into class, the strict and upright Kang Hyeon-Beom makes it his mission to keep him in check. Determined to reform Tae-Hyeon into a model student, Hyeon-Beom starts watching his every move… only to find himself slowly drawn into Tae-Hyeon’s orbit. As the line between discipline and friendship starts to blur, could Hyeon-Beom really be the one getting “reformed” instead?  (Source: Lezhin US)

title: Go Jin and Gam-rae
description: After only one day's performance in this new village, someone has destroyed Go Jin and his musical troupe's instruments. His search for the culprit leads him to Gam-rae, the Taoist master of the village. Endowed with supernatural gifts, suspicion often falls on him. But Go Jin soon finds that there is much more to this man than his gifts, as he becomes caught in the middle of Gam-rae's own supernatural battle.  (Source: Lezhin)

title: Hwayangyeonhwa
description: In her campus life, full of ups and downs, she may have a magnificent appearance, but in reality, she has the most timid personality.

title: Fantasia World
description: Youngjin joined a Role-playing Game so he could talk to his crush. Who would’ve thought that he’d be his crush’s in-game lover? How long would he keep up the pretense?

title: Zero at the Bone
description:
After witnessing a mob hit, surgeon Jack Francisco is put into protective custody to keep him safe until he can testify. A hitman known only as D is blackmailed into killing Jack, but when he tracks him down, his weary conscience won't allow him to murder an innocent man. Finding in each other an unlikely ally, Jack and D are soon on the run from shadowy enemies.
Forced to work together to survive, the two men forge a bond that ripens into unexpected passion. Jack sees the wounded soul beneath D's cold, detached exterior, and D finds in Jack the person who can help him reclaim the man he once was. As the day of Jack's testimony approaches, he and D find themselves not only fighting for their lives... but also fighting for their future. A future together. (Source: Dreamspinner Press)

title: Oppaya Nunaya
description: Brothers and sisters, don't fight because of us!

title: Bukbudaegongui Hamster
description: Note: This is a one shot prologue for the web novel of the same name.

title: Chetamja: The King’s Eyes
description: Become a Chetamja! Turn your rage into a weapon that defends the kingdom! When young Gwiyeong loses his family in a brutal Jurchen raid, he swears to hunt down every last one of them. His skill in battle soon catches the attention of King Sejong, who offers him a chance to join Chetamja—an elite force of secret agents serving as the king’s eyes and ears in the north. Now, alongside his comrades, Gwiyeong must carry the flame of vengeance and forge it into a blade of duty that will defend the kingdom of Joseon from the shadows.    (Source: WEBTOONS)

title: The Correlation Between Love and Heat
description: Ji Gwi, a lad who became a heated ghost after loving Queen Sun Duk one-sidedly. Eun Chong, a descendant of Ji Gwi, found that by touching the Hong Kong exchange student Hae Bum, his body temperature lowers. So seeking help -"If the type of touching changes the body temperature, shouldn't we progress this further?" Due to the very forward Hae Bum, Eun Chong's life becomes shaken.    Chapter count includes a prologue,14 side story chapters and one short special chapter within the final authors note.

title: Sex Complex - Body Complex CG Toon
description: A sexy new spin-off of Body Complex!! Enjoy this steamy compilation of the mature scenes from the original series, now made even more intimate. Jae-Hyun is a piano prodigy picked up by Kang Min-Woo, a world-renowned classical music professor. Outside of the classroom, they are secretly lovers, but Seo-Jin's surprise appearance soon changes everything...  (Source: Lezhin US)

title: Baekseosasi
description: A long time ago, a hero gathered other heroes and saved the day. There was a prophet who claimed there would be peace for a while - but, then it would get much worse. There would be a Hero and a Villain. Fast forward 500 years later, where we meet a very talented young traveling warrior-looking monk. He is tracking down man eaters for a specific purpose. His magic is referred to as Taoism.

title: Namukkundyeon
description: A woodman dropped his axe into a pond and it got picked up by the mountain god who was supposed to be an old man, but that god is actually a pretty woman?  (Source: Toomics, translated)

title: Yusilmul
description: Seo Yi-Hwan, the youngest daughter of a conglomerate. She, a close friend, and a world-renowned pianist have enjoyed dangerous times committing themselves to promiscuous parties and drugs together. But soon, the walls of trust they've built slowly begins to crack as the mysterious girl, Yoo Se-Rin appears in the lives of the two men. Who is is this new mysterious girl?  (Source: Ridibooks, translated)

title: Love at First Bite
description: Kalyx the golden dragon loses a part of his sacred 'core' in the middle of metamorphosis. Celia was the one who took a bite out of it, mistaking it for a fruit. Kalyx vows to kill her in the next decade, but ends up meeting her as his maid. What could have been a dangerous cat and mouse game with Kalyx not recognizing a grown up Celia slowly changes as the two gradually develop feelings for each other.    (Source: POCKET COMICS)

title: Accidentally in Love
description: “I would like to go back in time one year. I lost someone important to me then.”     That’s what workaholic Eunkyeol Jung wishes one Christmas at a mysterious bar, as she laments being dumped by her boyfriend a year ago. And against all odds… her wish comes true! Unfortunately, she still gets dumped, but this time around she saves her best friend’s brother Yiyool from a tragic death. He even becomes her coworker! With this time to do over and without the love life she hoped for, will Eunkyeol find unexpected happiness or another year of heartbreak?    (Source: Tapas)

title: Pure Intentions
description:
For seven years, Seo Hyeon-Jin, a Korean literature major, has nursed a secret crush on his upperclassman Soon Jeong-Wook. Unfortunately, Jeong-Wook only sees him as a cherished junior, leaving Hyeon-Jin’s love life at a standstill. Everything changes when Heo Chan-Yeong, who perfectly matches Jeong-Wook’s type, transfers in. To make matters worse, Chan-Yeong boldly confesses his feelings for Jeong-Wook to Hyeon-Jin, explaining that he wants to sleep with him. As if that weren’t enough, Chan-Yeong even asks Hyeon-Jin to help him win Jeong-Wook’s heart. Determined to protect the man he loves, Hyeon-Jin finds himself caught in a battle of wits against Chan-Yeong, who only wants Jeong-Wook out of curiosity.

But when Hyeon-Jin realizes Chan-Yeong’s “interest” might not be so fixed after all, he starts to wonder…could the rival he’s trying to fend off become something else entirely? (Source: Lezhin US, edited)

title: Bound to Be Fools
description: The stress of a demanding father almost drives the fun-loving Kangjin to extremes. But he is saved by Jungkwon, the class president who excels at everything despite coming from poverty. The boys become bound to one another and fall in love... until Kangjin witnesses Jungkwon's family caught in a shameful moment. The proud Jungkwon cuts ties with Kangjin, and their love unravels. Yet countless heartaches and years later, the two find that life has pulled them back together at a host bar...    (Source: Tapas)    Note: The chapter count includes two April Fools' special episodes.

title: Who Cares If I’m a Loser!
description: Kihyeon's dream is to leave his hometown and start a new life in college. Will he be able to turn his life around?  (Source: Toomics)

title: Office Romance is a No-No
description: Kwon Ji-Sung had no interest in dating until his casual sex partner suddenly became his colleague.  (Source: Toomics, edited)

title: The Saint Reborn as the Villain
description: For ten years, Beatrice lived as a saint to protect the empire and earn her family's love. But when Lina steals her position, Beatrice is accused of witchcraft and sentenced to death. In her second life, she vows to get revenge. Thus begins Beatrice's transformation!    (Source: Manta)

title: Match Rate 99.99%
description: In the world of modern omegaverse, Hae-Jin is an average office worker with a spirit of adventurer who happens to be the omega that Hwan Lee, a sharp-looking and ambitious corporate executive has been searching for. Hwan, who needs a matching omega with a sufficient compatibility rate in order to have him bear his child, offers Hae-Jin an overwhelming deal that is too sweet to be rejected.  (Source: POCKET COMICS, edited)    Chapter count includes 6 side stories.

title: Love Debugging
description: 'Cherry' is forced to go on a trip to Paris following a travel app due to her sister's threats. In a completely new place, he encounters his very familiar rival, 'Lemon'.    'Cherry' tries to ignore 'Lemon', which makes him angry, and accidentally meets his partner 'Peach', and is drawn to 'Peach' who perfectly matches her ideal type...    The three become partners at the same time due to an error in the travel app of 'Lemon', 'Cherry', and 'Peach' as ​​if they interfered with the love of 'Cherry'!    (Source: Bomtoon, translated)

title: Department Store Cougars
genres: Comedy, Drama, Hentai, Romance, Slice of Life
description: Is Ju-Ho in love with love or is he really looking for his partner? It seems he's looking in all the wrong places! Working at a department store, you'd think he'd be able to find one woman for him! Instead, he meets all the wrong women and doesn't seem to care!  (Source: DAYcomics, edited)

title: Ryokan Romance
description: Kang Yun-chan is ready for the adventure of a lifetime! Armed with a decent grasp of Japanese and a daring spirit, he sets off on a solo journey to explore new places and meet new faces. Every street is a thrill, every corner an opportunity. But his trip takes an unexpected turn when he crosses paths with three stunning, mysterious young women—completely out of their element and in need of help. When Yun-chan steps in and saves the day, they thank him with an invitation to a secluded, traditional ryokan deep in the countryside. Do they truly just want to say thank you, or could there be even more in store?  (Source: Lezhin US)

title: Too Late for Regrets
description: The tale of Princess Ines is a tragic one. Born a royal of the Zener Empire, she is reviled and neglected as a child born out of wedlock. To compound her misfortune, Ines is married off to Grand Duke Ryan of Eleanor, a renowned war hero of the Lezan Empire who fought against Zener. Ryan proves a stern and distant husband to Ines, and she soon determines that she must fight for a life of dignity – if not in Eleanor, then elsewhere. Thus begins a marriage of emotional reserve and regrets…  (Source: WEBTOONS)

title: Maru is a Puppy
description: Woo-Ri’s 5-year old poodle mix, Maru, has turned into a human — a 5-year old little girl, that is! Now Woo-Ri’s gone from pet owner to big sister, and it’s her job to keep Maru out of trouble. Human Maru has the same endless curiosity and playfulness of a puppy, but now she can walk into grocery stores, go to kindergarten, and check this out — hold things with her opposable thumbs. Being human rules!    (Source: WEBTOON, edited)

title: Don't XXXX Where You Work
description: When Dabi Song meets Dr. Han, the memories hit her like a ton of bricks. This is THE Junghyun Han—the WORST blind date she's ever had. Whether 10 years ago or now, he's still the same socially awkward jerk. So when on one fateful business trip, Junghyun discovers her sex toy, Dabi couldn't believe his offer. He wants me to train him... to be boyfriend material? For another woman?!  (Source: Pocket Comics)   Note: Includes one extra chapter.

title: Be the Good to My Bad
description: All the world’s a stage – and that includes Lee Hyesung’s love life! A former child star, Hyesung exited the limelight after a traumatic incident left him unable to continue. But he is thrust back into the public eye when a fateful trip to Hawaii leads him to get caught up in dating rumors with A-list actor Shin Yoo-il: the nation’s bad boy with looks that deserve a standing ovation. Though there is seemingly nothing between them at first, the two decide to pursue things further in the interest of their careers; after all, all press is good press, right? But when business mixes with pleasure, Hyesung and Yoo-il’s method acting begins to blur the lines between fantasy and reality. Will the two find their happy ending together? Or are they destined to star in a real-world tragedy…?    (Source: Lezhin US)    Note: Contains five side story chapters

title: ARTS MANZ
description: Dan Eun-oh is an aspiring artist, and he's struggling to make ends meet. His lifeline and arch-nemesis all in one? Baek Joohyuk, the rich jerk who he grew up with. It doesn't help that the two of them go to the same university, and more often than not Joohyuk asks for sexual favors that Eun-oh ends up complying with. One day for their art club meeting ("full of jerks like Joohyuk," Eun-oh would say), Joohyuk asks—or rather, commands that Eun-oh hire a model for their nude sketches. Now, the quiet and buff model guy sure seems inexperienced and out of his depth, but even without so many words, it's evident that he seems intrigued by Eun-oh, or "Mr. Art Student," he calls him...    (Source: Lezhin US)

title: My First and Last
description: Everyone has a first love... But not everyone's first love marries their dad!  (Source: Toomics)

title: The White Tiger's Daughter
description: The Tiger Lord of the East is now my father?!    When Ari opens her eyes, she finds herself reborn as a baby in the land of divine animals, abandoned in the middle of a forest. Luckily, the white tiger lord takes her in, but he plans to send her away once she is old enough. Can Ari find a way to stay at the palace for as long as possible?    (Source: Manta)

title: The Empire's Hidden Hope
description: Han Wol is known as one of the military’s finest young men, but… Wol is a woman! After her father was framed for the former emperor’s murder, she narrowly escaped execution by disguising herself and hiding in plain sight. Since then, the empire has been under the thumb of chief state councilor Shin, but the young emperor is hatching a plan to take back control. As the only one who holds the key to unlocking the mysteries of the past, it looks like Wol’s days of laying low are over…    (Source: Tapas)

title: Bagaseo Saranamgi
description: As an occult club, all of us did rituals on a 1,000-year-old sacred tree in the back of the school to prove occult. Then, the sacred tree really talked to us…!   “Don’t curse so that your wishes will come true.”   “If you want to survive… have sex!”  (Source: Lezhin, translated)

title: Yanoe Baek Dong Soo
description: Some corrupted high-ranked officers within the palace are accusing the crown prince Sado of high treason and ask for his death! What will the Emperor do to save his son?    A fusion heroic historical about a crown prince in a wooden chest about to meet death, but actually turns out he has bigger influence and authority beyond imagination.<

title: S.K.T(Swallow Knights Tales)
description: Endymion passed the interview to finally become a Swallow Knight because he’s... cute? His lifelong dream has turned out to be nothing like what he had expected. He thought knights were supposed to be honorable and tough! But there is also good news: his past experience as a party host may come in handy after all. How will his life change as he becomes a Swallow Knight?    (Source: WEBTOONS)

title: Yes Ma'am
description: Listless and going nowhere, Jiwoo finds a flicker of purpose during his late-night shifts at the convenience store in regular customer, Juhee, a confident and captivating college student who treats him with unexpected warmth. But what begins as quiet admiration soon turns electric, as Juhee reveals a teasing, dominant side that awakens something deep in both of them. Caught between submission and desire, Jiwoo is about to discover just how sweet it can be to give in.   (Source: Lezhin US)

title: Sinipsawon Kim Cheol-Su
description: On the day he was abandoned by the company he devoted his entire life to, did he return to the moment of his first day at work? Kim Cheol-Su, a new employee with no qualifications who joined Hanyoung Trading, one of the largest conglomerates in Korea. Will he be able to rise to the position of 'CEO' that he had longed for in this life? A modern-day self-made story of success through hard work!   (Source: Naver, translated)

title: Senza Replica
description: Dowon chose to be a freelance guide for the freedom to do other things, but his cold and demanding esper, Kwonwoo, calls him for guiding every day without fail. Although he thinks he has his hands full already, he's proven wrong when Kwonwoo loses eight years of his memories and his powers due to an accident on the job. Now it's up to Dowon to restore both by giving the mentally 20-year-old Kwonwoo the kind of intimate guiding he always refused before. But surprisingly, this cheery and affectionate Kwonwoo seems all too eager to take things to the next level...    (Source: Tappytoon)

title: Room 1305
description: For Lee Jae-Young, room 1305 has been the one constant in his life. He’s lived there since childhood, and it has remained the same even while everything around him has changed. So, you’d think that when his old upstairs neighbor returns, Jae-Young wouldn’t feel any different. In many ways, the tall and confident Lee Tae-Young is nothing like the sweet kid Jae-Young once knew. But, there’s some habits that no amount of time apart can seem to shake. Sure, Tae-Young had always been a little possessive of Jae-Young’s attention, but after what happened…. surely he must have grown out of that by now?! Nevertheless, Tae-Young is certainly no longer the innocent kid that Jae-Young once knew, and now he’s determined to weasel his way back into Jae-Young’s life. From old friendships to hardcore sex, what else will happen in room 1305?    (Source: Lezhin US)

title: Urewa Hamkke
description: Rae rejects an invitation to go to a semester-end party from the most popular student on campus, Sungwoon, but what happens when Rae's new part-time job is at a strange bunny boy costume bar... and his customer is a drunk Sungwoon?!

title: The Runaway Extra and the Obsessive Duke
description: In this world, a duke's full power can only be unlocked by uniting with his "phero," his destined mate. So, to undermine his rival, Krua's father sends her to Duke Arzenta disguised as his phero, hoping she'll take his innocence and his power with it. But Krua has no intention of playing along! If she can just convince her fiancé to join hands with her and keep up the enamored newlyweds act until his real phero appears, she'll be able to flee safely when the time comes... But will he let her go?  (Source: Tapas)

title: Every Building has a Gimmick
description: Lee-Hyeon, an intern, drops by the convenience store on his way home from work and there's something different about the part-timer.   "She's not wearing anything right now, right?"   I'm so confused...  (Source: DAYcomics, edited)

title: How to Protect the Young Master of Monster Manor
description: No! The beloved young master has died again!   When the young master of a game dies for the 43rd time, the 44th round begins, followed by a strange voice and a new job, character, and storyline. From there, Lynne's beloved child-rearing sim begins to take a weird turn, becoming more like a dating sim! Can she save the young master again amidst these oddities?  (Source: Manta)

title: The Chairman's Secret Son
description: Seconds before you self exit you hear that your divorced father has passed away, leaving you an unimaginable amount of money. But once you get to his funeral who he left behind, you realize that money isn't the only thing you can take...  (Source: Toomics)

title: The Distance Between Us
description: Hae-Mi is an ordinary high school art teacher. Sure, she gets scolded by the principal a lot, but her personality makes it impossible for anyone to hate her. While Hae-Mi has her eyes set on one of her fellow teachers, things start to get a little more complicated when her old childhood friend steps into the picture. Between the confusion and the drama, the three of them keep crossing paths in unexpected ways.    (Source: WEBTOONS)  Note: Includes 2 extra chapters.

title: Work, Fight and Love
description: Soohan likes his uneventful days working at a small ad agency. But when new guy Taeyeol from a big-shot ad firm joins the team, all his quirks gets on Soohan’s nerves – most especially the undeniably good looks that remind him of his first love…  Note: Includes 11 extra chapters.

title: Tempters
description: For Haesoo, the idea of a demanding, sexually aggressive “queen” has always felt more appealing than being “king” himself. But when he thinks he’s finally met someone who can turn that dream into reality, he discovers that it’s not a woman who’s waiting to dominate him but another guy… Is this the sexual fantasy that Haesoo has always been after? Can Haesoo handle being pushed far beyond his limits? Check out the newest BL comic from the author of “An Innocent Sin” and “Temptress”!    (Source: Lezhin)

title: The Mean Guy
description: Seung-Jo gets involved in a struggle for the rights between mobs and hides out in a small town out in the country.    "Why shouldn't I cause trouble here? No one here knows me anyway."  (Source: DAYcomics, edited)

title: Manjjijnamnyeo
description: Han Seon-Nyeo hears about an old romance manhwa from more than a decade ago, with a female lead character whose face and name are the same as hers. She obtains a copy of that manhwa by luck, and falls asleep while reading it. When she wakes up, she finds Cheon Nam-Wook, the male lead character, lying next to her. From the moment he comes "straight out of manhwa," Seon-Nyeo's normal school life begins to go awry!

title: Summer Vacation
genres: Drama, Hentai, Romance, Slice of Life
description: Sometimes it sucks going back home. Annoying childhood friends, old people who won't shut up about helping raise you. But sometimes you get to see those girls you once hung out with. But now they're sexy women.  (Source: TOPTOON+)

title: Just Something I've Heard
description: Jaehyun has had a huge secret crush on his friend Woojin for the past seven years. But seeing Woojin fall in love with someone else is breaking his heart. Jaehyun tells this all to Seungtae, his online friend who knows all about his secret crush. While on a call with Seungtae, Jaehyun meets a handsome cashier with an oddly familiar voice. Will Jaehyun forever be doomed to talk about his love life like it’s something he’s heard from someone else? Or will he finally find a happier story of his own to tell?    (Source: Lezhin US)    Note: The chapter count includes 10 side story chapters.

title: Hands Up, You're Mine
description: It’s Christmas eve and Ju-hyeon has no one to spend it with. Her own daughter is too cool to spend it with her mom and so is everybody else at the police precinct Ju-hyeon works at. Right when Ju-hyeon is ready to throw herself a pity party, Santa brings her an early Christmas present: Choi Si-Woo A.K.A one of her daughter’s friends. But what started out as an innocent invite to share cake at her house soon turns into a hot steamy night. Come morning, Ju-hyeon wants nothing to do with Si-Woo but… Two things are for certain: Si-Woo is not going to let Ju-hyeon push him away and Ju-hyeon is definitely ending up on the Naughty List next year!  (Source: Lezhin US)   Note: Chapter count includes 4 side stories.

title: I'll Save the Heroine!
description: Imagine Lee Sangyeo's surprise when she wakes up one day inside her favorite novel... and her horror when she realizes she's in the body of the adorable heroine's evil sister-in-law, Aylee Brydon! Knowing that the story will end terribly if nothing changes, Aylee is determined to save the heroine at all costs. However, her complete character reversal leads to problems in high society and causes friction with her cold fiancé, Duke Van Drave. At this rate, Aylee might be the one who needs saving!   (Source: Tapas)

title: Shovel Up!
description: "Welcome to Another World. Exciting adventures with millions of other users await you!"   Or at least, that's what Jiseok was promised when logging in. Instead, he finds himself alone with nothing but an ordinary shovel to fend off ferocious beasts, evil dragons, and... some dude in tighty-whities? Now, Jiseok's only got two choices - dig or die.  (Source: WEBTOON)

title: Stealing Her Place
description: Ye-Seul’s arrival at her new school is anything but perfect. Not only does she make a terrible first impression, but she immediately becomes a target for bullying when the most popular girl in school, So-Hui, notices their strikingly similar appearance. Despite being bullied and harassed every single day, Ye-Seul is determined not to back down. She knows that she’s just as attractive as So-Hui… and that it’ll be a breeze to steal everything from her.    (Source: WEBTOONS, edited)

title: The Duchess's Secret Writing Life
description: As an introvert, Alisha Weber has spent most of her time writing the fantasy series "The Knight's Return" under a pseudonym, only to have her freedom threatened when she's pressured to marry. Enter Duke Lhesa Armunt, another introvert with a similar issue and a rabid fan of "The Knight's Return"! Upon meeting each other, they realize they're a rather good match and agree to a contract marriage. But how long can Alisha keep her writing life a secret when living with a huge fan of her own work?    (Source: Tapas)

title: Master of the Martial Arts Library
description:
As an inept martial artist and a bastard son of the great Ha Clan, Ha Sochan had no choice but to become a vagabond. But his wretched life takes a turn when a mission brings him to the Martial Arts Library, a place filled with the secret techniques of the martial world. There, Sochan is accidentally bound to the library and sent back to when he was 12 years old. Now armed with the library's martial knowledge, he vows to make a name for himself in not only his clan but also the world!
(Source: Tapas)

title: Sexcape Room: Good Game
description: The fourth in the “Sexcape Room” series!  Kang-San and Sophia are both hardcore gamers who’ve been warped into a strange room together. The catch? They must have sex within the allotted time or else they’ll lose the ability to use their ultimate in-game weapons! Without their power-ups, their dreams of becoming professional gaming streamers are toast. Will these two strangers be able to pull it off in time…?    (Source: Lezhin X, edited)

title: Falling for Her
description: Jin-U is a struggling student who has to work several jobs. One day, he meets his best friend, Chan-Yeong and his girlfriend, Se-Jeong. Jin-U falls for Se-Jeong and breaks up with his girlfriend Yeo-Jin to be with her. However, Se-Jeong was not who she claimed to be...     (Source: TOPTOON+, edited)

title: Boy Princess
description: When a prince's soon-to-be-bride elopes two days before their wedding, her desperate family dress up their young son and send him to get married in her place. With his deep blue eyes and flowing blond hair (and strategically placed apples), nobody bats an eye at the pretty pubescent standing before them. But how long can he keep up the charade. Despite the odds stacked against them, the two princes share adventures and intimacies.

title: The Cellhouse Kingmaker's Playbook
description: Mint Limnades has clawed her way to the top of Niflheim Prison––a brutal, lawless jungle where only the strongest survive. Now the undisputed boss of the block, she’s offered freedom by the warden in exchange for one last job: turn the handsome, wide-eyed newcomer, Helios, into the next leader. The catch? She has to go undercover in a men’s prison. Will this kingmaker succeed in shaping her lost lamb into a boss, or are they both doomed to be crushed by the savagery of prison hierarchy?  (Source: Tapas)

title: Bloom of Vengeance
description: Soon after losing her parents in a tragic car accident, Seol-Young meets her end, her death cleverly faked as a suicide by the murderer. She draws her last breath - cursing the Hong family for everything they'd done to make her life miserable - and wakes up in an entirely different world, with servants tending to her and addressing her as "My Lady." Now in her new body, Seol-Young must find a way to not only fend for herself in this hostile new world, but also cast her long-awaited revenge!    (Source: Lezhin US)

title: Trapped in the Dark
description: Hae-On is a K-pop idol who never made it big. His career is halfway dead and his life is a bleak and boring grind. But one day, things start looking up. His career is kickstarted into life as he gains gigs and popularity. His life starts to become vibrant and busy. He’s finally about to become a true star.   Except, something dangerous is lurking around the corner. Somebody is following him. Watching him. On the brink of dragging him into darkness entirely. And once you’re trapped in the dark, it’s almost impossible to escape…    (Source: Lezhin US)

title: Her Toy Shop
description: The reunion with a friend from high school. Her shop is strange and she tries all of the products she sells. Even the anal plug!  (Source: Toomics)

title: Moonchild
genres: Drama, Fantasy, Horror, Psychological, Romance, Supernatural
description: Since childhood, Bak-Ha has been able to see "things" that others can't. On the first day at his new school, Bak-Ha meets Jin-Do, and due to the sickeningly sweet smell Bak-Ha has, Jin-Do notices he is different, just like himself. As they get closer, Bak-Ha finds out that he was the moonchild, the mythical creature who ruled the spirits in the past, and realizes that this is why the ghosts and demons are after him.    (Source: WEBTOONS, edited)

title: Howimusa
description: The story of a breath-taking battle to become the strongest of the Jianghu. A man and a woman’s paths crossing into destined love.  (Source: Kakao, translated)

title: Enoch: The Shining Tree
description: "You shall live and suffer for eternity, trapped within your armor, prisoners of time."   Enoch's life is turned upside down when his entire family is slaughtered overnight by the cursed knights. The knights wander, sentenced by the witch's curse to a fate of endless empty slaughters. Enoch trampled under their trail of blood, burns for a vengeance that outlasts, outdoes eternity. Who will be whose fate? Who is the one that orchestrates their conflicting fates?  (Source: WEBTOON)

title: Love Class
description: When Ji Eunchae is set up on a date with the wealthy heir Cha Yiheon, she knows this is her chance to escape her abusive family. Never mind the fact that Yiheon is both 10 years her senior and her former high school teacher! Yiheon takes pity on her and offers a deal that can save both of them from their families' expectations: they'll get married, but a year later, she must have completely ruined the marriage. Is Eunchae up to the task of faking a marriage and keeping love out of the picture?    (Source: Tapas)

title: Yumuringneun Gamjeongsa
description: Hae Jin has a father who devoted his whole life to finding the national artifacts that were smuggled out of the country. Then one day, after receiving an unknown “artifact” sent by his father, whom he had lost contact with for a long time, a strange light suddenly came from it, granting Hae Jin a mysterious power and a mission.    “The magic of the Heavenly Object has been bestowed upon you.”    Thus, an adventure involving the artifacts scattered all over the world, including the "Three Heavenly Objects," which contain the soul of the Korean people, begins!    (Source: Naver, translated)

title: Yeoksaneun Doseogwaneseo
description: Perdi, known widely throughout the continent, is a very famous author of adult novels. But Perdi’s true identity is actually Vivian, the Imperial Night Librarian.    Vivian sends over the 4th draft of her latest novel to her publisher to be reviewed, but her work is criticized because the way she writes hetero sex scenes isn’t erotic at all.    “What, so you’re saying I’ll only know what sexual relationships are like after I experience it myself? But what can I do when I’m bound to a chastity contract?”    Unfortunately for Vivian, she had to sign a chastity contract in order to be hired as an imperial servant, and has been forced to remain a virgin ever since. Worse still, only a member of the imperial family could break the contract... but Vivian only has eyes for Ray, a mysterious man who visits the library every night.    But as it turns out, Ray is the imperial archduke and the emperor’s brother! One day, he approaches her with a sweet offer that she can’t resist…

title: Not Interested in Dating
description: "I want to live a simple life."   Do-Hui wants to live as she always has, and her co-worker Dong-I likes to be alone. They have no intention of dating anyone in their workplace... Or do they? We invite you to the intimacy of two people who keep encountering each other.    (Source: WEBTOON, edited)   Note: Includes two extra chapters.

title: 2023 Yojeumyeonae Teuk
description: 'Something is SNS, dating lightly, ex-lovers like friends' These days, dating is like this? Haha Really? lol. A spring day full of excitement.. I will be satisfied with the webtoon again this time. ^^ Stories Featured: 1) Chajatda! Kiss Zone (찾았다! 키스존 - Found! Kiss Zone) by Lee Dong-Geon 2) Sunkiss-husseom? (선키스후썸? - Sunkiss Aftersome?) by Kang Hwanyoung 3) Seonghyang Chai Hh (성향 차이 ㅎㅎ - Difference in Inclination) by Gong Cheol-Jin 4) Neon Naui Trend (넌 나의 트렌드 - You are my Trend) by Sangha 5) Nae Chingurang Jamanchu (내 친구랑 자만추 - Sleep with my Friend) by Mun-To 6) Sangnamja Kim Ha-Yul-Teuk (상남자김하율특 - Real Man Kim Ha Yul Teuk) by Yeo Seulgi 7) Jamanchu? Jamanchu! (자만추? 자만추! - Conceit? Let's go!) by Kim Hyuna 8) Bidaemyeonsueop! (비대면수업! - Non-face-to-face Classes!) by Seyun 9) Joseonnamja X MZ-Yeoja (조선남자 X MZ여자 - Joseon man X MZ Woman) by Ryoung 10) Gajja Couple Doenayo? (가짜 커플도 되나요 - Could it be a fake couple?) by Olso 11) Ingeopat Villain (잉어팟 빌런 - Carp Pot Villain) by Han Seong-Man 12) Eumchimjjinttawaui Date (음침찐따와의 데이트 - A date with a Yumchimchintta) by Rujeuna and Dai 13) Naekkeoindeut Naekkeogateun Neo (내꺼인듯 내꺼같은 너 - You are like Mine) by Sunga 14) Namdeul Da Haneun Yeonae (남들 다 하는 연애 - Love that everyone else does) by Seo-Nye 15) Ya, Na Bokaksaeng Hwaseogijana (야, 나 복학생 화석이잖아 - Hey, I'm a fossil of returning students) by NIMNI 16) Hwayoirui Agun (화요일의 아군 - Tuesday's Ally) by Lusideu 17) Joayo (좋아요 - Like) by Hyojung 18) Naman Bom (나만 봄 - Only I See) by Jyabachip 19) Eojjijeojji Ujji Bom (어찌저찌 우찌 봄 - Somehow it's Spring) by Ori 20) Biroso Pieonan (비로소 피어난 - Blooming at Last) by Youngmo 21) Analogy Naming (아날로지 네이밍 - Analogy Naming) by Sam 22) F-wa T-sai (F와T사이 - Between F and T) by Olive-yu (Source: Naver, translated)

title: Transfer Student Storm Bringer Reboot
description: Remake of the original Transfer Student Storm Bringer series, by the same author.   This time Ju Ingong is no longer a lucky wimp with a front of being strong. Instead Ju Ingong is now a famous fighter renowned for becoming Jjang of a school and transferring to another to crush it which earned him the title of 'Transfer Student Storm Bringer' Ju Ingong now has his sights on a new school!

title: Short Circuit Love
description: Seol Jaeha and Lee Hyun have been best friends since childhood. They do nearly everything together, and despite Jaeha’s unprecedented popularity at school, he only has eyes for Hyun. Enter the new transfer student (and Jaeha’s personal nightmare), Kim Doyoung. Hyun and Doyoung spend more and more time together every day, leaving less time for Jaeha to make his move. What’s worse, Doyoung is icing him out for some unknown reason, all while growing ever closer to Hyun. The two seemingly butt heads at every turn, and Jaeha simply cannot figure out why. The answer is simple: Doyoung sees Jaeha’s coy, flirtatious teasing of Hyun as bullying, and wants to protect his new friend. Their wires crossed, an unending cycle of misunderstandings and misfortunes between the rivals ensues; however, a fateful game of basketball just might spark something electric between them…    (Source: Lezhin US)    Note: chapter count includes two extras

title: Touch Touch Geudae
description: I, Junhee Baek fell in love at first sight. But he rejected me immediately! One day, I was in a marriage arranged by my grandfather and turns out- “Argh!”  We haven’t seen each other after twelve years… “Junhee Baek, do you want to marry me?” Why the heck does he want to marry me?! “But you’re not my type” I don’t want to marry you either! But why does my heart beats rapidly whenever he touches me?

title: The Queen's Knight
genres: Action, Adventure, Drama, Fantasy, Romance, Supernatural
description: When Yuna Lee's mother moves to Germany to pursue a music degree, she's left to stay with her father, a university professor, and her three older brothers, who are fiercely overprotective of her.   During her summer vacation, she visits her mother in Germany, where she falls off a cliff and is rescued by Rieno, an 18-year-old knight living in the land of Phantasma. Rieno makes a deal with Yuna that because he has saved her life, she must marry him and become his queen. Indebted to him for saving her life, Yuna is torn between her normal world back home and life as Phantasma's Queen.   (Source: Tokyopop)

title: Apocalypse-ui Goinmul
description: He was just an ordinary guy running a small restaurant.But behind that quiet life…he was actually a legendary veteran who spent thousands of hours in a hardcore zombie-survival VR game.Then one day, the world he knew turned upside down.The game he mastered…dying and respawning endlessly…suddenly became real.A zombie apocalypse breaks out without warning.At that moment, he awakens a strange power:the ability to open dimensional gates.Now he moves between this world and another, preparing for the coming collapse.Soon, familiar faces from his gaming past begin to appear…the endlessly respawning Bunny Princess,Duck-Butt Quack-Quack who commands monsters,and other unbelievable players start “logging in” to reality.The world is falling apart.Humanity blurs with pure survival instinct.But he stands firm:“This isn’t a game… but I know this battlefield.”What choice will the strongest former players make when everything reaches the end?  (Source: Naver, translated)

title: Floating in My Mind
description: Garam is a kind-hearted girl, but she’s a pariah at her small-town high school. Years ago, a falling out with the queen bee Jihye made her an outcast, and her classmates have since treated her as if she were invisible and nothing but thin air. When the ever-popular boy Sandeul moves back to town, Garam doesn’t recognize her childhood friend. But she catches him at an unguarded moment, discovering his secret: he has zero weight and floats up without his weighted shoes! Sandeul swears her to secrecy and helps her make friends in return. Now it’s Sandeul’s turn to be shocked: whenever he’s kind to Garam, his body gains weight and stays on the ground! The two clearly need each other, but will they manage to steer clear of the sabotaging Jihye and become true friends?    (Source: Tappytoon)

title: My Ex, Client
description: Jihyo is an Account Executive at a mid-size ad firm. Jegook is Jihyo's ex-boyfriend who shows up one day as a very important client. Jihyo tries to avoid working for Jegook, but the client is too important for her company that she has no way to escape.    What does he want from Jihyo?!    (Source: NETComics)

title: Entrapment
description: What's Remy gonna do, now that the two most popular girls at school are obsessing over him?!  (Source: Toomics)

title: Natanajuseyo!
description: One day, an ordinary college student, Kim Ji-Yong, begins to see Jung Jung-Hye in his dreams.After falling in love with her at first sight, Kim tries to find her, but it turns out she was... She committed suicide two years ago!  A bittersweet romance in which Kim Ji-Yong struggles to save her life. Show up, right in front of me!    (Source: Naver, translated)    Note: Chapter count includes 19 extras.

title: Nega Saneun Iyu
genres: Drama, Fantasy, Romance, Slice of Life
description: "Congratulations on being born."    Once I opened my eyes, I was in a cold laboratory. I wasn't born because I wasn't human, I was created, but she still celebrates it nevertheless.    I learned how to live by drinking coffee together, smelling the scent, hearing the sound of decoration shaking due to the wind, and becoming close to the rabbit who often came to visit the garden.    However...    "Actually, in a week from now, I'm going to die."    She, who neither complains about pain or reveals her pain, is calm, but why does my heart hurt so much? I was also a person who could shed tears.    "Why did you create me? Why did you make me like you?"    (Source: Ridibooks, translated)

title: The Dress
description: A temptation from which you can't escape...  What's a dress between to friends? Maybe a whole lot more than nothing!

title: Mia's Fantastic Toys
description: A future that is in distress because of the extreme population decline! People are disappearing... Love is disappearing. Kim Mi-wa has arrived from a future of 500 years later with a futuristic tool that will allow love to activate through artificial intelligence, and has decided to test it out among modern day citizens...  (Source: Lezhin US)

title: Saha
description: Giju is pretty for a boy; he’s different. That’s why he was called names growing up, why he was adopted by a rich artist couple, why his stepfather couldn’t keep his hands off of him. Broken and lost, all Giju wants is to lead a quiet life. The last thing he needs is to get involved with a gangster. But there’s more to Young-do the gangster than meets the eye; he’s different, too. Though he may have tattoos inked all over his body, an imposing build, and a foul mouth, he’s a romantic at heart—he only joined a gang because of his first love. Set in Saha, a conservative seaside town in southern Korea, this is a poetic tale of two souls in search of their place in the world.  (Source: Lezhin US)

title: Villainess Reborn: 24 Hours
description: The warrior Erquanna wakes in a casket and hears people making light of her death. When she shocks them by opening her eyes, she realizes she’s now in the frail body of Erne de Medina, a well-known dimwit from the empire. Erne made a deal with a demon (and died in the process) that Erquanna must now fulfill. She must fall in love with one of the three strongest men in the empire—and have them fall in love with her—before her time is up and her soul is taken as payment.    (Source: Tapas)

title: Married for 120 Days
description: Ellouise Starwood is looking to find a mate for her adopted daughter. She is from an aristocratic family that has been faced with financial difficulties for years. As a result, her father and Louize (older sister and mother of Juliet) run away. The older sister returns to Ellouise with Juliet but dies a few days later from a severe fever. Ellouise has now adopted Juliet and decides to find a suitable husband for her daughter in the aristocratic city of Cliff where the social circles are more relaxed and non-discriminatory. Upon her arrival to Cliff, she meets Marcus Hanger, the heir to a mining conglomerate where the family is often looked down on by the nobility for their lack of prestige and titles. Marcus was sent to Cliff where his aunt resides, after a series of romantic conquests at the capital city. He meets a widow at Cliff, Duchess Bellona, and has been courting her to no avail. He later learns that the Duchess is extremely wary and will only associate herself with married men or young boys. Marcus believes Duchess Bellona is his one true love so he convinces Ellouise to marry him on paper for 120 days so that he can continue his courtship while offering a safe haven for Ellouise as they look for a suitable husband for their daughter, Juliet.  (Source: Pocket Comics)

title: The Losing Streak
description: Kiss more, win more!  Seung-A's a lifelong baseball fan, but she's on the verge of calling it quits. Her team, the Futures Victory, is on a notoriously long losing streak — until she kisses a fellow fan, and the Futures happen to win. Now back in the game, the two get intimate to push the Futures up the ranks...  (Source: Manta)  Note: Includes an epilogue and 3 extra chapters.

title: Obey the Flower
description: I have reincarnated as a supporting character who gets killed by the male protagonist. My ultimate goal is to connect the heroine with the male protagonist without him going crazy. I decided to tame the male protagonist to avoid fate. But the eyes of the beast looking at me kept changing. “You promised that you will be mine once I turn into a human.” His serious attitude and his strong body make my heart tremble. “No, Floria, I shouldn’t fall for this. This is just the part of the contract!”     (Source: Pocket Comics)

title: Garbage Time
description: A new coach is appointed to the basketball team of Jisang High School, one of the weakest in the country.    (Source: Naver, translated)

title: Siryeonjungimnida
description: When Min Gun Lee is rejected after confessing to the upperclassman he likes, he is shocked when his crush's scary twin brother Jo Gan immediately asks him out afterward... and refuses to take no for an answer! With the nickname "Mad Dog" and a reputation for putting a teacher in the hospital, Jo Gan is the very picture of a juvenile delinquent - the exact opposite of his princely, model student brother Jo Han. Will timid Min Gun survive being in a relationship with someone the entire school is terrified of, or will his new boyfriend manage to win his heart with his rough but sincere affection? And how will Jo Han react to the situation? (Source: Anime-Planet)

title: Error Detected
description: Oh Seungpyo has always been at the top of his class, but once he enters high school, his spot gets stolen by Ryu Jaemin. No matter how hard Seungpyo tries, he can't seem to reclaim his place and is stuck in second. For the first time in his life, he develops an inferiority complex and, without realizing it, he starts keeping an eye on Jaemin. One rainy day, the two accidentally swap phones. Though it seemed like a minor accident, what Seungpyo discovers on Jaemin's phone leaves him in shock, complicating their relationship beyond expectation.    (Source: Lezhin US)

title: Tied Up
description: Cheon Ki-Joon is a vampire cursed with a huge burden; if he drinks the blood of the person he loves, they will eventually grow sick and die. He resolves to live his life without harming another human when in comes Yoon Han, a wealthy playboy who saves Ki-Joon from the brink of starvation by agreeing to start harvesting human blood for him. Maintaining this relationship with Yoon Han, Ki-Joon has managed to resist his carnal instincts for the past ten years, but things take a complicated turn when Yoon Han wants to know why Ki-Joon will drink anyone’s blood but his...  (Source: Lezhin US)

title: Christmas Miracles
description: Kwon Nameun, a young script writer, recently finds herself caught in a career turn as well as romantic dilemma. As she reencounters her high school crush who mercilessly dumped her seven years ago, how is she supposed to face this adonis of an actor for whom she once set on the path of writing? She has to prove that she already let go. Luckily, she meets another cute, sweet and handsome singer, who offers her lunch-break jokes, late-night chats, and perhaps… a perfect reason… to let go. Is this fair? Can she really let go?    (Source: MangaToon)

title: Cell
description: Unpredictable superpowers suddenly arrived one day.   Wi Sang-U, a young teen with a bleak future acquires a useless power! But, will it really stay useless?

title: One More Try!
description: Life has been anything but easy for Ju-In On. She is unlucky in love, finances, and career. So when she finds out that her current company has been bought out, she just takes it as another tough break. However, the company that bought out her previous one doesn’t want to fire her… they want to hire her! Ju-In On believes her luck has finally turned until she meets the CEO of the company, Jae-Heon Do. He’s handsome, smart, charming... and the one person she hoped to never see again.   (Source: Tapas, edited)    Note: Includes a seven extra chapters.

title: My Fair Maid
description: For Sandy the maid, seeing Killian Winifred's handsome face is the best part of working for the Winifred family. But Killian's fiancee, Alexandra, hates his womanizing ways and would rather be struck by lightning than marry him. As if to answer her prayer, lightning strikes Alexandra's carriage while she's out on a rainy day. In that exact moment, Sandy falls off a cliff while gathering mushrooms, landing on the carriage. Next thing she knows, she's waking up in Alexandra's body! With her own body buried in a cemetery, Sandy has no choice but to pretend she's Alexandra. But despite her best efforts, Killian starts noticing changes in "Alexandra's" behavior. The situation get even messier when the real Alexandra's soul shows up and demands her body back. Can Sandy and Alexandra return to their previous lives, or will they have a better chance of getting struck by lightning again?     (Source, Tappytoon)

title: Cheonnyeongumiho
description: The story of a girl with a hereditary fate and a nine-tailed fox trying to break free from a thousand-year curse.    (Source: Naver, translated)

title: Love on the Clock
description: “When I grow up, I wanna marry you, hyung!” When Woojin first heard Eunsoo, the little kid from next-door say this to him, he chalked it up to childish naivete. However, it turned out to be only the first of the many, many declarations of love Eunsoo would make to Woojin over the next few years. Cut to present day, although Eunsoo’s love for Woojin has remained unchanged, Woojin still thinks of him as the kid he used to babysit. Things start looking bad when neither side is ready to give. But Lady luck intervenes to break the stalemate! Woojin’s company is suddenly in need of a new illustrator and Eunsoo is the only perfect candidate available for the job! Excited at the prospect of working with Woojin, Eunsoo begins concocting plans, confident that a change of place will become the friction that will help Woojin see him in a new light. But Woojin is onto his shenanigans and has no intention of falling for his seductions! Only one question remains now: Will love bloom on the clock or will it fizzle and burn out?    (Source: Lezhin US)

title: Pokgunui Mangnani Opparo Saneun Beop
description: On the day the empire fell to rebellion and invasion from another world, Valen met his end alongside his sister, the Emperor. But when he opened his eyes again, he found himself 40 years in the past. This time, he vowed to do whatever it took to prevent the world’s destruction and protect the Emperor. And his solution? To live an even wilder life than before. “If I was a scoundrel in my past life, then this time… I’ll be the ultimate menace!”  (Source: Ridibooks, translated)

title: Naneun Areumdapda
description: Jaewoo was rejected by Soojin whom he has an unrequited love for. He remains as his friend as usual, and gradually tries to settle his feelings. But then one day, Soojin’s older brother comes looking for him?!

title: The Body Game
description: Back on campus after his military service, Jang Daechu can’t wait to get some action. However, a series of untimely events leaves him knee-deep in debt and with a tarnished reputation. All hope seems lost, but one day, he receives an invitation to the “Body Game.” The rules look simple: hide a number on your body, then find the numbers of three other participants. How? By having as much sex as you can! With 30 million won on the line, will this raunchy game help Daechu get back on his feet?    (Source: Lezhin US)

title: My Dear Maid!
description:
His blessing changed my life.

Kate knows full well that orphan girls don't get fairy tale endings. But when she saves the kidnapped daughter of Count Blanc, she's given the opportunity of a lifetime: becoming a maidservant at the Blanc Estate. There, she meets Alex, the cold but dashing heir whom she mistakes as a priest... (Source: Manta)

title: True Colors
description: Jihan is a sincere gentleman who wants nothing else than to help those around him. So when Soonae needs somewhere to crash, he decides to be a good samaritan and let her stay at his house. But don't worry - Soonae is more than willing to repay the favor...  (Source: Lezhin US)

title: The Red Empress
description: When the emperor murders the python, god of the waters, a curse is put over the Cha Kingdom preventing men from succeeding the throne. So begins the reign of empresses and the endless struggle against men who try to control the kingdom. After all her sisters are killed by the hands of Yom, the young Empress is seated on the throne. Rather than performing her duties as a ruler of a kingdom, the empress spends her days and nights drinking and sleeping with different men, whom she all executes immediately after. The people call her the Blood Empress, attributed to her violent behavior and the red hair, which is dyed with the blood of the men she killed. One day, the Empress meets a handsome and intellectual young man named Kanghee. As she picks up her sword to kill him, Kanghee convinces her to spare him and begins to captivate her heart by telling her stories he's read from book. As the empress gets closer and closer to Kanghee, she begins to change her violent ways. Is he someone she can finally put her trust in? Or is he not?   (Source: Pocket Comics)

title: Fancy Mate
description: The pure fool + pervert Lim Tae-O dreams of a loving relationship. Because he's gay, he is estranged from his parents and at odds with his friends. Even the men he's dated can't overcome Tae-O's obsession, so he's been dumped many times. Thinking it's his last chance, he wants to finds a roommate to be his FWB... But then he meets Choi Hyeon, a roommate who suits Tae-O's taste more than he could have imagined! Like fate, he falls in love at first sight.    The strange co-habitation of Tae-O, who needs love, and Choi Hyeon, who needs attention. ♥  Can this love be successful?    (Source: Lezhin, translated)

title: Hwangnyeonimeun Pyeonhi Jukgo Sipeo!
description: Promotional Manhwa for the novel.    I now possess the body of Ophelia, the villainess in the story 'The Crown Prince Returns'. And just like the protagonists in the other reincarnated novels, I thought I would fare well. I died by getting guillotined the first time, the second time was getting my limbs torn apart, third was suicide by poison, and by the fourth time, I was struck with arrows atop the throne. And by the fifth restart, even if I tried to stray from the original storyline, I would still be doomed to die. "Concoct a poison for me. Not one that’s painful, but one that’ll kill me slowly." Therefore, this time, with all my heart and soul, I wished to die properly for once. "After I ascend the throne, are you leaving me behind?" "I sincerely hope that her highness survives, no matter what." "Your Highness, I wish to get to know you better." All these people surrounding aren't letting me die off easily!

title: Going the Extra Inch
description: At 27, I should be enjoying sweet, carefree relationships. But ever since my shocking first time with my first boyfriend at 20, I haven't been able to date anyone else. Why? Because size does matter. And because of this, I've coldly rejected even the obvious advances of one of my coworkers. Then one day, I stumbled into his lap—literally—and my hand accidentally brushed his thigh. And there it was. Something long and firm...like a baguette? I'm serious. It’s not about his loaded family. It’s about what’s in between his legs! Could there be more to the guy I turned down than meets the eye? A daringly sweet and spicy office romance begins with "Going the Extra Inch."   (Source: Lezhin US)   Note: Includes ten extra chapters.

title: Love Countdown!
description: Yoo Min-hee, who just witnessed her boyfriend cheating on her, returns home crying and runs into her childhood friend Park Hee-min. After seeing Minhee crying, Heemin proposes to Min-hee that the two of them make a love contract…?!    These two people were once best friends, but as time passed, they drifted away from each other. What will happen to this love countdown that started?    (Source: Bomtoon, translated)

title: My Jumbo Babe
description: “That chubby dude will never know what he’s in for.”   Hye-Sung happened to eavesdrop on a conversation amongst his boyfriend’s classmates. But does that mean Hye-Sung’s fashion design major boyfriend, Jung-Won, will eventually move on to skinnier pastures? He can’t let that happen! Hye-Sung is determined to lose weight and keep his lover. If only he knew that Jung-Won actually loves him exactly the way he is…   (Source: Lezhin US)

title: I Swear I Really Like You
description: What am I to you? Boyfriend? A boy toy? A hostage? A witness? Why did you save my life and just walk away? Why would you transfer to my school and tell everyone we go way back? On a different note, why do you always have a gun? And why do those foreigners keep chasing after me? Will I survive being next to you?    (Source: WEBTOONS)

title: Training Center : The Revenge Trap
description: "Sir... Promise you'll guarantee my success in return for claiming my body..."   In the corrupted athlete training center, players are ravaged by the coach’s absolute power. Their hunger for success intensifies, and they slowly begin to crumble under the weight of their own desires.  (Source: DAYcomics)

title: Jogeuman Nunawa Keun Dongsaeng
description: Saetbyeol, an office worker who is loved by her colleagues for her small and cute appearance! I’m a bit worried about her because she looks very tired lately…   “Saetbyeol, you seem exhausted these days.”   “Yeah, because I was playing with my little brother.”   “Really? You have a little brother?”   “Yes. He’s cute.”   “Wow~ He’s really…”   Huh?!! Her little brother in the picture is a huge black man?! And this ugly figure is definitely… what the fuck?!  (Source: Lezhin, translated)

title: Ugly Duckling
genres: Comedy, Drama, Mystery, Psychological, Romance, Supernatural
description: Have you ever felt as if you are a protagonist of a fictional story? Then Ori's life could be called a cruel drama: the death of her parents, uncaring guardians, bullying in school, nervousness around people... But as a matter of fact she is... an invented character in the truest sense of the word! And the author, who decides her future, is already writing a tragic finale! Only, ignorant Ori does not obey his will...  Source: MU

title: Goemul Hwangjareul Gildeuryeobeoryeotda
description: She was tamed by the monster prince in the palace she married into as if she had been disposed of.   Irene, who was forced to marry the first prince who had the stigma of being the monster prince due to a curse. It was a marriage that was no different from being disposed of as she was the illegitimate child of a prestigious noble family. Like the previous candidates for crown princesses, she thought she was destined to die on the wedding night, but with an unexpected ability, she calms down the monster prince and ends up being with him…  (Source: Ridibooks, translated)

title: Marionette
description: The story of Ilya, who lives purely for his lover Henrik, a genius in a steampunk world. Despite horrible nightmares, life goes on as usual until a stranger visits. As Henrik grows jealous and possessive, Ilya begins to grow a spine want to live for himself. Will he be able to follow his own heart?

title: Perle
description: Jean Erhardt debuted in Joachim Empire as a successful capitalist infamous for buying his noble title. Despite his seemingly innocent intentions, Jean yearned to spark a revolution from within high society. But first, he must gain a powerful friend. A chance encounter with Maximilian, the hedonistic Crown Prince of Joachim, presented Jean with one such auspicious ally. This proved tricky as Maximilian knew of Jean’s past as an escort and the prince hungered for Jean’s return to decadence… (Source: Tapas)    Note: Includes five side stories.

title: Love Bite
description: It all started back in high school. Shinwoo is caught in a compromising position by his crush, Taesoo. And Taesoo doesn’t react well: “You’re dirty!” “You whore!” Cut to seven years later, and those insults have left a mark. Shinwoo can only get off on hardcore humiliation, the nastier the better. His clean-cut hunk of a boyfriend tries hard to satisfy those desires… but there’s something missing. Until Shinwoo attends his high school reunion, that is, and his first love comes back to bite him…

title: Born to be the Grand Duchess
description: Annette Fraise was supposed to die as the novel’s wicked villainess. Instead, she’s using her 21st-century charm to survive her marriage to the cursed Grand Duke of the North, Loic Blenheim. Between one awkward accident, a magical curse, and a one-year marriage contract, love might just become the plot twist that changes everything.    (Source: WEBTOON)

title: b-ssiman Molla
description: The life of an ordinary beta is overtaken by an omega!  Who is he that only Mr. B doesn't know?  (Source: Bomtoon, translated)

title: Iltagangsa
description: Spring beings for Jun-Seong Kang when he, being registered at a certified academy, and So-Ra Han, an elite instructor, meet. Will Jun-Seong be able to conquer her heart?  (Source: TOPTOON, translated)

title: Treat Your Friends With Respect
description: The fragile but cheeky Laviette is not here to save the plot of the novel she transmigrated into. Instead, her goal is to escape her fate of a short life through her best friend, Ahckard, and his healing powers. The novel says he'll fall for her brother, so she sees him as just a friend. However, it doesn't seem like Ahckard plans to follow the original plot either. Will Laviette have to look elsewhere for her happy ending, or will she realize that what she needed has been beside her all along?    (Source: Tapas)

title: Collide
description: "A fateful encounter between Joy, with a special gene, and Moowon, who has top class super abilities!"    The average girl Joy suddenly becomes the target of super powers due to her genetic mutation that she never knew about.  The super powered Moowon, who is at a supreme level, gets sent to protect her. And then out of the blue, Joy's gene makes Moowon feel strongly attracted to her no matter how much his rationality tires to resist...    (Source: NetComics)

title: Hell Hath No Fury
description: A mall employee, a successful actress, and a wealthy CEO... Three women come together for one purpose—revenge!   (Source: Pocket Comics)

title: Reincarnated Warrior
description: A legendary martial artist, after countless reincarnations, awakens in the body of Jin-Ho Seok, the neglected bastard of a powerful merchant family. Once downtrodden and suicidal, Jin-Ho transforms into an unstoppable force, stunning his family with unmatched martial arts skill. As his reputation soars, Jin-Ho’s newfound strength sets him on a path to reshape his destiny and claim his place in a world that once cast him aside.  (Source: Tapas)

title: My Wife's Friend
description: When your wife is always too tired to have sex, it builds up inside. What is a man to do when his beautiful coworkers at the office seem all too eager to help him release some of that stress? But be careful what you wish for... ?    (Source: TOPTOON+)

title: Doksa
description: White Tiger member Yoojoon infiltrated the faction to get the corruption books of congressman Jang Seokjoon, whom he serves. Yoojoon, who successfully caught the eye of Viper boss Jaeha as planned, asked Jaeha to spare his life…    “Then can you suck my dick?"

title: The Villainous Duke's Daughter's Special Method of Growing Rice
description: When you transmigrate into a novel as the villainess destined to die, there are different ways to survive: flirting with the male lead, learning to fight, or finding happiness elsewhere—but not Erica! She has decided to become a successful rice farmer just like in her past life! What follows is an epic (and rather surreal) quest to find the last rice seeds in the world, tame a giant rabbit magic beast, recruit magicians to water the fields, and—Wait, did she just turn the Holy Sword into a hoe?!    (Source: Tapas)

title: Salvation
description: Welcome to Ubrade, your majesty.    After falling into an icy pond, Min-Hu wakes up in an unfamiliar world. He soon realizes he's the prophesied hero who's supposed to bring salvation to Ubrade by marrying Emperor Sioen. Will Min-Hu find his way back to earth? Or will he accept his destiny as the savior?    (Source: Manta)

title: Pretty Scam
description: Hyun-U, a poor country boy studying in Seoul, buys a secondhand phone from an app. The seller, to his surprise, is quite attractive. However, not all is as it seems, as the pretty seller turns out to be... a dirty scammer. Enraged, Hyun-U vows vengeance. As luck would have it, the two meet again in a very unlikely scenario. As their paths continue to cross, will they end up fighting until the very end? Or will there be a more... pleasant ending for them both?  (Source: Lezhin US, edited)

title: A Tactical Genius on the Field
description: If there is one thing that Ma Jung-Woo is good at, it's football. Although he is a genius strategist, others look down on him because of his lack of education and debt. But things seem to turn around when he finds out he has just inherited his late grandfather's British football team. He plans to sell the team and start fresh, only to find out the team has massive debt! Left with no other choice, Jung-Woo must use his tactical genius to help this team rise from the ashes and be number one!  (Source: Tapas)

title: The Road of Karma
description: Once a cancer patient, Inhan Kang starts a new life as the great warrior Karma after falling through a mana hole.   (Source: Toomics)

title: Lovers of the Galaxy
description: Six years ago, when Wu-Ju lost her father, she came across a kind-hearted alien in the mountains. Ever since then, she’s been an avid fan of aliens, but she pretends not to believe in their existence out of fear that her classmates will ostracize her. One day, Wu-Ju discovers a school club that meets her interests. She’s excited to finally share her passion for aliens with others, but she has no idea that this will be the beginning of her exciting romance with the student body president Hui-Mun, who has a secret of his own.    (Source: WEBTOON, edited)

title: Sergeant Brynn
description: I recently started a new job at a café where I met my old sergeant... My hot, sexy, sergeant... And yes, we have a past...  (Source: Toomics)

title: Angnyeogyosil
description: Heo Jeong-U, a high school student who is bullied by a girl in his class for his weakness. Han Bo-Ra, a transfer student, comes to Jeong-U's class, where he was spending his miserable days. Jeong-U feels a strong sense of déjà vu when he sees the child with straight black hair and stains on his legs. Sure enough, Han Bo-Ra, who has subdued the arguing classmates, asks them, "Have you ever seen a child similar to me?" Jeong-U decides to approach Bo-Ra, who might be able to correct what is wrong...  (Source: Naver, translated)

title: Lucid Dream
description: Ever had a dream so realistic you couldn't be sure what was real? Raeum has a special power - the power to control his dreams. His power will bring to life an eerie dreamscape that may reveal the key to unlocking the truth behind his past.    (Source: Lezhin)

title: Kick Off
description: Expensive shoes, a nice watch. Smoldering good-looks. That’s the new guy, Doh Jaeha, appointed to lead a new team in the company. Tae-eun is a third-year copywriter who’s vying to join this new group to move his career forward. Jaeha seems a bit strict but if he’s achieved this position already at his age, he must be competent, right? But something suddenly dawns on Tae-eun… This Jaeha...is this the same Jaeha he went to school with, his first crush?! Second chances at love don’t come around very often. But they were just kids when they first met, surely things are different now. Still, this guy is confident, hot and seems interested, why not make the most of this opportunity? But office romances are always complicated and there’s a new air about Jaeha that feels just a little off… Love and lust ensue but things aren't quite as they seem...    (Source: Lezhin US)    Note: Includes ten extra chapters.

title: The Killer Whale's Comfort Penguin
description: Lia, a penguin-turned-human, hides her anthropomorphic self from her dad for fear of abandonment and hatred. Fleeing her home, she’s discovered by Souradel—a killer whale anthro with a thing for penguins. His obsession with her fluffy belly leads to wild misunderstandings, mistaken kisses, and hilariously tense encounters. Now, Lia must dodge his affections while keeping her identity secret.   (Source: Tapas)

title: XS
description: In a strange future where gifted, "hybrid" humans police the planet, Mina is a likeable tomboy with growing psychic powers. When a young boy falls into a coma after gazing into her eyes, it's clear that there's more to Mina than her pretty looks. This young boy, Hinchang, grows up to be quite a daredevil, and his awkward, secret love for Mina fuels his protective fire when mysterious men arrive, bringing the violence of the "hybrid" world with them!    (Source: Dark Horse Comics)

title: The Dying Emperor's Personal Physician
description: Executed for failing to save the emperor, Serena Vincent wakes up again and again on the day she’s assigned as his physician. Azaid Khan Krothen, the emperor's bastard son from a lowly maid, was cast aside at birth. But he now sits on a throne others want to control. As Serena races to cure his mysterious illness, each failure ends in her death. Trapped in a deadly loop, she must find the cure to the emperor's illness... before her next death is her last.  (Source: Tapas)

title: A Midsummer Night’s Kiss
description: Cha Yoon and Kim Seo-Jin have known each other since childhood. And try as he might to avoid him, Seo-Jin always seems to end up being around Yoon, which only makes Yoon’s feelings for him grow fonder. So much so that Yoon has to steal kisses from Seo-Jin every night! But now through high school and beyond, what will become of their whirlwind romance?   (Source: Lezhin US)    Note: Includes five extras.

title: A Savage Proposal
description: When the ruthless Lord Tiwakan seizes the kingdom of Nauk, Princess Liene Arsac faces an impossible choice: marry her captor or watch her homeland crumble. But Lord Tiwakan isn’t just after power; he desires Liene, and his devotion stirs a mix of fear and undeniable attraction within her. With her former betrothed, Lafitte, still missing, Liene must decide whether to trust Tiwakan's promises or hold out hope for a rescue. As dangerous secrets come to light, Liene’s decision could change the fate of Nauk—and her own heart—forever.  (Source: WEBTOON)

title: Love Lies
description: Being the manager of a popular actress is not very fun. Hyojung is stuck on the sidelines running errands for Yeonkyung, the popular actress who also happens to be Hyojung's cousin. But Yeonkyung makes an interesting proposal: “Help me date Seungyun, Korea’s hottest star.” What will happen when Hyojung and Seungyoon begin a fake relationship to get back at Yeonkyung? They're just faking it, no emotions involved... right?   (Source: Manta)

title: I Couldn't Care Less About the Original, I'm Just Trying to Survive
description: In my past life, I was Soonjung Lee, but I died from overwork. When I awoke in the novel I’m Choosing the Sub Male Lead in This Life!, I swore that I wouldn't suffer again--I'd get rich and live as I pleased! But the side character I transmigrated into, Penelope, is nothing more than the widowed baroness of a poor territory. I need to do better--I must become wealthy! But, unfortunately, to reach my goal I'll need the lord of the magic tower's help, and he’s not exactly the nicest guy...    (Source: Tapas)

title: Tasty Missus x4
description: Orphaned overnight, a boy is taken in by his parents' best friends. Years later, love and desire blur as he grows closer to them and their daughters.  (Source: Toomics)

title: The Immoral Duke Needs to Be Homeschooled
description: Estella Margaret Montiel is a dedicated governess for House Bertha. However, she is currently facing more pressing matters than math or grammar. She knows her pupils' half-brother, Duke Diego Bertha, plans to kill everyone in his family! Determined to protect her students from a tragic fate, she sets out to reform the charming yet dangerous duke. Can her resolve and guidance truly transform the devilish Diego and teach him the value of family? Or will her class be dismissed much too early?  (Source: Tapas)

title: Vampire of the East
description: After the fall of her family, Yangsun begins living as a book dealer while hiding her true identity. One day, while visiting Eumseokgol to deliver a book, she meets a breathtakingly beautiful scholar by the name of Sungyul Kim. They find themselves drawn to each other, but their love is stunted from the start: Sungyul is a vampire.    (Source: Tappytoon)

title: Apollo's Heart
description: Taejoon has it all: money, power, and a beautiful fiancée. He’s finally moving on after his ex-girlfriend died under mysterious circumstances four years ago. Yuri, on the other hand, is struggling to piece together her past after a traumatic memory loss. Apparently, Yuri looks exactly like Taejoon’s ex, and he’ll do whatever it takes to get her back. How far will he go to uncover the truth, and will Yuri survive his dangerous games?    (Source: Tapas)

Since being identified as a Guide at the age of five, Choi Tae-Hun has spent his life searching for his destined Esper, but has never found one. Now 28 years old, he unexpectedly meets his match at an autograph signing for top celebrity Ji Gwan-Yeong, after being persuaded to attend by his younger sibling. As they begin working together due to their unique connection, Tae-Hun struggles with the unexpected intensity of their bond. He insists that their relationship must remain professional, denying any romantic involvement, while Ji Gwan-Yeong remains confident and unfazed, teasingly suggesting that their connection will evolve into something more. Despite his reluctance, Tae-Hun finds himself increasingly drawn to Gwan-Yeong, leading to a complicated and tension-filled relationship.  (Source: Lezhin US)

title: The Genius Sales Person: Mind Reader
description:
Jihun Min is a diligent and honest medical sales representative who is trying to make a name for himself in a company that is rampant with nepotism. Hence, he is constantly being outshined by his general manager’s nephew, Junseong Choi, who monopolizes sales performance through lobbying and shady tactics. One day, Jihun is blessed with a special ability that could propel him forward in his career. Things are finally going his way and he’s feeling more optimistic than ever, but will Jihun be able to maintain his strong moral compass and not lose sight of what truly matters?

(Source: Tappytoon)

title: Antique Romance
description: "I am a human, but a doll... Feelings are not needed. Physically alive, but not mentally. I am a painting trapped inside rusted frame. The cold skin of a statue. Life a stuffed bird- killed and set for display I wonder... I wonder on whose display I will be put on..." Suzette, a young girl, is regarded as a ‘living painting’ and comes from owner to owner. One day a young aristocrat, Ian McPolt buys her as a new item for his huge antics collection. But will Suzzete always be regarded as an item or will they develop some deeper feelings for each other? (Source: Esthétique and Osuwari Team)

title: Hunks, Harems, and Hardcore Habits
description: Trapped in a game where she’s a spy tasked with seducing the men of the Empire, our protagonist finds herself in a twisted reverse harem scenario with no way out.   “Did I log in to the game last night? But I don't remember logging in...”   What started as an immersive gaming experience for her day off quickly turns into a nightmare when she realizes she’s stuck inside. Now, surrounded by irresistibly handsome men and intense encounters, she desperately wants to escape. But there’s one problem: the game doesn’t plan on letting her leave anytime soon!  (Source: Lezhin US)

title: Aiming for the Alimony
description: Reincarnated as the heroine of a dark fantasy novel who meets a tragic end, Ibelin is determined to avoid her fate. After being forced into a marriage with the cold and indifferent Dyffrin, she resolves that, no matter what, she would divorce him in two years, taking a hefty alimony with her in the process. However, as she begins to put her plans to take control of her destiny into action, controlling one’s feelings proves harder than expected for both Ibelin and Dyffrin as their relationship takes an unexpected turn.     (Source: WEBTOONS)

title: Lesson S
description: I'm returning to college, and I'm in dire need of a girlfriend, but I have no experience with women. Can anyone give me some lessons?  (Source: Toomics)

title: Concubine
description: The heir to a rich family meets his father's concubine for the first time and falls in love with her. He knows it is wrong, but crosses the line, unable to resist her sweet temptation...  (Source: TOPTOON+)   Note: Chapter count includes a prologue

title: Sajangnimeun Neomuhae
description: Taeho, a top, has a wet dream about being on the bottom! To get rid of the restless state this put him in, he decides that he needs a relationship. Following his friend into a club, he meets a guy with a nice body, just like in that dream.     <I>"But... why am I beneath him again?!"

title: Sihanbu Hanyeoreul Wihan Boksu Jichimseo
description: Framed for a crime she didn't commit, Isabel died leaving behind her little daughter. Ten years later, she awakens in another woman's body, with only one year left to live.
