But the world she returns to is even crueler. Her daughter is now married to the very man who murdered her, all in the name of revenge. With just one year, Isabel must find a way to save her daughter, no matter the cost.  (Source: Naver, translated)

title: Gongnyeoneun Jigeumbuteo Paeopamnida
description: “Die for us, just like you’ve served our family all along.”   Because of her crimson eyes and the dark splotch on her face, Arryl Brixia, the illegitimate child of the Brixia ducal house, had to live with a mask on her entire life. She tried desperately to win the acceptance of her family, but in the end, she met her death after being framed for treason.    But now, she’s returned to the past. She can no longer see the hideous splotch in her reflection in the mirror. But her face isn’t the only thing that’s changed from before — Ethan, the heir to the Burstein ducal family, suddenly comes and finds her…    “Lady Arryl, why do you wear a mask?”  “Why do you ask?”  “Your eyes.”  “What?”  “I saw your eyes. Your clear and confident eyes.”  “People fear them because they believe it’s the sign of the devil. Don’t you think so, Sir Ethan?”  “No, not at all. They look absolutely beautiful to me.”    The satisfying revenge story of Lady Arryl Brixia, who was abandoned by her own family.   (Source: Kakao, translated)   Note: A promotional one-shot for the homonym novel.

title: Heeojimyeon Jugeum
description: The perfect influencer life. Having a date with the girl you like. Only confession remains, but I got caught up in an absurd terrorist incident?!    "It's not an obsession, we really...! If we break up, we die!!"      (Source: Naver, translated)  Note:   - Includes five extra chapters.  - Part of YLAB's Red String Universe.

title: Ssabulsaengjunggye
description: "I wanna go big. I just want my small channel to skyrocket." Live streamer, Kyeong-U, has only one wish: to become incredibly popular. To fulfill that wish, he will do whatever it takes.    Oh, and about Do Ji-Ho… A live streamer who’s popular because of his hot and sexy streams. "I hate that. I always pray for his downfall. But, I will do anything for views~ Just say the word!"  (Source: Peanutoon, translated)   Note: Part of Peanutoon's Gosuwi BL Danpyeonseon (고수위 BL 단편선) Collection.

title: Nammaesai
description: My first love, who stood out even from a distance, my father remarried, and we became brothers and sisters.   "Do you like me too? Can we be normal?"  (Source: TOPTOON, translated)

title: Jonghoeng Guju
description: Cheon Muji-Chee, the only son of the Hebei thousand swords family and the grandson of King Kwon. Cheon Seong, the lazy young master of the heavenly swordsman. He wants to become an imperial scholar, but the world pushes him to the top.    “My dream is to become a scholar….  How long do I have to be like this?”   (Source: KakaoPage, translated)

title: Love at First Sight
genres: Comedy, Drama, Romance, Slice of Life
description: “You want your phone back? Be my girlfriend!”  “Why!”  “Because I want it!”  “Then for how long?”  “Till the day before my birthday~”  But which birthday? Nobody knows.    (Source: MangaToon)

title: Sindorim
description: The world collapsed and built underground city Sindorim. The boys who couldn't get there and survived, dig into the secrets of the underground city.  (Source: Naver, translated)

title: Under One Roof
description: Jun always wished to live freely, away from his father's meddling. He finally gets his own place and enjoys doing whatever he wants, without knowing that a strange girl lives there too!  (Source: TOPTOON+)

title: How to Send Your Husband to Hell
description: Helena Winston, the dazzling diva of noble society, is thrust into scandal when the crown prince unexpectedly confesses his love. To protect the Empire—and her own reputation—the Empress proposes a secret deal: marry a man of her choosing and expose his secrets. Her target? Count Benjamin Ischpern, a veiled noble rumored to be tied to enemies of the throne. As Helena begins her life in an arranged marriage, one thing becomes clear—there is indeed far more to this man than it seems. So she swears: she will bring her husband to ruin, no matter the cost.  (Source: WEBTOON)

title: Yeogyosuui Bimilgyejeong
description: I just retired from the army and went back to school, and I was in a normal college life. If you can’t afford it, you’ll be able to apply for a lecture that you really don’t want to hear. The reason why Ji-woo is reluctant to lecture is because he has been treated unfairly by Hayoung in the past. Crying and listening to Hayoung’s lecture by eating mustard. Unsurprisingly, I found Hayoung’s deviant account.  (Source: Lezhin, translated)

title: Two Empires: A Tale of One Slave
description: Murdered in cold blood, Emperor Levenoad of Strahss is reincarnated as a slave named Ray in the enemy empire of El Fascher! To make matters worse, he's caught the eye of the emperor, Jiskar, and gets dragged off to the palace as his concubine. In order to escape, Ray must spread his legs for Jiskar in order to win his favor, all while carefully avoiding the jealous, power-hungry empress and crown prince who will do anything to tear him down. More importantly, he must figure out who killed him in his past life... and why. Unfortunately, none of this will prove to be easy with guards at his side 24/7 and his feet in shackles. Will Ray be able to find freedom while uncovering the truth about his past? Or is he doomed to be forever chained in the palace of the enemy empire?    (Sourde: Tappytoon)

title: Serene Bird
genres: Drama, Hentai, Romance, Slice of Life
description: Sha Hu Rong is looking for a special talent: a traditional Korean dancer whose movements are so effortless and elegant, he glides across the stage like a bird. Like a snake on the hunt, Sha Hu Rong finds his talent working at a coffee shop. Unfortunately, while Yoo Chung’s twin brother might still have some dream of stardom, somewhere along the line Yoo Chung gave up the stage. But a figure not dissimilar to Sha Hu Rong has been haunting Yoo Chung’s dreams, lately… and it seems the snake is never too far from the bird it hunts.    (Source: Lezhin)

title: The Monkey King’s Journey to the Murim
description: The Monkey King’s journey was over. But a new story begins with an impossible crime -- his master, Sanzang, has gone missing. His new mission is to dive into the Murim, a world where mortals and their martial arts rival the power of the gods and unravel this mystery. The threads of fate reveal not only allies, but foes from his past. The Great Sage, Heaven’s Equal has been unchained, but this new arduous journey may yet prove to be his most challenging yet...   (Source: WEBTOON)

title: Secret Siblings 2
description: From the outside, Taesung and Haeun look just like real siblings. They were certainly raised that way, living together in the same house since they were kids. But here’s the secret: they aren’t actually related. Haeun’s just been living with Taesung’s family since her parents went to live abroad, and that’s the way it’s been for the last 15 years. They’re basically real sister and brother at this point…until one day, Taesung comes to learn a prank from his friends. Grab a girl’s sides, and you can tell from her reaction what she really thinks of you. Taesung tries this out on Haeun that night, eager to see how she reacts…and accidentally ends up grabbing her boobs. Uh-oh. But just what is up with Haeun’s reaction? She’s blushing, squirming, not saying anything… Is this how you would normally act in front of your brother? Things come to light, and Taesung’s starting to look at his “sister” a little bit differently now…  (Source: Lezhin US)

title: The Girl from the PC Café
description: At a local PC café, the shy owner secretly pines for his drop-dead gorgeous part-timer, Mina. But subtle details about her stir painful memories he can’t ignore, leaving him torn between fear and desire, especially when her bright smile makes his heart race all over again.  (Source: Lezhin US)

title: Serene Bird
genres: Drama, Hentai, Romance, Slice of Life
description: Sha Hu Rong is looking for a special talent: a traditional Korean dancer whose movements are so effortless and elegant, he glides across the stage like a bird. Like a snake on the hunt, Sha Hu Rong finds his talent working at a coffee shop. Unfortunately, while Yoo Chung’s twin brother might still have some dream of stardom, somewhere along the line Yoo Chung gave up the stage. But a figure not dissimilar to Sha Hu Rong has been haunting Yoo Chung’s dreams, lately… and it seems the snake is never too far from the bird it hunts.    (Source: Lezhin)

title: Secret Siblings 2
description: From the outside, Taesung and Haeun look just like real siblings. They were certainly raised that way, living together in the same house since they were kids. But here’s the secret: they aren’t actually related. Haeun’s just been living with Taesung’s family since her parents went to live abroad, and that’s the way it’s been for the last 15 years. They’re basically real sister and brother at this point…until one day, Taesung comes to learn a prank from his friends. Grab a girl’s sides, and you can tell from her reaction what she really thinks of you. Taesung tries this out on Haeun that night, eager to see how she reacts…and accidentally ends up grabbing her boobs. Uh-oh. But just what is up with Haeun’s reaction? She’s blushing, squirming, not saying anything… Is this how you would normally act in front of your brother? Things come to light, and Taesung’s starting to look at his “sister” a little bit differently now…  (Source: Lezhin US)

title: Flip the Script
description: Jeong Yigon, CEO of Seongso Group, has absolutely no desire to become the future chairman. His ambitious brother, however, wants nothing more than to sideline Yigon and take the top spot – no matter the cost. In a strategic move to fend off his brother's aspirations, Yigon concocts a plan to spread a rumor about himself being in a same-sex relationship, a situation sure to be despised by his traditionalist grandfather. To execute this plan, Yigon seeks out Shin Tae-kang, the heir to the Hanje Group, as the ideal candidate for a fake relationship. Tae-kang readily agrees, under the condition that Yigon does anything Tae-kang desires. It seems like Tae-kang is the one who holds all the power in this con of theirs, but could there come a time when Yigon manages to turn the tables?     (Source: Lezhin US)

title: Salamander
description: After Sebastian and Mia's house burns down, they move in with Carter and Emma. But things start to get heated.    (Source: Toomics)

title: The Most Ordinary Relationship
description: Wonwoo and I have been living together for the last ten years. We've also been dating for just a few months shy of ten years. Apparently, we were a fairly lovey-dovey couple when we first got together, but things are different now. These days, we fight more than we laugh, and our hearts rage with anger instead of racing with excitement. But any couple that's lived together through thick and thin for this long would say the same thing, right? That's why this is a story about the most ordinary relationship.    (Source: Tapas)

title: A Second Chance for the Outcast Prince
description: In a nation where alphas and omegas hold all the power, being born as a beta is a terrible fate for Prince Renato El Fleuret. His life is a string of tragedies leading to a cruel end… until he is reawoken in the past! Determined to make the most of this second chance at life, Renato enlists the help of Kalid, a prince from a neighboring kingdom with a complicated backstory of his own. Together, they must do everything in their power to fight for their own happily-ever-after…    (Source: Tappytoon)

title: Kowloon: COPÓKA
description: Jin-Tae Seo and his younger sister Ji-Na, a purple-eyed albino, are separated after being kidnapped by human traffickers. After two years of torment, Jin-Tae is rescued by an assassin named Shin Kim. After years of training, Jin-Tae, now an assassin himself, follows a lead to Hong Kong to find his sister. After accidentally getting involved in a gang war, it is revealed that Ji-Na is apparently an assassin working for Kai Liu, another albino, who is rebelling against the Triad, and claims that Ji-Na is his half-sister. Can Jin-Tae stay alive long enough to reunite with her?  (Source: WEBTOON)

title: I'll Make You Hate Me
description: The hot new guy in Min-Soo's department turns out to be none other than his childhood friend, Jun-Won. But Jun-Won thinks of Min-Soo as more than a friend. Finally craving into Jun-Won's persistent advances, Min-Soo agrees to go out with him for one semester. While Min-Soo's plan is to make Jun-Won grow sick of him during that time, will Min-Soo succeed? Or will Jun-Won manage to win Min-Soo over?    (Source: Pocket Comics)    Note: Chapter count includes a prologue and seven extras.

title: Raising the Second Male Lead’s Son
description: Our protagonist wakes up one day to find herself as Elia, the daughter of a bankrupt baron and a side character in a romance-fantasy novel. While on the run from debt collectors, she saves a child from an attacker -- only to be accused of being the kidnapper by the child’s guardian, Duke Kaiden. Taken to his mansion, she’s forced to live with them and be the child’s nanny. Can Elia clear up the misunderstanding and find her way out of this mess?  (Source: WEBTOONS)

title: Byeongyakan? Nampyeonui Gyeyak Anae
description: I’m Selena, a daughter born to a family well-known for their fertile women. I was all but sold off in a marriage to a sickly duke whose life hung in the balance, all for the sake of producing an heir for his family. They provided me a medicine purported to aid in pregnancy, and the astrologist advised me good days for sleeping together, but... there was no child.    “So, are there any signs of pregnancy?”  “Ah, I-I'm sorry.”  “You’re useless. What luck do you think won you the position of the duke's wife?”    I couldn't say a word.    "No, excuse me. I only have to look at the sky to pluck a star. That's how I attained this position.*"   *Metaphor: Lit. Plucking a star from the sky: something that's difficult to get/achieve)  (Source: Kakao, translated)  Note: A promotional one-shot for the homonym novel.

title: Anonymous 7
description: A shy freshman girl has a crush on a charming sophomore in her class. She dreams of a relationship with him, but when he starts talking to her anonymously as "Anonymous7,"  she discovers his hidden promiscuous side. What happens when her innocent crush meets reality?  (Source: Toomics)

title: Destructive Desires
description:
As a lonely orphan and a corporate heir, the lives of Seo Yeon-Woo and Lee Seok-Heon couldn’t be any more different. Due to this, Yeon-Woo has been unable to refuse Seok-Heon’s advances to be his sex partner. But as Seok-Heon’s grandfather was the one to take Yeon-Woo in when she was orphaned, the guilt of sleeping with her savior’s grandson weighs heavily on her mind. She finally draws the line when Seok-Heon pulls out a wedding ring, professing that he’s willing to go against his family’s wishes and marry Yeon-Woo. No longer wanting to become a burden to those around her, Yeon-Woo decides to pack her bags and run far away. But just when everything seems okay, Yeon-Woo learns that she has an unexpected baby on the way… (Source: Tappytoon, edited)

Note: Includes a prologue.

title: EROMANCE
description: A former actress is determined to do anything to get back to the top, even if means going underground to the world of porn.     (Source: TOPTOON+)

title: Yongsa Kariel
description: The Demon King is dead, leaving only warriors in the world. Someone must fill that void.  (Source: Naver, translated)

title: Annyeong, Yeoreuma
description: He climbed onto a tree to avoid the teacher and saw a strange girl on top of the tree full of white beautiful petals.  The summer sun shined as bright as the white flowers on the strange Han Yeoreum (summer).    He endlessly searches for the storage room filled with memories of her.

title: Your Grace, Please Fail for Once!
description: Nellie Pepper, land steward to the paranoid psycho Duke Lionel Alterwood, dies from overwork after three years of torture. As she closes her eyes, her final wish is to get revenge. Miraculously, she soon wakes up on her first day of work again! Ready to sabotage her cruel boss, she embarks on all sorts of wicked plans. However, every attempt hilariously backfires, and she ends up improving the duchy instead! Will Nellie be able to enact her revenge and finally make the duke fail for once?    (Source: Tapas)

title: Gyeolhonkkaji Mangsanghaesseo!
description: "My partner is just a male friend."   So-mang Park wants to have a relationship at least once in her teens. But true love leading to a dreamy romantic marriage is just a crazy delusion that'll never happen. In reality, So-mang Park and the word "date" just don't belong together. Then one day a ray of hope shines upon her. Is this what flirting is? This is a story of a cheerful yet delusional girl's quest for romance.   (Source: Naver, translated)   Note: Includes an epilogue.

title: Even in Your Death
description:
Jeong-Cheol is a gambler, a failure, and now a divorcé after ten years of a marriage that finally collapsed. Before he can even catch his breath or curse his miserable luck, the very person who started it all returns to his life. Ji Min-Yeong, the ex-lover who terrified him, chased him, and yet was the one he loved more deeply than anyone else, appears without warning. Standing before him with the same chilling certainty as in the past, Min-Yeong whispers the words Jeong-Cheol fears most:
“I will stay with you until the moment you die, Cheol." (Source: Lezhin US)

title: Dangsinman Molla!
description: Everyone knows women are tricky beings, with layers upon layers of secrets they hide, but there are some secrets women must risk everything in order to keep hidden! These women with such hidden secrets are being revealed in this series!  (Source: Naver, translated)   Note: Includes four side stories and one epilogue.

title: Solo Martial Arts
description: In the realm of martial arts, you’re either strong or dead. Ilyong Kim learned this the hard way after spending seven years training, only to die at the hands of a master. Resurrected in his home dimension, Ilyong’s experiences have granted him the power he’s sought all along. As an Awakened with no mana, Ilyong struggles getting a guild to accept him, but his fighting prowess quickly sets him apart from other new adventurers. But can he keep up with the monsters he must now face?  (Source: Tapas)

title: Thirsty Thirty
description: Yaeun Chu is about to turn thirty. While her friends marry and start new lives, she works full-time at a lighting company and sees her boyfriend on the weekends. That all ends when she discovers he’s having an affair with one of her coworkers. Drowning herself in work until her body and mind begin to fail her, Yaeun struggles to keep her head above the raging waters of romance, personal happiness, and life after thirty.  (Source: Tapas)

title: Girlfriend for Hire
description: They say unhealthy attachments are the root of most problems. Kim Luna knows this because she's attached to many things - her toxic ex-boyfriend, her kind but unavailable psychiatrist, and most of all, her opulent lifestyle that she lost after her family went into debt. So when she meets Moon Sung-hyun while working as a girlfriend-for-hire, it's no surprise that another unhealthy relationship begins between them... except this one may have deeply troubling consequences. Not only does Sung-hyun live in the very apartment Luna was kicked out of, but unbeknownst to them, there's something more sinister connecting their two families. Despite this, Luna's feelings for Sung-hyun grow increasingly sincere. Will Luna be able to stop her unhealthy habits and find genuine love with Sung-hyun, or will she become enmeshed in something much more poisonous?    (Source: Tappytoon)

title: Moonlight Beauty Parlor
description: I-Na Yun is left without a job or home after she gets fired and her house burns down. Her luck takes a turn when Hyeon-Du Seo, owner of the Moonlight Beauty Parlor, offers her a place to stay as well as a job -- on one condition! Hyeon-Du suffers from insomnia, and it seems I-Na’s presence is the only thing that allows him to sleep through the night. If she agrees to help him sleep at night, she can stay. As I-Na spends more time with with Hyeon-Du, her heart begins to skip a beat when she sees how thoughtful he is with each of his clients. Is Hyeon-Du only keeping I-Na around to help him sleep, or do his feelings run deeper?  (Source: WEBTOONS)

title: Idol Shopping
description: I could do anything for Aul… S the person who takes cares of bullies, for Kang Song EE brother. I go into Chungha High school, it was there that I met Suh Ga Eun the “bully take carer S” rumored boyfriend. The handsome and yet bad character guy with charisma. This is a story of my High school life at a men’s dorm…   For whoever bothers my brother, get prepared to face me!

title: The Sock Monster
description: Sujin Park is a young girl from a small village who suddenly finds herself moving to a big city far away from home because of a new job. For the very first time, she must learn to navigate life and work all by herself while also suddenly becoming the caretaker of a creature known as the sock monster.  (Source: Spottoon)

title: The Villain's Daughter-In-Law
description: Luciel, a Crystal Fairy skilled in crafting jewels from her emotions, returns to the past after a life cut short by betrayal. Armed with the knowledge of a grim future, she proposes a contract marriage to the empire’s most villainous family. What begins as a desperate strategy to escape her fate soon becomes an adventure filled with unexpected warmth. Can Luciel rewrite her story, or will her past come back to haunt her?    (Source: TappyToon)

title: My Breast Friend
description: Tae-Yang and Hee-Tae have grown up alongside each other their whole lives. Hee-Tae’s feelings for Tae-Yang are so strong that all of their close friends are aware of them. But Tae-Yang, the subject of his affection, is oblivious. The two are so close they live together in the same house, but one day Hee-Tae notices something strange about Tae-Yang. He’s hiding something from him! Out of curiosity and sadness, Hee-Tae barges into Tae-Yangs locked room and sees…Tae-Yang’s chest!..But something’s coming out of them?!    (Source: BOMTOON, translated)

title: Haengseongingan
description: Just the extraordinarily unfortunate life of a high school boy... but misfortune isn't all that's extraordinary about him.

title: The Princess in the Henhouse
description: Princess Soria has been cursed to live in her dilapidated kingdom as a chicken for the last century. Her curse can only be broken through true love with her Prince Charming. Unfortunately, the only fitting candidate for her comes in the form of Emperor Lenok, who doesn’t know a thing about romance! He also needs her help to save his empire from a long-term drought, a problem that can only be solved by breaking her curse and restoring her kingdom. But how is a poultry princess supposed to fall for such an unattractive ruler?!  (Source: Tappytoon)

title: W: Two Worlds
description: Whatever she draws becomes reality.    Yeonjoo, the daughter of a famous cartoonist, always dreamed of following in her father’s footsteps. However, her lack of drawing skills ultimately leads her to leave the world of comics behind — until she suddenly finds herself in her father’s cartoon universe...    (Source: Manta)

title: 50 Million Km
genres: Comedy, Drama, Fantasy, Psychological, Romance, Sci-Fi
description: Kim Paksa is a genius programmer. He is currently working on rovers in outer space when one night he sees a face appear on the screen.

title: Nameless Flower
description: Young Ruan, the little lord of House Marcellion, has never had an easy childhood. With his older brother constantly feigning illness, the burden of the harsh heir’s training falls squarely on his small shoulders. One day, unable to take it any longer, Ruan dashes out of the mansion and loses himself in the forest. There, he stumbles upon a boy his own age. They don’t exchange names, and yet none of that seems to matter. With him, even nibbling on grass becomes an adventure. Ruan finds himself laughing, playing, and perhaps for the very first time, feeling free. Day by day, his thoughts drift further from the rigid lessons of succession and closer to the warmth of that kindhearted boy. But gossip spreads quickly, and soon even the stern Count Marcellion hears whispers of his son’s wandering heart…    Could a simple forest friendship change the path of an heir?    (Source: Lezhin US)   Note: Includes 22 side story chapters.

title: Naman Boyeo!
description: Various secrets are uploaded anonymously every day in the school's anonymous application.  Min-Jun, who is in love with Ha-young unrequitedly for 10 years, has all the anonymous posts appearing as real names due to an error and finds out the shocking fact that Ha-young's boyfriend 'Ki-ju' is cheating.    (Source: Naver, translated and edited)

title: Flowers May Wither but You Remain
description: At the ancestral estate of Glown Hall, plain and serious Helen Godwin is hired by the wealthy and powerful Somerset family to tutor the young master Henry. Among its dark and ancient halls, Helen hears whispers about a ghost, madness, and something more sinister the Somersets are hiding. It’s not long before she catches the eye of the womanizing Raymond, Henry’s older brother. Even though Helen isn’t the type Raymond usually goes for, something about her is too alluring for him to ignore…  (Source: Tapas)

title: Frozen Hearts
description:
Hiding her identity as a Snow Maiden demon, Seol-Ha has carved out a life in disguise among humans. However, her life changes forever when she catches the interest of the Northern Prince, a man known for hunting down and killing demons, and agrees to become his bride. Will these two be able to overcome their differences and live happily ever after?

(Source: WEBTOONS)

title: Kiss Meow
description: Sara comes back to life from a car accident with the grace of a cat god. But she is now under a cat spell—that is, Sara turns into a cat on rainy days. There is only one way to break the spell. She must fall in love with the cat butler of her destiny who truly loves and cares for cats, and kiss. On top of that, a mysterious yet familiar cat murderer starts chasing Sara’s catself after she witnesses the murderer killing a cat with a stone. Will Sara be able to protect herself from the cat murderer? Will she be able to break the spell with a kiss from the butler of her destiny?   (Source: WEBTOONS)

title: Ex-Boyfriend vs Stalker
description: An online store model, Juyeon Ye, wakes up and finds herself tied up in an abandoned school. It was her ex-boyfriend who kidnapped her, and there was no one to come to the rescue. The only person who was aware of her absence was her stalker, who had been following her since the horrible blind date. Now, she has to depend on the stalker to escape, and the tension between her ex and the stalker continues to intensify...  (Source: Pocket Comics)

title: Mareomneun Jeonhaksaeng
description: The silence is over. Now his fight begins!   One day, Ji-Jun, a transfer student who never speaks, overpowers the bullies in his class with overwhelming skill. Because of this fight, Ji-Jun becomes the center of attention of the bullies inside and outside the school. And another silent female student begins to watch Ji-Jun.  (Source: Naver, translated)

title: Pound of Flesh
description: Sharing flesh for lunch? Very normal.   A world where people share their flesh.  I give mine to others, and they carve a piece for me.  It’s toxic corporate culture on another level — how long could you last in a workplace like this?  (Source: Manta)

title: Hellcraft
description: Note: Includes one extra chapter.

title: The Hidden Muse
description: Riv Roydes, a tutor turned secret nude model, poses to pay for her sister's medicine, believing her identity to be safe. But when a painting reveals her profile, she is drawn into a forbidden romance with the enigmatic marquis Dimus Ditrion.  (Source: Manta)

title: Over The Moon
description: Hayoon works as a member of a film crew during the day and as a host at a homosexual club at night. Hayoon's life takes a turn for the better when he becomes close to the famous actor Kwon Yian.  Two people whose love slowly blooms enjoy a fantastic covert romance on set...     (Source: INKR)    Chapter count includes a valentines special, an epilogue and two extras.

title: Please Touch Me Here
description: When Seong-Gi Kim, a  physical therapy major freshman, touches women's bodies with the manual therapy he learned from his grandfather, all women fall for his touch and crave more. Then, on the first day of the orientation, his hands touch an egoistic professor Yeong-Hui Han, which becomes the first step to creating his harem.  (Source: DAYcomics, edited)

title: Sokboimnida
description: An ordinary college student, "Ye-Seul", starts a part-time job at a broadcasting station cafe to meet "Min-Jun", the youngest main news announcer in South Korea, who is also known as a spy. Contrary to her expectations, Kim Min-Jun is a very cold person...     "Do you know how long I've liked you? Why are you being so cold towards me?"    (Source: Naver, translated)

title: Ground and Pound
description: A strong coach challenges her boss, sparking passion and revealing a shocking connection to a past he can’t recall.  (Source: Toomics)

title: Netkama Punch!!!
description: What would you do if your e-girl was a boy? Find out Hee-Jae's reaction!    One year ago, I was a world-class player in the game Arcana. However, everything I built up was destroyed by Hee-Jae Shin as easily as a sandcastle. I sold my account at a high price and decided to never set foot in the game again... Even if I quit now, it doesn't mean I quit for good though, right? One year later, I made a new account just like following a homing instinct.    The Grand Mage comes back as a young girl!  Note: This is a promotional one-shot for the homonym novel.

title: Doomed
genres: Drama, Hentai, Horror, Psychological, Romance, Thriller
description: Some women are just treasures. This girl is such a treasure, every guy who ever meets her wants to lock her away for their own personal use. Can she ever escape this dreadful fate? Or will she remain a slave for the rest of her life?  (Source: TOPTOON+)

title: Game Sok 2-hoecha Gwangjeonsa
description: The protagonist, having possessed a berserker character within the game, has finally slain the Great Demon and cleared the ending after many events. He believed that was the end. However, before his eyes was not an exit to the real world but a [New Game+] button to start another run.  (Source: Naver translated)

title: I'm the Emperor's Long-Lost Daughter
description: Rositte is a "reincarnated one," someone who recalls their past life from another world, but is framed for the murder of Duke Luchiaden. She goes back in time right before his death to save him and is shocked when he says she might be the emperor's lost daughter, foretold to be the last reincarnated one! However, Carina, another reincarnated one, insists she's the true daughter. Will Rositte be able to uncover the truth about her origins, or will Carina be crowned as imperial princess instead?    (Source: Tapas)

title: Holesome Romance
description: Jung Hyun-ho is an average office worker who is infatuated with his team leader, Seo Doha, also known as Mr. Seo. Despite confessing his love, Mr. Seo remains strictly professional and pays no attention to Hyun-ho's romantic advances. Frustrated and unable to resist his feelings, Hyun-ho purchases a unique adult toy with intriguing instructions. Filled with a mix of excitement and guilt, he begins to indulge in his fantasies, imagining what it would be like to be intimate with his boss. However, at that very moment, a peculiar and unexpected event unfolds, causing a ripple effect on both Hyun-ho and Mr. Seo's lives in ways they could never have imagined.    (Source: Lezhin US)

title: Jilpunggwangnyong
description: Kang In-Young, betrayed by his friend and his lover, is framed for murder and is thrown into prison. There he meets a fellow prisoner, an old man who used to be a petty thief. Turns out he stole a secret martial art from JeonJin sect, and to escape their pursuit, he intentionally broke the law to enter the prison and spent 30 years honing the secret martial skills. Tragically the old man catches a plague-like disease and is going to die… but after observing Kang, he decides to make him his heir and gives him the secret martial arts. 10 years after the old man's death he fully masters the secret art…

title: Knight in Flight
description: Amadeonte Elvin, the legendary swordsman of the Elcano Kingdom and the first woman to join the Royal Guard, and Cyonel Gavadien Meon, the prince who is entangled in a struggle for his succession to the throne and is hated by his own father. Two really different people who share one common goal: to escape the country. Will they be allies or enemies?  (Source: POCKET COMICS)

title: Game Sok 2-hoecha Gwangjeonsa
description: The protagonist, having possessed a berserker character within the game, has finally slain the Great Demon and cleared the ending after many events. He believed that was the end. However, before his eyes was not an exit to the real world but a [New Game+] button to start another run.  (Source: Naver translated)

title: Pig Bride
description: Lost in the mountains on a trip to summer camp, eight-year-old Si-Joon fears he’ll never make it out alive. When a strange girl in a pig mask appears before him, he follows her to a house deep in the woods, where he is told that he must marry the pig-faced girl to atone for the sins of their ancestors. Si-Joon’s not too keen on getting married, but that wedding feast looks so delicious! It’s only afterward that he realizes what he’s done and…wakes up. Now in high school, Si-Joon Lee has been dreaming about the pig bride for as long as he can remember. But it’s all just a dream, right?   (Source: Yen Press)

title: Appa, Jeoneun Amugeotdo Haji Aneulgeyo
description: Just as your birth did not inspire me, so your death won't mean anything to me.    Jaina reincarnated as a supporting character who was born as mixed blood of human-dragon and died miserably after being neglected. She is branded as an unclean entity and was abandoned by the dragons.    And the first time she met her father, the lord of the tower, Diamide, he just looked at her coldly, as though he didn't feel any sense of intimacy to his daughter as described in the original.    "Is that the one you called my daughter?"    Jaina flinched as he approached and lowered her sight.    "Blue eyes... but that's not a proof that she's my daughter. You could have brought me a child born with another human."    And so he went back leaving her alone and Jaina was living in the shabby warehouse of the tower.    Rather than making vain efforts to get into the eyes of his father, the lord of the tower, she decided to have a small luxury that she had never experienced even in her previous life before her death.    "You don't have to think of me as your daughter. I won't call you father either."    "..."    "Tower's lord?"    So is the father, who should've been indifferent, starting to get obsessed? Father, can you just leave me alone?

title: Wolgan Gaseum
description: A feeling of volume that fits in both hands. Smooth surface. Pinkish shiny bumps.  </br> 1st of every month  A new heart that suits your taste will be found.  </br> Monthly Chest September 2020  •Raisin Intensive Care Room  건포도 집중 치료실  Jisoo has a lot of troubles with his bigger chest than others.  he goes to the hospital with anxiety that there may be something wrong with his body...  </br> Monthly Chest October 2020  •An Island to Become a Real Man  진짜 남자가 되는 섬  Andrew got into an accident during flight training.  After being in distress on an unknown island, he is greeted strongly by the natives...  </br> Monthly Chest November 2020  •Striker Becomes Goal  골대가 된 스트라이커  Intern reporter Lee Jae-yeon who interviewed sports star Kim Gun-woo.  I witness the reversal of the player who has only lost talent in Inseong Bottom...  </br> Monthly Chest December 2020  •Branara Panty Princess Rabbit Part-timer  브라나라 팬티공주 토끼 알바생  </br> Monthly Chest January 2021  •The Boarder Between Chocolateand Milk  초코와 밀크의 경계  </br> Monthly Chest February 2021  •A Man Calls with His Heart  남자는 가슴으로 부른다  </br> Monthly Chest March 2021  •Pit-A-Pat★Strawberry Picking  두근두근★딸기 따 먹기  </br> •Pit-A-Pat ★White Day  두근두근★화이트데이  </br> (Note the term 두근두근 is much like the Japanese Doki Doki term hence Pit-A-Pat)  </br> Monthly Chest April 2021  •Rotor Date  로터 데이트   </br> Note: Each story has a Prologue and 3 chapters.

title: That's the Guy!
description: Ji-Han Yoo played Hero of Legends but always lost to pro-gamer, Gamgak. Fed up, he jumps ship to a new game, but the guild master, Yoo-Chae, picks a fight over his gamer ID. But when Yoo-Chae finds out Ji-Han used to play HoL, he becomes obsessed. Can Ji-Han withstand Yoo-Chae's relentless pursuit?  (Source: Manta)

title: The Tyrant's Soft Side
description: Born with a scar seen as undesirable, Erica Corr thought she might never get married. That is, until she is betrothed to the ruthless emperor Carl Lakin as a noble consort. With several of his previous consorts having turned up dead, it is predicted that the sweet, gentle Erica won’t last very long. However, she discovers that beneath Carl’s twisted exterior lies a surprisingly soft side and some scars of his own. But is Erica strong enough to heal this tyrant? Or will she be his latest victim?    (Source: Tapas)

title: Cat and Dog
description: They say opposites attract. Let's see it! She's a naive country girl, playful and affectionate like a dog. He's a brooding actor, haughty and reserved like a cat. The two were arranged to be married as kids, and now it's time to start their life together. Will they be able to overcome their differences and find love?  (Source: Manta)

title: VR Hero
description: The main character, who has a very bad life in real life, experiences a 180-degree shift in his circumstances after entering the virtual world of Bitworld. Manjae was actually paying a hefty price even if he was glad to have become the strongest and to have gained a lot of fame and fortune thanks to his unexpected weapon. What will happen to the protagonist in that compulsive struggle between power and guilt… Which decision will he make?    (Source: Kakao Webtoon, translated)

title: Heungmak Gongjagui Monnani Buin
description: "Please, do not leave me."    "We should get a divorce. You don't love me, do you? We... only got married for our families' sake."    "Why… Why are you saying such things? Did I do something wrong to you? If you want me to kneel, I will. If you don’t like my face, I will wear a mask for the rest of my life. So, please… please, do not leave my side."   My husband, whom I married through an arranged marriage, is the second male lead who harbors an unrequited love for the heroine of The Saintess’ Wish, the novel I have possessed. And I, his lawful wife, am destined to endure a lonely marriage before meeting a mysterious death. For my own survival—and for his love—I decided to cleanly end our marriage. But…   "Why is he holding onto me? Aren’t you supposed to love Aria???"   "This novel’s world… is different from what I knew. What is the truth?"   (Source: KakaoPage, translated)

title: College Secrets
description: It's my first year of college, but the pandemic forced my first class to be online... The thing is... that class would be life-changing.  (Source: Toomics)

title: Sex Knights
description: Woojin, a kid born with a silver spoon, goes to a night club, as usual, to seek out someone to enjoy a one night stand. As usual, he meets a sexy girl just ripe for the taking. However, this time, this girl isn't your ordinary girl. In fact, she's not even a normal human! Based on what she's saying, neither is Woojin!    (Source: Lezhin US)

title: Return Your Soul
description: Ryeong is the only one in her exorcist family without powers—she can only see ghosts. One night, during the village festival, she encounters Yuseong, a young man possessed by a mysterious ghost. The ghost asks Ryeong to help uncover his lost memories and break the grudge that binds him to the living world. Desperate to escape her family's cruelty, Ryeong seizes the chance to enroll in Mujang-gak, the elite martial arts school run by Yuseong’s family. As a female student in a male-dominated world, she faces relentless challenges. Can she survive and uncover the truth to free them both?  (Source: WEBTOON)

title: Go Deok-Chun-ui Food Truck
description: Jun-ho inherits his late Uncle Deok-chun's food truck. He travels the country, cooking to make the name "Go Deok-chun" known nationwide. Starting with Se-hee, the heir to a conglomerate, Jun-ho gets involved with women who each have their own stories in every region he visits! They all fall for him, but the one thing that truly captures Jun-ho's heart... is cooking! Follow the irresistible Jun-ho on his nationwide romantic food truck journey-business, let's begin!  (Source: Naver, translated)

title: Justice Arcade
description: Lee Doosan is a master of the arcade. The only place he can find reprieve from the agony of adolescence, the games there act as an outlet for the stress and strain of daily life. But when he runs into his childhood best friend at the hottest spot in town—Justice Arcade—the real games begin. As the two boys try to reconcile their complicated feelings about the past with the realities of the present, will they be able to achieve a high score for their futures? Or is this reunion "game over" from the get-go...?    (Source: Lezhin US)

title: Secrets of the Mystic Moonlit Library
description: In an empire where women are forbidden from learning the ancient language, Luna cross-dresses as "Lou" to work as an ancient language translator. Sure, her actions are punishable by death, but what haunts her more are the depressing details of her future self's diary from the mysterious library in her dreams. Making money as a translator is the fastest way she can leave her uncaring uncle's house and change her dismal future. However, Luna's main client happens to be her cousin's fiance, Duke Rothenbern, who gets drugged with a potent love potion and needs her "assistance" detoxifying it...    (Source: Tappytoon)

title: The House of Diana's Choice
description: After being orphaned at the tender age of 7, poor Diana had little choice but to slave away as a maid to survive. But her fortune takes a turn when she encounters a mysterious mage who introduces himself as her mother's friend. He gifts her better clothes, a beautiful house, and even her mother's inheritance. All that's left is for Diana to spend her days living happily... until another chance meeting with a certain individual reveals a family secret that will change her life forever.    (Source: Tapas)

title: Secretary with Benefits
genres: Comedy, Drama, Romance, Slice of Life
description: Hakyung's long-time crush was his boss, Hyunsoo Jang. Without appealing to his secret crush, he's been seeing any man who resembles his boss. But one night, he was offered by his perfect boss an unusual offer, "Be my sex partner", how should Hakyung manage this relationship?    (Source: Pocket Comics)    Chapter count includes 5 special chapters and an April Fools Day special Chapter

title: Can I Help You?
description: The only one I've loved was my first girlfriend... There's been no on else after I lost her. One day, I came a young girl that looks just like my ex-girlfriend...  (Source: TOPTOON+)

title: Chawonidonghaessdeoni Tteokhyeopji Gosuga Doeeossdago?
description: Kang Yoo, A novice martial arts web toon novelist, flops his first novel. Under the impression that his career was already ruined. He starts writing a new novel with his own personal tastes he started an adult murim novel series full of milfs called “Colorful Warriors”. However, Colorful Warriors suddenly gained positive feedback and an enormous following. While feeling burdened by the unexpected reactions, Kang Yoo was accidentally transported into his own novel. In there, he meets the women he had always admired back in his world, learning to cultivate the “Art of the Snake,” which can only become stronger through yin and yang harmony(sex)…  (Source: Lezhin, translated)

title: Choemyeon Massage-syabeseo Saenggin Il
description: Heejoo, struggling to maintain her exhausting work life, comes across a flyer one day: [Women-only Healing Massage Shop – OPEN EVENT!] An intimate massage that soothes her deep-seated fatigue begins…  (Source: Lezhin, translated)

title: Jipchak Gwanggongdeuri Jabameogeuryeogo Hae
description: I possessed someone in a depraved adult BL novel and met the young obsessive male lead (Top). After being bullied by the bottom for years, he turns to a darker path in his adulthood and becomes the crown prince, indulging in imprisonment, obsession and all sorts of heinous adult past-times. Hmm… Then if the bottom never bullied the top, it would have a happy ending, right?   (Source: KakaoPage, translated)  Note: This is the promotional one-shot for the homonym novel.

title: The Giving Girl
description: Nothing went the way I wanted it to in my life, until... she gave her everything to me!  (Source: Toomics)

title: Shh, You'll Wake the Baby!
description: Hwan, a college student, is introduced to a part time job of babysitting.   To his surprise, Nabi, his employer, makes a move on him on his first night of work.   He is even more surprised when Nabi seems to casually brush off this encounter and signs him on for work.     So begins a peculiar working environment, as Hwan starts to care for Yoojoo, Nabi's son, and things get more personal and complicated between Hwan and Nabi     (Source: Pocket Comics)     Note: The chapter count includes a prologue.

title: Goodnight Cinderella
description: Hong Jin-Ju and Ji Su-Jeong couldn't be any more different. Jin-Ju is bubbly, popular, and more interested in hanging out with friends and chasing women than worrying about school. On the other hand, Su-Jeong is quiet and reserved, relying on her good grades to earn her scholarship money to afford her tuition. Contrary to her closed off and frigid appearance, Su-Jeong is secretly the model and muse for the lingerie company, “Goodnight Cinderella.” Jin-Ju is drawn to the mysterious nature of Su-Jeong and wants to get to know her better, meanwhile Su-Jeong is keen to stay away and protect her secrets. Watch as the juicy drama unfolds on campus.    (Source: Lezhin US, edited)

title: The Secret Friend
description: My friend has always dated hot girls, but his current girlfriend is my... shh! It's a secret!  (Source: Toomics)

title: Knock Me Out
description: The extraordinary love story between Eddie, a world-famous superstar who does whatever he wants, and Jae-young, who accidentally becomes his bodyguard, begins.

title: No Men Allowed
description: Simon's sister asks him to boost his account because she's busy. But it turns out the guild his sister belongs to is for women only.  (Source: Toomics)

title: Seong Jeonmun Saripmyeongmundaehakgyo, Yukgudae
description: In a world where sex rules everything, 69 University is the best sex college in the country. Students here will become the leading talents of the country’s sex industry. Hidden behind the prestigious title, 69 University’s dirty side is a promiscuous campus life where the moaning never stops. …Will I be able to graduate safely?  (Source: Lezhin, translated)

title: Michin Segyeui Extra
description: "I got thrown into this godforsaken world?!"   The infamous web novel Chronicles of the Seven-Colored World ran for over 800 chapters, gaining notoriety for being an absolute mess—with absurd plot twists, overpowered monsters, and yandere heroines who kill the protagonist on a whim. And now... I've reincarnated into that very world. As who? Some nobody named Rudian. A literal background character with zero plot relevance. But then I stumbled across two game-changing companions: a weird, googly-eyed monster named Adi, and a cursed sword known as Diablo. If this world wants to be crazy? Fine. I'll go full crazy with it. It's time for the ultimate chaotic run, and this time, the so-called "extra" is flipping the whole story on its head.  (Source: KakaoPage, translated)

title: Magic Soup
description: “Please be our slave… No, I mean our castle’s chef!”  To grant the last wish of his mother, Romiard left for the Larmanilla’s Ice Castle where an ice magician, who’s notorious for his beauty and cruelness, lives. Taken by a bear with snowy white fur, he reached the Larmanilla’s Ice Castle, but… The ruthless wizard orders Romiard to make a Magic Soup out of the blue! Succeeding in winning the heart of the magician with his soup, Romiard happens to sign an employment contract as a castle’s chef with the Larmanilla’s Ice Castle. The beautiful fantasy between a cruel magician who has a heart of stone and a friendly, warm chef now starts to unfold against a fairytale ice world.   (Source: NetComics)

title: The Princess's Guide to a Perfect Life
description: After a fatal accident, Sia is transported into a historical drama as the baby princess of a lowly concubine. All she wants is to live peacefully with her new mother, but Sia's strength and intelligence gain her the favor of the crown prince and the king. Soon, she becomes a pawn in the hotly contested selection of the new queen. With the competing head concubines and their sons using her in their race to the throne, can baby Sia save herself from falling prey to this royal charade?  (Source: Tapas)

title: King of the East
description: Long ago, ten suns rose into the sky, turning the earth into a scorched world crawling with demons. On the heavenly emperor’s orders, the hero Yae shot down nine of these ten suns. Many years later, the Solar Goddess initiates a conflict by releasing the demons with Hanbal in order to revive her sons. In response, the Heavenly Emperor calls upon Hang-ah and Dongbangsak in order to fight his wife... Can Hang-ah and Dongbangsak save the human world from the demons?!    (Source: WEBTOONS)

title: Wrath of the Underdog
description: Working as the apartment security, he had to put up with all sorts of abuse from its residents. One day, he comes across their secrets, and now the tables are turned!     "You like spreading your legs in front of a loser?"    (Source: TOPTOON+)

title: Reverse the Crazy Curse
description: Tarassa Neptunos Atlantiz was once all-powerful and truly happy as she ruled the Atlantiz Empire alongside her lover, Kaortan. But after he betrayed her and sealed her away for 1,000 years, she vowed vengeance. The next time she opens her eyes, she finds herself reincarnated as a baby, Nisefor Ruseiyan, the future Dragon Princess of the Kaortan Empire. Now, she is expected to marry the descendant of the man who betrayed her and lift a mysterious curse that has caused his lineage to go mad!    (Source: Tapas)

title: Doppelganger Game
description: A time bomb-like game starts in a certain girls-only high school! Every time the final bell rings, one person's soul is stolen away.     (Source: Hour of Lunacy)

title: Into the Thrill
description: Gifted violinist Moon Haewon has been avoiding deep connections after his mother's tragic death. But his life takes a turn when his only friend Taeshin commits suicide, leaving Haewon guilt-ridden for ignoring his calls. At a police interview, Haewon encounters Hyeon Wujin, a special prosecutor and the subject of Taeshin's unrequited love. Haewon's life spirals further as he's drawn into an assault case, and he seeks Wujin's help. Their interactions intensify, with Wujin challenging Haewon's emotional barriers. Swayed by Wujin, Haewon confronts a tangle of guilt, passion, and fear of true connection.    (Source: Tappytoon)

title: Mokpyoneun Geumsujeoro Mubyeongjangsuhagiimnida
description: Lady Adrianna isn't just a noblewoman, she's the side character in "Ramona's Tale," the favorite novel of an ill peasant girl who died tragically young. This is her second chance at life, and she's not reliving that tragedy! An evil stepmother's not gonna stop her, and Rian slowly gathers handsome companions along the way... the calculating imperial prince, the friendly count, the mysterious and brooding demon prince. After all, she is determined to live a long, healthy, and wealthy life!   (Source: Tapas)

title: Broken Boy
description: Choi Ho-Yun, the second son of a prominent government official, resorts to selling himself to a stranger to undermine his abusive father's reputation. By chance, his first client happens to be Se-Hwan, a former close friend of Ho-Yun's older brother. Se-Hwan's dark desires ignite fury and stir up the scars and trauma within Ho-Yun, leading to a secret deal aimed at tearing down the Choi family.  (Source: Lezhin US, edited)

title: Haneun Hyeongnim
description: Jin-Ho and Yunjeong, a 10-year longevity couple. Perhaps because of a long-lasting relationship, the stimulation of the relationship disappears, and to make matters worse, Jin-Ho develops symptoms of Erectile Dysfunction. I tried various things to overcome it, but the result went the worst… In front of the frustrated Jin-Ho, the best AV actor ‘Simiken’ appears.    (Source: Lezhin, translated)

title: Healing the Duke of Darkness
description: To flee from her abusive family, Evelyn Diego pretends to be a goddess from a prophecy and tricks the blind Grand Duke Devan Lantimos into believing she can lift his curse. Unfortunately, her powers fail to heal him completely, and things get even more complicated as she discovers that Devan's curse isn't quite what she thought it was. With time running out and her family looking for her, will Evelyn be able to cure Devan and get the freedom she so desperately wants?    (Source: Tapas)

title: Eoljjangsidae
description: The story of a generation filled with romance and chaos.  (Source: Naver, translated)

title: The Last Passage
description: Hell? Far from it. After all, isn't this what you wanted? After choosing to end his own life, Hui-Seo Yun awakens adrift on a wooden raft in a bleak, desolate ocean. Attacked by a monstrous creature that defies reality, he questions if it's a dream... but his instincts scream otherwise. Just when all seems lost, he is rescued by a mysterious woman who resembles a grim reaper. As he catches his breath, Hui-Seo asks: am I in hell?  (Source: WEBTOONS)

title: Nunmeon Gongjakgwa Yakonhaetda
description: Reborn as a side character in a novel, Marin swears she’ll avoid every major figure in the story. But when her family collapses overnight, she finds herself cast out onto the streets with nothing.   " I need money—fast."   Forced by circumstance, she accepts a six-month temporary position at the estate of the novel’s blind male lead, Duke Gerald.   “How is life in the duke’s manor?”   “Thanks to Your Grace’s generosity, I’m living quite comfortably.”   “You like living here? Then we should get engaged.”   Marin freezes. How does enjoying life in the manor suddenly connect to an engagement?   “Congratulations. Now you can keep living in the place you like.”   “By any chance… do I have the right to refuse?”  (Source: KakaoPage, translated)

title: Runner's High
description: Lee Jeong-hyeok enters the Department of Physical Education at Lejin University as a track and field special student. His goal is to graduate with diligence and become a physical education teacher. Following his routine, he heads out to the field the day after a training session. However, things take an interesting turn when his classmate Yoo So-ra appears. Despite having just finished her own training, something even most men would struggle with, So-ra continues to run ahead, piquing Jeong-hyeok’s curiosity. The problem is, So-ra misinterprets his gaze, thinking he’s staring at her chest. But that’s just the beginning… While drunk, the famous 100-meter racer and influencer, Im Yoo-ju, unexpectedly asks Jeong-hyeok a personal question. To make matters worse, a sports massage therapist secretly rubs her genitals on Jeong-hyeok’s hand in an attempt to suppress her sexual urges. Amidst these strange and heated situations, Jeong-hyeok must navigate through them while striving to stay on track for his graduation. Will he be able to make it through without losing his focus?  (Source: Lezhin, translated)

title: Swin! Ilgeum Gimil Bogoseo
description: A new employee, Ah-Young, has been secretly in love with her boss, Cheon Seung-Hee. Then one day, while secretly masturbating on Seung-Hee's desk, Ah-Young discovers her secret diary and discovers the shocking truth...    "What? My love, manager Cheon Seung-Hee, actually scolds people with sex every night?!"

title: Pokgunui Singyeonganjeongje
description: Note: This is a promotional one-shot manhwa for the novel of the same name.

title: Like Mother Like Son
description: What happens when your mom’s freshly-dumped boyfriend turns out to be exactly your type? In the case of Ji-Yun, his answer is obvious: sleep with him. Hyun-Soo, the ex-boyfriend in question, could probably use a rebound. And maybe a one-time rebound can become the long game. Ji-Yun just needs to make the first move…  (Source: Lezhin US)

title: Gobaek Attack
description: Hana was always second— because of Geon-u Han, who was always in first place! Hana would go to any lengths to defeat him. This time, she tried to shock him with a fake confession...  "Why are you accepting my confession? What... You like me?!"

title: Schoolboy vs The World
description: A girl at my new school asked me out. She's the school's strongest, Yi-Na Kim. Is this an elaborate scheme to punish me?   "Can the next challenger wait until tomorrow?"   Only the strongest girl can take me! Wait, do I not have a say in this?  (Source: DAYcomics)

title: Sword God: Dragon of Light
description: They called him the Calamity Sword—a rogue Mudang elder feared by the arrogant and revered by the common folk. Jeong-Hyun, once the scourge of corrupt warriors, now lives a quieter life after the death of his old friend, Mu-Baek Son, the Heavenly Demon and ruler of the Temple of the Radiant Heaven. Entrusted with Mu-Baek’s granddaughter, So-Jin, Jeong-Hyun gains more than just a ward—he gains a second chance at life and purpose.  (Source: Tapas)

title: When Pear Blossoms Bloom
description: After 13 years away from his hometown, Siu returns, reuniting with childhood friends he hasn't seen since "that incident" drove them apart. Though awkwardness lingers, their warm reception reassures him. But after a night of celebration, Siu wakes up to a shocking discovery—a kiss mark on his neck. Who could be responsible?    (Source: Lezhin US)

title: One Shot Men's Clinic
description: A men's clinic in the neighborhood is always filled with male patients. Is there something different about this clinic?  (Source: Toomics)

title: The Reason She Is Avoiding Her Childhood Friend
description: After being reborn as a baby in a new world, Arendine Ade is determined to make this life better than her last! Once a miserable and underpaid college drop-out, now she is the daughter of a baronet. With an early start to her education, she makes it her goal in this life to become a government employee – everyone knows they get the best benefits, after all. Unfortunately, her diligent studies are interrupted by the appearance of Kiershka Reinfont, the son of the grand duke. Despite his angelic face, he’s a rotten bully with the manners of a devil, and worst of all, he’s taken an interest in Arendine. With her new life at stake, Arendine will do whatever it takes to make sure this new “friend” doesn’t mess things up!    (Source: Tappytoon)

title: Heat Protectant
description: Su Seong-Hyeon, a successful hair designer, has been secretly in love with his best friend, Jeong Jun-Yeon. One day, Jun-Yeon asks Seong-Hyeon to tutor his younger brother, Jae-Yeon. While Seong-Hyeon believes Jae-Yeon to be a Beta, he starts to faintly sense pheromones from him. Then, one day, Seong-Hyeon discovers a piece of clothing soaked in pheromones among the gifts he received from Jae-Yeon. Overcome by the pheromones, he experiences an unusual heat. At that moment, while on a call with Jun-Yeon, he ends up pleasuring himself to the sound of his voice...    "What kind of insane Omega spreads their pheromones like this?!"   (Source: Lezhin US)

title: I Didn't Sign Up to Be a Nanny!
description: While working the regular shift in a supermarket, Ailene finds herself waking up in the body of a nanny within a fantasy novel. Knowing this character dies at the hands of the twin princes at the beginning of the novel, Ailene vows to raise these boys to be kindhearted and avoid their dark storyline. She fits right into her role and things seem to be looking up until the empire’s “mad dog” Duke Kasar stumbles into her life and asks her to pretend to be his lover. Will Ailene make it through the fantasy novel alive?!    (Source: WEBTOONS)

title: I Have Never Abandoned the Tyrant
description: I transmigrated…twice. As Rari, I doted on Thierry so that I wouldn’t die at his hands later. But I was murdered anyway and, seven years later, I woke up as Princess Alicia Ashtad. Thierry became a ruthless tyrant in that time and, when he shows up in Ashtad Kingdom, I agree to leave with him to protect it. Now in Thierry’s palace, I must conceal my past life and, worse, someone wants me dead…again! Thierry may be the least of my worries.    (Source: Tapas)

title: As You Wish
description: Ein Price was 35 when he was murdered. Now he’s 19 again and back in college with the man he was madly in love with: Ray Cunnington.    After saving a dragon named Null, Ein was given three wishes. The first was a sausage. The second was for Ray to be the last face he saw before he dies.    His wish was granted…    (Source: Tapas)

title: Stalker Gongnyeo
description: Note: This is a promotional one-shot for the web novel of the same name.

title: A Handbook for Villainesses
description: Laviore Rea Bailey, the fake saint and heartless puppet of the merciless Prince Sidar, drinks poison on the day the prince is to give her up as an offering to the devil. Instead of dying, she reincarnates 10 years in the past. Set on righting her previous wrongs, Laviore vows to save the slave Damian Rhode Drake, whom she had once framed as a spy. As she gets closer to the mysterious Damian, new feelings start to emerge, but will this former villainess truly be able to change her ways?    (Source: Tapas)

title: Sneak Peek
description: Ami has a special ability: she can see the dirty fantasies of virginal men. The ability is more of a curse than a blessing, and she she’s never once reaped any benefits from being able to peek into other men’s obscene thoughts. But things take a turn when she finds herself having her own x-rated fantasies…  (Source: Lezhin US)

title: Living with A Succubus
description: The girl who always smiles, and brings light to his life... is actually a succubus? One day, after a fire, she turns to him for help.  "Can you... let me stay at your place?"  (Source: TOPTOON+)

title: The Villain's Daughter-In-Law Rules by Nature
description: After six short, measly lives as insignificant items of a novel, Florine finally wakes up in the body of a shapeshifter. The problem? She's a tiny sable without enough power to turn into a human. While spending her days as a servant, she crosses paths with Kiraxus, the original novel's villain. She thinks her short life as a shapeshifter is over, but instead, he makes her the daughter-in-law of his family! Will Florine finally live the long life she desires? Or is it all too good to be true?  (Source: Tapas)

title: The Novelist and His Neighbor
description: A man moves next door to a slightly unusual but well-known novelist. As a result, something changes within the novelist little by little. And finally, the end of the story nears...    (Source: POCKET COMICS)    Note: Chapter count includes a prologue and three extras.

title: Akdangui Ireobeorin Ttari Doeeotda
description: I possessed an extra who didn’t even have a name in the novel. Her features are black hair and purple eyes that means that she is cursed. And I’m the lost daughter of the villain in the novel?! I thought I was a passing by extra, but she was actually the lost daughter of the villainous Grand Duke.   “Erita, my beloved daughter.”   “My precious little sister. I’ll protect you.”   ……are these the bloody villains I’ve seen? My father and brother, who people said to be cruel, were too sweet to me. But the villain has a death ending! It was the first time I received love and warmth, and I decided to change the cruel ending of my friendly family since I possessed it 10 years earlier than the original. Yeah, I will definitely change my family’s future……   “Erita, I love you.”   What’s wrong with the Male Lead?  (Source: KakaoPage, translated)

title: My Gangster Girlfriend
description: What started as a blind date takes a dark turn when Hayes finds out his date is a mob boss. Now, he’s trapped in a dangerous relationship he can’t escape.  (Source: Toomics)

title: Breakaway: Joys of Travel
description: Two couples take a trip to a beautiful beach house. While enjoying themselves there, they realize that some of them pair better with others. Can both pairs survive the trip? Or will there be some secret moonlight meetups...  (Source: TOPTOON+)

title: Taming the Emperor's Hound
description: I just wanted to fall in love!    About to be trapped in a loveless marriage, Esmeralda is determined to find a husband of her own choosing. When the handsome Lord Alfonse woos her at her first society event, she decides to take a gamble and asks him to court her. But why didn't anyone tell her he's the emperor's hound?!     (Source: Manta)

title: Guest House
description: A jobless loser is tasked with managing his mom's guest house for a month. All of the guests there are beautiful women. And our main character has a little surprise about him, once he gets drunk, he turns into a real chad!  (Source: TOPTOON+)

title: How to Win over Your Crush
description: At our high school graduation, the rival who had tangled with me for years suddenly confessed that he liked me. It was completely different from the victory I imagined, but still, I thought I had won. I walked away believing the score between us was finally settled. That is, until years later, when he reappeared with a small child clinging to his hand. A son. Disgust and irritation flare up all at once. A shameless fool… If his heart was going to waver that easily, why did he confess in the first place? But fine. It doesn’t matter anymore. The past, his choices, the kid—none of it changes what I already know. If I wanted to drag him back into my bed, it would be the easiest thing in the world.    In this bitter, twisted reunion, the line between victory and desire grows dangerously thin.  (Source: Lezhin US)

title: My Stowaway Diary
description: A stowaway named Lee Sesang wakes up in the middle of the ocean, aboard a cargo ship. It has already been a month since he started living there, treated like a nuisance by the crew. Branded as an unwanted intruder, he barely speaks to anyone, except for Aeri, the ship’s cook. Aeri is the only one who doesn’t outright shun him, and so, Sesang begins helping out in the kitchen, trying to pull his weight. One day, as they find themselves alone in the kitchen, Aeri suddenly smirks and says:   "Do you even know how heavy they are? Wanna try lifting it?"   Soft and squishy. A naughty little prank begins in the quiet kitchen..   "Sesang, are you… really gonna touch them?”  (Source: Lezhin US)

title: The Scandalous Proposal
description: The worst crisis in his 15 years of career as an actor! When he was considering leaving the line of business, she stepped into his life.   Her life story is even more pathetic than his. Apparently, she's about to get sold into marrying a junkie. It sounds like she can be a perfect partner...   (Source: Pocket Comics)

title: Nephilim John
description: Battle angels, Lucifer, demons and holy wars: a nephilim by the name of John is abruptly thrown into this world one day when Mikael, a battle angel, comes crashing into the room he is in.   -From mangaupdates.com

title: No Mercy
description: I thought I lost everything to my best friend, Valietta, but I didn’t expect I’d lose my husband to her as well. I, Sierra Brilloxen, was too naive to see that her copying me wasn’t affection—it was obsession. I shattered and decided to end it all. But somehow, I was given a second chance—seven years in the past. This time, I won’t let her get rid of me. I’ll take back everything she stole and show her no mercy for the pain she caused.  (Source: Tapas)

title: Jeonhak Saeng
description: Their friendship seems stronger than anything. But will it resist the appearance of a beautiful student? For Nare and Minsu, nothing is less certain. No need to lie, one thing is obvious for the two friends : Nare is completely captivated by her new classmate. So when the pretty stranger tries to become friends with Nare, the latter does nothing to stop her...

title: Jeobgeun Geumjigeoli 10M
description: Nam Joo Won is a high school teacher with a phobia of students. On the first day of classes, Joo Won runs to the faculty bathroom to find shelter from his students but encounters the class delinquent, Lee Tae Gyum. Why won't this kid leave him alone?

title: The Disloyal Subject Saves The Country
description: All the disloyal subject wanted was to take advantage of the kingdom’s fall to pocket the royal treasure. But instead… he took an arrow for the queen and ended up dead. He is awoken in an afterlife by an apostle of god who mistook him for a faithful subject and tells him his job is to restore the fallen kingdom by reliving the historical moments that shaped it. Will he manage to rebuild the kingdom to its most glorious day and go down in history as the true loyal subject or… will his greed get in the way?    (Source: Tapas)

title: She Wasn't My Daughter
description: When Diana le Pereshte is convinced that sacrificing her vision will restore her daughter's lost eyesight, her blindness reveals the hidden truth of her home—her "daughter" is her husband's and best friend's lovechild. Cast aside and left to question the fate of her real daughter, she succumbs to her death only to find she's woken up in the past, her vision now restored. With a second chance, can Diana find her real daughter and exact revenge, or will she find herself lost in the dark once more?  (Source: Tapas)

title: Kill Me With Kindness
description: Thirty years ago, Lynn embarked on a quest to destroy the Orb of Evil, but she was betrayed and sacrificed by her companions to seal the orb. Now, she has woken up in the body of a young girl, only to find out that she was framed as a traitor and is now remembered as such in history. To make matters worse, the child whose body she's borrowing appears to have been traumatized by years of abuse. Lynn is determined to set the record straight... But first, she'll avenge this little girl!  (Source: Tapas)

title: Rebirth
description: Set in an Eastern fantasy backdrop, It's a love story entailing beautiful men in a rare and obsessive BL romance. It's got it all: acting macho, feeling regret, getting fussy, destroying all surroundings, enslaving skillful characters, and a couple that exceeds all expectations!   (Source: Copin Comics)

title: Baek Ilmong
description: "Even though I don't have wings, I can fly."

title: Princess
description: Princess is a very straight forward and extremely sad series. This series is full of romance and politics. The background is an unknown medieval era where there are three countries. Among the three countries, there is an island country called "Ramira". The empire, Ramira, is where most of stories will unfold.

title: Life With My Loving In-Laws
description: Roel Linthea is a timid, fragile girl who has been mistreated by her adoptive family. She's shocked and worried when she's sent away to marry Asran Hycariel, the son of a powerful yet infamously cruel ducal family. But to her surprise, she soon learns that none of the rumors are true, and everyone there is nothing but kind. And strangely, Asran seems to have known her since a long time ago... Will Roel be able to find happiness with her loving in-laws, or will the past come back to haunt her?    (Source : Tapas)

title: Eye Contact
description: Jong-Pil is a returnee student who keeps running into Jae-Hyeong, a rude, pink-haired guy at school. One night, in an attempt to retrieve his laptop, he winds up in a drunken encounter with Jae-Hyeong. Follow Jong-Pil as he hilariously tries to sort his feelings out about his rude but handsome junior   (Source: INKR)   Note: Includes nine extra chapters.

title: Roland Roland
description: The adventure story of Prince Corgi Roland and Louisa the witch. The secrets of the high priest's past and the church, which were hidden in the veil, are finally revealed...    Note: The chapter count includes a prologue and an epilogue.

title: Bul Billyeodeurilkkayo?
description: Actually, I didn't want to be a teacher. I gave up my dream and was about to take responsibility for the path I chose, when a cocky boy said, "Would you like to lend me a light?". My life as a teacher seems to be going awry as I get entangled with this cocky kid who has genius talent, overflowing wealth, and fame. A story about school life intertwined with dreams, talent, and love.  (Source: Naver, translated)

title: Domination
description: Those “things” have been watching me. Ever since the day I felt their eyes on me, the people in my life have been acting strange. Actually, the whole world has been acting strange. Everywhere I go, I’m haunted by distorted faces and eerie shrieks. There are a few of us who have managed to evade their influence, but we don’t know why. It seems like something about me is different… special. I need to stop them from hurting anyone else, but I fear that it’s too late. Domination has already begun.    (Source: Tapas)

title: Bride of the Devilish Duke
description: An unwilling marriage, an unexpected love. Young noblewoman Ariel Patrick has always dreamt of romance and passion. To her dismay, she is instead faced with a political marriage to the cold-hearted "devil" Duke Austin Alfred. Despite his rejection, can Ariel conquer the heart of a man who knows nothing but war and loyalty to the emperor?  (Source: Manta)

title: Gyeolhon? Haedeurimnida!
description: “Do you want to easily make a huge amount of money in one go? Marry me.”    Yuseong ended up marrying Jinhyuk when the bride didn’t show up on the day of Jinhyuk’s wedding. There was too much money involved for him to say no… But somehow, they’ll be living together and using only one bed now! What’s in store for Yuseong?   (Source: Peanutoon, translated)    <I>Note: Includes 10 extras.

title: Perfect Liar
description: Georgia 2066, in a world overrun by a zombie epidemic, Ryu Kai has always admired Croix. He thought that their paths would never cross, but suddenly he is assigned a mission with him !! The implications will be more than unexpected….  (Source: Bomtoon, translated)

title: Nuga Uri Oppadeul Jom Mallyeo Juseyo
You're Perfect for Me
description: To make sure her webtoon is perfect, author Baek Mireu starts working as a maid at the Sophist Hotel to help inspire her story, but ends up in trouble that could make her lose her job. Thankfully, the good-looking and wealthy hotel president Kang Hyuk is there to save her, but there's a catch—she must agree to a contractual relationship to help get his marriage-crazed mother off his back. But even though the relationship is fake, Hyuk slowly finds that his feelings for Mireu might be real.    (Source: Tapas)

title: The Right Relationship
description: Han-Kyeol, a busybody studying to become a cop, is completely drawn to a part-timer Ji-Hoon at the newly opened dessert shop these days. He only tries to help Ji-Hoon who is the clumsiest on the face of the earth at the beginning. Nevertheless, Han-Kyeol becomes mesmerized by Ji-Hoon’s sweet, gorgeous face hiding behind the glasses and entirely falls for it. Keeping horrible scars on his body, probably from being bullied, Ji-Hoon seems vulnerable to Han-Kyeol. Ji-Hoon always thanks him for his help with a beaming smile that makes Han-Kyeol’s heart race out of control. Hank-Keol tries to convince himself and everyone else that it is only for the sake of humanity, but is that really the case? Fate has made two people from opposite poles run into each other! Let’s fall in love in the “right” relationship!    (Source: Netcomics, edited)

title: ShaMONEYism
description: Where does one find the top shamans and the most reliable fortune tellers in the country? Welcome to the stock exchange, where one prediction could make or break billions. This is their all-star match, world series, medal of arts, and olympics all rolled into one. Follow the story of Jiseung Cheon, as he breaks into the world of occult and finance, one shamanic ritual at a time.  (Source: WEBTOON)

title: Chronicles of the Cursed Sword
description: Rey Yan was an orphan with no home, no skills, and no purpose. But when he comes upon the PaSa sword, a cursed blade made from the bones of the demon king, he suddenly finds himself with the power to be a great hero. The sword's creator is the evil Shiyan, the royal vizier who needs the sword to assist him in releasing his ancestor, the demon king.   (Source: Tokyopop)

title: Dragon Recipe
description: Insia and her sword Kalsis hunt dragons to cook them at the Royal Competition.

title: Recipe for Love
description: We're cooking up a scandal!    Washed-up singer Rosa is at the end of her rope. She's jobless, her agency's just about given up on her, and her boyfriend is a deadbeat. But what happens when she's suddenly invited on to the reality show Celeb Kitchen Battle? And how will she react to meeting her one true love?    (Source: Manta)

title: Nuneul Gameumyeon Dugeunjeonseon
description: Seong-Won, a new employee and a gold digger, falls in love with team leader Yang Haru as soon as he joins the company. Seong-Won, who wants to hear the team leader's voice even if it's just an auditory hallucination because he's in love with her, ends up hearing the team leader's voice as an auditory hallucination! But is it really just an auditory hallucination? Or??  (Source: Lezhin, translated)    Note: Part of Peanutoon's Gosuwi BL Danpyeonseon (고수위 BL 단편선) Collection.

title: Recipe for Love
description: We're cooking up a scandal!    Washed-up singer Rosa is at the end of her rope. She's jobless, her agency's just about given up on her, and her boyfriend is a deadbeat.
