But what happens when she's suddenly invited on to the reality show Celeb Kitchen Battle? And how will she react to meeting her one true love?    (Source: Manta)

title: What Happens in Rio...
description: When Se-Yeon Han finds out that her boyfriend of three years has been cheating on her, she is absolutely devastated. Not wanting to stick around to deal with the heartbreak, she decides to book a flight to Rio de Janeiro and plans to forget all about her ex! During her vacation, she meets the gorgeous and alluring, Ji-Hyuk Joo, and the two decide to have a one-night stand. Se-Yeon thought she would never see Ji-Hyuk again, so imagine her surprise when she shows up to work and realizes that her one-night stand is now… her new boss.  (Source: Tapas)

title: Let’s Play Hooky
description: Jiseok hardly does any work, playing hooky and sleeping with the whole office. That is, until the new intern arrives...  (Source: Toomics)

title: Just Give It to Me
description: Havi is the girl who has it all. Money, looks, boys, you name it. She's got everything she could ever want... except for one thing. Her new boyfriend's virginity! Eager to have some fun with the guy she's hounded for a year, will Havi finally have her way with Yul? Or is getting this docile boy into bed more than she bargained for?!     (Source: Tappytoon)

title: My Husband Was Stolen Twice
description: Byeolha wakes up as Rose, the female lead of a novel who is doomed to be betrayed by her unfaithful husband, Eric. The nightmare deepens when she discovers that her best friend, who stole her husband in their past life, has also transmigrated and is now targeting her husband again. However, Rose refuses to be the victim this time. She’ll gladly let her friend have her worthless husband while she plans her escape to a peaceful life. But fate has other plans when she keeps crossing paths with Arteum, the powerful Grand Duke…  (Source: Tappytoon)

title: The Boss in the Bedroom
description: Director Gu, leader of Sales team 3 at Yeong-rong Corporation, is very adamant about keeping his personal life and his private life separate. At the office, he’s a notoriously no-nonsense boss who can’t stand sloppy work, especially from employees who got into the company using personal connections. When he’s off the clock, he becomes Yeong-Jo; the college aged, regular customer at S&M lounge bar who loves being degraded and abused in the bedroom. On a night out, he hooks up with an alluring, extremely wealthy party boy who turns out to have sadistic sexual tendencies. After thoroughly enjoying a night filled with pain and pleasure, he returns to work the next day to find a nightmare situation awaiting him. Who knew the sales team 3 latest recruit would be the company CEO’s son. And to make matters worse, he’s the same man from the night before who had Yeong-Jo crying out and moaning the word “hyung…”   (Source: Lezhin US)

title: Sinryeong
description: Divine Bells - they choose their own masters and they determine the status, prestige, and influence of the countries their masters rule. The presence or lack of these Bells also has great consequence in the lives of each country's royalty. In particular, the personal and political futures of King Hong-Ryeong seem doomed without a Bell, but at equally great peril if he obtains one.    But are the Divine Bells simple magical charms, deities of great powers, or something else altogether? And when the owner of three of the eight existing Divine Bells dies, leaving them to choose new owners, where will the resulting turmoil lead?

title: Love Barometer
description: Chaewoon is back in school after taking 2 years off. She doesn't want any trouble and wants to graduate without any incident but she can't seem to help but get entangled with not only the most popular guy in the department, Sado, but also the hot-blooded freshmen Mingyu! So much for wanting a quiet school year!  (Source: Lezhin)

title: Our Contract Marriage Ends Here
description: Marrying your childhood best friend and first love may sound like a dream come true – but not for Renee. After marrying into a contract marriage with Alexander, Renee faces all sorts of trouble, but none can match her own husband’s cold shoulder. However, a magical wish might change everything. Can a simple wish save Renee’s failing marriage?  (Source: WEBTOON)

title: Capture
description: To Gahee, sex is just a means to fulfill her artistic desires. She uses her camera to capture intimate moments of her sex partners, friends, and other couples. So when she meets Sungha, a cute phys ed major at her school, she wonders what he’d look like through her lens, what faces he’d make in bed. But she quickly learns Sungha is different from the guys she’s used to “dating.” Will he just be another photograph in her collection, or something more?    (Source: Lezhin)

title: We Got Ourselves Stuck Inside an Adult Fantasy Novel
description: There’s only so much one can take of her friend squealing over yet another cliché romance fantasy novel. But the biggest cliché of all happens when Jiwon and Yein reincarnate with Sihyeon in the exact story their friend is so obsessed with! Though God has summoned them to this new world to save it from impending doom, the three women have other plans. Jiwon wishes to rebel against the imperial palace, Sihyeon gets romantically tied up with the crown prince, and Yein is busy literally tying up her new submissive boy toy…  (Source: Tappytoon)

title: Love in Reprise
description: Seol Chae-woo is a top vocal talent at his university with a promising future seemingly his for the taking; until his life comes crashing down before his eyes. When his mother suddenly passes and his father’s business goes bankrupt, Chae-woo is now forced to work odd jobs to keep his crumbling family afloat. But when his uncle approaches him with the idea of becoming a Reset Partner - one who carries an alpha’s child for him in exchange for hefty compensation - Chae-woo has a choice to make. The only problem? The alpha in question is Chae-woo’s rival - the enigmatic dominant alpha Beom Euigeon. Will the two be able to put their differences aside and create beautiful music together, or will this low note in Chae-woo’s life become an indefinite song of sorrow?    (Source: Lezhin US)

title: Bulhaengeul Molgo Oneun Cheonjae Baeu
description: “You’ll get hurt if you’re close to him.”  “I don’t know why he’s so unlucky.”  “Yeonjae, I’m scared of you…”   Lee Yeonjae, avoided by everyone as if just being near him beings misfortune. Even he thinks it’s weird. Why do bad things only happen around me? I wonder how it feels to live a life of being loved and not hurting those around me. But, was even wishing for that too much? —Bam!! After an accident, I woke up in a strange place facing a mysterious entity.   “Strange. You should’ve died according to your fate, so why are you still alive?”   One truth I learned after meeting that entity is, I can avoid misfortune if I act like someone else. To survive, I have to become an actor.  (Source: KakaoPage, translated)

title: One Night Mate
description: U-Jin Cha wants his backpacking trip through Europe to be exciting—and maybe even a little bit spicy! Instead, his hotel reservation gets canceled, and it’s pouring rain. To make matters worse, the only person around to help him is Seung-Hyeok, his year-long crush he’s trying to forget! Despite U-Jin’s initial reluctance, one night as Seung-Hyeok’s roommate turns into another... and another. This definitely isn’t the trip U-Jin had in mind, but he’s starting to wonder, is it really that bad?  (Source: Tapas)    Note: Includes 24 side story chapters.

title: Your Romance
description: As a closeted gay man, Gyulwoo is 28 and single. He has a decent job but he’s lacking in the love department, too terrified to come out and ruin his career or reputation. Ready to live the rest of his life hiding his feelings, Gyulwoo is shocked when Hojun, his old friend from high school, appears. In the past, Hojun had revealed he loved Gyulwoo but Gyulwoo wasn’t ready to accept his love. Decades later, will Gyulwoo keep their romance secret or will he finally share his heart with Hojun and the world?

title: Wouldn't It Be Nice
description: Hyobin and Gichan have been best friends for a decade, so Hyobin naturally thought he knew everything about Gichan. He always knew that Gichan was sweet and gentle and super dependable. But when he witnesses Gichan kissing another guy, Hyobin realizes that he doesn’t know his best friend as well as he thought. In fact, he somehow completely missed the fact that he’s Gichan’s first (and current) crush. Now, it’s up to Hyobin to make a move and figure out whether this friendship is going to tank entirely or get a hell of an upgrade.    (Source: Lezhin US)

title: Deep Bloody Night
description: "During yet another endless, boring night, when I was sick and tired of everything, 'that' came for me."   The Governor General of a city in 'The Age of Chaos' finds his louche malaise interrupted by a very interesting and dangerous visitor.

title: Rewriting My Third Life
description: After being abused and killed by her family in two separate lifetimes, Blesse Lavian expects nothing from them in her third life. This time, despite knowing the horrible end that awaits House Lavian, Blesse decides to keep quiet and flee when the time is right. But the more time she spends with her cold-looking father and half-sister, the more she realizes that the Lavians aren't so bad after all. Will Blesse take a chance and rewrite her third life, or will she end up betrayed once again?    (Source: Tapas)

title: Ipdae Jeonira Geupamnida
description: "100 days left, and I'm still a virgin"    Kun-Hee is a 21-year-old university student. He has a girlfriend but is still a virgin because her, Goo-I, said that she will be a virgin until marriage. Instead of a girlfriend showing no sign of permission, a tempting offer comes to Kun-Hee, in a hurry before enlistment...  (Source: TOPTOON, translated)

title: Hana's Demons of Lust
description: Hana thought she would only be haunted by the demons of the past, however, she soon learns that demons come in many shapes and sizes. After coming in contact with lust demon Luxuria, Hana soon finds herself wanted by just about every lust demon that exists. There’s something about her body that makes her absolutely irresistible, making her the perfect prey. While she’s trying to get her head around this, Luxuria comes up with a preposterous proposition which involves…entering a contract with him?!  (Source: Lezhin US)

title: Kiss Haejuseyo
description: A story about a man with a disease where he dies if he doesn't kiss, and the secret kissing contract made in order to keep him alive; an office contract romance.    (Source: Hour of Lunacy)

title: I Swear I'm Not a Scammer!
description: Yeon-Woo's an author but his work isn't going so well and there's the slight problem of his stalker (aka his ex). When he looks for a new place to live, the landlord of the apartment is suspiciously young and way too handsome...but desperate times call for desperate measures!    (Source: Lezhin US)

title: Newfound Partners
description: Mirae recently got into a marriage of comfort with an older man. She's now got a cushy and stable lifestyle as a housewife that suits her just fine. That is until one day, her husband’s adult son Hyunsoo, abruptly returns home from abroad and moves back in. To Mirae, Hyunsoo feels like an uninvited guest in her house. Now with the sudden news that Mirae’s two voluptuous sisters are also planning on moving in, will all of these temptations and titillations under one roof be too much?    (Source: Lezhin X)

title: Until Morning Light
description: When a supposedly simple reconnaissance mission goes wrong, C-Rank Guide Chung Leehyun finds himself alone in a sort of no-mans-land, with no way to protect himself from the dangerous creatures that roam the area. He’s sure he’s destined for disaster until he runs into Francis Han, an arrogant S-Rank Esper from an opposing faction, also stranded. The two may be enemies from the safety of their respective bases, but it’s clear that out in the wilderness they need one another if they hope to survive. As they begin to work together, one thing becomes certain: their compatibility level is off the charts! It would be foolish to let a partnership like this go to waste, but can they really overcome the animosity between them?    (Source: Lezhin)

title: Savage Castle
description: Else von Roatte has never been loved by anyone. So when her servant Ian becomes the first person to show her kindness, Else knows she has to make him hers even if it’s against his will. As his master, she orders him to join her in bed each night, a fine line between duty and desire shadowing their every move. But little does Else know that Ian doesn’t actually hate her at all. In fact, Ian is secretly the exiled King Sybil, who plans to turn the tables and make Else entirely his once he reclaims his throne...  (Source: Tappytoon)

title: Sunshine Shower
description: Seo-Yun Mun’s life has been a rollercoaster of heartaches—losing his mom, dealing with his dad’s cheating, and abandoning his beloved piano. But one constant has been his best friend, Yeon-Jae U. Surprise, surprise, Seo-Yun’s head over heels for him, but Yeon-Jae already has a girlfriend. What makes it spicy? Yeon-Jae is all about pushing those boundaries, blurring the lines between friendship and something… deeper.  (Source: Tapas, edited)

title: Kwak Ha-Jun Gwancharilji
description:
Cha In-Woo, who is timid and has no presence, becomes partners with Kwak Ha-Jun, who looks exactly like his favorite student, among his new friends. While Cha In-Woo is excited to become friends with Kwak Ha-Jun while doing homework together given by his teacher, he suddenly gets caught up in a mean bet by Kwak Ha-Jun... A fresh and bashful romantic comedy between two high school students!
(Source: Ridibooks, translated)

title: Pale Bones and Blossoms
description: In a world where humans and vampires coexist, a starving vampire Jess is trapped by humans and imprisoned beneath a slave camp. The warden tortures Jess, seeking a cure for his own disease, but Jess fails to heal like most vampires. Desperate, Philip locks Johan, a former doctor turned slave, underground with Jess to nurse him. As Johan works to gain Jess’s trust, he finds himself dangerously drawn to the enigmatic vampire. Sensing Johan’s feelings, Jess pretends to return them, planning his escape. But if they break free together, can they ever truly reclaim their old lives and escape this darkness?  (Source: Lezhin US)

title: Night of Silence
description: [PUBG UNIVERSE] When Leah finally returns to her small town after five years, she doesn’t find the warm welcome she’s expecting, as she opens the door to find her father’s corpse hanging from the ceiling. The police rule it a suicide, but the longer she stays in town, the more she suspects that it was anything but. In the middle of it all is a violent book her father was writing called Battlegrounds, which has half of its pages missing. But the townsfolk don’t appreciate Leah snooping around, and there’s no limit to what they’ll do to stop her from uncovering the truth.    (Source: WEBTOON)

title: Archlord
description: The great warrior Leon Manas, son of the legendary Nathan Manas, now carries the powerful sword Brumhart. Though this blade is coveted by many, only the heirs to the House of Manas can wield it. But that doesn’t stop the sinister from trying. Ernan, once trusted knight of the House of Manas, murders his commander, robs him Brumhart and orders the death of Leon’s only son, Zian. But the men sent to perform this infanticide come up against a mysterious figure in a dark cloak who defeats them only to disappear with child into the thick of the Tass Forest. Sixteen years later, Ernan has become a feared tyrant, but still has not been able to unsheathe Brumhart. Thus begins the tale of this desperate king and the young boy who would be one.  (Source: Tokyopop)

title: The Lovely Geum Bokhee
genres: Comedy, Drama, Romance, Slice of Life
description: Geum Bokhee's first love, Yoon Geonwoo, was someone who could never return her feelings. But she held on to her one-sided crush for seven years. But everything seems to change when she encounters Kim Geonyi, a grumpy classmate whose name is similar to Geonwoo's. Though she takes an interest in him, he doesn't share her sentiments... or so it seems. Will this new relationship finally end Bokhee's unrequited love, or steer her toward an ending she doesn't expect?   (Source: Tapas)

title: Isegye Kang Chef
description: Kang Taeyang, a chef who chased his dreams. One day, he lost everything due to a single choice. But an opportunity came to Taeyang, who was spending hopeless days working odd jobs. [Aurora is hiring employees.] A single line of text changed everything for him!  (Source: Naver, translated)

title: A Fairy-Tale Ending for a Fake
description: Adopted into a ducal family, Odette Grizelle is merely a “fake” daughter, a stand-in for the duke’s long-lost real daughter. Bullied by her brothers and looked down on by the maids, life isn’t easy for Odette. So when the duke’s real daughter Beri is found, Odette thinks it's finally time to make her exit. But surprisingly, Beri is thrilled to have her as a sister, and Odette now sees she has more supporters than she thought. With their help, can this fake find a real-life fairy-tale ending?    (Source: Tapas)

title: 99% in Love
description: School is hard, but love is even harder—especially when you’re as popular as Lee Do-Ha. Fortunately for him, his best friend Seo Jun has been by his side to ward off his worshippers since they were kids. Unfortunately for him, however, Jun has also been harboring a soul-crushing love for Do-Ha since the day they met. So when the two enter high school, Jun will do whatever it takes to keep Do-Ha safe from the swarms of admirers that hover around his every move. Under the pretense of keeping him safe from others’ affection, he takes the opportunity to realize his dream of a relationship with Do-Ha—even if it comes in the form of a contract with its own set of terms and conditions. As the two dive deeper into dating, will Jun and Do-Ha add up to be a 100% match? Or is Jun destined to live in love purgatory, always giving 99% of his heart to his one true love?    (Source: Lezhin US)

title: Residents' Committee is in Session
description: After his divorce, Zackary Nam moves into a new apartment and finds himself surrounded by many beautiful tenants.  (Source: Toomics)

title: The Sexy Alien Next Door
description: Just after moving to a new apartment complex, Jeong-Tae meets his sexy next door neighbor, Yu-Mi. To his shock, he discovers she is an alien with an insatiable thirst for semen, and the two begin to enjoy secret sexual encounters. Complications soon arise when Yu-Mi’s husband comes back from his business trip, but while Jeong-Tae knows it’s wrong, he just can’t get the sexy alien next door out of his mind!    (Source: Lezhin X, edited)

title: Black Dragon's Choice
description: To others, Im Jin-Ha is a superstar. But to attorney Cha Yul-Ri, he’s just a loyal customer at her mom’s book rental shop who exclusively reads books with dragons in them. After Yul-Ri gets fired from her job, Jin-Ha offers her a spot on his agency’s legal team, with her law school senior as her boss! However, Yul-Ri doesn’t know that her new workplace holds an ancient secret. Something... draconic. Could it be that Yul-Ri and Jin-Ha's relationship goes beyond just books?    (Source: Tapas, edited)

title: Dating My Way Up
description: Handsome, stylish, and capable, Jinah is often mistaken as the heir of the company he works in. In reality, his polished look is just that--a facade he maintains in hopes of entering elite society. It’s not easy to keep up appearances, but Jinah is surely inching up the social ladder. Until, that is, a bungling subordinate nicknamed the “ticking bomb” is assigned to his team. Like Jinah, though, new team member Do-hyeon is not who he appears to be.    (Source: Lezhin)

title: Under the Cherry Blossoms
description: The tale of Snow White, re-invented!    Learning her stepmother had been trying to kill her for the last ten years, Yi Hwa flees from the palace for her life. She desperately searches for Sa-eon, firmly believing he will help her out... But when she finally finds him, he flat out refuses to take her in, as he has enough of a hard time trying to support his six siblings. No matter how much Yi Hwa pleads with him, Sa-eon's answer is an unwavering "no" - an answer which she, of course, refuses to accept!    (Source: Lezhin US)    Note: Chapter count includes a prologue

title: Blaze Out
description: Once a promising high school baseball player, Yeon Hong’s bright future is shattered by a tragic car accident, leading him to uncover the involvement of private loan sharks. Seeking revenge, he transforms into a loan shark himself, establishing “Coco Loan.” However, twelve years later, Hong’s journey takes a surprising turn when the powerful President Yoo Jaeyoung orders Hong to mentor his mysterious lover, ‘Panther.’ Now tasked with making Panther a suitable heir to President Yoo’s colossal loan shark empire, Hong starts to question Panther’s true intentions. What drives Panther to become a private money lender under Hong's guidance? Is there an ulterior motive behind his approach and if so, why did he choose Hong?    (Source: Lezhin)

title: Imsin Haeran
description: Hong Doo-kke, who lived on a secluded island to escape the Imjin War, ventures into the sea on the anniversary of his father’s death to find a sea anemone. However, he is reborn into an alternate Joseon era in another world…!In this alternate Joseon era, a curse afflicts men, causing their descendants to wither. Reincarnated as Hong Doo-kke, he faces a challenging trial alongside Princess Somyeong to overcome this curse.Will Hong Doo-kke be able to break the curse of this alternate Joseon era and ascend to the throne?  (Source: Lezhin, translated)

title: Han Beon Haebwa?
description: When the hot-tempered Han Hye Won accidentally insults the handsome jjang of Han Hwa Go, Sun Woo Bin decides to pay her a visit...with his entire motorcycle gang, ready to see some blood. So how does that lead up to a kiss and the infamous captain begging for a date? Do you want to try?

title: Singles’ Royale
description: Find love and…500 million won?! Three women are about to take on a special challenge to escape their “forever alone” status. The “airhead” Jurim, the “trash collector” Seona, and the “devout Christian” Chaeyul are ready to compete for both money and love for the first time ever. Who will take it all?  (Source: WEBTOONS)

title: The Elite Princess’s Handbook to Becoming Valedictorian
description: Isabel, a princess from a kingdom under the rule of the Eternity Empire, is forced into marriage with Count Valon, a noble of the empire. Haunted by a nightmare, she recalls memories of her previous life and a grim future where she endured a miserable marriage filled with constant disdain and neglect from her husband. Determined to change her fate, Isabel seizes an unexpected opportunity by enrolling in the empire’s most prestigious institution, Kavalla Academy. Upon earning the top spot in her entrance exams, Isabel quickly becomes the center of attention, catching the eye of Chris, the imperial prince who also attends the academy. As she navigates academy life, Isabel hones her abilities, confronts shadows of her past, and forms new friendships. Step by step, she prepares herself for the challenges ahead, driven by her determination to create a future free from the tragic fate she once faced.  (Source: Lezhin US)

title: a real life PK
description: "I wanted to meet you, master. Sincerely"   Liam is a challenger who is as good as pro gamers, and a virgin. One day his friend promises him that she will set him up with a girl if Liam helps her boost her score in Legends of League. When he was playing the game at internet cafe, he ends up having a real life PK. Unexpected lucky encounters lead to game-like events.  (Source: DAYcomics)

title: Two Heretical Heroes
description: Ci Yunye is an unruly yet clever servant at the Gansu Xie Clan. Xie Xiufan, the eldest son, is the only one he respects and fears despite their differences. But when the clan head's new wife schemes to take over the house and harm their loved ones, the two set out to gain power and get revenge on her. As they strive to do so, they find themselves on the Heretical Path, away from orthodox martial arts. Their skills may be called evil and demonic, but Yunye and Xiufan will bring justice with them!  (Source: Tapas)

title: Mistaken for the Villain's Lover
description: Enter Heilbronner: gentleman thief! The main villain of a novel, who fought against the heroes, steals from the rich at night, but by day takes on the identity of Ludger Kassen, the philanthropic son of a duke, more interested in history than politics or power. As commander of the ragtag Ruby Knights, isekai’d knight Clara has no choice but to get involved in the Heilbronner case. However, in doing so, and in working alongside Ludger himself, Clara learns he secretly has far grander motives...    (Source: Tapas)

title: Your Eyes, My Words
description: “Every day, I ravenously awaited those 30 minutes”... Hwane is studious, careful, and serious. Jinha is popular, cool, and fun. They seemed so different, and yet, throughout high school, they secretly met up for silent, passionate encounters. Hwane treasured these moments—until he is betrayed by Jinha’s denial of him to their classmates. It haunts him even into adulthood. When chance brings them back together, will it restart their hot love or will they both be burned in disaster?    (Source: Tapas)

title: Gudusin-eun Sonyeo, Undonghwasin-eun Sonyeo
description: The story of a friendship between two teenage girls in their third years of high school — 'Dong-ah' who likes to simplify things and 'Hoo' who tends to overthink.

title: The Elite Princess’s Handbook to Becoming Valedictorian
description: Isabel, a princess from a kingdom under the rule of the Eternity Empire, is forced into marriage with Count Valon, a noble of the empire. Haunted by a nightmare, she recalls memories of her previous life and a grim future where she endured a miserable marriage filled with constant disdain and neglect from her husband. Determined to change her fate, Isabel seizes an unexpected opportunity by enrolling in the empire’s most prestigious institution, Kavalla Academy. Upon earning the top spot in her entrance exams, Isabel quickly becomes the center of attention, catching the eye of Chris, the imperial prince who also attends the academy. As she navigates academy life, Isabel hones her abilities, confronts shadows of her past, and forms new friendships. Step by step, she prepares herself for the challenges ahead, driven by her determination to create a future free from the tragic fate she once faced.  (Source: Lezhin US)

title: Let's Get Hitched
description: Yeon Bo-Ra is the CEO of Wedding Violet, Korea's top wedding shop. Although she's respected at work, it's the opposite at home, where she's mistreated by her grandmother and cousin, Ji-Yeong, due to her parents' past. Ji-Yeong even uses this dark secret to threaten Bo-Ra and her business. One day, out of anger, Bo-Ra proposes to top star An Do-Un, knowing Ji-Yeong has her eye on him. But not only does he accept, he actually shows extreme interest! Who knew that he would say yes to a total stranger?!    (Source: Tapas, edited)

title: Gudusin-eun Sonyeo, Undonghwasin-eun Sonyeo
description: The story of a friendship between two teenage girls in their third years of high school — 'Dong-ah' who likes to simplify things and 'Hoo' who tends to overthink.

title: Singles’ Royale
description: Find love and…500 million won?! Three women are about to take on a special challenge to escape their “forever alone” status. The “airhead” Jurim, the “trash collector” Seona, and the “devout Christian” Chaeyul are ready to compete for both money and love for the first time ever. Who will take it all?  (Source: WEBTOONS)

title: Off Stage
description: A top secret K-pop romance!   Everyone knows that PAZE is the hottest idol group in Korea. But when one of the members gets injured, leader Haeun and main rapper Jaehyuk have to form a two-man unit in order to keep the group alive! But... why is Jaehyuk so happy about this situation?!  (Source: Manta)   Note: Includes one extra chapter.

title: Gajeonggyosa
description: Seong-Hun’s parents hire a private tutor to help him prepare for the University entrance exam, but what his parents don’t know is that this private tutor uses unconventional methods as an incentive to help her students improve their grades.  (Source: TOPTOON, translated)

title: Heal, Heal, Heal!
description: At a bar on the first day of school, Go Shinjae, a tall and handsome dance major student from a prominent family, hears drunk Baek Hanbin, a pale photography student with huge tacky glasses, confessing his love towards a person he met online in a game. The drunken love confession Go Shinjae would’ve normally laughed off, was a bit strange. For some reason, the person that drunk guy likes seems to be him. The next day, Go Shinjae decides to shrug it off but Baek Hanbin walks into the classroom of an elective Go Shinjae’s taking. On top of that, Go Shinjae and Baek Hanbin end up becoming a group for the rest of the semester. What will happen to these two both offline and online?    (Source: Pocket Comics)

title: Sihanbunikka Gyeyak Gyeolhon Hamnida
description: "Please be my husband for just one year! I only have one year left to live."    The way she chose to escape from her vicious family was marriage.    “You have a secret lover, right? I’m going to die anyway. I’ll be your air-like wife to fill that empty space.”    It was nice to escape the house by proposing to Duke Kaiyen, the Grand Duke of the North and a war hero known for being cruel…    “Gwama disease is not an incurable disease. It shouldn’t be.”    The duke is so kind to me that it’s melting my heart! Duke, I thought you have a lover…?    (Source: KakaoPage, translated)

title: The Queen's Realm
description: When rogue pirate Francis Drake comes face-to-face with Elizabeth I, Queen of England, it looks like the end of the line for his crew. But instead, the scoundrel and the sovereign join forces to take down the Spanish Armada, forming one of history's most unlikely alliances. As they work together, this money-crazy man and power-hungry woman find that there may be something else that makes their hearts race... But in the midst of political turmoil and impending war, does love stand a chance?    (Source: Tapas)

title: 21-segi Bannohwandongjeon
description: A society where martial arts warriors dominate the underworld. Heo Pung-gae, a Taoist monk who has been living since the end of the Joseon Dynasty, compulsively practicing good deeds and following the path with the impure motive of not wanting to die of old age at the end of his lifespan, suddenly undergoes a reversal one day... Among extremely selfish people, he loses meaning in the good he does. Will the bragging dog be able to achieve the climb he wants?    (Source: Naver, translated)   Note: Includes one extra chapter.

title: Horeojeonpasang
description: “Please keep in mind. This shop is not responsible for any harm caused by the electronic device.”    A mystery horror about the strange electronics shop owner, ‘Yak’.

title: Pokgunui Gajeonggyosaga Doegetseumnida
description: If there is no “Beauty” in “The Beauty and the Beast”, then who shall lift the Beast’s curse? “One day, someone trapped in a world of black and white will appear, and stain your world with blood.” Thanks to this prophecy, the “Beast”, Prince Reynsis, was abandoned and left to fend for himself. To undo the curse, he needs the “Beauty”, but the only problem is-- "Who the hell is this beauty supposed to be?!" I reincarnated into my own, incomplete novel before I wrote about the beauty’s appearance! All I know about the “Beauty” is that she has black hair and crimson eyes...but after witnessing Prince Reynsis’ unfortunate childhood firsthand, I resolved to go and find the Beast’s beauty myself! Note: This is a promotional one shot manhwa for the novel.

title: Confessions of the Night
description:
Enoch is a priest that has lost the love of his life. One day, he comes across a familiar face in the church where he preaches. The man, also called Ray like his beloved, pursues him posing as his late lover and Enoch decides to go along with his ruse. Will Enoch be able to resist temptation? Or will he end up making a pact with the devil?
(Source: Lezhin US)

title: Itangugui Jacheongbi
description: A fantasy romance transcending time and space! Jacheongbi, a student of Taekwondo, stumbles into the world of an ash-scented palace!    After a spectacular win in the national Taekwondo trials, Jacheongbi meets a man from her dreams in the hospital garden. After choosing to follow him, Jacheongbi is led into a lake by the hand and opened her eyes to find herself in a glorious palace! Stuck in a strange country with no friends, how will she be able to return home?    After hearing a tale of death in the river only to return to life with her help, Jacheongbi realizes her way home is through the river! Rather than returning outside where it’s full of danger, she remains in the place where she awoke. A situation in-which her mind couldn’t be made up...    A handsome crown prince, her savior the Prince of Misfortune, and the playful, tomboy princess who claimed ownership of Jacheongbi--- She begins preparing for a quick, safe return home...  (Source: Comics Naver, translated)

title: Her Situation
description: Having to lie about a nonexistent girlfriend to date a charming girl. Is this relationship going to work out?  (Source: Toomics)

title: The Princess is Going on Strike
description: Shunned and forced to mask her disfigurement, Arryll lives a miserable life as the illegitimate child of Duke Brixia. When her family’s crimes come to light, she dies a miserable death as their scapegoat. Then Arryll goes back in time… Now armed with future information that will help expose her family, Arryll plots her revenge and teams up with the captain of the royal guard, Ethan Velstein, to serve justice. However, her family’s crimes may go beyond just fraud and embezzlement…    (Source: Tapas)

title: Booty Camp
genres: Comedy, Hentai, Romance, Slice of Life
description: Ever find the one that got away? Ha-Rim and Eun-Ju are old high school classmates who never got to fulfill their desires of being with each other. After graduating, they went their separate ways. But one day, they bump into each other and old flames get rekindled. Things are about to get hot and heavy, but there’s just one thing. This stud has prioritized athletics above all else, meaning Eun-Ju will have to show him the ropes in bed. Will they experience the ultimate high-intensity bedroom “booty camp” or will Ha-Rim’s obsession with fitness get in the way of everything?    (Source: Lezhin US, edited)

title: Surviving as an Obsessive Servant
description: A reader is magically transported into a BL novel called The Night of Hwangseong. She now inhabits the body of Lobelia Flore, the daughter of a noble family suffering from a rare illness. Lobelia discovers that the only way to avoid a painful death is to remain in close physical contact with Edric Dencart, the young, beautiful, and sickly duke. To do this, Lobelia disguises herself as a man named “Lobel” and commits herself to becoming the Duke of Dencart’s most trusted manservant.  (Source: Tapas)   Note: Chapter count includes a prologue.

title: Game-ui Beopchik
description: Yun Si-U is a master of the fighting game "Bloodfist”. Even in real life, he can see a system that usually appears while playing games. Feeling bored with the game, Si-U turns towards actual combat, and tries to use his abilities to conquer his school, but is defeated by the snow leopard Hong Min-Jae. In order to compete with him again, Si-U joins the martial arts club "Lalapalooza"…    (Source: Naver, translated)

title: Intense
description: The mafia banishes Jiwoon Kang to live in a secluded red light district amount struggling prostitutes, dirty street thugs, and shady drug dealers. He's a quiet man with a deadly talents with a knife. The local thugs quickly learn to hate him. To maintain peace a brothel manager sends Jiwoon to live with a strange local man Soohan. Soohan is a mute. He only wishes to be left alone and help prostitutes in need. The street thugs hate him, too. Both man carry deadly, dark, and traumatic secrets in their past. They may find their only solace and protection...lies in each other.

title: To My Rude Darling with Multiple Personalities
description: Life has never been easy for Monica Orphen. She spent her childhood at an orphanage before becoming a war nurse. During the war, she met a soldier named Sol, whose face she never forgot. Years later, by a stroke of luck, she runs into Sol again...except he says his name is Louis? But then the next time she runs into him he’s Garcia, then after that… Enrique? Monica isn’t sure what’s going on, but she isn’t going to give up until she finds out who this man really is!    (Source: Tapas)

title: We've Already Broken Up, Your Majesty
description: After a fatal carriage accident, Rumiere Lashantia wakes up disoriented and is diagnosed with amnesia. While her identity and distant memories remain intact, her recent memories seem to have been erased. In her journal, she finds a chilling entry: “You can’t love him.” The man in question is Carl Winger, her ex-lover, whom she broke up with days before. Despite not remembering him, Rumiere is drawn to Carl and is determined to uncover the truth about the nature of their relationship.    (Source: Tapas)

title: Powerless
description: It’s time! Introducing, in the “powerless” corner, the former undisputed MMA champion Gwangho Hwang, with a professional record of 49:1 and a reputation for all kinds of dirty tactics, returning fresh from a supposed ‘permanent’ suspension. And in the “powered” corner… well, folks, let’s just say it’s a murderer’s row of deadly opponents with an array of special abilities. Welcome to the octagon, the ultimate showdown between a league of enhanced super-fighters going up against Gwangho’s brawn and his manager Seyeon’s brains! The bell rings for Round 1. Touch gloves, and face the pain! Here… we… go!  (Source: WEBTOONS)

title: Gureumeul Nubineun Sonyeo
description: A village like fairytale. A meeting of a sixteen-year-old boy and a girl.     (Source: MrBlue, translated)    Note: Chapter count includes a prologue.

title: Gajeongbureul Butakae
description: When college student Ban Chan hits his wealthy underclassman Doyun's car with his motorcycle and runs off without taking responsibility, Doyun tracks him down and informs him that he owes him 10 million won in damages. Broke, in debt and unable to escape the consequences of his hit-and-run, Ban Chan loses his girlfriend and his job and ends up working as Doyun's temporary housekeeper. As the two young men get to know each other better, Ban Chan learns that Doyun's family is rather dysfunctional. He was abused by his brother for being gay, and he's being stalked by his obsessed step-sister who refuses to believe it and has convinced herself that he will one day marry her. To get rid of her, Doyun offers to reduce Ban Chan's debt if he pretends to be his lover, and he agrees. But what happens when this fake couple develops real feelings?    Note: Includes an extra.

title: My First XXX: The Black Knight Under the Red Curse
description: Ratan the mage is being pursued by the knights of the inquisition for studying the forbidden Red Curse. When he seeks refuge in The Black Forest, he runs into its deadly resident knight in steel armor who happens to be the curse's victim. Thankfully, Ratan's offer to lift the curse keeps the knight from killing him. But the solution involves some heated action in the bedroom, and Ratan isn't so sure that he'll survive to see another day...    (Source: Tappytoon)   Notes:  - Part of RIDI's Cheot XX Danpyeonseon (첫XX단편선) Collection.  - Includes three extra chapters.

title: Working It Out
description: Maeng Byeongtae has it all — a privileged background, a flawless physique, and more than enough where it counts. As a personal trainer, women were just passing distractions, good for relieving tension and nothing more. But everything changes when Seo Jihye walks into his gym. A new client. A married woman. The kind of trouble Byeongtae usually avoids without a second thought. And yet, something about Jihye — her quiet poise, the way loneliness clings to her — begins to shake his resolve.  (Source: Lezhin US)

title: Fall for Me!
description: Hong Yeo-Ul is just an ordinary high school boy… who attracts every guy he meets! And it’s all because he’s possessed by a highly seductive fox demon called a maegu! The only way for him to be freed from this creature is to either undergo a ridiculously expensive exorcism… or succeed in dating a guy who won’t fall for him. Unfortunately, Gu Hae-Jun, the only person who fits that bill, isn't the least bit interested in dating anyone! Will Yeo-Ul be able to win Hae-Jun over?!    (Source: Tapas)

title: Hitpoint
description: Ha On-Bit, a boy who suffered from heart problems after a car accident, has a dream where he is killed by an unidentified assailant. The relief of it being a dream only lasted for a moment, though, as On-Bit ran into that mysterious person exactly as it had happened in his dream. While he is running away, he comes to the realization that a deadly weapon that can destroy everything is inside his heart.   (Source: Naver, translated)   Note: Includes one extra chapter.

title: Toymaker Tria's Tyrant Problem
description:
As the ordinary owner of a toy workshop, Tria spent her days struggling to pay off a mountain of debt with the help of Shadie, her trusty shadow friend. Luckily for her, a mysterious, half-dead client shows up one day, offering a jaw-dropping amount of money to make an expensive toy. Despite being wary of the man and his circumstances, Tria accepts the commission. But it doesn't take long for her to realize that this dictatorial client is just one of the many tyrants that will plague her shop...

(Source: Tapas Media)

title: Drip, Drip
description: Jaehyeok, who lost his dream due to a series of events, in front of him a ray of hope comes to find him. Placed in a Korean highschool.

title: I'm the Final Boss Villainess He Must Kill
description: Hongyeon Kim has spent her afterlife generally being bored. So when a new program is introduced to entertain the dead, Hongyeon jumps at the chance to be transported into her favorite novel. However, when she finds herself in the body of the villainess, the demon princess Bella, she attempts a spell to speed up time to the end of the novel. Instead, she finds herself ten years in the past. Now, she must wait fifteen years to escape all while living with demons and raising the main character!  (Source: Tapas)

title: Road to Stardom
description: After a tragic accident, Seo Jihoon suffers a horrible injury that mars his face. With his dreams of being an actor seemingly dashed, he spends his time working in a small shop while imagining another life. But when he chances upon a spirit who heals his injury, Jihoon is given a golden opportunity to chase his goal once again. The road to stardom won’t be easy, but with the help of his special guide and some unique friends he meets along the way, he’s going to give one “spirited” performance!    (Source: Tapas)

title: The White Room
description: People are locked in a white room with nothing but the clothes on their backs... Who put them there? What do they want...?  (Source: Toomics)   Note: Chapter count includes a prologue.

title: SSS Romance Collection
description: Antstudio brings you a collection of five stories that transcend time and space, with each one filled with more love and romance than the last. This collection takes you from a world of demons versus humans to a manor full of unexpected relationships and magical surprises. After that, it brings you to a "sew"lful grand empire and then to a humble sweet potato farm full of lonely longing. Finally, you return to the present day as you reminisce about past loves by "drawing" on happy memories. (Source: Tapas) 1. The Tyrant Princess Wants to Get Married (폭군 공주는 결혼이 하고 싶어!, Pokgun Gongjuneun Gyeolhoni Hago Sipeo!) [Somnip, Ppangyaui Nubeopja, Nubi] 2. Winter Magic at Nordfield Manor (노드필드의 겨울엔 마법이 있다, Nodeupildeu-ui Gyeouren Mabeobi Itda) [Yeongyeon & Se-Woon Jeong] 3. The Needlepoint Swordmaster (자수 놓는 소드마스터, Jasu Nonneun Sodeumaseuteo) [ Wolhet & Nubi] 4. The Field Warrior (밭 가는 용사, Ban Ganeun Yongsa) [Da-Da Lee,Ye-Seul Kang, Yu-Sin Kim, Shalom] 5.Chalkboard Doodle (칠판 낙서, Chilpan Nakseo) [Heung and Hong, Saejagga, Ha-Rim Jung]

title: Die, Please!
genres: Comedy, Romance, Slice of Life, Supernatural
description: "I just want to tell him how I feel!"     Mi-Na has been planning on telling Yeo-Myung she likes him. But every time she goes to confess, something foils her plans. It turns out Yeo-Myung and Young-Woong, her best friend, were actually plotting to kill her. But why?!     (Source: Manta)

title: Cherry Picking
description: Is being a virgin a good or a bad thing? For 24-year-old Joo Hansol, it’s a pain in the ass. Why you ask? Because he finally managed to meet the love of his life but was coldly rejected just for not having any experience. So, he makes it his mission to have his cherry popped. But it won’t be that easy, especially when his best friend is Do Woobin. A man of many talents, Woobin seems to be the only one capable of reining the impulsive Hansol in. Will Hansol succeed in his quest to finally have his cherry picked…?   (Source: Lezhin US)

title: Diamond Dust
description: Having lived as a beta his whole life, Seo Yee-Hyeon never imagined his path would cross with a golden Alpha like Liu Weikun - someone so far above his world it, felt like fate would never even bother. But one day, Weikun catches an impossible scent adrift in the air: the sweet, addictive pheromone of an Omega…coming from Hyun. Stranger still, it’s a scent only he can perceive. As desire and instinct blur into obsession, Yee-Hyeon finds himself caught between disbelief and temptation, his world crystalizing into one he never thought possible…  (Source: Lezhin US)

title: Gongjakgaui Yeokdaegeup Sindong
description: Note: This is a promotional one-shot for the web novel of the same name.

title: Good Night, See You in My Dreams
description: A long corridor bathed in red… A ghostly figure lurking in the shadows… Dozens of hands, their long, spindly fingers grasping at your throat… Sounds like the stuff of nightmares, right? But it’s not the kind of thing that troubles Seongha. She’s just your average high-school kid with a head full of exam stress. Her classmate Isu, on the other hand, has been plagued by that very dream for years. And it’s taken its toll, leaving her exhausted and alone. So one day, when Seongha finds herself inside Isu’s dream, both girls know that something seriously freaky is going down. Can Seongha save Isu from her nightmares?    (Source: Lezhin US)

title: Yeojuingongui Cheotsarangeul Taraksikyeo Beorimyeon
description: "I am a Knight of Latem, destiny that cannot stand under the same sky as you."   The body that came into the book and became possessed was Karina Apocalita, a member of a heterogeneous race that reigned as evil in the world.   But in the original story, the heroine Paladin Ren, who was the first love of, almost saved the life of the novel, the content of the novel began to twist. Reneger doubted his faith, and eventually lost his brilliant white blonde hair.   So the holy paladin became corrupted and eventually sympathizes with Karina's fate.   “Now we have each other's desires," Karina said, stroking his cheek. It felt like a seductive thorn vine was pulling me in, one by one. Reneger couldn't cut it down.  “God, please forgive me."    (Source: KakaoPage, translated)

title: The Most Ordinary Girl
genres: Drama, Romance, Slice of Life, Supernatural
description: Have you ever wished you were special? Se-Gye Lee certainly doesn’t! She wants nothing more than to be ordinary, but her extraordinary strength keeps landing her in hot water, like the time she accidentally knocked down the wall separating her home from her neighbor’s. Her good-looking neighbor, Ju-Won, is surprisingly nice about it, but he has secrets of his own. Then Yeong, who granted Se-Gye her powers, comes back into her life. Se-Gye asks him to make her normal again, but why does it seem like her life’s about to become much less ordinary?  (Source: WEBTOONS)

title: This Marriage Will Surely Succeed
description: Despite her unquestioning loyalty to the emperor as his knight, Iona is left to die on the battlefield by her uncaring master. The last person she expects to come to her rescue in her final moments is her husband, Duke Leroy Hann, who was forced into a political marriage with her. Once she dies and wakes up as her past self, Iona decides to abandon the emperor and devote herself to making Leroy happy. Can she make this unlikely marriage work this time around, despite Leroy's distrust and the people determined to come between them...?  (Source: Tappytoon)

title: Shattered Ties
description: Once tormented, a man returns rich and powerful to destroy his teacher—using her own daughter.  (Source: Toomics)

title: Sin Mauiseon
description: The god of the Jeongpa and the magic of the Sapa. Two legendary doctors are getting married? Father is the god, mother is the magic. An absolute master appears before Dan Ak-Seon, who inherited his parents' medical skills. That fateful meeting leads the young Dan Ak-Seon to the world of martial arts...  (Source: Kakaopage, translated)

title: Dreaming: My Friend’s Girl
description: I have everything that I ever wanted. A big house, a nice job, and even a beautiful fiancée... However, ever since I ran into my first love, I would give it all up to be with her, even if it means cheating on my best friend...    (Source: TOPTOON+, edited)

title: A Tale of Felluah
description: Ortez, first daughter of Duke Tesa, marries someone she’s never even seen before. An exciting love story that starts with an arranged marriage!    (Source: Copin Comics)

title: The Masters of Heaven and Earth
description: The tales of the heavens are no different from those on earth. Tongmi just wants to live an ordinary, peaceful life. However, with new kinds of thugs appearing left and right every day, it seems like the world has other plans for him – plans that involve him becoming a legend.  (Source: WEBTOON)

title: I Became the Ghost Duke's Daughter
description: Unwanted as an heir, Theresia Oblen is sent from her noble home to live with the ghostly Duke Everdin. As someone who can see phantoms, the haunted rumors mean little, but the residents of Everdin Manor are no average ghouls. Despite their lively warmth, they live under a curse that turned them into invisible beings. Theresia hopes that by absolving the woes of the manor's true evil specters, she can restore the duchy and return home. Can she put these spirits to rest and finally live in peace?  (Source: Tapas)

title: Eoneu Jjogi Joa?
description: “I need your help, assistant manager. By that… I mean sexually.”     A sad office worker by day, reigning dom by night! Yang-Hwa, who lives a risqué double life, has another secret. Her gender changes whenever she has an orgasm, and the only way to change back is to have another orgasm… But why… did I have to have an orgasm with my irritating boss, assistant manager Kang, of all people…?!     (Source: Bomtoon, translated)

title: I Became the Ghost Duke's Daughter
description: Unwanted as an heir, Theresia Oblen is sent from her noble home to live with the ghostly Duke Everdin. As someone who can see phantoms, the haunted rumors mean little, but the residents of Everdin Manor are no average ghouls. Despite their lively warmth, they live under a curse that turned them into invisible beings. Theresia hopes that by absolving the woes of the manor's true evil specters, she can restore the duchy and return home. Can she put these spirits to rest and finally live in peace?  (Source: Tapas)

title: Most Wanted Wife
description: My husband is hot on my trail!    Eloise, a fugitive with a dark past, and Lord Johannes, the temple’s relentless hound, enter a marriage built on lies. With one year to live, Eloise must steal the Stone of Time from Johannes without revealing her identity. Can she survive this deadly game of deception?    (Source: Manta)

title: Lizzie Newton: Victorian Mysteries
description: Lizzie Newton, a young upper crust lady with a budding career as a mystery writer, is expected to know her place in Victorian society. Her father has arranged for her to marry the handsome Edwin White, who has put his rising career as a lawyer on hold to prove his love to Lizzie.    While the headstrong Lizzie tolerates earnest Edwin, she is not yet ready to accept him as her fiance. Besides, Lizzie is distracted by something far more important: an apparent suicide has occurred in the manor, and Lizzie is ready to solve her first real life murder case!    (Source: Seven Seas Entertainment)

title: The Secret Pleasure Report
description: From reckless one-night encounters with strangers, to shameless nude confessions in secluded parks... this is the secret pleasure report, unveiling every forbidden moment of men and women’s most dangerous, intoxicating desires.  (Source: Lezhin US)

title: The Villain
description: The top dog of Busan is moving to Seoul. Will he be able to take over the new city?  (Source: Toomics)

title: I Became a Dog!
description: Hyunwoo wakes up to find himself buried under a million-dollar debt. But there's a way out. If he agrees to become a literal 'dog,' he just might escape paying it back!  (Source: Toomics)

title: Mujin
description: Lee Seon-Ho was falsely accused of parricide crime for murdering his own father. He lived through each day without being able to die. One day, Seon-Ho was approached by a mysterious old man and offered a desired deal that he could never refuse…    (Source: Naver, translated)

title: Oneulbuteo Cheonsaengyeonbun
description: Rising stars and longtime childhood friends, So Dakyung and Ji Minwoo. The scandalous open 'business relationship' is rapidly evolving to 'marriage'! But somewhere in this whole marriage, is something a little suspicious.     <I>"Before the summer you turn 29, you must succeed in marrying So Dakyung."    What kind of story did he have with his old note?    (Source: Naver, translated)    <I>Note: The chapter count includes 3 side stories.

title: I Created a Harem by Accident!
description: In a hardcore adult novel full of wicked villains and frustrating situations, Selena Crawford is the female lead who suffers endlessly. When a nameless actress wakes up as Selena, she is determined to use her wit and acting skills to stay away from the male lead and change her fate. But as she struggles to do so, it seems that even more possible love interests are drawn to her. Can she cleverly avoid the male lead and kick out the villains? Or will she just end up in a bigger mess?    (Source: Tapas)

title: The Duke Needs His Coffee
description: Beauty, brains wealth—Duke Claude Winterville had it all, except one thing: sleep. Then April Renoen, a healer-barista, walks in and cures his insomnia with a single cup of her coffee. As they grow closer, Claude discovers that it's not just her coffee that captivates him, but the woman herself...  (Source: Manta)

title: After Killing You
description: Mismatched lovers Eun-Seong and Hyeon-U face a bizarre twist of fate. When Hyeon-U abruptly ends their relationship, Eun-Seong finds himself committing the darkest of crimes. However, Eun-Seong wakes up in a world where the cold body in his arms isn't Hyeon-U's and instead, he's the one who's been killed... In this surreal switch, Eun-Seong realizes a chilling truth—their destinies are entwined in a dark cycle of love and murder. Despite this deadly paradox, Eun-Seong still believes they are meant to be together, and this time he won't let anything get in his way...    (Source: Lezhin, edited)

title: My Other Girlfriend
description: My girlfriend and I are at a stage where we're getting bored with our relationship... The only thing that can respark that... is another one...?  (Source: Toomics)

title: Fatal Mistake
description: Han Sung-Min, an escort who repeatedly fails to satisfy his clients is given a last chance to make a big score. But by some twist of fate, he mistakes the wrong man for his client and leads him to the hotel—only to discover that the man is actually a mob boss...    (Source: Lezhin US)    Note:   - Chapter count includes a prologue.  - Part of Lezhin's Gwanggong Collection (광공단편선). A gwanggong (광공, hanja: 狂攻) character is obsessed with the object of their desire, similar to the Japanese "yandere". Scanlations have erroneously translated this to "GwangGong Apartment/Industrial Complex", which may have caused confusion.

title: I'm Finding a New Husband
description: After being returned to the past multiple times, Lyatte finally succeeds in escaping execution by murdering her treasonous husband. The only catch is that each time she returned, it cost her half of her remaining lifespan, and now she has less than two years left. Determined to live the rest of her short life to its fullest, Lyatte decides to hold a contest to find a new husband. Will the competition be a success, or will Lyatte's time run out before she can experience true love?  (Source: Tapas)

title: Return of the Gods
description: U-Ju Hyeon dreams of living the ordinary life of a high school student, but his dream will never come true as he possesses special powers that others don’t have. One day, after being chased by an evil spirit, he is taken to the School of the Tiger and learns that he has a dragon orb in his body. Will U-Ju be able to protect himself and the dragon orb from evil spirits?    (Source: WEBTOON, edited)

title: From Morning to Night
description: When the town of Night relocates all of the townspeople to build a temple for its goddess Obscurity, 12-year-old Mane and 9-year-old Nox start a new life in the neighboring town of Morning. Trouble awaits them when Nox vanishes as if by magic, and Mane turns to Morning’s goddess Lumiere for help. Told that he must vanquish Obscurity to save his kidnapped sibling, Mane is given the body of a grown man and sent on a perilous journey. Will Mane be able to save his sibling in a world where nothing is as it seems?   (Source: WEBTOONS)

title: I'll Take That Marriage This Time
description: Adored by her noble family, Saina Devof had a perfect life until one night ruined her societal debut, her family’s honor, and her future in one fell swoop. Determined to fix her mistake, she chooses to marry the man from that night, only to find herself trapped in a nightmare that ended with her lonely death. Then, she woke up. 18 years old again with a second chance at life, Saina swears off marriage for good. But her plans change when he appears:   “I want to be your choice.”   Enter Duke Constantine—the man determined to rewrite her destiny.  (Source: WEBTOON)

title: Jeonsaengui Wonsuga Apparagoyo?
description: I lived to the age of 19, only to be constantly taken advantage of by fake family members. With the vow to seek revenge still fresh in my mind, I made the choice to live my life again. Yet why have I returned to the night I was kidnapped from a burning castle?     "Hwelp me! Hwelp me! The willian ish twaking Maedie!"     My savior ended up being the enemy's son?! For days and nights I followed him to the enemy's castle, but upon arrival, a warm welcome...     "Ack! Father! Second Brother's picked up another living thing!"     ...wasn't what awaited me.     (Source: Kakao, translated)      Note: Webcomic prologue of the homonym web novel.

title: Campus Love
description: After a humiliating breakup, Kibum suffers from recurring nightmares of his cheating ex. But a new school year always comes with the added anticipation of romance, and Kibum is more than determined to spice up his love life once again!  (Source: Lezhin X)

title: D:AZE
description: In a world where vampires exist, a special undercover agency keeps the rest of society safe by hunting them down. Agent “First” Shin is the best of the best. The only problem is he keeps losing partners, so he’s decided to stick to working solo. However, his manager has other plans, and a recruit is assigned to him. The new guy just won’t leave him alone, yet annoyed as he is, First also can’t ignore his model-like new partner. Is it his potential as a partner... or something else?    (Source: Tapas)

title: Pond Where Flowers Fall
description: Woojoo and his older stepbrother Hanbit have always been close, with Hanbit doting on his little brother as if he had known Woojoo from the very minute he was born. However, Woojoo has a little secret… Swearing to push his forbidden feelings away, Woojoo tries to behave like an innocent little brother in front of Hanbit, until one day, Woojoo suddenly manifests as an omega. Now, Woojoo is not the only one with a secret…    (Source: Lezhin US)

title: Consumua and Sudutist!
description: Jung Woo spends most of his time nerding out, looking at various fanworks of his favorite characters. One day, he meets the artist of his favorite fanworks, Yoo Jooin, and the more he spends time with her, the more he falls for her. An artist and her number 1 fan: a match made in heaven?    (Source: Lezhin US)

title: Kangtawoo
description: Hyeon Kang, a self-centered high school kid, has to bear the burdening fate of being the master of 'KANGTAWOO', the only robot that can stand against 'Spelta Empire', which seeks to conquer Earth. A giant robot action in Busan!

title: In Good Faith
description: Prosecutor Baek has built his career by manipulating evidence and witness testimonies with the help of a gangster. His success catches the attention of higher-ups in the prosecution, who now want him to clean up his act and arrange a marriage with a woman from a respectable family. Seeing this as the perfect opportunity to discard the gangster who has been clinging to him, Baek accepts the proposal. However, the gangster - who has long harbored feelings for Baek and aided him in his illicit dealings - feels a deep sense of betrayal and rage upon hearing the sudden news. Now, with resentment festering, their once-covert partnership threatens to unravel in ways Baek never expected…  (Source: Lezhin US)   Note: Part of Lezhin's SS Short Story Collection (SS 단편선) or the Depraved Collection in english. Chapter count also contains prolouge.

title: How to Protect My Male Lead
description: Overcome with grief, Iris cradles her dying husband, Crown Prince Cedric, who was betrayed by her own bloodline. Suddenly, she's transported to another dimension where Cedric's life is written in a book, and pleads for the power to change the ending. That's when Iris is sent back to the time before her marriage, armed with the knowledge of impending treachery and determined to reshape Cedric and her destiny. As the past unfolds anew, Iris must outmaneuver both her family and the emperor to secure a future for them both. But can she truly alter fate, or is tragedy inescapable?    (Source: Tappytoon)

title: Winter Breeze
description: Set against the backdrop of a wintry Seoul, Winter Breeze tells a story of second chances, hope, and the unexpected warmth that can bloom even in the coldest seasons. Two years after their fleeting encounter at Seoul Station, Hae-Na is reunited with Do-Hwa at a newly opened photo studio tucked away in her quiet neighborhood, and finds herself drawn to the mysterious photographer she hasn’t been able to forget. Is their reunion merely coincidence, or is it the beginning of something meant to be?  (Source: WEBTOON)

title: Three's Company, Or Is It?
description: One fun, slightly tipsy night with her brother’s two best friends, Jiwon and Eunho, turns into a threesome Yeonhee never expected... and then somehow, it happens again. Who will she choose? Jiwon or Eunho? Who will emerge victorious as the winner of Yeonhee's heart... and lower regions? To add onto her troubles, she has to keep this all a secret from her older brother, Yeolchan. Will they pull it off? Or will one slip-up bring everything crashing down?  (Source: Lezhin US)   Note: Includes 18 extra chapters.

title: The Little Saint and the Grand Duke of the North
description: Everyone knows Duke Windzorice is a cold, powerful man, but for the young saint Lilliette, he's a kind adult and just the person to save her from the Temple's abuse! After healing his eyes, Lilliette is granted a home at Windzorice Castle, but the Temple's not willing to let her go. That's when the duke comes up with a foolproof plan to keep her by his side... They'll say she's his daughter! Can this fake family vanquish the Temple and live in peace? Or will the little saint suffer once more?  (Source: Tapas)

title: The Seductive Wife
description: Some marry for love, and some marry for convenience. In I-Jae’s case, she marries Yu-Heon, the son of a business tycoon, to save her family after her father ends up in deep debt. Even though their marriage is contractual, I-Jae feels an intense attraction for the cold and calculating Yu-Heon. Every night in her dreams, she imagines what it would be like to make love with him… until one day, the two end up actually sharing a passionate night together. But will their physical chemistry be enough to build a genuine connection? Or will I-Jae remain a pawn in Yu-Heon’s game?   (Source: WEBTOONS)

title: Home Sweet Home
description: The last thing Jungyeon expected was for his mom to ask if she could remarry. The new man was kind, considerate, a perfect match for his mother but there’s a catch: he has a younger son. Sunwoo is an introvert. He’s shy and has trouble opening up to others, until he meets Jungyeon and finds himself opening up for the first time. As their parents get closer to marrying, they become close, too close, and that’s when Sunwoo learns Jungyeon is already seeing another man.  (Source: Tapas)

title: Corridor of Mirs
description: Baek Nabi is saved from a speeding truck by a handsome man who disappears from the scene before she can thank him. The experience gives her the ability to see shadowy creatures attracted to negative emotions and a strange bracelet she can’t take off. It’s hard enough being a high schooler, but now she faces a supernatural world of Reapers and past lives. Why now and why her? Join Nabi as she simultaneously slays high school and Reapers, while unraveling the secrets that tie her to the mysterious new men in her life.    (Source: Comikey)

title: Tomorrow
description: Jun-Ung, an unemployed college graduate, slips into a coma when he accidentally falls off of a bridge. While he's in a comatose state, he gets an offer from the crisis response team of the underworld company Flashback to temporarily join their team. If he accepts this offer, he could wake up early from the coma and even get rid of the karma from his past life that’s been holding him back from getting jobs! He’s got nothing better to do tomorrow, so it’s a beautiful day to save lives… with these grim reapers!!    (Source: WEBTOONS, edited)

title: Double Life
description: Seol-Hee used to work with Jae-Wook at an amusement park before he got fired for beating up a pervert who harassed her. They meet again at night where she works a second job, as a karaoke hostess. Can she handle two jobs and a relationship?  (Source: TOPTOON+, edited)  Note: The chapter count includes an epilogue.

title: S-musaeneun Salangeul Tago
description: Nagyung couldn't contain her anger at the sound of moans coming from the next room every day. Let's knock on the door where continuous groans keep coming from. A naked neighbour greets us! A hot roco GL with a neighbour!

title: Chronicles of the Grim Peddler
description: The Grim Peddler waltzes through fairly tales, giving the stories' inhabitants their hearts' desires. But benefactors beware, for his gifts don't always turn out quite as expected! Classic fables like Sleeping Beauty, Hansel and Gretel, The Frog Prince and more are turned on their side.  (Source: Udon Entertainment)

title: Wedding Plans for Mr. & Mr.
description: Gyeong-Won Yu is a successful wedding planner. Though excellent at planning other people’s weddings, he’s terrible at planning his own love life and is always falling for the groom. This rings true when his one-night stand, the handsome Gang-U Seo, becomes his new client. Despite their unexpectedly hot first meeting and their endless magnetic attraction, Gyeong-Won now needs to plan Gang-U's wedding. Can Gyeong-Won keep his cool to design the perfect wedding? Or will he succumb to the groom’s lustful advances?    (Source: Tapas, edited)    Note: Includes three extra chapters.

title: Doppelganger Yeosachin
description: You’re kidding me, right? Why are there two of you, Ban Yeri…?! Both Yeris are saying they’re the real one. People will notice if we’re both out and about… Minwoo, can we stay at your place?  (Source: TOPTOON, translated)

title: Recipes for a Ravenous Succubus
description: It’s Baekyoung’s 10th day as a succubus and she’s hangry for a meal. As a matter of fact, she’s getting downright desperate. Of course, a gourmet meal would be preferred but at this point any man will do, she just needs some sustenance. Ah, that guy right there! He looks a little nerdy but he’ll do for now. But it turns out that this meal will be much juicier than Baekyoung ever anticipated and now she can’t get this human off of her mind. The ravenous succubus has found her perfect meal, now she just has to make him all hers!  (Source: Lezhin US)   Note: Includes one special and seven side story chapters.

title: Maid
description: A wealthy man hires a maid to take care of his son who is currently in a coma. Something happens that night and soon, she is asked to leave the house. What could have possibly gone wrong?  (Source: Toomics)

title: Don't Touch Me
description: Since he was a child, Kang Dokyung has been able to see an eeire black smoke that caused people to get hurt. One day, he runs into a man covered in this smoke, who turns out to be his infamous school sunbae Park Woohyun. Though wary of his cold demeanor at first, Dokyung is surprised to find out that whenever he touches Woohyun, the smoke disappears. Ecstatic to finally use his special gift for some good, Dokyung is determined to help his sunbae to get rid of the darkness surrounding him.    (Source: Tapas)

title: Friends at First
description: Everyone has memories of their first love. For Dong-Ha, however, his first love only ended in regret. In high school, Dong-Ha’s feelings were reciprocated by his crush Sung-Wu, but Dong-Ha avoided his first love for fear for losing his friends if they found out about his sexuality. It wasn’t until later that he tried to express his true feelings, but by then Sung-Wu had disappeared from his life. As Dong-Ha remains remorseful of hurting his first love, One day he receives a package from Sung-Wu. Inside is a novel titled, “Memories of Sorrow from Gyeongseong.” After reading the book, Dong-Ha finds himself sucked into its fictional world. And there he meets novel’s version of Sung-Wu. This time, Dong-Ha vows to never lose his first love again… Two lovers reunited during the Japanese occupied Korea, will they be able to find each other this time?    (Source: Lezhin)

title: The Alpha Agenda
description: Jaehee’s always prided himself on being a reasonable alpha. All that pheromone nonsense between alphas and omegas? Ruts? Heats? He thinks it primitive, and considers his two-year long relationship with the beta Yeowoon as true, pure love. But all that comes to a screeching halt when he finds himself stuck on a bus with an older omega going through heat. After one night of passion(and infidelity) with the said omega, Jaehee finds himself tormented. He’d always thought himself as a nice guy above all that alpha stuff, so what is he to do now? Jaehee knew that night would be the ruin of him but he didn’t know just how much, until he comes across the same omega on campus…    (Source: Lezhin US)    Note: Includes seven extra chapters.

title: Smile Brush: My Old Pictures
description: Hilariously drawn, centered around a humorously short boy named Waru, his friends, and his memories. The memories are all based on according pictures that were taken during those moments...

title: Gungeneun Gaekkochi Sanda
description: She is beautiful, persevering but what amazes people is her sharp mind. Sharp minded enough to become the next empress. However the prince despises her... How will she manage to make him fall in love with her?

title: Bullet Time
description: Helltham is a crime-ridden city ruled by the Golden Bite Family, whose boss dies in a mysterious accident. When Seven, the family's degenerate third-in-command, is named as a promising candidate for the next boss, he plans to use his power to live it up even more. However, he gets stabbed in the back by his long-time partner, Felix, who turns out to be a spy working with the city's only law enforcement agency. Felix then offers him two choices at gunpoint: either work with him to take down the Golden Bite Family or sleep with the fishes.  (Source: Tappytoon)

title: Proof of Dignity
description: Geon-Yeong is a brilliant girl. Despite being underprivileged, her exceptional intellect allows her to enroll in the prestigious Pyeonghyeon High School. There, she meets new competitors and friends. She struggles to compete with all the other privileged students who have expensive lessons. Amidst these challenges, she is determined to succeed and become a judge. This is Geon-Yeong's journey to prove that despite the disadvantages life has dealt her, she is worthy of respect.    (Source: WEBTOON)

title: Elegant Desire
description:
What’s the chance of running into your first love again after twelve years? This is exactly what happens to Solhui after attending her frenemy’s bridal shower. What’s more? Her first love is having an affair with a married woman. But that’s not all. She meets him and the woman again when she starts a viola lesson with a new student.

(Source: WEBTOON)

title: Juveniles
description: Before a child is born, somewhere in the world, they will have a dream. Do you have a dream? In this world, everything is precious. A child is left in a märchen fantasy.

title: Wonted
description: There are three different types of people in this world:  Those that are born ordinary,  Those that were born ordinary but can change,   And those who are born with special powers...  The first arc is about the past of the two main characters.  The second arc - Wonted Cacophony- is the official 'Wonted' set six years later.

title: When a Thousand Moons Rise
description: What if you were fated to be murdered in every life? Living in a small countryside town, No-Gyung Lee thinks her biggest problem is her unrequited crush on her childhood friend. But No-Gyung is cursed destined to be slain by the same villagers every time she's reborn. With no memories of her previous lives, she must unravel the mysteries of her village and the legends surrounding it in order to stay alive. Can No-Gyung finally break the curse or is she fated to relive this tragedy forever?    (Source: Tapas)

title: Isang-ui Gwangye
description: Han Ho Jun decided to take a modelling career because he admired Li Tae In. Li Tae In... a skilled top model, and an unparalleled beauty, but was rumoured to have a nasty personality. But then, Ho Jun accidentally met Ho Jun's eyes during a rehearsal and they kept running into each other after that. Were those meetings just some coincidences?  (Source: Random Fujoshis)

title: When a Thousand Moons Rise
description: What if you were fated to be murdered in every life? Living in a small countryside town, No-Gyung Lee thinks her biggest problem is her unrequited crush on her childhood friend. But No-Gyung is cursed destined to be slain by the same villagers every time she's reborn. With no memories of her previous lives, she must unravel the mysteries of her village and the legends surrounding it in order to stay alive. Can No-Gyung finally break the curse or is she fated to relive this tragedy forever?    (Source: Tapas)

title: Nappeun Jjogeuro
description: Instead of holding her accountable, Marie makes a strange suggestion to Seon, who is falsely being accused to have stolen the class' money. Was it a helping hand?    (Source: Naver, translated)

title: Pokgunege Yeuireul Gareuchimnida
description: Promotional Manhwa for the webnovel.    I came into the world of a novel I was reading, and became an unknown extra destined for a miserable life. Teaching manners to a crazy bastard who turns into a tyrant?    Manners, my ass!    Quick thinking was my only means of survival. I tried everything to prevent such a tragic relationship with the tyrant from happening. I kicked, punched and screamed his head off, but I was still beaten in the end. Actually, he’s unexpectedly docile at times and even told me,    “You’re the first person who understands me.”    The male lead’s personality is strange.

title: Defense Mechanism
description: Su-Ho isn’t the kind of guy to care deeply about other people. He’s tried the whole infatuation thing once, and it didn’t work out. He’s pretty determined not to repeat the ordeal. Yul is equally, if not more, aggressive about keeping personal boundaries. When the two of them collide, their defensive reactions cause sparks to fly. But are those sparks merely angry ones? Or are they more?    (Source: Lezhin US)

title: Beasts of Desire
description: Power. Pleasure. Both can drive one's humanity to its extremes. So when Jin Hyeon-jin, president of the prestigious Jinhwa Company, is suddenly found dead, his son Sihyeon can't help but to question everyone around him. Most suspicious of all is Kang Seung-tae, a recent external hire who is shrouded in mystery; yet this cold and calculating figure may be Sihyeon's only hope for discovering what really happened on that fateful night. And so, he proposes a deal...he will help Seung-tae become the successor to Jinhwa if the latter is able to get to the bottom of his father's fateful demise. But words alone will not be enough to convince the enigmatic-yet-carnal Kang, who desires more: "You. Your life. Your everything. That is what you bring to the table."    (Source: Lezhin US)

title: Your Fetters
description: Sun-Hee is intrigued by the arrival of the indifferent new girl from Seoul and wants to befriend her. Eun-Byeol puts up a cold exterior and ignores Sun-Hee, who attempts to make friends! When the two finally become friends, Sun-Hee soon starts to question her own feelings for Eun-Byeol      (Source: INKR, edited)  Note: Includes 1 extra chapter.
