title: Seiren
description: Right as Asmodeus was on the brink of being awakened, an obscene and devilish "Siren" has appeared. All who are seduced by this evil spirit will find themselves immersed in lust and end up getting destroyed. Meanwhile, a crusader known as "Bato" finds himself lost and struggling after losing all his comrades in a war that was influenced by evil. But as he finds himself seduced by the Siren...  (Source: Lezhin, translated)   Note: Chapter count includes a prologue.

title: Appa Sijibga?
description: Gong U-Jin is a passionate salesman at Bubble Doll, a doll toy company for girls! You fell in love with a married man with a child you met by chance? Gong U-Jin and Lee Do-Hyeon's relationship develops due to successive coincidences.    ① A married man   ② The father of a child  ③ A lot older  ④ Straight, maybe?     Even though he can see the mountain he has to overcome, U-Jin can't control himself, he's still attracted to Lee Do-Hyeon... What will this couple's fate be?    (Source: Lezhin, translated)

title: Summer Snow
description: One day, in the middle of summer, it suddenly starts to snow. What sort of changes will the snow bring?

title: The Summer Guest
description: Sanwoo is spending his summer employed as a custodian of an old house, where his lonely days are filled with nothing but manual labor and reflections on the past. One day, however, Sunwoo’s solitude is interrupted by the arrival of Eunjae, the handsome young heir of the house. As old memories and feelings come flooding back, slowly the two boys slip into a steamy summer passion. But when another visitor comes looking for Eunjae, that’s when things really begin to heat up…  (Source: Lezhin)  Note: Includes 1 extra chapter.

title: Big Boss Gone Bad
description: Woo Soo-han is what you would call the “complete package.” He’s young, physically fit, handsome, and has flourishing career to boot. He’s got everything anyone could ever desire, except maybe a relationship. That never bothered him, as work has always been his main priority. Everything changes when he meets his close hyung (and work subordinate)’s wife, Nayoung. From the moment he laid eyes on her, he felt an inexplicable attraction. Soo-han knew it was wrong and tried to forget about her, but when the two cross paths at a night club, and he ends up taking an intoxicated Nayoung back to her house. After discovering her husband isn’t home, Soo-han finds that he is no longer able to control his urges…  (Source: Lezhin X)

title: The Sibling's Woman
description: A not-so-beautiful love story between a woman and a pair of siblings caught in a complex love triangle.   During her monotonous days as a part-timer in a cafe, amateur photographer Hyeon-U meets a beautiful woman named Hui-Eun.   Secretly taking photos of the woman - who appears at the same time and sits in the same place - is the only thing that makes Hyeon-U’s world continue moving. However, after a week of her secret hobby, Hyeon-U’s eyes meet the woman’s across the viewfinder. What will happen to Hyeon-U now?  (Source: POCKET COMICS, edited)

title: Jambokgeunmu
description: A refreshing story of love and passionate detectives solving the biggest cases in all of South Korea! In the Korean Police Department, there is a team in charge of investigating violent and special crimes. Directly from the “Violent 01” team, Detectives Han Jeoung-yu, our prodigy son, and Seo Haeso, wild mad dog, make their appearance! Ready for anything to find answers! From infiltrating a club frequented by the most powerful businessmen in the country to ... Competing in a passionate kissing contest for a luxury watch?! Get ready! That your covert mission… is about to begin!  (Source: KTOON, translated)

title: First Love Complex
description: Yoo-Chan is a young man who can't get over his boyfriend from high school, who was his first love. Since then, Yoo-Chan dated people that resembled his ex, but every time the relationship failed. When Yoo-Chan spends a night with Nam-Hyun, whom he thought was the opposite of his ex, he gets a surprise!    (Source: INKR Comics, edited)

title: A Bittersweet Life
description: A collection of sweet stories about couples and singles, office workers and unemployed people. But be warned: there’s more than a touch of bitterness here.   (Source: WEBTOONS)

title: Averted Gaze R
description: Dahye and Dawoon are siblings that live together with their parents. Their relationship is a bit rocky since Dawoon has always been their parents’ favorite and Dahye holds some resentment towards him. Dawoon, who is a high school dropout, is always in his room playing games. Dahye starts noticing that he’s acting weird, and after finding a disturbing story in her brother’s computer, she starts fearing him and what he might be capable of doing. So she enlists the help of her aunt and best friend to try and find out what is wrong with Dawoon.    (Source: Lezhin)

title: Uwolhanharu
description: What would you do if you found out that your neighbour is a serial killer?   But more importantly: what would you do if some unknown third person was trying to make you kill him?!

title: Pick-up!
description: The dynamic and elite college life of a freshman who rolled up to an eco-friendly campus in their car.   "Pull over... I want to do it right here."  (Source: TOPTOON)

title: Just Like You
description: Chungho thinks it’s unfair how Jun gets away with everything. Why should he be the one labeled as a troublemaker, when his best friend is clearly the one not sticking to the dress code? But then again…how could anyone not fall for Jun’s charms? He’s smart, popular, nice, and to top it all off…extremely handsome. It’s really no surprise Chungho himself’s been crushing on the guy for as long as they’ve known each other. Chungho tells himself that this is just enough, that he’s satisfied with liking Jun from a safe distance. But little does he know, his crush might not be so unrequited as he’d thought, and someone might be feeling the same way…    (Source: Lezhin US)    The first sixteen chapters (Season 1) are R15. From chapter 17 (season 2) they are R19. Chapter count includes 5 extras and one special episode.<I>

title: The Wild Flower of the Palace
description: Hun is the carefree crown prince of the Taesa Kingdom, wholly uninterested in state affairs and devoted only to his lover. However, Ryuha, his appointed bride, has other plans. With her ruthless tactics and political finesse, Ryuha plans to charm and educate him so that he stands a chance at surviving... But the imperial concubine and her son are dead set on taking the palace for themselves.     Ryuha must navigate the lies, spies, and savagery of the concubine, whereas Hun must face his growing feelings for Ryuha and figure out why she feels so familiar to him. Meanwhile, a mysterious tragedy from the past tying the two together threatens to rear its ugly head. Will Ryuha be able to use her wit and charm to protect Hun and take hold of the palace before it's too late?    (Source: Tappytoon)

title: FLOWAR
description: “Wake up.” These are the words Sora Han hears right before her heart stops and then begins to beat again. The first and only person in the world to successfully have a plant heart transplant, Sora has felt an inexplicable pull to go to outer space ever since her operation. At 25 years old, she finally gets the chance. But why does everything on the planet she travels to seem familiar? Sora learns more about herself on this journey than she could have ever imagined.    (Source: WEBTOONS)

title: Baekjo Mudeom
description: Anna, a dimensional traveler, enters the mansion of Margrave Lohengrin, known ominously as the "Swan Grave," as a maid in search of a way back to her original world. There, she encounters Margrave Rothbart, who mistakes Anna for his missing wife and forcibly takes her. He then makes her an unexpected offer:   "Be my wife in her place."   He then reveals that to return to her original world, Anna must "bear a child with a person from this world." As she ponders this, Rothbart's son, Svanhild, lingers by her side, pleading, "I want a mother, Anna." A relationship with a definite end. A condition she cannot refuse. Desperate to return to her original world, Anna accepts Rothbart's offer...  (Source: Ridibooks, translated)

title: Blindspot
description: Seon Jin-Woo’s life takes a sharp turn when someone he once helped vanishes—leaving him stuck with a mountain of debt that isn’t even his. Refusing to give in, Jin-Woo stands his ground. But loan shark Seong-Hyeon has other ideas, pressuring him to seal an unusual deal: a contract that uses his very body as collateral. Which begs the question, how far are you willing to go to pay for someone else’s mistakes?  (Source: Lezhin US)   Note:   - Chapter count includes a prologue.  - Part of Lezhin's Gwanggong Collection (광공단편선). A gwanggong (광공, hanja: 狂攻) character is obsessed with the object of their desire, similar to the Japanese "yandere". Scanlations have erroneously translated this to "GwangGong Apartment/Industrial Complex", which may have caused confusion.

title: Exchange Student
description: After Yong-Cheol's mother suddenly faints on the day of her college entrance exam, her world is turned upside down. She starts working to pay for the hospital bills, but one day after work, a university jacket randomly lands on top of her head. Inside the jacket, she finds the ID card of a student named Chae-Yeon Lee. One thing leads to another, and she starts impersonating that student. While things seemed all right initially, the real Chae-Yeon finally shows up. How will Yong-Cheol explain her way out of this, and does this mean the end of school for her?    (Source: WEBTOONS, edited)

title: My Lover, My Teacher
description: To the outside world, Kyujin and Doyeol are cousins who live together. But behind closed doors, the younger Doyeol is a reckless lover that Kyujin somehow can’t disobey. Unwittingly, Kyujin triggers Doyeol’s possessive side as he finds himself entangled with Jimin, a rebellious high schooler he’s tutoring. Cousin, teacher, and student—all roles and rules are bound to be broken.  (Source: Lehzin)

title: Unsta
description: The strongest man of the Murim, “Asura,” got transported to another world. Having reached the pinnacle through his martial capabilities alone, he smashes the status window and the tower with his own hands—rejecting participation as a player outright.  (Source: Naver, translated)

title: Uri Jim Sarinma
genres: Action, Comedy, Horror, Mystery, Psychological, Romance, Slice of Life
description: Normal family, normal looks, normal personalities. For someone who is not special, I have become somewhat like the main actor from an action thriller-horror movie. Or perhaps from a romantic comedy movie? No, a slice of life movie? Wait! whatever it may be, Why! Why has this happened to me? The special story of a Korean standard university student, Woo-Ri Nam, is starting!

title: Cheon Kiss-neun Gyehoekjeogeuro
description: When she came back to life, she became an extra in a novel. Living in the palace of the cruel emperor’s as a villainess concubine, her throat was cut because she tormented the heroine!     What should I do at this moment?    Get close to the heroine? No.    Get close to the male lead? No, not that either.    Survive to have long and fine life? All of it!    Three years have passed since she lived peacefully as an outsider of the Imperial City. As long as the novel ends with a happy ending, she thought she could be free.    “Who are you…”    “All this time…”    …What?    “I’ll listen to you.”    “Huh?”    “I’ll listen to whatever you say. Can we live together then?”    The servant who came into my easy life.    I live a happy life with him. Sometimes he’s a kind servant, and other times, a dear friend…The problem is, I can’t seem to take my eyes off him when he smiles saucily and flirtatiously with those red eyes.    …Is it because of my feelings?

title: At Your Mercy
description: Getting transported into a novel once? Unusual. Twice? Welcome to Ji-an Han’s reality. Her second possession lands her in the body of a noble lady with an unfortunate reputation—the court fool. While still adjusting to this twist of fate, the enigmatic Crown Prince Iskan enters the scene with an unsettling proposition: "Take me as yours," he says, "I’ll become your most cherished possession." Between her reputation as a fool and a prince whose motives remain unclear, can Ji-an navigate this complicated new reality?  (Source: WEBTOON)

title: A Bad Case of Junioritis
description: Teen angst in full swing.   U-Jeong's hopes for a normal sophomore year are dashed after a run-in with Se-Ra, a foul-mouthed troublemaker, who has a few choice words for him. What starts out as a simple accident snowballs into a big misunderstanding, and now U-Jeong finds himself tangled up with a bunch of depressed juniors!    (Source: Manta, edited)

title: Heart Crush
description: Second-year resident Yoo Daon followed her heart and confessed her feelings to visiting professor Kang Juheon at his farewell party. It’s not like she’s gonna see him again, right? But little did she know that he’s decided to stay! Confused, embarrassed, and regretting the night before, Daon doesn’t know what to do. Can she survive the rest of her residency while working with her crush? And what made Juheon decide to stay? Plus… will her colleagues ever stop being so damn annoying?!    (Source: Tapas)

title: Wet Women
description: Everyone knows that there is only one thing these women want... Someone that can satisfy them!    (Source: Toomics)

title: Nal Sarang Haejuseyo
description: I already confessed to him, but he still treats me like a child...

title: The Crownless Queen
description: On the day of her retirement, history professor Jung Gwinam is hit by a bus as she pushes her daughter out of the way. When she wakes up, she finds herself in a different world, a different time, and even a different body! Now living as Delia, the protagonist of her daughter's novel, she'll have to climb the social ladder to escape life as a peasant. Despite some historical inaccuracies in this fantasy world, will Delia’s extensive knowledge be enough to help her make it back to the real world?    (Source: Tapas)

title: Love Falls Like Rain
description: When Sa-Rang discovers a mysterious yellow umbrella left by her doorstep, she doesn't think much of it. But one rainy evening she opens her umbrella and is magically transported to Albia where she runs into two men, one of whom could potentially be her soulmate. Will Sa-Rang be able to find her true love in a foreign land on the other side of the globe?  (Source: WEBTOON)    Note: Includes one extra chapter.

title: The Heart of the Lotus
description: Chang-Gyeon, the bastard third son, clawed his way to the throne in a whirlwind of chaos and blood. Now, with his reign spiraling out of control and the kingdom teetering on the edge, his only comfort lies in one person—his childhood friend, Sam-Myeong. But what started as fondness has twisted into something darker. Chang-Gyeon’s obsession knows no bounds, and he’s willing to do anything—schemes, manipulation, even breaking Sam-Myeong’s will—to keep him close.    (Source: Lezhin US)

title: When The Flowers Bloom
description: Think of me whenever the flowers bloom. Eungtae, a man destined to die young. Yeon, a woman whose childhood was cursed by the heavens. On a precious summer day beneath the blossoms of the trumpet vine, the two fall in love as fate intended. And in an instant, a shadow is cast over their future.    (Source: Manta)    Note: Includes 1 extra chapter.

title: Belle and the Beast's Labor Contract
description: Belle isn't the classic beauty who falls in love and marries the Beast. She's a gunslinging tomboy who's out to revive her family's dying business, and love is nothing but a distraction to her. But when her father has a costly run-in with the local Beast, Belle is forced into a contract with the Beast himself in order to repay the debt. And thus, this "tale as old as time" takes a complicated twist. Despite the growing fondness the Beast has for Belle, our spitfire heroine refuses to fall in love! As outside forces begin to squeeze their way into the pair's lives, Belle and the Beast continue to clash over their views on romance. Will the two be able to close the distance between them to make it to the end of their contract?    (Source: Tappytoon)

title: The Hunter Next Door
description: The rift brought an end to the world humanity once knew. Monsters claimed the lives of countless people, and those with supernatural powers known as hunters became humanity’s last hope. For Jiho Lee, becoming a hunter wasn’t a choice, but a result of losing everything. Now, in the aftermath, she begins forming new ties and gradually rebuilding a life on her own terms.  (Source: WEBTOON)

title: Pawprints on Her Heart
description: When Coco dies after five happy years with her owner Chloe, she thinks her tail-wagging days are over. But Coco can't bear to stay in the afterlife as she watches Chloe's world crumble. Taking pity on her, the Puppy God grants Coco's wish to return. Now, she's a human child who gets adopted into Chloe's family. Unfortunately, she discovers that reaching Chloe's heart is harder than any trick she's ever learned. Can she fetch the joy Chloe has lost, or has their bond slipped away like a leash?  (Source: Tapas)

title: A Fine Line
description: Guys like Woojin have it all: the looks, personality, and background to be popular. There’s no way Woojin would take interest in a nobody like Yunwoo, but Yunwoo ends up falling for Woojin and telling him how he feels. To Yunwoo's surprise, Woojin responds to the outburst with a risky suggestion of his own. Yunwoo can’t seem to say no to Woojin, but how long can they last?    (Source: Lezhin)

title: The Blooming Violet in the Back Garden
description: Timid orphan Violet discovers she's the empire's new saint destined to destroy the evil Malum. Unfortunately, she's surrounded by scornful nobles and the power-hungry emperor and pope. Alone, friendless, and overwhelmed, she finds solace in Ethelmund, heir of House Ermengart, who vows to protect her until the end. Can this fragile wildflower find her footing in the thorny and dangerous world of politics and betrayal? And will she be able to fulfill her destiny with only Ethelmund by her side?    (Source: Tapas)

title: Close, but Far
description: A sweet looking woman moves in next door, but something's strange. Isn't she married? What's she doing?  (Source: Toomics)

title: Naneun Jigeum Gomgwa Hamkke Salgo Itda
description: A wife sees her husband in the form of a bear. When they go to the doctor he tells them it’s stress related and that he will “turn” back to normal soon. But how can you define normal when your husband looks like a wild animal? A story about love and the hardships of keeping it.

title: Bigongsik Romance
description: Informal! And their special love begins. The love story between two girls that first met through an online avatar-creation community.

title: A DeadbEAT's Meal
description: What’s better than a good meal? My name’s Jae-Ho and I love food. While some may call me a deadbEAT because I don’t have a job at the moment, I’m just your normal happy guy who loves eating and my girlfriend of 7 years. That is until I got a breakup text yesterday. Where did things go wrong? I keep trying to look back through the years, but I just can't figure it out...   (Source: WEBTOONS)

title: I Declare Vengeance!
description: All Yun Je-Jin wanted was to succeed in life by climbing his way out of misery and misfortune - but his life takes a nosedive when he ends up a debt collector’s target, all because he co-signed a loan for a friend. With nothing to his name and revenge on his mind, Je-Jin decides to pay it off the hard way...by becoming a gangster himself. But unbeknownst to him, someone’s been watching his back: Choi Taek-Mu, a thug with a heart as big as his muscles, and a not-so-secret crush on the rookie mobster. As the two work together toward Je-Jin’s goal, vengeance might not be the only thing that’s coming in red hot…  (Source: Lezhin US)

title: The Fabulous Lives of the Hillington Sisters
description: Hildea Hillington, the daughter of duke Hillington, always knew that she was a mere supporting role in the story. She also knew that her destiny was to watch her younger sister, Roserielle, get married to young and ambitious duke Gabriel Velkius.  But something was definitely off. Why does Gabriel say that he loves me? He's supposed to be in love with my sister!    (Source: Pocket Comics)

title: A DeadbEAT's Meal
description: What’s better than a good meal? My name’s Jae-Ho and I love food. While some may call me a deadbEAT because I don’t have a job at the moment, I’m just your normal happy guy who loves eating and my girlfriend of 7 years. That is until I got a breakup text yesterday. Where did things go wrong? I keep trying to look back through the years, but I just can't figure it out...   (Source: WEBTOONS)

title: I Declare Vengeance!
description: All Yun Je-Jin wanted was to succeed in life by climbing his way out of misery and misfortune - but his life takes a nosedive when he ends up a debt collector’s target, all because he co-signed a loan for a friend. With nothing to his name and revenge on his mind, Je-Jin decides to pay it off the hard way...by becoming a gangster himself. But unbeknownst to him, someone’s been watching his back: Choi Taek-Mu, a thug with a heart as big as his muscles, and a not-so-secret crush on the rookie mobster. As the two work together toward Je-Jin’s goal, vengeance might not be the only thing that’s coming in red hot…  (Source: Lezhin US)

title: Following Eunju
description: Min-Jun sets up a fake profile to get Eun-Ju, his crush, to accept his follow request on social media. Now, with her daily activities and whereabouts available at his fingertips, he uses this information to move in as her next-door neighbor. But little did Min-Jun know, that Eun-Ju’s life isn’t anything like what she posts online–this sends him down an unexpected path, where he learns that following Eun-Ju turns out to have its consequences.      (Source: WEBTOONS, edited)    Warning: This series contains themes regarding mental health, sexual violence and child abuse that may not be suitable for all readers. Viewer discretion is advised.

title: Oneulburo Partnership Jongnyohamnida.
description: Yeon-Ju and Jae-Ho are business and sex partners. Their partnership is shaken by a blind date proposal sent by Jae-Ho's friend pretending to be Jae-Ho to Yeon-Ju.   (Source: BOMTOON, translated)

title: The Tiger's Bride
description: In the shadows of Mt. Bukhan, a lonely tiger spirit discovers the corpse of a man and seizes the chance to live among humans in his body. Dreaming of love but armed with raw instinct, he stumbles through human life until he meets Suhyeon, a quiet young man with a shaman grandmother who sends him to confront the unruly spirit. But when a protective charm breaks, the tiger’s suppressed desires explode, and he becomes fiercely obsessed with making Su-Hyeon his mate—promising to protect him for life, no matter what.     (Source: Lezhin US)   Note: Includes two side story chapters.

title: Trace 1.5
description: The story takes place after the end of Trace 1 and revolves around Han Sihyun, an investigator of the National Investigation Service (NIS). In attempt to find a way to coexist with "Troubles" instead of killing them, Sihyun frequently proposal to the board of NIS to approve a research on communicating with "Trouble." But after getting his proposal rejected yet again, Sihyun accidentally captured "Trouble" while he was drunk and decided to illegally experiment on it. Though communication seems impossible at first, Sihyun and his "Trouble" slowly begin to close the distant between them and form a bond together.

title: Little Did We Know
description: When a shady police inquiry causes Scarlet Crimson to have a mysterious memory lapse and unknowingly betray her cold and distant husband, Victor Dumfeldt, their fragile marriage shatters in divorce. To start anew, she returns to her family’s watchmaking trade to rebuild her life and her parents' legacy. But when Victor reenters her life, Scarlet starts to wonder if what was broken can be repaired. Between memories lost and words unspoken, can they learn from what they didn’t know the first time?  (Source: Tapas)

title: Love Deficiency
description: In Love Deficiency there is an invisible virus. People infected with it are in danger of turning invisible and dying if they're not in love! Thus the romance of a man and a woman begin because of the need to survive!  (Source: Tapas)

title: Bloodhounds
description: Bark, bark! Yes, I aim to please and do your bidding. And I’ll certainly never bare my teeth – that is, as long as you don’t show your back. Because it’s a dog-eat-dog world out there. Whether you’re a judge, CEO, boss of the criminal underworld, or a nobody, it doesn’t matter. In the face of money, all are equal.    (Source: WEBTOON)

title: Neoui Kkoriro Eungeung ♥
description: A collection of works by various authors: 01. Meogireul Juseyo! (먹이를 주세요!, Please Feed Me!) by Junggak 02. Bad Night Kiss (배드 나잇 키스) by Gae-Syak Gom 03. Seonakgwa (선악과, Forbidden Fruit) by Wiji 04. Sinsujeon(신수전, Halfling Gods) by Jayjay & Gang Jun 05. Kkoriwa Kkori Sai (꼬리와 꼬리 사이, Between Two Tails) by Nu-Ne

title: In the Name of the Savior
description: Yvonne Brigejer is an archmage and demidragon, the one human loved by the dragon Roigenkistro. Being a dragon’s soulmate is a great privilege, but it also means that she occasionally becomes cold and heartless, just like a dragon. After Yvonne tries to harm her unborn child in a fit of rage, she makes Roigenkistro promise that he will protect her child and her lover, Jeye. But when Roigenkistro fails to keep that promise and Jeye dies, she decides to end her life as well. Sadly, instead of being reunited with Jeye in the afterlife, Yvonne wakes up in a world where no one remembers that she and Jeye were lovers and Roigenkistro is gone. Will Yvonne be able to overcome her sadness and find out what happened to the man and the dragon she loved?  (Source: Tappytoon)

title: Sweet and Cold
description: There’s nothing more beautiful and dangerous than you. Eugene doesn’t have time to finish his homework since he spends the night trying to find Juan who is only attracted to strangers looking for a good time. Juan, who is used to sleeping with strangers that he doesn’t even know, has a smile that overwhelms Eugene. Eugene, who can’t stand his smile anymore, has a goal to wipe that filthy smile off his face.

title: Forest of Gray City
description: Yun-Ook Jang is a 24-year old freelance illustrator who rents out a room to help pay off her debts. Her tenant is a 17-year old drop out named Bum-Moo Lee who only has a part-time job. Before Yun-Ook knew how old Bum-Moo was, he seemed rather mysterious and cold to her, and the two argued all the time. Then one day, Bum-Moo asks her a most dangerous question: ”Do you mind if I like you?”   (Source: Yen Press)

title: A Kiss Is Not Enough
description: Young actress Joo Arin is set to make her big-screen debut, but while preparing for the role, she comes across a bit of a problem... She has to film a kiss scene even though she hasn't even had her first kiss yet! As Arin struggles to practice for the shoot, top star Kang Hajun, who happens to be with the same agency, decides to help out by teaching her how to kiss. As she starts these special secret lessons, Arin's finding it hard to tell if she's more immersed in the role or in Hajun.    (Source: Tapas)

title: REDRUM 327
description: When a group of seven young college students go off to enjoy a weekend getaway at a remote mountain villa, secrets that haunt the friends are unveiled--which lead to bizarre love triangles, tragic relationships, and deadly betrayal. And when hallucinations and strange disappearances begin, their dream vacation turns into a nightmare...

title: SPECTERS: KARMA
description: In a world where certain people, titled "Knockers," have awakened to innate supernatural abilities, Agent Xian Yu is a member of a special ESPer crime-fighting unit and puts righteousness above all else. Kirscher Schneider doesn't care much about justice, but he does set about enforcing it in his own unique way.    When these two men with polar opposite personalities meet, sparks fly, but the emergence of a Knocker-run mafia group named Monarch means that they're grudgingly forced to team up in order to defeat a common enemy.  Special agent Xian Yu, who lives only for justice, meets the worst partner in a most unexpected way. Other team members are very happy with each other, but why are we the only one like this? A special agent and a criminal who are forced to be a team - can they become lovers?

title: The Knight's Unfulfilled Dreams
description: They say there is a thin line between love and hate…    Prince Kaliyan takes over as the new Emperor at the end of a long and bloody war for the throne. After years of secretly fulfilling Kaliyan’s desires as his sword, Ian knows he is no longer needed and goes into hiding. Ian receives news of his brother Robin’s impending execution after years of silence, and rushes back to the palace.  He is after his once-beloved Kaliyan, hell-bent on getting his revenge. Instead, out of their reunion erupts a steamy yet deadly imperial romance!   (Source: Netcomics)

title: Yorisaga Doego Sipeun Cheonmanim
description: Woo-Jin, who realized his past life during the Monster Gate incident, was a Cheonma who conquered the Central Plains! Even as a Cheonma, he had a dream he couldn't fulfill... so this time, he will definitely achieve it. That dream of becoming a chef! The great(?) story of the former Cheonma, Cheon Woo-Jin, on his journey to become a chef!  (Source: Naver, translated)

title: Like a Fever Dream
description: Myung-Ha, cast out by his family and forced to live a lonely life as a gravekeeper, is suddenly tasked by his father with a peculiar “errand.” What seemed like a simple task brings him to none other than the estate of Grand Prince Howon, Yi Sa-Hwon. In the blink of an eye, Myung-Ha goes from being a gravekeeper to the wife of the enigmatic prince. Alone in an unfamiliar place, the only warmth Myung-Ha can rely on comes from Sa-Hwon’s kindness. Yet that kindness proves dangerous to trust, for the Sa-Hwon of the night is an entirely different man...  (Source: Lezhin US)   Note: Includes 10 extra chapters.

title: Dear Stranger
description: After surviving a car accident that left him in a months-long coma, Lee Soo-Han wakes up with no memory of his past. Standing by his side is a mysterious man who claims to be his husband—Jo Yeon-Seo. Although they’re supposedly married, the emotional distance between them feels insurmountable. Soo-Han grows wary of Yeon-Seo, yet he can’t help but be drawn to the man’s steadfast devotion. Just as Soo-Han begins to feel a connection, Yeon-Seo shatters his expectations with a shocking revelation: he’s ready to give Soo-Han a divorce—for his own good. The more his young husband pulls away, the more genuine Soo-Han’s feelings become. Determined to break through Yeon-Seo’s guarded heart, Soo-Han takes matters into his own hands.  (Source: Lezhin US)

title: Knuckle Girl
description: Ran, a high school female boxer, goes out into lawless territories of school bullies and school gangs to get revenge for her sexually assaulted younger sister.

title: Nahollo Jubu
description: A life of high school student when his hidden secret as a housewife almost is revealed. Season 1: 29 chapters

title: Four-way Stop
description: "A spell to change the genre of your life!” Yeah, that’d be nice. So far, Juwon’s existence has been pretty ordinary: a boring daily routine with zero romance to speak of. Then one day, he sees a movie where the main character’s life suddenly turns into a rom-com. Things have been weird ever since. Surely it can’t be down to the movie, but… guys just won’t leave him alone! His childhood friend, the cute barista from the coffee shop, his mean classmate, AND his first love?! Four hotties, all at once! Now Juwon stands at a crossroads. Which way will he turn?   (Source: Lezhin US)   Note: Chapter count includes 11 extras.

title: How About a Cosmic Horror?
description:
Irae wakes up in the hospital, married but with no memory of the wedding or her husband. To everyone else, he’s the perfect man, but to her, he’s a tentacled cosmic horror! Bewildered by the gap between memory and reality, she wonders... Is this really just an aftereffect of her accident?

(Source: Manta)

title: A Killer Woman
description: The story of a woman and a curse that leads men to their death, will she be able to find happiness?  (Source: Toomics)

title: Mr. A and Mr. B
description: Mr. A is a mild-mannered salary worker. Mr. B is a lazy college student slouch. When a night out drinking ends with Mr. B passed out on Mr. A’s doorstep, the two somehow get along. Friends or more? They may be opposites but, like opposites, they attract.    (Source: Tapas)

title: Tentacle Recipe
description: A man steps into a VR game room, looking for some light VR fun after a drunk night out - but the next thing he knows? He's trapped inside the game, being toyed by huge demonic tentacles! His captors, the crafty devil duo, pay no attention to his cries for help as they scout for their next target to be trapped in the cycle of endless agony and pleasure.    (Source: LezhinUS)

title: Lullaby
description: Seo-Hwa finally gets hired at the best mattress company in the country, but its CEO, Cheol-Su Gam, turns out to be a sleep demon who hasn't been able to sleep for 600 years! Upon meeting, he suspects that she's his human partner - the only person who can make him fall asleep and allow him to return to the demon world. It's strictly business, but there’s undeniable chemistry between the two of them. Will he be able to go back to the demon world, or will her sudden inability to sleep thwart their destiny?    (Source: WEBTOON)

title: Analogue
description: Ned starts taking advice from an older girl on how to make things work with his girlfriend, but he starts getting distracted.    (Source: Toomics)

title: The Vampire's Flower
description: In a world where humans and vampires struggle to coexist, Seoyoung is just trying to live a peaceful life, spending time with her high school friends and working part-time at the flower shop. But that all changes when she crosses paths with Louie, an ancient and powerful vampire who needs her help hunting down the mystical "Vampire Flower" before it falls into the wrong hands. Suddenly thrown into a deadly battle between humans and monsters, Seoyoung will begin to unravel long-hidden secrets and sinister schemes as she tries to help Louie find what he’s been looking for all along...    (Source: Tappytoon)    Note: The chapter count includes a prologue.

title: Outburst
description: A notorious hit group whose existence itself is veiled, boasts considerable power among the mafia with their perfect workmanship.     In order to get those psychopaths with his own hands, Simone decided to enter the killers' den, just so he could avenge his sunbae. However not everything goes as planned...

title: Fruitless
description: See what happens behind closed doors of this secretive town.  (Source: Toomics)

title: CHILDREN OF VAMFIELD by DARK MOON
description: Seven boys live under the care of Ms. Marge at Vamfield House. Their peaceful lives are shattered one day after they stumble upon a secret room...  (Source: WEBTOON)

title: Summer Heat
description: Chae Yeon runs a quiet little pension on a remote island—but with her painfully shy personality, dealing with guests is more stress than success. Just as she’s contemplating closing up shop, an unexpected guest checks in: Baek Sanho, her high school classmate…and the guy she once rejected. Now all grown up and annoyingly charming, Sanho seems determined to turn up the heat—on the island and in Yeon’s heart. With old sparks beginning to flicker back to life, this getaway is about to get way too hot to handle.  (Source: Lezhin US)

title: The Bastard’s Revenge in the House of Magic
description: All Lucia wants is a family. But as an illegitimate child of the House of Lordvel, she is cast into the Abyss. There she meets the Evil God and makes a pact to take revenge on the Lordvels. Reborn 10 years in the past, will Lucia rewrite her fate in this second life or succumb to dark forces beyond her control?  (Source: Manta)

title: I'll Predict Your Happy Ending
description: When gifted fortune teller Park Do-A dies, she transmigrates into the body of Bunnie, a curse absorber for the daughter of an archduke. As the new Bunnie, she befriends Demian, a boy prophesied to bring ruin to the empire. But when Bunnie reads Demian's fortune, she learns that, actually, he has the potential for greatness and prosperity, so she decides to shape him into the next emperor instead. Will these two be able to defy destiny and rewrite their futures? Or will the curse of fate prevail?  (Source: Tapas, edited)

title: Let's Meet After Work
description: Three years ago in Spain, Chae-Won had to break up with her boyfriend, Seong-Jun Han, because her father collapsed after his company went bankrupt. In order to pay the debt her father owes to his former employees and loan sharks, she decides to take part in a posthumous marriage for 200 million won. As a condition for the marriage, she’s not allowed to date anyone for 1,000 days. On her wedding day, she runs into Seong-Jun, who still has feelings for her, and now she has to work part-time at his company for three months.    (Source: WEBTOONS, edited)

title: Goyangi Therapy
description: Yong-U, a tiger-superhuman working as an actor in the superhuman community, rescues a cat abused on a film set for being an unlucky black cat and takes it in. He names it Dodong and grows attached to it, but one day, when he wakes up from a nap, Dodong has vanished without a trace. He's even robbed Yong-U of his wallet and valuables! The media is abuzz with reports that Yong-U abandoned his cat, and to quell the controversy, Yong-U proposes a roommate to Hae-Dong, the cat-superhuman who tricked him into thinking he's a cat...  (Source: Ridibooks, translated)

title: Yeonaesoseol Ingneun Gyosu
genres: Drama, Psychological, Romance, Slice of Life
description: A middle-aged professor, Joon-woo, is infatuated with internet romance novels. Even though he does not show that he's an avid reader due to his social status, waiting for the next chapter of the novel enthuses him. But one day, as the author goes on an unexpected hiatus, Joon-woo decides to write a letter to the author... A story that echoes and vibrates deeply in the heart.

title: Queen's Revenge
description: Wi Mokhwa was given another chance at life. Her first life had been worse than hell, therefore, at her untimely death, life came flowing back into her.    At fifteen, she fell in love easily and believed Lee Gajun to be her destiny. There wouldn’t have been anything more perfect for eternity. However, facing death, Wi Mokhwa had to accept her cruel end. Her life at fifteen had been futile and was where her misery started.    Regretting her life, she was given another chance. This time she has Lee Jejun's sincere feelings to protect her and stand by her side. He was willing to be her light even inside a dark world. This life was not doomed to fail.    Revenge, salvation, and a miracle.This is her true life, the second life where it all begins again.

title: Another Sequence
description: Method acting comes like breathing to Yeonwoo, as he convincingly steps in and out of different roles to keep people at bay. But while his brilliance as an actor never fails to shine through the screen, he finds there is something missing in his life. With Taehyuk - his long time sex partner - and Yubin - a fresh face in showbiz - now stepping into the scene, a dangerous new sequence begins to play out...    (Source: Lezhin)

title: Shoot for the Stars
description: Falling star to superstar!    Forced to give up on his dream of becoming an idol, Yoo-Sung laments having to spend the rest of his days working as his crush's manager. That is, until he wakes up as a trainee! How did he go back to the past? What are these mysterious skill bars only he can see? Could they be the key to success?    (Source: Manta)    Note: Includes 14 extra chapters.

title: Living with Magicians
description: Living in the city can be tough. Living with magicians can be tougher. Rangse Enna worked hard to pass the government official exam. After being stationed to work for the government in the city, she bravely left her hometown… only to be housed with the magicians. The apartment seems to be full of strange magicians who operate differently from the people Rangse used to know. Will she be able to adjust to her new job, new city, and her new apartment?    (Source: WEBTOONS)

title: Time to Choose
description: I'm busy writing my e-book, taking classes, and having a crush on the hottest chick on campus. But why do I keep thinking of my friend?  (Source: Tooomics)

title: In the Deep
description: It’s been years since Haemin first began craving blood…and only his brother’s will do. Something uncontrollable has called out to Haemin since he was a young boy: an animalistic urge that won’t quell until he’s had his share of blood. Despite this, his younger brother Dogun will do whatever is necessary to keep him safe…and that includes lending him a hand (or vein) whenever his thirst takes over. On top of this, as an elite agent, Dogun needs to fight off the mutants that have begun to invade the world. As the two brothers try to survive in a world full of ravenous beasts and calculating figures disguised in shadows, they uncover secrets that were meant to stay hidden far below the surface.    (Source: Lezhin US)

title: Not an Angel
description: Father Daniel is a new teacher at Kaebiji Private High School, a school that is known for being a dump where all the local delinquents gather. He is adjusting to his new life well until one night when he stumbles upon a woman while on patrol… and finds her beating a man. Sensing that something is off, Father Daniel reports the incident to the faculty the next day, only to realize that the woman, Miss Sasha, is also a teacher at the school. A strange relationship between a devoted priest and a kind teacher both disguised as angels begins...    (Source: WEBTOONS)

title: Huhoe Namjureul Wihan Heungsinso Jeolchan Yeongeop Jung!
description: A detective who'll find your leading lady for 500 won has appeared! Out of all the countless web novel protagonists, I wasn't a romance-fantasy noble lady, a cool hunter, or a holy saintess. Of all things, to think I've been reincarnated as a 'private investigator'…. And on top of that, my clients are all regretful male leads? "Hurry up and find my woman." "All of a sudden?" Still, now that I've started, I have no choice but to see it through. Just how many 'runaway lead' stories do you think I've read?! The runaway female lead always gets caught soon enough. They come back one way or another! The cool guy, the hero, the beastly man— I'll make sure all the regretful male leads get their happy ending.  (Source: KakaoPage, translated)

title: The Inheritance
description: An ordinary high school boy, "Hero Kim," suddenly receives all his father's inheritance. And now, all the ladies are dying to sleep with him    (Source: Toomics)

title: Grasp
description: Sojin Yeon, a temporary employee who posts her daily work life on her vlog, gets caught in the midst of a messy crime scene after the murder of her assistant manager. Her viewer ratings are escalating along with the shadows of her past latching onto her from moving forward. Can she break free from the mysterious crimes that are continuously occurring around her?    (Source: WEBTOONS)

title: Peace Restaurant
description: Chef Sua, with her unrivaled culinary skills, doesn't just rule over Peace Restaurant, Seoul's most peculiar eatery -- she weaves harmony between cosmic enemies now seated as tablemates. The tension in her restaurant simmers not from culinary rivalry but from the precarious peace among patrons from warring dimensions. Will Sua's culinary diplomacy be enough to maintain this balance, or is her restaurant destined to become the epicenter of an ultimate showdown?  (Source: WEBTOONS)

title: Pieces of Us
description: The simplest of choices can shape our lives forever. Returning to college after a break, Kwon Yoonho decides to take a pottery class. But what he doesn’t know is that his instructor will be Lee Suyeon: a professor with a reputation for favoritism whom all the students go out of their way to avoid. Yet from the moment Yoonho lays eyes on his new teacher, he recognizes the same quality of isolation and solemnity that has been ever-present in his own life. The two begin to mold a deeper connection as their lives become intertwined; but when Suyeon’s ex-boyfriend – and first love – Choi Gyeol makes a sudden appearance, an unbridled sense of jealousy and possessiveness becomes impossible for Yoonho to ignore. Will this unexpected interruption cause the foundations of their love to shatter? And if it does, who will be left to pick up the pieces...?    (Source: Lezhin US)

title: I Thought I Tamed the Villain
description: After a close call with death, Iris has a sudden revelation: she's been living inside a novel from her past life. But if her memory's correct, all the characters in the novel, herself included, ultimately meet their demise at the hands of the villain, Theo. Determined to survive, Iris resolves to befriend Theo in hopes of reforming him while he's still young. At first, everything seems to go according to plan... But when she reunites with him ten years later, she realizes something's gone terribly wrong. Why is the same ruthless villain she saw in the novel... standing before her?    (Source: Tappytoon)

title: You Are Obsessing Over the Wrong Person, Lord of the Tower!
description: A bad fall awakened Selina Elsner to the truth… she’s been reborn into a novel! It also gave her a cruel realization—she’s a no-name side character! She barely even had any lines! As if that’s not bad enough, Louis Bloomberg, the evil lord of the magic tower, fancies her! He’s a sorcerer so powerful that his magic speaks darkness in his mind! But one touch from Selina and all the voices would go away! Is that why he’s obsessing over her instead of the real main character of the novel?    (Source: Tapas)

title: The Lovable Maid
description: Shunned by her noble father, and having gone mute after her mother’s death, Fey was just drifting through life until the empire invaded. Amidst the chaos, the terrifying Marquess Max Warren saves her life. Grateful, she enters his service as a maid. Despite the potential communication gap, the two have no problem understanding each other. Not so much for the other nobles though, who grow suspicious of their bond. Can this lovable maid prove them wrong and show that true charm goes beyond words?    (Source: Tapas)

title: Dial Again
description: Following a near-death experience, an otherwise ordinary young man named Noah finds out that he has become immortal. Deciding to make good use of his abilities, he becomes a bodyguard, but an unexpected side effect of his powers forces him to quit the job. It's then that he meets a shady-looking man named Allen Walker, who offers to take care of that particular side effect in return for his resuming bodyguard work...

title: Seogwajangeun Sanjaecheori Dwaesseulkka
description: “Why should we care about free-to-play players?”    Seo Sa-hyuk, a planner who neglected gameplay and focused only on monetization elements, has now fallen victim to his own greed for making money, working tirelessly through the night until he succumbed to overwork. In his unfortunate situation, he wakes up once again.    “This place is just like the game I used to create…!!”    The demonic planner who tormented gamers is now experiencing the consequences he sowed, a story of redemption and transformation begins!    (Source: Naver, Translated)

title: Sosimhan Palette
description: Come join the "Palette" illustration club where your imagination becomes reality!

title: Secret Massage
description: Jo Jingoo, leading a hopeless life, starts working part-time at a women’s aesthetic shop through his aunt’s connections. Wealthy wives and arrogant female coworkers look down on him– until one day, he gains a unique power: his massage techniques can instantly turn women on.  (Source: Toomics, translated)

title: Draig MidKnight
description: Not long after the vicious dragons hid their presence on the continent, Knight Commander Alexander is dispatched to investigate the sharp fall in tax revenue. Alexander gets lost in unfamiliar lands and runs into a man named Kline. But this man, as soon as he meets Alexander, starts calling out by his nickname and gets closer by acting friendly, saying that he has waited a long time. And under his half-worn cloak, Alex sees a dragon's horn?!    Kline knows how to use magic and Alexander becomes interested in recruiting him as a knight...    (Source: POCKET COMICS)   Note: Includes two side story chapters.

title: The Fangs That Pierce the Heart
description: Born as the illegitimate second son of Loxollum’s king, Iblonde is sacrificed by his pagan mother to ensure that one day, he sits on the noblest seat in the kingdom. A few years later, Iblonde has started a new life as Abel, a serf of a baron’s domain. Aside from his tragic past, Abel harbors many secrets, including the fact that he is actually a girl. But the greatest secret of all is that Abel’s resurrected body is now occupied by Belial, the seventh king of hell, who has come to slowly plague the land...    (Source: Tappytoon)

title: Sarangbatgi Wonhaji Anneunda
description: The imprisoned queen, Rihannan Alessin.    She took poison and committed suicide. But when she opened her eyes, she was back to being a 12-year-old.  Life repeated, and a chance was gained again. She put everything in order and went away to live differently this time.    But six years later, she chooses the fate of becoming the queen of Arundell again... .    “If you are asking me to renounce the proposed marriage, I cannot.”    (Source: Ridibooks, translated)

title: Thorns of Innocence
description: Eunhyo has always been sweet and innocent. She grew up constantly smiling. But then one day he came into her life and took that innocence away. This man who’s thirsty for sex and violence. Once there to protect her, his presence has now become a curse. Eunhyo needs to escape from this beast at all costs, even if it means killing him…  (Source: Lezhin X)

title: Nobody Knows
description: The “self bully” Ban has a normal enough life, and where divorced parents aren’t that uncommon, her life becomes shadowed in mystery when her mother, Eun-Joo, suddenly brings their “distant relative” Jin-Whan home to live with them. Ban’s mother would always avoid the topic of her family, so who is this strange boy? Are they really relatives? What torturous secrets does her mother’s past hold? And what do the sudden strange happens that follow in Jin-Whan’s wake mean? Would a better question not be who is he, but what?

title: Stepsister
description: For most people, family is important. For Seo Do-wook, it’s everything…especially when it comes to his stepsister, Han Gayoung. After Gayoung’s mother passed away when the two were young, Do-wook made a promise to do everything in his power to keep his noona safe. But when their father marries again to a wicked woman determined to make their lives a living hell, it proves harder than he thought. Attempting to escape, the two move out on their own only to be presented with a new problem. As their once familial love begins to turn into tangible desire, will the two step-siblings be able to resist temptation? Or will they give in to themselves and take their relationship one step too far...?  (Source: Lezhin US)

title: I Tamed The Male Lead's Father
description: This is a tale of Lireis Deldearue, the sole heir to the demonic House Deldearue. Unworthy as a newborn, Lireis is sentenced to death. Will she survive? Maybe. Is it because she made a pact with the Demon King or that she was saved by Agnos, leader of the rival House Ardelos? Or maybe it’s because I reincarnated as Lireis, and I know what’s fated to come! I’m destined to resurrect the Demon King, continuing the eternal battle between monsters and humans, but what happens if I fight against fate?    (Source: Tapas)

title: Emerald Midnight's Lover
description: The year is 1887 in the rolling hills of the French countryside. The estate of Viscount de Rougemerle gently basks in its verdant glory, a beacon in the twilight years of the aristocracy. With the return of the viscount’s wayward son Cameron, however, the tranquility of this stately home threatens to shatter into scandal. It falls upon Edgar O’Grady, an Irish butler in service of the Rougemerles, to maintain decorum in the household, all the while protecting his childhood friend June and his master’s daughter Lady Victoria, as each furtive glance gleams the emerald green of envy…    (Source: WEBTOON)

title: On-Air
description: On social media, A-Yeong Oh has a perfect life. Her vlogs on the popular video-sharing platform MeTube command the adoration of thousands of fans as she regularly posts vlogs with her loving boyfriend, Ji-Hun. However, when Ji-Hun abruptly breaks up with her and disappears one day, her livelihood and MeTube fame are threatened. As A-Yeong struggles to maintain her online celebrity status and delves into the mystery behind Ji-Hun’s disappearance, she gradually begins to uncover the sinister truth behind Ji-Hun’s real identity. Will A-Yeong manage to find out who her ex truly was, or will her obsession with fame consume her first?    (Source: WEBTOON)

title: Shadow Beauty
description: Because of her looks, Yaejin is bullied at school and even insulted by strangers. But after school, she leads a secret life: with heavy makeup and hours of photo editing, she lives as Genie, a social media star with 770K followers. While Yaejin is toeing the line between her true self and Genie, what will happen when a boy from school discovers her secret?    (Source: Manta)

title: The Young Emperor is Obsessed With Me
description: When a royal kiss fails to wake the sleeping beauty in the forest, young Prince Cedric figures a knife to the throat should do the trick. Lucky for Ariel, she awakens from her long slumber just in time to avoid a funeral at the age of 1000. Unlucky for her, she has now become the object of the twisted prince’s obsession. Though she manages to banish him from the forest for a decade, Cedric finds his way back stronger than ever as the emperor. After setting her home ablaze, he has just one thing in mind: “Let’s get married, Ariel.”  (Source: Tappytoon)

title: Namja Juingonggwa Ihonhaneun Beop
description: "...I'm screwed."    On a normal day like any other, Duchess Juliana Auburn woke up from a dream. No, rather, it is I, "Isian," who remembered my past life.    Juliana Auburn was a character in a novel who did nothing but badmouth and find fault with her husband, his friends, and her own father who had forced her to marry an illegitimate man.    According to a spoiler comment that I read, she will be killed at the start of the novel.    "Why did I only remember everything now after I've already done all of those bad things to the male lead?!"    In order to avoid the novel's "bad ending," Juliana plans to divorce her husband, Evan, the male lead....    "I'll give you everything you want."    "Don't you know that the one who falls in love first loses?"    "Why should I apologize for staring at you because you're so pretty?"    ...Isn't my husband's obsession more serious than I thought?

title: The Iron Inside
description: Love and survival beneath the sand.  Baekgi awakens in a world engulfed in sand after being cryogenically frozen. She joins Spear and Shield, a unit entrusted with protecting the bunker, and begins training under her senior officer, Ibaek. They must fight to survive in this new world amidst sudden epidemics and monster attacks...    (Source: Manta)    Note: Includes a prologue.

title: Ilbosingwon
description: Born as the son of a wealthy family, Jang Geon was destined for ruin. To turn his fate around, he had to live a simple life under the guidance of a virtuous monk. Given to the frugal monk Gyeongmok at Shaolin Temple, Jang Geon spent his days in rough cotton robes, barely getting by on plain rice... While enduring hunger and minimizing movement in his daily life, he stumbled upon martial arts and managed to apply his mindset of thrift to it...?  (Source: KakaoPage, translated)

title: Demon Lord
description: Following the brutal Virtuous-Demonic War, the Demon Cult emerges victorious, seizing control of the world. But their triumph is shaken when the Cult’s vice-leader is assassinated in a sinister conspiracy. From the shadows emerges Ryeon-Hwi Hyeok, Crown Prince of the Demon Cult. Determined to uncover the truth and avenge his brother, he infiltrates the elite Academy of Mirages. There, he crosses paths with Seol Bi, a hidden master from the Virtuous Sect, and as the two aid each other, their relationship begins to blossom… Follow Ryeon-Hwi on his journey to conquer the Murim and become the next Demon King!   (Source: WEBTOONS)

title: Unfair Love Affair
description: Actor Yoo Haek-Yeong has been in love with his spoiled friend Seo Kwon-Yeong for more than 10 years. Not only is it a hopeless love, but it’s downright abuse as Kwon-Yeong takes complete advantage of Haek-Yeong’s feelings to constantly boss him around. Haek-Yeong just can’t help letting Kwon-Yeong string him along… until he connects with his crush’s older brother, Kwon-Lim, the top actor in Korea. Unlike his manipulative brother, Kwon-Lim is thoughtful and kind—and incredibly handsome. As Haek-Yeong grows closer to Kwon-Lim, the dynamic between him and his old friend begins to shift—and so do Haek-Yeong’s long-harbored feelings…    (Source: Tappytoon)

title: Omangwa Nangman
description: Wi Seok-Hui works at a law firm along with her crush, attorney Kang Min-O. However, a new employee Jung Yun-Hu joins the firm and a love triangle relationship forms...

title: Against All Odds
description: Haunted by guilt, detective Jeong Hae-Il flees his past in Daegu, seeking refuge in his hometown of Seoul. But the city isn't as forgiving as he'd hoped. Soon, he's forced to confront the ghosts of his trauma when he crosses paths with his old flame, Jun-Seon, now tangled up in a dangerous new drug. Just when things couldn't get more complicated, a mysterious ally named Han-Gyeol emerges from the shadows—but can Hae-Il really trust him? In a city filled with secrets, can any of them overcome the odds?  (Source: Lezhin US)

title: Naeildo 69 Beonji
description: The young Cheolwoo from Korea goes on a trip to the beautiful vacation spot, Tomorrow Island, only to lose his important belongings not long after he arrives. As an omega, Cheolwoo needs his inhibitors so he immediately starts a part-time job… Then his fateful meeting with Dylan happens, and he gets to experience what it’s like to be in the middle of a whirlwind of pheromones.

title: Eoringeunyeo 2: Naui Seonsaengnim
description: My teacher Seo-A, whom I first met at Aunt Jia and Uncle Deok-Sin's wedding. I never confessed to her, but I think she is the woman of my destiny... and now she's getting married?!  Now that I'm an adult... if I was the same age as her, would everything be different?   (Source: Toptoon, translated)

title: Publishing Love
description: Bom Ahn had a dazzling debut as a writer, and won a major award for her first novel. But nine years later, she’s found no long-term success with only countless rejections from over a hundred publishing companies, whereas her childhood friend Leo has already become a successful writer. When Bom applies for a job at the SW Publishing Company, she meets Haneul, a frosty yet capable department head. Haneul has a rare condition which prevents him from recognizing the faces of women. That is, until he meets Bom, whose face he can see as clear as day…  (Source: WEBTOONS)

title: Sayong Hu Banpumbulga
description: Baek Chunho seeks to get revenge on Shin Jaehee, the man he believes raped his younger sister, by giving him a taste of his own medicine. However, when he finds out that it was all a misunderstanding, he nervously goes to Jaehee's house to apologize...  "Hyung, I thought about it and... I think I'm gay!"  For a situation where a police report wouldn't even be enough, he wants to date me instead?  What the hell is wrong with this guy...?    (Source: Mr. Blue, translated)

title: Gangajiga Saranghaneun Beop
description: The sweet office romance unfolds in a world that has been animalized ♡     Da-Eun, who works as usual, hears the rumor that an employee from another company will come, and that they will carry out a project together. The employee who attracted the attention of people in the company with his handsome looks, was none other than Da-Eun's long-time unrequited love, Jun-Hyeok. Can Da-Eun capture Jun-Hyeok now that they met again?     (Source: Mr. Blue, translated)

title: Podobatui Grace
description: After the death of her mother, Ruby is taken in by her mother's friend, Mrs. Watson, as a maid for the Bell family. She meets Grace, a young lady of different origins. She thinks she's just a bad girl, but Grace is the only one in the Bell household who cares about her. She becomes the only one who cares about Ruby, and a strange feeling grows between them...       Ruby's feelings for Grace are either envy or love.    (Source: Lezhin, translated)   Note: Chapter count includes a prologue

title: The Villainess's Debut Novel
description: Centuries ago, Mago was punished by a god for writing a calamitous book. She was doomed to be repeatedly reborn until she destroyed every copy of her novel under the surveillance of Ha Lib, the deity's errand boy. There are now only five copies remaining, but Mago's quest to end her cycle of rebirth is complicated when Do Kyujin, a charismatic CEO, joins the search for his own purposes. With yet another mysterious figure thwarting them at every turn, will Mago finally be able to rest in peace?    (Source: Tapas)

title: Be My Boomer
description: Falling head over heels for your professor at first sight and then deciding to woo him is not the best idea, but Hansol is willing to make terrible life choices for the sake of love. But then it turns out, Professor Baek Min-Joon is the boomer to end all boomers. Is his stuck-up mindset going to ruin this romance, or can Hansol overcome this unexpected obstacle?   (Source: Lezhin US)     Note: Chapter count includes 5 side story chapters.

title: I Corrupted the Male Lead!
description:
Despite possessing great beauty and wealth, Anastasia Sinclair suffers in pain due to a terminal illness. With just two years to live, her only wish is to enjoy life, especially with her friend, the handsome and kind Adele Magnus. As they grow closer, she realizes she has feelings for him, but having read this story in her past life, Anastasia knows that Adele actually meets the love of his life… at her funeral! Will this ailing lady's off-script crush corrupt the male lead’s fairy-tale ending?

(Source: Tapas)

title: Breaking News: I’m Married to the Grand Duke?!
description: Libelle Ibella, a viscount's daughter, works undercover as a reporter to repay her father's gambling debt. ⁤⁤While covering a story, she accidentally discovers her fiancé's love affair. Devastated and heartbroken, she drunkenly proposes to Systain von Diranta, a stranger at a bar. ⁤⁤To her surprise, she wakes up with a marriage approval letter signed by the grand duke himself. ⁤⁤Overnight, Libelle finds herself thrust into the role of grand duchess, struggling to balance her new duties with her secret life as a reporter. ⁤⁤And little does Systain know that she's the reporter behind a scandalous article questioning his manhood...    (Source: Tappytoon)

title: Miunohri Baekjodoigi
description: The heroine is a short, overweight and ugly girl but one day an old man turns her into a real beauty. But whenever raindrops touch her she turns back to her original form (but she becomes beautiful again), and if she ever kisses someone, she won't become beautiful again.

title: Metronome
description: A bloodstained man stands in front of a terrified girl. He proclaims his love for her and makes this ominous declaration: A year from now, she will either die alone or will be with him forever. Now, rumors abound about the cursed girl that causes any boy who proclaims his love for her to die. Join us to discover the mysteries of Metronome.

title: Prince-ui Wangja
description: A chaotic comic story of two perfect men betting on the future of "Castlesoft," a game developer company consisting of handsome men. Note: - This entry contains seasons one and two. - Includes a prologue and two extra chapters. - Note: Part of YLAB's Red String Universe.

title: The Knight of the Falling Star
description: During a meteor shower, a magical Faerie appears in a dark alley. Lemon, the Fae Knight has come to the human world to complete his final knighthood test. Alongside him is his human companion, Mira, who dreams of being a Black Mage. Will Lemon be able to complete his test in time? Find out in this whimsical romantic comedy!    (Source: Lezhin)

title: The Naughty Volleyball Team
description: Joon-ho’s always been intimidated by his temperamental sister, so he’s not looking forward to being alone with her this summer. His dreams of living the wholesome otaku life are shattered when he joins his sister’s volleyball team as the team manager. These girls seem innocent, but they all have secret fetishes… Can this 20-year old virgin overcome his fear of women and handle all the sexy action tossed his way?  (Source: Lezhin X)

title: Dangeum and Jigyo
description: Our story begins with Ji-Gyo, the crown prince, having recently been exiled from the palace with a guard, Dan-Geum, and the man who raised him, Chunggeum. The three are forced to pass their remaining days in a quiet village made up of mostly elderly residents. This leads to a listless and lonely Ji-Gyo, who begins pressing Dan-Geum to relieve his traditional post as a voiceless shadow, and the two quickly grow closer. Hints of a bloody conspiracy, Dan-Geum’s mysterious origin, and Chunggeum who seems to know more than he's letting on - just how are these three characters connected, and what will happen to them during exile?    (Source: Lezhin US, edited)   Note: Includes a prologue and seven side story chapters.

title: Eunggeup! Sarange Daecheohaneun Bangbeop
description: Despite having no connections and oppositions from her family, Shin Chae-rin went to practice medicine as an intern at Migang Hospital. There she meets a doctor by the name of Baek Kangwoo who has everything in his favor yet wants to give up his training. This is a love story blossoming in the emergency room where Chaerin struggles with her daily work and her love for Kangwoo.

title: Stupid Love
description: Find out what happens when a man is tangled up with a girl who only means trouble.    (Source: Toomics)

title: The Golden Spoon
genres: Drama, Psychological, Romance, Slice of Life, Supernatural
description: Would you trade your poor but loving family for a life of riches? When Seungcheon gets his hands on a magical spoon that allows him to switch lives with his rich best friend, he thinks it’s a no-brainer. But life-altering decisions are always accompanied by a sense of doubt, and with only three chances to change his mind, Seungcheon has to decide which of his two possible futures is worth keeping.    (Source: WEBTOONS)

title: Manghyangmusa
description: The Ghost Wolf of the Battlefield howls in the Murim!’    So Cheon-Ho returns to his homeland after a decade of war and learns that his father has passed away and his disciple-brother, who was no different from his family, had disappeared without a trace!    He briefly spends pleasant days with his childhood friend, So-Hyae, but is entrusted with her daughter, Hui-Yeon before she dies of a disease. Cheon-Ho, who has lost everything, starts an endless war against the Martial Artists in order to protect Hui-Yeon…    A macho man with an unbreakable constitution and overwhelming power. He puts everything on the line to protect the child of the woman he loved!    (Source: KakaoPage, translated)    Note: Includes one extra chapter.

title: Love Me, Revive Me
description: For his entire life, Chae Jeong-Hyeon has lived as nothing more than a shadow, an art restorer forced into the role of hidden ghost painter for his father, the celebrated Painter Chae. When the old master dies suddenly, Jeong-Hyeon’s long-nurtured desire for revenge dies with him, leaving only despair and the urge to abandon everything. But on the edge of surrender, a stranger appears: Yeom Tae-Hwa, a man caught between mortal and divine.   Tae-Hwa offers Jeong-Hyeon a bargain. Restore what has been lost and share his roof, and in return, he will grant Jeong-Hyeon the honor stolen by his father. Reluctantly, Jeong-Hyeon agrees, clinging to the fragile hope Tae-Hwa extends. Yet as the days pass, cold obligation begins to blur into fascination. Living side by side, Jeong-Hyeon is drawn closer to Tae-Hwa’s enigma… and to the haunting secret hidden within his 200-year-old silence.  (Source: Lezhin US)

title: Hero-ui Namchinindeyo?
description: The most famous hero x ordinary person couple at the moment, Devil M and Jung Na-na, also enter a period of inevitably boredom after 10 years of dating. But one day, the love bead containing the will of the villain who has been tormenting Devil M bears fruit in Jung Na-na's body, and their boredom flows in a new direction.  (Source: Lezhin, translated)   Note: Part of Peanutoon's Gosuwi BL Danpyeonseon (고수위 BL 단편선) Collection.

title: Love Me, Revive Me
description: For his entire life, Chae Jeong-Hyeon has lived as nothing more than a shadow, an art restorer forced into the role of hidden ghost painter for his father, the celebrated Painter Chae. When the old master dies suddenly, Jeong-Hyeon’s long-nurtured desire for revenge dies with him, leaving only despair and the urge to abandon everything. But on the edge of surrender, a stranger appears: Yeom Tae-Hwa, a man caught between mortal and divine.   Tae-Hwa offers Jeong-Hyeon a bargain. Restore what has been lost and share his roof, and in return, he will grant Jeong-Hyeon the honor stolen by his father. Reluctantly, Jeong-Hyeon agrees, clinging to the fragile hope Tae-Hwa extends. Yet as the days pass, cold obligation begins to blur into fascination. Living side by side, Jeong-Hyeon is drawn closer to Tae-Hwa’s enigma… and to the haunting secret hidden within his 200-year-old silence.  (Source: Lezhin US)

title: Real World Mobile
description: Gang-U Choi is an ordinary high school student who likes video games. One day, he hears that his favorite game store is going out of business. When he visits the shop one last time, the store owner hands him a QR code for a mobile game. Gang-U starts up the game out of curiosity, but something feels off…. His mission is to drink 3 glasses of water?! When he decides to ignore the mission, he suddenly receives a penalty in real life! As the missions get more dangerous, will Gang-U be able to protect his reality?   (Source: WEBTOONS, edited)

title: The Youngest Disciple of the Hwasan Sect
description:
Biyeon always hoped to be a baby in a romance fantasy webtoon and live idly if she were ever reborn. So she's shocked when she gets her wish... but as an infant in the world of martial arts! Nevertheless, despite brutal training and harsh realities, Biyeon tries her best to form new relationships and become a true member of the Hwasan Sect. With the knowledge from her past life and the support of Hwasan disciples, can Biyeon rise to the top and find the life she dreamed of in this world?

(Source: Tapas)

title: This Magical Moment
description: Everyday life can be tough even at the best of times, and when you’re a witch, an aspiring nun, or a former child actor, it gets a lot tougher! All Bakha, Minhyeok, Sara, and Sanghyeop want to do is live like everyone else and follow their dreams, but they are constantly confronted with prejudice and discrimination from those they encounter. Will they be able to show the world that despite their differences, people are all the same deep down?    (Source: WEBTOONS)

title: Yeomyeongui Deungbul
description: Sergeant ‘Bucky’, a war hero belonging to the ‘Empire of the Sun’. He serves as an example to the imperial soldiers through his loyal loyalty to the emperor and his excellent martial arts, but in fact, his ultimate goal is to take revenge on the emperor by causing the downfall of the empire. Can Bucky achieve revenge against a massive empire?    (Source: Naver, translated)

title: Cheonjae Tajaga Gangsokgureul Sumgim
description: Kang Geon-woo, a genius major leaguer who has achieved wealth, fame, and everything. Even he could not continue his happy married life with his wife. Feeling the void left by his wife, he regrets it and returns to the past with the power of a mysterious ring. Will he be able to win love this time, having become a high school student during his innocent love days?  (Source: Naver, translated)

title: Wanbyeokan Gajok
description: Sun-Hee's family seems to be a perfect, happy family.     One day, Sun-Hee confesses that she killed her friend, Kyung-Ho, but her mother's reaction is somewhat strange.     (Source: Naver, translated)

title: Deepest Confession
description: Do-Hun has been secretly in love with Ye-Jun since middle school. They were always together through high school and college, and Do-Hun believed they would stay by each other’s side forever. But one day, Ye-Jun suddenly got married, shattering Do-Hun’s quiet hopes. Even after years of trying, he couldn’t shake off his endless, frustrating one-sided love. Determined to move on, he decides to take a solo trip. Just as he’s about to leave, he hears the news, Yejun is getting divorced after just three years of marriage. That very night, Ye-Jun unexpectedly shows up at Do-Hun's door and asks him...    “Can you take me on that trip?”   (Source: Lezhin US)   Note: Includes three extra chapters.

title: Sin Flower
description: Haesoo takes care of Dojin after he loses his parents to an evil spirit. As Dojin grows up, he struggles to hide his feelings for Haesoo, but tries to do so regardless by assisting him in his priestly duties. But evil soon creeps into Dojin's heart when he stumbles upon Haesoo's dark secret, whispering to let his desires loose...    (Source Lezhin)

title: The Fairy Legacy
description: I'm falling for the servant of my lady's enemy!    Lady Ersetta refuses to marry the man her father has chosen for her and asks her maid Farmé to meet him in her stead. But Lord Ligieri, her hated enemy, sends his servant Angelo to cover for him as well! Turns out, Angelo is oddly charming and Farmé can't get him out of her head!    (Source: Manta, edited)

title: I’ll Become the Heroine in This Life
description: If Amber Verdi had known a goddess was a fan of her novel, she never would’ve discontinued writing it. Unfortunately, she’s angered a goddess. And as punishment, she must become a side character and help the female and male leads, Freya Ardel and Kyle Blackwood, reach a happy ending. But when Freya suddenly dies as a result of her actions, she manages to pacify the enraged goddess once again by becoming the new heroine of the story. Will Amber's journey with Kyle bring a satisfying conclusion for her most extreme fan?    (Source: Tappytoon)

title: Mary Jane
description: Dr. Doh Won is a renowned psychoanalyst. Upon returning to Korea, he takes a position at the Institute for Psychoanalysis and does his best to avoid criminal cases to protect his family. One day, the enigmatic arsonist MJ pays him an unexpected visit. MJ insists on ongoing sessions to address his uncontrollable desire to start fires. Reluctantly, Doh Won agrees, only to discover that MJ is more than just an arsonist; he’s involved in something major related to a mysterious figure known only as ‘Father.’ Will Doh Won be able to extinguish MJ’s love of fire? And just who is this ‘Father,’ and what connection does he have with MJ?    (Source: Lezhin US)

title: The Swordmaster Who Leapt Through Time
description: The Kingdom of Vanroah has fallen. Lansen, the last prince, flees with the remaining survivors to a faraway land. Vowing to one day revive the kingdom, he becomes a swordmaster at a young age, only for a treacherous incident to strip everything away. Powerless to protect those he loves, he uses an ancient artifact to travel 10,000 years back in time to the Age of the Arcane. There, its rich knowledge and wisdom help him avert disaster in the present. But each time he turns back the clock, new secrets emerge, entangling the past and present in ways he never foresaw.  (Source: WEBTOON)

title: The East Wind of the Altas
description:
The people of Genevu always pay their debts. So when peasant girl Claire throws herself under Marquess Balt Morenheitz's favorite horse, forcing him to kill the animal to save her life, she must repay him by spending a night in his bed. But Balt isn't satisfied with just one night and moves Claire and her family to live at his palace so that she can "service" him whenever he pleases. However, Claire may end up paying Balt back more than he could've imagined... because Claire isn't quite the simple peasant girl she appears to be. As Balt becomes increasingly embroiled in the empire's political mayhem, Claire's true identity will become a deciding factor in his success, or else a catalyst for his downfall. Whichever it may be, Claire will be sure to repay her debt before she leaves!

(Source: TappyToon)

title: Lowlife
description: I was never able to fit into any type of group... but life just got so much better after choosing to become a low life.    (Source: Toomics)

title: One Coin Closer to Holiness
description: When a former detective wakes up as Ordelle Kyris, the villainess and fake saint of the novel "Idella the Holy," she is entrusted with the task of saving the Sun God and this world from disappearing forever. However, being a fake, her divine power is close to nothing. And the only way to increase it is... money! From securing rich followers to starting a new business, Ordelle strives to gather funds and gain more power. Will this fake yet fiery saint successfully climb the ladder of holiness?  (Source: Tapas)

title: The Odds of This Love
description: What are the odds of running into a one-night stand on the street?  Jitae can't muster the courage to tell his straight friend Kyunghoon that he's had a crush on him for a long time.
