Much to his dismay, Kyunghoon announces his engagement to his pregnant fiancée.  Shattered, Jitae has a one-night stand with a random guy he meets at a gay bar. As if congratulating a years-long crush on his wedding day isn't hard enough, Jitae runs into the one-night stand who happens to be the bride's brother! But Haejoon doesn't seem to want to remain a casual sex partner to Jitae. He comes on to Jitae with a hint of threat and an offer hard to refuse.  "Don't do it. Choose me, instead. I'll make you get over him."    (Source: NETCOMICS)

title: Kkaejin Yuri Guduui Jogak
description: Roena, the stepsister beloved by everyone. Sise, the new older sister who hated her.   "Roena. I really hate you."   After losing everything, Sise ends her life before Roena's eyes, leaving those words behind. That's definitely how it was...   "My name is Roena. Does this mean we are family now?"   Her life was repeating. So bitterly and hopelessly.  (Source: KakaoPage, translated)

title: Cherry Cake
description: Soo-Hyeon’s peaceful life in the countryside, running a quaint general store and tending a garden, is upended when rumors spread of a luxury hotel project—and the arrival of Tae-Yeon, a gruff yet oddly charming director from S.W. Construction who looks more like a mob boss than a businessman. Despite warnings from the village grandmas to steer clear, Soo-Hyeon isn’t intimidated, even as Tae-Yeon’s attempts to “bribe” him with sweet treats start melting his defenses. But when an unexpected moment reveals Soo-Hyeon’s biggest secret, what starts as a clash of personalities turns into a tangled mix of sweetness, spice, and chaos that neither of them saw coming.    (Source: Lezhin US)

title: From Pauper to Prince
description: Having lived in poverty all his life, Brian gets a second chance when he is offered the role of the sole heir to a conglomerate family's enormous fortune.  (Source: Toomics)

title: Showered with Love
description: Yu Doha, a veterinarian and trainer at a monster biology facility, becomes an unexpected guardian to a juvenile tentacle monster after a slimy first encounter. Imprinting on Doha as its parental figure, the creature named Octo leaves Doha responsible for its care and training over the next year. However, Octo proves nearly impossible to manage alone due to its unpredictable behavior and insatiable sexual appetite. To ensure Doha's safety, Cha Gyeonghwan, the facility chief’s son, is brought in as his assistant. As they work to tame Octo’s wild tendencies, the two grow unexpectedly close, their connection deepening into something far more personal.    (Source: Lezhin)    Note: Includes five side story chapters.

title: Amber Alert
description:
After saving little Amber from an abusive foster parent, hitman Tennessee gains someone worth protecting for the first time in his life. But the older Amber gets, the more his obsessive love for Tennessee grows, despite his rescuer still seeing him as the same little boy from years ago. It isn’t until Tennessee gets into an accident that leaves him with face blindness that the lines between them begin to blur. Tennessee knows in his head that this is still Amber, but his impairment makes both the younger man’s face and Tennessee’s own feelings for him unrecognizable...
(Source: Tappytoon)

title: Killer Stall
description:
One thing is for certain - if you exercise violence, that violence will return to you in any shape or form.
 
 The man who bakes flour-based food and runs an eatery, has a darker past than anyone could ever guess.
 
 ...unless you see the name of his store.

title: Uncle
description: Seongjin, an unemployed amateur writer is suddenly involved in an unexpected romantic relationship! But 7 years later...  (Source: Toomics)

title: Loved by the Villains
description: After a life of family abuse and betrayal, Lumina Lanchoux, a supernatural Leggion being, is saved from the brink of death by her half-brother Endymion. Just then, her healing powers awaken, and she is discovered by Duke Hart, the most powerful living Leggion. He sends her back in time to age 12 with the mission of saving his son Karajan from death by his own superpowers. Under the care of House Hart, Lumina is set for a peaceful second life. That is until she learns of the duke's deadly secret.    (Source: Tapas)

title: Saturday's Master
description: Thirteen. Thirteen weeks, and it would all be over… Lee Seo-dan is on the verge of resignation. Having reported his seniors at Raewon for internal corruption, he has been ostracized by all those around him. With no one to turn to, Seo-dan figures it would just be better to leave altogether - until he is presented with an opportunity for redemption. Han Juwon has been called many things by those around him: “Workaholic.” “Tyrant.” “Demon.” All titles earned for his reputation as one of Raewon’s toughest, yes, but also as the best in the business. So when the desperate Seo-dan turns to Juwon for a chance at salvation, the latter is initially hesitant. Yet he senses something in Seo-dan that could be of use…something manageable, malleable, and most importantly - manipulable. With a single utterance, Juwon is about to change Seo-dan’s life forever: “If you’re truly desperate, prove it.”    (Source: Lezhin US)

title: Bimilchingu
description: A secret disclosing devil If you speak about it, the one who you tell the secret to will die.

title: The Overflowing Elixir of the Fallen House
description: Ryeon knew from the moment she was born that her life was a cursed one. Born sickly in a martial arts family meant she had nothing else to do other than wait for death. And when that icy embrace came, it delivered not peace but a second chance at life! Regressed to her days as a child, Ryeon resolves to cure herself and live a long, healthy life for the sake of herself and her family.  (Source: Tapas)

title: Cosplay Girl
description: After being rejected by her unrequited love, the usually carefree Narae decides she needs to redeem her self-esteem. A normal girl by day, at night Narae now transforms into "BJ Nari," the cosplaying livestreamer! It doesn’t matter that she got rejected, she’ll show her adoring fans how sexy she is! Things start heating up when a mysterious user named “Aooya” proposes something naughty to Narae on her livestream. Hesitant at first, she’s a true exhibitionist at heart and gives her fans what they want. As she gets deeper and deeper into the world of live streaming, will Narae be able to resist the temptations that await her?  (Source: Lezhin X)

title: Low-Level Civil Servant Wants to Climb the Social Ladder
description: Namia, the magic-scroll-writing genius, gets taken advantage of by everyone—from her lazy boss to her greedy family. But when she uses her knowledge of this novel to save the life of Prince Kiaros, it’s time for her life to turn around. Those who used her will finally get what’s coming to them, while Namia’s skills and good deeds are finally recognized and rewarded. But little does she know that her new assistant is really the prince in disguise, and someone is still trying to kill him!  (Source: Tapas)

title: My Older Sister is the Main Character
description: When Helena was reborn into a novel, she was forced to grow up knowing that her sister was the main character and that a terrible life awaited her… unless Helena could stop it from happening. By learning how to take care of family matters, Helena took her sister, Callisto’s, place as the head of the house, allowing her to live her dream of being a knight. But she now finds herself hurtling towards both the terrible fate once meant for Callisto and the man who makes it come to pass.    (Source: Tapas)

title: Wife Training
description: I'm a sham online, but I can't believe someone actually believed in my lies... Were they serious about what they offered me...?!    (Source: Toomics)

title: All I Want Is... Who?!
description: College life is a minefield! You know those times when you wish the ground would just open up and swallow you whole? Well, Mi-Seol sure does. She screwed up big time by ruining some random (hot) guy’s class schedule for the entire semester. Wracked with guilt, she hopes and prays she’ll never have to face him again… But the cruel hand of fate has other ideas!    (Source: Lezhin US, edited)

title: Namanui Gyeyakcheonsa
description: After being traumatised from getting forcefully outed, Yeonho, a closeted gay, is a "single-for-life" who has never dated anyone. One day, Yeonho gets hit by a shooting star, and he woke up to see someone, who calls himself "Cupid", sharing his bed! The strange man promised to end Yeonho's one-sided crushes, but will he really...?

title: Macguffin
description: "What kind of person do you think I am?”  "…A stranger."    Lee Su-Ha, who has been locked up in an unidentified facility for a long time, is dragged out by strangers one day. He meets a man and starts living with him, before discovering he himself is an Omega who was sold to an Alpha.    "Alright, be like that. Just know that what kind of person I become from now on is up to you.”    He is concerned about the fact he has no heat cycle and is unable to conceive due to his abnormal physical condition, but the man doesn't seem to care that Lee Su-Ha is not fulfilling his role as an Omega.    "You hate it when I treat you kindly. That's why I'm doing my best to accomodate you."    What the man's true feelings are, the hatred he feels towards him, the feelings of déjà vu... Lee Su-Ha becomes more and more confused as the number of inexplicable things keeps increasing...    (Source: Ridibooks, translated)

title: Yeoreumui Jeoju
description: Hyunsoo falls in love with the campus idol, Kwon Jiwon, at the freshman welcoming party. But Jiwon suddenly disappears a week before summer vacation and appears again... As a cat?! A cute romantic comedy of an adorable couple who struggle to change Jiwon back to normal.    (Source: Bomtoon, translated)    Note: Part of Kidari Entertainment's "Yeoreumdanpyeonseon: Some in Summer (~키다리이엔티 여름단편선~ 썸인썸머, Kidari Entertainment Summer Short Story Collection: Some in Summer)"

title: Kiss of Damnation
description: I'm not here for love.    Si-Yun's been crushing hard on his high school tutor, U-Hyeon, and finally works up the courage to confess to him after graduation. U-Hyeon's answer? "Let's be friends with benefits." One night, Gyeong-Hu sees Si-Yun and U-Hyeon about to kiss outside a motel, stirring up something within him...    (Source: Manta, edited)

title: Singun
description: The monsters take everything away from a boy and keep him captive as their food. He grits his teeth and seeks revenge, but human strength isn’t enough to beat the monsters. At that moment, a monster hunter appears…

title: Just One Bite!
description: Sang-Gu is a student who's struggling financially and is a hypochondriac due to trauma from a childhood accident. Young-Hui, on the other hand, is the “it” girl of the famous K-Pop girl group, Sugar Red. Immediately after Young-Hui meets Sang-Gu, she chases after him because of the "delicious" smell he has. One single bite of your blood for 10 million won – will you take the deal?    (Source: WEBTOONS, edited)

title: You Make Me Swoon
description: Face it, high school's hard. From friends to grades to looks, everything matters. Luckily, Ha Nami's got most of that taken care of. Her grades are at the top of her class, she's got two loyal friends, and she's pretty to boot. Unfortunately, she's also got a curse. One that makes it impossible for her to talk to anyone she likes. Like... "like" likes.    (Source: Lezhin)

title: Bloody Mary
description: Scarlett was a happy girl. With beautiful looks, a wealthy family, and even a kind fiancee, Scarlett was expected to be the most beautiful bride in the world. But on the morning of her wedding day, the pure-white bride was killed by someone. When she opened her eyes again, everything was different.   “I’ve told you many times before. It’s because I’m Scarlett Antwerp!”  “I’m sorry, but the Esteemed Daughter of the Count, Lady Antwerp, is already dead.”   Waking up in a strange place, Scarlett could not understand what had happened to her. Why couldn’t anyone recognize her? Why was her fiancee standing next to another woman? Why was she Vivian instead of Scarlett, the Esteemed Daughter of the Count? Why was the one next to her not her fiancee Edward, but Alexis, the police chief? Scarlett swore that she’d get her fiancé back and get revenge on the one who killed her.

title: Maeumui Sugje
genres: Drama, Romance, Slice of Life, Supernatural
description: My first ever love disappeared 13 years ago... and came back as a vampire.

title: The Lucky Guy
description: Mr. Kim, a broke guy in his 40's, suddenly wins the lottery and decides to go get what he's always wanted first...    (Source: Toomics)

title: Time and Reason
description: 10 years ago, Banji and Baek-Yeong, along with his three younger siblings, spent their happiest moments together. It seemed like time would last forever. But one day, it all came crashing down and Banji and Baek-Yeong parted ways. 10 years later, the two fatefully meet again as coworkers, but Banji pushes Baek-Yeong away. As for Baek-Yeong, he is determined to reconnect with Banji because he doesn’t want to lose her again. Will Banji and Baek-Yeong be able to rekindle the relationship they once had?    (Source: WEBTOONS)    Note: This works was first released as a self-published work Kakao Webtoon League.

title: Pool Party
description: "Everything you see and hear here must be kept a secret."   Chi-Seong receives an offer to handle chores at a billionaire's secret pool party. He heads to the vacation house, hoping to build connections with the elite. But he soon gets caught up in some trouble as he encounters a series of unexpected events and temptations.  (Source: DAYcomics, edited)

title: The Egoistic Courtship
description: As the last of the divine beasts who protected the land, Lionel Milliard was coveted by women for his power and influence. But after an accident with an ancient relic binds him to an inn worker named Hanna, he finally finds one woman with no interest in him! Lionel, intrigued by Hanna's rejection, convinces her to go on a journey with him to free them of the relic's power. Hanna reluctantly agrees, but will she be able to fend off Lionel's advances, or will this beast devour yet another woman?    (Source: Tapas)   Note: Includes 11 extra chapters.

title: I'll Give You the Most Rotten One
description:
Ten years of relationship go down the drain when Haeru discovers that her loving boyfriend, Se-o, spent the night with another woman. What begins as a series of small misunderstandings snowballs into something much bigger as the college sweethearts wade through love, temptation, and workplace drama. Well, what better way to get back at her cheating boyfriend than to take the most rotten revenge ever?

(Source: WEBTOON)

title: Cottage Garden
description:
Burnt out and buried in work, Isaac Schrader drowns his stress in drinks with his only friend, James. The next morning, he wakes up in a hotel bed—hungover, disoriented, and far from alone. Lying next to him is Theodore Donovan, his charming yet insufferable roommate from their boarding school days… a man who vanished without a word years ago. Their reunion is anything but ordinary—and Theodore’s sudden return feels far from innocent.

What is he really after?

(Source: Lezhin US)

Note: Includes four extra chapters.

title: Elegy of Rose Castle
description: Who knew that the life of an aristocrat would be full of such loneliness? Ruri wakes up one day as Albertina von Rozenburg, the oldest legitimate child of the Rozenburg family. This new life of hers is full of tetchy servants, unfamiliar rules, and distant family members. Ruri longs to go back to her familiar world, but there’s no one here to guide her. With no one to trust, Ruri becomes wary of everyone, even the only person who seems to care about Albertina: Elma, a young servant girl who follows Albertina with a dogged devotion. When Ruri finds out that Albertina’s only purpose is to get married off to an unpleasant, albeit very handsome, prince, she’s had enough. She’s going to find a way out of here, even if that means she doesn’t act according to the traditions of this world, so be it.   (Source: Lezhin US)

title: Geu Guide-ga Sarangbanneun Bangbeop
description: Note: Includes five extra chapters.

title: Taming My Young Aunt
description: Hyeonsu just lost his first love…and to his dad, of all people! But before he can even process the heartbreak, he’s stuck getting bossed around by his tiny, bratty aunt who suddenly showed up in his life. Then, the unthinkable happens - his way-too-young aunt drops a totally random love confession out of nowhere. They’re total opposites, they argue non-stop…and now they’re teaming up for a secret mission that definitely isn’t normal. Buckle up for a wild ride with this unhinged duo and their not-so-family-friendly plan!  (Source: Lezhin US)

title: Gongyumong
description: What if there exists another world beyond lucid dreaming? That is where those who have been stolen of their dreams gather. Do Shi-Eon, who escapes reality by lucid dreaming, loses his dream and falls into the space of 'Shared Dream.' Now he must fight to reclaim his dream.  (Source: Naver, translated)

title: New Normal: Class 8
description: The students of Class 8 may not look like your average students, but that doesn't make their lives any less interesting. Follow Dongwon and his classmates as they have fun at school and redefine what it means to be normal.     (Source: WEBTOON)     Note: Includes one prologue and three extra chapters.

title: Hunting for Cougars
description: After Sunghyun’s parents decide to go to Europe for a few years without so much as a warning, he’s left alone with no house or money, forcing him to fend for himself. He’s reluctant about taking a job at a child-friendly café at first, but he soon realizes that it’s not only a place for kids to find playmates. After a while, he’s in luck when two of the hottest moms show interest in him. Yujin, a mother of two who still wants to be treated as an attractive woman, and Ahyun, a single mother who feels lonely raising a child on her own. Will this 21-year-old be able to find a way to juggle a relationship with the two cougars without being caught?  (Source: Lezhin X)

title: Watch Dog
description: There's only one way to stop the hyenas from going for the big piece of meat. I have to become the king to protect my owner.    (Source: Toomics)  Note:  Chapter count includes a prologue.

title: Lady Scarlet
description:
Scarlet Mathia, the eldest daughter of a poor Baron family, heads to the capital to earn money by playing the piano. After three years, instead of using her piano skills, she decides to marry Edward... but he was already engaged! Eventually, she is betrayed by the man she trusted...
Then one day, a notorious marquess asks her to participate in taking revenge on Edward... (Source: POCKET COMICS)

title: Elegy of Rose Castle
description: Who knew that the life of an aristocrat would be full of such loneliness? Ruri wakes up one day as Albertina von Rozenburg, the oldest legitimate child of the Rozenburg family. This new life of hers is full of tetchy servants, unfamiliar rules, and distant family members. Ruri longs to go back to her familiar world, but there’s no one here to guide her. With no one to trust, Ruri becomes wary of everyone, even the only person who seems to care about Albertina: Elma, a young servant girl who follows Albertina with a dogged devotion. When Ruri finds out that Albertina’s only purpose is to get married off to an unpleasant, albeit very handsome, prince, she’s had enough. She’s going to find a way out of here, even if that means she doesn’t act according to the traditions of this world, so be it.   (Source: Lezhin US)

title: Iut Geunyeo
description: Hanwool and Orum are childhood friends who have been through everything together. Orum decides to give Hanwool something precious to her as a token of appreciation for sacrificing himself for her…  (Source: TOPTOON, translated)

title: Geojinmal Gateun Geojinmal
description: In summer of that year, during the hottest day, in the small neighborhood in which I lived, a case of child violence occurred. They abused him in front of my own eyes, and I just ran away in panic. That day, it was the first time I killed a butterfly.    Notes: The chapter count includes 8 extra stories and a prologue.

title: Michelin Star
description:
Only a handful of restaurants have the honor of being awarded a Michelin Star. Does our up and coming chef have the courage and the skills to overcome all obstacles? Rivalries and Romance, are they an obstacle or a catalyst to become the first chef to receive a Michelin Star in Korea?
(Source: Tapastic)

title: Angnyeoro Sallasinda
description: “You have to become a villain to live? … But how do you do that?”   One day, Da-jeong Kim, an ordinary Korean office worker who suddenly possesses the world of a novel. In fact, it is Christine Rosalind, the villain character who dies at the beginning of the novel in the series that she possessed. Perhaps because of Da-jeong’s possession, the original death is avoided, but that is only temporary. In a few moments, you die, and when you die, you return to the starting point of your life. How can I live without dying? The sky throws a clear answer to Da-jeong, who is in trouble. let her be a villain When she becomes a villain she can live without dying. … By the way, can she become a villain that only eats her heart?    “A world collapsing, twisting characters. If you want to live, you have to remember who you are.”   She said she could only live if she was a villain, did she mean that she could only live? After many twists and turns, she heard the voice of a villain, but Da-jeong’s life is hard and painful. It turns out that Christine was born into a civilization of ‘dead or bad’. Unexpected characters appear in front of Da-jeong, who is in such trouble. Raymon Myers, who is the man of the original story and is a perfect match for Christine, Diane Schneider, who was not found in the original, but has a reputation as a vicious witch in the world, and Cordelian Parker, who was possessed by the original author, the female lead of the original and the creator of this world. The three of them approach Da-jeong with different goals…  (Source: KakaoPage, translated)

title: Leave Room For Love
description: Kang Yui lost his parents in an accident, and has been blaming himself ever since. As bad things keep happening to those who try to get close to him, he decides to shut himself off from the rest of the world and live a life of solitude. But then comes the effervescent Lee Hyun, his new roommate at university: with his motto of “never give up,” Hyun is determined to wiggle his way into Yui’s heart, one way or another. But is Hyun bound to be beaten in this battle? Or is there still room for love in Yui’s life?    (Source: Lezhin US)

title: The End of a Relationship
description: Gyu-Heon goes on a vacation with his girlfriend, Da-Eun, to a guest house hidden in the countryside. However, from the moment they encounter the owner of the guest house upon their arrival, everything starts to fall apart. As horrible events start to unfold along with dreadful encounters, they continue to fall deeper into the darkest pit of hell... It’s time to put an end to everything.    (Source: WEBTOONS, edited)

title: Bloody Lies
description: In a world where vampires and humans coexist, orphaned Eugene seeks recognition from his enigmatic vampire progenitor, Logan. Struggling with his lack of human emotions, Eugene stumbles upon an intimate scene involving Dominic, sparking a desire to reclaim his lost humanity. To learn emotions, Eugene makes an unusual deal with Dominic, blurring lines of desire, loyalty, and sacrifice in a world where emotions are both prized and perilous.    (Source: Lezhin US)

title: Cheonmasingyo Nagyangbonbu
description: What does the "Wu" in Wuxia truly mean? It is the power to enforce one's chivalry—to wield justice not just for oneself, but to shape the world by sheer strength. And if that strength transcends the self, flows through others, and reaches to the ends of the world... Then that power is none other than divine. So what does it take for a mere human to ascend to such godhood? To reach the realm of the divine through martial might? Thus begins the epic tale of Pi Wol-ryeo, a warrior in search of that very answer—one forged in blood, will, and iron discipline.  (Source: KakaoPage, translated)

title: Frost Will Always Fall
description: Unha is the granddaughter of a shaman, and she's next in line to become one herself. It's a fate she never asked for, but she's always known that an evil force is out there waiting to destroy her if she rejects her destiny. However, all hope is not lost, as her grandmother spoke vaguely of a person who holds the key to her survival. So when the handsome character she's only ever met in her dreams appears before her as a man named Jueon, she's almost certain he's the key. Still, Unha's fate only becomes more complicated with her old school friend Haesu reentering her life. If she and Jueon are fated, then why is her connection to Haesu so strong? Is it possible they're all connected, not just in this life, but in the past as well?    (Source: Tappytoon)

title: Dark Mage
description: Once... Humans and Orcs peacefully co-existed, but at some point humans got greedy and started a war claiming the Orcs' territory. The diety-Lord who created all, got angry with the humans' greed and decided to punish them with 3 catastrophes. One of them was the "Dragons", divine creatures blessed with magic capable of doing almost anything. Now the Orcs, with a "Dragon" by their side, seem to have the upper hand. Will humans just sit back and see their land get destroyed? They are too devious for that... Their only good plan at that point is to abduct a "Dragon" to even things up. But how are they going to manage the capture of a being with so much power?

title: An Obedient Inheritence
description: Inheriting a vast fortune overnight from a father he never knew, Nam Jaeho finds himself the unexpected master of a man completely devoted to him. Testing his loyalty becomes his latest hobby as he navigates this strange new reality, grappling with the complexities of power, submission, and the mysterious past that has brought them together.    (Source: Lezhin US)    Note: Includes seven extra chapters.

title: Aquaman
description: Jump into the life of twenty-something Naru as he navigates through the confusing world of modern dating. He’s faced with familiar moments we’ve all been through such as “should I add that smiley face at the end of the text?” or “why haven’t they responded to my text?” But the added challenge for Naru? He’s never dated, doesn’t use a cellphone and most importantly someone’s out there to sabotage his dating life!

title: The Delinquent Girl
description: Bullied in school, and now reunited... Can I get my payback?  (Source: Toomics)

title: Yeongjunimui Koini Julji Aneum?!
description: Note: This is a one shot promotional manhwa for the novel of the same name.

title: Isnelda
description: Stuck between my first love and my hero.    After suddenly becoming an orphan, Isnelda is sent to live with her cold relatives until she reaches adulthood and can gain her inheritance. Yet upon becoming an adult, a benefactor returns to Isnelda's life, opening her eyes to a world of wealth, greed, lust, and... magic? What could go wrong?    (Source: Manta)

title: My Personal Caddie
description: Seo Yeo-Won, desperate for money, starts a high-paying caddie job at Royal Golf only to find that it’s a private country club where only the most powerful and wealthiest people are allowed. Yeo-Won caters to the guests' whims and catches the attention of the mysterious and ominous Jang Gi-Ju, who makes him a lucrative offer he can't refuse, changing the course of both their lives. Can Yeo-Won handle Mr. Jang’s eccentric and prolific tastes?  (Source: Lezhin US)

title: Seuji Maseyo, Sajangnim!
description: Eun-Ho is a younger guy who has been chasing after me since we were kids and making it impossible for me to date anyone. Working at my father’s company, I finally thought I was free from him and his advances. But my father made him my secretary and now he’s even more annoying! Constantly telling my father that I’m not working enough, that I’m drinking on the job… On the day his tattling got me kicked out from the house, I learned something new about Eun-Ho. That guy…he’s actually ridiculously big!  (Source: BOMTOON, translated)

title: My Dearest Misery
description: Sheldon, a popular webcomic creator, is drinking alone after his crush ignores him when he's approached by a man who looks exactly like one of his characters. Afterwards, he wakes up with a broken leg in a room eerily similar to his own. His kidnapper, Do-Hyuk, is a psychopath who truly believes he is that character and wants Sheldon to change the ending. Though Sheldon tries to manipulate the situation and escape, he winds up getting more deeply involved in a twisted love affair with Do-Hyuk. Will Sheldon be able to break free of their shared delusion and return to reality?  (Source: Lezhin US)

title: Noye
description: At the secret slave auction market only for the top 1%. Attractive identical twin sisters are up for special sale. Because of the man who successfully wins the bid the girls become more sensational and more lustful. This is their one and only secretive fun.   (Source: Lezhin)      Note: The chapter count includes a prologue.

title: Bongyeok Geumyeon Gwonjang Manhwa
description: Brilliant usage of modern media for antismoking campaign. Park Hyung Suk from Lookism makes an appearance.

title: My Neighbor Nari
description: Reclusive geek Woo-Chan, who yearns for tranquility after suffering the consequences from his brother's past with loan sharks, encounters a sweet but determined force: Na-Ri, the daughter of the loan shark company's CEO. Love-struck, Na-Ri persistently tries to seduce him, eventually moving in next door, but Woo-Chan repeatedly rejects her advances, clinging to his desire for peace. However, as Na-Ri's charm chips away at his defenses, Woo-Chan finds himself sucked into the allure of this unexpected connection, which sparks a series of events that will rock his quiet life forever... whether he likes it or not!    (Source: Tappytoon, edited)   Note: Includes eight extra chapters.

title: Reforming My Regretful Husband
description: “Don’t use the regretful male lead hashtag if the heroine doesn’t end up with a regretful male lead!” After wailing over the ending of my favorite novel, I wake up as Cornia, the heroine who kicks her regretful hubby to the curb for a new flame. The catch? My heart’s set on the regretful husband, Duke Ertein Belcita! But I’ll have to overcome several obstacles to stay married to Ertein. First up, let’s give those meddling villainous in-laws the boot. Watch out, world. Cornia’s rewriting her love life!    (Source: Tappytoon)

title: Classmate
description: "I'll be your friend."    A chilling ghost boy, Hae-Su Lee, visits the outcast, Eun-Ha Ju. The moment she accepts this dangerous friendship, unexpected events unfold around Eun-Ha...    Will this hand offered by her mysterious friend be salvation, or a curse?  (Source: Naver, translated)

title: A Hunter's Stamina
description: In a world where dungeons have opened and some people awaken as hunters, South Korea offers an unusual deal—become a hunter and serve for ten years, and your siblings will be exempt from military service. This leads to a strange trend of wealthy families adopting children to shield their own. Yeon-woo was adopted under such circumstances, becoming a hunter to protect his younger brother, Jeong-woo. Now, five years into his service, when an unknown dungeon opens near Jeong-woo's university, Yeon-woo volunteers for a dangerous mission, ready to risk everything to protect his brother—even his life.    (Source: Lezhin US)

title: Susu, Han
description: Lee Susu, an easy-going girl who lived in the countryside all the time since she was a child. She had no choice but to stay at his brother, Lee Han's house after the high school in the village was closed. And there are big and small misunderstandings between the awkward siblings...   (Source: Pocket Comics)

title: Jangdane Matchwojwo!
description: A romantic comedy between two opposing forces, the ultra-short Yu Bo-Ram and an Iljin Basketball Club member, Choi Gyeom.    (Source: Naver, translated)   Note: Chapter count includes an epilogue.

title: Flip Turn
description: Yeonsoo is a gentle swimming instructor for kids, content with the calm rhythm of everyday life—until top star Cha Juhwan suddenly walks into his pool, needing to master swimming fast for a film role.    What starts as a professional arrangement quickly turns personal. Yeonsoo, shaped by years of gaslighting from a toxic partner, has come to believe he can only enjoy relationships that hurt. But Juhwan sees right through him, and offers something different—something kind.    "I’m used to getting hurt. My partner likes it that way."  "Then try it with me as well."  "I’m not talking about pain. I mean something real—something gentle."    With Juhwan’s quiet patience and unwavering honesty, Yeonsoo begins to realize that love doesn’t have to come with bruises. And maybe, just maybe, he deserves something softer.    (Source: Lezhin US)    Note: Includes ten extra chapters.

title: Trap Trap
description: Adult novelist Baekyeon suffers from sociophobia and hasn't left his old decrepit villa for years. The only one who cares for him is his editor Soohyun. One day, the bugs keep appearing inside his home, and Baekyeon has had enought and calls Soohyun for help. Soohyun calls extermination service “BFX.” The exterminator Hyuk, with a tall and muscular physique, shows up and Baek's cold heart is thawed...!    (Source: POCKET COMICS)

title: Meokgo Twiryeo Haetseumnidaman
description: After starving for several months, I picked up and ate unknown food in a temple I had entered to beg at, and when I opened my eyes again... A man called the devil who will destroy the world was in front of me.    "If you ate it, you should be responsible for what happens?"    I ate the source of his power, so he spit out strange words about taking responsibility. I have to get away from this madman before he splits my stomach!     "Body contact is the most effective way to exchange power between humans. The most effective method is to sleep together..."    "Ah, this is reasonable. It can't be helped. It's good. One by one, step by step, shall we try it? Starting with sleeping together."    I couldn't ask him why it would be one by one, step by step. I felt like I would be eaten up just by his black eyes. Are you... Are you actually a villain who destroys the world with your beauty?    (Source: KakaoPage, translated)

title: Secretary Jin's Confinement Journal
description: Kidnapped by the cold, dominating CEO from his favorite S&M novel, Yoo-Hyun Jin, a masochistic secretary, looks forward to the anticipated torture. He eagerly awaits Yi-Shin Kwon’s touch, but as the lines blur, Yoo-Hyun wonders if this delicious pain might unlock something deeper and more intimate…    (Source: Tapas)   Note: Includes three side story chapters.

title: From Pakuri To Assistant?!
description: “I'm... I'm a pakuri to my super handsome crush...?!”    Liking Kanghyun's artwork so much, Jiun became his pakuri(someone who copies another's artwork). One day, Jiun is shocked to be told by a friend that he's just a mere pakuri. Over his distraught guilt, he decides to meet with Kanghyun to apologize. But instead... Jiun becomes Kanghyun's assistant?!

title: Adios, April
description: A world of magic, science, and love.    After the tragic death of her sister, April is sold off by her father for just three pieces of silver. With no one to turn to, she's soon purchased by a duchess and begins working at her castle. But everything changes once she catches the eye of her new master...     (Source: Manta)

title: Let Me Drive
description: The best part of being a driver's ed instructor is the one night stands with my students. Until I met someone I couldn't have and it turns out she's my friend's wife...     (Source: Toptoon)

title: From Me to You
description: Seung-tae’s not sure he’s lived the best of lives. He’s 70-years-old and still closeted, with no one left at his side to hold his hand when he’s diagnosed with Alzheimer’s. But maybe all that could change… with the help of his old diary. Turns out he can reach out to his 19-year-old self in the past via its magic. And talking to his younger self, all these memories keep coming back… Of how he was in love when he was so young, and how there was this serial killer on the loose in his neighborhood…    (Source: Lezhin US)

title: My Boss is My Biggest Fan!
description: By day, Naeul Ju is an unassuming pushover at J&H Tab House. By night, she is Author Juna, a popular writer known for her web novel, Love Shot. No one knows about her secret double life except for her two closest friends. Hiding behind her taglines, she struggles to speak up while working for her ignorant boss, Dobin Kwon. She finds comfort in her cyberfriend, Dobi, who has always been there to support her. Workplace drama, pen names, and hidden identities… what will Naeul do when she realizes that Dobi is actually her ruthless boss, Dobin?    (Source: Tapas)

title: Blast
description: Kael (a.k.a. Ryu Shiho) was a menace in his angelic form, harassing other angels whenever he got the chance to. Therefore, the heavenly fathers decided to expel him to the human world, hoping that his behaviour would improve. But... They guessed wrong. His attitude didn't get any better at all, and to top it off, humans now call him "Lucifer" because of his evil deeds and his scary eyes. If he ever wants to see the doors of heaven open up to him again, he has to perform a hundred good deeds... Will this task prove to be impossible?

title: Self-Defense Lesson
description: "Sex... no, I'll teach you self defense."   Sunghyun is the head of the failing Hapkido Dojo. One day, he happens to obtain a mysterious system message. It says the dojo will expand every time he clears a quest but the next quest is...?! [Quest] Make the female members climax!  (Source: TOPTOON, translated)

title: BLACK JUNE
description: 7 deadly sins...7 murders. The tested and the testers... "I will always be watching you"

title: Seonsaengnim
description: Su-Cheol has a crush on his math teacher. His feelings for her aren't the innocent kind of love a student could have for his teacher..His meticulous and premeditated plan to make her fall for him begins!   "My Teacher.. She's my girl."  (Source: TOPTOON, translated)

title: Grinding To The Top
genres: Action, Adventure, Drama, Fantasy, Hentai, Romance
description: In the not-too-distant future, a Full-Dive game called “Lowtow World” captivates players worldwide. Kang Tae-young, an unemployed 20-year-old, is farming virtual items for his former high school bullies. One fateful day, he stumbles upon a mysterious and legendary item that inexplicably attracts the attention – and bodies – of nearby women to him: The Eye of Yoma. With his newfound powers, Tae-young will try his best to leverage this unexpected advantage, changing his life from a nerdy nobody into a super stud.  (Source: Lezhin US)

title: Engineer x Jangmurabi
description: Have I seriously lost my body and my heart to that Beary Otaku? The sexiest man in this neighborhood, Johny Black, comes to tell you the sad story(?) of his unrequited love...  (Source: Lezhin, translated)

title: Legend: The Beginning
description: Cheon Mudeok knows two things: fighting and loyalty to his friends. Will he be able to graduate safely? Or is this the birth of a legend?  (Source: Toomics)

title: Grinding To The Top
genres: Action, Adventure, Drama, Fantasy, Hentai, Romance
description: In the not-too-distant future, a Full-Dive game called “Lowtow World” captivates players worldwide. Kang Tae-young, an unemployed 20-year-old, is farming virtual items for his former high school bullies. One fateful day, he stumbles upon a mysterious and legendary item that inexplicably attracts the attention – and bodies – of nearby women to him: The Eye of Yoma. With his newfound powers, Tae-young will try his best to leverage this unexpected advantage, changing his life from a nerdy nobody into a super stud.  (Source: Lezhin US)

title: Seonsaengnim
description: Su-Cheol has a crush on his math teacher. His feelings for her aren't the innocent kind of love a student could have for his teacher..His meticulous and premeditated plan to make her fall for him begins!   "My Teacher.. She's my girl."  (Source: TOPTOON, translated)

title: How to Hold His Leash
description: Not a single day has passed by without Yeon-U calling her verbally abusive boss Jun-Hu Kang a “son of a b****”. After being cursed out for the millionth time, Jun-Hu turns into an actual dog. What's worse is that Yeon-U becomes Jun-Hu's owner, and the only way for him to temporarily turn back into a human is if she touches him. After internally cursing him 317,920 times, Yeon-U finally gains the upper hand against her supercilious CEO, who is now an adorable white puppy.    (Source: WEBTOON, edited)

title: Forest Sea
description: After centuries of war, the Avian and Serpent races agree to a tentative peace and joint training of cadets. Instructor Sahwahyun, an admired Avian war hero, maintains a strict composure that keeps all students at bay—except Yahyul, an unassuming Serpent cadet harboring hidden depths beneath his stoic shell. As their paths intertwine through subtle encounters, a halting bond forms that soon blossoms beyond mere camaraderie into something deeper that defies the boundaries between their races.    (Source: Tapas)

title: The Good Life
description: Yuchang is a boy that lives with the problem of being way too handsome that nobody can relate to! Having been born with such pure beauty, Yuchang undergoes a project to become a dork.  </br> (From: Copin Comics)  </br> Note: Chapter count includes one prologue

title: Rapport
description: S-class Esper Eunhyeon is forced into a rural transfer and paired with a male Guide, Jaewoo. Bored and biding time until he can return, he's shocked to find Jaewoo tangled up with another Esper. Could there be more to this “dull” partner than meets the eye?    (Source: Manta)    Note: Includes a prologue.

title: Lavender in June
description: Chic Si-Yeon and bubbly Yu-Ra couldn’t be any more different, but after a whiff of lavender scented clothes and an unexpected encounter at Dahan Art Academy, they become inseparable best friends. Now that they’re adults stepping into the real world, Si-Yeon and Yu-Ra start exploring exciting new opportunities and pursuing their artistic passions. But when they start catching each other at bad timings and misunderstandings start to accumulate, their friendship is put to the test. Will Si-Yeon and Yu-Ra be able to keep up with their own personal lives and maintain their friendship intact?  (Source: WEBTOONS, edited)

title: Kkumeul Yeokkneun Sonyeon
description: About a dream handler, and the decision he takes for the sake of his client. Note: Won the 3rd spot of Daewon manwha contest.

title: God of Ecstasy
description: Arthur is a sex addict who can't help but seduce every woman he comes across. He begins seeing a therapist as advised by his friend.  (Source: Toomics)

title: Love in Spring
description: Jihoon is the last person to be seen with a girl. He's spent his entire life turning down girls because his heart simply does not skip a beat for any girl. And then there's Sol, whose heart beats for every man out there. Serendipitously, the two meet at their college orientation, and whereas Jihoon finds himself helplessly in love, Sol finds herself able to breath in the presence of a man for the first time ever. Jihoon needs to win her heart, but he can't even speak to her without blushing or stuttering. Luckily for Jihoon, his friends come up with a devious plan to bring Sol and Jihoon together. Will the plan work?   (Source: Lezhin)

title: Super Rich
description: Daeho Han needs money to save his mother. Jihoon Nam wants revenge. The two join hands to take on the top 0.01% 'super rich' class.    (Source: Toomics)

title: Taming the Tyrant
description: Betrayal, rebirth, and second chances.    Jae-Ryun seduced and betrayed the tyrannical emperor before being discovered and executed. Now he’s woken up 20 years in the past and crossed paths with the emperor once again. Is this his chance to atone for his sins by reforming the man he loves, or are some romances fated to end in tragedy?    (Source: Manta)

title: You Just Made My Day
description: The transfer student Ye-Bom was jealous of Eun-Ho, an honor student everyone liked. Many years later, Ye-Bom’s life feels hopeless and bleak when one day, she finally learns about the reason behind Eun-Ho’s death that occurred a long time ago. Ye-Bom, filled with regret, returns to the time when she was 18 and faces him once again. What drove the seemingly perfect boy to death? Ye-Bom is finally ready to hear Eun-Ho’s story.   (Source: WEBTOONS)   Note: This series contains themes regarding suicide and bullying that may not be suitable for all readers. Viewer discretion is advised.

title: Chagapge? Tteugeopge!
description: After rejecting all the men who were fawning over her big chest, Jihyun realized she became 27. After receiving a wedding invitation from her friend, she became nervous. Beautiful and single, “Jihyun” fell in love at first sight with a man three years younger than her named “Sungwoo.” He’s kind and mature. Moreover, he’s extremely hot. Together, the two experience each other. They go through heaven and hell, hot and cold, but…  (Source: Lezhin, translated)

title: Heaven
description: My father left us a huge debt when he died and my mom  abandoned me and my sister. The only way to pay off my father’s huge debt is do whatever they say... Can I overcome this and become a king?  (Source: TOPTOON+)

title: Polarity
description: The hit series from Eun Song returns with officially updated artwork, chapters, and additional scenes! With the sudden outbreak of a deadly virus, humanity is thrown into chaos. The few who survive it are either transformed into horrible cannibalistic creatures called "Worms," or super-humans called "Anomalies."  Haru, a young Anomaly student at New Seoul High School, dreams of joining the prestigious "ISO" - an organization formed to fight the war against this virus. But the future in store for him is nothing like he imagined...    (Source: Tappytoon)

title: The Ashen Snowfield
description: The world didn't end with a bang. It was a flash of light bookended by a long, endless freeze that covered the landscape is white snow. Kindness and compassion were replaced with struggle and the ruthless will to survive. And then, there are the Ashen. New beings with abilities beyond that of normal humans, giving them an edge above all others in the frozen wasteland. In this war, there are no victors, just survivors.    (Source: Lezhin)     Note: Includes a prologue and an epilogue.

title: Yuiljeong Siseon
description: Jae-Kyung was the one hyung Se-Ju looked up to when they were kids, but after the financial ruin of Jae-Kyung's family, the two were separated. They never saw each other once during their time apart until one day they ran into each other at the bar Jae-Kyung works at. In a moment of drunken weakness, Jae-Kyung sleeps with Se-Ju and Se-Ju proposes they keep sleeping together? Confused and adrift in life, Jae-Kyung wonders if he can continue their physical relationship.

title: Nonfiction Phrase
description: Movie lover Seo Dong-Ju and genius composer Han Da-Un's first encounter couldn't be worse! But after they accidentally reunite at school and get acquainted, they grow more and more curious about each other... The two boys’ chaotic and heart-fluttering melody unfolds~  (Source: Kakao, translated)

title: Dead Queen
description: Gigantic wasps appear on school grounds and start devouring everyone. Han-Hui, Jong-Bin, Ju-Hyeon, A-Yeong, and Min-Ji run for their lives and safely hide inside food storage. Outside, however, all others turn into hybrids, one by one. Soon, a group of mysterious soldiers shows up and leaves them with syringes and weapons but no information. Now they realize that no help is coming and that there's something bigger behind this bug apocalypse. Will Han-Hui and her friends also turn into hybrids? Who are those soldiers? Against all odds, they must fight for their survival.    (Source: WEBTOONS, edited)

title: Baits
description: Soonam’s always considered himself normal, albeit a bit sheltered. His world consists of regular humans and “hybrids,” a half-animal, half-human species that possesses the characteristics of the animal they are. Hybrids are faster, more sensitive, more powerful than regular humans, and the higher up they are in the food chain, the more privileged they are. But all that’s got nothing to do with Soonam, right? Well, turns out that’s not the case, and Soonam’s world turns completely upside down when he encounters Siyeol, an apex predator hybrid in the same department. Siyeol keeps telling him he smells like rabbit, like prey, and he tells him of bigger plans in motion with Soonam at the very center…    (Source: Lezhin US)

title: Doggone Romance
description: Choi Ji-Hu works as secretary to Jung Da-Won, the CEO of Seungjin Corporation. On the surface, he seems like just another ordinary employee, but he’s hiding a dangerous secret - he’s received an offer promising an enormous sum of money in exchange for a damning video that could jeopardize Da-Won’s inheritance of the company. Hoping to make a big break, Ji-Hu carefully collects evidence in secret. But one day, he gets caught…by Da-Won himself! However, instead of reacting with anger, Da-Won jumps to an unpredictable conclusion: “Secretary Choi, do you love me?" Panicked, Ji-Hu blurts out a response without thinking: “Yes! I love you!” Having fallen head-over-heels for his secretary, Da-Won is about to show Ji-Hu what it means to be loved until you’re dog-tired!  (Source: Lezhin US)   Note: Includes three side story chapters.

title: Mabeopsaneun Gananhae
description: Be it forte or skill, the Wizard Elena’s capabilities were all rank-A at the top. However, even such an Elena had a few flaws; one being the height of her poverty, and another her immense debt! And the most devastating of her flaws was the fact that jewels were her medium for magic.    Then one day, she was recruited by the greatest household in the Borina Empire, the Mayfield Duchy, as an exclusively contracted Wizard. At the thought of being able to pay back all her debts at once, Elena accepted the offer. However, protecting the Duchy, which stood at odds with the Empress, was harder than expected.    To make things worse, the Duke of Mayfield, Cedric, who thought of Wizards as less than bugs, was turning out to be an obstacle for Elena. Will the opportunistic Wizard Elena be able to safely complete her task?

title: Muljoeun Hasukjip
description: Boy-crazy Jae Yoo is willing to go through any underhanded means if it means living in the boarding house full of hot guys… Even if it’s going out on a blind date with the dorkiest boy in the school. When she dumps the guy immediately after, she pisses off his handsome best friend Ji Hu and from that point on, the two are constantly going at each other’s throats like cats and dogs. When Jae Yoo finally accomplishes her dream of entering the “boarding house of hunks,” she thinks that nothing could go wrong. An amazing house, a kind landlady, and even a cute guy who seems to be interested in her… What’s this?! Ji Hu is the landlady’s son?! And how is it that he knows about Jae Yoo’s most embarrassing moment in life? What kind of life will the two lead under the same roof? Will they be able to live together at all?!

title: Crimson Moon
description: Succubi are the weakest in the underworld... But what if one was able to again sexual control over the Demon King?  (Source: Lalatoon)

title: Masinneun Ppangjim Albasaeng
description: In hopes of getting close to his estranged friend, Se-Gun, Nan-Woo decides to work part-time at the bakery run by him. However, Nan-Woo, who visits Se-Gun during his rut, manifests as an omega for the first time in his life. The two intoxicated people indulge in a moment of physical ecstasy...     (Source: Bomtoon, translated)

title: As the Moon Wanes
description: Trapped in a mysterious forest...     "There's a forest that steals shadows?" Hyo-Ju is on the verge of losing her shadow to a menacing forest and disappearing forever when she meets Mu-Yeong, a mysterious yet beautiful man. In this fairy tale romance, the two race against time as the moon slowly wanes...    (Source: Manta, edited)

title: Start Game
description: If only progressing in life were as easy as leveling up in a game. That’s what happened to James, a game developer who thought his life had hit rock bottom—until his creation began to blur the line between the game and reality.  (Source: Toomics)

title: A Taste of Happiness for the Tragic Extra
description: Once upon a time, a neglected princess died a tragic death, only to wake up as a child once more and find herself beloved by all. This is the novel Leivella wakes up in, but she’s not the princess. Instead, she’s a mere extra whose family was framed and slaughtered by the tyrannical emperor. Now serving as the princess’s food taster who tests for poison, Leivella must find a way to avoid meeting a tragic death of her own. The world may revolve around its protagonist, but the unmentioned extra might have a shot at writing her own fate!    (Source: Tappytoon)

title: Sleeping With the Enemy
description: When Shin Yiyeon, CEO of Sini Entertainment, chances across Yeo Taejin, she’s convinced she’s struck gold. With his perfect visuals and aloof personality, Taejin practically oozes star potential. Little does Yiyeon know, however… Taejin is actually the CEO of Jin Entertainment, Sini’s rival company! Intrigued by Yiyeon’s ability to spot talent, Taejin infiltrates Sini to find out the key to her success. Will he succeed in stealing her secrets? Or will it be his heart that is stolen instead…?  (Source: Tapas)

title: The Devil's Descendants
description: I have the cursed skill that lets me know who the criminals are. It's my job to get rid of them from this world.  (Source: Toomics)

title: Isegye Gongbang Gogiinhyeong
description: When I woke up after dying from overwork I realized that I was in a workshop street in this new world? I, Jang Suhyeok, broke the most expensive product of this street’s best Meister Heine right after I woke up. I had to work at Aruru, her workshop as a payback… Then why am I being used as a model for adult products? Plus, the sex doll she’s working on, doesn’t it look just like me? My new life starts with master craftsman Heine who’s perfect except for her personality, and Deliah, the spirit of fire of Aruru. A craftsman is a craftsman even after he dies, and I will make everything needed. Even if it’s an adult product!  (Source: Lezhin, translated)

title: Immortal Days
description: Mankind has discovered the secret to immortality. As humans can no longer die, violence abounds. Living among the immortals is Myeol. Careful and conscientious, he’s a street-smart fighter who’s trained himself to survive. Why? Because he’s mortal; a mutant. Upon meeting Phill, a money-grubbing “Troubleshooter” short on morals, Myeol is thrown into a life full of guns, bombs and death cults. But Myeol and Phill have more in common than meets the eye...    (Source: Lezhin US)

title: Secret Family
description: Kang Geon, 17, transfers to a prestigious high school for only the top 0.1% of South Korean students. Raised as a secret agent in North Korea since the age of five, he is a genius and a human weapon. He is tasked with infiltrating South Korea's upper class and building connections. However, making friends proves to be a much bigger mission. This spy action drama follows Kang Geon, who lives as a fake family with his hacker father, who is under international surveillance, and his legendary assassin mother, and finds true happiness!  (Source: KakaoPage, translated)

title: Modern Apartment - Gyeongseong 1930
description: Late 1930s, Gyeongseong.   Dohyeon, a caretaker for Japan’s elite, has learned to endure their depravity-ignored, dehumanized. He just needs to survive one more year. Then she appears, and everything changes. With the mysterious woman by his side, Dohyeon is drawn into a dangerous, inescapable path.  (Source: Lezhin US)

title: High and Mighty
description: Yong Cheon-Sang, the young lord of the great House Yongcheon, is a free soul. His main joy in life is exploring the world. As such, when his father tries to marry him off to supposedly the most beautiful woman in Bukgyeong area, he’s not interested in settling down in the least. He steals everything he can carry from the carriage transporting the wedding gifts meant for his bride and sets out on another adventure. Little does he know that out of the gifts he steals, there is a certain item that is the key to reviving the demonic sect. Will Cheon-Sang be able to vanquish the dark forces pursuing him and thwart their plans of rising to power once again?    (Source: TappyToon, edited)

title: Toemarok
description: Hyun-Am trains in Tai Chi Qigong in order to fight the water ghost that killed his sister; Father Park, unable to save his friend's daughter from an unknown evil spirit, chooses to become a priest walking the path of asceticism; Jun-Hoo, the only survivor of Eastern Sea Esoteric Buddhism, is a genius who has inherited all the magic of the five guardians of Esoteric Buddhism; Seung-Hee, who has a secret, gets involved in a mysterious case due to her father.    An occult fantasy in which individual exorcists, each driven by their own causes, solve crimes and fight together against evil demons—demons who rule the spiritual and emotional worlds of mankind, and drive society into chaos.  (Source: Naver, translated)

title: Thicker Than Memory
description: When orphan Rosie learns of her brother Julian and that they are a part of the esteemed House Noart, she gains both riches and the greatest treasure of all—the pure love of family. But after an accident causes Julian to lose all memory of recent years, including Rosie's existence, she discovers House Noart has many hidden enemies. Preventing her family from falling to ruin is one thing, but will these siblings be able to prove that blood is not just thicker than water but lost memories as well?  (Source: Tapas)

title: Simsimhan Mawang
description: After peace gets established between the world the devil king finds himself bored out of his mind basically every single day, as such he seeks entertainment, which often involves his subjects and comes at their expense.    Join the Demon King on his "small" adventures as he tries everything he can to temporarily cure his boredom.

title: I'm Fine Thank You, And You?
Be My Guest
description: Ever wanted to give it all up and book a one-way ticket to paradise? Well, Yeonwoo did just that. Upon arriving in Okinawa on a sultry summer night, she’s ready to kick back at her hotel with a cold beer and meet some cute guys. Ah, hang on - the hotel’s burnt down. Unfazed, she decides to go for a sneaky skinny-dip and work out a plan of action! But mid-swim, she gets into trouble and is saved by a mysterious man in a helmet. She wakes up in Yururi Guesthouse, and soon decides to stay (helmet-man turning out to be a hottie may have played a part.) After all, when the scenery’s as gorgeous as the staff and the guests are this, er, open-minded, who’d wanna leave?    (Source: Lezhin)

title: Sinipsawon Gang Hoejang
description: I'm Kang Yong-ho, the Chairman of Choi Sung Group, one of South Korea's top 10 conglomerates. Just when I was basking in the glory of my retirement declaration, out of the blue, a new employee fell from the sky and landed on my head. But hey, where'd my body go, and now I've turned into a new employee?!    "What's this? Are you telling me to start with Excel or something?"    (Source: Naver, translated)

title: 99 Daejang
description: The protagonist, Na Seon-Uk, was born with the heart of a tiger. He was a troublemaker, but at the request of his parents, he hid his strength and transferred to Gukyang High School, located in a remote area that he thought would be quiet. However, it was a place where various old-fashioned cultures and dangerous people gathered. Seon-Uk, who wanted to graduate quietly,  couldn’t help but feel his hot blood and began educating people!    (Source: KakaoPage, translated)

title: Cherry Doll Scandal
description: "Listen carefully, I'm a bit of a pervert."  "What?"  “So I want Hyung to do as I tell you.”    One day, Do Jaewon of the popular idol group "Majors" saw Cheon Eunho, a member of the same group, masturbating using his video. Realizing that Eunho has a crush on him, Jaewon starts a sexual relationship with him out of curiosity. However, before he knows it, he becomes more and more sincere...    What will be the end of the scandal between the two 'Cherry Dolls', who just began to know each other?    (Source: Naver, translated)

title: Office Romance from Hell
description: Dumped by her boyfriend and fired from her job, Jin-Eon, her family's breadwinner, has no time to cry over the spilled milk. She must find another job and fast. Enter The Hell, a mysterious company with great pay, excellent work-life balance, and an easy commute! What more could she ask for? Or so she thought. Little did she know, she had walked into hell—literally. How will she navigate the harrowing journey in the hellscape of her new job with King Yeomra, her stunning new boss, further complicating everything? Could love blossom in this pit of hell?   (Source: WEBTOON)   Note: Includes four extra chapters.

title: Blood Time
description: Yeon-woo can’t help stumbling into pervy situations. What a creep would call a blessing is her curse. Case in point: going through an alley one night, she walks in on a couple making out. Except this time it’s worse—the couple is actually a vampire and her victim! The vampire, Hayang, is willing to let it slide… for some of Yeon-Woo’s blood! Could this be the start of a bloody good time?  (Source: Tapas)

title: A Compendium of Ghosts
description: Sang, once the little boy too afraid to jump into the lake with the older children, comes back home a brave new man – a huntsman, to be exact. It's only after reuniting with his friend Se-Jin, the shaman’s daughter, that he notices a black shadow has been following him... The experience reminds him that there are spirits that walk amongst us, and not always in the dark.    (Source: Lezhin)    Note: The chapter count includes a prologue.

title: Naui Wonsu Cheossarang
description: I have a love-hate relationship with my first love, Ji Yura, who is the elder of twin sisters and the very same person that bullied me and cruelly rejected my innocent feelings. Then, my first love changed to Ji Yuri, the younger twin of Ji Yura, who comforted me when I got bullied. However, when I thought I put those painful memories behind when I started university, Ji Yura reappeared in front of me!  (Source: Lezhin, translated)

title: Into the Deep
description: Mi-Nu is a shy college student who becomes entangled in a whirlwind relationship with notorious bad guy Yu-Jin. Mi-Nu believes in true love, but Yujin only believes in one-night stands. Yu-Jin reveals his deepest secret to Mi-Nu in order to seduce him, but things take an unexpected twist when Yu-Jin develops feelings for Mi-Nu. Will Mi-Nu and Yujin be able to overcome their differences and find true love?    (Source: POCKET COMICS)

title: Wangdo
description: When Oh Jae-Yeol, the president of Hwarang, a criminal organization in Korea’s nationwide district, died in a mysterious accident, internal divisions began as a result of a struggle for succession. The black society, who did not miss the gap, came in to take the place of the Hwarang, causing great chaos. The executives of each region of the Hwarang begin to seize power by developing their own ambitions as they begin to deal with the black society. As a result of the black society, civilian victims begin to appear, but the police and politicians who have already been taken over by the black society and divisions turn away from the victims. Meanwhile, when the mother of Baek-Han Yu, a former special forces unit, tries to drive her black society out of her neighborhood, she is murdered by the black society. Hearing the news, he can’t contain his anger and begins to take revenge against them.

title: Naui Wonsu Cheossarang
description: I have a love-hate relationship with my first love, Ji Yura, who is the elder of twin sisters and the very same person that bullied me and cruelly rejected my innocent feelings. Then, my first love changed to Ji Yuri, the younger twin of Ji Yura, who comforted me when I got bullied. However, when I thought I put those painful memories behind when I started university, Ji Yura reappeared in front of me!  (Source: Lezhin, translated)

title: The Rib of Adam
description: Taeyoung’s always treated girls like crap. But after waking up one day to find a “lady-hole” on his ribcage, he slowly starts to gain a deeper understanding of the female experience. And luckily (or not) his ex-girlfriend is on-hand to speed up the process. Join Lizzy as she drags Taeyoung on a depraved journey of sexual discovery…    (Source: Lezhin US)

title: The Handsome Male Lead Won't Let Me Log Out
description: The development of "Marigold in a Box", a virtual reality game, is stopped after an unfortunate accident. Sun-ah can't help but be sad and disappointed as the manager of the development team. She decides to log on to the game as a farewell... But she can't customize her character? She can't even log out?! She is forced into becoming the protagonist of the game, Cloe Marigold. What choice does she have? She just has to kill herself and reach the 'dead ending' in the game. Then, she'll be free! However, due to interfering NPC characters, she always fails. She almost makes it out once... but she doesn't. Now, there's only one way to get out. She must beat the game.    (Source: PocketComics)

title: Block 69
description: I enrolled for the army to forget about my girlfriend... But who would've known I would meet the most sexiest woman in my life there?!  (Source: Toomics)

title: Eonni Gamok
description: A very special prison with only women!    Ahn Tae-Seong, one of the world's leading conglomerates, creates a very special women's prison in order to protect his precious daughter Jiae. There, Jiae forms her own harem and continues her debauchery life. However, in there she also meets Eun-Ha, who has been charged with attempted murder. Intrigued by the other woman, Jiae pretends to help Eun-Ha in her jailbreak plan, but falls into a world of lust with her...

title: My Misraised Husband
description: Leverticia Celsiear, a wisecracking noblewoman-turned-knight is used to taking care of herself and her younger brother. But she never expected to add the eight-year-old duke, Caius Baltail, to her protection list--until the emperor arranged their marriage. Meanwhile, she’s also got an eye on her nemesis, rival knight Anthody Everett, is tracking down the truth about her parents’ death, struggling to get out of debt, and even gets stuck in a time-distorted dimension! Whew! Good luck Leverticia!    (Source: Tapas)

title: Dragonsitter
description: This is a story about a girl who was dispatched as a sitter to take care of the last remaining dragon in the human world, an alcoholic, hikikomori, tsundere dragon.

title: Hwasang
description: Nathaniel has lived all his life as the second son of a wealthy mafia family when his older brother (the newly appointed boss) strikes him with a shocking request: Nathaniel is to be sent as a hostage to a company, for the sake of the gang. The CEO of this company, Fabian, will lend his own strengths to the mafia, in exchange for Nathaniel’s body. Yet even as the two draw closer than ever, their hearts only seem to grow further apart...  (Source: Korean publisher, translated)

title: Eighth Time's The Charm
description: A one night stand becomes so much more when Yeon Subin and Jin Hoyeon begin spending more and more time together…until one day, out of the blue, Subin asks to break up for reasons unbeknownst to Hoyeon. But the two just can’t stay away from each other, and so they get back together again…and again…and again. But each time, Subin suddenly breaks things off without telling Hoyeon why. Until finally, after their seventh breakup, Hoyeon is determined to find the reason why.   (Source: Lezhin US)   Note: Includes three side story chapters.

title: The Prince Doesn't Cry Over Onions
description: After the war, Anna’s restaurant held her village together. She took in strays and sowed farms from war-torn fields. When the lumbering bear of a man, Bertram, wanders into town, she puts him to work chopping onions. He doesn’t shed a single tear. Instead, he offers his services to repay a debt to her late father. Meanwhile, Bertram, stripped of his ability to feel emotion, is not immune to Anna’s warmth. As forces converge around the village, a charming tale of curses, loss, and love simmers.   (Source: Tapas)

title: Flash Behavior
description: Can Yuli save humanity?!    Eaters — intelligent creatures from outer space that prey on Earthlings. Problem is, even though they look like humans, no one knows how to talk with them! Enter Yuli, the only known human to date who can communicate with the Eaters. Can Yuli save the world AND her love life?    (Source: Manta)

title: Eye of the Storm
description: Hwan Woon-Ryong and Beom Pung-Ho have spent their entire lives locked in a fierce rivalry. As the heirs to the world’s two most powerful crime syndicates, their hatred runs deep—and so does their competition. But just as they’re poised to seize the biggest opportunity of their careers, fate throws them a curveball: a toddler named Hwan Beom-Hae, who, according to advanced DNA testing, is the biological child of both of them. Caught between disbelief and chaos, the two enemies are presented with an absurd yet high-stakes mission: raise Beom-Hae together, lovingly and responsibly. The reward? Exclusive construction rights to the largest global development project in history, sanctioned by the United Nations itself. But co-parenting isn’t exactly easy when you’d rather strangle your partner than share snack time and diaper duty. As Beom-Hae’s giggles and tantrums slowly chip away at their walls, Woon-Ryong and Pung-Ho must navigate tantrums, toys, and a growing sense of responsibility—not to mention some unexpected feelings. Can two lifelong enemies become the world’s most unlikely dream team dads? Or will their stubborn pride and unresolved tension bring everything crashing down?    Enemies-to-daddies has never looked this chaotic—or this heartwarming.    (Source: Lezhin US, edited)

title: Purely in Love
description: Since childhood, Yeonha has fervently pursued his dream woman, Soo-yi, undeterred by her repeated rejections due to their age difference. For Yeonha, Soo-yi has always been his one and only. However, a harsh reality check arrives when he learns of Soo-yi's marriage while serving in the military. Years later, following Soo-yi’s divorce, Yeonha's unwavering love for her remains unchanged and he sets out to make his beloved noona aware of how deep his feelings truly are. As time passes, Soo-yi finds herself slowly but surely consumed by the fiery passion of Yeonha's love.  (Source: Lezhin US)

title: Food Chain
description: During the day, he's an elite high school teacher and by night, he's a sexy and charming man with his sights set on other men. Ian Woo managed to lead the perfect double life. That is, until he meets Dohyun Kye, the grandson of the head of the school board. After seeing his secret double life in person, Dohyun approaches Ian with a proposition. But things are only going to get worse for Ian. It's dominate or be dominated in this war for survival!   (Source: NetComics)   Note: Chapter count includes 6 extras.

title: Gieokaeyahal Bam
description: When I opened my eyes, the first thing I realized is that I am not a living person. Who am I? Why am I wandering around this place? And who is that man who visits my grave every week?  (Source: BOMTOON, translated)

title: Lunacy
description: Luce Kaisel is commander of the 3rd regiment of the Crimson Knights. But it has been a tough road to get to this position for him. Being the son of a woman of ill repute, Luce had always wanted to escape the judging gaze of his family and succeed on his own terms. One day, he is thrust into the position of serving Ayle Linus, the Crown Prince. Luce is commanded to play the part of Ayle’s lover, but just for a short while. But what was supposed to be a fake affair, may create even more madness than anticipated...    (Source: Lezhin US)

title: A Saint From the Slums
description: In the Eden Brozue Empire, the peace of the nation is guarded by a saint named Bethcherian. But who could have thought the next Bethcherian would be a five-year-old girl from the slums? Despite facing doubts and cold looks from narrow-minded people who refuse to accept someone from a humble background as their saint, the newest Bethcherian tries hard to adapt to her new life. Armed with determination, can this young saint successfully become the empire's proud guardian?    (Source: Tapas)

title: Beyond Memory
description: Won-Jun is a university student who can read other people’s emotions by touching them. He hears that Gyu-Han, who he shares lectures with, graduated from the same high school and decides to approach him. However, Gyu-Han gives him the cold shoulder, and no matter how hard Won-Jun tries, he can’t seem to read Gyu-Han’s feelings. But instead of chasing him away, Gyu-Han’s reaction to Won-Jun’s touches piques his curiosity instead and makes him continue his efforts all the more!    (Source: POCKET COMICS, edited)

title: 11 of Me
description: To Gibeom’s surprise, the mechanical calculator he bought working at a junkyard turns out to be a time machine! With the time machine, he sets out to find and bring together his past selves. Currently, all 11 versions of Gibeom are living together peacefully, but unexpected problems materialize as Gibeom(s) interacts with people outside of his circle...    (Source: WEBTOONS)

title: Forest of Humans
description: A secret experiment on serial killers conducted in the woods? What could possibly go wrong? Follow one young researcher’s descent into madness and self-doubt as she attempts to escape a locked facility with ten bloodthirsty murderers. Will she make it out with her humanity intact?     (Source: WEBTOON)    Note: Includes one extra chapter.

title: Neukdaeneun Taeyangeul Humchinda
description: Charlotte, Princess of Toldran, the wealthiest nation on the continent. Following her mother the Queen's wishes, she completes her long period of religious devotion and embarks on an unwanted public courtship. But when a special suitor named Skadi arrives from Nuarnar, boredom soon turns to delight...  (Source: Ridibooks, translated)

title: Old Habits Die Hard
description: Won-Hyuk’s life is simple: study hard, stay out of trouble, and prepare to study abroad. But everything changes when his alpha stepbrother Han-Seo suddenly reappears. Won-Hyuk wants nothing to do with him, but how does he face someone when his body remembers what his heart wants to forget?    (Source: Manta)    Note: Includes a prologue.

title: Good Hunter & Bad Prey
description: Jay, who lives day to day by having one-night stands with different people every day and then running away with their belongings, luckily one day, succeeds in having a one-night stand with Eugene, who seems wealthy. After spending a passionate night together, he steals Eugene's belongings while he's sleeping and runs away, but someone calls him...  (Source: Lezhin, translated)   Note:   - Chapter count includes a prologue.  - Part of Lezhin's Gwanggong Collection (광공단편선). A gwanggong (광공, hanja: 狂攻) character is obsessed with the object of their desire, similar to the Japanese "yandere". Scanlations have erroneously translated this to "GwangGong Apartment/Industrial Complex", which may have caused confusion.

title: Ordinary to Alpha
description: After all-boys schools, a male-dominated major, and a stint in the military, Kim Sungmin has barely even spoken to a woman, let alone dated one. Now, having landed a position at a well-known company, Sungmin feels ready to settle down, until he comes across an article that changes his whole worldview. Faced with the knowledge that women will only ever go for strong alpha males, Sungmin knows he has to change if he wants to avoid a loveless marriage and being reduced to nothing more than a slightly pudgy ATM. Can Sungmin go from boring beta to attractive alpha?  (Source: Lezhin US)

title: A Marriage Contract With My Two Husbands
description: Roselaine married Grand Duke Melchior, the best knight in the Empire. He said it’s because, “I want to save you.” Roselaine can only respond, “You don’t know anything about me.”    A man who wants to save her life, save her family, pay off her debts, and even marry her? They say there’s no such thing as a favor without any strings attached, so why would he go this far for someone he doesn’t even know?    “Because you look like someone I knew.” Roselaine evidently looks just like Melchior’s first love.    While depressed because she thinks she is only a stand-in for his first love, Roselaine takes in Julian, who looks exactly like her husband’s childhood self, as her disciple. But then Julien asks, “Please divorce him and marry me, Roselaine.”    What happens if she marries both men?    (Source: Manta)

title: Producer
description: Hyoju, who climbed up the ladder to the top 8 of an Audition program gets disqualified and joins the company of an enemy to her favorite judge, Tae-Seong. However, as she comes back to Tae-Seong after many events, rumors and odd vibes begin to spread...

title: Nugurang Haesseulkka?
genres: Drama, Hentai, Romance, Slice of Life
description: Jong-seok returned to his hometown after living in Seoul for a long time. He is having a good time meeting the girls from his memories. But then he gets a strange letter...   “You didn’t forget to take responsibility, right?”  (Source: TOPTOON, translated)

title: The Cruelty of Salvation
description: Olivia Liberty is the first commoner ever admitted to Herolington University. However, she cannot be properly recognized because she is a woman and must instead use the name of a man, Oliver, to receive credit for her creations. Meanwhile, Noah Astrid, Prince of Herod, takes notice of Olivia, who is beloved by the commoners of Herod.
