Noah seeks to involve her in royal affairs to raise the royal family’s popularity and asks for her hand. But while every other member of the royal family treats Olivia affectionately, Noah alone continues to treat her coldly. Will he come to regret it?  (Source: WEBTOON)

title: The Greatest Heiress of the Empire
description: Estelle's life shatters when her family, already resentful of her albinism, abandons her for Seria, who claims to be their real daughter. Left to wander in the cold, Estelle collapses, only to awaken in the care of the House Ballua, the empire's eternal guardians. Intent on leaving after recovery, she finds herself bound by the affections of the Balluas. Unexpectedly, an heirloom arrives from her presumed dead aunt - the lost treasure "Dragon's Tear." Now the heir to the prestigious Mercedes family and the center of everyone's attention, Estelle starts a new life.    (Source: Tappytoon)

title: Sorry, but I'm Normal
description: U Yeon-Hui is the number one hunter in the world who can kill hordes of monsters singlehandedly, but she has one problem. She doesn't want anyone to know! To live a normal life, she makes sure to hide her face when she enters dimensional gates and clears dungeons. But when her cover gets blown one day, she becomes the center of a bidding war among the world's top guilds. As she goes on more perilous missions with her identity exposed, she wonders if she'll ever get to live a normal life again.    (Source: Tapas)

title: We On
genres: Action, Adventure, Drama, Fantasy, Sci-Fi, Supernatural
description: When the world is threatened by a parasitic alien invasion, our only hope lies with a group of super-powered teenagers. But how can they save the world when they can hardly save themselves? Teamwork, optimism, and good intentions are seemingly no longer enough as each enemy is stronger than the last. They’re going to save the world, or simply die trying.   A collaboration webtoon featuring fictionalized versions of South Korean idol group, BTS.

title: 30 Days With You
description: Iro’s plan was simple. Pretend to be a service man, make the delivery, and exchange a few words with Rene, his dream guy. But when a drunk Rene mistakes him for the android he ordered, Iro decides to take advantage of the situation. As long as he keeps playing along, he gets to live with the man of his dreams! But what will happen when Rene finds out the truth?    (Source: Lezhin)

title: Reincarnated as My Husband’s Mistress
description: Adrienne Trovica, the sole Grand Duchess of the Rhonta Empire, suddenly dies from a seizure and wakes up in the body of Countess Bleiah Acacia, who looks exactly like her. As it turns out, Bleiah is no ordinary woman. She was the mistress of Adrienne’s loving husband, Noevian Trovica. Adrienne, shocked by the news, attends her funeral as Bleiah to confirm the rumor. To her surprise, she sees a man crying for her at her grave. Who is this mystery man, and was everything that she knew about her husband a lie?    (Source: WEBTOONS)

title: First Love
description: Man-Suk has lived a timid life as a cripple. However, he is able to walk again after a miraculous event. He sets out to find his first love with his new legs, but little did he know, there were more changes than just his legs.     (Source: TOPTOON+)

title: Acquainted: Encounter Spin-Off
description: What appeared to be a one-time encounter in Spain blossoms into romance when by-the-book CEO Jung Wooseok and free-thinking architect Han Yujin meet again in Korea. The two are drawn to each other, but there’s a catch: Yujin’s the winner of a high-profile architecture competition held by Wooseok’s company. When word gets out that these two are acquainted, will their love be able to survive the public’s scrutiny... and their families’ even harsher criticism?    Spin-off of K-drama “Encounter.”  (Source: Tapas)

title: JOHNSON CONTRACT
description: Do you know the pain of a small penis? Well one young man has lived his entire adult life being mocked and belittled by women. Now he's had enough and signed a deal with a devil to get what he wants...No matter the cost.  (Source: TOPTOON+)   Note: Includes one extra chapter.

title: Lady Baby Is a Revenge Maker
description: The Allegros are about to get what’s coming to them. My family barely remembers my name (it’s Sephiel!), but I’ve written all of their names on my revenge list. Now that I’m engaged to Elgar from the powerful Remdragon family, I’ve got the allies and influence to make it happen. I’ve definitely got to be careful that these half-dragons don’t catch me in a lie (or kill me themselves), but I’m sure my cuteness and cunning will keep me alive.    (Source: Tapas, translated)

title: Amnesia
description: The last thing I remember... is nothing. Nothing at all.. These girls are the ones telling me who l am... God, I wish I could remember...  (Source: Toomics)

title: Arachi: Peoseuteu Irregular
description: Born to a mother who was sealed in a mysterious ark with ten longevity on it, Arachi, who has tremendous power, hides her power and is now the wife of the HS group and an ordinary housewife.    While leaving for Gangwon-do with his wife and mother Hwang Shin’s family, his son Soo-Hyuk and Sunmi were seriously injured and lost consciousness.    In order to protect his precious family, Arachi borrows the status of Sunmi, not Hwang Shin-Hye, to awaken the power of the past to find the person behind him. Arachi, he’s coming out into the world!

title: Pleasure Delivery
description: 'Delivering pleasure directly to the clients!' GUN-WOO starts working at a mysterious delivery company, and soon finds that he has real talent in satisfying his clients. "Ma'am! You can't do that!"    (Source: TOPTOON+)

title: The Wicked Wife of a Scheming CEO
description: Eun-Sang Hahm just caught her boyfriend cheating, and Gyeong-U Gang, the CEO of her company, is engaged to someone he doesn’t love. They both agree to a mutually beneficial fake relationship. After all, it’s just a business deal, so… what could go wrong? But as the two begin their scheme, it is clear that their connection runs deeper than what is written in their contract. With his rich family set on finding out the truth, and her nosy coworkers and the media watching their every move, how long will they be able to keep up the charade?    (Source: Tapas, edited)

title: My Teacher Has Chosen My Husband Candidates
description: Lena has been counting the days until she comes of age. This is all to finally confess her feelings to Nix, her teacher, so that he can become her husband instead of her guardian. But on her long-awaited birthday, Nix suddenly vanishes without a trace, and five years pass in the blink of an eye. Lena dutifully tends to Nix’s store while waiting for his return. Then one day, out of the blue, she receives an absurd letter from Nix that says he’ll be sending prospective husbands her way that he has carefully sought out and selected during his absence. All Lena wants is for Nix to come home, but surely it couldn’t hurt to play around with these candidates in the meantime, right?    (Source: Tappytoon)    Note: Chapter count includes prologue and five side story chapters.

title: The Degrees Between Us
description: Dojin and Yeonwoo are in the same homeroom. Yeonwoo is the class rep and a bright, diligent kid. Dojin looks intimidating but he’s actually just misunderstood. For some odd reason, Dojin has been becoming more and more aware of this strange, sprightly kid in his class. As fate would have it, they bump into each other after school one day. Yeonwoo describes to Dojin his most pressing problem in life: he’s bored. Dojin makes Yeonwoo a promise that he’ll be the freshness and excitement in his life whenever he needs to feel something new. But when Dojin innocently grazes Yeonwoo, there seems to be an electric warmth that shocks him. As these two grow closer and closer, to what degree will their intimacy develop? What will this warmth between them become?   (Source: Lezhin)

title: My Wizard, My Destiny
description: Prophet Liye falls into a world where magic exists and wakes up as a woman that a shaman doctor resurrected when she was a little girl. Tanaril, a wizard cursed by a witch to never have children with any woman, meets Liye at a hotel bar by chance. After drinking cocktails from a bartender at the bar, they spend the night together. Tanaril misunderstands that Liye approached him on purpose and accuses her of approaching him to take advantage of his high status. Despite how she was offended by his accusations, she became pregnant with his child. After announcing the pregnancy through a magical letter, the two get married by contract for different reasons and purposes. She knows she shouldn't fall in love with Tanaril, since she's from a different world and all that. It'll be a piece of cake since Tanaril is a cold, distant person, right? But her expectations are ruined when she discovers that Tanaril is actually caring and warm.    (Source: POCKET COMICS)

title: SIDEKICKS
description: The story of the sidekick's journey to becoming a true hero!  (Source: WEBTOON)   Note: Includes 28 extra chapters.

title: After the Frozen Heart Melts
description: Centuries ago, Hestia was born with incredible magic, so she was the only one powerful enough to sacrifice herself to save the world from a great evil. Now, she has been reborn into a new body and retained her magic and memories from her past life. Hestia's only goal in this life is to make her sister happy. The only problem is her sister wants to marry Yanik, an immortal who's been waiting for Hestia's return. Can Hestia keep Yanik from discovering her identity so that her sister can marry him?    (Source: Tapas)   Note: Includes one extra chapters.

title: Lilac 200%
description: 24-year-old Haneul Yeon both dislikes and envies Bunhong Jin, the girl who was mean to her in middle school and a popular idol who happens to be close to Haneul’s favorite idol, Robin. Haneul’s dream of switching places with her becomes a reality when the two of them end up swapping bodies after an accident. Haneul is overjoyed to be an idol and to see Robin frequently, but does she have what it takes to live the life of an idol?    (Source: WEBTOONS)

title: Mignon
description: After losing his parents at a young age, Mignon lives as a mechanic by day, and a cage fighter by night at an illegal arena. Living a life of exploitation and violence, the only person who gives him any attention is Oh Young-One, a doctor at the illegal arena.    “I’ll do anything…! I… I can help you!”    Despite knowing Young-One’s true identity, Mignon’s pure and blind love for him causes Young-One to start slowly opening his heart. But the hellish reality that surrounds Mignon starts to shake up even Young-One’s life!

title: Number of Cases
description: "I never imagined being here and doing this with you.”    Shim Woo-Jin was Kwon Kyung’s sunbae back in high school. 12 years later, they reunite at Woo-Jin's best friend’s wedding…who just so happens to also be Kyung's first love. Kyung always thought of Woo-Jin as his rival in the race for his best friend’s affection; but as the two of them find themselves reconnecting at an after-party all alone, their conversation isn’t the only things that grows deeper and deeper…    (Source: Lezhin US)    Note: Includes prologue and one side story chapter.

title: Mignon
description: After losing his parents at a young age, Mignon lives as a mechanic by day, and a cage fighter by night at an illegal arena. Living a life of exploitation and violence, the only person who gives him any attention is Oh Young-One, a doctor at the illegal arena.    “I’ll do anything…! I… I can help you!”    Despite knowing Young-One’s true identity, Mignon’s pure and blind love for him causes Young-One to start slowly opening his heart. But the hellish reality that surrounds Mignon starts to shake up even Young-One’s life!

title: Number of Cases
description: "I never imagined being here and doing this with you.”    Shim Woo-Jin was Kwon Kyung’s sunbae back in high school. 12 years later, they reunite at Woo-Jin's best friend’s wedding…who just so happens to also be Kyung's first love. Kyung always thought of Woo-Jin as his rival in the race for his best friend’s affection; but as the two of them find themselves reconnecting at an after-party all alone, their conversation isn’t the only things that grows deeper and deeper…    (Source: Lezhin US)    Note: Includes prologue and one side story chapter.

title: Delivery Complete
description: If the sexy toys you ordered for “research” end up at your neighbor’s house, and your neighbor happens to be a gorgeous actor willing to help you test them out, well… It’d be a waste not to, right? Shy BL author, Eujae Lim, just wanted to live a quiet life, but Jinhoo Park wants to be his male lead.    (Source: Tapas)

title: Red Lion
description: Quite possibly the best and most reknown fighter of all the schools is a red haired girl, solely referred to as the Red Lion. But as the Red Lion suddenly disappears one day, we find that's only the beginning to the trials of real "Red Lion".

title: My Crazy Dramatic Fairy Tale
description: After the girl meets the prince, they live happily ever after, but don't you wonder what happens to the others? My name is Lynette Camellia, and after helping my sister meet her Romeo, I started a gossip column about the empire for fun. But instead of just writing about drama, I'm living it. Not only am I trying to escape an engagement to a man twice my age, but Prince Lucas wants to use me and my column to take down the evil crown prince! Who knew that a fairy tale could be so... dramatic?  (Source: Tapas)

title: Rebirth Knight
description: There are mysterious masked-men trying to conquer the earth!! And to defeat them, the state started a project team called 'Rebirth Knight'. Kang Chan, one of the strongest high schoolers, meets a girl named Chaewon and falls in love at first sight. However, Kang Chan hears from Chaewon that she is a member of the Rebirth Knight, and decides he wants to be a member too...

title: Cheonyeon Letbyol
description: A young girl accidentally awakens a guardian spirit sealed within a sword. Together they will face many challenges in order to complete a mysterious mission given by the gods. They meet other summoners and spirits, face demons, and details about their past lives are revealed.

title: Sixth Sense
description: Kind, charismatic and mystic Taeo and the solitary and mysterious Ho, the two are secretly dating. But then Taeo is confused by Ho's unfamiliar behavior and how different he is from the one he knew. Between two people who are in danger of breaking up. How will these two hearts end up burning dangerously?

title: Geunyowa Yasu
description: Her peaceful life that was different from her previous life was cut short. Astina was sold to Grand Duke Terriod due to her father’s bankruptcy, however, Grand Duke Terriod lived in the form of a beast...     “He got hit and fainted. It’s not a serious injury so he’ll quickly regain consciousness.”  “He… fainted?”    Contrary to everyone’s expectation of her dying in one night, she began to tame the monster Terriod with her fancy swordwork, and tame it as a pet.    “Theo, sit.”  “Woof!”    But one night after telling Terriod how talented he is, she kissed him for just a second...   “...Theo?”   Astina’s wild beast... Became human?   A full-fledged romance between the deficient monster husband and the indifferent wife!   (Source: KakaoPage, translated)    Note: This is a promotional one-shot for the web novel of the same name.

title: Bride Training
description: A marriage of convenience shouldn’t stop you from having fun! Playboy lawyer Taeshik’s determined to make his last day as a single man as memorable as possible. A club is the best place for sexy encounters that don’t last, and Taeshik thinks that his one-night stand with Heejoo will be nothing more than a one-night stand…until the next day when he finds out that she’s actually his bride-to-be! This could be an opportunity for him, so he decides to train her to be the one and only bride for him. “I promise I’ll make you happy, so…can you do me a favor?”  (Source: Lezhin X)

title: Happiness
description: Saebom, a Sergeant of the Special Forces, and Ihyeon, a Detective Sergeant of Saeyang Police Station, are high school friends who enter into a marriage of convenience so that they can qualify to buy an apartment together, while a mysterious and seemingly contagious virus tear through their city of Saeyang. Saebom and Ihyeon move into their dream home only to find that the new virus that turns people violent and thirsty for blood has come knocking at their door.    (Source: WEBTOONS)

title: Secretary To Stage
description: Not everyone is infatuated with their boss like Doyoon. Ever since Gang Taehyuk's days as a 2nd gen idol—a pop star from way back—Doyoon has been obsessed. So, what does he do when Taehyuk retires and establishes an entertainment company to nurture new talent? Naturally, he trains to become Taehyuk’s personal secretary, landing the coveted role. But Doyoon’s life takes another dramatic turn when a member drops out of a new idol group just about to make their debut. There’s no one better suited for the role, and Taehyuk wants Doyoon to step up and fill the spot. Besides, Taehyuk is willing to sweeten the deal with a wish, so looks like Doyoon is gonna have to leave the office and step into the spotlight…    (Source: LezhinUS)

title: Ripple: Berserker
description: Unlike his friends, Hyun-So, who dropped the world's no 1 professional gamer because of the virtual reality implementation item "real play", is bullied for refusing to ripple and earn money from Alvaro. Unfortunately, with the invitation of his best friend, He reluctantly begins to ripple, and he became the main character of the topic with the power of reflexes, vision, and photoelectric forces that react on a one-frame basic...

title: Touch Me, Tease Me
description: Sojin and Jeongho have been friends for years, but she never knew he was keeping a secret…and a big one, at that. But when she hears talk around campus about how her best friend is packing quite the surprise, she just wants one little peek. Or two, or three…  (Source: Lezhin US)   Note: Includes 11 extra chapters.

title: Lighten Up
description: Kim Hyunwoo is a freshman in university and like every other freshman, he should be enjoying his college life to the fullest. But forget about university friends, his dark and gloomy aura makes him so unapproachable that not even his sunbaes want to go anywhere near him. Enter the kind and popular Seong Jiho, whose presence lights up the whole room. One could say he’s the complete opposite of someone like Hyunwoo. When a classmate who is mentoring Hyunwoo asks Jiho to take over, he reluctantly agrees. However, things get complicated when, after a night of drinking, Jiho wakes up in Hyunwoo’s bed to an...unexpected situation. Despite being creeped out by Hyunwoo’s dark presence, the more Jiho gets to know him, the more he feels attracted to him. Maybe now, Hyunwoo will finally find a way to lighten up...    (Source: Lezhin US)    Note: Chapter count includes a preview and a short extra in the authors review.

title: Wanbyeokan Honeymoon
description: After getting married, the bride suddenly sees her new husband with another woman? Their honeymoon is at stake from the start!    (Source: Naver, translated)

title: Namjuga Yeojureul Bakkuryeogo Hamnida
description: I ended up possessing the body of an extra named Luberia, who is barely mentioned in the story. And right in the tragic novel “Emperor Caesar”, full of wars and disasters, where the protagonist sacrifices everything for the love of the hero and everyone ends up dying! I planned to live discreetly and hide my strength...    But the male lead, Caesar, keeps looking for me and even proposes marriage, saying he wants to keep me around. Luberia doesn't want to meet the same tragic end as the protagonist, so she tries to avoid Caesar at all costs... But due to Caesar's intimidating appearance and assertiveness, before she knows it, she ends up engaged to him.    Will Luberia manage not to fall in love with Caesar and survive until the end?    (Source: KakaoPage, translated)   Note: Chapter count includes three side story chapters.

title: Living Out My Deadline as the Tyrant's Wife
description: When she wakes up as an extra in a fantasy novel, married to a villain and destined to be poisoned to death, Lea knows she must change her fate. Her strategy? Get rid of the booze and men in her harem, soften up her tyrannical emperor husband by being kind and gentle with him, and make him fall in love with her for real! But he’s been trained his whole life not to feel anything at all... Hopefully, that pesky prophecy about an emperor with feelings bringing doom to the empire isn’t true!    (Source: Tapas)

title: Chingu Yeodongsaeng Malgo, Dareun Geo
description: Seula has endured a long-standing crush, thinking that being friends would be enough. But when she learns Areum has accepted her boyfriend’s proposal, she breaks down. To soothe her torn heart, she gets drunk and calls her, confessing her feelings. The next day, she wakes up naked next to Areum’s sister, Daun! When Seula begins to piece the pieces of what happened together, she begs Daum to keep this a secret from Areum, to which Daum agrees under one condition…    <I>“Want to keep having a good time together?”    (Source: Peanutoon, translated)

title: Campus Eummoron
description: Yeon-Ho, who was living a life of fame and fame that he had never enjoyed before, suddenly appears in front of Yeon-Ho, a nerdy guy named Man-Gil, and shakes up the image of 'Lee Yeon-Ho, who gets along well with everyone'. Then one day, Man-Gil sees Yeon-Ho's face without his glasses...  (Source: Ridibooks, translated)   Note: Part of the Geogeoikseon: Heavenly Original Webtoon Danpyeonseon (거거익선~헤븐리 오리지널 웹툰 단편선~) Collection.

title: Despite the Risk
description:
“Could you sleep with me?” The moment Min Seolha accidentally lets that question slip to her boss, Cha Jeongmu, she believes she is done for. Yet to her surprise, her superior and crush of three years agrees, even adding on a condition that they won’t have a limit to the number of nights they spend together. And so begins the CEO and secretary’s steamy love affair after work hours. But unbeknownst to them, a shared tragic past could end up jeopardizing their already-risky romance...

(Source: Tappytoon)

title: Ghost Yaseuwang
description: “Shall I help you escape being forever alone?”   After leaving the Marine Corps, Lee Hyunho, who had never dated and only focused on working out intensely until 26, believed that he would rule the world, but nothing changed. He has resurrected as the King of Nightlife after meeting a female in the suite of an hotel he began working at, thanks to the introduction of a close friend!  (Source: TOPTOON, translated)

title: Woman's Best Friend
description: There’s a crazy dog at Sungwoon Publishing Company. It has an expressionless face, a monotone voice, cold and dark eyes, and a difficult personality. Its name is Woojoon Seo. But is this man really crazy? Taeryung is exhausted from love, work, and even her her own family. To the tired Taeryung, Woojoon’s gentle and tender actions seem more like of a loveable pet than of a crazy dog. She doesn’t know what to make of him! At times, he seems like a loyal doberman and others, a cute maltese. What's a girl to do?  (Source: Tapas)

title: Jonjaljuui
description: A devil appeared in front of me, who was suffering because of my appearance, and made an attractive offer! I can make the look I want with just one click? CUTE! SEXY! PURE! LUXURY! Raise stats to create the look you want?! But you know... I thought I would be happy if I became prettier... but that doesn't seem to be the case?

title: Backdoor Neighbors
description: The small town farmer life is all Gi-Tae has known his whole life. He’s never been into mystery, intrigue, or complications. But all of that appears in the form of his newly hired helper Hae-Un—who is absolutely useless at farming. But Hae-Un’s true talents lay somewhere else. Mainly in the bed…if only they could actually get into a bed, somehow.  (Source: Lezhin US)   Note: Includes four side story chapters.

title: Haven
description: Min Sung and Ji An became brothers after their parents remarried. Eight years later, Min Sung, now twenty-six years old, works as a food stylist and his younger brother Ji An, now twenty-three years old, works as a model and is strangely obsessed with Min Sung. The two develop a mutual relationship to relieve each other’s heat and rut periods. At first, Min Sung thought his younger brother's persistent and obsessive behavior over him was nothing more than cute and whiny attachment. But when it begins to develop into a bigger problem, Min Sung does his best to distance himself from Ji An. They slowly drift apart, but as Min Sung’s buried past begins to unfold once more, their relationship slowly becomes catastrophic.   (Source: Copin Comics)    <I>Note: The chapter count includes 2 extras.

title: This Time, I Will Survive Until the End
description: Adette Berse keeps getting reborn but never survives past 30, always after trying to get married. Determined to break the cycle, she vows to stay single and instead focuses on earning money for her family. In a society that frowns upon working women, she disguises herself as a man to invest in a business with Duke Mateilo. Intrigued by Adette's audacious maneuver, the duke eschews business talk for continuous meetings. With her future on the line, can Adette outwit him and survive until the end?     (Source: Tapas)

title: Guiding the Lead Out of His Trauma
description: When the reader wakes up in a novel as Liliope, a guide who tragically dies because of the unstable male lead, Octaeon, she has her work cut out for her. Liliope's death traumatizes Octaeon in the original novel, but the female lead helps him recover, and the two fall in love. However, Liliope’s brother, Hyacin, despises Octaeon for killing her and morphs into the novel’s villain. Refusing to let her death drag him into darkness and despair, Liliope decides to rewrite her ending. However, as she weaves her new fate, she realizes her ending isn’t the only thing that's changing.  (Source: Tappytoon)

title: Masca
description: The Devil's Castle is a dark and somber place, until the good-hearted apprentice ASARELLA stumbles into this abode on a goodwill mission, against the wishes of her master, the Arch-Mage, ELIWHO. Things sour quickly, and soon Asarella is bound in a blood pact with The Devil. Little does she know that the mage harbors a secret love for her, which will only complicate her training to prepare her for the apocalyptic battle to come, and which sets up the most unusual love triangle of any place or time.   (Source: CPM)

title: Living with One Leg
description: Fight or be killed, the dawn of a wretched revenge!  (Source: Toomics)

title: In the Shadow of the Spring
description: Cha-Hui finds herself being forced to return to her hometown of Cheongna, where she practically ran away from after graduating high school. The reality of her family's poverty and misfortunes begin to overwhelm her, all while her first love and ex-boyfriend U-Kyeong insists on coming back into her life. She was the one who broke his heart, but he seems to still have feelings for her, flirting with her incessantly and making her waver. This is a story about Cha-Hui's heart-wrenching first love that she has no choice but to turn her back on.  (Source: WEBTOONS, edited)

title: Joppajige Jongjokbeonsik
description: In my reality, my dick was small, but in this other world, it’s huge?! But, the way they’re looking at my body is giving me a bad feeling…!  (Source: TOPTOON, translated)

title: Ladies at Her Service: A Very Naughty Girl
description: Despite being a pretty and talented film student, Yeo-Woo is brutally rejected after flirting with her cocky underclassman, Jin-Yeong. As if that wasn't humiliating enough, Jin-Yeong accidentally sees Yeo-Woo's racy video of herself wearing a dog collar when they're exchanging files for a film project! What Yeo-Woo doesn't expect is for this to turn on Jin-Yeong's dominant side and spur a series of secret BDSM hookups between them. And Yeo-Woo soon finds out that there's more to their relationship than their heated master-dog dynamic...  (Source: Tappytoon)   Note: Part of Ridi's Jujonggwangye GL Danpyeonseon (주종관계 GL 단편선) Collection.

title: Seonggwabogo Deurimnida
description: Jun-Hyeon discovers that the female employees at his company are making bets regarding him. He then started fighting back against the women who teased him with lewd jokes, only for...  (Source: TOPTOON, translated)

title: Yeoreumeun Tteugeopda
description: Han Yeo-Reum, his friend's younger sister, who appeared in front of Black Dragon at Dongdaejeong High School! Should I keep her unpredictable?

title: Santa
description: Su-Ho and Chi-Won, coming from the same orphanage and members of the Viper organization. Su-Ho, with the support of President Kim, opened a room saloon and Chi-Won, seeing Su-Ho in that situation, sets a trap to destroy him.  “It's okay, Hyung. I'll kill him."  (Source: BomToon, translated)

title: Melin's Salvation Plan
description: I suddenly woke up in the body of Melinia, a supporting character and the first love of Male Lead A from Azuli's Magnificent Misfortune. Since I know how this tragic tale ends, I decided to do what I can to stop the ultimate destruction of the kingdom from the male leads. But the more I try to fix things, I can't help but notice that the storyline seems to veer farther away from what I read. Will this plan of mine work? Or will it just cause more harm than the original?    (Source: Tapas)

title: Yongisanda
description: Meet my neighbor - a typical fantasy novelist, more than a little scatterbrained, likes to gossip, borrow things without asking, and play MMORPGs. Oh, and by the way, he's a dragon in disguise. Named Dragon Kim.    Yeah...    (Source: Naver, translated)    Note: chapter count includes 2 prologue chapters and 1 extra

title: Dr. V and His Three Lovers
description: Devastated by his lover Henry's sudden death, Victor gets drunk and steals his coffin from his grave. The last thing he remembers is bringing it back to his lab before blacking out. But when Victor wakes up, he's confronted by three men who claim that he revived them from the dead using Henry's head, heart, and crown jewels! Although none of them are Henry, all of them are drawn to Victor in different ways... Can Victor's three new lovers fill the hole in his life that Henry left behind?  (Source: Tappytoon)

title: Deathcord
description: One day, Kyung-min, whose self-esteem has hit rock bottom from being bullied by his friends, suddenly receives an invite to "DeathCord," a chatting room where you can kill people through voting. Anonymous death penalty vote in the chat room! Anonymous participants invited to the chat room are keen to kill people for their own reasons. However, one of the chat participants becomes the target of the death penalty, after that, the participants in the "DeathCord" chatroom start struggling to identify each other... A murder game that won't end unless they kill each other!   (Source: Naver, translated)

title: Gyeongchari Neomu Gangham
description: "You guys use fists, not guns!"   Shin Hae-Soo, a specialist in excessive suppression, gains the ability to go back 60 minutes. On the day my father passed away, I intuitively knew. This was a murder disguised as suicide. Hae-Soo becomes a detective to catch the culprit who killed his father. And one day, along with a mysterious accident, he suddenly gains superpowers! A huge shadow gradually reveals itself as he solves criminal cases and pursues the organization!  (Source: Kakaopage, translated)

title: Skill Boksaro Kkul Ppapnida
description: Junhyuk’s relentless journey to completely rewrite a past filled with regrets begins. After finally obtaining the Stone of Regression with great difficulty, Junhyuk carefully prepares to return to the past. However, an urgent crisis strikes, forcing him to initiate the regression with only the preparations he has managed so far.   “Haha, then let’s meet in the past.”   Leaving behind those who sought his life, Junhyuk regresses to the past.   “This is the start of something new.”   Armed with heightened senses and the ability to copy, Junhyuk embarks on a daring mission to fix a past riddled with regrets.  (Source: KakaoPage, translated)

title: Island Girls
description: On the island he arrives at to find his younger brother, he is tempted by women of a suspicious cult.  (Source: DAYcomics)

title: YOU’RE SO COOL
description: Everyone dreams about Seung-Ha, the perfect prince, the shining star of the school. Chasing after the perfect prince is definitely not easy. For Nan-Woo, Seung-Ha was just a dream far, far away. However, sometimes dreams exist to come true! But when Nan-Woo’s dream comes true, it comes at an expensive price. Who knew the perfect prince was actually a big jerk?!    (Source: Yen Press)

title: Yeouga Neukdaedoeneun Sungan
description: Gook Eun-Song is your average high school girl... that is until her attractive younger sister steals the man she had a crush on. Depressed, Eun-Song purchased a bottle of alcohol and crawled into a supposedly cursed closet in her father's furniture store. Yu-Ha is your average typical bad boy. He even broke traffic regulations just to end up being chased by a couple of police officers.    Oddly enough, he also ended up in the same closet where Eun-Song is asleep from drinking too much. Yu-Ha ends up sleeping in the cursed closet with Eun-Song by his side... just to find out the next day, their bodies have been *gasp* switched!    Can anything else possibly go wrong for our poor heroine?

title: Our Encounter
description: "Even in another world, I will only love you. Someday you will come there and find me. I will wait for that day." After coming home from work, Myung Shiwoo unexpectedly finds someone in historical clothing lying outside his door. Is there such a thing as destiny?

title: The Nerd is Actually a Tyrant
description: Before her accident, Lucette was a young woman living in modern-day Korea. So why did she wake up in the body of a little girl living in the remote outskirts of the Vladin Empire? That was the setting of the ultra-violent webnovel she was reading when she was hit by a truck! But since things have come to this, Lucette might as well get her hustle on, far away from the dangerous capital. At least, that's what she thought before befriending a brilliant but mysterious boy named Lev. What will happen as their growing bond unveils a life-threatening secret?    (Source: Tappytoon)

title: My Husband Ascended as the Chosen One
description: "How could you be so self-centered? You have a wife and child!"    Shirley's husband, George, flees to the capital on his own, saying that he'd return one day as the chosen one. Left all alone, she decides to raise her son, Brandon, on her own and forget about her scoundrel husband. But life is always full of surprises. Shirley had to learn it the hard way, when her irresponsible husband returned to her with pride as the chosen one.    "Forget about my past mistake and come live with me, for Brandon's sake..."    Being forced to accept George's offer, Shirley forgives her husband and moves to the capital city with her son. After all, Brandon's happiness is all she cares about.    (Source: POCKET COMICS)

title: The Inheritance
description: Late at night, an unknown woman suddenly appears at In-Hyeok's doorstep. She claims she's the inheritance sent by his father. Obeying every command without question, her presence awakens the dark desires Dominic has been suppressing deep inside...  (Source: DAYcomics, edited)
